Matthew1:1 Abraham ii suan, David ii tu le ta ahi, Jesus Christ ii taanghpupite ii min tepteena lai sia hi bang hi a, Abraham pan David kumpipa dong, a taanghpupite ii minte a nuai a bang ahi hi." 
Matthew1:2 Abraham ta Isaac, Isaac ta Jacob, Jacob ta Judah le a suapuite ahi hi." 
Matthew1:3 Judah in a zi Tamar taw Perez le Zerah hing a, Perez ta Hezron, Hezron ta Ram," 
Matthew1:4 Ram ta Amminadab, Amminadab ta Nahshon, Nahshon ta Salmon," 
Matthew1:5 Salmon ta Boaz hi. Boaz ii nu sia Rahab ahi hi. Boaz in a zi Ruth taw Obed hing a Obed ta Jesse hi. 
Matthew1:6 Jesse ta sia David Kumpipa ahi hi. David pan Babylon khua ah Israel mite salin a kimat hun dong, a nuai a bangin taanghpupite khang kiciamtee hi. David in Uriah zi taw Solomon hing a,"

Matthew1:11 Amon ta Josiah, Josiah ta Jehoiachin le a suapuite ahi uh hi."

Matthew2:2 “Jew te Kumpipa tu in a piang nausen sia koisung a suak ziam,” ci in dongh hi. “Nisuana sang panin ama ii aksi hong suak ka mu uh a, ama bia tu in kong pai uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew2:3 Herod Kumpipa in hi thu a zaak ciang, Jerusalem a om midangte bangma in liinglawng hi."

Matthew4:1 Tua zawkciang Thaa in Jesus sia Doaimangpa ii ze et tu in ngam sungah paipui hi. 
Matthew4:2 Sun sawmli le zan sawmli an ne ngawlin a om zawkciang Jesus ngilkial hi. 
Matthew4:3 Tuasia ciang Doaimangpa hong pai a, “Pathian Tapa na hi le suang hite anluum suaksak in,” ci hi." 
Matthew4:4 Ahihang Jesus in zo a, “Laithiangtho in, ‘Mihingte sia anluum bek taw nungta thei hi ngawl a, Pathian kam sung pan a pusuak kammal khat sim nuntak pui hi,’ ” ci hi." 
Matthew4:5 Tua zawkciang Doaimangpa in Jesus sia Khuapi Thiangtho Jerusalem ah paipui a, Biakinn khuvum a saangbel na ah suanhto hi." 
Matthew4:6 “Pathian Tapa na hile nangma le nangma kitaaksuksak in, banghang ziam cile laithiangtho in ci hi, ‘Pathian in a vantunglalangte nang huvau in sawl tu a, na peang beak zongh suang taw a kisutha ngawl natu in, a khut taw hong domto tu hi.’ ” ci hi." 
Matthew4:7 Jesus in, “Ahihang laithiangtho in, ‘Na Topa Pathian na ze et heak vun,’ zongh ci si hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Matthew4:8 Tuaciang Doaimangpa in mualsaang mama khat ii tungah paipui a, leitung ngam tuatuamte ii letna theampo lak hi." 
Matthew4:9 “Khupdin in kei hong bia lete, hi teng theampo nang kong pia tu hi,” ci hi."

Matthew5:2 tuaciang amate tungah hil tu in kipan hi. 
Matthew5:3 “Thaa thu ah a zawngkhal hunlam a kihete in, mihing lungdamte ahi hi; Vantung ngam sia amate aa ahi hi!" 
Matthew5:4 “A thuum a taute in mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi! Pathian in amate heeneam tu hi. 
Matthew5:5 “A kiniamkhiakte in mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi; amate in Pathian kamciamte a saang tu uh hi! 
Matthew5:6 “Pathian ii tangkalte sep tu a lungngulbel te in mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi; Pathian in a kicing lungkimna pia tu hi! 
Matthew5:7 “Ngual hesuak theite in mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi; Pathian in amate hesuak tu hi! 
Matthew5:8 “Thinsung thiangthote in mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi; amate in Pathian mu tu uh hi! 
Matthew5:9 “Kilemna a vawtte in mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi; Pathian in ka tate ci tu hi! 
Matthew5:10 “Pathian ii deina bang ngamtatna hangin vawtsiat a thuakte in, mihing lungdamte ahi uh hi; Vantung ngam in amate aa hi tu hi!" 
Matthew5:11 “Kei nungzui na hi uh hu in ngual in hong zawngsak hong vawtsia in, ngitlo leilot thu a nanam taw mawna hong zong le mihing lungdamte na hi uh hi." 
Matthew5:12 Na thinnuamsak vun, lungdam vun, banghang ziam cile vantung ah na thaman saan tu hong kikoisak sia lian mama hi. Taanghlai kamsaangte zongh tuabang ma in, na kivawtsia hi." 
Matthew5:13 “Mihingte atu in no sia ci taw na kibang uh hi. Ahihang ci sia a alna a thai le ki alsak kik thei nawn ngawl hi. Tua in kimanna nei nawn ngawl a, kivawkin, mihingte in tuanhcil tu hi." 
Matthew5:14 “No sia leitung bup atu in khuavak taw na kibang uh hi. Mualtung ah a kisa khuapi sia a kiseal thei bua hi. 
Matthew5:15 Mei a det ciang, kuama in kuang taw sincip ngeingawl hi. Inn sung a om theampo a taan natu mun meivakna tungah kikoi zaw hi." 
Matthew5:16 Tuasia bangma in, napha na sep uhte mihingte in a mu ciang, vantung a om na Pa uh a pok natu in, amate mai ah na khuavak uh taangsak vun." 
Matthew5:17 “Moses thukham le kamsaangte hilnate bosak tu in hong pai hong sa heak vun. A bosak tu hong pai hi ngawlin, a khuangkhimsak tu in hong pai ka hizaw hi." 
Matthew5:18 Na theampo ii tawp natu a khuangkhim mateng, simlei le vanpi a kip laiteng, thukham sung a thu nobel khat zongh a bo thong buatu hi." 
Matthew5:19 Tua ahikom, a kuama po thupiakte sung pan a nobel khat ni ngawlin midang zongh tuabangin a nit ngawl natu a hil sia in Vantung ngam sungah a nobel hi tu hi. Tuaciangin a kuama po ahizong thukham ni a, midangte zongh tuabangin a nit natu a hil sia Vantung ngam sungah lian tu hi." 
Matthew5:20 A tatakin kong ciciang, Pathian ii deina bang na vawtna sungah Thukham hil Syate le Pharisee te sangin na thumaan zaw uh le bekin Vantung ngam sungah na tum thei tu uh hi." 
Matthew5:21 “Mihing na that uh le thusitna na thuak tu hi. ‘Mihing na that heak vun,’ ci in taanghlaite kihilna sia na he uh hi." 
Matthew5:22 Ahihang tu in kong ci in ah: a suapuipa tungah a thin uuk pawpo te in thusitna thuak tu hi, a kuama po ahizong a suapuipa ngina ngawl hi, a ci peuma, Council te mai ah kipaipui tu a, a kuama po a suapuipa mannung ngawl mihing mawmaw, a ci peuma hell meikuang sungah a pai tu lauhuai hi." 
Matthew5:23 Tua ahikom biaknatau tungah biakpiakna nei tu in, na kithoai laitakin, na suapuipa in, nang tungah lungkim ngawlna nei hi, ci in na phawk le," 
Matthew5:24 na piak tu vanh sia biaknatau mai ah nusia phot zii ta'n a, na suapuipa taw kilemna vawt phot ta'n, tua zawkciang hong pai kik ta'n a, Pathian tungah biakpiakna nei pheang in." 
Matthew5:25 “Khat po in thu hong vawt a, zumkong hong then le a hun om lai, zum na thet ma in, na kituu uh thu sia saatmit masa tavun. Tua ahibuale ama in thukhenmangte tungah hong then tu a, tuate in palikte munah hong aapin, thonginn sungah hong khum tu hi." 
Matthew5:26 A maan tatak kong ci ciangin, tua na liausum teng a cingin na piak siat mateng thonginn sung pan na suakta thei buatu hi." 
Matthew5:27 “ ‘Nupa kipalngul heak vun’ ci thu na za zo uh hi. 
Matthew5:28 Tu in hi bangin kong ci hi: khat po in numei khat khialpui nopna thin taw a en le a thinsung ah nupa palngul khialna vawt hi zo hi. 
Matthew5:29 Tua ahikom na mit ziatsang in hong mawsak le khelkeak in vawk in! hell sungah na pumpi bup in na pai sangin, pumpi cing ngawlin, om lete phazaw hi." 
Matthew5:30 Na khut ziat sangin hong khialsak le, saattan in vawk in. Na pumpi cingin hell sungah na pai sangin, khutsamh peangsamh in om lete phazaw pek hi." 
Matthew5:31 “ ‘A zi a khul mihing khat pawpo in kikhulna lai pia tahen,’ kici si hi." 
Matthew5:32 Ahihang tu in kong ci in ah: a zi ii thumaan ngawlna simngawl thudang taw pasal khat in a zi khul a, tua nu in pasal dang khat a nei kik le, nupa palngul mawna a vawtsak suak hi. A pasal kik sia zongh in, nupa palngul mawna vawt ahi hi." 
Matthew5:33 “ ‘Na kamciam vawtte ciampeal heak vun. Topa tungah vawt tu a na kamciamnate uh na vawt vun,’ ci in khangluite tungah a kison thute na heaksa uh hi." 
Matthew5:34 Ahihang tu in kong cina panin: kamciam na kipiak uh ciangin kiciamna zangh heak vun. Vantung min lo in na kiciam heak vun, banghang ziam cile tua in Pathian tokhum ahi hi;"

Matthew5:36 Na lutang taw zonghin na kiciam heak in, banghang ziam cile na samzam khat a kaang tu le a vom tu in na vawt thei bua hi."

Matthew5:38 “ ‘Mittang khat luang mittang khat, hatang khat luang hatang khat, ci thu na zaaksa uh hi." 
Matthew5:39 Ahihang kei kong cina pan: no tungah hong khialte na thuk kik heak vun; khat po in na biangkho ziatsang hong beang le na biangkho veisang zongh na ngat vun. 
Matthew5:40 Tuaciang khat po in na laktong khat dei in zum ah thu hong vawt le na laktong puasilh zongh na pia thua lai vun. 
Matthew5:41 Tua mun a ngak ngalkapte in, tai khat vanh pua in hong sawl le, tai nii puaksak vun." 
Matthew5:42 Khat po in na khat hong ngen le pia vun; khat po in na khat hong zawng nuam le zawn vun. 
Matthew5:43 “ ‘Na lawmte it vun a, na ngalte ensan vun,” ci thu na zaaksa uh hi." 
Matthew5:44 Ahihang kei kong cina pan: na ngalte it vun a, hong vawtsiate atu thungetsak vun." 
Matthew5:45 Vantung a na Pa ii tate na sua thei natu in, tuabangin ngamta vun. Banghang ziam cile ama in mihing phate tung le mihing siate tungah a kibangin ni taangsak a, na pha seamte le a sia seamte tung zongh ah a kibangin nguazusak hi." 
Matthew5:46 “No hong itte bek na it uh le, Pathian in banghangin thaman hong pia tu ziam? Shiadongte ngawngawn zongh, tuabangin ngamta kana ngawl ziam?" 
Matthew5:47 Tuaciangin na lawmte bek na paupui uh le, ngualdang taw bang na kilamdanna uh om ziam? Doai biate zongh in tuabangin ngamta kana ngawl ziam?" 
Matthew5:48 Vantung a na Pa uh cialcing ahi bangma in, no zongh na cialcing uh kul hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew6:1 “Biakpiak vaipuakte na sep uh ciangin, mihon ii hong mu tu in, ngual sungah vawt heak vun. Tuabangin ngual sungah na vawt uh le, vantung a na Pa kung pan, thaman khat zongh na nga buatu hi." 
Matthew6:2 “Mihing cimaw khat huna na nei uh ciangin, mihing a kihitheamsakte in lampi liante tung le biakna innte ah a vawt uh bangin, pokngaina taw vawt heak vun. Amate ahile, mihingte pok tu thangai in tuabangin ngamta hi. A tatakin ka ci ciang, amate ii a thaman uh a cing takin kipia zo hi." 
Matthew6:3 Ahihang a cimaw khat na hu uh ciangin, na lawm phabel khat zongh in hesak heak vun." 
Matthew6:4 Tuasia ciangin kuama in hong heakpui ngawl tu hi. Tuaciang a kilangh ngawl a, na nasep hong mu, na Pa in thaman hong pia tu hi." 
Matthew6:5 “Thu na nget uh ciangin a kihisak mihingte bangin ngen heak vun! Amate lamkaa khawng le biakna innte ah ngual mu tu in ding a thungen thanuam uh hi. A tatakin ka ci ciang, amate a thaman uh a cing takin kipia zo ahi hi." 
Matthew6:6 Ahihang no thu na nget uh ciangin, inndoi sungah tumin, inn na kha zawk uh ciang, a kimu thei ngawl, na Pa tungah thungen tavun. Tua hile noma ii heak bek a na ngamtatna uh hong mu na Pa in thaman hong pia tu hi." 
Matthew6:7 “Thu na nget uh ciangin, doai biate bangin, khiakna nei ngawl kammal tam mamate zangh heak vun, amate in thunget sau thethei a zak uh ciangin, a pathiante in za tuan tu in um uh hi." 
Matthew6:8 Amate bang hi heak vun. Na nget uh ma in na Pa uh in, na kitaangsap uh teng hong he siat zo hi." 
Matthew6:9 Tua ahiciang hi bangin thu ngen vun: Vantung a om kote Pa awng: Na min thiangtho ki upat tahen; 
Matthew6:10 na Kumpingam hong piang tahen; Vantung ah na deina a kicin bangin Leitung ah kicing tahen. 
Matthew6:11 Tu ni in ka khamkhop tu an hong pia ta in. 
Matthew6:12 Ko tungah hong khialte ka maisak uh bangma, Kote khialna zongh hong maisak ta in." 
Matthew6:13 Ze etna haksa hong thuaksak heak in a, Ngilopa ii khutsung pan hong tan ta in. Uk zawkna, vaangletna le minthanna Nang aa hi tawntung tahen, Amen." 
Matthew6:14 “Ngual ii note tung a hong khialnate na maisak uh le, vantung a na Pa zongh in, note khialna zongh hong maisak tu hi." 
Matthew6:15 Ahihang ngual khialna na maisak bua uh le na Pa zongh in note khialna hong maisak ngawl tu hi. 
Matthew6:16 “Tuaciang, an na tan uh ciang, a kihisak theamte bangin maikhingin om heak vun. Amate sia a antan hunlam uh ngual heak tu in kipua ngawl lui in om hi. A tatakin ka ci ciang, amate in a thaman uh a cing takin a kipiasa ahi hi." 
Matthew6:17 An na tan uh ciang, na mai uh phiatin na sam uh pot vun," 
Matthew6:18 tua hi le na antan uh hunlam ngualdang in hong he tuan ngawlin, a kimu ngawl na Pa bek in hong he tu hi. Tuaciang, nangma bek heak a na ngamtat sia na Pa in, hong mu tu a, thaman hong pia tu hi." 
Matthew6:19 “Na nei na lamh uhte, nget ii neak tu, a eakseau tu le ngutate in phuul a, a nguk theina, leitung ah noma atu in khol heak vun." 
Matthew6:20 Tua hi zaw ngawlin, na nei na lamh uhte, nget neak thei ngawl, eakseau thei ngawl ngutate in phuul a, a nguk thei ngawlna, vantung ah na khol vun." 
Matthew6:21 Banghang ziam cile na neisate omna munah na thin na lung uh om tu hi. 
Matthew6:22 “Mittangte sia pumpi atu in meivak ahi hi. Na mittangte a ciidam le na pumpi khuavak taw kidim tu hi. Ahihang na mittangte a pha buale na pumpi khuazing sungah om tu hi. 
Matthew6:23 Tua ahikom na sungah a om khuavak sia khuazing hi thong le bangza in zingcip tu ziam? 
Matthew6:24 “Kuama in to nii ii sal hi thei ngawl hi. Ama in khat ensan tu a, khat it tu hi; khat ii tungah thumaan tu a khat puavawk tu hi. Pathian le sum ii sal na seam khawm thei buatu hi." 
Matthew6:25 “Na nuntak thei natu in, an le tuite ahizong, na pumpi atu in puante ahizong, tuate huvau thintoi heak vun, kong ci sia hisia hang ahi hi. Nuntakna sia an sangin manpha zaw kana ngawl ziam? Pumpi sia puan sangin manpha zaw kana ngawl ziam?" 
Matthew6:26 A leang kawkoai vacimte en vun: amate in thai tu ngawl, anla ngawl a, saal sungah an khol ngawl hi; ahihang vantung ah na Pa in, amate vaak hi! Note sia vacimte sangin manpha mama zaw ngawl kana nu ziam?" 
Matthew6:27 Note sung pan thinngimna taw na khan uh bekno khat beak sauzawsak thei natu nu ziam? 
Matthew6:28 “Tuaciang puansilh tu banghangin thintoi nu ziam? Duisung paakte en tavun, bangbangin khang ziam: amate in na le seam ngawl a, puansilh nikteen le vawt ngawl hi." 
Matthew6:29 Ahihang a maan tatakin kong ci ciangin, Solomon Kumpipa in, a hau mama hang, hi paakte za in a hoi puan nei ngawl hi." 
Matthew6:30 Tuni in po a, zing ciang a bo tu meikhuk sung a kihal tu lopa — hi lopa a zeam sia Pathian hi. Ama in no hong zeam zaw tu ahi sia muang ngawl nu ziam? Na nei uh upna sia bangza in no ziam!" 
Matthew6:31 “Tua ahikom, ‘bang ka ne tu a, bang ka dawn tu? bang puan ka silh tu ziam?’ ci in thinngim heak vun." 
Matthew6:32 (Hite sia doai biate ii thinbot thei bul thute ahi hi.) Vantung a om na Pa in, hite theampo na kitaangsap uh hong he nginge hi." 
Matthew6:33 Tua sangin Pathian Ukna-ngam le ama in nang tung pan bang dei ziam, ci sia thupisak masa vun, tua hile ama in tua nadang theampo zongh hong sik tu hi." 
Matthew6:34 Tua ahikom zing ciang atu in, thinngim heak vun; zing ciang in ama khom tu ma thinngimna nei tu hi. Ni sim hong piang thinngimnate belap kul ngawl hi." 
Matthew7:1 “Pathian ii note tungah thu hong khen ngawl natu in, ngual tungah thu na khen heak vun," 
Matthew7:2 banghang ziam cile ngual tungah thu na khen uh babangin note tungah Pathian in thu hong khen tu hi. Ngual tungah na zak uh na ngeina let uh teng ma no tungah hong kizangh tu hi. 
Matthew7:3 Tua ahile banghangin na suapuipa mittang sungah ninteak sia mu thei in, noma mittang sungah thingluang sia thupi laak ngawl nu ziam?" 
Matthew7:4 Noma mittang sunga, thingluang khat om nginge sia, awlmawk ngawlin na suapuipa munah, ‘Na mittang sungah ninteak sia laaksak tong,’ banghangin ci ngam nu ziam?" 
Matthew7:5 No a kihisak minamte awng! Noma mittang sungah thingluang sia la keak phot vun, tua hile na suapuipa mittang sung ninteak sia na laak thei natu in, thiang takin na mu thei tu uh hi." 
Matthew7:6 “A thiangtho nate uite na pia heak vun — amate in noma hong pet kik zaw tu hi. Vokte mai ah na suang manphate na lot heak vun — amate in a peang nuai a siikcil lel tu hi. 
Matthew7:7 “Ngen vun na nga tu uh hi; zong vun na mu tu uh hi; king vun, kongkha hong kihon tu hi." 
Matthew7:8 Banghang ziam cile a ngen pawpo in nga a, a zong khat pawpo in mu a, a king sia kongkha kihon hi." 
Matthew7:9 Pa ahi note khat pawpo, na tate in anluum hong nget uh ciang, suangtum na pia tu uh ziam?" 
Matthew7:10 Tua ahibuale ngasa hong nget ciang, ngul na pia tu uh ziam?" 
Matthew7:11 Na phat ngawl uh kawm panin na tate atu napha piak tu na he uh hi. Tua ahile, vantung ah na Pa in a ngente tungah naphate bangza in hong pia zaw kan tu ziam?" 
Matthew7:12 “Noma tungah hong kivawt le na oai uh bangin, ngual tungah na vawt vun; tuasia in Moses Thukham le kamsaangte hilnate ii a khiakna ahi hi." 
Matthew7:13 “Kongbiang ciak sungah na tum vun, banghang ziam cile hell ngam kongbiang sia zai a, tua mun paina lampi sia tot ol hi, tua lampi a tawn mihing tam mama om hi." 
Matthew7:14 Ahihang nuntakna sung tum natu kongbiang sia ciak a, tua mun pai natu lampi sia tot hak hi, tuaciang tua lampi a mu mihing tawm hi." 
Matthew7:15 “Leilot kamsaangte na up ngawl natu kidawm vun; amate a puatham ah tuu bangin hong pai tu a, a sungsang uh sia ngia hangsan bang hi tu hi." 
Matthew7:16 A ngamtatna uh panin amate na tel tu uh hi. Lingsawl te in, sapitnga ngeingawl a, lingkungte in theipum nga ngeingawl hi." 
Matthew7:17 Thingkung ciidamte in a nga pha nga a, ahihang thingkung ngina ngawlte sia a nga pha nga ngawl uh hi." 
Matthew7:18 Thingkung ciidamte in, a nga pha ngawl nga thei ngawl a, thingkung ngina ngawlte in a nga pha nga thei ngawl hi." 
Matthew7:19 Thingkung khat pawpo a nga a pha buale kiphuk in mei sungah kisep hi. 
Matthew7:20 Tua ahiciang leilot kamsaangte amate nasepna tung pan na tel thei tu uh hi. 
Matthew7:21 “ ‘Topa, Topa’ hong ci theampo Vantung ngam sungah a tum siat buatu hi, vantung ah ka Pa deina bang a ngamtate bek tum tu hi." 
Matthew7:22 Thukhenna Ni hong thet ciang, mihing tam mama te in, ‘Topa, Topa! Na min taw Pathian thuhil in, na min taw doaite tam mama notkeak in, nalamdang tam mama vawt hi ngawl khu ziam?’ ci tu uh hi." 
Matthew7:23 Tuasia ciang, ‘Note hong he ngei bong, Ka kung pan taikeak vun, no misiate awng!’ ka ci tu hi." 
Matthew7:24 “Tua ahikom, kei kammal hite za a, a zaak uh bang a zuite sia suangpi tungah inn sa mihing ciimpa taw kibang hi." 
Matthew7:25 Nguazu in khuanawl hong sua ciang, tua inn vuipi in nawmngawp hi. Ahihang tua inn suangpi tungah kisa ahikom a puk bua hi." 
Matthew7:26 “Ahihang kei kammal hite za napi in, a zui ngawlte sia sen tungah inn sa mihing mawmaw pa taw kibang hi." 
Matthew7:27 Nguazu in, khuanawl suak a, vui in a nawmngawp ciang, tua inn cimhtham hi. Tua in a lauhuai puna ahi hi!”" 
Matthew7:28 Jesus in hi thusonteena a nei zawkciang, mi honpi in ama hilzia lamdang sa uh hi." 
Matthew7:29 Ama Thukham hil syate taw a kibang bua hi; ama in thuneina taw hil hi. 
Matthew8:1 Jesus mualtung pan hong tuaksuk ciang mihonpite in zui uh hi. 
Matthew8:2 Tuasia ciangin a lauhuai vun natna vei khat hong pai a, Jesus mai ah khupdin in “Topa hong damsak nuam po lete hong damsak thei tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew8:3 Jesus in a khut zan a, ama thamin, “Hong damsak nuam khi hi, dam ta'n,” ci hi. Thakhat thu in, pasalpa a natna pan dam hi." 
Matthew8:4 Tua zawkciang Jesus in, “Ngai in, kuama munah son heak in a, thiampipa kungah pai vingveng in, na pumpi vealsak ta'n; na damna thu ngual theampo hong heak natu in, Moses thupiak bangin sangaw biakpiakna vawt ta'n,” ci hi." 
Matthew8:5 Jesus Capernaum khua sungah a tum laitakin, Rome ngalkapmang khat taw kisi a, tua pa in Jesus munah hu ngen hi." 
Matthew8:6 “Topa awng, ka naseampa sia inn ah ciina in lum a, tungh thei ngawlin ngim mama hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew8:7 “Na inn ah hong pai in, damsak tu khi hi,” Jesus in ci hi." 
Matthew8:8 Ahihang ngalkap hon ukpa in, “Topa awng, ka inn sungah nang nong pai tu sia ka kiphu bua hi. A dam natu thu hong piaksak po lete ka naseampa dam tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew8:9 “Keima mama zongh uliante khutnuai ah om a, keima khutnuai a ngalkapte om hi. Khat tungah, ‘Pai in’ ci leng pai a, ‘hong pai tan’ ci leng hong pai hi. Ka salpa munah hi sia seam in ci leng seam hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew8:10 Jesus in hi thu a zaak ciangin, lamdang sa in, a nungzuite munah, “A tatakin ka ci ciang Israel ngam sungah hi bang upna mu ngeingawl khi hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew8:11 “A maan tatak ka ci ciang, nisuana le nitumna panin, mihing tam mama hong pai tu a, Vantung ngam sungah Abraham, Isaac le Jacob taw anneakpoai sungah hong tokhawm tu hi." 
Matthew8:12 Ahihang tua Kumpingam sungah om tu a kilawmte, khuazing sungah kivawk tu a, tua munah kapin ha ngoai in om tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew8:13 Tua zawkciang, Jesus in ngalkap hon ukpa munah, “Va cia ta'n, na upna bangin hong kivawtsak tu hi,” ci hi. Tuaciang ngalkap hon ukpa naseampa tua hun laitak ma in dam hi." 
Matthew8:14 Jesus in Peter inn ah pai a, tua munah Peter sunghnu a ci suukin lupna tungah om mu hi." 
Matthew8:15 Jesus in Peter sunghnu khut thamsak hi; a cisa natna dam a, tho in Jesus zindo hi." 
Matthew8:16 Nitak ciang mihingte in Jesus kungah doaivei tam mama hong paipui uh hi. Jesus in thaa ngilote kammal khat taw notkeak a, tuaciang ciina theampo damsak hi." 
Matthew8:17 “Ama mama in ih natna satnate hong puaksak a, ih ciluang natna hong laakkeaksak hi,” ci in Isaiah kamsaangpa ci teng a taangtun natu in seam ahi hi." 
Matthew8:18 Jesus in a kiim a mihonpite a mu ciang, a nungzuite munah tuili ngalkhat ah a pai natu in sawl hi." 
Matthew8:19 Thukhamhil sya khat in, “Sya awng, na paina po ah paikhawm tu in, ka kinging hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew8:20 Jesus in, “Ngiate in kua nei a, vacimte in bu nei uh hi. Ahihang Mihing Tapa in lup natu le, tawlngak natu a nei bua hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Matthew8:21 A nungzui ngei dang khat in, “Topa awng, hong ciasak ta'n a, ka pa na vui phot tong,” ci hi." 
Matthew8:22 Jesus in, “Hong zui ta'n, mithite in amate ii mithi vui tahen,” ci hi." 
Matthew8:23 Jesus ngunkuang tung to a, a nungzuite zongh in ama zui uh hi." 
Matthew8:24 Thakhat thu in a kiitakhuai vuipi suangval khat tuili tungah hong va a, ngunkuang sia tui ii a khup tu lauhuai hi. Ahihang Jesus mutthip hi." 
Matthew8:25 Nungzuite a kungah pai in, phong uh hi. “Hong hun ta'n, Topa, thi dektak khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew8:26 Jesus in, “Banghangin tuaza liangin lau nu ziam? Na upna uh bangza in no ziam?” ci hi. Tua zawkciang ama dingto a, vuipi le tuihualte a thim natu in thupia a, tuasia ciangin thim dide hi." 
Matthew8:27 Mihing simin lamdang sa uh hi “Hisia pa bangbang mihing hi thong ziam? Vui le tuihualte ngawngawn in a thu ni hi,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew8:28 Tuili ngalkhat Gadara ngam ah Jesus a thet ciangin, thaan hawng sung pan hong pusuak pasal nii taw kisi uh hi. Hi mihingte doaivei a, kiitakhuai mama ahikom tua lampi tawnin, kuama khualhaw ngam ngawl uh hi." 
Matthew8:29 Thakhatin amate cik-au uh a, “Nang Pathian Tapa awng, ko bang hong law nuam ni ziam? A hun hong thet ma in, daan pia tu in hong pai ni ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Matthew8:30 Tuak nai ah vok honkhat taa uh hi. 
Matthew8:31 Tua ahikom doaite in Jesus munah, “Nong notkeak tu ahile zia lai a vok honte sungah hong tumsak ta'n,” ci in ngen uh hi." 
Matthew8:32 Jesus in, “Pai tavun,” ci hi. Tuasia ciang amate in a omna uh nusia in paisan a, vokte sungah tum uh hi. Vok hon bup liangpangh ah kinuntaw sukin, tuili sungah tuitaa in thi siat uh hi." 
Matthew8:33 Vok cingte tai in khua sungah tum a, tua munah doaiveite tung a thupiang theampo son siat uh hi." 
Matthew8:34 Tua ahikom khuapi sung pan mihingte Jesus taw kisi tu in hong pai tek uh hi; ama a mu uh ciangin a ngam uh panin a pusua natu ngen uh hi. 
Matthew9:1 Jesus in ngunkuang tungah to kik in tuili langkhat ama khuapi ah cia kik hi. 
Matthew9:2 Tua munah mihing pawlkhat in pumzaw pasal khat lupna tungah a lum sa in, Jesus kungah hong paipui uh hi. Jesus in amate upna bangza lian ziam ci in a mu ciang, pumzaw pa munah, “Na thin kiliansak in, ka tapa awng. Na mawna hong kimaisak zo hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew9:3 Tuasia ciangin Thukham hil syate pawlkhat in, “Hisia pa in Pathian zawnsakna kampau hi,” ci in phun uh hi." 
Matthew9:4 Jesus in amate thinsung a ngaisut uhte he ahikom, “Banghangin tuabang thinsiatnate ngaisutin nei nu ziam?" 
Matthew9:5 ‘Na mawna hong kimaisak zo hi,’ ci le ‘tho in a lampai in,’ ci koisia ol zaw ziam?" 
Matthew9:6 Mihing Tapa in leitung ah mawmaisak theina thu nei hi, ci in kong lak tu hi,” ci hi. Pumzaw pa munah, “Tho in, Na luppha luakin, na inn ah cia ta'n,” ci hi." 
Matthew9:7 Pasal pa tho in a inn ah cia hi. 
Matthew9:8 Mihonte in a mu uh ciangin liinglawng uh a, mihingte tungah tuabang thu nei theina a piak hu in, Pathian pok uh hi." 
Matthew9:9 Jesus in tua mun nusia in lamdung zui in a pai laitak Matthew a kici shiadong khat a zum sungah a to mu hi. Tua pa munah, “Hong zui ta'n,” ci hi. Matthew zongh dingin zui hi." 
Matthew9:10 Jesus Matthew inn ah an ne in a om laitak, shiadong tam mamate le a dang a kipuavawk te hong pai a, Jesus le a nungzuite taw an nekhawm uh hi." 
Matthew9:11 Hi bangin a om uh, Pharisee te pawlkhat in mu a, “Banghangin na Syapa uh hi bang mihingte taw an nekhawm ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Matthew9:12 Jesus in za a, “Mihing a ciidamte in syavuan kisamh ngawl a, ciinate bek in kisamh uh hi." 
Matthew9:13 ‘Sangaw biakpiakna ka dei bua a, cikna thuthiamna bek ka dei hi,’ ci laithiangtho ii khiakna sia kan phot tavun. Mihingphate sam tu in kong pai bua a, mawneite sam tu in kong pai hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Matthew9:14 Tua zawkciang, Tuiphumpa John nungzuite hong pai a, Jesus tungah, “Ko le Pharisee te in an tang nithi a, banghangin na nungzuite in an tang ngawlhet ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Matthew9:14 Tua zawkciang, Tuiphumpa John nungzuite hong pai a, Jesus tungah, “Ko le Pharisee te in an tang nithi a, banghangin na nungzuite in an tang ngawlhet ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Matthew9:15 Jesus in, “Mopoai sungah zi neipa a om lai teng a leangnate khuangai thei tu in na um uh ziam? Ni khat ni ciang zi neipa amate sung pan kila tu a, tuasia ciang amate an tang tu uh hi." 
Matthew9:16 “Kuama in laktong puasilh luisa khat puanbek thak taw phaw ngeingawl hi. Tuabangin phaw le puan thak sia hong ton tu a puan lui sia, ekkeak seseam tu hi." 
Matthew9:17 Tuabang ma in savun thawl lui sungah sapittui a thak kithaal ngeingawl hi, banghang ziam cile sapittui in savun thawl hong saantham tu hi. Sapittui buakeak in a thawl lalcip tu hi. Tua hi ngawl zaw in, sapittui a thak sia savun thawl thak sungah kithaal le a nii ma in lal ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew9:18 Jesus in hi bang a pau laitakin, Jew ulian khat hong pai a, a mai ah khupdin in, “Ka tanu a thi zawk hiat bek ahi hi. Ahitazong hong pai lete a, ama tungah na khut nga lete, ama nungta kik tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew9:19 Tuasia ciang Jesus dingin ama zui a, nungzuite in tonpui uh hi." 
Matthew9:20 Kum sawm le kum nii tawntung chibua natna a vei numei khat Jesus nung pan hong pai a, a puanmong tham hi." 
Matthew9:21 “A puan bek ahizong tham leng dam tu khi hi,” ama le ama kici hi." 
Matthew9:22 Jesus hong kingeilee kik a, numei sia a mu ciangin, “Na thin kiliansak in, ka tanu awng! Na upna in hong damsak zo hi,” ci hi. Tua hun lianin, numeinu dam thiang hi." 
Matthew9:23 Tua zawkciang Jesus ulianpa inn sungah tum hi. Mithi vui tu music thiamte le a ngamlum lialua mihonte a mu ciang," 
Matthew9:24 “Na vekpi pusuak vun. Numeino sia thi ngawl hi, a mu hi bek hi,” ci hi. Tuasia ciangin amate in Jesus nuisan uh hi." 
Matthew9:25 Ahihang mihonte a kipusuasak siat zawkciang, numeino ii inndoi tuam sungah Jesus tumin a khut a let ciangin, numeino thoto hi." 
Matthew9:26 Hi thu huvau tua ngamkhen sung bup ah thang hi. 
Matthew9:27 Jesus in tua mun nusia in a pai ciang, mittaw niite in ama zui tu in kipan uh hi. “David Tapa awng, ko hong hesuak ta'n,” ci in au uh hi." 
Matthew9:28 Jesus inn sungah a sungtan zawkciang, mittaw nii ama kungah hong pai a, Jesus in, “No hong damsak thei tu in nong um uh ziam,” ci in dongh hi. “Topa, hong um ung,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew9:29 Tuasia ciangin Jesus in, a mitte thamsak a, “Na up uh bangin piang tahen!” ci hi." 
Matthew9:30 Tuasia ciangin amate in khuamu thei uh hi. Jesus in, “Hi thu kuama tungah son heak vun,” ci in nasia takin khaam hi." 
Matthew9:31 Ahihang amate pai in, Jesus thu, tua ngamkhen bup sungah kizel in thangsak uh hi." 
Matthew9:32 Mittawte a pai zawkciang mihing pawlkhat in, doaivei in a pau thei ngawl pasal khat Jesus kungah hong paipui uh hi." 
Matthew9:33 Ahihang a doai a kinawkeak zawk po ciangin ama hong pau paih a, a om theampo in lamdang sa uh hi. “Hi bang peuma Israel ngam sungah mu ngei bua hing!” ci uh hi." 
Matthew9:34 Ahihang Pharisee te in, “Jesus tungah doaite nawkeak thei natu vaang a pia sia in doaimangpa ahi hi,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew9:35 Jesus in khuapi khuanote ah vakkotin haw kawkoai hi. Synagogue te ah hilna nei in Kumpingam Lungdamna Thu, thuhil in nei a, natna satna namcin le ciluang natna damsak hi." 
Matthew9:36 Mihonte a et ciangin, hesuakhuai sa hi, banghang ziam cile tuucing om ngawl tuuhonte bangin, amate thinngim cimaw in, om uh hi." 
Matthew9:37 Tua ahikom nungzuite munah, “Anlaak tu tam mama a, ahihang lo sungah anla tu, mi tawm hi." 
Matthew9:38 Tua ahikom anneipa tungah, anla tu mi tam mama hong sawl natu, thu na ngen vun,” ci hi." 
Matthew10:1 Jesus in nungzui sawm le niite khawmin, doai ngilo naw theina le, natna satna le ciluang natna theampo damsak thei natu thu neina pia hi." 
Matthew10:2 Nungzui sawm le nii teng sia hi teng ahi hi; a masa phit in Simon (Peter zongh kici) le a suapuipa Andrew, Zebedee ii tate James le a suapuipa John;"

Matthew10:3 Philip le Bartholomew; Thomas le shiadongpa Matthew; Alphaeus ii tapa James le Thaddaeus; 
Matthew10:3 Philip le Bartholomew; Thomas le shiadongpa Matthew; Alphaeus ii tapa James le Thaddaeus; 
Matthew10:4 Minam it pa Simon, le Judas Iscariot kici Jesus leeheakpa ahi hi." 
Matthew10:5 Hi sawm le nii teng hi bangin thupiakna taw Jesus in sawl hi: “Gentile mite ngamsung mun khat pawpo le Samaria te khuapi pawpo ah, pai heak vun." 
Matthew10:6 Tuu bangin a mangthang Israel mite kungah paizaw vun. 
Matthew10:7 Pai tavun a, ‘Vantung ngam hong nai zo hi!’ ci in thuhil tavun." 
Matthew10:8 Ciinate na damsak vun a, mithite na nungtasak kik vun, a lauhuai vun natna veite damsak vun a, doaite not vun. A thongin na saan uh bangma, man la ngawlin pia tavun." 
Matthew10:9 Na zaip sungah khamh, ngunn le taausan sumte pua heak vun." 
Matthew10:10 Nguai an keng heak vun a, puan laih natu le peangdap laih natu keng thua heak vun, ciangkhut zongh keng heak vun. Naseam khat sia a kitaangsap tu teng, kipia tu hi." 
Matthew10:11 “Khuapi khat ahizong, khuano khat ahizong, na thet uh ciang, a sungah tum vun a, no zin hong do nuam khat po zong phot vun, tua mun pan na din kik uh dong, zin kheal heak vun." 
Matthew10:12 Inn khat sungah na tum uh ciangin, ‘Thupha na nga tavun,’ ci vun." 
Matthew10:13 Tua innteakte in, hong saang a, ahile, thupha nga tavun ci a, na paupui nate, tua munah kip tahen, ahizong, hong saang nuam bua ahile tua na piak thuphate dawk kik tavun." 
Matthew10:14 Tuaciang innkuan khat po khua khat po in hong saang nuam bua a, na thuson hong ngai nuam buale, tua mun taisan tavun a, na peang nuai leivuite thin vaset tavun." 
Matthew10:15 A tatak kong ci ciang thukhen ni ciangin tua khua mite sangin, Sodom le Gomorrah khua mite tungah Pathian in hesuakna lak zaw tu hi." 
Matthew10:16 “Ngai vun! Note tuu bangin ngiahon sungah kong tha hi. Ngul bangin pilvang vun a, ngam vakhu bangin cingh tavun." 
Matthew10:17 Kidawm tavun, banghang ziam cile mihingte in hong man tu a, zum ah hong then in, synagogue te ah hong vel tu hi." 
Matthew10:18 Kei hu in note sia ngamukte le kumpite mai ah hong kipuak tu a thu hong sit tu hi. Amate tung le Gentile te tungah Lungdamna Thupha huvau na son thei natu hi tu hi. 
Matthew10:19 Amate in note thu kisit tu in hong aap ciangin, na pau tu uh le na pauzia tu uhte tungtaang ah thinngim heak vun; a hun hong thet ciangin na pau tu uhte hong kipia tu hi." 
Matthew10:20 Banghang ziam cile kammal na pau uhte sia no kammal hi ngawl tu hi; tuate sia na pa ii Thaa tung pan hong pai a, note tungtawnin hong pau ahi hi." 
Matthew10:21 “Mihingte in a suapuite thalup tu in aap tu a, pate zongh in tate tungah tuabang ma in ngamta tu hi; tate zongh in nute pate langpan tu a, thatlumsak tu uh hi." 
Matthew10:22 Kei hangin a kuama theampo in, hong ensan tu hi. Ahihang a tawp dong a thuak zo sia kihun tu hi." 
Matthew10:23 Khuapi khat sungah hong kivawtsiat ciangin, khuapi dang khat ah tai vun. A tatakin kong ci ciang, Mihing Tapa hong pai kik ma in, Israel te khuapi theampo ah na nasep, na khuangkhim zo buatu uh hi." 
Matthew10:24 “Nungzui khat sia a syapa sangin lianzaw ngawl hi; sal khat sia a topa sangin lianzaw ngawl hi. 
Matthew10:25 Tua ahikom, nungzui khat sia a syapa taw a kiban ciangin, lungkim tahen a, sal khat zongh in a topa taw a kiban ciangin, lungkim tahen. Baangkua pabel sia Beelzebul a kici le, a innkuan pui dangte zongh min a sia seseam taw kina tu hi." 
Matthew10:26 “Tua ahikom, mihingte kiita heak vun. Tu laitakin a kiseal theampo kilangh tu a, thuku theampo kipualaak tu hi." 
Matthew10:27 Khuazing sungah kong son theampo khuavak sungah na son kik tu uh hi. Tuaciang a thimtham a na zaak theampo, innkhum tung panin, na thangsak tu uh hi." 
Matthew10:28 Pumpi that thei a, a thaa a that thei ngawlte na kiita heak vun; hell sungah thaa le pumpi a lalcip khawmsak thei Pathian kiita zaw vun." 
Matthew10:29 Banghang ziam cile dangkasan pheak khat taw tonbawm nii kilei thei hi, ahitazong na Pa ii thukimna ngawl taw tonbawm khat zongh leitung ah taak thong ngawl hi." 
Matthew10:30 Note na hi uh le na lu tungah na samzamte dongin hong kisimsak siat sa ahi hi. 
Matthew10:31 Tua ahikom lau heak vun; note sia tonbawm tam mamate sangin manpha zaw nu hi. 
Matthew10:32 “Mihingte mai ah khat po in kei neisa a hina a pualaak le, vantung ka Pa mai ah, kei zongh in tuabang ma in ka pualaak tu hi." 
Matthew10:33 Ahihang mihingte mai ah khat po in kei hong nial a ahile, vantung ka Pa mai ah kei zongh in ka nial tu hi." 
Matthew10:34 “Leitung ah kilemna puak tu in hong pai hi, ci in ngaisun heak vun; kilemna puak tu in hong pai hi ngawl khi hi, namsau khat puak tu in hong pai khi hi." 
Matthew10:35 Tapate in a pate langpan tu a, tanute in a nute langpan tu a, mote in a tonupite langpansak tu in hong pai ka hi hi;" 
Matthew10:36 mihing khat ii a thuak laakbel a ngal sia, ama innkuanpuite ma hi tu hi." 
Matthew10:37 “Kei sangin a nu a pa a itzaw sia kei nungzui tu in kiphu ngawl hi; kei sangin a tapa ahibuale a tanu a it zaw te kei nungzui tu in kiphu ngawl hi; 
Matthew10:38 a kuama po, a thinglamtee kisuanhin ka nung hong zui ngawlte, kei nungzui tu in kiphu ngawl hi." 
Matthew10:39 A nuntakna a nga natu a hanciam khat pawpo sia a nuntakna taan tu hi; ahihang a kuama po kei hangin a nuntakna a taan le, nuntakna tatak nga tu hi." 
Matthew10:40 “A kuama po no hong saangte sia, kei hong saang ahi hi; tuaciang kei hong saangte sia kei hong sawlpa saang ahi hi." 
Matthew10:41 A kuama po in mihing khat sia Pathian thupha puak a hina taw a saang le Pathian thupha puakte ii thaman kihawm tu hi. A kuama po in mihing khat sia mihing pha a hina taw a saang le mihing phate ii thaman ma kihawm tu hi. 
Matthew10:42 Hi sung ka nungzuite sung pan, a nobel khat sia, keima nungzui ahi hu in, tuidam hai khat bek a pia zong a maan takin thaman saang tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew11:1 Jesus in a nungzui sawm le niite tungah hi hilnate a nei zawkciang, tua mun nusia in tua mun taw a kinai khuapite ah hilna le thuhilnate nei tu in pai uh hi." 
Matthew11:2 Tuiphumpa John in a thongtaakna mun panin, Christ nasepnate a zaak ciangin, a nungzuite pawlkhat kamtai in ama kungah paisak hi." 
Matthew11:2 Tuiphumpa John in a thongtaakna mun panin, Christ nasepnate a zaak ciangin, a nungzuite pawlkhat kamtai in ama kungah paisak hi." 
Matthew11:3 Amate in Jesus tungah, “Hong son ta'n, John ii ‘Hong pai lai tu hi,’ a ci sia nangma ni ziam maw, ngualdang khat muangmaw lai tu khu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Matthew11:3 Amate in Jesus tungah, “Hong son ta'n, John ii ‘Hong pai lai tu hi,’ a ci sia nangma ni ziam maw, ngualdang khat muangmaw lai tu khu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Matthew11:4 Jesus in, “Heak kik tavun a, John munah na mu na zaak uh teng son kik tavun:" 
Matthew11:4 Jesus in, “Heak kik tavun a, John munah na mu na zaak uh teng son kik tavun:" 
Matthew11:5 mittawte khuamu in, peangbaite lampai thei a, a lauhuai vun natnate kidamsak in, nangongte khuaza thei a, a thisate kinungtasak kik in, a zawngte tungah Lungdamna Thupha kihil hi." 
Matthew11:6 Kei tungtaang ah a lungmang ngawlte bangza in lungdam ziam!” ci hi. 
Matthew11:7 John nungzuite a cia kik laitakin, Jesus in John ii thu teng mihonte tungah son hi: “Sennealngam sungah om John kungah na pai uh ciang, bang teng mu tu in kimuangmaw nu ziam? Vui ii a kuaikhum lopate khat po ziam?" 
Matthew11:7 John nungzuite a cia kik laitakin, Jesus in John ii thu teng mihonte tungah son hi: “Sennealngam sungah om John kungah na pai uh ciang, bang teng mu tu in kimuangmaw nu ziam? Vui ii a kuaikhum lopate khat po ziam?" 
Matthew11:8 A bangbel mu nuamin kuan nu ziam? Puansilh hoi nawno a silh pasal khat mu nuam na hi uh ziam? Mihing tuabang a, a kizeamte kumpite teenna innpite huang sungah teang bek hi!" 
Matthew11:9 Hong son tavun; bang mu tu in pai nu ziam? Kamsaang khat ahi ziam? Hi tatak hi, na mu uh sia kamsaang thawthong bek hi ngawl hi." 
Matthew11:10 Banghang ziam cile John sia laithiangtho ii: ‘Pathian in, ka kamtaipa na mai ah na lampi hong honsak khol tu in ka paisak tu hi,’ a ci sia pa hi." 
Matthew11:10 Banghang ziam cile John sia laithiangtho ii: ‘Pathian in, ka kamtaipa na mai ah na lampi hong honsak khol tu in ka paisak tu hi,’ a ci sia pa hi." 
Matthew11:11 A tatak ka ci ciangin tuiphumpa John sia a piang ngei mihing khat pawpo sangin lianzaw hi. Ahihang Vantung ngam sungah a om a nobel khat sia John sangin lianzaw hi. 
Matthew11:11 A tatak ka ci ciangin tuiphumpa John sia a piang ngei mihing khat pawpo sangin lianzaw hi. Ahihang Vantung ngam sungah a om a nobel khat sia John sangin lianzaw hi. 
Matthew11:12 John ii thuhil a kipat pan tuni dong tatak ma Vantung ngam in nasia takin zawthawk thu taw sutolna thuak hi, a ngoltol mihingte in laak tu in hanciam uh hi." 
Matthew11:12 John ii thuhil a kipat pan tuni dong tatak ma Vantung ngam in nasia takin zawthawk thu taw sutolna thuak hi, a ngoltol mihingte in laak tu in hanciam uh hi." 
Matthew11:13 John khang dong ma in, kamsaang theampo le Moses thukhamte in, Kumpingam thu huvau son uh hi;"

Matthew11:14 tuaciang amate thuhilte na um nuam uh le John sia Elijah hi a, hong pai tu a kisonkhol sa sia ahi hi."

Matthew11:16 “Tu in, tu hun a mihingte bang taw teengat tu khi ziam? Amate sum zuakna phual a to, patangte taw kibang hi. Pawl khat in pawldang khat te oksan a;" 
Matthew11:17 ‘Mo kiteenna music kong tum uh a, laam nuam ngawl nu hi! Mithi vuina la kong sak uh a, kap nuam ngawl nu hi!’ kici uh hi." 
Matthew11:18 John in an tang a sapittui ne ngawlin hong pai ciang, ‘Ama ii sungah doai om hi,’ mihing theampo in ci uh hi." 
Matthew11:18 John in an tang a sapittui ne ngawlin hong pai ciang, ‘Ama ii sungah doai om hi,’ mihing theampo in ci uh hi." 
Matthew11:19 Mihing Tapa hong pai a, ama in ne in dawnin a om leleau ciang, ‘Hisia pa en vun! Antuangpa, zutuangpa, shiadongte le pawlsung pan a kipuavawkte ii lawmpa!,’ mihing theampo in ci uh hi. Ahitazong Pathian ii ciimna sia maan tatak hi ci in a piang thute panin kilak hi.”" 
Matthew11:20 Jesus ii nalamdang lakna a tamzaw a vawtna khuapite sungah a teang mihingte in, a mawna uh panin, kisiik kik tuan ngawl ahikom, ama in tua khuapite teih hi." 
Matthew11:21 “Nang atu in bangza in lauhuai ziam, Chorazin awng! Nang atu in bangza in lauhuai ziam, Bethsaida awng! Tyre le Sidon khuate tungah note sungah hong kivawt nalamdang laknate kivawt thong le, a mihingte in khau-ip puan silh in, amate tungah vut kithe in, mawna kisiik kikna a lak zawk ngei zo tu hi." 
Matthew11:22 A tatakin ka ciciang, Pathian thukhenna Ni hong thet ciang, note tung sangin Tyre le Sidon khua mite tungah Pathian in hesuakna tam lak zaw tu hi." 
Matthew11:23 Tuaciangin, Capernaum, nang na hile, nangma le nangma vantung dongin kilapto sawm na hi ziam? Hell khuk sungah na kisepsuk tu hi. Nang sungah a kiseam nalamdang laknate Sodom khua ah kiseam thong le tua khua sia tuni dongin kip lai tu hi." 
Matthew11:24 A tatakin kong ci ciang, Pathian thukhen ni hong thet ciangin, note sangin Sodom khua tungah Pathian in hesuakna tamzaw lak tu hi.”" 
Matthew11:25 Tua hun laitakin Jesus in, “Simlei le vantung ii Topa, Pa awng hi thute mihing ciim mihing thiamte tung panin, na sealcip a, bangma he ngawl lai mihingte tungah lak na hikom na tungah ka lungdam hi." 
Matthew11:26 Hi hi, Pa, hi bangin a pian tu sia na deina ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew11:27 “Ka Pa in na theampo kei hong pia zo hi. Pa simngawl kuama in Tapa a tel zo bua a, Tapa le Tapa ii a telsak nop a teal mihingte simngawl kuama in Pa a tel bua hi." 
Matthew11:28 “Vanhngit pua in, a toite theampo awng, kei kungah hong pai tavun, tawlngakna kong pia tu hi." 
Matthew11:29 Ka hakkol la in kisuanh vun, kei tung pan hong kisin tavun, banghang ziam cile keima in cingh in a kiniamkhiak pa ka hi hi; tua ahikom toithaina na nga tu uh hi." 
Matthew11:30 Banghang ziam cile, hakkol kong sot tu sia puak nop a, vanh kong sot tu sia zaang hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew12:1 Tua zawk khuangeingawlin Jesus in Sabbath ni khat zungtaang lo sungah vak hi. A nungzuite a ngilkial ahikom zungtaang huite hiat in a humte ne uh hi. 
Matthew12:2 Pharisee te in hi bang a ngamtat uh a mu ciangin Jesus munah, “En in, Sabbath ni in na nungzuite hi bangin a ngamtat sia ih thukham taw kileebul hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew12:3 Jesus in, “David le a mite a ngilkial uh laitak a ngamtatna thu a ki atte sim ngeingawl nu ziam?" 
Matthew12:4 Ama in Pathian inn sungah a mite taw tum in, amate neak tu a kilawm ngawl thiampite bek neak tu kilawm anluum thiangtho a neakna thu sim ngeingawl nu ziam?" 
Matthew12:5 Tua ahibuale thiampite in Sabbath sim ma in Biakinn sungah Sabbath thukham khial napi in, mawsakna a nga tuan ngawlna thu Moses thukham sungah sim ngeingawl nu ziam?" 
Matthew12:6 A tatakin kong ci ciang, hi sungah Biakinnpi sangin a lianzaw khat om nginge hi." 
Matthew12:7 Laithiangtho in, ‘Thuthiamna ka dei a, sangaw biaknate ka dei bua hi,’ a ci sia he tatak hi le uhte, a maw ngawl khat sia mawsak lalai ngawl tu nu hi." 
Matthew12:8 Banghang ziam cile Mihing Tapa sia Sabbath ii Topa ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew12:9 Jesus in tua mun nusia in Synagogue inn khat ah pai hi. 
Matthew12:10 Tua munah pasal khat sia khut langkhat zaw in om hi. Mihing pawlkhat in, Jesus ii ngamtat khialna encik in, a maw natu zong nuam ahikom hi bangin dongh uh hi, “Sabbath ni in ciina damsak tu sia ih thukham taw kileebul ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Matthew12:11 Jesus in, “Note sungah mihing khat in tuu khat nei le a, tua tuu sia Sabbath ni in dum sungah taaksuk le ama in dum sungah zamh suk in pusua ngawl tu ziam?" 
Matthew12:12 Mihing sia tuu khat sangin manh neizaw pek hi! Tua ahiciang ih thukham in, Sabbath ni in mihing khat pawpo ih hu tu sia hong oai hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew12:13 Tua zawkciang a khutzawpa ii munah, “Na khut vaan in,” ci hi. Ama in a khut vaan a, a khut langkhat sang bangma in, a khut dam thiang hi." 
Matthew12:14 Tuasia ciangin Pharisee te pusuak in Jesus a thalup thei natu vaihawm uh hi. 
Matthew12:15 Jesus in ama a kithasawmna thu a zaak ciangin, tua mun panin ama mundang zuan a, mihon tam mama in zui uh hi. Ama in ciina theampo damsak hi." 
Matthew12:16 Tuaciangin, kei thu kuama munah son heak vun, ci in thupia hi." 
Matthew12:17 Hi bangin a vawtna sia kamsaangpa Isaiah ii a sonkhol sa teng a taangtut natu ahi hi. 
Matthew12:18 “Hi sungah ka tealsa ka naseampa om hi. Ka lung hong kimsak ka itpa ahi hi. ama tungah ka Thaa ka pia suk tu a, tuaciang ama in, ka thukhenna minam tuatuamte tungah thangsak tu hi." 
Matthew12:19 Ama in thu nial ngawl tu a, a au buatu hi. Lampi lian tungah au vazakin thu a son buatu hi." 
Matthew12:20 Ama in a kikuaikhum sa pumpa a thiaktan buatu a, a mit dek tak meiinn zongh a mit buatu hi. Ama in thutang khenna ii zawna a ngasak dong hanciam tu hi." 
Matthew12:21 Tuaciang ama ii tungah minam theampo in lametna nei tu hi”. 
Matthew12:22 Tua zawkciang mihing pawlkhat in Jesus kungah doai a vei hu in mittaw a, a pau thei ngawl pasal khat hong paipui uh hi. Khuamu thei a, a pau thei natu in, Jesus in damsak hi." 
Matthew12:23 Jesus sep teng a mu uh ciang mipite in lamdang sa uh hi. Amate in, “David tapa hi takpi tu ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Matthew12:24 Pharisee te in hi thu a zaak uh ciang “Doaite a ukpa Beelzebul in ama ii vaangletna pia a tua hu in doaite notkeak thei hi thong zam,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew12:25 Jesus in amate khua ngaisutnate tel ahikom amate tungah, “Ngam khat pawpo pawl tuatuamin kikhen hen a, kidawdo le tua ngam a kip ngei buatu hi. Khuapi khat ahizong innkuan khat ahizong, pawl tuatuamin kikhenin, kihau siasua le a kitamhtham tu hi." 
Matthew12:26 Tua ahikom Satan ngamsung zongh ah pawl tuam khat in, a dang pawltuam dangkhatte do in a om uh le Satan ngam a kikhen tham hi zo a, hai ngawlin zaantham tu hi." 
Matthew12:27 Beelzebul hong piak vaangletna taw doaite notkeak hi hong ci nu hi. Pha hi, tua ahile na nungzuite akua in doai nawkeak theina vaang pia ziam? Na nungzuite ngamtatna panin, na khial hunlam kitel hi!" 
Matthew12:28 Hi ngawl hi. Doai nawkeak natu vaangletna hong pia sia Beelzebul hi ngawl a Pathian Thaa ahi hi. Tua ahikom hi thu mama in, Pathian Ngam sia note tungah hong theng zo hi,” ci in kitelsak hi." 
Matthew12:29 “Kuama in mihing thahatpa inn sungah tumin, a neisa ol takin a laaksak thei bua hi, tua mihing a thahatpa sia a letheen cip phot kul hi. A letheen zawkciang bekma in, a inn kiphuul thei pheang tu hi." 
Matthew12:30 “Khat pawpo kei sang a hong pang ngawl sia in kei hong langpan pa ahi hi; khat pawpo hong kaikhawm pui ngawl sia in, a thezau tatak pa ahi hi." 
Matthew12:31 Hi thu hangin kong ci in ah, mihingte mawna le kamsia paunate kimaisak thei hi; ahizong Thaa Thiangtho sonsiate kimaisak zo ngawl tu hi." 
Matthew12:32 Mihing Tapa a sonsiate kimaisak thei hi; ahihang Thaa Thiangtho a sonsiate tu hun ahizong, maisang a tawntung ahizong kimaisak ngawl tu hi." 
Matthew12:33 “Thingnga pha a pian natu in, thingkung ciidam kul hi; thingkung ciidam ngawlte panin thingnga mannung ngawlte piang hi. Thingkungte a nga panin kihe hi." 
Matthew12:34 No ngul ngilo suante awng — mihing ngilote na hi uh ciang, bangbangin thupha son thei tu nu ziam? Banghang ziam cile thinsung pan a, a dimleet teng sia kam panin kipau ahi hi." 
Matthew12:35 Mihing phate in a thinsung a ngaisutna pha a kholsa te sung panin pau uh a; mihing ngilote in a thinsung thusia a kholte panin kamsia pau hi. 
Matthew12:36 “A tatakin kong ci ciang, Thukhenna Ni ciangin, mihing sim in, phattuamna hong pia ngawl kammal khat a paute tungtawnin, thusitna thuak tu hi." 
Matthew12:37 Noma kammalte mama in, na maw uh le na tan uh thu hong khen tu hi.”" 
Matthew12:38 Tua zawkciangin Thukham hil syate le Pharisee te pawlkhat in, “Syapa awng, nalamdang lakna na vawt ka mu nuam uh hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew12:39 Jesus in, “Tu hun mihingte sia, bangzata in sia a, Pathian nei ngawl ziam! Nalamdang lakna hong ngen na hi uh ziam? Hong pia ngawl tu khi hi! No tung a hong kipia tu nalamdang lakna in kamsaangpa Jonah, nalamdang lakna sia bek hi tu hi." 
Matthew12:40 Jonah in sun thum le zan thum ngasa lian ii ngil sungah a om bangin, Mihing Tapa zongh sun thum le zan thum leithukna sungah om tu hi." 
Matthew12:41 Thukhenna Ni ciangin Nineveh khua mite hong ding tu a, note hong mawsak tu hi, banghang ziam cile amate in Jonah thuhilna a zaak uh ciangin a mawna uh pan kisiik kik hi; a maan tak kong ci ciang in hi sungah Jonah sangin a lianzaw khat om hi." 
Matthew12:42 Thukhenna Ni ciangin, Sheba kumpinu zongh hong ding tu a, note hong mawsak tu hi, banghang ziam cile, ama in a khuala mama ngam pek pan in, Solomon kumpipa ciimna taw thuhilna ngai tu in khual hong haw hi; a maan tak kong ci ciangin, hi lai ah Solomon kumpipa sangin a lianzaw khat om hi." 
Matthew12:43 “Mihing khat sung pan doai ngilo khat sia a pusua ciang a tawlngak natu zongin, munko ngawtaakna ngam ah vak kawkoai hi." 
Matthew12:44 A mu ngawl ciang, ‘Ka inn zuan kik ka heu tong,’ ama le ama kici a, a inn ah a cia kik le a inn awng a, kipua thiang sa in a om mu hi."

Matthew13:6 Ahihang ni a sat ciangin ankung note kaanghlum hi; zung thuk tha ngawl ahikom, ankungte ko ngawtaak cip hi."

Matthew13:16 “Note na hi uh le bangza in hampha nu ziam! Na mittangte khuamu uh a, na bilte in khuaza uh hi."

Matthew13:33 Jesus in thusonteena dang khat ma son lai hi: “Vantung ngam thu hi bang hi. Numei khat in tol tawm la in anvui khum khat dim taw hel a, a vekpi in hong pawm hi.”"

Matthew14:13 Jesus in John thute a zaak ciangin, ngunkuang khat sungah to in, a ngamkhingna mun khat ah ama nguakin pai hi. Mipite in tua thu za ahikom a khuapi uh nusia in leilam panin ama zui uh hi."

Matthew14:16 “Amate paisak kul bo, amate neak tu an note in pia vun,” ci hi."

Matthew14:20 mi sim in ne in kham tek uh hi. Tua zawkciangin nungzuite in, a kham vaal uh khum sawm le khum nii dim in seng uh hi." 
Matthew14:21 Numei le patang simngawl, pasal an ne sia tulnga bang pha uh hi."

Matthew14:26 Tui tungah a pai a mu ciangin, amate patau mama uh hi. “Thithaa hi tu hi!” ci in lau in ciik au uh hi."

Matthew14:28 Tuasia ciangin Peter in, “Topa na hi takpi le nangma kung tui tungah kong pai thei natu in thu hong pia ta'n,” ci hi." 
Matthew14:29 “Hong pai ta'n!” Jesus in ci hi. Tua ahikom Peter sia ngunkuang sung pan pusuak a, tui tung Jesus kungah lampai tu in kipan hi." 
Matthew14:30 Ahihang vui va ngawp sia a mu ciangin lau in tui sungah taaksuk tu in kithoai hi. “Topa hong hun ta'n!” ci in au hi.

Matthew15:4 Banghang ziam cile Pathian in, ‘Na pa le na nu zakta vun’. Tuaciang ‘A pa ahibuale a nu a haamsiat pawpo sia thalupna thuak tahen,’ kici hi." 
Matthew15:5 Mihing khat in a pa ahibuale a nu a hu natu a, a kizangh thei na khat pawpo sia, ‘Hi sia Pathian atu a kipiasa hi’ ci pole," 
Matthew15:6 a pa zatak vawt kul nawn ngawl hi, ci in thuhil nu hi. Hi bangin noma le noma na kihilna te na zui uh ciangin, Pathian thupiaknate paltan na hi uh hi." 
Matthew15:7 No a kihitheamsakte awng! no huvau Isaiah ii sonkholnate bangza in maan ziam!

Matthew15:10 Tuaciang Jesus in mihonpite samin hi bangin ci hi, “Ngai vun a, tel tavun!"

Matthew15:23 Ahihang Jesus in ama kam khat zongh a paupui bua hi. A nungzuite hong pai a, “Ama ciasak in! Ama in ei hong zui a, au tawntung hi!” ci uh hi."

Matthew15:32 Jesus in a nungzuite samin “Hi mihingte hu in ka thinnuam ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile, tu in ni thum pha zo a, bangma neak tu nei ngawl hi. Anvaak phot ngawlin cia thongsak nuam ngawl khi hi, banghang ziam cile, a inn uh a zot ciang lampi ah ngilkial in pukhong siat tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew15:33 Nungzuite in, “Hi sennealngam sungah mihing hiza neakkhom tu an, koisung pan nga thong tu khu ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Matthew15:34 “Anluum bangza nei nu ziam?” ci in Jesus in dongh hi. “Anluum sali le ngasa no tawm nei ung,” ci in zo uh hi."

Matthew15:36 Tuasia ciang Jesus in anluum sali le ngasate la in, Pathian tungah lungdam a ko zawkciang, balneen in a nungzuite pia hi; tuaciang in nungzuite in mipite pia sawn uh hi." 
Matthew15:37 Amate theampo in ne uh a, kham tek uh hi. Nungzuite in a kham vaal uh khum sali dimin seng lai uh hi." 
Matthew15:38 Numei patang sim ngawlin pasal an ne peuma mihing tulli pha uh hi.

Matthew16:1 Pharisee te pawlkhat le Sadducee te pawlkhat Jesus kungah hong paite in ama sia Pathian thukimpui ahile ahi ngawl a tel nopna in, aitaa in, nalamdang lakna khat a vawt tu in ngen uh hi." 
Matthew16:2 Ahihang Jesus in, “Nitum laitakin ‘Van san ahikom, khua pha vak’ na ci uh hi." 
Matthew16:3 Tuaciang zingtuung in ‘Van san a, niim ahikom nguazu vak’ na ci uh hi. Van en in khuahunte sonkhol thei nu hi, ahihang hi hunte taw kisai in limte na khia thei bua uh hi!" 
Matthew16:4 Hi hun ah mihingte bangza in khansia a Pathian um ngawl ziam? Nalamdang lakna hong ngen na hi uh ziam? Vawt ngawl tu khi hi! Jonah nalamdang lakna khat sia bekma note tungah hong kipia tu hi,” ci hi. Tuaciang, amate nusia in paisan hi." 
Matthew16:5 Nungzuite tuili ngalkhat ah a pai uh ciangin anluum a ken tu mangil uh hi. 
Matthew16:6 Jesus in, “Kidawm vun; Pharisee te le Sadducee te ii tol panin kidawm tavun,” ci hi." 
Matthew16:7 Amate kikum uh a, “Hi bang a hong ci sia anluum ih ken ngawl hang ahi ka tawm,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew16:8 Jesus in amate bang teng kikum ci in he a, “Banghangin anluum na nei ngawl uh teng po kikum nu ziam? Na upna uh bangza no ziam!" 
Matthew16:9 Tel thei ngawl lalai na hi uh ziam? Anluum nga baltham in mihing tulnga in a neak lai in, khum bangza dimh kana nu ziam?" 
Matthew16:10 Tuaciang anluum sali sia mihing tulli in bangbangin ne kana ziam? Khum bangza dimh kana nu ziam? 
Matthew16:11 Tua ahile anluum huvau ka sonna hi ngawl ahi hunlam tel thei ngawl nu ziam? Pharisee te le Sadducee te ii tol panin kikeam tavun!” ci hi. 
Matthew16:12 Tuaciang nungzuite in anluum sung a tolte pan a kikep tu thuson hi ngawl a, Pharisee te le Sadducee te ii hilna panin kikep natu son ahi hunlam tel uh hi." 
Matthew16:13 Jesus in Caesarea Philippi khuahui ngamkhen ah pai a, tua munah, “Mihing Tapa sia ngual in akua ci ziam?” ci in a nungzuite dongh hi." 
Matthew16:14 “Pawlkhat in Tuiphumpa John hi hong ci a pawlkhat in Elijah hi hong ci hi, tuaciang a dangte in Jeremiah ahibuale kamsaang dang khat hi vak hong ci uh hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Matthew16:14 “Pawlkhat in Tuiphumpa John hi hong ci a pawlkhat in Elijah hi hong ci hi, tuaciang a dangte in Jeremiah ahibuale kamsaang dang khat hi vak hong ci uh hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Matthew16:15 “Note in kei sia akua hi nong ci uh ziam?,” ci in dongh hi." 
Matthew16:16 Simon Peter in zo a, “Nang sia Messiah, a nungta Pathian Tapa na hi hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew16:17 Jesus in, “John tapa Simon awng, nang sia mihing hampha khat na hi hi! Hi thutak sia mihing chi le sa sung pan nang tung a hong pai ahi bua a, vantung a ka Pa kung pan in, hong kipia thu ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew16:17 Jesus in, “John tapa Simon awng, nang sia mihing hampha khat na hi hi! Hi thutak sia mihing chi le sa sung pan nang tung a hong pai ahi bua a, vantung a ka Pa kung pan in, hong kipia thu ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew16:18 “Tuaciang, a maan takin kong ci ciang, Peter awng: nang sia suangpi na hi hi, tuaciangin, hi suangpi phungkawng tungah ka pawlpi ka phut tu a, thina ngawngawn zongh in a zo zo buatu hi." 
Matthew16:19 Vantung ngam tawtangte nang kong pia tu a, leitung a na khakte vantung ah kikhak tu a, leitung a na honte vantung ah kihon tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew16:20 Tua zawkciang, ama sia Messiah ahi hunlam kuama munah a son ngawl natu in a nungzuite munah thupia hi." 
Matthew16:21 Tua hun panin kipan a nungzuite munah Jesus in thiang takin son a, “Jerusalem ah ka pai kul tu a, upate, thiampi liante le Thukham hil syate tung panin, nasia takin thuak tu khi hi. Hong kithatlum tu a, ahihang, ni thum zawkciang, nuntakna sungah hong kiphongto kik tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew16:22 Peter in Jesus sia samtuamin teih hi. “Topa awng, tuabangin na thuak tu sia Pathian in hong khaam tahen! Tuabang peuma in, nang tungah hong piang heak hen!” ci hi." 
Matthew16:23 Jesus kingeilee in, Peter munah, “Kei kung panin tai in, Satan awng! Nang sia kei mai hong khaktan na hi hi, banghang ziam cile hi khua ngaisutnate sia Pathian kung panin hong pai hi ngawlin, mihing pianzia sung pan hong pai ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew16:24 Tua zawkciang Jesus in a nungzuite munah, “Khat po in kei hong zui nuam le ama le ama kinial in, a thinglamtee pua in, ka nung hong zui tahen." 
Matthew16:25 Banghang ziam cile, a nuntakna a huu nuam sia in taan tu a, ahihang kei hu a, a nuntakna a taan sia in nuntakna mu tu hi." 
Matthew16:26 Mihing khat in leitung theampo a nga zonghin, ama nuntakna a taan le bang meetna nei tu ziam? Meet ngawl tu hi! Ama nuntakna a nga kiksak natu a piak thei khat zongh om ngawl hi." 
Matthew16:27 Banghang ziam cile Mihing Tapa in Pa vaangletna le a vantunglalangte taw hong pai ciangin, ama in mihing khat sim ii a sepna babangin thaman pia tu hi." 
Matthew16:28 A tatak kong ci ciang, hi lai ah a om mihing pawlkhatte ahile, Mihing Tapa Kumpipa in hong pai a mu mateng in a thi buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew17:1 Ni luk zawkciang Jesus in Peter, James le John te unau samin mual tungah paipui to a tua munah amate teng nguak om uh hi." 
Matthew17:1 Ni luk zawkciang Jesus in Peter, James le John te unau samin mual tungah paipui to a tua munah amate teng nguak om uh hi." 
Matthew17:1 Ni luk zawkciang Jesus in Peter, James le John te unau samin mual tungah paipui to a tua munah amate teng nguak om uh hi." 
Matthew17:2 Amate mu tangin meal kikhealna sia Jesus tungah hong piang hi: a maitang sia ni bangin taang a, a puansilhte sia tee velvol hi." 
Matthew17:3 Tua zawkciang Jesus sia Moses le Elijah taw thu son khawmin a om uh nungzui thumte in mu uh hi. 
Matthew17:4 Tua ahikom Peter in, “Topa hi munah ih om sia bangza in nuam ziam? Na uuk le nang atu buk khat, Moses atu buk khat, le Elijah atu buk khat, puanbuk thum kong saksak tu uh hi,” Jesus munah ci hi." 
Matthew17:5 Tuabangin a pau laitakin, a taang meeikaai khat in amate teng tuam a tuaciangin meeikaai sung panin awnging khat in, “Hi sia in ka it ka Tapa hi a, ama tungah ka lungkim hi; a thu na ngai tavun,” ci hi." 
Matthew17:6 Nungzuite in tua aw a zaak uh ciangin, amate sia lau mama ahikom lei ah bokcip uh hi." 
Matthew17:7 Amate kungah Jesus hong pai in, amate tham in, “Tho vun, lau heak vun!” ci hi." 
Matthew17:8 Tua ahikom amate in a et uh ciang Jesus simngawl kuama dang a mu bua uh hi. 
Matthew17:9 Mual tung pan hong tuaksuk kawmin Jesus in, “Mihing Tapa sia thina pan a kithawsak kik mateng hi mukholna sia kuama tungah son heak vun,” ci in thupia hi." 
Matthew17:10 Tuaciang nungzuite in Jesus tungah, “Thukham hil syate in Elijah hong pai masa tu hi banghangin ci ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Matthew17:11 Jesus in, “Elijah sia hong pai masa takpi tu hi, tuaciang in ama in na theampo kithoai sa in koi tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew17:12 “A tatakin ka ci ciang, Elijah hong pai zo a, ahihang mihingte in ama tel ngawl ahikom, ama tungah a uuk uh bang tek po in, ngamta uh hi. Tuasia bangma in, amate in Mihing Tapa zongh vawtsia tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew17:13 Tuasia ciangin a nungzuite in ama sia Tuiphumpa John huvau son hi ta a, ci in tel uh hi." 
Matthew17:13 Tuasia ciangin a nungzuite in ama sia Tuiphumpa John huvau son hi ta a, ci in tel uh hi." 
Matthew17:14 Mihonpite kungah amate hong heaksuk kik zawkciangin pasal khat Jesus kungah pai a, a mai ah khupdin in," 
Matthew17:15 “Topa, ka tapa hong hesuaksak ta'n! Ama butthi thei a, kaikin in, mei sungah ahibuale tui sungah puksuk thei hi." 
Matthew17:16 Na nungzuite kungah ka paipui uh hangin, amate in damsak thei ngawl uh hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew17:17 “Bangza ta in upna nei ngawlin a khial mihingte hi nu ziam! No taw bang tan vei hong omkhawm tu khi ziam? A bang tanvei hong dual zo tu khi ziam? Patang sia keima kungah hong paipui tavun!” ci hi. 
Matthew17:18 Jesus in doai tungah thupia a, tuasia ciangin patang sung pan doai pusuak a, tua hun lian ma in a patang sia dam hi." 
Matthew17:19 Tua zawkciang amate nguakin a om laitak, nungzuite Jesus kungah hong pai a, “Banghangin doai hi sia notkeak thei ngawl khu ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Matthew17:20 Jesus in, “Banghang ziam cile noma in upna kicing nei ngawl nu hi. A tatakin kong ci ciang, ankamhtang cia upna nei hi le uhte hi mual munah, ‘Hi sung panin zialai ah kikhiin in,’ ci in sawl le uhte kikhiin tu hi. Na khat pawpo na vawt thei tu uh hi." 
Matthew17:21 Thungetna le an tanna in, hite pawl notkeak zo bek a, nadang in notkeak zo ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew17:22 Nungzuite theampo Galilee ah hong kikhop uh ciangin, Jesus in amate tungah, “Mihing Tapa sia mihingte khut sungah thalup tu in ki aap dektak zo hi." 
Matthew17:23 Tua mihingte in ama sia thatlum tu hi. Ahihang ni thum zawkciangin ama nuntakna sungah kiphongto kik tu hi,” ci hi. Nungzuite sia khuangai mama uh hi." 
Matthew17:24 Capernaum khua ah Jesus le a nungzuite hong thet uh ciangin, Biakinn atu shiadongte hong pai a, Peter munah, “Na syapa in Biakinn atu shia a pia ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Matthew17:25 “Pia hi,” ci in Peter in zo hi. Peter inn sungah a tum zawkciang, Jesus pau masa a “Simon awng, nang ngaisutna bangbang ahi ziam? Hi leitung kumpite tungah akua bangte in sum zuakna tung pan shia pia ziam? Ngamsung mite in pia ziam maw ngamdangmite in pia ziam?” ci hi." 
Matthew17:26 “Ngamdangmite in pia hi,” Peter in ci hi. “Pha hi, tua ahile ngamsung mite in piak kul ngawl hi." 
Matthew17:27 Ahihang mihingte thin uuksak nuam bua hing. Tua ahikom tuili ah va pai ta'n a, ngasa tangthaak ta'n. Ngasa a awk phitbel sia manin, a kam sung en lete, dangkatang khat om tu hi. Biakinn shia piak tu in kei atu le nang atu kicing tu hi. Va la ta'n a, ih shiate amate va pia ta'n,” ci hi." 
Matthew18:1 Tua hun laitakin a nungzuite sia Jesus kungah hong pai a, “Vantung ngam sungah akua lianbel ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Matthew18:2 Tua ahikom Jesus in patang khat samin, amate mai ah dingsak a," 
Matthew18:3 “A tatakin kong ci ciang kikheal in patangte bang na suak bua uh le Vantung ngam sungah na tum thei buatu uh hi. 
Matthew18:4 Vantung ngam sungah a lianbel sia in, ama le ama kiniamkhiak a, hi patang bang ahite ahi hi." 
Matthew18:5 Tuaciangin hi bang patang khat kei min taw a saangte in, keima hong saang ahi hi." 
Matthew18:6 “Mihing khat po in patang khat ii kei hong upna a lalsak le, tua pa ngawng ah an ngoaina suangpheak kikhii in tuipi thukna sungah kikhiasuk le phazaw hi." 
Matthew18:7 Mihingte upna a lalsak thei nate om ahikom, hi leitung atu bangza in kiitakhuai ziam? Tuabangte sia hong piang tawntung tu hi, ahihang tuabang a piangsakte atu in, bangza in lauhuai ziam?" 
Matthew18:8 “Na khut ahibuale na peang in, na upna hong taansak le saattan in vawk in! Tawntung meikuang sungah khutcing peangcing hong kibum sangin, nuntakna sungah khutsamh peangsamh in tum lete phazaw hi." 
Matthew18:9 Tuaciang mittang khat in na upna hong taansak le, khelkeak in vawk in! Hell meikuang sungah mittangte ngeal taw hong kibumsuk sangin mittang langkhat sel in, nuntakna sungah tum lete nang atu in, phazaw hi." 
Matthew18:10 “Hi patang khat po na zawnsak ngawl natu in, na kidawm vun. Amate ii vantunglalangte sia ka Pa omna munah om tek nginge hi, ci in hong son ka hi hi." 
Matthew18:11 Banghang ziam cile Mihing Tapa sia a bote hun tu in hong pai ahi hi. 
Matthew18:12 “Mihing khat in tuu zakhat a nei sung pan, tuu khat a bosua sia in bang law tu in na um uh ziam? Ama in a om lai tuu sawmkua le kua mual tungah taasakin nusia a, a bosua tuu sia zong tu in kuan hi." 
Matthew18:13 Ama in tua tuu a bosua sia a mu ciangin, a bo ngawl sawmkua le kua tungah a lungdamna sangin, hi a bosua tuu khat tungtaang ah lungdam zaw tu hi." 
Matthew18:14 Tuabang ma in vantung a na Pa in, hi patangte khat po a bo tu sia a oai bua hi." 
Matthew18:15 “Na suapuipa in nang tungah hong khial le, va pai ta'n a, ama khialna teng lak ta'n. Noma tuamin kilemtua tavun. Na thu hong ni a ahile na suapuipa na nga kik zo hi." 
Matthew18:16 Ahihang hong ni nuam buale, ngualdang khat le nii mai ah son pui in, tua hile laithiangtho ci bangin, ‘na mawsakna teng sia mihing nii le a tamzaw in tetti in hong pang tu hi.’" 
Matthew18:17 Tuaciangin amate zongh in, a sonpui thei bua lai le, pawlpi bup mai ah a vekpi in son siat tavun. Pawlpi thu zongh a ni nuam bua ahile, ama sia doai biate khat bang ahizong, shiadongpa bang ahizong ngaisun tavun." 
Matthew18:18 “Tua ahikom na vekpi tungah hong ci khi hi: leitung ah na kha uhte vantung zongh ah kikhak tu hi; leitung ah na hon uhte vantung zongh ah kihon tu hi. 
Matthew18:19 “Thudang kong son lai natu panin, mihing nii in leitung ah na khat pawpo tungtaang ah thukim in thu a ngen uh le, vantung ka Pa in hong vawtsak tu hi." 
Matthew18:20 Banghang ziam cile ka min taw nii le thum kikhopna sungah amate taw ka omkhawm hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew18:21 Tuaciang Peter in Jesus kungah pai a, “Topa, ka suapuipa in ka tungah hong khial kikik le bang tanvei maisak tu khi ziam? Salivei dong ziam?” ci hi." 
Matthew18:22 “Salivei dong hi ngawlin, sali mun sawmsalivei dong, maisak in,” Jesus in ci hi." 
Matthew18:23 “Banghang ziam cile Vantung ngam sia hi bang ahi hi. Khatvei lai in kumpipa khat in a naseamte sazian sit tu in khensat hi. 
Matthew18:24 Hi bangin vawt tu a kipat ciangin, amate sung panin, talen awn tam mama leiba nei khat hong kipaipui hi." 
Matthew18:25 Naseampa in a liau tu sum nei ngawl hi. Tua ahikom Kumpipa in, tua pa ii zi taw a tate taw a neisa theampo taw sila a zuak tu in thupia hi. A leiba kilo natu ahi hi." 
Matthew18:26 Kumpipa mai ah naseampa khupdin hi. ‘Thinsau takin hong ngak lai ta'n, kong bat theampo hong lo kik tu khi zam,’ ci in ngen hi." 
Matthew18:27 Kumpipa zongh in ama sia khuangaihuai sa in, a leiba teng maisakin ciasak hi." 
Matthew18:28 “Tuaciangin tua naseampa pusuak in, ama tungah sum tawm a ba naseam dang khat taw kisi uh hi. Tua pa sia manin a tawlsaan a, ‘Sum nong bat teng hong lo ta'n,’ ci hi." 
Matthew18:29 A naseppuipa in a mai ah bokin ‘Thinsau takin hong ngak lai ta'n; sum kong bat teng hong lo siat tu khi zam,’ ci hi." 
Matthew18:30 Ahizong ama in za nuam ngawlin, a leiba a lo siat dong thong sungah khum hi." 
Matthew18:31 Naseam dangte in, thupiang teng a mu ciangin, a thinnuam ngawlin, kumpipa kungah pai in thupiang theampo son uh hi." 
Matthew18:32 Tua ahikom ama in naseampa sam a, ‘Nang a mannung ngawl silapa awng, ka tungah nong bat theampo hong maisak ta'n ci in nong nget hu in, hong maisak siat khi hi." 
Matthew18:33 Nang kong hesuak bangin, na naseppuipa na hesuak tu kilawm hi ngawl ziam?’ ci hi." 
Matthew18:34 Kumpipa thin uuk mama a, naseampa in ama tungah a bat theampo a lo siat dong thongtaak tu in puak hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew18:35 Jesus in a thukhupna ah, “Na thin tak taw na suapuipa na maisak buale vantung ah a om ka Pa in mihing sim tungah tuabangin hong vawt tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew19:1 Jesus in hi teng a ci zawkciang, Galilee ngam nusia in Jordan ngun ngalkhat Judea ngam ah pai hi." 
Matthew19:1 Jesus in hi teng a ci zawkciang, Galilee ngam nusia in Jordan ngun ngalkhat Judea ngam ah pai hi." 
Matthew19:2 Mihonpi in zui a, tua munah amate damsak hi." 
Matthew19:3 Pharisee te pawlkhat in, ama aitaa nuam ahikom hi bangin dongh uh hi. “Pasal khat in a zi sia bang thu po taw ahizong a khul nuam le khul thei hi ci thu, ih thukham in a oai ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Matthew19:4 “A kipatciil in Bitphuapa in mihing sia pa khat le numei khat vawt hi, ci in a ki at laithiangtho sia sim ngeingawl nu ziam?" 
Matthew19:5 Tuaciangin hi thu hangin, ‘Pasal in a pa le a nu nusia tu a, a zi taw kingawm in, amate ngeal sia khat suak tu hi,’ Pathian in ci hi." 
Matthew19:6 “Tua ahikom amate sia nii hi nawn ngawlin khat suak hi. Tua ahikom Pathian ii ngawmsa sia mihing in khen thei ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew19:7 Pharisee te in, “Tua ahile banghang Moses in, Pasal in a zi a khul le kikhulna lai pia tahen, ci in thukham vawt ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Matthew19:8 Jesus in, “Moses in zi khul thei natu thu hong pia hi, banghang ziam cile noma sia hil hak mama nu hi. Ahihang bitphua ciil hunin tuabang thu om ngawl hi." 
Matthew19:9 A tatakin kong ci ciang, pasal khat in a zi sia, vaang kitan ngawlna simngawl, thudang taw a khul a, numei dang a teenpui le ama in palngul mawna vawt ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew19:10 A nungzuite in ama tungah, “Pasal le zi kilaklaw ah ngamtat natu sia tu a bang ahi thong le kiteang bualeang phazaw hi,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew19:11 Jesus in, “Hi kihilna sia mihing theampo atu kici ngawl a, Pathian ii piakte atu bek hi:" 
Matthew19:12 Banghang ziam cile pate ii zi a nei thei ngawl natu thu tam mama om hi; pawlkhat sia a nei thei ngawl tu in piang hi; pawlkhat sia ngual in tuabang tu ma in vawt hi; tuaciang pawlkhat in Vantung ngam thu hangin nei ngawl hi. Hi kihilna a saang theite in, tuabangin ngamta tahen,” ci hi." 
Matthew19:13 Mihing pawlkhat in patangte tungah khut nga a, thungetsak tu in Jesus kungah paipui uh hi; ahihang nungzuite in tua mihingte teih hi." 
Matthew19:14 Jesus in, “Patangte ka kungah hong pai tahen, khaam heak vun, banghang ziam cile Vantung ngam sia tuabangte atu ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew19:15 Amate tungah a khut nga a tua zawkciangin paisan hi. 
Matthew19:16 Khatvei lai in Jesus kungah pasal khat hong pai hi. “Sya awng, tawntung nuntakna nga natu in, bang nasep pha ka seam tu ziam?” ci in Jesus dongh hi." 
Matthew19:17 “A banghangin naphate huvau kei tungah hong dongh ni ziam? A pha khat bekma om hi. Nuntakna sungah na tum nuam le thupiakte tang in,” Jesus in ci hi." 
Matthew19:18 Ama in “A bang thupiakte ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Jesus in “Mihing that heak in, palngul mawna vawt heak in, ngu heak in, leilot thu taw ngual suanhkhial heak in;" 
Matthew19:19 na pa le na nu zakta in, nangma le nangma na ki it bangin na innpaamte zongh it in,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Matthew19:20 “Hi thupiakte theampo ka zui siat sa hi,” khangnopa in ci hi. “A dang bang ka sep tu kul lai ziam?” ci hi." 
Matthew19:21 Jesus in ama munah, “Na cialcing nuam le, va pai ta'n a, na neisa theampo zuak in, sum na nga teng a zawngte pia ta'n, tua hile vantung ah na hau tu hi; tua zawkciang ka nung hong zui ta'n,” ci hi." 
Matthew19:22 Khangnopa in hi thu teng a zaak ciangin khuangai in paisan hi, banghang ziam cile ama hau mama hi." 
Matthew19:23 Jesus in a nungzuite munah “A tatakin ka ci ciang sumhaute Vantung ngamsung a thet tu sia haksa mama tu hi. 
Matthew19:24 Kong ci kik hi: kalaoh khat phin bilvang sungah a tum tu sangin sumhaute Pathian Ngam sungah a tum tu sia haksa zaw lai hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew19:25 Nungzuite in hi thu a zaak uh ciangin, amate lungmang mama uh hi. “Tuabang hi thong le akua peuma ngupna nga thei tu ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Matthew19:26 Jesus in amate tangtan in en a, “Mihing atu in suak thei ngawl ahihang Pathian atu na khat pawpo suak thei hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew19:27 Tuaciang Peter in, “En in, na theampo nusia in nang hong zui khu hi, bang ka nga tu uh ziam?” ci hi." 
Matthew19:28 Jesus in, “A maan takin kong ci hi. Mihing Tapa sia hong pai tu Khang Thak hun sungah minthanna kumpi tokhum tungah hong to ciangin, no kei hong zui sawm le niite zongh kumpi tokhum tungah to in Israel minam sawm le niite na uk tu uh hi." 
Matthew19:29 Tuaciang a kuama po kei hu in, a inn, a suapuipate, a suapuinute, a pa, a nu, a tate, a leitang khat pawpo a nusiate in, a see zakhat sangin tamzaw in saang tu a, tawntung nuntakna kipia tu hi." 
Matthew19:30 Ahihang tu laitak a masate hong nungkhak tu a, tu laitak a nungkhakte hong masa tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew20:1 “Vantung ngam sia hi bang hi. Khatvei lai in pasal khat in a sapithuan sungah diang tu in, mihing pawlkhat cial tu in, zingtuungin kuan hi." 
Matthew20:2 A kipia ngeiza ngunn dangka pheak khat tek piak tu in, thukim in a cial te sia sapithuan sungah kuansak hi." 
Matthew20:3 Zingsang nai kua sa in sumzuakna a pai ciang, mihing pawlkhat nasep nei ngawlin om mu hi." 
Matthew20:4 Tua ahikom amate munah, ‘No zongh sapithuan sungah diang tavun, a kilawm bangin, nitha hong pia tu khi hi,’ ci hi." 
Matthew20:5 Tua ahikom amate kuan uh hi. Tuaciang sun nai sawm le nai nii sa ciang le nitak nai thum sa ciangin tuabang ma in mihing cial hi. 
Matthew20:6 Nai nga saat dektak ciangin, sumzuakna munah a pai le, midang pawlkhat a ding thawthong mu leleau hi. ‘Banghangin naseam ngawlin ni khat bup hi sungah na hun bosak thawthong nu ziam?’ ci in dongh hi." 
Matthew20:7 ‘Kuama in hong cial ngawl hi,’ ci uh hi. ‘Tua ahile no zongh sapithuan sungah diang tavun,’ ci in sawl hi." 
Matthew20:8 “Nitak ciangin huan neipa in a tha lampuipa munah, ‘Naseamte va sam tavun a, a nitha uh pia ta'n, a khakbel a kicialte pan panin pia ta'n a, a kicial masate pia khak tan’ ci in sawl hi." 
Matthew20:9 Nai nga ciangin nasep kipante sia, ngun dangkatang khat tek pia hi." 
Matthew20:10 Tua ahikom a kicial phitbelte in, thaman saang tu hong pai uh ciang dangka tamzaw nga tu in ki um uh hi; ahizong amate zongh ngunn dangkatang khat tek ma kipia hi." 
Matthew20:11 Amate in a sum saan uh ciang, thacialpa phunsan hi." 
Matthew20:12 ‘A khakbel a kicialte in, nai khat bek seam hi, ko sia nitangtumin sun nisa sungah diang khu hi, ahitazong ko nong piak za ma amate pia ni hi!’ ci hi." 
Matthew20:13 “Tuasia ciang, ‘Lawmte awng, hong ngai tavun, hong theam ngawl khi hi. Ngaisun le uhte ni khat bup thaman tu ngunn dangkatang khat taw lungkim a kong cialte na hi uh hi." 
Matthew20:14 Tu in na ni thaman uh la in cia tavun. A khakbel a kicial hi sia pa zongh, no kong piak za ma pia nuam khi hi." 
Matthew20:15 Keima sum tungtaang ah ka uuk bang po in, zeak thei natu thunei hi kana ngawl khi ziam? Ngo takin ka piakte banghangin eang nu ziam?’ ci in zo hi.”" 
Matthew20:16 Jesus in a thukhupna ah, “Tua ahiciang a khakte masa tu a, a masate khak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew20:17 Jesus in Jerusalem khua sang zuanin, a pai ciang, lampai kawmin a nungzuite munah thu son tuam hi." 
Matthew20:18 “Ngai vun, Jerusalem khua ah ih paito tu a, tua munah Mihing Tapa sia, thiampi liante le Thukhamhil syate tungah ki aap tu hi. Amate in, ama tungah thalup natu in thukhen tu uh hi." 
Matthew20:19 Tua zawkciang Gentile te tungah aap tu a, tuate in selno zazaan in, vel tu a, thatlum tu hi; ahihang ni thum zawkciangin, ama sia nuntakna sungah tho kik tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew20:20 Tuaciang Zebedee zi sia a tate nii taw Jesus kungah pai a, a mai ah kun in huna khat ngen hi." 
Matthew20:21 “Bang nuam ni ziam?” ci in Jesus in dongh hi. “Kumpi na sua ciangin, hi ka tate nii sia khat na ziatsang ah khat na veisang ah, na tosak natu in, kamciam hong pia ta'n,” ci in nupi nu in zo kik hi." 
Matthew20:22 Tapate nii munah Jesus in, “Na nget uh sia bang ziam ci in tel ngawl nu hi. Hi thuakna hai ka dawn tu sia dawn zo natu nu ziam,” ci hi. “Dawn zo tu khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew20:23 “Ka hai sia dawn takpi tu nu hi, ahihang ka ziatsang le ka veisang a to tute sia kei teal thei hi ngawl hi. Hi munte sia ka Pa ii see sa mite atu ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew20:24 Nungzui dang sawm teng in hi thu a zaak ciangin, tua unaute nii tungah amate thin uuk hi." 
Matthew20:25 Tua ahikom Jesus in amate khawmtua a, “Leitung mihing uliante in a khutnuai a omte tungah uk theina thu nei a, lampuite in thuneina theampo nei hi, ci in na he uh hi." 
Matthew20:26 Ahizong hi thu sia note zui tu ngeina hi ngawl tu hi. Note sungah khat in a lianbel a suak nuam le ama sia note ii naseam hi tu hi. 
Matthew20:27 Note sungah lampui a suak nuamte na sila hi tu hi — 
Matthew20:28 Mihing Tapa in ngual na sawl tu in hong pai ngawl a, naseam tu le a nuntakna pia in, mihing tam mamate tan tu in hong pai hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew20:29 Jesus le a nungzuite in Jericho khua a nusiat ciang, mihonpi khat in zui uh hi." 
Matthew20:30 Lampi hui ah a to mittaw nii in Jesus hong pai hi ci in a zaak ciangin, “David Tapa awng, ko hong hesuak ta'n, Topa awng,” ci in au uh hi." 
Matthew20:31 Mipite in amate teih in, a ngamlum ngawl natu in a sawl uh hang, amate a nging seseam in au a, “David Tapa awng, ko hong hesuak ta'n, Topa,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew20:32 Jesus in amate nii sam a, “Bang hong vawtsak leng na uuk uh ziam,” ci in dongh hi." 
Matthew20:33 “Topa awng, khua nong musak tu uuk ung,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew20:34 Jesus in amate sia khuangai huai sa in, a mitte thamsak a; thakhatin, amate khuamu thei a, amate in ama zui uh hi." 
Matthew21:1 Jesus le nungzuite in Jerusalem khua hong nai uh a, Olive Mual, Bethphage a kicina mun hong theng hi. Tua munah Jesus in, a nungzuite nii sawlin paikholsak a," 
Matthew21:2 hi bangin thupia hi; “Na mai a om khuano sia ah pai tavun, tua munah laapui khat kikhii in om thakhat thu in na mu tu uh a, laano zongh a pui kungah om tu hi. A khau suutin a nii in keima kungah hong paipui tavun." 
Matthew21:3 Tuaciang khat po in, bang khat po hong cile ‘Topa in tulmaw hi’: ci po le uhte thakhatin hong tha tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew21:4 Hi bangin a pian theina sia kamsaangpa sonna teng a taangtut natu ahi hi. 
Matthew21:5 “Zion khuapi munah son vun, En vun, na kumpipa no kungah hong pai hi! Ama kiniamkhiak in laa tungah to a, laapui ii ta laano tungah to hi.”" 
Matthew21:6 Tua ahikom nungzuite in Jesus sawl bangin pai in vawt uh hi: 
Matthew21:7 laa le laano hong paipui uh a, a laktong puasilh uh dapin, Jesus sia a tungah to hi." 
Matthew21:8 Mihonpi in a laktong puasilh uh lampi ah pha in a dangte in thingsawl saatin, lam tungah pha uh hi." 
Matthew21:9 Jesus mai le a nung panin a pai mihonte in, “David Tapa minthang hen! Topa min taw hong pai pa tungah Pathian in thupha pia tahen! Hosanna, Pathian in pokna nga tahen!” ci in au uh hi." 
Matthew21:10 Jerusalem khua sungah Jesus hong tum ciang, a khuathing ngamlum lialua uh hi. “Ama sia akua ziam?” ci in mipite in dongh uh hi." 
Matthew21:11 “Hisia pa sia Galilee ngam Nazareth pan kamsaangpa Jesus hi,” ci in mihonte in zo uh hi." 
Matthew21:12 Biakinn sungah Jesus tumin vanh lei vanh zuak theampo notkeak hi. Sum theakte ii sabuai le vakhu zuakte ii tokhumte sawnthalsak hi," 
Matthew21:13 tuaciang, “Laithiangtho sungah Pathian in, ‘Ka Biakinn sia thungetna inn’ kici tu hi, ci hi, ahihang note in ngutate bukna na suaksak uh hi!” ci hi." 
Matthew21:14 Mittaw le peangbai te Biakinn sung ama kungah hong pai uh a, amate damsak hi." 
Matthew21:15 Thiampi liante le Thukhamhil syate in, Jesus ii nalamdang a vawt hu le, patangte ii “David Tapa tungah Hosanna, kipok tahen!” a ci hu in amate thin uuk hi." 
Matthew21:16 Tua ahikom amate in Jesus munah, “Amate in bang teng ci ziam, na za ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Ka za takpi hi, laithiangtho sungah sim ngeingawl nu ziam? ‘A cialcing pokna a pia thei tu in Patangte le nausente na sinsak zo hi,’ ” ci in Jesus in zo hi." 
Matthew21:17 Jesus in amate nusia in Bethany zuan tu in, khuapi puasia ah paisuak a tua munah zantaam hi." 
Matthew21:18 Zingtuungin khua sung sang hong zot kik ciang, Jesus a ngilkial hi." 
Matthew21:19 Ama in lamhui ah theikung khat mu in vil a, ahihang a tee simngawl bangma a mu bua hi. Tua ahikom thingkung tungah, “Nang sia nga kik thei nawn ngawl tu ni hi!” ci hi. Thakhat thu in theikung kongaw cip paih hi." 
Matthew21:20 Nungzuite in a mu ciangin lamdang sa uh hi. “Banghang hi za in kocip paih thei ziam?” ci uh hi. 
Matthew21:21 Jesus in “A tatakin kong ci ciang, um in muang la bua po le uhte hi thei tungah ka vawt bangin na vawt thei tu uh hi. Hisia bek zongh hi ngawlin, hi mual munah, ‘Tho to in a, tuipi sungah kilawnsuk in,’ ci le uhte, tuabang ma in hong hi tu hi." 
Matthew21:22 Na um uh le thungetna taw na nget uh po na nga tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew21:23 Biakinn sungah Jesus heak kik a, hilna a nei ciangin, thiampi liante le upate in, “Hi bang na sep thei natu in bang thuneina nei ni ziam? Akua in hi thunei theina hong pia ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Matthew21:24 Jesus in, “Kei zongh kam khat hong dongh tu khi hi, tuasia nong zo thei uh le a bang thuneina taw hite seam khi ziam cisia kong son tu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Matthew21:25 “John ii baptize piak theina thu sia, koisung pan hong pai ziam? Pathian tung pan ziam maw mihing tung pan ziam?” ci hi. Amate teng kinial uh a, “Bangbang ci tu hi ziam? ‘Pathian tung pan ci tu hi leang, tua ahile banghangin John sia um ngawl nu ziam?’ hong ci tu hi." 
Matthew21:25 “John ii baptize piak theina thu sia, koisung pan hong pai ziam? Pathian tung pan ziam maw mihing tung pan ziam?” ci hi. Amate teng kinial uh a, “Bangbang ci tu hi ziam? ‘Pathian tung pan ci tu hi leang, tua ahile banghangin John sia um ngawl nu ziam?’ hong ci tu hi." 
Matthew21:26 “Ahihang ‘mihing tung pan’ ci thong leang, mipite kiitakhuai hi, banghang ziam cile amate theampo in John sia kamsaang khat hi ci in saang hi,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew21:26 “Ahihang ‘mihing tung pan’ ci thong leang, mipite kiitakhuai hi, banghang ziam cile amate theampo in John sia kamsaang khat hi ci in saang hi,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew21:27 Tua ahikom amate in Jesus munah, “He ngawl khu hi,” ci uh hi. Tuasia ciangin, amate tungah Jesus in, “Kei zongh hite bang thuneina taw vawt khi ziam ci in kong son buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew21:28 “Tu in hi thu bangbang na ngaisun uh ziam? Khatvei lai in pasal khat in tapa nii nei hi. A tapa lianzaw sia kungah ama pai in, ‘Ka tapa awng, sapithuan ah tu ni in na kuan ta'n,’ ci hi."
