Matthew21:29 Ama in, ‘Uuk ngawl khi hi’ ci napi a zawkciangin a thin kikheal kik in kuan hi." 
Matthew21:30 Tua zawkciang a pa in a tapa dang khat sia munah tuabang ma in sawl hi. Tua a tapa in, ‘Pa awng, hi tahen,’ ci napi a kuan bua hi." 
Matthew21:31 Tapate nii sung pan akua in a pa thu ni zaw ziam?” ci hi. “A tapa lianzaw sia in ni zaw hi” ci uh hi. Tuaciang Jesus in amate tungah, “Kei kong ci in ah: Shiadongte le numei paktatte in Pathian Ukna ngam sungah note sangin theng masa zaw tu hi." 
Matthew21:32 Banghang ziam cile Tuiphumpa John hong pai a, thumaan lampi hong hil napi, ama na um bua uh hi; ahihang shiadongte le numei paktatte in um uh hi. Hite na mu zawk ngawngawn in, na thin uh kikheal in na um nuam bua uh hi.”" 
Matthew21:32 Banghang ziam cile Tuiphumpa John hong pai a, thumaan lampi hong hil napi, ama na um bua uh hi; ahihang shiadongte le numei paktatte in um uh hi. Hite na mu zawk ngawngawn in, na thin uh kikheal in na um nuam bua uh hi.”" 
Matthew21:33 Jesus in “Thusonteena dang khat ngai vun,” ci hi. “Khatvei lai in leitang nei khat in, sapithuan khat vawt a, a kiimkot dal vawtin, sapittui suuk natu dum to a, lo hun natu teitaan khat vawt hi. Tua zawkciang a lo tuasia saapthawsak tu in, ngual a aap zawkciang, ama khualhaw tu in ding hi." 
Matthew21:34 Sapit nga law hun ciangin, ama tel tu teng a saang tu in, huanthote munah a silate paisak hi." 
Matthew21:35 Huanthote in silate man a, khat sia saatin, khat sia that uh a, khat sia suangtum taw deang uh hi." 
Matthew21:36 Leitang neipa in a silate a tamzaw paisak leleau hi, ahihang huanthote in a masate tungah a ngamtat uh bangma in, taa kik uh hi." 
Matthew21:37 A khakbel ciangin, ‘Ka tapa buang hong zataksak tu zam,’ ci in, a tapa sawl hi." 
Matthew21:38 Ahihang huanthote in a tapa a mu uh ciangin, ‘Hisia huan neipa tapa hi. Hong pai tavun, thatlum tu hi; tua hile a neisa teng ih tang thei tu hi!’ ci uh hi." 
Matthew21:39 Tua ahikom ama man in, sapithuan pua sangah a lot zawkciang, thatlum hi." 
Matthew21:40 “Tu in huan neipa sia sapithuan sungah hong pai tak ciangin huanthote bang law tu ziam?” ci in Jesus in dongh hi. 
Matthew21:41 “Ama in tua misiate thatlum nanak tu a, a hun zui in, thaw ante, ama saan tu bangin a pia tu ngualdangte tungah sapithuan sia saapthaw tu in aap tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Matthew21:42 Jesus in, “Laithiangtho ci thu sia sim ngeingawl nu ziam? ‘Inn sate ii mannung ngawl a sak a nil suangtum sia a kizanghbel suangtum hong suak hi. Hi thu in Topa ii nasep na hi a; ih mu ciangin lamdang mama hi!’" 
Matthew21:43 “Tua ahikom kong ci hi, Pathian Ngam sia no kung pan in, kila tu a, nga pha a piangsak mihingte tungah kipia tu hi." 
Matthew21:44 Hi suang tungah a taak sia akua po ahizong zaantham in vui tu hi; tua suang sia khat po ii tungah a taak ahile tua pa zaantham in thi tu hi.” 
Matthew21:45 Pharisee te le thiampi liante in Jesus thuson nate za uh a, amate a cinopna ahi hunlam tel uh hi." 
Matthew21:46 Tua ahikom ama sia mat sawm uh a, ahihang amate in mihonpite kiita uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate in Jesus sia kamsaang khat hi ci in ngaisun uh hi." 
Matthew22:1 Jesus in mihingte munah thusonteenate zangh kikin thu son hi. 
Matthew22:2 “Vantung ngam thu sia hi bang ahi hi. Khatvei lai in kumpipa khat in a tapa atu mopoai anneakna khat vawt tu in kipan hi. 
Matthew22:3 Ama in a naseamte sawl a mopoai hong siim natu in, khualhilsak hi. Ahihang amate pai nuam ngawl hi." 
Matthew22:4 Tua ahikom naseam dangte paisak a, khual a kihilte munah hi bang sawl hi. ‘Ka poai sia tu in a kipan thei tu hi zo hi; ka khuital le ka khuino thaute kingo zo hi, na theampo kinging sa in om zo hi. Mopoai ah hong pai tavun!’" 
Matthew22:5 Ahihang khual a kihilte in awlmawk ngawlin amate nasep tek ma sep san uh hi: khat in a lokuan a, a dang khat in a sumbuk ah pai in," 
Matthew22:6 a dangte in kumpipa naseamte pummat a, velin thatlum uh hi." 
Matthew22:7 Kumpipa thin uuk mama ahikom a ngalkapte paisak a, mihing that te thatlum in a khuapi halthapsak hi." 
Matthew22:8 Ama in a naseamte sam a, ‘Ka mopoai kipat thei lian tu in, om zo ahihang ka khualhil sate mopoai taw kiphu ngawl hi." 
Matthew22:9 Tu in lam ziikpite ah pai tavun a, mihing na mu zaza uh sam tavun,’ ci hi." 
Matthew22:10 Tua ahikom naseamte in lam ziikpite ah pai in a mu theampo le mihing pha mihing sia a kibangin khawmtua uh hi; tuaciang in mopoai vawtna inn dim hi. 
Matthew22:11 “Kumpipa sungtang in a leangnate a et ciang, mopoai puan silh ngawlpa khat mu hi." 
Matthew22:12 ‘Lawm awng, mopoai puan silh ngawlin hi sungah bangbangin hong tum thei ni ziam?’ ci in dongh hi. Ahihang tua pa in a zo natu a he bua hi." 
Matthew22:13 Tuasia ciang kumpipa in naseamte munah, ‘Hisia pa a khut a peang sawmcip vun a, doipua khuazingna ah vawk tavun. Tua munah ama kapin ha ngoai tu hi,’ ” ci hi." 
Matthew22:14 Jesus in a thukhupna ah, “Tam mama kisam tu a tawm bek kiteal tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew22:15 Pharisee te pai a, kam doknate taw Jesus aitaa sawm uh hi." 
Matthew22:16 Tua zawkciang amate in, a nungzuite pawlkhat le Herod mihingte pawlkhat paisak uh hi. “Sya awng, thumaan na son hi ci in hong he khu hi. Pathian ii mihingte atu a deisak thutakte, mihingte in bang ngaisun ci patau ngawlin na hil hi. Banghang ziam cile mihingte maitang na zakta bua hi." 
Matthew22:17 Bangbang ngaisun ni ziam?, Rome Kumpilianpa shia ih piak tu sia, ih Thukham taw kisi ziam, kisi ngawl ziam? hong son tan?” ci uh hi." 
Matthew22:18 Ahihang Jesus in amate thinsung ah, thusia a sawmna, he ahikom, “A kihitheamsakte awng! banghangin hong aitaa nu ziam?" 
Matthew22:19 Shia piak tu sumtang sia hong lak tavun,” ci hi. Amate in sumtang a kungah paipui uh hi," 
Matthew22:20 Jesus in, “Hite akua lim le akua min ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Matthew22:21 “Kumpilianpa aa hi” ci in zo uh hi. Tua ahikom Jesus in, “Pha hi, Kumpilianpa sum sia Kumpilianpa na pia vun a, Pathian sum sia Pathian na pia vun,” ci hi." 
Matthew22:22 Hi thu a zaak uh ciangin amate in lamdang sa uh hi; tua ciangin ama nusia in paisan uh hi. 
Matthew22:23 Tua ni in Sadducee te pawlkhat Jesus kungah hong pai uh a, “Mihingte in thina pan tho kik ngawl tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew22:24 “Syapa awng, Moses ii cina panin, pasal khat sia ta nei ngawlin a thi le a suapuipa in meingongnu sia teenpui tahen, tua hile ta a nei uh ciang, mithipa ta bangin, kingaisun tu hi." 
Matthew22:25 Tu in hi sungah unau pa sali om ngei hi. A lianbel sia in zi nei in ta nei ngawlin thi a meingongnu sia, a suapuipa in lua hi." 
Matthew22:26 Tuabang ma in a niina a thumna panin kipan a salina dongin ta nei ngawlin thi uh a, meingongnu lua susuk uh hi." 
Matthew22:27 A khakbel ciangin meingongnu zongh thi hi. 
Matthew22:28 Tu in mithite thaw kik ni ciangin tua numei sia akua ii zi hi tu ziam? A vekpi in ama teenpui ngei tek hi,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew22:29 Jesus in, “Pathian ii vaangletna le Laithiangtho na heak ngawl uh hu in bangza in khial nu ziam!" 
Matthew22:30 Banghang ziam cile mithite a thaw kik ciang, vantung ah a om vantunglalangte bang hi tu a, kiteenna om ngawl tu hi." 
Matthew22:31 Tu in mithite thaw kikna thu, Pathian hong son thute sim ngeingawl nu ziam? Ama in," 
Matthew22:32 ‘Keima in Abraham ii Pathian, Isaac ii Pathian, Jacob ii Pathian ka hi hi,’ ci hi. Ama in a nungtate Pathian hi a, a thisate Pathian ahi bua hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew22:33 Mihonte in hi thu a zaak uh ciangin, a hilnate lamdang sa uh hi." 
Matthew22:34 Sadducee te a pau natu a heak ngawl dongin, Jesus in a koi zawkciang, Pharisee te hong kikhawmtua uh a," 
Matthew22:35 amate sung panin, Thukham hil sya khat in, Jesus sia thudokna khat taw aitaa sawm hi." 
Matthew22:36 “Sya awng, Thukham sung teng pan a lianbel le a thupibel thupiak sia koisia ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Matthew22:37 Jesus in, “ ‘Na Topa Pathian sia na thin theampo, na thaa theampo le na ngaisutna theampo taw it in.’" 
Matthew22:38 Hisia in a lianbel le a thupibel Thupiak ahi hi. 
Matthew22:39 A niina a thupibel Thupiak sia tuasia taw ma in kibang hi: ‘Nangma le nangma na ki it bangin midangte zongh na it in.’ 
Matthew22:40 Moses Thukham buppi le kamsaangte hilna theampo sia hi thu niite kibulphu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew22:41 Pharisee te pawlkhat a kikhop uh ciangin Jesus in," 
Matthew22:42 “Messiah huvau bangbangin ngaisun nu ziam? Ama akua ii suan ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Ama sia David suan hi,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew22:43 Jesus in “Tua ahile banghangin Thaa in David munah, ‘Topa’ cisak ziam?” ci in dongh hi. David in," 
Matthew22:44 ‘Topa in ka Topa munah: Na ngalte na peang nuai ah ka koi dong, hi sung ka ziatsang ah hong to ta'n,’ ci hi." 
Matthew22:45 “David in ama sia ‘Topa’ ci ahile Messiah sia bangbangin, David ii suan hi thei tu ziam?” ci in Jesus in zo kik hi." 
Matthew22:46 Jesus dokna kuama in a zo thei bua uh a, tua ni pan kipan kuama in ama thu a dongh ngam nawn bua uh hi." 
Matthew23:1 Tuaciang Jesus in mipite tung le nungzuite tungah thu son hi. 
Matthew23:2 “Thukham hil syate le Pharisee te sia Moses Thukham a pheen thei tu, thu neite ahi hi." 
Matthew23:3 Tua ahikom amate in vawt a hong sawl peuma ni in zui vun; ahihang amate ngamtatnate zui heak vun, banghang ziam cile amate in a hil uh bangin ngamta ngawl uh hi." 
Matthew23:4 Mihingte ii nungzaang ah vanhngit a puak hakte sia tua mite ma ii sot to ahi hi, ahihang amate in tua vanhngitte puakpui tu in, a khutme dawn zongh a tung nuam bua uh hi." 
Matthew23:5 Mihingte mu tu in amate in na theampo seam uh hi. Amate talki tung le a baante tungah laithiangtho kammal a ki at savun pheakte bangza in beak ziam, en vun! A laktong puasilh mong a teapkaaite zongh bangza in sausak ziam!" 
Matthew23:6 Poai sungah amate tona a nuambelte tungah ahizong, synagogue sungah a kikhaam sa tonate tungah ahizong amate in to nuam saap a;" 
Matthew23:7 amate in vanhzuakna munah ngual ii paupui tu thangai a, ‘Syapa’ ci in a sap tu uuk uh hi." 
Matthew23:8 Note sia ‘Syapa’ kici ngawl tu nu hi, banghang ziam cile note sia unau khat vive hi a, Sya khat bek na nei uh hi." 
Matthew23:9 Tuaciangin hi leitung ah kuama ‘Pa awng’ ci heak vun, banghang ziam cile vantung a Pa khat bekma na nei uh hi." 
Matthew23:10 ‘Lampuipa awng,’ zongh na kicisak heak vun, banghang ziam cile Messiah khat bek ma na lampui uh ahi hi." 
Matthew23:11 No sungah a lianbel sia in note naseam hi tu hi. 
Matthew23:12 Akua po ama le ama a kiliansak sia kiniamsak tu a, a kuama po a kiniamkhiak sia, thupi in kikoi tu hi." 
Matthew23:13 “Thukham hil syate le Pharisee te awng! Note atu in bangza in lauhuai ziam? No a kihitheamsakte awng! Ngual mai panin, vantung Ngam kongkha khaktan nu hi, tuaciang noma mama in a sungah na tum bua uh a, tum nuam in a hanciamte zongh, a tum tu na oai bua uh hi!" 
Matthew23:14 Thukham hil syate le Pharisee te awng! No atu in bangza lauhuai ziam? A kihitheamsakte awng! Meingongte na zothaw uh a, a inn uh na phuul uh hi. Tua zawkciang na thunget a sau mama in na kivawt tawm uh hi! Tua hu in daan na thuak tu sia nasia mama tu hi!" 
Matthew23:15 “Thukham hil syate le Pharisee te awng! No a kihitheamsakte awng! No atu in bangza in lauhuai ziam? Noma upna sungah mihing khat na nga thei natu in, tuipi tungah pai a, ngam theampo kaantan in pai nu hi; tuaciang tuabangin nungzui khat na nga zawk uh ciang, noma sangin hell ngam sungah a zaa nii in theng tu in a kilawm suaksak nu hi." 
Matthew23:16 “Mittaw ngual lamlakte awng! No atu in bangza in lauhuai ziam? ‘Biakinn taw a kiciamte a kamciam a peal hangin phamaw ngawl hi; ahihang Biakinn sungah khamhte taw a kiciamte sia a kamciam bangin a vawt uh kul hi,’ na ci uh hi." 
Matthew23:17 Mittaw mawmawte awng! koisia thupi zaw ziam, khamh hi zaw ziam, khamh a thiangthosak Biakinn sia hi zaw ziam?" 
Matthew23:18 Na kihil thua lai na uh pan, ‘Biaknatau taw a kiciamte sia a ciampeal hangin phamaw ngawl hi; ahihang biaknatau tung a om nate taw a kiciamte sia a kamciam bangin tung tu hi,’ ci nu hi." 
Matthew23:19 Na mit uh bangza in taw ziam! Biakpiak natu in a kikoi nate thupi zaw ziam maw, tua nate a thiangthosak biaknatau sia thupi zaw ziam?" 
Matthew23:20 Tua ahikom mihing khat in biaknatau taw a kiciam le, tua biaknatau le a tung a om na theampo taw ama kiciam ahi hi;" 
Matthew23:21 tuaciang Biakinn taw kiciam ciangin tua Biakinn le a sung a teang Pathian taw zongh kiciam hi si a," 
Matthew23:22 tuaciang khat po in vantung taw a kiciam le Pathian tokhum le a tungah a to pa taw kiciam ahi hi. 
Matthew23:23 “Thukham hil syate le Pharisee te awng! A kihitheamsakte awng! No atu in bangza lauhuai ziam? An mee sungah hel thei lonamsia, masala le thing namtuite dongin, see sawm sua see khat sia Pathian na pia uh hi, ahihang Thukham sungah a kihil a thupi tatak ahi, thukhaikimna, hesuakna le thumaannate na awlmaw bua uh hi. Hite zongh na zak tu uh hi a, a dangte zongh na awlmawk ngawl tu hisaap ngawl hi." 
Matthew23:24 Mittaw ngual lamlakte awng! Na dawn tu uh tui sung pan tho khat po sia nasia takin na chit uh hi; ahihang kalaoh khat na lopvalh uh hi! 
Matthew23:25 “Thukham hil syate Pharisee te awng! A kihitheamsakte awng! No atu in bangza lauhuai ziam? Hai le kuang sia a puasang teng na sil uh hi, ahizong sungsang sia zawthawk thu le duhopna taw na nga uh nate taw kidim hi." 
Matthew23:26 Pharisee mittawte awng! Hai sia a sungsang sil phot le uhte a puasang zongh thiang tu hi. 
Matthew23:27 “Thukham hil syate le Pharisee te awng! A kihitheamsakte awng! No atu in bangza lauhuai ziam? No sia suangkaangtui taw a kizut thaankul taw kibang nu hi, tuate sia a puasang hoi ahihang a sungsang ah mithi ngu le mithi muat taw kidim hi." 
Matthew23:28 Tuasia bangma in no sia a pua sang panin a kuama po ii muna ah a hoi bang na hi uh hi, ahihang na sungsang uh ahile kihi thepsakna le mawna taw kidim nu hi." 
Matthew23:29 “Thukham hil syate le Phariseete! A kihitheamsakte awng! No atu in bangza lauhuai ziam? Kamsaangte atu in thaankuul sia a et hoi tu in na vawt uh a, miphate atu in, tepteena khan sia na zepsak uh hi;" 
Matthew23:30 Tuaciangin ka taanghpupite khan lai in, a nungtate hi le ung amate ii septe seam buan ci ung, kamsaangte that buan ci ung, ci nu hi." 
Matthew23:31 Tua ahikom kamsaangte a thatlumte ii suante na hi uh hunlam noma pauna panin kipholaak na hi uh hi. 
Matthew23:32 Tua ahiciang na taanghpupite ii patsa nate na zaw dong seam vet tavun! 
Matthew23:33 Ngul le ngul ii suante awng, hell sungah hong kikhiak suk natu panin, bangbangin suakta tu in ki um nu ziam!" 
Matthew23:34 Tua ahikom, kamsaangte, mihing ciimte le syate sia note kungah kong paisak tu hi; tuate pawlkhat na thatlum tu uh a, pawlkhat thinglamtee tungah na kilh tu a, pawlkhat sia synagogue inn sungah na vel tu uh a, khuapi khat pan khuapi khat ah na delkot tu uh hi." 
Matthew23:35 Tua hu in mawna nei ngawl Abel pan a kipan, sangaw na biaknatau le Biakinn kilaklaw a na thalup uh Berechiah tapa Zechariah le mawna nei ngawl bul a na thalup uh theampo hangin thuak tu daan sia note tungah hong tung tu hi." 
Matthew23:36 A tatakin kong ci ciang mihing that theampo hangin na thuak uh daan sia tu hun mihingte ii tungah hong tung tu hi! 
Matthew23:37 “Jerusalem, Jerusalem awng! Nang in kamsaangte na thatlum a, Pathian kamtaite suangtum taw na hua hi. Akpui in aknote a thakhui nuai ah a uap bangin, bang tanvei na mihingte angvan nuam khi ziam? ahihang na oai bua hi!" 
Matthew23:38 Tua ahikom Biakinn sia kitaisan tu a, a hawm in om tu hi." 
Matthew23:39 Hong ci khi hi; tu pan kipan, ‘Topa min taw hong pai pa sia Pathian in thupha pia tahen,’ na ci uh mateng in, kei nong mu kik nawn buatu hi.” a ci hi." 
Matthew24:1 Biakinn pan Jesus a pusua zawkciang a nungzuite in Biakinn huang sung a inn dangte lak nuam in neak uh hi. 
Matthew24:2 Jesus in, “Hi hi, en tek vun. A tatakin kong ci ciang, hi sungah suangte khat zongh a omna ngei san ah om nawn ngawl tu hi; a vekpi kilawn keak siat tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew24:3 Jesus in Olive Mual tungah a to laitakin, a nungzuite ama kungah hong pai tuam uh hi. “Hi thu sia bang hun ciangin hong tung tu a, tuaciang nong pai kik tu hun le hun bo tu hun, a lak tu in bang hong piang tu ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Matthew24:4 Jesus in, “Kidawm tavun, kuama in theamsak heak vun." 
Matthew24:5 Banghang ziam cile mihing tam mamate kei min zanghin hong pai tu a, ‘Keima in Messiah ka hi hi’ ci tu a mihing tam mama theam tu hi." 
Matthew24:6 A naina ah ngal kidona aw na za tu uh a, a khualana ah ngal kidona thu hong kison tu hi; ahihang patau heak vun. Tuabangte hong piang nanak tu a, ahihang hun bona hong theng zo hi, cina hi ngawl hi." 
Matthew24:7 Ngam khat le ngam khat kisim tu hi; kumpi khat le khat kido tu hi. Mun theampo ah kialpi tung tu a, zinliing tu hi." 
Matthew24:8 Hite theampo sia nautut kipat ciang, a nat bang ahi hi." 
Matthew24:9 “Tua zawkciang note hong kiman tu a, daan piak tu le thalup tu in hong ki aap tu hi. Keima hu in mihing theampo in note hong ngaimaw tu hi." 
Matthew24:10 Mihing tam mama in tua hun ciangin, a upna uh nusia tu hi; amate khat le khat kileeheak tu a, khat le khat kingaimaw tu hi." 
Matthew24:11 Tua zawkciang leilot kamsaang tam mama piang tu a, mihing tam mama theam tu hi." 
Matthew24:12 Tuabangin siatna hong kizel tu a, mihing tam mamate ki itna kiam tu hi." 
Matthew24:13 Ahihang a tawp dong a thumaante kingum tu hi. 
Matthew24:14 Tuaciangin, hi Kumpingam Lungdamna Thupha sia, leitung theampo ah tetti tu in minam theampo tungah kihil kawkoai tu hi; tua zawkciang hun bona hong theng tu hi." 
Matthew24:15 “Kamsaangpa Daniel ii son ‘A kiitakhuai mama sia’ na mu tu uh hi. Tua in a thiangthona munah ding tu hi.” (Hi lai a sim sia in tel tahen!) 
Matthew24:16 “Tuaciang Judea a omte in mual tungah tai tahen. 
Matthew24:16 “Tuaciang Judea a omte in mual tungah tai tahen. 
Matthew24:17 Innkhum tung a om mihing khat in ama ii vanhte la tu in tuaksuk nawn heak hen. 
Matthew24:18 Lo sungah a om mihing khat in a laktong puasilh la tu in, heak kik nawn heak hen." 
Matthew24:19 Tua hun sungah a om numei naupaaite le nau noailuaite atu in bangza he huai tu ziam? 
Matthew24:20 Na tai tu uh hun sia phalbi lai le Sabbath ni ahi ngawl natu in Pathian tungah thungen vun. 
Matthew24:21 Banghang ziam cile tua hun ah ngimna sia leitung a kipat pan kipan, tuni dong a piang ngei ngimnate theampo sangin nasia zaw pek tu hi. Tuabang ngimna sia maisang zongh ah om kik ngei nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Matthew24:22 Ahihang Pathian in a ni sia khiamsuk zo hi; tua hi buale kuama a suakta buatu hi. Ahitazong a tealtuam mihingte atu in Pathian in a ni khiam tu hi. 
Matthew24:23 “Tuasia ciang khat po in, ‘En in, hi sungah Messiah om hi!’ ci in ahizong, ‘Zia sungah om hi!’ ci in ahizong hong cile um heak vun." 
Matthew24:24 Banghang ziam cile Messiah theam le kamsaang theamte hong piang tu hi; hi thei hile Pathian tealsa mihingte ngawngawn a theam natu in, amate in nalamdang lakna liante le a tumdang nate tam mama hong vawt tu hi." 
Matthew24:25 Ngai vun! a hun hong thet ma in hong sonkhol zo khi hi. 
Matthew24:26 “Tua ahibuale mihingte in, ‘En vun, ama sia sennealngam sungah om hi!’ hong cile zong, tua munah pai heak vun; tua ahibuale ‘En vun, ama sia hi sungah buu hi,’ hong cile zong na um heak vun." 
Matthew24:27 Banghang ziam cile Mihing Tapa sia van buppi ah nisuana pan nitumna dong a kaantan khualeng taang bangin hong pai tu hi. 
Matthew24:28 “Mithi luang omna mun po ah vaciikte kikhawmtua tu hi. 
Matthew24:29 “Tua hun ngimnate zawk a hai ngawlin, ni hong taang nawn ngawl tu a, tha zongh taang nawn ngawl tu hi, aksite van panin taaksuk tu a, van ah a om nate sia amate ii zin tek panin kipialsak siat tu hi." 
Matthew24:30 Tuasia ciang Mihing Tapa ii lim sia van ah hong kilangh tu hi; Mihing Tapa sia van ah meeikaai tung pan vaangletna le minthanna lianpi taw hong pai a mu uh ciangin, leitung mihing theampo kap tu uh hi." 
Matthew24:31 Lemlepui aw hong nging tu a, tuaciang ama in leimong king lite ah a vantunglalangte sawl in, amate in ama tealsa mite leimong khat pan mong khat dongin khawmtua tu hi." 
Matthew24:32 “Theikung in hilsak tavun. A baakte zongh hingin hong moisua ciangin, a teeno meang tu in kithoai a, tuasia ciang khuakhaal hun hong nai hi ci in na he uh hi." 
Matthew24:33 Tuasia bangma in, hite theampo na mu uh ciangin, a hun hong nai a, hong kipapan zo hi, ci in na he tu uh hi." 
Matthew24:34 Tu laitak a nungta mihingte a thi siat ma in, hi thu sia hong piang tu hi ci in phawk tavun." 
Matthew24:35 Vantung le simlei a bo tu hi, ahihang ka kammalte a bo ngei buatu hi." 
Matthew24:36 “Ahitazong tua a ni le a nai tu sia kuama in he ngawl hi — vantung ah vantung mite ahizong, Tapa ahizong, he ngawl hi; Pa bek in he hi." 
Matthew24:37 Mihing Tapa hong pai natu sia Noah hun lai thupiang bang hi tu hi. 
Matthew24:38 Tuipi liim ma in mihingte an ne tui dawnin om a, numei le pa kiteangin, Noah ii teambaw sungah a tum tatak ni dong sia tuabangin om uh hi." 
Matthew24:39 Tua hi napi tuiliim a, tui ii a taikeak dongin, bang thu piang ziam ci in amate in a phawk bua uh hi. Mihing Tapa hong pai ciang zong tuabang ma hi tu hi." 
Matthew24:40 Tua hun laitakin pasal nii sia lo sungah naseam khawm tu hi: khat kila tu a khat kikhe tu hi. 
Matthew24:41 Numei nii an ngoaina ah diang tu hi: khat kila tu a, khat kikhe tu hi." 
Matthew24:42 “A kingingta sa in om vun, banghang ziam cile Topa hong pai tu ni sia na he bua uh hi." 
Matthew24:43 Inn neipa khat in ngutate ii hong pai hun tu he le, mu ngawlin om tu a, ngutate in inn a phuulsak buatu hi, ci in na heak uh ahi hi." 
Matthew24:44 Tua ahiciang no zongh, a tawntung kinging sa in om vun, banghang ziam cile Mihing Tapa in na muanmawk ngawl hun laitakin hong pai tu hi." 
Matthew24:45 “Thumaan a, a ciim naseampa sia akua bangte ziam? Ama sia naseam dangte a uk tu le a hun a hun in an a pia tu in a kikoipa ahi hi." 
Matthew24:46 A topa hong cia laitakin a kisawl bang a naseam hi ci in a topa ii mu naseampa sia bangza in lungdam tu ziam? 
Matthew24:47 A tatakin kong ci ciang, a topa in tua naseampa sia a neisa theampo uk tu in koi tu hi." 
Matthew24:48 Ahihang tua naseampa sia a ngina ngawl khat ahile, a topa sia hong cia hak lai vak, ci in ama le ama kitheam tu a," 
Matthew24:49 tuaciangin a nasep khoppui naseam dangte saatin, zukham theite taw, an ne zu ne in om tu hi." 
Matthew24:50 Tuaciangin tua naseampa ii topa sia a muanmawk ngawl hun le a heak ngawl ni hun khat ciang hong cia tu hi. 
Matthew24:51 A topa in ama sia nasia takin ngim pia tu a, a kihitheamsakte ii thuak tu teng thuaksak tu hi. Tua munah ama sia kap in ha ngoai tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew25:1 “Tua hun ciangin Vantung ngam sia hi bang hi tu hi. Khatvei lai in ngaknu sawm sia a meivak uh la in, zineipa muak tu in pai uh hi." 
Matthew25:2 Ngaknu ngate mawmaw a, a dang ngate ciim hi." 
Matthew25:3 A mawmaw nga teng in meiinn keng ahihang meitui keng thua ngawl uh hi," 
Matthew25:4 a ciimte ahile meiinn atu meitui bung dimin keng thua uh hi. 
Matthew25:5 Zineipa theng hak ahikom, ngaknute lusu in mu uh hi." 
Matthew25:6 “Zankim zawkciangin taangkona aw khat hong nging a, ‘Hi sungah zineipa hong pai hi. Hong pai tavun a muak vun,’ ci hi." 
Matthew25:7 Ngaknu sawmte khanglo in a meiinnte puua tek uh hi. 
Matthew25:8 A mawmawte in a ciimte munah, ‘Na meitui uh tawm hong hawm tavun, banghang ziam cile ka meiinnte mit tu hi’ ci uh hi." 
Matthew25:9 A ciimte in, ‘hi thei mama ngawl hi; no atu le ko atu in kicing ngawl hi. Sumbuk ah pai in lei tavun;’ ci uh hi." 
Matthew25:10 Tua ahikom a mawmaw ngaknute sia meitui lei tu in pai uh hi; tuaciang amate pai lanin zineipa hong theng hi. A kinging sa a om ngaknu nga teng sia ama taw kiteenna poai ah sungtang uh a, tuaciang kongkha kikhak hi." 
Matthew25:11 “Tua zawkciangin ngaknu dangte hong theng hi. ‘Topa, topa! Hong tumsak ta'n!’ ci in au uh hi." 
Matthew25:12 ‘Hong tumsak mama ngawl tu khi hi! No hong he ngawl khi hi,’ ci in zineipa in zo hi.”" 
Matthew25:13 “Tua ahikom kikeam khol vun, banghang ziam cile, a ni tu le a nai tu na he bua uh hi,” ci in Jesus in thukhup hi." 
Matthew25:14 “Tua hun ciangin Vantung ngam sia hi bang hi tu hi. Khatvei lai in pasal khat in khualhaw sawm hi; a naseamte samin a neisa teng aap hi. 
Matthew25:15 Mihing simin amate thiamna om bangin, ama in pia hi: khat ii tungah khamh dangka tulnga pia hi; a dang khat ii tungah tulnii, a dang khat ii tungah tulkhat pia hi. Tua zawkciang ama sia khualhaw tu in ding hi." 
Matthew25:16 Dangka tulnga a kipia naseampa in, thakhat ma in sumvawt in, a dang tulnga ma nga thua hi." 
Matthew25:17 Tuasia bangma in dangka tulnii a nga sia zongh in, a dang tulnii ma nga thua hi." 
Matthew25:18 Ahihang dangka tulkhat a nga naseampa in pai a, leidum to in, a topa dangka teng phual hi." 
Matthew25:19 “A khuangei zawkciang naseamte ii topa hong cia kik a, amate sum tepteena tek sit hi." 
Matthew25:20 Dangka tulnga a saang naseampa hong pai a, a dang tulnga ama tungah aap hi. ‘Topa, dangka tulnga hong pia ni hi. En in! Hi sungah dangka tulnga ka meetsak hi,’ ci hi." 
Matthew25:21 ‘Pha hi, a thumaan naseam pha pa awng, tawmno na zeakna tungah thumaan na hikom, tampi zeakna ah a uk tu in kong koi tu hi. Kei taw lungdam khawm tu in hong pai ta'n!’ ci hi." 
Matthew25:22 “Tuaciang tulnii a kipia naseampa hong pai a, ‘Topa, dangka tulnii hong pia ni hi. En in! Hi sungah ka thalaw dangka tulnii om hi,’ ci hi." 
Matthew25:23 ‘Pha hi, a thumaan naseam pha pa awng! Na tawmno tungah thumaan na hikom, na tampite uk tu in, kong koi tu hi. Kei taw lungdam khawm tu in hong pai ta'n!’ ci hi." 
Matthew25:24 “Tuaciang in dangka tulkhat a saang naseampa hong pai a, ‘Topa, nang sia mihing sonham khat na hi hunlam kong he hi; na tuu ngawlna munah a at pa, na poai ngawlna munah anla pa na hi sia kong he hi." 
Matthew25:25 Lau ka hikom pai in, lei sungah na sum teng ka phual hi. En in, hi sungah na neisa teng om hi,’ ci hi." 
Matthew25:26 “ ‘A datham misia naseampa awng! Ka tu ngawlna munah at a, ka poai ngawlna munah anlapa hi, ci in hong he na hi ziam?’ a topa in ci hi." 
Matthew25:27 ‘Tua ahile pha hi; ka sum teng sia sum kholna munah na koisak po lete, kong cia kik ciang a meet taw a vekpi nga kik tu hi ngawl khi ziam?" 
Matthew25:28 Tu in a sum laaksak vun a, tulsawm a neipa piaksak tavun." 
Matthew25:29 Banghang ziam cile, a neisate tungah a tamzaw kipia thua tu a hau seseam tu hi; ahihang bangma a nei ngawlpa tung pan a nei susun kila tu hi." 
Matthew25:30 Hi naseam ngina ngawlpa ahile — doipua khuazing sungah not tavun; tua munah kap in ha ngoai tu hi,’ ci hi." 
Matthew25:31 “Mihing Tapa sia Kumpi bangin vantunglalangte taw hong pai ciangin, a kumpi tokhum tungah to tu a," 
Matthew25:32 tuaciangin minam theampo ama mai ah kikhawm tu hi. Tua zawkciangin ama in tuu cing khat ii tuu le keal a khen bangin pawl nii in khen tu hi. 
Matthew25:33 Ama in thumaan thutang mite sia a ziatsang ah koi tu a, a dang teng sia a veisang ah koi tu hi." 
Matthew25:34 Tuaciang Kumpipa in ziatsang a om mihingte munah, ‘Hong pai tavun; Ka pa ii thupha piakte awng! Simlei a kibitphua ciil panin no atu a kipua khol sate lua tu in hong pai tavun." 
Matthew25:35 Ka ngilkial laitakin an nong vaak uh hi, ka dangko laitakin tui nong pia uh hi; zin in ka vak laitakin na inn uh ah zin nong do uh a," 
Matthew25:36 puansilh ka sel laitakin puan nong khu uh hi; ka ciinat laitakin nong ou uh a, thong sungah nong ve uh hi’ ci hi." 
Matthew25:37 “A thumaan thutang mihingte in, ‘Topa, bang hun in ngilkial a na om hong mu a, an hong vaak ka na khu ziam?, ahibuale na dangko a tui neak tu, bang hun in hong pia kana khu ziam?" 
Matthew25:38 Khualmi in bang hunin nong vaak a, ka inn uh ah zin hong do ngei khu ziam? ahibuale puansilh sel in bang hunin na om a puan hong khu ngei kana khu ziam?" 
Matthew25:39 Bang hunin na ciinat ahizong, na thongtaak lai ahizong, hong mu ngei a hong ve kana khu ziam?’ ci uh hi." 
Matthew25:40 Kumpipa in, ‘A maan tak ka ci ciang, hi ka suapuite a nobel khat tungah na vawt uh sia kei tung a hong vawt na hi uh hi!’ ci in zo tu hi." 
Matthew25:41 “Tuaciangin a veisang a tote munah, ‘Kei kung pan tai vun, no Pathian ii haamsiat sate awng! Doaimangpa le a lalangte atu a kivawt kholsa tawntung meikuang sungah pai tavun." 
Matthew25:42 Ka ngilkial laitakin hong vaak ngawl nu hi, ka dangko laitakin ka neak tu bangma nong pia bua uh hi;" 
Matthew25:43 khualmi in ka om a na inn sungah nong saang bua uh hi, puansilh ka sel laitak puan taw nong khu bua uh hi; ka ci a na zong thong ka taak zong, nong ou nong khoi bua uh hi,’ ci hi." 
Matthew25:44 “Tuasia ciang amate in, ‘Topa, ngilkial dangtaak a, khualmi in, puansilh sel a ciina le na thongtaak, bang hun hong mu ngei a, hong hu ngawl kana khu ziam?’ ci in zo tu uh hi." 
Matthew25:45 Kumpipa in, ‘Kei kong cina pan, hi lai ah mihing thupi ngawlbelte khat na hu nop ngawl uh ciang, keima hong hu nuam ngawl na hi uh hi.’" 
Matthew25:46 Tua ahikom hite sia tawntung daan thuak natu sungah kipuak tu a, ahizong a thumaan thutangte sia tawntung nuntakna sungah pai tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew26:1 Jesus in hi thu teng hilna a nei zawkciang a nungzuite munah," 
Matthew26:2 “Na heak uh bangma, ni nii zawkciang Paisan Poai hong theng tu a, tuaciang Mihing Tapa sia thinglamtee tungah thalup tu in ki aap tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew26:3 Tuaciang, Thiampi Lianbelpa Caiaphas teenna inn ah thiampi liante le upate kisitua uh a," 
Matthew26:4 Jesus man ku in a thalup thei natu ngeal uh hi. 
Matthew26:5 “Poai hun sungah vawt ngawl tu hi, tuabang hi thong leang, mipite hong ngamlum tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew26:6 Jesus sia Bethany khua, a lauhuai vun natna a vei Simon a kici pa ii inn ah om hi." 
Matthew26:7 Jesus an a neak laitakin numei khat hong pai a, a manham sathau namtui suangngo thawl dim khat hong keng a, Jesus lu tungah buak hi." 
Matthew26:8 A nungzuite in a mu uh ciangin a thin uuk uh hi. “Banghangin hi bangin pakvawt ziam?” 
Matthew26:9 “Hi sathau namtui zuak leang, sum tam mama kinga tu a, mizawngte kipia thei tu hi!” ci uh hi." 
Matthew26:10 Jesus in amate thusonnate za ahikom amate munah, “Banghangin hi sia nu thinnuam maw se nu ziam? Ama in kei atu in nasep pha nasep hoi khat hong seam ahi hi." 
Matthew26:11 Mihing a zawngte sia note taw hong om tawntung tu ahihang kei sia, note taw hong omkhawm tawntung ngawl tu khi hi." 
Matthew26:12 Ama in ka kivui natu in ka pumpi sia paaknamtui hong noai khol hi. 
Matthew26:13 A tatakin kong ci ciang, hi lungdamna thu leitung theampo ah a kihil na mun po ah, ama nasep sia ama a kiphawk natu in, kison tawntung tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew26:14 Tua zawkciang nungzui sawm le nii sung pan khat ahi — Judas Iscariot a kici sia — thiampi liante kungah pai in," 
Matthew26:15 “Jesus hong leeheak leng bang hong pia tu nu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Amate in ngunn dangka sawmthum la in a sim zawkciang pia uh hi. 
Matthew26:16 Tua hun pan kipan Judas in Jesus a aap thei natu hunpha zong tan hi. 
Matthew26:17 Tol saw ngawl anluum poai ni masa ni in nungzuite Jesus kungah hong pai a, “Paisan Poai an koisungah kong vawtsak tu uh ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Matthew26:18 “Khuapi sungah tum tavun a, pasal khat kungah, ‘Syapa in, ka hun hong theng zo hi; ka nungzuite taw Paisan Poai na inn ah vawt tu khu hi,’ ci in son tavun,” ci hi." 
Matthew26:19 Nungzuite in Jesus sawl bangin, ngamta uh a, Paisan Poai anneak natu vawtkhol uh hi." 
Matthew26:20 Nitak ciangin, Jesus le a nungzui sawm le niite an ne tu in to uh hi." 
Matthew26:21 Anneak laitakin Jesus in, “A maan takin ka ci ciang note sung pan khat in kei hong leeheak tu nu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew26:22 Nungzuite a thin uh nuam ngawl a, khat zawkciang khat in, “Topa, kei hong ci nuam na hi bua na ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Matthew26:23 “Ankuang sungah anluum kei taw sawk khawm sia in kei hong leeheak tu hi. 
Matthew26:24 Mihing Tapa sia Laithiangtho in thi tu hi a ci bangma in thi tu a, ahihang Mihing Tapa a leeheak sia atu in, bangza in lauhuai ziam? Tua pa atu in pian awl zaw le phazaw hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Matthew26:25 A leeheakpa Judas in, “Syapa, kei hong ci nuam na hi bua na ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Jesus in “Nangma ci bangma ahi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Matthew26:26 A an neak uh laitakin, Jesus in anluum bek khat la in, lungdamko thungetna a nei zawkciang, baltham in a nungzuite pia hi. “La in ne vun, hisia in ka pumpi ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew26:27 Tua zawkciang hai la in, Pathian tungah lungdamko a, amate pia hi. “Na vekpi in ne vun," 
Matthew26:28 hi sia in ka chisan hi a, Pathian thuciamna a kipsak, mihing tam mamate mawna a kimaisak natu a bua ka chisan ahi hi." 
Matthew26:29 Kei kong cina pan, ka Pa Ngam sungah note taw sapittui thak ka neak mateng hi sapittui sia ka ne nawn buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew26:30 Tua zawkciang amate lasa in, Olive Mual zuanin pai uh hi." 
Matthew26:31 Tuaciangin Jesus in amate munah, “Zan ciang tatak ma in no na vekpi in taikeak in kei hong nusia siat tu nu hi, banghang ziam cile laithiangtho in, ‘Pathian in tuucingpa thatlum tu a, tuute sia kithethaang tu hi,’ ci hi." 
Matthew26:32 Ahihang nuntakna sungah hong kiphokto kik ciangin, note mai Galilee ah ka na paikhol tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew26:33 Peter in Jesus munah, “A dangte theampo in hong nusia zong, kei kong nusia buatu hi!” ci hi." 
Matthew26:34 Jesus in Peter munah, “A maan takin kong ci ciang, zan ciang ak khuan ma in thumvei kei nong nial tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew26:35 Peter in, “Nang taw thi khop tu a kul le zong, tuabangin hong nial ngawl tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi. Nungzui dangte zongh in, tuabang ma in ci tek uh hi." 
Matthew26:36 Tua zawkciang Jesus in a nungzuite taw Gethsemane a kicina mun khat ah pai a, amate munah, “Zia sungah thungen a ka pai lanin hi sungah na to vun,” ci hi." 
Matthew26:37 Ama in Peter le Zebedee ii tate nii paipui hi. Heena le thinngimna in ama khunel hi," 
Matthew26:38 tuaciangin amate munah, “Ka thinngim mama a thi dektak khi hi. Hi sungah na om vun a, mu heak vun,” ci hi." 
Matthew26:39 Ama sia tawm a pai zawkciang, lei ah bokcip in, thungen hi. “Ka Pa awng, ahithei le hi thuakna hai sia kei tung pan hong laaksak ta'n! Ahihang kei dei bang hi ngawlin, nangma deina bang hi tahen,” ci hi." 
Matthew26:40 Tua zawkciang, a nungzuite thum kungah heak kik a, amate a mu sa in a om mu hi; tuaciang in Peter munah, “Bangbangin note thum in nai khat sung takpi zongh kei hong ngak zo ngawl nu ziam?" 
Matthew26:41 Na na ngak kenkon vun a, ze etna sungah na taaksuk ngawl natu in, thu na ngen vun. Thinsung in uukna nei ahihang, pumpi sia thazawm hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew26:42 Khatvei ma, Jesus pai in thu ngen hi, “Ka Pa awng, hi hai ka dawn phot ngawl peuma in, hi thuakna hai sia hong kilaaksak ngawl tu ahile nangma deina bang hi tahen,” ci hi." 
Matthew26:43 Khatvei ma hong heak kik a, nungzuite sia a mu sa ma in mu leleau hi; amate a mit hak zo mama ngawl uh hi." 
Matthew26:44 Jesus in amate khatvei nusia kikin, a kammal zak ngei teng ma pau kikin, a thum veina thungen hi." 
Matthew26:45 Tua zawkciang nungzuite kungah heak kik a, “Tu dong mu lai in tawlnga lai nu ziam? En vun! Mimawte khut sungah Mihing Tapa a ki aap tu hun hong theng zo hi." 
Matthew26:46 Tho vun, Pai ka tawng. En vun! Kei hong leeheakpa hi sungah om hi!” ci hi." 
Matthew26:47 Jesus sia tuabangin a papau laitak, nungzui sawm le nii sungah khat ahi Judas hong theng hi. Namsau le moltawng a toai, thiampi liante le upate ii a sawl mihon khat, ama in hong tonpui hi." 
Matthew26:48 Ngual leeheakpa in mihonte munah lim khat lak zo hi: “Ka nap tu pa sia na dei uh mihingpa hi tu hi. Man vun!” ci hi. 
Matthew26:49 Judas in Jesus kungah tangtan in pai a, “Thupha nga ta'n, Syapa,” ci in namh hi." 
Matthew26:50 Jesus in zo a, “Na sep tu po seam memeang in, lawm awng!” ci hi. Tua zawkciang amate hong pai in, Jesus man in lencip uh hi." 
Matthew26:51 Jesus taw omkhawm khat in, a namsau dokin Thiampi Lianbelpa ii salpa saat a, a bil saattan hi." 
Matthew26:52 Jesus in, “Na namsau thun kik in. Namsau a zamhte sia namsau taw ma in thi tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew26:53 “Ka Pa munah hu ngen nuam hi leng ama in vantung ngalkap hon sawm le hon nii sangin a tamzaw thakhat thu in, hong puak tu ahi hunlam he ngawl nu ziam?" 
Matthew26:54 Ahihang tuabang hi thong le, Laithiangtho in hi teng tung tu hi, a ci sia koibangin tung nawn tu ziam?” ci hi." 
Matthew26:55 Tua zawkciang mipite tungah Jesus in, “Mihing that taiku bangin hong ngaisun a, namsau le moltawng taw kei man tu in hong kuan na hi uh ziam? Ni simin Biakinn sungah to in hilna ka nei lai in, nong man bua uh hi." 
Matthew26:56 Ahihang hite theampo sia kamsaangte ii Laithiangtho sung a at teng a taangtun natu ahi hi,” ci hi. Tuaciangin a nungzuite theampo ama nusia in taikeak uh hi." 
Matthew26:57 Jesus a mante in Thiampi Lianbelpa Caiaphas inn ah paipui uh a, tua munah Thukham hil Syate le upate kikhawm uh hi." 
Matthew26:58 Peter in a khuala thithim na panin Thiampi Lianbelpa leitual dong zui hi. Ama sia leitual ah ngalkapte taw tokhawm in bangbangin thu hong piang ziam ci in encik hi. 
Matthew26:59 Thiampi liante le Council bup in Jesus a thalup thei natu in, leilot tetti pawlkhat zon tu in hanciam uh hi," 
Matthew26:60 mihing tam mama hong pai uh a, ama huvau leilot thu tam mama son ahitazong, a mat thei natu thu, bangma a mu bua uh hi. A khakbel ciangin, pasal nii hong ding a," 
Matthew26:61 “Hisia pa in Pathian ii Biakinn baltham in ni thum sung ka sa kik thei tu ci hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew26:62 Thiampi Lianbelpa hong ding a Jesus munah, “Nang tungah maw hong kisuanhte na zo kik natu he ngawl ni ziam?” ci hi." 
Matthew26:63 Ahihang Jesus a huthe bua hi. Khatvei ma Thiampi Lianbelpa in ama tungah, “A nungta Pathian min taw nang sia kiciamna hong vawtsak khi hi: Pathian Tapa Messiah na hi ziam, hong son ta'n,” ci hi." 
Matthew26:64 “Nangma ci bang ahi hi. Ahihang na vekpi tungah kong ci hi: tu pan kipan Mihing Tapa sia Vaanglianbelpa ii ziatsang ah to a, van a meeikaai tung pan hong pai na mu tu uh hi!” ci hi." 
Matthew26:65 Tuasia ciangin Thiampi Lianbelpa in, a puan hong baltham a, “Pathian zawnsakna kampau pa! Tetti dang kul nawn ngawl hi. Pathian min a daisak na sia na zaak tek uh hi." 
Matthew26:66 Bangbang ngaisun tu nu ziam?” ci hi. Amate in, “Ama sia mawnei hi, a thi kul hi,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew26:67 Tua zawkciang amate in, a maitang cilphii in, saat uh hi; tuaciangin a beangte in," 
Matthew26:68 “Messiah awng, hong beang sia akua ziam, hong son thei ka sin in,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew26:69 Peter sia leitual ah to in a om laitak Thiampi Lianbelpa ii naseam numei khat hong pai a, “Nang zongh Galilee mi Jesus taw a kithawl khat hi ngawl ni ziam?” ci hi." 
Matthew26:70 Ahihang amate theampo ii zaakna ah, ama in nial hi, “Na son thu sia he ngawl khi hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew26:71 Tuaciangin leitual tumna kongbiang ah pai hi. Naseam numei dang khat ma in mu a, “Ama sia Nazareth khua mi Jesus taw a kithawl khat hi,” ci in mite tungah son hi." 
Matthew26:72 Peter in nial leleau a, “Tuasia pa he bong ci in kiciam khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Matthew26:73 Tua zawkciang tua munah a ding pasal pawlkhat in Peter kung hong zuan a, “Nang zongh ama mite khat ma hi tatak ni hi. Bangpo na ci zong na pau zia in nang sia hong pholaak hi,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew26:74 Tuasia ciang Peter in, “Thumaan son khi hi, ci in kiciam ing! thumaan son ngawl ka hile Pathian in daan hong pia tahen! Mihing ziasia pa he ngawl khi hi!” ci hi. Tua zawk hiat ciangin ak khuang hi." 
Matthew26:75 Peter in Jesus ii ama tungah “Ak khuan ma in thumvei hong nial tu ni hi,” ci in a son teng phawk hi. Ama pusuak in nasia takin kap hi." 
Matthew27:1 Zingsang tuungin thiampi lian theampo le upate in Jesus a thalup natu vaihawm uh hi. 
Matthew27:2 Amate in Jesus thikkhau taw khi in, paipui a, Romete ii ngamuk mangpa Pilate kungah aap uh hi." 
Matthew27:3 Ngual leeheakpa Judas in Jesus sia thidaan kipia tu hi, ci in a heak ciangin, ama kisiik kikin, a ngunn dangka sawmthum teng thiampi liante, upate kungah paipui hi." 
Matthew27:4 “Mihing mawna nei ngawl khat a thi tu in, leeheak ka hikom ka maw zo hi!” ci hi. Amate in, “Tua thu ko taw bang kisai nawn ziam? Tua thu sia nangma taw kisai bek hi!” ci in zo kik uh hi." 
Matthew27:5 Judas in a dangka teng Biakinn sungah vawk in nusia a, tua zawkciang ama pusuak in ama le ama awklum hi." 
Matthew27:6 Thiampi liante in dangkatangte tawmin, “Hisia in chisan ii man hi a, ih Thukham in chisan man sia Biakinn sumkholna ah khol tu khaam hi,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew27:7 Amate teng tua sum tungtaang ah thukimna a nei zawkciang, Bealseakpa Lo a kici sia, ngamdangmite thaan tu in, tua sum taw lei uh hi." 
Matthew27:8 Tua hu in tua lo sia “Chisan Lo” tu dong ma in kici hi. 
Matthew27:9 Tuasia ciang kamsaangpa Jeremiah ii sonkhol teng taangtung hi. “Amate in, Israel mite ii ama man tu a, a thukim uh ngunn dangka sawmthum la in," 
Matthew27:10 Topa ii keima hong sawl bangin bealseakpa ii lo sia lei uh hi.” 
Matthew27:11 Jesus sia Romete ii ngamuk mangpa mai ah ding a, tua pa in, “Nang sia Jew te ii kumpipa na hi ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Nangma ci bang ahi hi,” ci in Jesus in zo hi." 
Matthew27:12 Ahihang thiampi liante le upate ii mawsiatnate huvau sia bangma zona a nei bua hi. 
Matthew27:13 Tua ahiciang Pilate in, “Hi thute taw hong mawsak nate za ngawl ni ziam?” ci hi." 
Matthew27:14 Ahihang Jesus in kammal khat zongh a zo bua hi, tuasia ciangin ngamuk mangpa in lamdang sa mama hi." 
Matthew27:15 Paisan Poai a tun simin, Romete ngamuk mangpa in mipite ii ngetna bangin, thongtaak khat veu suataksak tu ngeina nei hi." 
Matthew27:16 Tua laitakin Jesus Barabbas a kici a minthang thongtaak pa khat om hi. 
Matthew27:17 Tua ahikom mipite hong kikhop ciang, Pilate in amate tungah, “Jesus Barabbas hong suatak leng deizaw nu ziam maw, Messiah a kici Jesus hong suatak leng deizaw nu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Matthew27:18 Jew mi thuneite in, Jesus eang ahikom ama ii khut sungah aap ahi hunlam sia Pilate in tel hi." 
Matthew27:19 Pilate sia thukhenna inn sung a to laitakin a zi in kamtaisak a: “Mawna nei ngawl tua pa tungtaang ah kihel heak in. Tu zan in ama huvau ka mang sungah nasia takin thuak khi hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew27:20 Thiampi liante le upate in Pilate ii Barabbas suatak a piak natu le, Jesus a thalup tu a nget natu in mipite hol uh hi." 
Matthew27:21 Ahihang Pilate in mipite munah, “Hite nii sung pan koisia hong tha leng na deizaw uh ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Barabbas,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Matthew27:22 “Tua ahile Messiah a kici Jesus sia bang law tu khi ziam?” ci in Pilate in dongh hi. “Thinglamtee tungah thatlum in,” ci tek uh hi." 
Matthew27:23 Ahizong Pilate in, “Ahihang ama in bang khialna vawt na ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Tuasia ciangin, amate in a aw neiza uh taw au in, “Thinglamtee tungah thatlum in,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew27:24 Pilate in tubang taw kinga zo ngawl tu hi ci a mu ciangin, ngamlumna piang thei tu hi, ci a mu manin tuidam tawm la in, mipite mai ah a khut sil a, “Hisia ii thina taw kisai kei hang hi ngawl hi! Hisia in noma ngamtatna hang ahi hi!” ci hi." 
Matthew27:25 “ama ii thina hangin thuak tu a om babang koma le ka suan ka paalte tungah hong tu tahen!” ci in mipi bup in zo hi. 
Matthew27:26 Tua zawkciang Pilate in, amate dei bangin Barabbas tha hi; Jesus sia a velsak zawkciang thinglamtee tungah thalup tu in aap hi." 
Matthew27:27 Tua zawkciang Pilate ii ngalkapte in Jesus sia ngamuk mangpa inn ah paipui uh a, ngalkap hon bup sia ama kim ah kikhawm hi." 
Matthew27:28 Amate in a puansilhte suukeaksak a, puantual san khat silhsak hi." 
Matthew27:29 Tua zawkciang lingngui taw kumpilukhu khat vawtin a lu ah khusak hi, tuaciangin ciangkang khat a khut ziatsang ah koi uh a; tua zawkciang a mai ah khupdin in nunau uh hi. “Jew te ii kumpipa a khansau tahen!” ci uh hi." 
Matthew27:30 Amate in ama cilphii in, a ciangkang sut kik a, a lutang saatna in nei uh hi." 
Matthew27:31 Amate in a ciammui vawt zazaan zawk uh ciang, a puantual sia suusak kikin, ama ii a silh ngei teng silhsak kik hi. Tua zawkciang thinglamtee tungah thatlum tu in paipui uh hi." 
Matthew27:32 Amate a pusua uh ciang, Cyrene mi Simon a kici khat taw kisi uh a, ngalkapte in zawthawk thu taw Jesus thinglamtee puasak uh hi." 
Matthew27:33 Amate in Golgotha a kici “Lungu Mun” theng uh hi. 
Matthew27:34 Tua munah amate in sapittui le tuikhaa nam khat hel in, Jesus pia uh hi; ahihang ama in tep bek in a ne bua hi." 
Matthew27:35 Amate in Jesus sia thinglamtee tungah kilh uh a, nuangtang lotna taw in a puan teng hawm uh hi." 
Matthew27:36 Tua zawkciang tua munah to in ama en uh hi. 
Matthew27:37 A lu tung san ah ama kimawsakna laimal teng taak uh hi. “Hisia in Jesus hi. Jew te Kumpipa hi,” ci in at uh hi." 
Matthew27:38 Tua zawkciangin phalakte nii zongh Jesus ziatsang ah khat veisang ah khat khaikhawm uh hi. 
Matthew27:39 Tua mun kaantan a hong pai mihingte in Jesus sia lupei sanin nunau zazaan uh hi. 
Matthew27:40 “Biakinn baltham in ni thum zawkciang a sa kik tu pa, Pathian Tapa na hile, nangma le nangma kihun in! Thinglamtee tung pan hong tuaksuk ta'n,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew27:41 Tuabang tatak ma in thiampi liante, Thukham hil syate le upate in selno uh hi." 
Matthew27:42 “Ngualdangte hun zo ahihang ama le ama kihun thei ngawl hi. Ama sia Israel te Kumpipa hi ka na ngawl ziam! Thinglamtee tung pan hong tuaksuk le, tuasia ciang ama ki um tu hi!" 
Matthew27:43 Ama in Pathian muang a, Pathian Tapa ka hi ci hi. Tua ahile Pathian in tu in a hunnuam ziam en tawng!” ci uh hi." 
Matthew27:44 Thinglamtee tungah ama bangin a kikhai phalakte ngawngawn in, ama sia tuabang ma in selno uh hi." 
Matthew27:45 Nisun ciangin ngam bup sia khuazing in siin cip a, nai thum sung khuazing hi." 
Matthew27:46 Nai thum saat tu bang ciangin Jesus in aw nging tatak taw, “Eli, Eli, lema sabachthani?” ci in au hi. A khiakna sia “Ka Pathian, Ka Pathian awng! Banghang hong nusia ni ziam?” a cina hi." 
Matthew27:47 Tua munah a ding mihing pawlkhatte in za a, “Ama in Elijah sam hi!” ci uh hi." 
Matthew27:48 Amate sung pan khat tai in, sapittui haau sungah puansia pap in, ciangkang tungah sawm in a neak tu in, ama kam ah taa to hi." 
Matthew27:49 Ahihang pawlkhatte in, “Ngak vun! Elijah in ama hun tu in hong pai ziam, en tawng!” ci uh hi." 
Matthew27:50 Tuaciang Jesus a nging takin a au kik zawkciang a hui tat hi. 
Matthew27:51 Tuaciangin Biakinn sungah kidalna puan a kikhai sia a lu pan a taw dong khen nii in kizensuk hi. Zinliing a suangpite kikhentham in," 
Matthew27:52 thaante kihong in, Pathian ii mihing a thisate tam ma kitho kiksak hi." 
Matthew27:53 Amate in thaan nusia in, Jesus ii thina pan a thaw kik zawkciang, Khuapi Thiangtho sungah tum uh a, tua munah mihing tam mama in amate mu uh hi." 
Matthew27:54 Ngalkap hon ukpa le Jesus a cing ngalkapte in zinliing le thupiang dang theampo a mu uh ciang, lau mama a, “Ama sia Pathian Tapa tatak hi!” ci uh hi." 
Matthew27:55 Galilee pan a zui, ama a hu numei tam mamate a khuala na ah ding in Jesus en uh hi." 
Matthew27:56 Tuate sungah Mary Magdalene, James le Joseph nu Mary, Zebedee ii zi kihel hi." 
Matthew27:56 Tuate sungah Mary Magdalene, James le Joseph nu Mary, Zebedee ii zi kihel hi." 
Matthew27:57 Nitak ciangin, Arimathea panin sumhau khat hong theng hi. A min Joseph hi a, ama zongh Jesus ii nungzui khat ahi hi." 
Matthew27:58 Ama in Pilate omna ah pai in Jesus luang ngen hi. Pilate in Jesus luang sia Joseph piak natu in thupia hi. 
Matthew27:59 Tua ahikom Joseph in la a, puanneal kaang thak taw a tun zawkciang," 
Matthew27:60 ama ii thaankuul sungah koi hi. Tua thaankuul sia suangpi a khuak thak ahi hi. Tua zawkciang, ama in suangtumpui khat thaan kuavang mai ah liik in a kha zawkciang cia hi." 
Matthew27:61 Mary Magdalene le Mary dang khat sia thaan maingat in to uh hi. 
Matthew27:62 A khuavak ni sia Sabbath ni hi a, thiampi liante le Pharisee te in Pilate taw kimu uh a," 
Matthew27:63 “Topa awng, mihing leilot pa in a nuntak lai in, ‘Ni thum zawkciang, nuntakna sungah hong kitho kiksak tu hi,’ a ci ngei sia ka phawk uh hi." 
Matthew27:64 A nungzuite hong pai in, a luang ngu a, mihingte munah thina pan thosak zo hi a ci thei ngawl natu in, a ni thum ni ciang dong thaan sia pha takpi a kicin natu thupia in. A leilot thu son khak zaw sia in, a masa sia sangin sia zawlai tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew27:65 Pilate in, “Ngalkap pawlkhat paipui vun a, thaan sia a muanhuai theiza in cingsak tavun,” ci hi." 
Matthew27:66 Tua ahikom amate pai in, thaan kongvang sia a bit thei natu in, suang tungah tepteena khen in ngalkapte ii cin tu in nusia uh hi." 
Matthew28:1 Sabbath zawkciang, Nipi ni khua hong vak ciangin, Mary Magdalene le Mary dangkhat thaan vil tu in pai uh hi." 
Matthew28:2 Thakhatin nasia tak zinliing hi. Topa vantunglalang khat van pan hong tuaksuk a, thaan kong hukna suangtum liikkeak in a tungah to hi." 
Matthew28:3 Ama meal sia khualeng taw kibangin, a puansilh sia vuuk bangin paak hi." 
Matthew28:4 A cingte lau mama ahikom, liingin mithi sate taw kibang uh hi." 
Matthew28:5 Vantunglalang in numeite paupui hi. “Lau heak vun. Thinglamtee tungah a kithat Jesus sia zong nu hi ci in kong he hi. 
Matthew28:6 Ama in hi sungah om ngawl hi! Ama hong sonsa bangma in kitho kiksak zo hi. Hi sungah hong pai tavun a, a lupna hong en tavun." 
Matthew28:7 Tu in manlangin pai tavun a, a nungzuite munah, ‘Ama sia thina pan kithosak zo a, tu in ama in note mai Galilee ah pai tu hi; tua munah ama na mu tu uh hi!’ ci tavun. Kong son sate ciamtee tavun,” ci hi." 
Matthew28:8 Tua ahikom amate in, thaan sia manlang takin nusia a, lau kawm si lungdamna taw kidim si in, nungzuite kungah thupuak tu in tai uh hi." 
Matthew28:9 Thakhatin Jesus in amate taw kisi a, “Thinnopna na nga tavun,” ci hi. Amate in ama kungah hong neak uh a, a peang koai in bia uh hi." 
Matthew28:10 Jesus in, “Lau heak vun; Pai tavun a, ka suapuite tungah, Galilee ah pai tu in sawl tavun, tua munah amate in kei hong mu tu hi,” ci hi." 
Matthew28:11 Numeite sia amate pai natu ah a pai laanin, thaancing ngalkapte pawlkhat khuapi sungah heak kikin, thiampi liante tungah thupiang theampo ko uh hi." 
Matthew28:12 Thiampi liante in upate taw kisi in, kikupna khat nei uh hi. A ngalkapte sum tam mama pia uh a," 
Matthew28:13 tuaciangin, “Zan ka mut lanin nungzuite hong pai a, a luang hong ngu hi, na ci tu uh hi." 
Matthew28:14 Tuaciangin ngamuk mangpa in hi thu a za tha le, note mawna a hi ngawl hunlam ka na son tu uh hi, bangma thinngim natu om ngawl hi,” ci uh hi." 
Matthew28:15 Ngalkapte in sum la in, a kisawl na bangin vawt uh hi. Tua hi a, tua thupuakna sia tuni dong Jew te sungah kizel hi." 
Matthew28:16 Nungzui sawm le khat te in Galilee ngam mual tungah Jesus sawl bangin pai uh hi. 
Matthew28:17 Ama a mu ciangin, pawlkhat in um tak ngawl ahitazong, amate in bia uh hi." 
Matthew28:18 Jesus in amate kung nai neakin, “Vantung le leitung ah thunei theina theampo a vekpi in kei hong kipia zo hi." 
Matthew28:19 Tua ahiciang pai tavun, mun theampo ah mihing theampo ka nungzui suaksak tavun: Pa, Tapa le Thaa Thiangtho min taw tui na phum tavun," 
Matthew28:20 tuaciang ka thu piakte theampo a zui natu hil tavun. Tuaciang hun bo dongin note taw kong omkhawm tawntung tu hi,” ci hi." 
Mark1:1 Hi thu in Pathian Tapa Jesus Christ Lungdamna Thupha ahi hi. 
Mark1:2 Kamsaangpa Isaiah at sa bangin kipan hi. “Pathian in ‘Ka kamtaipa sia na lampi hong honkholsak tu in, na mai ah ka paisak tu hi.’" 
Mark1:3 Sennealngam sungah mihing khat hong au a, ‘Topa atu in lampi puuakhol vun; ama khualhaw natu in lamzin tang khat vawtsak vun!’ ” ci hi." 
Mark1:4 Tuabangin John sia sennealngam sungah hong kilak a, ama in thuhil in tuiphum hi. “Na mawna pan kisiik kik vun a, tui kiphum vun, tua hile Pathian in na mawnate hong maisak tu hi,” mipite tungah ci hi." 
Mark1:4 Tuabangin John sia sennealngam sungah hong kilak a, ama in thuhil in tuiphum hi. “Na mawna pan kisiik kik vun a, tui kiphum vun, tua hile Pathian in na mawnate hong maisak tu hi,” mipite tungah ci hi." 
Mark1:5 Judea ngam pan le Jerusalem khua panin John thuson ngai tu in mihing tam mama hong pai uh hi. Amate in a mawnate pualaak uh a, tua zawkciang Jordan Ngun sungah, ama in tuiphum hi." 
Mark1:5 Judea ngam pan le Jerusalem khua panin John thuson ngai tu in mihing tam mama hong pai uh hi. Amate in a mawnate pualaak uh a, tua zawkciang Jordan Ngun sungah, ama in tuiphum hi." 
Mark1:5 Judea ngam pan le Jerusalem khua panin John thuson ngai tu in mihing tam mama hong pai uh hi. Amate in a mawnate pualaak uh a, tua zawkciang Jordan Ngun sungah, ama in tuiphum hi." 
Mark1:6 John in kalaoh mul taw a kitak puan silh a, savun kawngkhau thua in, a anneak sia khaumaw le ngam khuaitui ahi hi." 
Mark1:6 John in kalaoh mul taw a kitak puan silh a, savun kawngkhau thua in, a anneak sia khaumaw le ngam khuaitui ahi hi." 
Mark1:7 Mihingte ii munah, ama in, “Kei nung pan hong pai lai tu pa sia kei sangin lianzaw pek hi. Kunin a peangdap khau suut tu zongh in ka kilawm bua hi." 
Mark1:8 Note sia tui taw tui kong phum hi, ahihang ama in Thaa Thiangtho taw hong baptize tu hi,” ci in taangko hi." 
Mark1:9 Tua zawk a ngei ngawlin Jesus sia Galilee ngam Nazareth khua panin hong pai a Jordan ah John in tuiphum hi. 
Mark1:9 Tua zawk a ngei ngawlin Jesus sia Galilee ngam Nazareth khua panin hong pai a Jordan ah John in tuiphum hi. 
Mark1:10 Tuisung pan Jesus a thaw to po ciangin, van kihong a, Thaa sia ama tungah ngam vakhu bangin hong tuaksuk sia ama in mu hi." 
Mark1:11 Vantung panin aw khat nging a, “Nang sia ka it ka Tapa na hi hi. Nang tungah ka lungkim hi,” ci hi." 
Mark1:12 Thakhatin Thaa in ama sennealngam sungah paisak hi. 
Mark1:13 Tua munah Satan in ama ni sawmli sung ze et hi. Tua munah ngamsate zongh om a, ahizong, vantunglalangte hong pai in ama hu hi." 
Mark1:14 John thong sungah a kikhum zawkciang, Jesus Galilee ngam ah pai a, Pathian Lungdamna thupha hil hi." 
Mark1:14 John thong sungah a kikhum zawkciang, Jesus Galilee ngam ah pai a, Pathian Lungdamna thupha hil hi." 
Mark1:15 “A hun hong tung zo hi, Pathian Ngam hong nai zo hi. Na mawnate uh pan kisiik vun a, Lungdamna Thupha um vun!” ci hi." 
Mark1:16 Jesus Galilee tuili hui ah a va laitakin, ngasa paai mihing nii, Simon le a suapuipa Andrew ngeen taw ngasa manin a om mu hi." 
Mark1:17 Jesus in, “Hong pai tavun, mihing mante kong suaksak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Mark1:18 Thakhatin amate in, a ngeen uh nusia in ama zui uh hi." 
Mark1:19 Ama in mai sangah tawm a pai ciang, Zebedee ii tapate James le John te unau mu hi. Amate a ngeente puua in ngunkuang sungah om uh hi." 
Mark1:19 Ama in mai sangah tawm a pai ciang, Zebedee ii tapate James le John te unau mu hi. Amate a ngeente puua in ngunkuang sungah om uh hi." 
Mark1:19 Ama in mai sangah tawm a pai ciang, Zebedee ii tapate James le John te unau mu hi. Amate a ngeente puua in ngunkuang sungah om uh hi." 
Mark1:20 Jesus in a mu po ciangin sam hi; amate in a pa uh Zebedee le a cial sa naseamte ngunkuang sungah nusia in Jesus zui uh hi. 
Mark1:21 Jesus le a nungzuite Capernaum khua hong theng uh a, Sabbath kik ni ciangin, Jesus in Jew te ii synagogue ah pai in hilna nei tu in kipan hi." 
Mark1:22 A thuhilna a za mihingte in ama thuhil zia lamdang sa uh hi, banghang ziam cile, Thukham hil syate bang hi ngawlin, ama in thuneina taw thuhil hi." 
Mark1:23 Tua zawk hiat ciangin doaivei pasal khat synagogue sungah hong tumin cik-au hi. 
Mark1:24 “Nazareth mi Jesus awng, kote bang hong nuammaw ni ziam? Ko hong lalcipsak tu in hi sungah hong pai na hi ziam? Nang akua na hi hunlam hong he khu hi — Nang sia a thiangtho Pathian kamtaipa ni hi,” ci hi." 
Mark1:25 Jesus in doai munah, “Pau heak in, pasalpa sung pan hong pusuak ta'n!” ci in thupia hi." 
Mark1:26 Doai in pasalpa thing zazaan a, a nging in a cik-au zawkciang pasalpa sung pan pusuak hi." 
Mark1:27 Mihingte theampo in lamdang mama sa uh a, “Bangbang thu hi thong ziam? Tu a sia kihilna thak khat ahi ziam? Hisia pa in doaite tungah thunei a, thu a piak ciangin doai in a thu ni hi!” ci in khat le khat kikum uh hi." 
Mark1:28 Tuabangin Jesus huvau thupiangte Galilee ngam mun theampo ah manlang takin kizel hi. 
Mark1:29 Jesus in a nungzuite taw synagogue nusia in Simon le Andrew te inn ah paisuak uh hi. Nungzui James le John zongh kihel hi. 
Mark1:29 Jesus in a nungzuite taw synagogue nusia in Simon le Andrew te inn ah paisuak uh hi. Nungzui James le John zongh kihel hi. 
Mark1:29 Jesus in a nungzuite taw synagogue nusia in Simon le Andrew te inn ah paisuak uh hi. Nungzui James le John zongh kihel hi. 
Mark1:30 Simon sunghnu a ciina in lum a, suuk hi. Jesus hong thet po ciangin, tua thu ama tungah son hi." 
Mark1:31 Ama in nupinu kungah pai in a khut pan kaito in thosak hi. A ciisa natna thai a, amate zin do hi." 
Mark1:32 Ni tumin nitak hun a thet ciang, mihingte in Jesus kungah, ciinate le doaiveite paipui uh hi." 
Mark1:33 Khuapi sung pan mihing theampo inn mai ah kikhawm uh hi. 
Mark1:34 Jesus in natna satna namcin taw a na theampo damsakin, doaivei tam mama a doai nawkeaksak hi. Ama in doaite ii pau tu khaam hi, banghang ziam cile amate in Jesus sia akua ziam ci in he uh hi." 
Mark1:35 Zingtuung khuavak ma in, Jesus tho in tua inn nusia hi. Khuapi puasang a ngamkhingna mun khat ah pai in thungen hi." 
Mark1:36 Ahihang Simon le a kitholpuite in ama zong tu in pai uh hi. 
Mark1:37 Tuaciang ama a mu uh ciangin, “A kuama po in nang hong zong hi,” ci uh hi." 
Mark1:38 Ahihang Jesus in, “Hisung kiim le paam khua dangte sung zongh ah ih pai kul tu hi. Tua munte zongh ah thu ka hil kul tu hi, banghang ziam cile, tua nasep ma seam tu in hong pai ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Mark1:39 Tua hi a, ama in Galilee ngam bup synagogue te ah thuhil in doaite not hi." 
Mark1:40 A lauhuai vun natna vei a nasia mama khat Jesus kungah hong pai a, khupdin in, “Hong damsak nuam po lete hong damsak thei tu ni hi,” ci in hu ngen hi." 
Mark1:41 Jesus in ama khuangai huai sa in, a khut vaan in tham hi. “Hong damsak nuam khi hi, dam ta'n,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Mark1:42 Thakhatin pasalpa a natna dam thiang paih hi. 
Mark1:43 Tua zawkciang, Jesus in ama nasia tak talin, paisak paih a," 
Mark1:44 “En in, hi thu kuama munah son heak in. Pai vingveng ta'n a, thiampipa in vealsak ta'n; na thianthona mihing theampo tungah a kilangh natu in, Moses sawl bangin, sangaw biakpiakna vawt ta'n,” ci hi." 
Mark1:45 Ahihang pasalpa pai in mun theampo ah hi thupiang sia son kawkoai hi. Pasalpa in nasia tak son ahikom Jesus sia khuapi khat pawpo ah, mipite ii mutang in, a tum ngam nawn bua hi. A ngamkhingna munte ah ama om a, mihingte in mun theampo panin ama kung zuan uh hi." 
Mark2:1 Ni tam kihal ngawlin Jesus Capernaum khua ah pai kik hi, tuaciang ama inn ah om hi, ci in kiza hi." 
Mark2:2 Tua ahikom mihing tam mama hong kikhawmtua uh a, om natu mun awng zongh om nawn ngawl liangin kongbiang puasia dongin dim uh hi. Jesus in thu a hihil laitakin," 
Mark2:3 pasal li hong theng a, Jesus kungah pumzaw pasal khat puak hi." 
Mark2:4 Ahizong mihonpite hu in ciina sia Jesus kung tatak a then zo bua uh hi. Tua ahikom amate in Jesus omna san innkhum sulet uh a, pasalpa phah tungah lumsakin, innkhum a sukletna panin khiasuk uh hi." 
Mark2:5 Amate in bangza in upna nei ci sia Jesus in a mu ciang, pumzaw pa munah, “Ka tapa awng, na mawnate hong kimaisak zo hi,” ci hi." 
Mark2:6 Tua munah a to Thukham hil syate in," 
Mark2:7 “Banghangin hi bangin pau ngam ziam? Hisia in Pathian min daisakna hi. Pathian bekma in mawnate maisak thei hi!” ci in ngaisun hi. 
Mark2:8 Thakhatin Jesus in amate ngaisutna teng tel ahikom, “Banghang tuabangin ngaisun nu ziam?" 
Mark2:9 Hi pumzaw pa tungah ‘Na mawnate hong kimaisak zo hi’ cile, ‘Tho in, na phah luakin lampai in,’ ci koisia ol zaw ziam?" 
Mark2:10 Tua ahibuale Mihing Tapa in leitung mawmaisak theina nei hi, ci in no tungah lak tu khi hi,” ci in pumzaw pa munah," 
Mark2:11 “Tho in, na phah luakin cia ta'n, hong ci khi hi!” ci hi." 
Mark2:12 Amate mu tangin pasalpa tho a, a phah luakin cia vingveng hi. Amate in lamdang sa mama in, Pathian pok uh hi. “Hi bang peuma mu ngei bua hing!” ci uh hi." 
Mark2:13 Jesus Galilee tuili hui ah pai kik hi. Mihon khat ama kungah hong pai hi, tuasia ciangin amate thuhil tu in kipan hi." 
Mark2:14 A pai kawkawm in, Alphaeus ii tapa Levi kici shiadongpa a zum sungah to in a om mu hi. “Hong zui ta'n” ci hi. Levi zongh ding vangiat in zui hi." 
Mark2:15 Tua zawkciang Levi ii inn ah Jesus in an ne hi. Shiadongte honkhat le a dang a kinialnamhte pawlkhat in, Jesus zui a, Jesus le a nungzuite taw an nekhawm uh hi." 
Mark2:16 Pharisee a kici Thukham hil syate in, Jesus shiadongte le a kinialnamhte taw an nekhawm in om a mu uh ciangin, “Banghangin ama in mihing tuabangte taw an nekhawm ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Mark2:17 Jesus in amate thu kidok za a, “Mihing ciidamte in syavuan tulmaw ngawl a, ciinate bek in syavuan tulmaw uh hi. Mihing zatakhuaite sam tu in kong pai bua a, a kinialnamhte sam tu in kong pai hi,” ci hi." 
Mark2:18 Hun khat lai in, Tuiphumpa John ii nungzuite le Phariseete an tang uh hi. Mihing pawlkhat Jesus kungah hong pai a, “Banghangin Tuiphumpa John nungzuite le Phariseete nungzuite in an tang a, na nungzuite in, banghangin an tang ngawl ziam?” ci in Jesus dongh uh hi." 
Mark2:18 Hun khat lai in, Tuiphumpa John ii nungzuite le Phariseete an tang uh hi. Mihing pawlkhat Jesus kungah hong pai a, “Banghangin Tuiphumpa John nungzuite le Phariseete nungzuite in an tang a, na nungzuite in, banghangin an tang ngawl ziam?” ci in Jesus dongh uh hi." 
Mark2:19 Jesus in, “Mopoai an kivaakna sungah leangnate in an ne ngawlin om tu na um uh ziam? Om ngawl tu hi! Zineipa sia amate taw a omkhop laiteng amate in tuabang a ngamta buatu hi." 
Mark2:20 Ahihang ni khat ni ciangin zineipa sia amate kung pan hong kila tu a, tuasia ciangin an tang tu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Mark2:21 “Kuama in puan lui ek sa sia puan thak taw phaw ngeingawl hi, banghang ziam cile puan thak sia a ton ciangin a lui sia ekkeak tu a, a vang zaisak seseam tu hi." 
Mark2:22 Tuasia bangma savun thawl lui sungah sapittui thak kuama in thaal ngeingawl hi, banghang ziam cile sapittui thak sia in savun thawl lui sia saantham tu a, a sapittui le a thawl lalcip tu hi. Sapittui thak sia savun thawl thak sungah thaal tu hi zaw hi,” ci hi." 
Mark2:23 Jesus sia Sabbath ni khat zungtaang lo pawlkhat kaantan in pai hi. A nungzuite zongh ama taw kithawl a, zungtaang huite hiat tu in kipan uh hi." 
Mark2:24 Tuasia ciang Phariseete in Jesus munah, “En in, Sabbath ni na nungzuite ii zia bang a ngamtat tu sia ih thukham in khaam hi,” ci uh hi." 
Mark2:25 Jesus in, “David in bang khat po a neak tu a kisap mama hun laitakin, a ngamtatna sim ngeingawl nu ziam? Ama le a mite a ngilkial hi." 
Mark2:26 Tua ahikom Pathian inn sungah tumin Pathian a kipiasa anluum ne hi. Tua hun laitak sia Abiathar in Thiampi Lianbel a sep laitak hi. Ih Thukham bangin ci leang thiampite bek in hi anluum a neak thei natu ahi hi, ahihang David in ne a, a mite zongh pia hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Mark2:27 A thukhupna ah Jesus in, “Sabbath sia mihingte ii phat natu in a kivawt hi a, mihing sia Sabbath atu a kivawt a hi bua hi." 
Mark2:28 Tua hi a, Mihing Tapa sia Sabbath ngawngawn ii Topa ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Mark3:1 Tua zawkciang Jesus in Jew te synagogue ah pai a, tua munah khut langkhatzaw pasal khat om hi." 
Mark3:2 Jesus ngamtat khial tu a encik mihing pawlkhat tua munah om ahikom Sabbath ni in, Jesus in ciina damsak ziam, a damsak bua ziam, ci in encik nginge uh hi." 
Mark3:3 Jesus in pasalpa munah, “Hi sung mai sangah hong pai ta'n,” ci hi." 
Mark3:4 Tua zawkciang mipite munah, “Ih Thukham in Sabbath ni in, bang teng sep tu hong oai ziam? Ngual hu tu ziam maw ngual ngim pia tu ziam? Mihing khat ii nuntakna hun tu ziam maw that tu ziam?,” ci in dongh hi. Ahihang amate kam khat zongh a pau bua uh hi." 
Mark3:5 A kiimkot a et ciangin, Jesus in amate tungah thin uuk ahitazong hesuakhuai sa si hi, banghang ziam cile amate a thin uh pui mama a, a ngaisutna uh zongh maan ngawl hi. Tua zawkciang pasalpa munah, “Na khut vaan in,” ci hi. Ama in a khut vaan a, a khut dam kik hi." 
Mark3:6 Tua ahikom Phariseete sia synagogue nusia in thakhatin Herod pawlte pawlkhat taw kisi uh a, Jesus thalup tu in, vaihawmna nei uh hi." 
Mark3:7 Jesus le a nungzuite Galilee tuili sangah pai uh a, mihonpi in zui hi. Amate in Galilee, Judea," 
Mark3:7 Jesus le a nungzuite Galilee tuili sangah pai uh a, mihonpi in zui hi. Amate in Galilee, Judea," 
Mark3:8 Jerusalem, Idumea ngam, Jordan ngun nisuana sang ngam, Tyre le Sidon khuapite kiim le paam ngamte panin hong pai hi. Hi mite theampo sia Jesus sep le vawt teng a zaak hu in, Jesus kungah hong pai uh hi." 
Mark3:9 Mihing tam mama a, ama a kihencip thak ngawl natu in nungzuite munah ngunkuang khat zongin sawl hi." 
Mark3:10 Ama in mihing tam mama damsak hi, tuaciang natna nei peuma in ama tham tu in kiphul ngawp uh hi." 
Mark3:11 Thaa ngilo vei mihingte in a mu uh ciangin, amate mai ah puk in, cik-au uh a, “Nang sia Pathian Tapa ni hi” ci hi." 
Mark3:12 Ama sia akua ahi hunlam kuama tungah a son ngawl natu in, thaa ngilote munah Jesus in nasia takin thupia hi." 
Mark3:13 Tua zawkciang Jesus in mualtung khat ah kaato in, ama dei teng a kungah samtuam hi. A kungah amate in zuan a," 
Mark3:14 tuaciangin ama in sawm le nii tealin, sawltakte ci in min vaw hi. “Kei taw a omkhawm tu in, no teng hong teal zo khi hi, thuhil tu zongin kong paisak tu a," 
Mark3:15 doaite nawkeak natu thu na nei tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Mark3:16 Sawm le nii a teal teng sia hi teng ahi hi, Simon (Jesus in Peter ci in min a piak sia)," 
Mark3:17 Zebedee tapate unau James le John, (Jesus in min pia a, Boanerges ci, a khiakna, “Vanto mihingte”);"

Mark3:18 Andrew, Philip, Bartholomew, Matthew, Thomas, Alphaeus ii tapa James, Thaddaeus, Minam itpa Simon," 
Mark3:18 Andrew, Philip, Bartholomew, Matthew, Thomas, Alphaeus ii tapa James, Thaddaeus, Minam itpa Simon," 
Mark3:18 Andrew, Philip, Bartholomew, Matthew, Thomas, Alphaeus ii tapa James, Thaddaeus, Minam itpa Simon," 
Mark3:19 le Jesus a leeheakpa Judas Iscariot te ahi hi. 
Mark3:20 Tua zawkciangin Jesus inn ah cia hi. Mipi hong kikhawm leleau ahikom Jesus le a nungzuite in anneak hun tu a nga bua uh hi. 
Mark3:21 A innkuanpuite in a zaak uh ciangin ama keam tu in hong pai uh hi, banghang ziam cile mihingte in, “Ama a thin amh zo hi,” ci uh hi." 
Mark3:22 Jerusalem pan hong pai thukhamhil sya pawlkhatte in, “Ama sungah Beelzebul om hi!” ci uh hi. “Tuasia doaite sung pan a lianbel sia hi, ama tungah doai nawkeak thei natu vaang a pia sia pa hi,” ci uh hi." 
Mark3:23 Tua ahikom Jesus in amate a kungah samin, thusonteena taw amate tungah son hi. “Satan in bangbangin Satan notkeak thei tu ziam?" 
Mark3:24 Ngam khat sia pawl tuatuamin kikhen hen a, khat le khat kido le tua ngam tamhtham tu hi." 
Mark3:25 Innkuan khat pawl tuatuamin kikhenin, pawlkhat le pawlkhat kido le tua innkuan sia kitamhtham tu hi." 
Mark3:26 Tua hi a Satan ngam sia pawltuamin kikhen le, kip ngeingawl tu a, tamhtham in bocip tu hi." 
Mark3:27 “Thahatpa, a kiletheen phot mateng kuama in a inn phuul zo ngawl tu hi. Tua zawkciang bekma in phuul thei pheang tu hi." 
Mark3:28 “A tatak ka ci ciang, mihingte sia a mawnate le a sia a paunate uh pan kimaisak thei hi." 
Mark3:29 Ahihang Thaa Thiangtho a sonsiate sia, kimaisak ngeingawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile ama in tawntung mawna vawt ahi hi,” Jesus in ci hi." 
Mark3:30 (Tuabang a ci sia banghang ziam cile mihing pawlkhat in, “Ama sia thaa ngilo vei hi,” a ci uh hang hi.)" 
Mark3:31 Tua zawkciangin Jesus nu le a suapuipate hong theng uh hi. Amate in doipua ah dingin, ama taw kimu tu in samsak hi." 
Mark3:32 Jesus kiim ah a to mihonte in, “En in, na nu le na suapuipate le na suapuinute in inn pua panin hong ngak a nangma taw kimu nuam hi,” ci uh hi." 
Mark3:33 Jesus in, “Ka nu akua ziam? Ka suapuipate akua ziam?” ci hi." 
Mark3:34 Ama in a kiim ah a to mihingte en in, “En vun! Hite sia ka nu le ka suapuite ahi hi!" 
Mark3:35 “Pathian dei bang a ngamtate sia, ka suapuipa, ka suapuinu le ka nu ahi hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Mark4:1 Jesus in Galilee tuili hui ah hilna nei tu in kipan kik hi. A kiim ah mihing tam mama ahikom ama in ngunkuang sungah tuak in to hi. Tui tungah ngunkuang om a, mihonte tui hui vaalbo ah ding uh hi." 
Mark4:2 Ama in thusonteena zanghin, thu tam mama hi bangin hil hi:" 
Mark4:3 “Ngai vun! khatvei lai in, pasal khat thaicii poai tu in kuan hi." 
Mark4:4 Ama in lo sungah thaiciite a poai ciangin, pawlkhat lamzin dung ah taakin, vacimte in tawm khawng uh hi." 
Mark4:5 Pawlkhat suang tam, lei daina ah taak hi. A lei thuk ngawl ahikom hai ngawlin, thaiciite poto hi." 
Mark4:6 Ni hong sat ciangin, ankungnote kaanghlum hi, a zung thuk ngawl ahikom ankungnote ko ngawtaak hi." 
Mark4:7 Thaicii pawlkhat sia lingphung sungah taak a, tua lingte in khannelh in deapcip ahi hu in a nga zo bua hi." 
Mark4:8 Ahihang thaicii pawlkhat sia lei phana ah taak ahikom, a kung hong po a, khangin a nga hong nga hi, tua a nga pawlkhat in, a zaa sawmthum, a zaa sawmluk le a dangte in a zaa zakhat dongin nga hi.”" 
Mark4:9 “Bil na nei uh le hi thu za tavun!” ci in Jesus in a thuson khup hi. 
Mark4:10 Jesus ama nguakin a om laitak nungzui sawm le niite le a thuson a za pawlkhatte ama kungah hong pai a, thusonteenate a sontel natu in, dongh uh hi." 
Mark4:11 “No tungah Pathian Ngam thuku sia hong kipia zo hi,” ci in Jesus in zo kik hi. “Ahihang a puasang om ngualdangte in, thusonteena taw veu in a za tu uh hi." 
Mark4:12 Tuasia ciang: ‘Amate in e en ahihang a mu buatu hi; ngangai tu ahihang a tel buatu hi. Banghang ziam cile amate in mu thei, za thei thong le Pathian kungah heak kik tu uh a, tuaciang ama in a mawna uh maisak tu hi.’ ”" 
Mark4:13 Tuaciang Jesus in, “Hi thusonteena tel ngawl nu ziam? Tua ahile thusonteena dangte koibangin tel tu nu ziam?" 
Mark4:14 Thaicii poaipa in Pathian kammalte poai hi. 
Mark4:15 Mihing pawlkhatte lamdung ah a taak thaiciite taw kibang hi, a thu a zaak po ciangin, Satan hong pai in laaksak hi." 
Mark4:16 Ngualdang pawlkhatte suang tungah a taak thaicii taw kibang hi. A thu a zaak po ciang lungdam takin saang hi. 
Mark4:17 Ahihang a thu in amate sungah thuk bun ngawl ahikom, khuangei a khom bua uh hi. Tua ahiciang tua thu hangin ngimna le vawtsiatna hong pai ciang, thakhat thu in amate pukkik uh hi." 
Mark4:18 Ngualdang pawlkhatte lingphung sungah taak thaiciite taw kibang hi. Hite sia a thu a zate ahi hi. 
Mark4:19 Ahihang nuntakna tu thinngimna, hau nopna le a dang deinate in deapcip ahikom nga a nga thei bua uh hi." 
Mark4:20 Ahihang mihing pawlkhatte lei phana a, a kipoai thaiciite bang ahi hi. Amate in a thu za a, saangin, a nga nga uh hi, pawlkhat a zaa sawmthum, pawlkhat a zaa sawmluk, pawlkhat a zaa zakhat dongin nga uh hi." 
Mark4:21 Jesus in, “Mihing khat pawpo in meiinn hong sungtan pui in kuang nuai ah ahibuale lupna nuai ah koi ngei ka na ziam? Mei vakna khuam tungah koi hi ngawl ziam?" 
Mark4:22 A kisealcip thute peuma a kipualaak tu a, a kisiin theampo kihongkeak tu hi." 
Mark4:23 Bil na nei uh le za tavun!” ci in zomto hi. 
Mark4:24 Jesus in, “Na zaak uh sia pha takin ngai vun! Ngual tungah na zak thukhenna sia Pathian in no tungah thukhenna in hong zangh tu hi — a nasia zaw lai in thu hong khen tu hi." 
Mark4:25 Na pawlkhat a nei sia tungah kipia thua tu hi, bangma a nei ngawl sia tung pan tawm bek a nei sun teng zongh kilaaksak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Mark4:26 Jesus in a ci lai na panin, “Pathian Ngam sia hi bang ahi hi. Pasal khat in ama lo sungah thaicii poai hi." 
Mark4:27 Ama zanin mu a, sunin diang hi, tua laan theampo in thaicii hong po a hong khang hi. Ahihang bangbangin piang ziam ci in a he bua hi." 
Mark4:28 Leitang mama in ankungnote posakin, ngasak hi, a masabel in a kung moi suakin ngap hong toai a, a khakbel in a ngapte sungah a tang a dim in om hi." 
Mark4:29 An a ngau ciangin a kungte mihingte in a phiau taw attan uh hi, banghang ziam cile anlaak hun hong theng ahi hi." 
Mark4:30 “Pathian Ngam sia bang taw kibang ih ci tu ziam?” ci in Jesus in dongh hi. “Bang thusonteena taw sontel tu hi ziam? 
Mark4:31 Tuasia hi bang hi. Pasal khat in ankamhcii, leitung a thaicii a nobel sia la in leisung tu hi." 
Mark4:32 Tawmvei zawkciang poto a, ankungte sung pan a lianbel hong suak hi. A baakte zongh lian mama ahikom vacimte hong pai in, a lim bealhin bu vawt uh hi,” ci hi." 
Mark4:33 Jesus in mihingte munah hi thuhil a, hi bang thusonteena dang tam mama zongh zangh hi, amate ii tel thei zaza son hi." 
Mark4:34 Amate tungah thusonteena ngawl taw thuson nuam ngawl a, ahihang a nungzuite bek a om ciang, amate munah a vekpi in sontel hi." 
Mark4:35 Tua nitakin Jesus in a nungzuite munah, “Tuili langkhat ah pai tawng,” ci hi." 
Mark4:36 Tuasia ciang amate in mihonte tua munah nusia hi, A nungzuite zongh ngunkuang tungah kaa uh a, tua ii sungah Jesus to khol zo hi, tuaciang amate in ama ngunkuang taw paipui uh hi. Tua munah ngunkuang dang zongh om hi." 
Mark4:37 Thakhat thu in nasia tak vuiva a, tuihual ngunkuang sungah kisepsuk hi, tuasia ciangin ngunkuang sung tui dim dektak hi." 
Mark4:38 Jesus sia ngunkuang nungsang ah lukham khat khamhin mu hi. Nungzuite in phong a, “Syapa awng, thilum siat dek ih hi sia awlmawk ngawl ni ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Mark4:39 Jesus tho a, vuipi tungah “Thim vun,” ci a, tuihual tungah “Kilok heak vun!” ci in thupia hi. Vuipi tawlnga in tuihual thim dikdek hi." 
Mark4:40 Jesus in nungzuite munah, “Banghangin lau nu ziam? Tu dong upna nei ngawl lai nu ziam?” ci hi." 
Mark4:41 Ahihang amate lau mama uh a, “Hisia pa a bang mihing hi thong ziam? Vuipi le tuihualte ngawngawn in a thu ni hi!” khat le khat kici uh hi." 
Mark5:1 Jesus a nungzuite taw Galilee Tuili langkhat Gerasa ngam theng hi. 
Mark5:2 Ngunkuang sung pan a pusua po ciang, mithi phumna thaankuul khat sung pan hong pai pasal khat taw Jesus kisi hi. Hisia pa thaa ngilo vei" 
Mark5:3 ahikom thaan sungah teang hi. Kuama in ama thikkhau taw zong khit thei nawn ngawl uh hi: 
Mark5:4 tamvei ma a khut le a peang pan thikkhau taw kikhii ahihang a khii simin, ama in thikkhaute saantat in peangkol thikte zongh sutham hi. Ama kuama zaw zawk ngawl tu dongin hat mama hi." 
Mark5:5 Sun le zan in thaan kawm le mualtung kaantan in vak a, cik-au in ama le ama suanghiam taw ki at bul hi." 
Mark5:6 Jesus a ngalmu ciangin, hong tai a, ama mai ah khupdin in," 
Mark5:7 “A saangbel Pathian Tapa awng! Kei bang hong law nuam ni ziam? Kei daan nong piak ngawl natu in Pathian min taw kong thuum hi,” ci in a aw neiza taw au hi." 
Mark5:8 (Banghangin hi bang ci ziam cile Jesus in, “Thaa ngilo awng, pasalpa sung pan hong pusuak ta'n!” a ci hu ahi hi.)" 
Mark5:9 Tua hi a Jesus in, “Na min bang ziam!” ci in dongh hi. “Ka min sia ‘mihonpi’ hi —” ci hi, “Kote tam tatak ka pha uh hi!” ci hi." 
Mark5:10 Tua ngam panin, thaa ngilote a nawkeak ngawl natu in Jesus tungah thaa ngilo in ngen top hi." 
Mark5:11 Tua mualpangh ah vok honpi khat an zongin taa uh hi. 
Mark5:12 Tua ahikom thaa ngilote in Jesus munah, “Vokte kung zuanin a sung uh ah ka tum thei natu thu hong pia ta'n,” ci uh hi." 
Mark5:13 Ama in tuabangin thupia a, doaite in pasalpa sung panin pusuakin vokte sungah tum uh hi. Vok hon bup — tulnii bang a pha tu teng — liangpangh ah kinuntaw ngawp a, tuili sungah tuitaa in thi siat hi." 
Mark5:14 Vokcingte tai in, hi thu khuapi sung le lote sungah kizelsak hi. Mihing tam mama in bang thupiang ci en tu in pai tek uh hi," 
Mark5:15 Jesus kungah a thet uh ciangin, doai hon tam mama a vei pasalpa mu uh hi. Tua pa sia tua munah to a, puan silhin thinciim in om hi, tuasia ciang amate theampo lau uh hi." 
Mark5:16 A mute theampo in doaivei pasalpa tung le vokte tungah bang thupiang ci thu ngual munah sonsawn uh hi. 
Mark5:17 Tua ahikom amate ii ngam a nusiat natu in Jesus sawl uh hi. 
Mark5:18 Jesus ngunkuang tungah kaa tu a kithoai ciangin doaivei ngeipa in “Hong zuisak ta'n,” ci in ngen hi." 
Mark5:19 Ahihang Jesus in a zuisak nuam bua hi. “Na inn ah cia zaw ta'n a, Topa in nang tungah bang hong vawt a, bangza in hong dik ziam ci thu na innkuanpuite munah son ta'n,” ci hi." 
Mark5:20 Tua ahikom pasalpa pai in Khuapi Sawmte ah ama tungah Jesus ii nasepna teng son hi. A za theampo in lamdang sa uh hi. 
Mark5:21 Jesus in tuili kaantan in a langkhat ah pai hi. Tua tuili hui ah mihonpi khat Jesus kiim ah kikhawm uh hi. 
Mark5:22 Jew te synagogue khat a lampui upa Jairus kici khat in, Jesus peang ah bok a," 
Mark5:23 “Ka tanu zawm mama hi. Hong dam kik natu in, hong pai in a tungah na khut hong ngaksak ta'n,” ci in nasia takin ngen hi." 
Mark5:24 Tuaciang Jesus in ama taw paikhawm hi. Mihing tam mama Jesus taw tonkhawm ahikom a kiim theampo pan kiphulung uh hi. 
Mark5:25 Kum sawm le kum nii tawntung chibua natna nasia mama a thuak numei khat tuate sungah om hi," 
Mark5:26 syavuan tam mama te in bawl a, a sum a paai theampo bo in kibawl ahihang damzaw ngawlin lawmawk seseam hi." 
Mark5:27 Ama in Jesus thu za ngei ahikom mihonte sung Jesus nungsang pan zui in," 
Mark5:28 “A puanmong beak tham thei leng dam tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
Mark5:29 A puan a thamsak ciang a chibua sia thakhatin kang hi, tuaciang a ngim ngana pan damna a nga hunlam kiphawk hi." 
Mark5:30 Thakhatin ama sung pan vaangletna pusuak hi ci in Jesus in, phawk a mipite sangah kiheak in, “Akua in ka puan hong tham nu ziam?” ci hi." 
Mark5:31 A nungzuite in, “Mihonpite ii hong neakcip na mu hi, bangbangin akua in hong tham nu ziam, ci ni ziam?” ci in zo kik uh hi." 
Mark5:32 Ahihang Jesus in ama a tham sia a tel dong en kawkoai hi. 
Mark5:33 Numeinu in ama tungah bang thupiang ci in phawk ahikom, lau in liing a, Jesus sangah pai hi, a peang ah khupdin in, ama tungah a thu theampo son siat hi." 
Mark5:34 “Ka tanu awng, na upna in hong damsak zo hi. Thinnuam in va pai ta'n, na ngim ngana pan dam ta'n,” Jesus in ci hi." 
Mark5:35 Tuabang Jesus a pau laitakin Jairus inn pan kamtai pawlkhat hong pai a, “Na tanu thi zo hi, banghangin Syapa ngim pepia lai ni ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Mark5:36 Jesus in amate thuson nangonthaakin, “Lau heak in, um po in” ci hi." 
Mark5:37 Tua zawkciang Peter, James le a suapuipa John simngawl ngualdang kuama a paipui bua hi." 
Mark5:37 Tua zawkciang Peter, James le a suapuipa John simngawl ngualdang kuama a paipui bua hi." 
Mark5:37 Tua zawkciang Peter, James le a suapuipa John simngawl ngualdang kuama a paipui bua hi." 
Mark5:38 Amate Jairus inn theng uh a, a kap taw a au taw buai in om Jesus in mu hi." 
Mark5:39 Ama sungtang in tua mihingte munah, “Banghangin hi bangin buai nu ziam? Banghangin kap nu ziam? Numeino thi ngawl hi, a mu hi bek hi,” ci hi." 
Mark5:40 Amate in ama nuisan uh hi. Tua ahikom amate theampo, doipua ah pusuaksak siat a, numeino ii pa, a nu le nungzuite thum taw inn doituamna sung numeino lupna ah tum uh hi." 
Mark5:41 Ama in numeino sia a khut pan kaito a, ama tungah, “Talitha, koum,” ci hi. A khiakna sia “Numeino awng, tho in hong ci khi hi,” cina ahi hi." 
Mark5:42 Ama thakhat thu in thoto a, a kiim tengah kotva tu in kipan hi. (Ama kum sawm le kum nii pha hi.) Hi bangin, hong pian ciangin, mihingte in lamdang sa mama uh hi." 
Mark5:43 Ahihang Jesus in kuama munah a son ngawl natu in, nasia takin khaam hi, tuaciangin, “Bang khat pawpo a neak tu pia vun,” Jesus in ci hi." 
Mark6:1 Jesus in tua mun nusia in ama khua Nazareth ah cia kik a, a nungzuite in zui uh hi." 
Mark6:2 Sabbath ni in synagogue ah thuhil tu in kipan hi. Tua munah mihing tam mama om hi; tuaciang ama thuson a zaak uh ciang, amate in lamdang sa tek uh hi. “Hite theampo koisung pan ama in nga ziam?” ci uh hi. “Ama tungah a kipia ciimna bang ciimna ziam? Ama in nalamdang laknate bangbangin vawt thei ziam?" 
Mark6:3 Ama Mary tapa James, Joseph, Judas le Simon ii suapui lettamapa hi ngawl ziam? A suapuinumeite zongh hi sung ma ah teang siat hi ka na ngawl ziam?” ci uh hi. Tua bangin ama a saang zo bua uh hi." 
Mark6:3 Ama Mary tapa James, Joseph, Judas le Simon ii suapui lettamapa hi ngawl ziam? A suapuinumeite zongh hi sung ma ah teang siat hi ka na ngawl ziam?” ci uh hi. Tua bangin ama a saang zo bua uh hi." 
Mark6:4 Jesus in, “Kamsaang khat sia ama khua, ama beete le a innkuanpuite simngawl po in, mun theampo ah zakta uh hi,” ci hi." 
Mark6:5 Ciina tawmte tungah khut nga a, a damsak simngawl tua munah nalamdang laknate, a vawt thei bua hi." 
Mark6:6 Ama in mihingte ii upna a nei ngawl uh sia, lamdang sa mama hi. Tua zawkciangin Jesus in tua mun kiim le paamte ah pai in mihingte hilna nei hi."
