Mark6:7 Ama in nungzui sawm le niite samin, nii veu nii veu paikhawm tu in sawl hi. Doai ngilote tungah thuneina amate tungah pia a," 
Mark6:8 “Na khualhawna uh ah, ciangkhut simngawl a dang keng heak vun — anluum hikale, an khonna ip hikale, sum hikale, na ipno sungah pua heak vun." 
Mark6:9 Peangdapte thua vun a, ahizong laktong keng thua heak vun." 
Mark6:10 No hong saangna inn ah tung tavun a, tua mun pan na din kik uh mateng tua inn ah taam tavun." 
Mark6:11 Khua khat po ah no hong kisaang bua a, hong ngai nuam bua ahile, nusia vun a, na peang tung leivuite na thin tavun. Tuate amate kidop natu thupiakna ahi hi,” ci thua hi." 
Mark6:12 Tuabangin amate pai in mihingte a mawna uh pan a kisiik kik natu thuhil uh hi. 
Mark6:13 Amate in doaite tam mama notkeak in, ciina tam mama olive thau taw zut in damsak uh hi." 
Mark6:14 Tu in Herod Kumpipa in hi thute theampo za hi, banghang ziam cile, Jesus ii minthanna mun theampo ah kizel hi. Mihing pawlkhat in, “Tuiphumpa John nungta kik hi! Tua hu in ama in nalamdang vawt thei natu, vaang nei hi,” ci uh hi." 
Mark6:14 Tu in Herod Kumpipa in hi thute theampo za hi, banghang ziam cile, Jesus ii minthanna mun theampo ah kizel hi. Mihing pawlkhat in, “Tuiphumpa John nungta kik hi! Tua hu in ama in nalamdang vawt thei natu, vaang nei hi,” ci uh hi." 
Mark6:15 A dangte in, “Ama Elijah hi,” ci uh hi. Ahihang a dangte in “Ama taanghlai kamsaangte bangin kamsaang khat hi,” ci uh hi." 
Mark6:16 Herod in a zaak ciangin, “Ama sia Tuiphumpa John hi! A lu ka tansak sa hi napi, hong nungta kik hi!” ci hi." 
Mark6:16 Herod in a zaak ciangin, “Ama sia Tuiphumpa John hi! A lu ka tansak sa hi napi, hong nungta kik hi!” ci hi." 
Mark6:17 Herod ama mama in, John a mat natu in thupia a, thikkhau khii in thong sungah khum hi. Herod in hi bang a, a ngamtat sia banghang ziam cile a suapuipa Philip ii zi Herodias a teenpui hang ahi hi." 
Mark6:17 Herod ama mama in, John a mat natu in thupia a, thikkhau khii in thong sungah khum hi. Herod in hi bang a, a ngamtat sia banghang ziam cile a suapuipa Philip ii zi Herodias a teenpui hang ahi hi." 
Mark6:18 Tuiphumpa John in Herod munah, “Na suapuipa ii zi na teenpui sia suak ngawl hi!” a ci tawntung hang ahi hi." 
Mark6:18 Tuiphumpa John in Herod munah, “Na suapuipa ii zi na teenpui sia suak ngawl hi!” a ci tawntung hang ahi hi." 
Mark6:19 Tua ahikom Herodias in John tungah lungkim ngawlin, thalup sawm ahihang Herod hu in a that thei bua hi." 
Mark6:19 Tua ahikom Herodias in John tungah lungkim ngawlin, thalup sawm ahihang Herod hu in a that thei bua hi." 
Mark6:20 Herod in John kiita hi, banghang ziam cile John sia mihing thiangtho, mihing pha hi ci in he a, tua ahikom ama keamcing hi. A hilna a zaak simin a thin nawngkai mama ahitazong, Herod in John thuson ngai nuam hi." 
Mark6:20 Herod in John kiita hi, banghang ziam cile John sia mihing thiangtho, mihing pha hi ci in he a, tua ahikom ama keamcing hi. A hilna a zaak simin a thin nawngkai mama ahitazong, Herod in John thuson ngai nuam hi." 
Mark6:21 A khakbel ciang Herodias in hunpha khat nga hi. Herod suani hi a, ama in kumpi sung ulianbel theampo, ngalkapmangte le Galilee ii khuanu khuapa te atu in poai vawt hi." 
Mark6:22 Herodias ii tanu pai in hong laam a, Herod le a leangnate theampo lungkim uh hi. Tua ahikom Kumpipa in ngaknu nu munah, “Bang na dei ziam? Na dei pawpo hong pia tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
Mark6:23 “Nong nget theampo hong pia tu khi hi, ka ngam a lang khen dongin hong pia tu khi hi, ci in ka kiciam hi!” ci in kamciam tam mama pia hi." 
Mark6:24 Tuasia ciang ngaknu nu pusuak a, a nu munah, “Bang ngen tu khi ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Tuiphumpa John ii lutang,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Mark6:24 Tuasia ciang ngaknu nu pusuak a, a nu munah, “Bang ngen tu khi ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Tuiphumpa John ii lutang,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Mark6:25 Ngaknu nu kumpipa kungah manlang takin, heak kik a, “Tuiphumpa John ii lutang, tu mama in hi lai ah kuangdal khat tungah hong pia ta'n,” ci in ngen hi." 
Mark6:25 Ngaknu nu kumpipa kungah manlang takin, heak kik a, “Tuiphumpa John ii lutang, tu mama in hi lai ah kuangdal khat tungah hong pia ta'n,” ci in ngen hi." 
Mark6:26 Kumpipa sia hi thu huvau in khuangai mama hi, ahihang a leangna theampo ii mai a kiciamna a vawtsate hu in, a nial thei bua hi." 
Mark6:27 Tua ahikom a cing khat paisak paih in, John ii lutang hong paipui natu thupia hi. A cingpa pusuak in, thong sungah pai a, John ii lutang saattan hi;" 
Mark6:27 Tua ahikom a cing khat paisak paih in, John ii lutang hong paipui natu thupia hi. A cingpa pusuak in, thong sungah pai a, John ii lutang saattan hi;" 
Mark6:28 tuaciang kuangdal khat ii tungah koi in ngaknu nu pia a, tua nu in a nu pia sawn hi." 
Mark6:29 John ii nungzuite in hi thu a zaak uh ciangin, a luang la in vui uh hi." 
Mark6:29 John ii nungzuite in hi thu a zaak uh ciangin, a luang la in vui uh hi." 
Mark6:30 Sawltakte hong cia kik uh a, Jesus taw kisi in, amate sep teng le hilna teng ko uh hi." 
Mark6:31 Mihing a pai a cia kithalee in tam mama ahikom, Jesus le a nungzuite anneak hun zongh a nga bua uh hi. Tua ahikom amate munah, “Eima teng nguak mun khat ah pai in, tawmvei no sung na toitan thei natu uh in, eima bek om tawng,” ci hi." 
Mark6:32 Tua ahikom amate ngunkuang taw pai in, a ngamkhingna mun khat zuan uh hi." 
Mark6:33 Ahitazong, mihing tam mama in, amate pai mu uh a, a kuate ziam ci in tel paih ahikom, khuapi theampo pan hong pai uh a, leilam tawn in amate mai ah tai in, Jesus le a nungzuite thet ma in, tua munah theng uh hi." 
Mark6:34 Jesus in hi mihonpi khat a mu ciang, khuangai huai sa hi, banghang ziam cile amate sia tuucing nei ngawl tuuhonte bang ahi hi. Tua ahikom amate thu tam mama hil tu in kipan hi." 
Mark6:35 Ni hong niam ciangin, nungzuite ama kungah pai uh a, “Tu in ni zongh niam mama zo a, hi sung sia ngamkhing mama mun khat ahi hi." 
Mark6:36 Mipite lo sung ahizong, khuano sung ahizong, a neak tu khat pawpo lei tu in paisak in,” ci hi." 
Mark6:37 “Noma in a neak tu khat pawpo pia vun,” ci in Jesus in zo kik hi. “Amate vaak natu ngunn dangka zanii manh anluum lei le hong oai ni ziam?,” ci in amate in dongh uh hi." 
Mark6:38 Tua ahikom, Jesus in, “Anluum bangza nei nu ziam? Pai in en tavun,” ci in dongh hi. “Anluum nga le ngasa nii kinei hi,” ci in zo kik uh hi." 
Mark6:39 Jesus in a nungzuite munah mipite a pawl a pawlin, lopa hing tungah tosakin sawl hi." 
Mark6:40 Tua ahikom mipite a ngui in to a, pawlkhat zakhat, pawlkhat sawmnga in to uh hi." 
Mark6:41 Tua zawkciang Jesus in anluum nga le ngasa nii teng la a, van ento in, Pathian tungah lungdamko hi. Ama in anluumte baltham in mipite hawmsak tu in a nungzuite tungah pia hi. Ngasa pum nii te zongh, amate sungah hawm siat hi." 
Mark6:42 A om theampo in a kham in ne tek uh hi. 
Mark6:43 Tua zawkciang nungzuite in, anluum le ngasa a khamvaal uh khum sawm le khum nii dimin seng lai uh hi." 
Mark6:44 An a kivaak sia pasal tulnga pha hi. 
Mark6:45 Mipite a ciasak lanin Jesus in nungzuite ngunkuang tungah tosak a, tuili langkhat Bethsaida khua ah a paikhol tu in sawl hi." 
Mark6:46 Kikhen natu mipite tungah mangpha a thaak zawkciang ama thungen tu in mual tungah kaato hi. 
Mark6:47 Nitak ciangin ngunkuang tuili laizang ah theng a, Jesus ama nguakin lei ah om hi." 
Mark6:48 Ama in a nungzuite ngunkuang nasia tak hotin a om mu hi, banghang ziam cile amate in vui vakna sang maingat in hot uh hi; tuaciang zingsang nai thum le nai luk kilaklaw in Jesus amate sang tui tungah lam hong pai hi. Ama in a nungzuite suang khial tu in kithoai a," 
Mark6:49 ahihang amate in tui tungah Jesus lam a pai mu uh hi. “Thithaa hi,” ci in ngaisun in cik-au uh hi." 
Mark6:50 Ama a mu uh ciangin, amate a lau tek mama uh hi. Jesus in amate thakhatin paupui a, “Na thin uh liansak vun! Keima khi hi. Lau heak vun!” ci hi." 
Mark6:51 Tuaciangin ama ngunkuang tungah to a, tuasia ciangin vui hong thim hi. Nungzuite in lamdang mama sa uh a," 
Mark6:52 banghang ziam cile amate in, mihing tulnga an kivaakna ii a khiakna tatak a tel bua uh hi; amate ngaisutna in a ban zo bua hi." 
Mark6:53 Amate in tuili kaantan in, Gennesaret vaalbo ah kaa a, tua munah a ngunkuangte khau khit uh hi." 
Mark6:54 Amate in ngunkuang a nusiat po ciang, mihingte in Jesus meal tel paih uh hi." 
Mark6:55 Tua ahikom mihingte in ngam bup sungah del kawkoai uh a; ama om hi a kici na mun theampo ah ciinate phah tungah sialin ama kungah puak uh hi. 
Mark6:56 Jesus paina po khuapi, khuano le lo sung a om mihingte in ciinate vanhzuakna phual ah paipui uh a, a puanmong beak a tham tek thei natu in, ama tungah ngen uh hi, tuaciang a thamte theampo dam uh hi." 
Mark7:1 Jerusalem pan hong pai Phariseete pawlkhat le Thukham hil syate pawlkhat, Jesus kiim ah kikhawm uh hi." 
Mark7:2 Amate in nungzui pawlkhatte an a neak tu ciang ngeina bangin, khut thiang ngawl taw an ne mu uh hi — koibang ziam cile amate in Phariseete hil bangin, a khut uh sil ngawl hi." 
Mark7:3 (Phariseete le Jew te peuma in, amate ii taanghpupite hil, ngeina tuatuamte nasia takin zui uh hi: a khut uh ahi tu bangin a sil bua uh le an ne ngawl uh hi;" 
Mark7:4 vanhzuakna phual pan a kinga peuma, tui taw sil phot ngawlin ne ngawl hi. Hai, kuang le beal, taausankuang le lupnate ahi tu bang a, silthiang natu ngeina dang tam mamate zui uh hi.)" 
Mark7:5 Tua ahikom Phariseete le Thukham hil syate in Jesus munah, “Banghangin na nungzuite in, taanghpupite hil ngeinate zui ngawlin, an a neak tu uh ciang a khut thiang ngawl taw an ne ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Mark7:6 Jesus in a zo kikna ah, “Isaiah in note thu a sonkholna bangza in maan ziam! A kihitheamsak minamte awng, ama in hi bangin at hi: ‘Pathian in, hi mite in a kammal bek uh taw, kei zatakna hong pia uh hi, ahihang a thinsung uh kei taw kikhuala uh hi." 
Mark7:7 Amate ii hong biakna sia kimanna om ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile amate in mihingte vawttawm ngeinate Pathian ii Thukham bangin hil uh hi!’ ci hi." 
Mark7:8 “No in Pathian thupiakte vawkin mihingte ii hilnate na ni uh hi.” 
Mark7:9 “Noma ii kihilna te na kholet thei natu in Pathian thukhamte na nial zia uh na thiam uh hi. 
Mark7:10 Bang ci nuam khi ziam cile Moses in ‘Na nu le na pa thasia vun,’ tuaciang, ‘A kuama po a nu a pa a haamsiat sia thina thuak tahen,’ ci hi." 
Mark7:11 Ahihang no ii hilna ah nu le pa hu natu in a kizangh thei na khat pawpo sia, ‘Hi sia Corban,’ hi, (Pathian atu a kipiasa hi) ci po le," 
Mark7:12 nu le pa a hu ngawl hangin, phamaw ngawl hi, ci nu hi." 
Mark7:13 Hi bang kihilnate khat tung pan khat na kipiak sawn uh ciang Pathian kammal a mel suak nu hi. Hi thu taw a kibang na ngamtatna dang uh zongh tam mama om lai hi,” Jesus in ci thua hi." 
Mark7:14 Jesus in mihonpite khatvei ma sam kikin, “Na vekpi in hong ngai tavun a, tel vun." 
Mark7:15 A pua sang pan hong tum nate bangma in, mihing khat sia zeksa taw kisai in ninsak ngawl hi. A sung pan hong pusuak to sia in mihing khat ninsak hi zaw hi," 
Mark7:16 Bil a neite in za tavun” ci hi. 
Mark7:17 Ama mihonpite nusia in, inn sungah a tum ciang, a nungzuite in, hi hilna hong sontel ta'n ci uh hi." 
Mark7:18 “No sia ngualdangte sangin ciimzaw tuan ngawl nu hi. Tel ngawl nu ziam? A pua sang pan hong tum suk na khat pawpo in mihing khat sia ninsak ngawl hi," 
Mark7:19 banghang ziam cile a thinsung ah tum ngawlin, a ngilpi um sungah a tum zawkciang a pua sangah pusuak hi,” Jesus in ci hi. (Hi bang a ci ciang Jesus in, an a minpiang neak tuak hi, ci ahi hi.)" 
Mark7:20 Tuaciang ama in zomto a, “A sung sang pan hong pusuakte in mihing khat ninsak hi." 
Mark7:21 Banghang ziam cile mihing khat ii a sung, a thinsung panin ngaisutna pha ngawl piang a, tuate in paktatna, kisutolna, kithalupna," 
Mark7:22 nupa kipalngulna, duhopna, ngamtat siatna tuatuam; kitheamna, maizummawkna, ki enna, kingensiatna, kiphatsakna, le mawmawtna —" 
Mark7:23 hi siatnate theampo sia mihing khat ii sung pan hong pai nate hi a, tuabangte in amate ninsak hi,” ci hi." 
Mark7:24 Tua zawkciangin Jesus Tyre khuapi hui ngamkhen ah pai tu in ding hi. Inn khat sungah tum a, tua munah ama a om hunlam kuama heak tu oai ngawl ahihang a bucip zo bua hi." 
Mark7:25 A tanu thaa ngilo vei nupi khat in, Jesus thu za ahikom thakhatin hong pai a, a peang ah bok hi." 
Mark7:26 Nupinu sia Gentile mi hi a, Syria ngam Phoenicia ngamkhen sung pan a piang ahi hi. Ama in a tanu sungah a om doai a nawkeaksak natu in Jesus munah ngen hi." 
Mark7:27 Ahihang Jesus in, “Tanote vaak masa phot tawng, tate ii anneak laaksakin, ui piaksak tu kilawm ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
Mark7:28 “Topa awng, tano teng an neakmongte sabuai nuai pan, ui ngawngawn in ne lai buang hi ngawl ziam!,” ci in nupinu in zo hi." 
Mark7:29 Tua ahikom Jesus in, “Tuabangin nong zona hangin, va cia ta'n, doai sia na tanu sung pan pusuak zo hi cisia na mu tu hi!” ci hi." 
Mark7:30 Nupinu a inn ah cia a, a sung pan doai pusuak sa a tanu lupna tungah a lum mu hi." 
Mark7:31 Jesus in Tyre kiim le paam teng nusia in Sidon kaantan in Galilee ah pai a, Khuapi Sawm ii ngamkhente tawn hi." 
Mark7:32 Mihing pawlkhat in pasal nangong a pau thei ngawl khat hong paipui a, ama tungah Jesus ii a khut a ngak natu in ngen uh hi." 
Mark7:33 Tua ahikom Jesus in ama nguakin mihonpite kung pan a khuala thithimna ah samtuam a, pasalpa ii bil sungah a khutme thunin, cilphii in pasalpa ii leei thamsak hi." 
Mark7:34 Tua zawkciang Jesus in, van ento a, phiing vahumin, “Ephphatha,” “Kihong in!” ci hi." 
Mark7:35 Thakhatin pasalpa in khuaza thei a, a pau thei ngawlna pan olno takin pau kik thei hi." 
Mark7:36 Tuaciangin mipite munah hi thu kuama tungah a son ngawl natu in, ama in khaam vaial kale mipite in son vaial uh hi." 
Mark7:37 A za theampo in lamdang sa mama uh hi. “Na theampo bangza in vawt thiam ziam! Ama in nangongte ngawngawn khua zasak thei a, a pau thei ngawlte dongin pausak thei hi,” ci uh hi." 
Mark8:1 Tuazawk khuangei ngawlin mihon dang khat hong kikhawm hi. Tua mihingte anneak tu bangma a nei nawn ngawl uh ciangin, Jesus in a nungzuite a kungah sam a," 
Mark8:2 “Hi mite khuangai huai ka sa hi, banghang ziam cile amate in ni thum tawntung kei taw hong omkhawm a, tu in bangma neak tu nei nawn ngawl hi." 
Mark8:3 An ne ngawlin ciasak leang, lamkaal ah pukhong siat tu hi, banghang ziam cile pawlkhatte a khuala pek pan hong pai ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Mark8:4 A nungzuite in, “Hi sung sennealngam ah koisung panin, mihing hi za ii anneak tu mu tu hi ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Mark8:5 “Anluum bangza nei nu ziam?” ci in Jesus in dongh hi. “Luum sali” ci in zo uh hi. 
Mark8:6 Ama in mihonte lei ah to tu in sawl hi. Tua zawkciang ama in anluum sali teng la in, Pathian tung lungdamko in, balneen a, nungzuite ii mihonte a hawmsak tu in pia hi; tuabang ma in nungzuite in hawm uh hi." 
Mark8:7 Amate in ngasa no pawlkhat zongh nei uh hi. Jesus in hite atu lungdamko a, nungzuite tungah hawm vun ci hi." 
Mark8:8 Mihing sim in ne uh a, kham tek uh hi — an ne mihing theampo 4,000 bang pha hi. Tua zawkciangin nungzuite in an neakmong a khop ciang khum sali dim pha hi. Jesus in mipite ciasak a," 
Mark8:9  
Mark8:10 thakhat thu in nungzuite taw ngunkuang tung zuanin Dalmanutha ngam ah pai uh hi. 
Mark8:11 Phariseete pawlkhat Jesus kungah pai a, ama taw kam kinial uh hi. Amate in Jesus thaangsia bangin sia nuam ahikom Pathian lungkimpuina a om le a om ngawl a tel nopna in, nalamdang lakna khat ngen uh hi." 
Mark8:12 Ahihang Jesus phiing vahumin, “Banghangin tu lai mihingte in nalamdang lakna veu hong ngen ziam? Hong pia ngawl tu khi hi kong ci hi! Hi mihingte tungah tuabang laknate kipia ngawl tu hi!” ci hi." 
Mark8:13 Amate nusia in ama ngunkuang tung zuan kik a, tuili ngalkhat ah pai tu in kipan hi." 
Mark8:14 Nungzuite in anluum a kicing a ken tu mangil a, ngunkuang sungah luum khat bek nei hi." 
Mark8:15 “Kidawm vun a, Phariseete le Herod ii tol panin, kikeam tavun,” Jesus in ci hi." 
Mark8:16 Amate sung teng tua thu kikum uh a: “Hi bang a hong ci sia anluum ih nei ngawl hang a, hong ci hi vak,” ci uh hi." 
Mark8:17 Jesus in amate kikup tuamna teng tel paih ahikom, “Banghangin anluum nei ngawl huvau kikum nu ziam? Tel ngawl lai, he ngawl lai nu ziam? Na thin uh kiphel ngawl het ziam?" 
Mark8:18 Mit nei napi — mu thei ngawl nu ziam? Bil nei napi — za thei ngawl nu ziam? 
Mark8:19 Anluum nga taw mihing tulnga ka vaak lai in, a khawn laak uh bangza khawm kana nu ziam? Ciamtee nawn ngawl nu ziam?” ci hi. “Khum sawm le khum nii,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Mark8:20 “Tuaciang anluum sali taw mihing tulli ka vaak lai in a khawn laak uh khum bangza khawm kana nu ziam?” ci hi. “Khum sali,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Mark8:21 “Tua hi napi tel ngawl lalai nu ziam?,” ci hi." 
Mark8:22 Amate Bethsaida khua hong theng a, ama ii tham tu in mittaw pasal khat mihing pawlkhat in Jesus kungah hong paipui hi." 
Mark8:23 Jesus in mittawpa ii khut pan len a, khua pua sangah paipui hi. Pasalpa mittang ah a cilphii zawkciang Jesus in ama tungah a khut nga a, “Khua na mu thei ziam,” ci in dongh hi." 
Mark8:24 Pasalpa in khuadak a, “Mihingte mu thei khi hi, ahizong amate thingkung lampaite taw kibangin ka mu hi,” ci hi." 
Mark8:25 Jesus in pasalpa mittang tungah a khut nga kik hi. Tuasia ciang pasalpa in khua pha tatak a et le, khuamu thei kik a, na theampo thiang takin mu thei hi." 
Mark8:26 Jesus in a inn ah ciasak a, “Tua khuano sungah pai kik nawn heak in,” ci in thupia hi." 
Mark8:27 Tua zawkciang Jesus le a nungzuite Caesaria Philippi khua hui khuanote ah pai uh hi. A pai kawmin, “Ngual in kei akua hi hong ci ziam,” ci in dongh hi." 
Mark8:28 “Pawlkhat in Tuiphumpa John hi hong ci hi, a dangte in Elijah hi hong ci a, kamsaang sung pan khat hi hong ci zongh om hi,” ci in zo kik uh hi." 
Mark8:28 “Pawlkhat in Tuiphumpa John hi hong ci hi, a dangte in Elijah hi hong ci a, kamsaang sung pan khat hi hong ci zongh om hi,” ci in zo kik uh hi." 
Mark8:29 “Note in kei akua hi nong ci uh ziam?” ci hi. Peter in, “Nang sia Messiah ni hi,” ci hi." 
Mark8:30 Tuasia ciang Jesus in, “Kei huvau kuama munah son heak vun,” ci in thupia hi." 
Mark8:31 Tua zawkciang Jesus in a nungzuite hilna nei tu in kipan hi. “Mihing Tapa in nasia takin ngimna thuak tu a, upate, thiampi liante le Thukham hil syate in nial tu uh hi. Ama thatlum tu a, ni thum zawkciang nuntakna sungah tho kik tu hi,” ci hi." 
Mark8:32 Ama in hi thu amate tungah thiangson mama hi. Tua ahikom Peter in ama sam tuamin teih hi. 
Mark8:33 Ahihang Jesus hong kingeilee a, a nungzuite en in, Peter teih hi. “Kei kung pan tai in Satan awng, na khua ngaisutna Pathian kung pan hong pai hi ngawlin, mihing pianzia sung pan hong pai ahi hi!” ci hi." 
Mark8:34 Tua zawkciang Jesus in mihonte le a nungzuite ama kungah sam a, “Mihing khat po in kei hong zui nuam le, ama le ama kinial in, a thinglamtee pua in hong zui tahen." 
Mark8:35 Banghang ziam cile a nuntakna a huu nuam sia in a nuntakna taan tu hi; ahihang kei hang le Lungdamna thu hang a nuntakna a taan sia in a nuntakna huu tu hi. 
Mark8:36 Mihing khat in simlei bup a nga hangin, a nuntakna a taan le meetna nei tu ziam? Meet ngawl tu hi!" 
Mark8:37 A nuntakna a nga kik natu in, a piak thei tu bangma om ngawl hi." 
Mark8:38 Pathian nei ngawl, hi seksolna khang hun sungah mihing khat po in, kei le keima thu hangin, a mai a zum le, Mihing Tapa sia Pa ii vaangletna le a thiangtho vantunglalangte taw hong paikhop ciangin, Mihing Tapa zongh in tuasia pa atu a maizum tu hi." 
Mark9:1 Tuaciang ama pau thua lai a, “A tatakin kong ci ciang, hi sungah a om mihing pawlkhatte in Pathian Ngam sia vaangletna taw hong pai a mu uh mateng a thi buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Mark9:2 Ni luk zawkciang Jesus in Peter, James le John te samin mualsaang khat tungah kaato pui hi, tua munah amate teng bek om uh hi. Amate mu tangin Jesus meal hong kikheal a," 
Mark9:2 Ni luk zawkciang Jesus in Peter, James le John te samin mualsaang khat tungah kaato pui hi, tua munah amate teng bek om uh hi. Amate mu tangin Jesus meal hong kikheal a," 
Mark9:2 Ni luk zawkciang Jesus in Peter, James le John te samin mualsaang khat tungah kaato pui hi, tua munah amate teng bek om uh hi. Amate mu tangin Jesus meal hong kikheal a," 
Mark9:3 tuaciang a puansilhte paakin tee a — leitung a khat pawpo ii thiansak thei sangin paak zaw lai hi. 
Mark9:4 Tuaciang nungzuite thum in Jesus sia Elijah le Moses taw thuson khawmin a om mu uh hi. 
Mark9:5 Peter in Jesus munah, “Syapa awng, hi sungah ih om sia bangza in pha ziam! Buk thum sa tawng, khat nang atu, khat Moses atu, khat Elijah atu,” ci hi." 
Mark9:6 Ama le a lawmte lau mama ahikom a pau tu he meal ngawl uh hi. 
Mark9:7 Tuaciangin meeikaai khat hong piang a, a limh taw amate tuamcip hi, tuaciangin meeikaai sung panin aw khat in, “Hi sia ka it ka tapa hi — ama thu ngai vun!” ci hi." 
Mark9:8 Amate in manlang takin a kiimkot a et uh le kuama dang a mu bua uh a, Jesus bek amate taw om a mu uh hi." 
Mark9:9 Mualtung pan hong tuaksuk ciangin Jesus in, “Mihing Tapa sia thina pan a thaw kik mateng in na mu uh teng kuama munah son heak vun,” ci hi." 
Mark9:10 Amate in a thupiak bangin om uh hi, ahihang amate sung teng kikum uh hi. “Thina pan tho kik ci sia bang a cinopna ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Mark9:11 Tuaciang amate in Jesus munah, “Thukham hil syate in banghangin Elijah hong pai masa tu ci ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Mark9:12 A zo kikna pan, “Na theampo puua khol tu in Elijah hong pai masa takpi hi. Ahitazong, Mihing Tapa in nasia takin thuak tu a, ama kinial tu hi, banghangin Laithiangtho in ci ziam?" 
Mark9:13 Ahihang a tatakin kong ci ciang, Elijah hong pai takpi zo hi. Laithiangtho ii ama thu a sonsa bangma in, mihingte in amate uuk bang po in ama vawt uh hi,” ci hi." 
Mark9:14 Amate nungzui dang teng kungah a thet ciang, a kiim ah mihonpi na om a, Thukham hil syate taw kam kinial in om a mu uh hi." 
Mark9:15 Mihonpite in Jesus a mu ciangin lamdang sa mama uh a, ama delin muak tek uh hi." 
Mark9:16 Jesus in a nungzuite munah, “Amate taw bang teng kinial nu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Mark9:17 Mihon sung pan pasal khat in zo a, “Syapa awng, nangma kungah ka tapa kong paipui hi, banghang ziam cile ama doaivei in a pau thei bua hi." 
Mark9:18 Thaa ngilo ii ama a vawtsiat simin, leiliik in, a kam pan cilphuan tha a, a haci in, a pum buppi tak hi. Na nungzuite munah thaa ngilo hong nawkeaksak natu ka nget hang, amate in a not zo bua uh hi,” ci hi." 
Mark9:19 Jesus in, “Bangzata in a um ngawl mihingte hi thong nu ziam! Bang tanvei no taw hong omkhawm zo tu khi ziam? Bang tanvei hong khual zo tu khi ziam? Patang sia ka kungah hong paipui tavun!” ci hi." 
Mark9:20 Amate in patang sia Jesus kungah paipui uh hi. Jesus a mu po ciang thaa ngilo in patang sia kikaikinsak a, lei ah pukin kilumliik a cilphuan tha hi." 
Mark9:21 Jesus in, “Hi bang ahithei zawk ngei zo ziam?” ci in a pa dongh hi. “A no lai pan ma hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Mark9:22 “Tamvei ma doai in ama thatlum nuamin meikuang sung le tui sungah lawn nithi hi,” ci hi. “Nong hu theina a om le, ko hong hesuak ta'n a hong hu ta'n,” ci hi." 
Mark9:23 Jesus in, “Nangma mama in na um nale hong hu thei khi hi, upna a nei khat tungah na theampo suak thei hi,” ci hi." 
Mark9:24 Thakhatin a pa au a, “Upna nei khi hi, ahihang kicing tham ngawl hi. A kicing zaw ka nei natu in hong hu ta'n!” ci hi." 
Mark9:25 Mipite in ama uumci tu a kithoai sia Jesus in mu ahikom thaa ngilo tungah, thupia a, “Nangong le a pau thei ngawl thaa ngilo awng, patang sung pan hong pusuak ta'n a, ama sungah tum kik nawn heak in, ci in thu kong pia hi,” ci hi." 
Mark9:26 Thaa ngilo cik-au a, patang sia nasia takin a kikaikinsak zawkciang pusuak hi. Patang sia mithi luang bang hi a, a kuama po in “Ama thi zo hi,” ci uh hi." 
Mark9:27 Ahihang Jesus in patang khut pan zamh a, a phokto ciang ama hong ding hi." 
Mark9:28 Jesus inn sungah a sungtan zawkciang a nungzuite in a tuamin dongh a, “Banghangin kote in doai not zo ngawl khu ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Mark9:29 “Hi bangte sia thungetna simngawl nadang in notkeak thei ngawl hi,” Jesus in ci hi." 
Mark9:30 Jesus le a nungzuite in, tua mun nusia in Galilee kaantan in pai uh hi. Jesus in ama omna kuama heak tu a dei bua hi," 
Mark9:31 banghang ziam cile ama in “Mihing Tapa in ama a thatlum tu mihingte tungah ki aap tu hi. Ahihang ni thum zawkciang nuntakna sungah ama tho kik tu hi,” ci in a nungzuite hil hi." 
Mark9:32 Ahihang amate in hi hilna bang ziam ci in a tel bua uh a, dongh zongh a dongh ngam bua uh hi." 
Mark9:33 Amate Capernaum khua hong theng a, inn sungah a tum zawkciang, Jesus in a nungzuite munah, “Lampai kawmin na kinial uh sia bang thu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Mark9:34 Ahihang amate in a zo kik nuam bua uh hi, banghang ziam cile lampi tungah a kinial uh thu sia, akua lianbel ziam ci thu ahihang hi." 
Mark9:35 Jesus to a, nungzui sawm le niite samin, hi bangin ci hi, “A kuama po note sungah, a lianbel tu a nuam sia in, ama le ama a nobel in kikoi in, ngual theampo ii naseam in na om uh kul tu hi.”" 
Mark9:36 Tua zawkciang ama in patangno khat lenin, amate mai ah dingsak hi. Patangno sia koai in hi bangin ci hi," 
Mark9:37 “A kuama po ka min taw hi patangte khat a saang sia in kei hong saang ahi hi; tuaciangin a kuama po kei hong saang sia in kei bek hong saang ngawlin kei hong sawlpa zongh a saang ahi hi” 
Mark9:38 John in, “Syapa awng, pasal khat in nangma min taw doai a nawnot ka mu uh a, a kheal natu ka sawl uh hi, banghang ziam cile ama ei pawl ahi bua hi,” ci hi." 
Mark9:38 John in, “Syapa awng, pasal khat in nangma min taw doai a nawnot ka mu uh a, a kheal natu ka sawl uh hi, banghang ziam cile ama ei pawl ahi bua hi,” ci hi." 
Mark9:39 Jesus in, “Thoh heak vun, banghang ziam cile kei min taw lamdang lakna a vawt khat in kei hong sonsia memeang ngawl tu hi." 
Mark9:40 Banghang ziam cile ei lang hong pang ngawl po, ei sang a hong kipawl ahi hi." 
Mark9:41 A tatakin kong ci ciang, keima mi na hi uh hu in, tuidam hai khat hong sua sia in, a thaman saang tatak tu hi.”" 
Mark9:42 “Hi patangno khat ii kei hong upna a bosuasak mihing khat sia a ngawng ah an ngoaina suang lian khat khi hen a, tuipi sungah kivawk le phazaw hi." 
Mark9:43 Tua ahikom na khut khat in na upna hong lalsak le saattan in! Khut nii taw hell ngam, a mit ngeingawl meisa sungah na pai uh sangin, khut langkhat nguak taw nuntakna sungah tum le uhte phazaw hi." 
Mark9:44 Tua munah amate a ne thanhte in thi ngeingawl a, amate a hal mei in mit ngeingawl hi." 
Mark9:45 Tuaciang na peang khat in na upna a lalsak le, saattan in! Hell sungah peang kim in na pai uh sangin, peang lang nguak taw nuntakna sungah tum zaw le uhte phazaw hi." 
Mark9:46 Tua munah amate a ne thanhte in thi ngeingawl a, amate a hal mei in mit ngeingawl hi." 
Mark9:47 Tuaciang na mittang khat in na upna uh a lalsak le khelkeak in! Pathian Ngam sungah mittang langkhat nguak taw tum le uhte hell sungah mittang cingin hong kivawk sangin phazaw hi. 
Mark9:48 ‘Tua munah amate a ne thanhte in thi ngeingawl a, amate a hal mei sia mit ngeingawl hi.’" 
Mark9:49 “Sangaw biakpiakna sia ci al taw a kithiansua bangma in, mihing sim zongh meikuang in thiansua tu hi." 
Mark9:50 “Ci al sia pha hi; ahihang ama in a alna a bosua le, bangbangin alsak kik thei tu nu ziam?” “Na sung uh a, kingualtamh theina ci al na nei tavun, khat le khat kilemna taw na om tavun,” ci hi." 
Mark10:1 Tua zawkciang Jesus in tua mun nusia in, Judea ngam ah pai a, Jordan Ngun kaantan hi. Mihonpite hong kikhawm kik a, a hil ngei tawntung sa bangma in amate hil hi." 
Mark10:1 Tua zawkciang Jesus in tua mun nusia in, Judea ngam ah pai a, Jordan Ngun kaantan hi. Mihonpite hong kikhawm kik a, a hil ngei tawntung sa bangma in amate hil hi." 
Mark10:2 Phariseete pawlkhat ama kungah hong pai a, ama aitaa tu in hong kipan uh hi. “Ih Thukham in, pasal khat in a zi a khul tu oai ziam hong son ta'n,” ci uh hi." 
Mark10:3 Jesus in thudokna khat taw zo a, “Moses in bang thukham hong pia ziam?” ci hi." 
Mark10:4 Amate zo kikna pan, “Moses in pasal khat sia a zi a khul natu in, lai pia pole, khul thei hi,” ci uh hi." 
Mark10:5 Jesus in amate tungah, “Moses in hi bang thukham a at sia banghang ziam cile noma hil zawk a pang ngawl na hi uh hang hi." 
Mark10:6 Ahihang a kipatciil bitphua hun lai in, laithiangtho ii ci bangin ci leang, ‘Pathian in pa khat le numei khat vawt hi." 
Mark10:7 ‘Tuaciang hi thu hangin, pa khat in a pa le a nu nusia in a zi taw kingawm tu hi." 
Mark10:8 Tuaciang amate nii sia khat suak tu hi.’ Tua ahikom amate nii hi nawn ngawlin, khat ahi hi." 
Mark10:9 Tua hi a, Pathian ii ngawmsa sia kuama in khen heak hen,” ci hi." 
Mark10:10 Inn sungah amate a sungtan zawkciang a nungzuite in hi thu huvau dongh uh hi. 
Mark10:11 Amate munah, “Pasal khat a zi khul a, zi dang khat a nei sia in, a zi tungah nupa kipalngul mawna vawt ahi hi." 
Mark10:12 Tuasia bangma in, numei khat in a pasal khulin, pasal dang a nei le, nupa kipalngul mawna vawt ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Mark10:13 Mihing pawlkhat in patangte tungah Jesus ii khut a ngaksak tu dei in, ama kungah hong paipui uh hi, ahihang nungzuite in amate teih uh hi." 
Mark10:14 Jesus in hi bang a ngamtat uh a mu ciangin, thin uuk a amate tungah, “Patangte ka kungah hong pai tahen, khaam heak vun, banghang ziam cile Pathian Ngam sia hi bangte atu ahi hi." 
Mark10:15 A tatakin kong ci ciang, patangno khat ii saan bangin Pathian Ngam a saang ngawl peuma in, tuasung ah a tum thei buatu hi.”" 
Mark10:16 Tua zawkciang patangnote, a khut taw toai in, khat sim tungah a khut nga a, thupha pia hi." 
Mark10:17 Jesus ding tu in a kipat kik ciangin, pasal khat hong tai a, ama mai ah khupdin in, “Sya pha awng, tawntung nuntakna ka nga natu in bang ka vawt tu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Mark10:18 “Pathian khat bek simngawl, a pha kuama om ngawl hi. Banghangin kei pha hong ci ni ziam?,” ci in Jesus in dongh hi." 
Mark10:19 “Thupiakte na heak hi a: ‘Mihing that heak in; palngul mawna vawt heak in; nguta heak in; leilot thu taw ngual suanhkhial heak in; ngualtheam heak in; na pa le na nu zakta in,’ ” ci hi." 
Mark10:20 “Syapa awng, ka no lai mama panin, hi thupiakte ka zui siat zo hi,” pasalpa in ci hi." 
Mark10:21 Jesus in ama itna taw en in, “Na kisap khat bek om lai hi. Va pai ta'n a na neisa theampo zuakin, na sum nga teng mizawngte pia ta'n; tuasia ciang vantung ah hauna na nei tu hi; tua zawkciang hong pai ta'n a, ka nung hong zui ta'n,” ci hi." 
Mark10:22 Pasalpa in hi thu a zaak ciangin a maikhing a, khuangai in a paisan hi, banghang ziam cile ama hau mama hi." 
Mark10:23 Jesus in a nungzuite en kawkoai a, amate munah, “Sumhaute Pathian Ngam sungah a tum tu sia, bangza in haksa tu ziam!” ci hi." 
Mark10:24 Nungzuite in hi kammalte lamdang mama sa uh hi, ahihang Jesus in, “Ka tate awng, Pathian Ngam sungah tum tu, bangza in haksa ziam!" 
Mark10:25 Sumhau khat ii Pathian Ngamsung a tum tu sia, kalaoh khat ii phin bilvang sungah a tum tu sangin haksa zaw hi,” ci lai hi." 
Mark10:26 Hi bang a ci ciang, nungzuite lungmang seseam a, khat le khat in, “Tua ahile akua ngupna nga thei tu ziam?” kici uh hi." 
Mark10:27 Jesus in amate tangtan in en a, “Mihingte atu hi sia suak thei ngawl hi, ahihang Pathian atu in suak maw ngawl hi. Pathian atu in na theampo suak thei hi,” ci hi." 
Mark10:28 Tuasia ciang Peter in, “En in, kote in na theampo nusia in, nangma hong zui khu hi,” ci hi." 
Mark10:29 Jesus in, “Hi hi, khat pawpo in inn ahizong, suapuipate ahizong, suapuinumeite ahizong, nu, pa, tate le lote ahizong, kei hang le lungdamna thu hangin a nusia le," 
Mark10:30 ama in hi khang hun sungah a tamzaw lai nga tu hi. Ama in innte, suapuipate, suapuinumeite, nu, pa, tate le lote a zaa zakhat tamzaw in nga tu hi, vawtsiatna zongh thuak tu hi, tuaciang hong pai pheang tu hun sungah tawntung nuntakna nga tu hi." 
Mark10:31 Ahihang tu laitak a masa ahi mihing tam mamate sia a khak hi tu a, tu laitak a khakte sia a masa hi tu hi,” ci hi." 
Mark10:32 Jesus le a nungzuite Jerusalem zuanin pai uh hi. Jesus in a patau a nungzuite mai ah paikhol hi; a nung pan a zui mihingte zongh lau uh hi. Khatvei ma Jesus in a nungzui sawm le niite sam tuam a, ama tungah a piang tu thute son hi." 
Mark10:33 “Ngai vun, ei teng Jerusalem ah ih pai tu a, tua munah Mihing Tapa sia thiampi liante le Thukham hil syate tungah ngual in aap tu hi. Amate in thidaan pia tu a, tua zawkciangin Gentile te khut sungah ki aap tu hi," 
Mark10:34 tua mite in ama selno in, cilphii tu a, vel in thatlum tu uh hi; ahihang ni thum zawkciang ama nuntakna sungah tho kik tu hi,” ci hi." 
Mark10:35 Tua zawkciang Zebedee tate ahi James le John sia Jesus kungah hong pai hi. “Syapa awng, ko atu hong vawtsak lete kong oai uh thu khat om hi,” ci uh hi." 
Mark10:35 Tua zawkciang Zebedee tate ahi James le John sia Jesus kungah hong pai hi. “Syapa awng, ko atu hong vawtsak lete kong oai uh thu khat om hi,” ci uh hi." 
Mark10:35 Tua zawkciang Zebedee tate ahi James le John sia Jesus kungah hong pai hi. “Syapa awng, ko atu hong vawtsak lete kong oai uh thu khat om hi,” ci uh hi." 
Mark10:36 “Bang ziam?” ci in Jesus in dongh hi. 
Mark10:37 “Na minthanna Ngamsung na kumpi tokhum tungah na to ciangin, ko zongh na ziatsang ah khat, na veisang ah khat, nong tosak tu ka uuk uh hi,” ci hi." 
Mark10:38 Jesus in amate munah, “Nong nget uh sia bang ziam ci in na tel bua uh hi. Ngim thuakna hai ka dawn tu sia dawn thei natu nu ziam? Kei ii ki baptize bangin, no zongh ki baptize thei natu nu ziam?” ci hi." 
Mark10:39 “Hi thei tu khu hi,” ci in zo kik uh hi. Jesus in, “Hai ka dawn tu sia no zongh dawn takpi tu nu hi, ka ki baptize bang keak ma in, no zongh ki baptize tu nu hi." 
Mark10:40 Ahihang ka ziatsang le ka veisang a to tute sia, kei in teal thei natu thu ka nei bua hi. Hi munte sia ama puuakholsak te atu in, Pathian in pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Mark10:41 A nungzui dang sawmte in, hi thu huvau a zaak ciangin, James le John tungah thin uuk uh hi." 
Mark10:41 A nungzui dang sawmte in, hi thu huvau a zaak ciangin, James le John tungah thin uuk uh hi." 
Mark10:41 A nungzui dang sawmte in, hi thu huvau a zaak ciangin, James le John tungah thin uuk uh hi." 
Mark10:42 Tua ahikom, Jesus in amate theampo samin, “Pathian he ngawlte a ukte hi a kici mihingte in a mite tungah vaangnei a, a lampuite in thuneina a cingin nei hi, ci in na he uh hi." 
Mark10:43 Ahihang no sungah hi bang hi ngawl tu hi. Khat po in a lian tu a uuk uh le, a dang teng ii naseampa hi tu hi;" 
Mark10:44 no sung pan khat in lampui a uuk le, ama sia a dang theampo ii salpa hi tu hi." 
Mark10:45 Banghang ziam cile Mihing Tapa ngawngawn zongh, ngual in ama na a sepsak tu in hong pai bua hi; ngual atu a seam tu le, a nuntakna pia in, mihing tam mama tan tu in hong pai hi,” ci hi." 
Mark10:46 Amate Jericho khua hong theng a, tuaciangin Jesus sia a nungzuite le mihonpi khat taw a din kik uh ciangin, lamhui ah Timaeus ii tapa mittaw khutdaw ngen Bartimaeus a kici khat to hi." 
Mark10:47 Ama in Nazareth mi Jesus hong pai ci in a zaak ciangin, “David Tapa Jesus awng; kei hong hesuak ta'n!” ci in au hi." 
Mark10:48 Mipite sung pan pawlkhat in teih in, a thim natu in, sawl uh hi. Ahihang ama in awnging seseam in au a, “David Tapa Jesus awng, Kei hong hesuak ta'n,” ci hi." 
Mark10:49 Jesus tawlnga a, “Na sam tavun,” ci hi. Tua ahikom amate in mittawpa sam hi. “Lungdam in! Ama in hong sam hi, ding in,” ci uh hi." 
Mark10:50 Ama in a puantual suutin, vawk a, lawp takin Jesus kungah pai hi." 
Mark10:51 Jesus in, “Nang atu bang hong vawtsak lengh, na nuam ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Syapa awng, khuamu thei kik nuam khi hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Mark10:52 “Va pai ta'n, na upna in hong damsak zo hi,” Jesus in ci hi. Thakhatin ama khuamu thei a, tuaciang Jesus zui in pai hi." 
Mark11:1 Amate Jerusalem hong nai ciang, Bethphage le Bethany khuapite taw a kinai, Olive Mual ah theng uh hi. Jesus in nungzuite nii sia mai ah pai kholsak a," 
Mark11:2 hi bangin sawl hi: “Na mai a khuano sia ah pai tavun. Tua mun na thet po uh ciang, bangma hun a tung a kito ngeingawl laano khat kikhit in, om na mu tu uh hi. A khau suut tavun a, hi sungah hong paipui tavun." 
Mark11:3 Tuaciang khat po in banghangin tuabang hi nu ziam hong cile, Topa in tuulmaw hi, hong puak kik paih tu hi, na ci vun,” ci hi." 
Mark11:4 Tua ahikom amate pai a, laano sia khua sung lampi tung, inn khat ii kongkha khuam tungah kikhit in om mu uh hi. Amate in khau a suut uh ciangin," 
Mark11:5 a hui ah a dingte in, “Tua laano khau na suut uh sia bang tu ci nu ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Mark11:6 Amate in Jesus ii sawl bangin zo uh a, tuasia ciangin tuate in paisak uh hi." 
Mark11:7 Amate in laano sia Jesus kungah hong paipui uh a, a puantual uh tua nganno tungah pha in, Jesus a tungah to hi." 
Mark11:8 Mihing tam mamate in a puantualte lampi tungah pha uh hi, a dangte in lo sung pan thingsawl saattan in lampi tungah pha uh hi." 
Mark11:9 A mai ah a paite le a nung pan a zuite in, hi bangin au uh hi, “Hosanna, Pathian pok vun. Topa Pathian min taw hong pai pa sia Pathian in thupha pia tahen!" 
Mark11:10 Hong tung tu ih pa David Kumpipa ngam Pathian in thupha pia tahen, Hosanna, Pathian pok vun!” ci uh hi." 
Mark11:11 Jesus Jerusalem khua theng a, Biakinn sungah tumin, na theampo enkot hi. Ahihang ni niam zo ahikom, a nungzui sawm le niite taw Bethany khua ah pai uh hi." 
Mark11:12 A zing ciang, amate Bethany pan hong heak kik ciang Jesus a ngilkial hi." 
Mark11:13 A ngalkhat ah theikung khat a tee puitung mama in mu hi, tua ahikom theinga khat po a om ziam ci in en tu in pai hi. Ahihang a kung a thet ciangin, theitee bek mu hi, banghang ziam cile a nga hun ahi bua hi." 
Mark11:14 Jesus in, “Nang tung pan kuama in theinga ne nawn heak tahen!” ci hi. A nungzuite in a pau teng za uh hi." 
Mark11:15 Amate Jerusalem a thet ciangin, Jesus in Biakinn ah pai in vanh lei vanh zuak theampo notkeak siat hi. Ama in sum theakte ii sabuaite le vakhu zuakte tokhumte sawnthal hi," 
Mark11:16 tuasia ciang ama in kuama vanh pua in, Biakinn leitual kaantan in a pai tu a oai bua hi." 
Mark11:17 Mihingte hi bangin hil hi: “ ‘Ka innpi sia minam theampo atu in thungetna inn kici tu hi,’ ci in Pathian in a sonna Laithiangtho sungah ki at hi ngawl ziam? Ahizong note in, ngutate bukna phual na suaksak uh hi!” ci hi." 
Mark11:18 Thiampi liante le Thukham hil syate in, hi thu za uh a, tua hu in, Jesus a thalup thei natu lampi zong tu in, kipan uh hi. Amate in Jesus kiita uh hi, banghang ziam cile mipite in ama ii hilna sia lamdang a sa uh hi." 
Mark11:19 Nitak sang ciangin Jesus le a nungzuite in khuapi nusia uh hi. 
Mark11:20 A zingsang ciang zingtuungin, lampi zui a, a pai uh ciang, amate in theikung a mu uh hi. Tuasia in a zung dongin thisuk hi." 
Mark11:21 Peter in bang thu om ci in ciamtee ahikom Jesus munah, “En in, syapa awng, theikung na haamsiat sia thi zo hi!” ci hi." 
Mark11:22 Jesus in amate munah, “Pathian um vun." 
Mark11:23 A tatakin ka ci ciang, khat po in hi mual munah, tho in tuipi sungah kisep in ci in sawl hen a, a thinsung ah lungmang ngawlin a ci sa teng bang piang tu hi ci in a um takpi le, a up bangin piang tu hi." 
Mark11:24 Hi thu hangin a tatakin kong ci ciangin: Thu na nget uh ciang, bang khat po na ngen uh le a nga sa bangin kingaisun vun, tua hile na nget uh po hong kipia tu hi." 
Mark11:25 Thungenin na din uh ciang, khat po tungah diksak ngawlna na nei uh le, maisak tavun," 
Mark11:26 tua hile vantung a om na pa in, no ii mawna zongh hong maisak tu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Mark11:27 Amate Jerusalem ah khatvei ma hong theng kik hi. Jesus Biakinn sungah a va laitakin, thiampi liante, Thukham hil syate le upate ama kungah hong pai a," 
Mark11:28 “Hi bangte na vawt natu in bang thu nei ni ziam? Akua in tua thuneina hong pia ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi. 
Mark11:29 Jesus in zo kik a, “Kei zongh thu khat kong dongh tu hi, nong zo thei uh le hite vawt natu bang thunei khi ziam, ci in kong son tu hi." 
Mark11:30 Tua ahile John ii tuiphum piak theina sia Pathian kung pan hong pai ziam maw: mihing kung pan hong pai ziam? hong son tavun,” ci hi." 
Mark11:30 Tua ahile John ii tuiphum piak theina sia Pathian kung pan hong pai ziam maw: mihing kung pan hong pai ziam? hong son tavun,” ci hi." 
Mark11:31 Amate sung teng kinial tu in hong kipan uh a, “Bang ci tu hi ziam? ‘Pathian kung pan hi’ ci leang, tua ahile ‘Banghangin John um ngawl nu ziam?’ hong ci tu hi." 
Mark11:31 Amate sung teng kinial tu in hong kipan uh a, “Bang ci tu hi ziam? ‘Pathian kung pan hi’ ci leang, tua ahile ‘Banghangin John um ngawl nu ziam?’ hong ci tu hi." 
Mark11:32 Ahihang ‘Mihing tung pan hi’ ci leang…’ ” (Amate in mipite kiita hi, banghang ziam cile John sia a kuama po in kamsaang khat hi ci in um tek uh hi.)" 
Mark11:32 Ahihang ‘Mihing tung pan hi’ ci leang…’ ” (Amate in mipite kiita hi, banghang ziam cile John sia a kuama po in kamsaang khat hi ci in um tek uh hi.)" 
Mark11:33 Tua ahikom amate in Jesus munah, “He ngawl khu hi,” ci uh hi. “Tua ahile kei zongh, bang thu taw hi nate vawt khi ziam ci sia hong son ngawl tu khi hi,” Jesus in ci hi." 
Mark12:1 Tuaciang Jesus in amate tungah thusonteena taw thu son hi. “Khatvei lai in pasal khat in sapithuan vawt a, dal taw uum in, a tuisuukna set atu leidum a taw zawkciang lo hun natu teitaan daw hi. Tua zawkciang, a saapthaw nuamte in saapsakin ama khualhaw hi." 
Mark12:2 Sapit nga law hun ciangin, ama tan tu tel teng a la tu in, a silate khat paisak hi." 
Mark12:3 Lo saapte in tua silapa manin, saat a, a ngawlnguak in ciasak hi." 
Mark12:4 Tua zawkciang huan neipa in, sila dang khat ma paisak hi; lo saapte in a lutang pan vel a, a maizumhuai dongin vawt uh hi." 
Mark12:5 Huan neipa in sila dang khat ma paisak lai hi; tuasia pa thatlum uh hi; a dang tam mama zongh tuabang ma in vawt uh a, pawlkhat vel in, pawlkhat thatlum uh hi." 
Mark12:6 Tuabang a sawl thei tu a taanglai mihing sia a it a tapa bek ahi hi. A khakbel ciangin ama in a tapa lo saapte munah paisak hi, ‘Ka tapa hi buang ahiciang, thasia hamtang vak’ ci hi." 
Mark12:7 Ahihang tua lo saapte in, “Hisia pa lo neipa tapa hi. Hong pai tavun, that tawng, tua hile a neisate eima aa suak tu hi!’ ci uh hi." 
Mark12:8 Tua ahiciang amate in lo neipa tapa manin thatlum uh a, a luang sapithuan pua sangah vawk hi." 
Mark12:9 “Tua hile huan neipa in bang a law tu ziam?” ci in Jesus in dongh hi. “Ama hong kuan tu a, tua mihingte a thalup zawkciang, sapithuan sia lo saap dangte tungah aap tu hi." 
Mark12:10 Laithiangtho sungah hi bangin a ki at sia sim ngeingawl lawlawm nu ziam? ‘Inn sate ii mannung ngawl hi ci a, a nil suangtum sia a thupibel suangtum suak hi." 
Mark12:11 Hi thu in Topa ii zeakna ahi hi; ih et ciang lamdang hi ngawl ziam!’ ” 
Mark12:12 Jew lampuite in Jesus mat sawm uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate in hi thusonteena sia amate huvau a sonna hi ci in tel uh hi. Ahihang mipite kiita ahikom amate in paisan uh hi." 
Mark12:13 Phariseete pawlkhat le Herod ii pawlmite pawlkhat in thudokna taw Jesus aitaa tu in paisak uh hi. 
Mark12:14 Amate Jesus kungah hong pai uh a, “Syapa awng, ngualdang ii ngaisutnate awlmawk ngawlin thumaan a son pa hi, ci in kong he uh hi. Mihing min le zate zongh thupi sim tuan ngawlin Pathian ii mihingte atu a deisak thute hil hi, ci in kong he uh hi. Ih thukham in Rome Kumpilianpa, shia ih piak tu khaam ziam? Pia tu hi ziam, pia ngawl tu hi ziam, hong son ta'n,” ci uh hi." 
Mark12:15 Ahihang Jesus in amate ii thimthel pilna teng tel a, ‘Banghangin kei thaang hong sia nuam nu ziam? Ngunn dangka khat hong paipui tavun, hong en sin tong,” ci hi." 
Mark12:16 Amate in khat paipui a, ama in “Hite akua ii maitang lim le akua ii min ziam?” ci hi. “Kumpilianpa aa hi,” ci in a zo kik uh hi." 
Mark12:17 Tua ahikom Jesus in, “Tua ahile pha hi, Kumpilianpa ii neisa sia Kumpilianpa ma pia vun, Pathian ii neisa sia Pathian ma pia vun,” ci hi. Tuasia ciangin amate in Jesus sia lamdang sa uh hi." 
Mark12:18 Mihingte thina panin tho kik ngawl tu hi a ci Sadducee te pawlkhat Jesus kungah hong pai in," 
Mark12:19 “Syapa awng, hi thukham sia Moses in ei atu in a at ahi hi: ‘Pasal khat in a zi thi san in ta a nei buale, a pasal ii suapuipa in meingongnu sia teenpui tahen, tua hile ta a nei uh ciangin mithipa ta hi ci in kingaisun tu hi,’ ci hi." 
Mark12:20 Khatvei lai in unau pa sali om hi: a lianbel sia in zi nei a, ta nei ngawlin thi hi." 
Mark12:21 Tua zawkciang a niina pa in, tua numei teenpui a, tuaciang ama zongh ta nei ngawlin thi hi. A thumna pa zongh tuabang ma ahi hi," 
Mark12:22 tuaciang a dangte theampo zongh tuabang hi siat hi: unau sali bupin tua numei teenpui tek a, ta nei ngawlin thi tek hi. A khakbel in tua numei zongh thi hi." 
Mark12:23 Tu in thaw kik ni ciang, tua nu sia akua zi hi tu ziam? A sali in teenpui tek hi,” ci uh hi." 
Mark12:24 Jesus in, “Bangza in telkhial nu ziam! Na telkhial uh sia banghang ziam, ci in na he uh ziam? Banghang ziam cile no sia Laithiangtho ahizong Pathian vaang ahizong na he bua uh hi." 
Mark12:25 Banghang ziam cile a thite sia nuntakna sungah a thaw kik ciangin, amate vantunglalangte bang hi tu a, a kiteang buatu hi." 
Mark12:26 Tu in a thite phoktona taw kisai in: Moses ii Laibu sungah sawlpaang kuang sia ii thu, sim ngeingawl nu ziam? Tua ii sungah ki at a, Pathian in Moses tungah, ‘Kei sia Abraham ii Pathian, Isaac ii Pathian, Jacob ii Pathian ka hi hi,’ ci hi." 
Mark12:27 Ama in a nungtate ii Pathian hi a, a thisate ii Pathian ahi bua hi. Telkhial mama nu hi!” ci in zo hi." 
Mark12:28 Thukham hil sya khat, tua kam kikupna sungah om hi. Jesus in Sadducee te pha takin zo kik thei ahi sia mu hi, tua ahikom ama in, thudok nop khat taw Jesus kungah pai hi, “Thupiak sung teng pan koisia thupibel ziam,” ci hi." 
Mark12:29 Jesus in zo a, “A thupibel sia hisia hi, ‘Israel awng, ngai vun! Topa ih Pathian sia ama bekma Topa ahi hi." 
Mark12:30 Topa na Pathian sia na thin theampo, na thaa theampo, na ngaisutna theampo le, na thatang theampo taw it in.’" 
Mark12:31 A niina a thupibel thupiak sia, ‘Nangma le nangma na ki it bangin na innpaamte it in’ Hite nii sangin a thupizaw thupiak dang om ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
Mark12:32 Thukham hil syapa in, Jesus munah, “Pha mama hi, Syapa awng, na ci bangin Topa bekma Pathian hi a, ama ngawl pathian dang om ngawl hi na ci sia thumaan hi." 
Mark12:33 Tuaciangin mihingte in Pathian sia a thin theampo, a ngaisutna theampo, le a thatang theampo taw a it tu uh kul hi; tuaciangin ama a ki it bangma in a innpaamte a it tu kul hi. Pathian tungah nganhing taw biakpiaknate le a dang biakpiaknate sangin, hi thukham niite zui tu thupi zaw hi,” ci hi." 
Mark12:34 Jesus in tua pa ii zo kikna sia ciim kammal hi ci in mu ahikom, ama munah, “Nang sia Pathian ngam taw kikhuala ngawl ni hi,” ci hi. Hisia zawkciang kuama in Jesus thudang a dongh ngam nawn bua uh hi." 
Mark12:35 Biakinn sungah hilna a nei laitak Jesus in, “Thukham hil syate in bangbangin Messiah sia David ii suan hi ci thei ziam?" 
Mark12:36 Thaa Thiangtho in David sia hi bangin pausak hi: ‘Topa in ka Topa tungah: Na ngalte na peang nuai ah kong koisak mateng, hi sung ka ziatsang ah hong to ta'n ci hi.’" 
Mark12:37 “David mama in, ‘Topa’ ci hi; tua ahile Messiah sia David ii suan hi thei tu ziam,” ci hi. Mihon khat in Jesus ii thuson lungdam takin ngai uh hi." 
Mark12:38 Amate a hil kawmin hi bangin ci hi, “Puantual silhin sumzuakna munah, ngual in zatak vawtin a biak tu thangai in, a vak thanuam Thukham hil syate kung panin kikeam vun," 
Mark12:39 synagogue sungah a kikoituam tokhumte le poai sungah a nuambel na munah to thanuam uh hi," 
Mark12:40 Amate in meingongte zothaw in, a inn uh suttol in, a sau pupui a thungetna taw amate ngamtatna phualseal uh hi. Tua hu in amate daan thuak tu nasia seseam tu hi!” ci hi." 
Mark12:41 Biakinn sum kholna hui ah Jesus a to laitak, ama in mihingte sumkhiak zia en hi. Sumhau tam mama in sum tam ma khia uh hi;" 
Mark12:42 tuaciangin a zawng meingongnu khat hong pai a, pya khat tang taw a kikim dangkasan pheak nii khia hi." 
Mark12:43 Ama in nungzuite sam in, “A tatakin ka ci ciang midangte sangin, hi meingongnu in tam khia zaw hi." 
Mark12:44 Banghang ziam cile a dangte in a nei vaal a lamh vaal uh teng khia uh hi, ahihang hi meingongnu in a zawn kawm pan, a nei theampo khia siat hi — a nuntak a kivaak natu a nei sun teng pia siat hi,” ci hi." 
Mark13:1 Jesus in Biakinn pan, a pusua laitak, a nungzuite khat in, “Sya awng, En in! Inn sakna suangte le a innte bangza in pha ziam!” ci hi." 
Mark13:2 Jesus in, “Hi innpuite mu hi ngawl ni ziam? Suangtum khat zongh ama omna ngei munah a om buatu hi; a kilawnthal ngawl khat zongh a om buatu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Mark13:3 Jesus Biakinn ngal Olive Mual tungah to in a om laitak Peter, James, John, le Andrew hong pai uh a, a tuamin thu sonpui hi." 
Mark13:3 Jesus Biakinn ngal Olive Mual tungah to in a om laitak Peter, James, John, le Andrew hong pai uh a, a tuamin thu sonpui hi." 
Mark13:3 Jesus Biakinn ngal Olive Mual tungah to in a om laitak Peter, James, John, le Andrew hong pai uh a, a tuamin thu sonpui hi." 
Mark13:4 “Hi thu bang hun ciang hong tung tu ziam hong son ta'n, tuaciangin hite a pian natu bang limte in lak tu ziam?” ci hi." 
Mark13:5 Jesus in, “Kidawm vun a, kuama in theamsak heak vun." 
Mark13:6 Kei min taw mihing tam mama hong pai tu a, ‘Keima in tuasia pa khi hi!’ ci in mihing tam mama theam tu hi." 
Mark13:7 Tuaciangin ngal kisimna awnging a naina ah ahizong, a khualana ah ngal kidona thu ahizong, na zaak uh ciangin patau heak vun. Tuate sia a pian tu ma hi a, ahihang a tawp natu hi ngawl lai hi." 
Mark13:8 Ngam khat le ngam khat hong kisim tu a; kumpi khat le kumpi khat hong kido tu hi. Mun theampo ah zinliing tu hi, tuaciangin kialpi tung tu hi. Hite sia nausuak tu a tut kipat bang ahi hi." 
Mark13:9 “Noma le noma na kikeam vun. No sia hong kiman tu a, zum mai ah hong kithen tu hi. Synagogue te ah hong kivel tu hi, Lungdamna Thupha son tu le, keima hu in ngamukte le kumpite mai ah note na ding tu uh hi." 
Mark13:10 Ahihang a tawpna hong thet ma in, lungdamna thu sia mihing theampo tungah kihil siat tu hi." 
Mark13:11 Tuaciang no hong kiman a, zum mai ah hong kipaipui ciangin, na pau natu uhte thinngim khol heak vun; a hun hong thet ciangin, hong kihil babangin, na pau tu uh hi. Banghang ziam cile na kammal zak tu te sia no ii pau ahi buatu hi; Thaa Thiangtho kung panin hong pai hi tu hi." 
Mark13:12 Mihingte in a suapuite thalup tu in aap tu uh hi, tuaciang, pate in a tate tuabang ma in vawt tu hi. Tate in nute pate langpan in, thatsak tu uh hi." 
Mark13:13 Mihing theampo in note kei hu in, hong ensan tu hi. Ahihang a tawp dong a thuak zote in ngupna a nga tu uh hi." 
Mark13:14 “ ‘A kiitakhuai mama thu’ sia a kilawm ngawlna munah hong piang, na mu tu uh hi.” (Hi lai a simte ii teptee tu thu hisia ii khiakna sia bang ziam ci in tel tavun!) “Tua hun ciangin Judea ngam a omte in mual tungah tai tahen." 
Mark13:14 “ ‘A kiitakhuai mama thu’ sia a kilawm ngawlna munah hong piang, na mu tu uh hi.” (Hi lai a simte ii teptee tu thu hisia ii khiakna sia bang ziam ci in tel tavun!) “Tua hun ciangin Judea ngam a omte in mual tungah tai tahen." 
Mark13:15 Innkhum tung a pasal khat in, a ken tu na khat pawpo la in, tuaksuk in a hun bosak heak hen." 
Mark13:16 Lo sung a om pasal khat in a laktong puasilh la tu in, a inn ah heak kik nawn heak hen." 
Mark13:17 Numei naupaaite le nau noailuaite atu in, tua hun sia bangza in haksa tu ziam!" 
Mark13:18 Hi thute a pian hun sia phalbi laitak ahi ngawl natu in, thu na ngen tavun!" 
Mark13:19 Banghang ziam cile tua hun a ngimnate sia Pathian ii leitung a bitphua pan tu hun dong leitung mihingte ii heak ngei sangin nasia zaw pek tu hi. Tuabang ngimna sia maisang zongh ah a om nawn buatu hi. 
Mark13:20 Ahihang Topa in tua nite khiamsuk zo hi; tua hi buale kuama nungta zo ngawl tu hi. Ama tealsa mihingte a khualna in tua nite khiam zo hi. 
Mark13:21 “Tuaciang khat po in, ‘En vun, hi sungah Messiah om hi!’ ci in ahizong, ‘En vun, zia sungah om hi!’ — ci in ahizong hong ci a om le na um heak vun." 
Mark13:22 Banghang ziam cile Messiah theam le kamsaang theamte hong piang tu hi. Hi thei hile, Pathian ii tealsa mihingte ngawngawn a theam tu in, amate in nalamdang lakna a tumdang nate hong vawt tu hi." 
Mark13:23 Na kidawm vun! A hun hong thet ma in, na theampo hong son zo khi hi." 
Mark13:24 “Ngimna hun zawkciang hong pai tu nite ah ni hong taang nawn ngawl tu a, tha zongh taang nawn ngawl tu hi," 
Mark13:25 aksite van panin taaksuk tu hi, van a om nate a paina lampi ngei panin lampial tu hi." 
Mark13:26 Tua zawkciangin Mihing Tapa sia hong kilangh tu a, meeikaai sungah vaangletna le minthanna lianpi taw hong pai tu hi." 
Mark13:27 Ama in vantunglalangte leimong king li ah paisak tu a, Pathian ii tealsa mihingte leimong khat pan mong khat kilaklaw ah khawmtua tu hi." 
Mark13:28 “Theikung in hilsak tavun. A baakte hong hing a hong moisuak in a tee note suak tu in a kithoai ciangin, khuakhaal hun hong nai zo hi, ci in na he uh hi." 
Mark13:29 Tuasia bangma, hi thute hong pianna mu uh ciangin, a hun hong nai zo hi, kipapan tu in kithoai zo hi, ci in na he tu uh hi." 
Mark13:30 Tu laitak hunin a nungta mihingte a thi siat ma in hi thute hong tung tu hi — ci in na ciamtee tavun. 
Mark13:31 Vantung le simlei hong bo tu hi, ahihang ka kammalte bo ngeingawl tu hi." 
Mark13:32 “Ahihang kuama in a ni le a nai hong tun hun tu a he bua hi, van a vantunglalangte hikale Tapa hikale in a he bua a, Pa bek in he hi." 
Mark13:33 Na kinging vun a, na kipilvangsak vun, banghang ziam cile a hun hong tun tu na he bua uh hi." 
Mark13:34 Mihing khat khualhaw tu in dingin, a naseamte in inn ngaksak a, khat simin a sep tu tek a vaithak zawkciang, kong cingpa munah a cin thiam natu in, a vaitha sia taw kibang hi." 
Mark13:35 Tua ahikom, na kikeam tavun, banghang ziam cile, innteakpa bang hun ciang hong cia kik tu, ci in na he bua uh hi — nitak zongh hi thei, zankim zongh hi thei, tua ahibuale zingtuung zongh hi thei, nisua laitak zongh hi thei hi." 
Mark13:36 Thakhat thu in hong theng le, a mu sa in na om uh hong si bua het le pha hi." 
Mark13:37 No tungah kong son teng mihing theampo tungah ka son ahi hi. A kingingta sa in om vun!” ci hi. 
Mark14:1 Tu in Paisan Poai le Tol saw ngawl Anluum Poai sia ni nii samh lai hi. Thiampi liante le Thukham hil syate in Jesus sia a thimtham in man a thalup thei natu in lampi zong uh hi. 
Mark14:2 “Poai sungah vawt ngawl tu hi, tuabang ahibuale mihingte ngamlum tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Mark14:3 Jesus sia Bethany khua ah a lauhuai vun natna a vei ngei Simon a kici khat inn ah a om hi. Jesus in an ne in a om laitak numei khat hong pai in, suangngo thawl khat dim a manpha mama sathau namtui hong keng a, Jesus lu tungah buak hi." 
Mark14:4 Tua munah a om mihing pawlkhatte thin uuk a, khat le khat ii munah, “Sathau namtui pakvawt sia bang a phattuamna om ziam?" 
Mark14:5 Ngunn dangka zathum sangin a tamzaw kikhawng thei tu a, mizawngte kipia thei tu hi,” ci in, nasia takin numei nu ngamtatna mawpusak uh hi." 
Mark14:6 Ahihang Jesus in, “Ama koi po vun! Note in ama sia bang nuam maw nu ziam? Ama in kei atu in, nasep pha khat a seam hi." 
Mark14:7 Mizawngte note taw hong omkhawm tawntung tu a, na hu nop uh simin na hu thei tu uh hi. Ahihang kei note taw hong omkhawm tawntung ngawl tu khi hi." 
Mark14:8 Ama in a hi thei tawpin seam zo hi, ka kivui tu hun hong thet ma in, ka pumpi sathau hong noai a hong pua khol ahi hi." 
Mark14:9 A tatakin ka ci ciang, leitung theampo ah lungdamna thu a kihil lai tengin ama ii vawt teng sia ama phawna taw kison tu hi,” ci hi." 
Mark14:10 Tua zawkciang nungzui sawm le nii sungah a kihel Judas Iscariot sia thiampi liante kungah Jesus leeheak tu in pai hi. 
Mark14:11 Ama son teng amate lungkim a, sum piak tu in kamciam pia uh hi. Tuabangin Judas in amate khut sungah Jesus a aap thei natu hunpha khat zong hi." 
Mark14:12 Tol saw ngawl Anluum Poai ni phitbel ni in, Paisan poai atu tuuno a kingo hi a, nungzuite in, “Paisan poai an sia koisungah pai in hong vawt kholsak tu khu ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Mark14:13 Tuasia ciang Jesus in amate sung pan nii paisak a, “Khuapi sungah pai le uhte pasal khat tuibeal taw tuitoai sia na mu tu uh hi." 
Mark14:14 Ama tumna inn ah va zui tavun, tuaciang innteakpa munah, ‘Syapa in, ka nungzuite taw Paisan poai an ka neak natu inn doituam sia koisung ziam ci hi, va ci tavun,’ ci hi." 
Mark14:15 Tuasia ciangin ama in inndawl tungnung ah doituam lian khat hong lak tu a, an lui natu le to natu kipua kholsa in om tu hi. Tua munah a kul teng, ei atu in a kipua kholsa in om tu hi,” ci hi." 
Mark14:16 Nungzuite zongh pai in, khuapi sung a thet uh ciang na theampo Jesus ii sonsa bang tatak ma in a om mu uh hi. Tua munah Paisan poai an tu vawt uh hi." 
Mark14:17 A nitak ciangin Jesus a nungzui sawm le niite taw hong pai hi. 
Mark14:18 Sabuai ah an ne in a om laitak Jesus in, “No sung pan kei taw an nekhawm khat in, kei hong leeheak tu nu hi,” ci hi." 
Mark14:19 Nungzuite a thin uh nuam ngawl a, khat zawkciang khat in, “Kei hong ci nuam na hi bua na ziam?,” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Mark14:20 Jesus in “Noma sawm le nii sung pan khat hi tu nu hi, ankuang sungah anluum keima taw a sawk khawm sia hi tu hi." 
Mark14:21 Laithiangtho ii ci bangin, Mihing Tapa ahile thi tu a, ahihang Mihing Tapa a leeheakpa atu in bangza in lauhuai ziam? Tua pa atu in pian awl zaw le phazaw hi!” ci hi." 
Mark14:22 Amate an a neak uh laitakin, Jesus in anluum bek khat la in, lungdamkona thungen a, balneen in a nungzuite pia hi. “Hisia in ka pumpi ahi hi. Ne vun,” ci hi." 
Mark14:23 Tua zawkciang hai la in, Pathian tungah lungdam a ko zawkciang, amate pia hi, tuaciangin amate in dawn uh hi." 
Mark14:24 “Hisia in mihing tam mamate atu a kibua ka chisan hi, Pathian thuciamna a kipsak ka chisan ahi hi." 
Mark14:25 A maan takin ka ci ciang, Pathian Ngam sungah sapittui thak ka dawn mateng, hi sapittui thak ka dawn nawn buatu hi,” Jesus in ci hi." 
Mark14:26 Tua zawkciang amate lasa in Olive Mual ah pai uh hi. 
Mark14:27 Jesus in “Note theampo in kei nong taisan tu uh hi. Banghang ziam cile laithiangtho in, ‘Pathian in tuucingpa thatlum tu a, tuaciang a tuute kithethaang tu hi,’ ci hi." 
Mark14:28 Ahihang nuntakna sungah hong kiphokto ciangin, note mai Galilee ah ka na paikhol tu hi,” ci hi." 
Mark14:29 Peter in, “A dang theampo in hong nusia zong, kei kong nusia buatu hi!” ci hi." 
Mark14:30 Jesus in Peter munah “A tatakin kong ci ciang, zan ciangin ak niivei a khuan ma in thumvei kei nong nial tu hi,” ci hi." 
Mark14:31 Peter in, “Nangma taw thi khop keak a kul zongin, tuabang peuma hong nial ngawl tu khi hi!” ci in kho takin zo hi. Nungzui dangte zongh in tuabang ma in ci tek uh hi." 
Mark14:32 Amate Gethsemane a kici mun hong theng uh a, Jesus in a nungzuite munah, “Thu ka nget lanin hi sungah na to vun,” ci hi." 
Mark14:33 Ama in Peter, James le John te paipui hi. Ama sia heena le thinngimna taw kidim hi," 
Mark14:33 Ama in Peter, James le John te paipui hi. Ama sia heena le thinngimna taw kidim hi," 
Mark14:33 Ama in Peter, James le John te paipui hi. Ama sia heena le thinngimna taw kidim hi," 
Mark14:34 tuaciang amate tungah, “Ka thinsung ah ka heena lian mama ahikom ka thi dektak hi. Hi sungah na om vun a, mu heak vun,” ci hi." 
Mark14:35 Ama tawm pai thua lai a, lei ah bokin, ahithei le ngim thuak natu hun a peal thei natu in thungen hi." 
Mark14:36 “Pa awng, Ka Pa awng! Na theampo nang atu in suak thei hi. Hi thuakna hai sia kei kung pan hong laaksak ta'n. Ahihang kei deina bang hi ngawlin, nangma deina bang hi tahen,” ci in thungen hi." 
Mark14:37 Tua zawkciangin hong heak kik a, a nungzuite thum sia mutthip sa in a om mu hi. Ama in Peter munah, “Simon awng, mu ni ziam? Nai khat zongh hong ngak zo ngawl ni ziam?”" 
Mark14:38 A nungzuite tungah, “Na ngak vun a, ze etna sungah na puk ngawl natu in, thungen vun. Thinsung in uukna nei ahihang pumpi sia thazawm hi,” ci hi." 
Mark14:39 Ama khatvei ma pai kik a, a kammal zak ngei teng taw ma in thu ngen kik hi." 
Mark14:40 Tua zawkciangin ama nungzuite kungah hong heak kik a, nungzuite mutthip sa in a om mu hi. Amate in Jesus tungah bang son tu ci a he bua uh hi." 
Mark14:41 Ama a thum veina hong heak kik ciangin, nungzuite munah, “Tu dong mu lai in, tawlnga lai nu ziam? Tu a teng pha zo hi! A hun hong theng zo hi! En vun, Mihing Tapa sia mimawte khut sungah ki aap tu hi zo hi." 
Mark14:42 Tho vun a, pai ka tawng. En vun, kei hong leeheak tu pa hi sungah om hi!” ci hi." 
Mark14:43 Jesus tuabangin a pau laitakin, nungzui sawm le niite sung pan khat ahi Judas hong theng hi. Thiampi liante, Thukham hil syate le upate ii sawl mihon khat namsau le moltawng toai in, Judas taw hong kithawl khawm uh hi." 
Mark14:44 “Ka nap pa sia na mat nop uh sia hi tu hi, man vun a, a cing tu kisepin paipui tavun,” ci in Judas in mipite limlakna piakhol hi." 
Mark14:45 Judas hong thet po ciangin Jesus kungah pai in, “Syapa awng!” ci in namh hi." 
Mark14:46 Tuabangin Jesus man uh a, lencip uh hi." 
Mark14:47 Ahihang tua munah a ding khat in, a namsau dokin Thiampi Lianbelpa ii salpa saat a, a bil saattan hi." 
Mark14:48 Jesus in amate tungah, “Mihing that taiku man tu bang phetin, kei hong man tu takpi namsau le moltawng taw hong kuan nu ziam?" 
Mark14:49 Ni simin Biakinn sungah no taw omkhawm in hilna kong nei a nong man bua uh hi. Ahizong Laithiangtho a taangtut kul hi,” ci hi." 
Mark14:50 Tuaciangin nungzuite theampo in ama nusia in taikeak uh hi. 
Mark14:51 Puankaang neal khat bek a silh tangval khat in, Jesus zui hi. Amate in tangvalpa man tu in kithoai uh hi." 
Mark14:52 Ahihang ama in a puan nusia in, a nguaktangin tai hi." 
Mark14:53 Tua zawkciang Thiampi Lianbelpa inn ah Jesus paipui uh hi. Tua munah thiampi liante theampo, upate le Thukham hil syate kikhawm uh hi." 
Mark14:54 Peter in a khuala thithimna panin Thiampi Lianbelpa ii leitual dong zui hi. Tua munah ngalkapte taw meilum oai in to hi. 
Mark14:55 Thiampi liante le Council buppi in, Jesus a thalup thei natu, a mawna zong ahihang a mu zo bua uh hi." 
Mark14:56 Mihing tam mama in leilot thu taw Jesus mawsak hikale amate khat le khat zongh a thu a kisi bua uh hi. 
Mark14:57 Tuaciangin pawlkhat hong ding a, Jesus mawsak natu in, leilot thu hi bangin son uh hi." 
Mark14:58 “Mihingte vawt Biakinn hisia ka baltham tu a, ahihang ni thum zawkciang mihingte vawt ngawl khat ka sa kik tu hi,’ ci in a pauna ka za uh hi,” ci hi." 
Mark14:59 Ahitazong amate ngawngawn a thu uh a kisi thei bua uh hi. 
Mark14:60 Thiampi Lianbelpa amate theampo ii mai ah ding a, Jesus thu dongh hi. “Hong mawsaknate na zo kik natu nei ngawl ni ziam?” ci hi." 
Mark14:61 Jesus huthe ngawlin om a, kam khat zongh a pau bua hi. Tuaciangin Thiampi Lianbelpa in, khatvei ma, “Nang Thupha toai Pathian Tapa Messiah na hi ziam,” ci hi." 
Mark14:62 “Hi khi hi, no theampo in, Mihing Tapa sia Vaanglianbelpa ziatsang ah to in, vantung ah meeikaaite taw hong pai na mu tu uh hi,” ci in Jesus in zo hi." 
Mark14:63 Thiampi Lianbelpa in, a puantual eautham a, “Tetti dang kul nawn ngawl hi." 
Mark14:64 Pathian min a simmawk hunlam na zaak tek uh hi. Bangbangin thukhen tu nu ziam?” ci hi. Amate theampo in ama a langpan siat uh hi. Ama maw hi, thalup kul tu hi, ci uh hi." 
Mark14:65 Amate pawlkhat in Jesus cilphii in, a mit a sawmsak zawkciang saat uh hi. “Akua in nang hong saat ziam, son thei ta'n,” ci uh hi. Tuaciangin ngalkapte in la in beang uh hi." 
Mark14:66 Thiampi Lianbelpa ii naseam numei khat hong pai laitakin, Peter leitual ah om lai hi." 
Mark14:67 Ama in Peter mei oai in om a mu ciang, encian a, “Nang zongh Nazareth mi Jesus taw kithawl ni hi,” ci hi." 
Mark14:68 Ahihang ama in nial hi. “Na son thu sia he ngawl khi hi,” ci in lampi ah paisan hi. Tuasia laitakin aklui khat khuang hi." 
Mark14:69 Naseam numeinu in tua munah a mu ciang, a dingte zaak tu in, “Ama sia amate sung pan khat ahi hi,” ci kik hi." 
Mark14:70 Ahihang Peter in nial kik hi. Tawmvei zawkciang tua munah a dingte in Peter munah, “Nang, amate mi khat na hina sia nial zo ngawl tu ni hi, banghang ziam cile nangma zongh Galilee ngam pan na hi hi,” ci uh hi." 
Mark14:71 Tuasia ciangin Peter in, “Thumaan son khi hi, ci in ka kiciam hi, thumaan ka son buale Pathian in daan hong pia tahen. Na son uh sia pa hong heaksak ngawl khi hi,” ci hi." 
Mark14:72 Tuasia ciangin aklui a nii veina khuang hi. Tuaciang Peter in Jesus ii ama tungah, “Aklui niivei a khuan ma in, hong he ngawl khi hi, ci in kei thumvei nong nial tu hi,” a ci teng phawk hi. Tuaciang ama in thuak zo ngawlin kap hi." 
Mark15:1 Zingsang tuungin thiampi liante sia upate, Thukham hil syate le Council bup taw a manlang in hong kisitua uh a, amate in vaihawmna nei uh hi. Amate in Jesus thikkhau taw khi uh a, Pilate kungah paipui in aap uh hi." 
Mark15:2 Pilate in, “Nang, Jew te ii kumpipa na hi ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Jesus in, “Nangma ci bang ahi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Mark15:3 Thiampi liante in Jesus mawsiatna hau mama uh hi. 
Mark15:4 Tua ahikom Pilate in, “Amate kam zo ngawl tu ni ziam? Hong mawsaknate theampo ngai in,” ci kik hi." 
Mark15:5 Jesus in kammal khat zongh zo tuan ngawl ahikom Pilate in lamdang sa hi. 
Mark15:6 Paisan Poai kivawt simin mihingte ii nget thongtaak khat pawpo Pilate ii suataksak thei ngeina khat om hi. 
Mark15:7 Tua hun laitakin kumpi leedona a vawt tualthat thongtaak te sungah Barabbas a kici khat zongh om hi. 
Mark15:8 Mihonpite hong kikhawm a, Pilate tungah a vawt ngei bang a vawt natu ngen tu in hong kipat uh ciangin," 
Mark15:9 ama in, “Jew te kumpipa sia suatak leng, hong oai zaw nu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Mark15:10 Thiampi liante in Jesus a een na hangin, ama tungah a aap uh hunlam thiangtel mama hi." 
Mark15:11 Ahihang thiampi liante in mihonpite hol a, Pilate in Barabbas a suataksak zawk natu ngensak uh hi." 
Mark15:12 Pilate in mihonpite munah, “Tua ahile Jew te kumpipa na ci uh sia bang law leng hong oai nu ziam?” ci hi." 
Mark15:13 Amate in, “Thinglamtee tungah thatlum in!” ci in au uh hi." 
Mark15:14 “Ahihang ama in bang khialna nei ziam?” ci in Pilate in dongh hi. Amate in “Thinglamtee tungah thatlum in!” ci in a nging seseam in au uh hi. 
Mark15:15 Pilate in mihonpite lungkimsak nuam ahikom Barabbas tha hi. Tua zawkciangin Jesus velsak a thinglamtee tungah thalup tu in aap hi. 
Mark15:16 Ngalkapte in Jesus sia ngamuk mangpa leitual sumsung sangah paipui a, ngualdang theampo zongh sam uh hi." 
Mark15:17 Amate in puantual sandup khat Jesus in silhsak a, lingngui taw a kivawt kumpilukhu khat a lu tungah khusak uh hi." 
Mark15:18 Tua zawkciang amate in, “Jew te kumpipa a khansau tahen!” ci in zatakna kipia theamsak uh hi." 
Mark15:19 Amate in a lu pan saat a, cilphii in a mai ah a zakta bang keakin khupdin in, kun uh hi." 
Mark15:20 A selnona uh teng a man zawkciang puantual sandup sia ama tung pan suutin, ama puansilh ngei teng silhsak kik uh hi. Tua zawkciang thinglamtee tungah thalup tu in paipui uh hi." 
Mark15:21 Ngamsung pan khuapi sungah hong pai Simon a kici pasal khat taw lampi ah kisi a, ngalkapte in ama sia zawthawk thu taw Jesus ii thinglamtee puasak uh hi. (Tua Simon sia Cyrene pan hi a, Alexander le Rufuste ii pa ahi hi.)" 
Mark15:22 Amate in Jesus sia Golgotha a kici munah paipui uh hi. Tua mun ii a min sia “Lungu Mun” cina hi. 
Mark15:23 Tua munah amate in Jesus sia sapittui le myrrh a kici zatui nam khat a hel sia tul tu in, kipan uh hi. Ahihang ama in a dawn nuam bua hi." 
Mark15:24 Tuaciangin ama thinglamtee tungah kilh a, a puansilh teng a koisia akua in nga tu ci in aisaanna taw a et zawk uh ciang hawm uh hi." 
Mark15:25 Thinglamtee tungah a kilh hunin zingsang nai kua saat hi. 
Mark15:26 “Jew te Kumpipa” hi ci in a kimawsakna lai ki at hi. 
Mark15:27 Amate in ngualsuam phalakte nii zongh thinglamtee khat veve tungah kilh uh a, khat sia Jesus ii ziatsang, khat sia a veisang ah kilh uh hi." 
Mark15:28 (Laithiangtho sungah ‘Ama in leitung thukham paltante thuak bangin thuak hi,’ a ci teng a taangtun natu ahi hi.)" 
Mark15:29 Tua mun kaantan in a pai mihingte in, lupei san in nunau zazaan uh hi. “Heii! Biakinnpi baltham in ni thum sung ka sa kik thei tu ci ni hi." 
Mark15:30 Tu in thinglamtee tung pan hong tuaksuk ta'n a, nangma le nangma kihun in!” ci uh hi." 
Mark15:31 Tuabang ma in, thiampi liante le Thukham hil syate in Jesus selno zazaan uh a, amate khat le khat hi bangin kici uh hi. “Ngualdang hun hi ve ahihang ama le ama kihun thei ngawl hi!" 
Mark15:32 Israel Kumpipa Messiah thinglamtee tung pan hong tuaksuk thei ziam maw en sin tawng, tua hile ama um vak hing!” ci uh hi. Tuaciang in Jesus taw thinglamtee tung a kikilh te nii zongh in Jesus nunau zazaan uh hi." 
Mark15:33 Nisun laitakin ngam bup khuazing in tuam cip a, nai thum sung khuazing hi." 
Mark15:34 Nai thum sa ciangin Jesus in a nging tatakin au a, “Eloi, Eloi, lema sabachthani?” ci hi. A khiakna sia, “Ka Pathian, ka Pathian awng, banghangin hong nusia ni ziam?” ci na ahi hi." 
Mark15:35 Tua munah mihing pawlkhat a omte in ama auna za a, “Ngai vun, ama in Elijah sam hi!” ci uh hi." 
Mark15:36 Amate sung pan khat in puansia khat la in, sapittui haau sungah a pap zawkciang, ciangkang dawn ah sawm hi. Tuaciang Jesus ii muk ah taa in, “Om zii tawng! Elijah sia thinglamtee tung panin ama suut tu in hong pai le hong pai ngawl en lai tawng!” ci hi." 
Mark15:37 Jesus in nging takin au in, thi hi." 
Mark15:38 Biakinn sungah kidoina puankhak sia a lu pan a taw dong khen nii kisua in kizen suk hi. 
Mark15:39 Tua mun thinglamtee mai ah a ding ngalkap hon ukpa in, Jesus thi zia mu hi. “Hi mipa sia Pathian Tapa takpi hi!” ci hi." 
Mark15:40 Numei pawlkhat tua munah om a, a khuala thithimna mun khat pan en uh hi. Amate sungah a kihel teng sia Mary Magdalene, a khangmoi zaw James le Joseph nu Mary le Salome te ahi uh hi." 
Mark15:40 Numei pawlkhat tua munah om a, a khuala thithimna mun khat pan en uh hi. Amate sungah a kihel teng sia Mary Magdalene, a khangmoi zaw James le Joseph nu Mary le Salome te ahi uh hi." 
Mark15:41 Amate in Galilee ngam ah Jesus a om lai in zui uh a, a hu tawntung te ahi uh hi. Ama taw Jerusalem khua a hong paikhawm numei dang tam mama zongh om uh hi." 
Mark15:42 Nitak ciangin Arimathea mi Joseph hong theng hi. Ama sia Council sungah a kizakta upa khat hi a, Pathian Ngam hong thet tu a ngakpa khat ahi hi. Tua ni sia kingin ni hi (Sabbath ma ni khat) tua ahikom Joseph in Pilate kungah hang takin pai a Jesus ii luang ngen hi." 
Mark15:43  
Mark15:44 Jesus thi zo hi ci a zaak ciangin, Pilate in lamdang sa hi. Ama in ngalkap hon ukpa sam a, Jesus a thi zawk a ngei zo ziam ci in dongh hi." 
Mark15:45 Ngalkap mangpa ii thu kona teng a zaak zawkciangin, Pilate in Joseph tungah Jesus luang pia hi." 
Mark15:46 Joseph in puankaang neal khat lei a, a luang la suk in, tua pua taw tunin, suangpi a kikhuak thaan khat sungah sial hi. Tua zawkciang ama in thaan kongvang ah suangtum pui khat taw khak hi." 
Mark15:47 Mary Magdalene le Joseph nu Mary in ngakin en a, Jesus luang koina mu uh hi." 
Mark16:1 Sabbath ni bo zawkciangin, Mary Magdalene, James ii nu Mary le Salome in Jesus luang a zut natu in hel namtuite keng uh hi." 
Mark16:1 Sabbath ni bo zawkciangin, Mary Magdalene, James ii nu Mary le Salome in Jesus luang a zut natu in hel namtuite keng uh hi." 
Mark16:2 Nipi ni zingtuung, nisua ciangin, amate thaan ah pai uh hi." 
Mark16:3 Lampi ah khat le khat hi bangin a kikum uh hi, “Thaan kong panin akua in suangtumpui sia hong liik keaksak tu ziam?” (A suangtum sia lian mama hi.) Tuaciangin amate in a etto uh ciangin a suangtum sia a kiliik sa in om mu uh hi." 
Mark16:4  
Mark16:5 Tuabangin amate thaan sungah tum uh hi, tua munah tangval khangmoi khat a ziatsang ah to in a na om a, puantual kaang khat silh hi, tuaciangin amate lau mama uh hi." 
Mark16:6 “Lau heak vun. Thinglamtee tungah a kithat Nazareth mi Jesus, zong na hi uh kong he hi. Ama hi sungah om ngawl a — tho kik zo hi! En vun, ama kisialna mun hi sung ahi hi." 
Mark16:7 Tu in Peter pan kipan a nungzuite munah hi thu puak tavun: ‘Ama note mai Galilee ah paikhol zo hi; tua munah ama ii hong son ngei bangin, na mu tu uh hi,’ ” ci hi." 
Mark16:8 Tua ahikom amate in lungmang patau in thaan sung pan, pusuak in tai uh hi. Amate in lau ahikom, kuama munah, bangma a son bua uh hi. [" 
Mark16:9 Nipi ni zingtuungin Jesus thina pan a thaw kik zawkciang, a masa phitbel in Mary Magdalene tungah ama kilak hi, tua numei nu sung pan doaite sali Jesus in a hawlkeaksak ngei hi. [Numeite in Peter le a lawmte kungah pai a, amate tungah a kison thute a tom in sonsawn uh hi." 
Mark16:10 Ama pai in Topa kitholpuite munah son hi. Amate kapin, tau in om uh hi. Hisia zawkciang, Jesus ama mama in, nungzuite tungtawnin, nisuana pan nitumna ah, a thiangtho, a hing top, tawntung ngupna thu puak hi.]" 
Mark16:11 Jesus nungta a, ama tungah kilak hi ci in numeinu ii son ciangin, amate in a um bua uh hi." 
Mark16:12 Hisia zawkciang, nungzuite nii ngamsung a pai laitakin Jesus sia a nam tuatuamin kilak hi." 
Mark16:13 Amate heak kikin, nungzui dangte munah a son uh hangin amate in a um bua uh hi." 
Mark16:14 A khakbel in, Jesus sia nungzui sawm le khat te anneak laitakin kilak hi. Jesus in amate teih hi, banghang ziam cile amate in upna nei ngawl a, a thin uh pui ahikom, a nuntak kik a mute ii thu son a um zo bua uh hi." 
Mark16:15 Ama in, “Leitung mun theampo ah pai tavun a, mihing theampo tungah lungdamna thu hil tavun." 
Mark16:16 Akua po ahizong um in, tui a kiphumte kingum tu hi, a um ngawlte ahile puavawkna thuak tu hi." 
Mark16:17 Thu umte nalamdang vawt thei natu vaang kipia tu hi; amate in keima min taw doaite a not tu uh hi; amate kam tumdangin pau tu uh hi; 
Mark16:18 ngulte zamhin nguu khat pawpo a ne zongin, bangma tat ngawl tu hi; amate in ciinate tungah a khut uh nga tu a, ciinate dam tu hi,” ci hi." 
Mark16:19 Topa in amate taw thu a son zawkciang, ama sia vantung ah kila to in Pathianziatsang ah to hi." 
Mark16:20 Nungzuite mun theampo ah pai in, thuhil uh hi, tuaciang Topa in amate taw naseam khawm a, amate thuhilnate sia maan hi ci in a kilak natu in, nalamdang laknate vawtsak thei hi.]" 
Luke1:1 Ka it Theophilus awng: Mihing tam mama in eite sungah thupiangte amate ii thiam thei za tekin at zo uh hi.

Luke1:20 Ahihang kong thupuakte um ngawl ni hi, hikale a hun hong tun tak ciang, ka ci bangin hong piang tu a, hong um ngawl na hikom, na pau thei nawn buatu hi. Kong thuciam teng a tun mateng in, pau thei nawn ngawl dide tu ni hi,” ci hi."

Luke3:2 tuaciang Annas le Caiaphas sia thiampi lianbelte ahi uh hi. Tua hun laitakin sennealngam sungah a om Zechariah ii tapa John tungah Pathian kammal hong theng hi.

Luke3:5 Ngamkuam theampo kivuk tu a, Muallian le mualnote theampo kiziik tam tu hi. Lam kingkoai theampo kimam in, Lam ham theampo a neal in kivawt tu hi." 
Luke3:6 Minam theampo in Pathian ii ngupna mu tu hi,’ ci hi.”" 
Luke3:7 Mihonpite sia John ii tuiphum tu in, hong pai tek uh hi. Amate tungah, “No ngul honte awng, Pathian ii hong tunsak tu daan pan, suakta thei tu nu hi ci in akua in no hong son ziam?" 
Luke3:7 Mihonpite sia John ii tuiphum tu in, hong pai tek uh hi. Amate tungah, “No ngul honte awng, Pathian ii hong tunsak tu daan pan, suakta thei tu nu hi ci in akua in no hong son ziam?" 
Luke3:8 Na mawna uh pan na kisiik kikna uh kilanghsak vun. Tuaciangin Abraham sia kote ii taanghpupi hi ci in, noma tetek sungah na kici tuan heak vun. Kei kong cina pan, Pathian in suangtum hite zongh la in, Abraham suan le paal in vawt thei hi!" 
Luke3:9 Thingkungte phuk tu in a bul ah, hei mai kingat zo hi; nga pha a nga ngawl thingkung theampo kiphuk tu a, meimang sungah kisep tu hi.”" 
Luke3:10 Mipite in, “Tua hile bangbang a ngamta tu khu ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Luke3:11 “Laktong silh nii a neite in, a nei ngawlte silh khat hawm tahen, an a nei te zongh in tuabang ma in hawm tahen,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Luke3:12 Shiadong pawlkhat zongh tui kiphum tu in hong pai a, “Sya awng, ko zongh bangbang ka ngamta tu uh ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Luke3:13 “Na khon tu uh sangin a tamzaw khon heak vun,” amate tungah ci hi." 
Luke3:14 Ngalkap pawlkhat in, “Ko zongh bangbang a ngamta tu khu ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi. Amate tungah, “Zawthawk thu taw kuama tung pan sum la heak vun, leilot thu taw kuama tungah thu zong heak vun. Na thasum uh taw lungkim vun,” ci hi." 
Luke3:15 Mihingte ii lametna sia khang tu in kipan a, amate in John sia Messiah ahi ka tawm maw ci in ngaisun uh hi." 
Luke3:15 Mihingte ii lametna sia khang tu in kipan a, amate in John sia Messiah ahi ka tawm maw ci in ngaisun uh hi." 
Luke3:16 Tua ahikom John in amate tungah, “Kei ka hile tui taw tui kong phum hi, ahihang kei sangin a lian zaw pek khat hong pai lai tu hi. Ama ii peangdap khau suut tu zongh in ka kilawm bua hi. Ama in Thaa Thiangtho le meikuang taw hong baptize tu hi." 
Luke3:16 Tua ahikom John in amate tungah, “Kei ka hile tui taw tui kong phum hi, ahihang kei sangin a lian zaw pek khat hong pai lai tu hi. Ama ii peangdap khau suut tu zongh in ka kilawm bua hi. Ama in Thaa Thiangtho le meikuang taw hong baptize tu hi." 
Luke3:17 Ama in ankheap natu taangkheaplaw, a khut sungah toai zo hi, zungtaangte hong kheap tu a, a tang teng saal sungah khawmtua in; a theap teng a mit ngeingawl meikuang sungah hal tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke3:18 John in Lungdamna Thupha mipite tungah a nanam in hil a, amate tek ii nuntakna ziate a kikheal thei natu in hanthawn hi."

Luke3:19 Ahizong John in ngamuk mangpa Herod teih hi, banghang ziam cile ama in a suapuipa ii zi Herodias teenpui a, phat ngawlna zongh tam ma vawt hi."

Luke3:20 Tuaciang Herod in John sia thong sungah a khumna taw in ngamtatna a sia seseam khat vawt hi.
