Luke4:1 Jordan ngun panin, Jesus sia Thaa Thiangtho taw kidim in, hong heak kik a, tua Thaa in senneal ngamsung dong lampui in paisak hi," 
Luke4:2 tua munah Doaimangpa in ni sawmli ze et hi. Tua hun sung teng theampo bangma neak nei ngawl ahikom, tua hun a bo ciangin a ngilkial hi." 
Luke4:3 Doaimangpa in “Pathian Tapa na hi le, suang hi sia anluum a sua natu in thupia in,” ci hi." 
Luke4:4 Ahizong Jesus in, “Mihingte sia anluum bek taw nungta thei hi ngawl hi, ci in Laithiangtho sungah ki at hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Luke4:5 Tuasia ciangin Doaimangpa in ama la to a, thakhat thu in leitung ngam theampo lak hi." 
Luke4:6 “Hi vaangletna le hi hauna theampo kong pia tu hi. Hite theampo keima khut sung a hong ki aapsa hi a, ka piak nop po ii tungah ka pia thei hi." 
Luke4:7 Kei hong bia lete hite theampo nangma ii neisa suak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke4:8 Jesus in “Laithiangtho in na Topa Pathian bek na bia tu a, ama atu bekma na seam tu hi ci hi!” ci in zo kik hi." 
Luke4:9 Tuaciang Doaimangpa in ama Jerusalem ah paipui a, Biakinn khuvum a saangbelna ah suanhto in, ama tungah, “Pathian Tapa na hile hi sung panin nangma le nangma kilawn suk in." 
Luke4:10 Banghang ziam cile, ‘Pathian in nang hong keam tu in, a vantunglalangte sawl tu hi,’ laithiangtho in ci hi." 
Luke4:11 ‘Amate in a khut uh taw hong domto tu a, na peang beak zongh suang taw a kithutha buatu hi,’ ci lai hi,” ci hi." 
Luke4:12 Ahizong Jesus in, “Laithiangtho in, ‘Na Topa Pathian na ze et heak in’ ci hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Luke4:13 Doaimangpa in Jesus a nanam in a ze et zawkciang, tawm vei sung nusia hi." 
Luke4:14 Tua zawkciangin Jesus Galilee ngam ah heak kik a, tuaciangin Thaa Thiangtho vaangletna sia, ama taw omkhawm hi. Ngamkhen sung bup ah, ama thu hong thang hi." 
Luke4:15 Ama in synagogue sungah hilna nei a, a kuama po in pok hon uh hi." 
Luke4:16 Tuaciang in Jesus Nazareth khua ama khanna munah cia kik a, Sabbath ni in synagogue ah a pai ngei bangin pai hi. Ama dingin Laithiangtho sim tu in kithoai a," 
Luke4:17 tuaciangin kamsaang Isaiah ii laibu aap uh hi. Laizial phel a, hi bang a ki atna mun mu hi." 
Luke4:18 “Topa ii Thaa kei tungah hong om hi, banghang ziam cile mizawngte tungah lungdamna thupha puak tu in kei hong teal hi. A kimante suatakna a pia tu le, mittawte khua a mu kik natu, nencip a thuakte suatakna thu a thangsak tu," 
Luke4:19 Topa in amate a ngup natu hun hong theng zo hi, ci in thangsak tu in kei hong kisawl hi,” ci hi." 
Luke4:20 Jesus in laizial zialin, a keampa tungah a aap kik zawkciang ama to hi. Synagogue sungah a to theampo in, ama lamdang et tek uh a," 
Luke4:21 “Hi laithiangtho kammal hong kisim teng na zaak uh bangin, tuni in hi thu teng hong taangtung zo hi,” a ci hu in, lamdang et tek ahi uh hi." 
Luke4:22 Kammal taknei taw a pau thiam hu in mihingte thinsung hong suu hi. “Ama sia, Joseph ii tapa hi kana ngawl ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Luke4:23 Amate munah, “ ‘Syavuan pa awng, nangma le nangma kidamsak phot in,’ ci paunak sia kei tungah hong zangh tu ci in kong up nginge ma ahi hi. Tua bek dom ngawlin, Capernaum khua ah a kivawt na zaak uhte hi lai ka khua zongh ah vawtin hong sawl lai tu nu hi." 
Luke4:24 A tatakin kong ci ciang, kamsaangte sia, amate khua ah kisaang ngeingawl hi,” Jesus in ci lai hi." 
Luke4:25 “Hong ngai tavun: Elijah hun sung kum thum le kum lang nguatui kang a, ngam bup kialpi a tun laitakin Israel ngam sungah meingong tam mama om hi." 
Luke4:26 Ahitazong Elijah sia Israel ngam sungah meingongte khat beak ii kungah a kipaisak bua hi, ahihang Sidon ngamkhen Zarephath khua ah teang meingong khat ii kungah, kipaisak hi." 
Luke4:27 Tuaciangin kamsaangpa Elisha hun ciangin Israel ngam sungah a lauhuai vun natna vei tam mama om hi; ahitazong Syria mi Naaman simngawl khat beak zongh a kidamsak bua hi,” ci hi." 
Luke4:28 Synagogue sung om mihingte in, hi thu a zaak uh ciang thin uuk uh hi." 
Luke4:29 Amate dingin Jesus khua pua sangah kai a, a khuamual liang tung pan lotsuk sawmin paipui uh hi." 
Luke4:30 Ahihang ama mihonte kaantan in paisuak hi. 
Luke4:31 Tua zawkciangin Jesus Galilee ngam Capernaum khua ah pai a, Sabbath ni in mihingte tungah thuhil hi." 
Luke4:32 Ama thuhil zia lamdang sa uh hi, banghang ziam cile ama in thuneina taw pau hi." 
Luke4:33 Synagogue sungah doai ngilo khat ii thaa a vei pasal khat om a, ama in nging takin ciik au hi." 
Luke4:34 “Aw Nazareth mi Jesus awng, ko bang hong law nuam ni ziam? Hong susiacip tu in hong pai ni ziam? Nang akua ci in hong he khu hi; nang sia Pathian ii a thiangtho kamtaipa ni hi!” ci hi." 
Luke4:35 Jesus in thaa tungah thupia a, “Thim in, pasalpa sung pan pusuak in!” ci hi. Doai in mihingpa sia amate mai ah lei denna in nei a, bangma dang tatsak ngawlin a sung pan pusuak hi." 
Luke4:36 Mihing theampo in lamdang sa uh a, khat le khat hi bangin kici uh hi. “Tu a kammalte bangbang kammal ziam? Thuneina le vaangletna taw hisia pa in, thaa ngilote thupia a, tuaciang amate pusuak hi!” ci uh hi." 
Luke4:37 Jesus huvau thu kipuakte, tua ngamsung mun theampo ah kizel hi." 
Luke4:38 Jesus in synagogue nusia in Simon inn ah pai hi. Simon sunghnu a cisa in suk a, amate in Jesus munah tua thu son uh hi." 
Luke4:39 Ama lupna ah Jesus pai in, ciina nu kungah ding a, ciina nu ciisuk natna pan a dam natu in thupia hi. A ciisuk hong thai a, thakhatin tho in, amate zindo hi." 
Luke4:40 Ni a tum zawkciangin, natna satna a tuatuam a veite peuma a lawmte in Jesus kungah hong paipui uh hi; mihing sim tungah a khut nga a, damsak siat hi." 
Luke4:41 Mipite sung panin, doaite pusuak a, “Nang sia Pathian Tapa na hi hi,” ci in au uh hi. Jesus in doaite a pau ngawl natu thupia hi, banghang ziam cile ama sia Messiah ahi hunlam doaite in he uh hi." 
Luke4:42 Khua hong vak ciangin, Jesus in khuapi nusia in, a ngamkhingna mun khat zuan hi. Mipite in, ama zong tu in kipan uh a, a mu ciangin, a taam lai natu in tho uh hi." 
Luke4:43 Ahihang, amate tungah, “Pathian Ngam huvau, Lungdamna Thupha sia khuapi dangte zongh ah, ka hil kul tu hi, banghang ziam cile tua nasep seam tu ma in, Pathian ii hong sawlpa ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Luke4:44 Tuasia bangma in, ama in ngam bup sung synagogue te ah thuhil hi." 
Luke5:1 Ni khat Jesus Gennesaret Tuili hui ah dingin mipite in Pathian thu ngai tu in, ama sangah neak ngawp nuamin a kiphulung uh hi." 
Luke5:2 Ama in ngunkuang nii vaalbo tungah kikaito sa in a om mu hi; ngasa paaite in a ngeen uh a sil laanin, a nusiat uh ahi hi." 
Luke5:3 Ngunkuangte sung pan khat sia Simon aa hi a — Jesus in tua tungah kaa in — vaalbo panin tawm a khualana ah sawnin sawl hi. Jesus ngunkuang tungah to in, mihonte hilna nei hi." 
Luke5:4 A son tu teng a man zawkciangin, Simon munah, “Na ngunkuang tui thukna munah sawn lai in, tuaciang in nang le na seppuite ngasa man tu in na ngeen uh hong khiasuk tavun,” ci hi." 
Luke5:5 Simon in, “Topa awng, zan khuateakin ka diang zo uh a, bangma man ngawl khu hi. Ahihang nangma in hong sawl na hi ciang, ngeente ka khiasuk tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Luke5:6 Amate in a khiaksuk uh ciangin, ngasa tam mama man a, a ngeente ektham dektak hi." 
Luke5:7 Tuasia ciangin ngunkuang dang khat sung pan a seppuite, amate hu tu in sam uh hi. Amate hong pai a, ngunkuangte ngeal dimin, ngasa a sun uh ciangin, a ngunkuangte tui sungah tum dektak hi." 
Luke5:8 Simon Peter in bang thu teng piang, ci in a mu ciangin, Jesus mai ah, ama khupdin in, “Topa awng, kei kung pan kiheam in! Kei sia mimawpa khi hi!” ci hi." 
Luke5:9 Ama le a ompui dangte in, ngasa tam mama a mat uh sia lamdang sa uh hi." 
Luke5:10 Simon seppui ahi Zebedee tate James le John zongh in, lamdang sa uh hi. Jesus in Simon tungah, “Lau heak in; tu pan kipan mihingte na man tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke5:10 Simon seppui ahi Zebedee tate James le John zongh in, lamdang sa uh hi. Jesus in Simon tungah, “Lau heak in; tu pan kipan mihingte na man tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke5:10 Simon seppui ahi Zebedee tate James le John zongh in, lamdang sa uh hi. Jesus in Simon tungah, “Lau heak in; tu pan kipan mihingte na man tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke5:11 Amate in a ngunkuang uh vaalbo tungah kaito a, a neisa theampo nusia in, Jesus nung zui uh hi." 
Luke5:12 Khatvei Jesus khuapi khat sungah om a, tua munah, a lauhuai vun natna a vei pasal khat om hi. Ama in Jesus a mu ciangin, a mai ah bok a, “Topa, nong thiangthosak nuam le hong thiangthosak thei ni hi,” ci in thum hi." 
Luke5:13 Jesus in a khut vaan a, ama tham in, “Hong thiangthosak nuam khi hi. Thiangtho ta'n!” ci hi. A natna teng thakhatin dam hi." 
Luke5:14 Jesus in, “Kuama munah son heak in, ahizong thiampipa kungah pai paih ta'n a, ama in vealsak ta'n; tua zawkciang, a kuama theampo in dam zo hi, ci in hong heak natu in, Moses ii sawl bangin, sangaw biakpiaknate vawt ta'n,” ci hi." 
Luke5:15 Ahihang Jesus ii thu thang seseam a, tuaciang mihonpite in ama thuson ngai tu le, a natnate pan damna a nga tek natu in, a kungah pai uh hi." 
Luke5:16 Ahihang Jesus a ngamkhingna munte ah thungen tu veu in pai hi. 
Luke5:17 Ni khat Jesus ii a thuhil laitak, Galilee ngam, Judea le Jerusalem panin Phariseete pawlkhat le, Thukham hil syate to hon uh hi. Ciinate a damsak natu in, Topa vaangletna Jesus tungah om hi." 
Luke5:17 Ni khat Jesus ii a thuhil laitak, Galilee ngam, Judea le Jerusalem panin Phariseete pawlkhat le, Thukham hil syate to hon uh hi. Ciinate a damsak natu in, Topa vaangletna Jesus tungah om hi." 
Luke5:18 Mihing pawlkhat in pumzaw khat, a lupna taw zawng a, inn sung Jesus mai ah tumpui tu in hanciam uh hi." 
Luke5:19 Ahizong mihonte hangin a tumpui natu, lampi a mu zo bua uh hi. Tua ahikom amate in ciina sia innkhum tungah puato in, suangpheak pawlkhat a lokkeak zawk uh ciang, mihonte laizang Jesus mai ah a lupna taw ma in khiasuk uh hi." 
Luke5:20 Tua mite in bangza in upna nei ci, Jesus in a mu zawkciang pasalpa tungah, “Na mawna hong kimaisak zo hi, lawm awng,” ci hi." 
Luke5:21 Thukham hil syate le Phariseete in, “Pathian zawnsakna kampau hisia pa akua ziam! Mawna maisak thei sia, Pathian khat simngawl a dang om ngawl hi,” amate tetek kici uh hi." 
Luke5:22 Jesus in amate ii ngaisutna teng he ahikom hi bangin ci hi. “Banghangin tuabangin ngaisun nu ziam? 
Luke5:23 ‘Na mawna hong kimaisak zo hi,’ ci sia le ‘Tho in a lampai in,’ ci sia koisia ol zaw ziam?" 
Luke5:24 Tua ahikom mihing Tapa in, leitung ah mawnate maisak theina thu a nei hunlam kong lak tu hi,” ci hi. Tua zawkciangin pumzaw pasalpa munah, “Tho in, na lupna luak in a, inn ah cia ta'n, hong ci khi hi!” ci hi." 
Luke5:25 Thakhat thu in, amate mai ah pasalpa tho a, lupna luakin, Pathian min pokna taw inn ah cia hi." 
Luke5:26 Amate theampo in lamdang tatak sa uh hi. Launa taw kidim in, Pathian pok kawm a, “Tuni in, bangza in a tumdang nate mu thong hi ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Luke5:27 Tua zawkciang Jesus pusuak a, Levi kici shiadongpa a zum sungah to in a om mu hi." 
Luke5:28 Jesus in ama tungah, “Hong zui ta'n,” ci hi. Levi zongh dingin na theampo nusia in zui hi." 
Luke5:29 Tua zawkciangin Levi in ama inn ah, Jesus atu in anvaakna poai lian khat vawt a, a leangnate sungah shiadongte tam ma le midangte kihel hi." 
Luke5:30 Pharisee pawlkhat le tuate sung pan Thukham hil syate in Jesus nungzuite tungah lungkim ngawlna hi bangin ci uh hi. “Banghangin shiadongte le a kipuavawkte taw annekhawm tuidawn khawmin om nu ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi. 
Luke5:31 Jesus in, “Mihing ciidamte in syavuan a kitaangsamh bua hi, ciinate bek in kitaangsamh uh hi." 
Luke5:32 A zatakhuai mihingte a kisiik natu a sam tu in kong pai bua a, a kipuavawkte a sam tu in kong pai hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Luke5:33 Mihing pawlkhat in Jesus tungah, “John ii nungzuite sia an tang mun mama in thungen hi, tuabang ma in, Phariseete ii nungzuite zongh in, ngamta uh hi; ahihang na nungzuite in anne tuidawn in om uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
Luke5:33 Mihing pawlkhat in Jesus tungah, “John ii nungzuite sia an tang mun mama in thungen hi, tuabang ma in, Phariseete ii nungzuite zongh in, ngamta uh hi; ahihang na nungzuite in anne tuidawn in om uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
Luke5:34 Jesus in, “Mopoai sungah zineipa a om laiteng, leangnate an kidan thei na ziam? Kidan thei ngawl hi!" 
Luke5:35 Ahihang zineipa amate kung pan a kilaak zawkciangin amate in an a tang tu uh hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Luke5:36 Jesus in hi thusonteena sia zongh amate tungah son thua hi. “Kuama in puan thak khat leapin, puan luisa phawna in nei ngeingawl hi. Tuabang hile, puan thak sia lalsak a, puan lui sia zongh a phawna taw kilawm ngawl tu hi." 
Luke5:37 Savun thawl luisa sungah kuama in sapittui thak thaal ngeingawl hi, banghang ziam cile sapittui thak in savun thawl lui sia saantham tu a, sapittui bua in, savun thawl lal tu hi." 
Luke5:38 Tua sangin sapittui thakte sia savun thawl thak sungah kithaal zaw tu hi. 
Luke5:39 Tuaciangin sapittui kumlui a dawn sate in sapittui thak a du buatu hi, ‘A lui sia phazaw hi,’ ci hi.”" 
Luke6:1 Sabbath ni khat, Jesus in zungtaang lote kaantan in pai hi. A nungzuite in zungtaang huite hiat uh a, a tangte ne uh hi." 
Luke6:2 Pharisee pawlkhatte in, “Sabbath ni a, vawt thei ngawl tu hi ci in, Thukham ii a cite banghangin vawt nu ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Luke6:3 “David le a ngalkapte a ngilkial uh ciangin, a ngamtatna uhte sim ngeingawl nu ziam?" 
Luke6:4 Ama in Pathian inn sungah tumin, Pathian a kipiasa anluum la in, ne a, a lawmte zongh pia hi, a tatakin ci leang tuate thiampite ngawl po ii neak thei natu ngeina om ngawl hi,” ci in Jesus in amate zo kik hi." 
Luke6:5 Tuaciang Jesus in a thukhupna ah, “Mihing Tapa sia Sabbath ii Topa ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Luke6:6 Sabbath nidang khat ah Jesus synagogue ah pai a, thuhil hi. A khut ziatsang a zaw pasal khat tua munah om hi." 
Luke6:7 Thukham hil syate le Phariseete in Jesus tungah mawna zong nuamin, Sabbath ni in ciina a damsak ziam a damsak bua ziam, ci in a khial tu encik hi." 
Luke6:8 Ahihang Jesus in amate thinsung he siat ahikom pasalpa tungah “Ding in a, hi sung mai sangah hong pai ta'n,” ci hi. Pasalpa tho a, dingto hi." 
Luke6:9 Tuaciang Jesus in tua mite tungah, “Ih Thukham in Sabbath ni in bang teng sep tu hong oai ziam? ci in hong dongh khi hi. Ngual huzaw tu hi ziam maw? Ngual nasak zaw tu hi ziam? Mihing khat ii nuntakna huu zaw tu hi ziam maw susia zaw tu hi ziam?” ci in," 
Luke6:10 a kiim a om theampo a et zawkciang; pasalpa tungah, “Na khut vaan in,” ci hi. Tuabangin ahiciang a khut dam kik hi." 
Luke6:11 Amate a thin uuk mama a, Jesus bang law thei tu hi ziam, ci in kikum uh hi." 
Luke6:12 Tua hun laitakin Jesus, mual tungah kaato in, zankhuateak Pathian tungah thungen hi." 
Luke6:13 Khuavak ciangin, a nungzuite ama kungah sam a, amate sung pan nungzui tu sawm le niite teal hi, tuate sawltakte kici hi:" 
Luke6:14 Simon (Peter ci in min vaw hi) le a suapuipa Andrew; James le John, Philip le Bartholomew,"

Luke6:14 Simon (Peter ci in min vaw hi) le a suapuipa Andrew; James le John, Philip le Bartholomew," 
Luke6:15 Matthew le Thomas, Alphaeus ii tapa James le Simon (minam it a kici pa),"

Luke6:16 James ii tapa Judas le ama a leeheakpa, Judas Iscariot ahi uh hi."

Luke6:17 Mualtung pan sawltakte taw Jesus hong tuaksuk kik ciangin, zaanglei tam mun khat ah a nungzui mihing honkhat taw ding hi. Judea ngam bup pan le Jerusalem le tuipi hui khuapi Tyre le Sidon pan, hong kingawmtua mihon khat, tua munah om uh hi;" 
Luke6:17 Mualtung pan sawltakte taw Jesus hong tuaksuk kik ciangin, zaanglei tam mun khat ah a nungzui mihing honkhat taw ding hi. Judea ngam bup pan le Jerusalem le tuipi hui khuapi Tyre le Sidon pan, hong kingawmtua mihon khat, tua munah om uh hi;" 
Luke6:18 amate in Jesus thuhilna ngai tu le a natna uh pan a damsak tu thangai in hong pai ahi uh hi. Thaa ngilote ii vawtsiat mihingte zongh hong pai a, dam uh hi." 
Luke6:19 Mihing theampo in ama tham tu in, hanciam uh hi, banghang ziam cile ama tung panin, vaang hong pusuak a, amate damsak siat hi." 
Luke6:20 Jesus in a nungzuite en a, “No a zawngte in a lungdam te na hi uh hi. Pathian Ngam sia note aa ahi hi!" 
Luke6:21 “Tu laitak a ngilkialte in a lungdamte na hi uh hi; na ngil uh a va tu hi! “Tu laitak a kapte in a lungdamte na hi uh hi; na nui tu uh hi! 
Luke6:22 “Mihing Tapa hangin ngual in hong ensan a, hong nial in hong lang in, misiate awng hong cile, a lungdamte na hi uh hi!" 
Luke6:23 Tuabangin thu hong pian ciangin lungdam vun a, lawpna taw na diang vun, banghang ziam cile no atu vantung ah thaman lian khat kikoisak hi. Banghang ziam cile amate ii taanghpupite zongh in kamsaangte tungah tuabang ma in, na ngamta uh hi." 
Luke6:24 “Ahizong tu laitak no a haute atu in bangza in lauhuai ziam; no sia a nuam a nungta sa hi zo nu hi! 
Luke6:25 Tu laitak no a ngilvate atu in bangza in lauhuai ziam; na ngil uh kial tu hi! “Tu laitak no a nuite atu bangza in lauhuai ziam; tau in na kap tu uh hi! 
Luke6:26 “Mihingte in hong phat son ciangin bangza in lauhuai ziam; amate taanghpupite zongh in leilot kamsaangte, tuabang ma in na son uh hi." 
Luke6:27 “Ahizong hong zate tungah kong ci hi: Na ngalte it vun, hong ensante tungah thupha vawt vun," 
Luke6:28 hong haamsiatte tungah thupha pia vun a, hong vawtsiate atu thungetsak vun." 
Luke6:29 Khat po in na biang lang hong beang le, a lang zongh na beang thuasak vun; khat po in na laktong puasilh a la le, na laktong zongh na pia thua vun." 
Luke6:30 Bang khat pawpo hong ngen a om le na pia vun, na neisa uh hong laaksak a om le, na ngen kik heak vun." 
Luke6:31 Noma tungah hong kivawt le na oai uh bangin, ngual tungah na vawt vun." 
Luke6:32 “No hong itte bek na it uh le, banghangin thupha saang tu nu ziam? Mimawte zongh in amate a itte it hi!" 
Luke6:33 Tuaciang in no tungah thupha hong vawtte tung bek ah thupha vawt le uhte, banghangin thupha khat saang tu nu ziam? Mimawte ngawngawn zongh in tuabang ma in ngamta hi!" 
Luke6:34 Hong lo kik tu a na muanmawk uhte tung bek ah na pukthaak uh le, bangbangin thupha khat saang tu nu ziam? Kilo kik tu lam etna taw mimaw tetek zongh kipukthaak hi!" 
Luke6:35 Tuabang hi ngawl hi! Na ngalte it vun, amate tungah thupha vawt vun; sum pukthaak tavun a lo kik tu na thangai heak vun. Tua hile no in thaman lian khat na nga tu uh a, a Saang Bel Pathian ii tate na suak tu uh hi, banghang ziam cile ama sia lungdamna a he thei ngawlte le mihing ngilote tungah thuthiam hi." 
Luke6:36 Na Pa uh sia hesuak thiampa ahi bangma in, no zongh ngual na hesuak tavun." 
Luke6:37 Ngual tungah thu na khen heak vun, tua hile Pathian in no tungah thu hong khen ngawl tu hi, ngual na mawsak heak vun, tua hile Pathian in hong mawsak ngawl tu hi; Ngual mawna na maisak vun, tua hile Pathian in note mawna hong maisak tu hi." 
Luke6:38 Ngual na piak uh bangin, Pathian in hong pia tu hi. Ngual na piakna uh taw kizui in a kihen ikek a kilok cinten, a teena khum a vuum a dimleet in Pathian in no tungah hong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke6:39 Tuaciang Jesus in hi thusonteena son hi: “Mittaw khat in mittaw dangkhat lam a pui thei buatu hi; tuabangin lampui le a nii in dum sungah taak khawm tu hi. 
Luke6:40 Sangpatangpa in a syapa sangin, lianzaw ngawl hi; sangpatang peuma a sin tu teng a man zawkciangin, a syapa bang hong hi pheang tu hi." 
Luke6:41 “Banghangin na suapuipa mittang sung a ninteak sia mu thei in nangma mittang sungah thingluang sia thupi laak thei ngawl ni ziam? 
Luke6:42 Na suapuipa munah, ‘Suapui awng nong hesuakna in, na mittang sungah ninteak sia hong laakkeaksak tong,’ na ci hang, nangma mittang sung a thingluang sia zongh mu thei ngawl hi ngawl ni ziam? No a kihitheamsakte awng! A masa phit in noma mittang sung a thingluang sia lakeak phot vun, tuasia zawkciangin na suapuipa mittang sung pan ninteak sia na laak thei natu in, a thiang takin, na mu thei tu uh hi." 
Luke6:43 “Thingkung ciidam khat in thingnga pha ngawl a nga bua a, tuaciang thingkung pha ngawl khat in thingnga pha a nga bua hi." 
Luke6:44 Thingkung sim in a nga taw in a kung ii omzia kitel thei hi; Ngam lingkung tung panin theinga na lo bua uh a; lingkung tung panin sapitnga na lo bua uh hi. 
Luke6:45 Miphapa in, a thinsung ah a kholsa phatnate panin, thuphate pusua a; mihing pha ngawl pa in thusiate pusua hi. Banghang ziam cile thinsung ah a dimin a om bangin kam panin kison hi." 
Luke6:46 “Banghangin ‘Topa, Topa’ hong cici napi, kong son bang vawt ngawl nu ziam?" 
Luke6:47 Mihing khat po in, kei kungah hong pai in, ka kammal hong ngai a, ka thu hong nite sia bang taw kibang ziam cisia kong lak tu hi." 
Luke6:48 Ama sia inn sapa khat khuamkua a thuk in to a, suangpi sia inn doppha in a nei pa taw kibang hi. Namthuam a, tua inn nawkngawp ahihang pha takin kisa ahikom a ngawk zo bua hi." 
Luke6:49 Ahizong ka thu hong ngai a, ka sawl bangin hong ni ngawlte sia inn doppha a nei ngawl inn sa pa taw kibang hi; namthuam in a nawk ciangin tua inn thakhat thu in puk a — bangzata in a lauhuai lalthapna ziam!” ci hi." 
Luke7:1 Jesus in mihingte tungah hi teng a ci zawkciang, Capernaum khua ah pai hi." 
Luke7:2 Tua munah Rome ngalkap hon ukpa ii a it mama a naseampa khat om a; ama thi dektakin a cina hi. 
Luke7:3 Ngalkap hon ukpa in Jesus thu a zaak ciang, a naseampa a damsak nop manin Jesus sam tu in Jew upate pawlkhat paisak hi." 
Luke7:4 Amate in Jesus kung a thet ciangin, “Hisia pa hu lete kilawm mama ka sa uh hi." 
Luke7:5 Ama in ih mite hong it a, synagogue khat zongh ko atu in hong saksak hi,” ci in nasia takin thuumsak uh hi." 
Luke7:6 Tua ahikom Jesus sia ama a samte taw paikhawm hi. A inn nai hong thet uh ciangin, ngalkap hon ukpa in a lawmte paikholsak a, hi bangin Jesus tungah cisak hi, “Topa awng, ngim nga thong tu ni hi. Kei inn sungah nang nong pai tu sia ka kiphu bua hi," 
Luke7:7 nang kungah kei kong pai tu hang zong kilawm kisa ngawl khi hi. Thupia po lete, ka naseampa dam tu hi." 
Luke7:8 Keima zongh thunei uliante khutnuai ah naseam khat ka hi a, keima ii khutnuai zongh ah ngalkapte om hi. Khat ii munah, ‘Pai in!’ ka cile, pai a; ‘Hong pai ta'n!’ ka cile, hong pai hi. Ka sila pa munah, ‘Hisia vawt in!’ ka ci ciang zong, ama in vawt hi,” ci hi." 
Luke7:9 Jesus in hi thu teng a zaak ciangin, lamdang sa hi; a nung pan a zui mihingte sangah kingeilee in, “Hi bang upna Israel mite sung ngawngawn zongh ah ka mu ngei bua hi!” ci hi." 
Luke7:10 Kamtaite ngalkap hon ukpa inn ah cia kik a, a naseampa a damsa in mu uh hi." 
Luke7:11 Tua zawk tawmvei ciangin Jesus in Nain a kici khua khat ah a nungzuite le mihon khat taw kithawlin pai uh hi. 
Luke7:12 Khuapi kongpi a thet lian laitakin mihing pawlkhat thaan kuan tu in hong pusuak hi. Mithipa sia meingong khat ii khat bek a nei sun tapa hi a, khua sung panin mihon in meingongnu zui uh hi." 
Luke7:13 Topa in ama a mu ciangin hesuakna thin taw kidim a, “Kap heak in,” ci hi." 
Luke7:14 Tuasia ciangin Jesus in mithi luang kung zuanin tham a, a kuang puate in din uh hi, Jesus in, “Tangval awng! Tho in kong ci hi!” ci hi." 
Luke7:15 Mithi pa hong tho to a, pau tu in a kithoai ciang Jesus in, a nu aap kik hi." 
Luke7:16 Amate theampo lau in, Pathian pok uh hi. “A lian mama kamsaangpa khat ei sungah piang zo hi! Pathian in a mite ngum tu in hong pai zo hi!” ci uh hi." 
Luke7:17 Hi bang Jesus ii thusia ngamsung le a kiimkot ngamkhente ah kizel hi. 
Luke7:18 John ii nungzuite in hi thu teng John tungah a son uh ciangin," 
Luke7:18 John ii nungzuite in hi thu teng John tungah a son uh ciangin," 
Luke7:19 ama in mihing niite Topa tungah hi bangin thu dongh tu in paisak hi. “Nang sia John ii hong pai tu hi a cisia ma na hi ziam? tua ahibuale ngualdang ka na lam en lai tu uh ziam?” 
Luke7:19 ama in mihing niite Topa tungah hi bangin thu dongh tu in paisak hi. “Nang sia John ii hong pai tu hi a cisia ma na hi ziam? tua ahibuale ngualdang ka na lam en lai tu uh ziam?” 
Luke7:20 Amate in Jesus kung hong thet uh ciangin, “Nang sia hong pai tu pa tatak na hi na ziam? Tua ahibuale mihing dangkhat ka lam en lai tu uh ziam? ci in Tuiphumpa John in nangma kungah dongh tu in ko hong paisak hi,” ci hi." 
Luke7:20 Amate in Jesus kung hong thet uh ciangin, “Nang sia hong pai tu pa tatak na hi na ziam? Tua ahibuale mihing dangkhat ka lam en lai tu uh ziam? ci in Tuiphumpa John in nangma kungah dongh tu in ko hong paisak hi,” ci hi." 
Luke7:21 Tua hun laitak mama in Jesus in, mihing tam mama te ii a natnate uh pan le, thaa ngilo veina uh panin damsak a, mittawte tam ma khua musak hi." 
Luke7:22 Ama in John ii kamtaite tungah, “John kungah heak kik tavun a, na mu uh na zaak uh teng son tavun: mittawte in khuamu a, peangbaite pha tak lampai thei a, a lauhuai vun natna veite kidamsak a, nangongte in khuaza a, mithite kitho kiksak a, a zawngte tungah Lungdamna Thupha kihil hi." 
Luke7:22 Ama in John ii kamtaite tungah, “John kungah heak kik tavun a, na mu uh na zaak uh teng son tavun: mittawte in khuamu a, peangbaite pha tak lampai thei a, a lauhuai vun natna veite kidamsak a, nangongte in khuaza a, mithite kitho kiksak a, a zawngte tungah Lungdamna Thupha kihil hi." 
Luke7:23 Kei hong muangla ngawlte bangza in a lungdamte ahi uh ziam!” ci in zo kik hi. 
Luke7:24 John ii kamtaite in a nusiat zawk uh ciang, Jesus in John ii thu, mihonte tungah son tu in kipan hi: “John ii thuhilna ngai tu in, sennealngam sungah na pai uh ciangin, bang mu tu in na kimuangmaw uh ziam? Vui ii khulup lopate ziam? A bangbel en tu in pai nu ziam?" 
Luke7:24 John ii kamtaite in a nusiat zawk uh ciang, Jesus in John ii thu, mihonte tungah son tu in kipan hi: “John ii thuhilna ngai tu in, sennealngam sungah na pai uh ciangin, bang mu tu in na kimuangmaw uh ziam? Vui ii khulup lopate ziam? A bangbel en tu in pai nu ziam?" 
Luke7:25 Bang en tu in pusuak nu ziam? Puan hoi nawno silh pasal khat ziam? Tuabang a kizeam a, a nuamin a nungtate sia kumpi teenna innte bek ah om hi!" 
Luke7:26 Hong son tavun, bang en tu in pusuak nu ziam? Kamsaangpa khat ahi ziam? Hi hi, ahizong no ii mu sia kamsaang khat sangin lianzaw pek hi." 
Luke7:27 Banghang ziam cile John sia laithiangtho sungah: ‘Pathian in na lampi hong honkholsak tu in, kamtai khat na mai ah ka na puak tu hi’ a ci sia ahi hi.”" 
Luke7:27 Banghang ziam cile John sia laithiangtho sungah: ‘Pathian in na lampi hong honkholsak tu in, kamtai khat na mai ah ka na puak tu hi’ a ci sia ahi hi.”" 
Luke7:28 Jesus in, “A tatakin ka ci ciang John sia mihing a, a minpiang khat pawpo sangin, lianzaw hi. Ahihang Pathian Ngam sungah a nobel pa in, John sangin lianzaw hi,” ci in belap hi." 
Luke7:28 Jesus in, “A tatakin ka ci ciang John sia mihing a, a minpiang khat pawpo sangin, lianzaw hi. Ahihang Pathian Ngam sungah a nobel pa in, John sangin lianzaw hi,” ci in belap hi." 
Luke7:29 Mihing theampo in ama thu za uh hi; amate a tuan in shiadongte in Pathian ii dei thumaan thutangte saang thei in John in tuiphum zo hi. 
Luke7:29 Mihing theampo in ama thu za uh hi; amate a tuan in shiadongte in Pathian ii dei thumaan thutangte saang thei in John in tuiphum zo hi. 
Luke7:30 Ahihang Phariseete le thukham hil syate in amate atu, Pathian ii tupna te nial in, John ii tuiphum tu a uuk bua uh hi." 
Luke7:30 Ahihang Phariseete le thukham hil syate in amate atu, Pathian ii tupna te nial in, John ii tuiphum tu a uuk bua uh hi." 
Luke7:31 Jesus in a kampau zomto suak a, “Tu hun a mihingte bang taw hong teengat tu khi ziam? Amate bang taw kibang ziam?" 
Luke7:32 Amate vanh zuakna phual ah, a to patangte taw kibang hi. Pawlkhat in a dang pawlkhatte ausan a, ‘Mopoai la hong sak ung, ahihang laam nuam bua uh teh! mithi vuina la hong sak ung, ahizong kap nuam bua uh teh!’" 
Luke7:33 Tuiphumpa John hong pai in, ama in an tang a, sapittui ne ngawlin a om ciangin ‘doaivei hi!’ ci nu hi." 
Luke7:33 Tuiphumpa John hong pai in, ama in an tang a, sapittui ne ngawlin a om ciangin ‘doaivei hi!’ ci nu hi." 
Luke7:34 Mihing Tapa hong pai a, ama in ne in dawn in, a om leleau ciangin, ‘En vun. Antuangpa, zutuangpa, shiadongte le a kipuavawkte ii lawmpa!’ ci nu hi." 
Luke7:35 Ahitazong, Pathian ciimna a saang theite theampo atu in, thumaan hi ci in kilak hi,” ci hi." 
Luke7:36 Pharisee khat in Jesus an ne tu in sam a, Jesus in tua pa inn ah pai in, an ne tu in to hi." 
Luke7:37 Tua khuapi sungah mawneinu khat teang hi. Jesus sia Pharisee pa inn ah an ne hi, ci in a zaak ciangin sathau namtui suangngo thawl khat dim hong paipui a," 
Luke7:38 Jesus ii nungsang a peang hui ah dingin, kap in a thitui taw Jesus ii peang kawtsak hi. Tua zawkciang a sam taw Jesus peangte nawlin, a peangte namh a, tuate tungah paaknamtui buak hi." 
Luke7:39 Pharisee pa in a mu ciangin, “Hisia pa sia kamsaang hi takpi le ama a tham numei hisia akua hi ci in he tu a, bangbang mawna taw nungta cisia he tu hi!” ama le ama kici hi." 
Luke7:40 Jesus in, “Simon awng, kong son tu thu khat om hi,” ci hi. “Hi hi, syapa awng, hong son ta'n” ci hi." 
Luke7:41 Jesus in, “Sum pukthaak khat pa tungah leiba mihing nii om hi. Khat in dangkatang za nga ama tungah ba a, a khat sia in sawmnga ba hi." 
Luke7:42 A nii ma in, lo kik zo ngawl ahikom, ama in amate ngeal ii leibatte maisak hi. Tua ahile, a koisia zaw in ama a it zaw tu ziam?” ci hi." 
Luke7:43 “Ka upmawk in, a tamzaw a kimaisak sia in it zaw tu hi,” Simon in ci in zo hi. “Na ci bang maan hi,” Jesus in ci hi." 
Luke7:44 Numeinu sangah nga in Simon tungah hi bangin ci hi, “Hi numei na mu ziam? Na inn sungah kong tum a, ka peang sil natu tuidam takpi zong nong pia bua hi, ahihang hisia nu in a thitui taw ka peang hong silsak a, a sam taw hong nawlkosak hi." 
Luke7:45 Nang in napna taw nong muak bua hi. Ahihang hisia nu in kong thet pan kipan ka peang hong namh hi. 
Luke7:46 Ka lu ah ka thii tu olive thau nong pia bua hi, ahihang hisia nu in paaknamtui taw ka peangte hong noisak hi." 
Luke7:47 Kei kong ci in a, ama ii, itna lianpi hong lakna sia in, ama mawna tam mamate kimaisak zo hi, ci na thu kiciansak hi. Tua hi a, tawm bek a kimaisakte in itna tawm bek lak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke7:48 Tua zawkciang Jesus in numei nu munah “Na mawnate kimaisak zo hi,” ci hi." 
Luke7:49 Sabuai ah a to dangte in, “Mawnate ngawngawn a maisak hisia akua ziam,” amate sung tengah ci uh hi." 
Luke7:50 Ahihang Jesus in, numeinu munah, “Na upna in hong ngum zo hi; thinnuam in va pai ta'n,” ci hi." 
Luke8:1 Tua zawk tawmvei zawkciang, Jesus sia khuapi le khuanote ah, khualhaw in Pathian Ngam huvau Lungdamna Thupha hil hi. Nungzui sawm le niite in zui a," 
Luke8:2 tuabang ma in numei pawlkhat le amate sung panin, thaa ngilo veina le natna satna dang a damsakte, Mary (Magdalene a kici), ama ii sung pan doai sali a nawkeaksak nu;" 
Luke8:3 Herod ii zumsung ulian khat ahi Chuza ii zi Joanna; le Susanna le a dang numei tam mama, Jesus le a nungzuite hu natu in, amate neisun po a pia pawlkhat in kitholpui uh hi." 
Luke8:4 Khua khat panin khua khat ah mihingte in Jesus kungah hong pai uh hi; mihon tam mama hong kikhop zawkciang, Jesus in hi thusonteena son hi." 
Luke8:5 “Khatvei lai in, pasal khat in thaicii poai tu in kuan hi. Lo sungah thaicii a poai ciangin, thaicii pawlkhat lamzin tungah taak a, tua munah kisiikcip in vacimte in tawm khawng uh hi." 
Luke8:6 Pawlkhat suang tamna munah tu a, a kung hong po tak ciang ngawtaakcip hi, banghang ziam cile, tua mun lei a nol bua hi." 
Luke8:7 Thaicii pawlkhat lingkung sungah tu a, tua lingkung taw khangkhawm in, lingkung in deapcip uh hi." 
Luke8:8 Tuaciang thaicii pawlkhat leiphana ah tu hi; a kung po a, a kung simin a zaa zakhat tek nga hi.” Tuaciang Jesus in a thuson khup a, “Bil nei po in hi thu za tavun!” ci hi." 
Luke8:9 A nungzuite in Jesus tungah hi thusonteena ii khiakna dongh uh a," 
Luke8:10 ama ii a zo kikna pan, “Pathian ngam thu thuthukte heakna no tungah hong kipia zo hi. Ahizong ngualdang a tu in, sonteena taw kipia hi, amate in en napi in a mu thei ngawl, ngai napi in a tel thei ngawl natu in kivawt hi." 
Luke8:11 “Thusonteena ii khiakna in hi bang ahi hi: thaicii sia Pathian kammal ahi hi. 
Luke8:12 Lamzin tungah a tu thaiciite sia a thu a zate hi; ahihang Doaimangpa hong pai a, ngupna a nga ngawl natu le a up ngawl natu in, a thinsung uh pan tua Pathian thu sia laaksak hi." 
Luke8:13 Suang tamna munah thaicii a tute sia Pathian thu lungdam takin za a, a saangte hi. Ahizong a thu in thuk bun ngawl hi; tawmvei hunsung teng um phot ahihang, ze etna hong pai ciangin, amate puk uh hi." 
Luke8:14 Ling kawm ah thaicii a tute sia a thu za a, ahizong thinngimna, hau nopna le leitung nopsaknate in khunel a, amate min hun a nei bua hi." 
Luke8:15 Leiphana ah a tu thaiciite sia a thu za a, thunitna thinsung pha taw keamcing a, a ngate a nga dong a zomto suakte ahi uh hi." 
Luke8:16 “Kuama in meiinn vaakin kuang taw khup ahizong, tua ahibuale lupna nuai ah ahizong koi ngeingawl hi. Hong sungtangte ii mu thei tu in, meivakna khuam tungah vaak zaw uh hi." 
Luke8:17 “A kiseal nate theampo a kilangh in kipusua tu a, a kikhupsin theampo kimu tu a, kipualaak siat tu hi." 
Luke8:18 “Tua ahiciang na thu zaak uhte kidawm tavun; banghang ziam cile a neite tungah tamzaw kipia tu a, a nei ngawlte tung panin, nei a kisak tawmnote ngawngawn zongh kilaaksak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke8:19 Jesus ii nu le a suapuipate ama kungah pai uh a, ahizong mipite hangin ama taw a kisi thei bua uh hi." 
Luke8:20 Jesus munah khat in, “Na nu le na suapuipate inn pua ah ding a, nang taw kimu nuam hi,” ci hi." 
Luke8:21 Jesus in amate theampo munah “Ka nu le ka suapuipate sia Pathian thu za a, a zuite ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Luke8:22 Ni khat Jesus in a nungzuite taw ngunkuang sungah to uh a, “Tuili ngalkhat ah pai tawng,” ci hi. Tuabang ma in kipan uh hi." 
Luke8:23 Amate tuabangin tui tungah a pai laitak, Jesus mutthip hi. Thakhat thu in tuili tungah suangval hong vasuk a, ngunkuang sungah tuicing tu in kithoai ahikom, amate atu in lauhuai mama hi." 
Luke8:24 Nungzuite in Jesus kung pai in phong a, “Topa, Topa! Ei teng thi dektak zo hing!” ci uh hi. Jesus tho in vuipi le tuihualte thupia a, tuate thimin, dai dide hi." 
Luke8:25 Tua zawkciang nungzuite munah, “Na upna uh koisung om ziam,” ci hi. Ahihang amate in lamdang sa in lau uh a, khat le khat hi bangin kici uh hi. “Hisia pa akua ziam? Ama in vuipi suangval le tui kihualte tungah thu a piak ciangin tuate in, a thu ni uh hi!” ci uh hi." 
Luke8:26 Jesus le a nungzuite tui tungah paisuak uh hi. Galilee tuili ngal Gerasa ngamkhen theng uh hi. 
Luke8:27 Jesus vaalbo ah a kaa ciangin, tua khua mi doaivei khat in muak hi. Tuasia pa khuangeipi hun sung puansilh ngawlin om a, inn ah om nuam ngawlin thaan hawng sungah teang hi." 
Luke8:28 Ama in Jesus a mu ciangin nasia takin au a, a peang kungah kileiden in, “A saangbel Pathian Tapa Jesus awng! Kei bang hong law nuam ni ziam? Daan nong piak ngawl natu hong thum khi hi,” ci hi." 
Luke8:29 Hi bangin a ci thei sia banghang ziam cile, Jesus in thaa ngilo munah, ama sung pan a pusua natu thupia zo ahihang hi. Tamvei mama thaa ngilo in ama man a, ama thong sungah a khut le a peangte thikkol bulin a kikhum hang, a thikkolte saantat in, sennealngam sungah doai in not hi." 
Luke8:30 Jesus in, “Na min bang ziam,” ci in dongh hi. “Ka min sia ‘Mihonpi’ ahi hi,” ci hi — banghang ziam cile ama sungah doai tam mama tum hi." 
Luke8:31 Tua doaite in Jesus munah, a hawng thukpui sungah a puak ngawl natu in thum hi." 
Luke8:32 Tua taw a kinaina mualpangh ah, vok honkhat an zongin taa uh hi. Doaite in Jesus munah tua vokte sungah a tumsak natu in, ngen uh a, Jesus thukim hi." 
Luke8:33 Amate in pasalpa sung pan pusuak a, vokte sungah tum uh hi. Vok hon bup sia mualpangh liang pan kinuntaw suk a, tuili sungah tuitaa in thi siat hi." 
Luke8:34 Vokcingte in thupiang teng mu ahikom amate tai in, khuapi sung le lote ah a thu thangsak hi." 
Luke8:35 Mihingte in bang thupiang ziam ci in, en tu in Jesus kungah hong pai uh ciang, ama sung pan, doai a kinawkeaksak sia pa, puansilh sa in, thinciim takin, Jesus peang kungah to hi; tuasia ciangin amate lau siat uh hi." 
Luke8:36 Tua thupiangte a mute in ngualdangte munah tuasia pa sia bangbangin kidamsak ci thu son uh hi. 
Luke8:37 Tua ngam ah mihing theampo in, Jesus sia mundang a zot natu in, sawl uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate lau mama uh hi. Tua ahikom Jesus in ngunkuang tungah kaa in ding kik hi." 
Luke8:38 A sung pan doai a nawkeaksak pa in, “Hong zuisak ta'n,” ci in Jesus munah thuum hi. Ahihang Jesus in heak kiksak a," 
Luke8:39 “Na inn ah cia kik ta'n, Pathian ii nang tungah na hong sepnate son ta'n,” ci hi. Pasalpa zongh in, khua sung kaantan in pai a, Jesus ii ama tungah a nasep teng son hi." 
Luke8:40 Jesus sia tuili langkhat ah hong heak kik ciangin mite in muak uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate in ama ngak in om top zo uh hi." 
Luke8:41 Tuasia ciangin Jairus kici mihing khat hong theng hi; ama sia tua munah a om synagogue ulian khat ahi hi. Ama in Jesus peang ah bok a, a inn ah a haw natu in thuum hi," 
Luke8:42 banghang ziam cile kum sawm le kum nii a pha khat bek a nei a tanu sia thi dektak hi. Jesus taw hong tonkhawm a, a kiimkot panin mihonpite in phultha tek uh hi." 
Luke8:43 Tuate sungah kum sawm le kum nii chibua top numei khat kihel hi; syavuan thapna in a nei a lamh theampo zangh siat zo hi, ahihang kuama in a damsak zo bua hi." 
Luke8:44 Ama in mihonpite sung, Jesus ii nungsang pan hong pai a, a puanmong tham hi. Thakhatin a chibua sia thai hi." 
Luke8:45 Jesus in, “Akua in hong tham nu ziam,” ci hi. Amate in nial tek uh hi. Peter in, “Mipite in na kiimkot panin hong neak tek hi,” ci hi." 
Luke8:46 Ahizong Jesus in, “Hong tham khat om hi, banghang ziam cile ka pum sung panin, vaangletna a pusua hunlam ka he hi,” ci hi." 
Luke8:47 Numeinu in ama kiphawk zo ci in a heak ciangin liing ngawpin pai a, Jesus peang ah bok hi. Tua munah a om mihing theampo ii muna ah ama ii puanmong a thamsakna thu le, thakhatin a kidamsakna thu son hi." 
Luke8:48 Jesus in ama tungah, “Ka tanu awng, na upna in hong damsak zo hi, Thin nuam takin, va pai ta'n,” ci hi." 
Luke8:49 Jesus in hi bang teng a pau laitakin, ulianpa inn pan kamtai khat hong pai a, Jairus munah, “Na tanu thi zo hi. Topa ngim pia nawn heak in,” ci hi." 
Luke8:50 Ahihang Jesus in tua thu za a, Jairus munah, “Thintoi heak in; um po in, ama dam tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke8:51 Tua inn a thet ciangin ama in Peter, John, James le numeino ii nu le pa simngawl a dang teng a sungtan tu a oai bua hi." 
Luke8:51 Tua inn a thet ciangin ama in Peter, John, James le numeino ii nu le pa simngawl a dang teng a sungtan tu a oai bua hi." 
Luke8:51 Tua inn a thet ciangin ama in Peter, John, James le numeino ii nu le pa simngawl a dang teng a sungtan tu a oai bua hi." 
Luke8:52 Tualai ah a om theampo in numeino hu in kap in mau in om uh hi. Jesus in, “Kap heak vun; numeino thi ngawl hi — a mu hi bek hi!” ci hi." 
Luke8:53 Amate in Jesus nuisan uh hi, banghang ziam cile numeino thi zo hi ci in he uh hi." 
Luke8:54 Ahihang Jesus in numeino ii khut pan kaito in, “Ka tano awng, tho in!” ci hi." 
Luke8:55 Numeino hong nungta kikin, thakhat thu ama hong tho to a, tuaciang Jesus in a neak tu bangkhat po a piak natu in a kiim a om mite sawl hi." 
Luke8:56 A pa le a nu in nasia takin lamdang sa uh hi, ahihang Jesus in thupiang teng kuama tung a son ngawl natu in khaam hi." 
Luke9:1 Jesus in a nungzui sawm le niite sam a doai naw natu le ciinate damsak natu in, vaangletna le thuneina pia hi." 
Luke9:2 Tua zawkciang Pathian Ngam thuhil tu le ciinate damsak tu in amate paisak hi. 
Luke9:3 Amate tungah hi bang teng ci masa hi, “Na khualhaw natu ah bangma keng heak vun; ciangkhut ahizong, sum ngetna ip ahizong, an ahizong, sum ahizong, puan laih natu ahizong, keng heak vun." 
Luke9:4 Hong kisaang na inn pawpo ah tung vun a, tua khua na nusiat uh dong tua inn ah taam tavun;" 
Luke9:5 no hong kisaang ngawlna mun khuate peuma nusia vun a, a kidop thei natu in na peang leivuite na thin tavun,” ci hi." 
Luke9:6 Nungzuite kuan in khuano theampo kaantan in pai a, Lungdamna Thupha hil in, mun theampo ah ciinate damsak hi." 
Luke9:7 Galilee ngamukpa Herod in, thupiang theampo a zaak ciangin, a lungmang mama hi, banghang ziam cile mihing pawlkhat in, tuiphumpa John hong nungta kik hi ci uh hi." 
Luke9:7 Galilee ngamukpa Herod in, thupiang theampo a zaak ciangin, a lungmang mama hi, banghang ziam cile mihing pawlkhat in, tuiphumpa John hong nungta kik hi ci uh hi." 
Luke9:8 Pawlkhat in Elijah hong kilangh zo hi a ci om a, pawlkhat in taanghlai a kamsaang khat hong tho kik hi ci uh hi." 
Luke9:9 Herod in, “John ii ngawng tansak zo khi hi; ama thu huvau ka zaak sia akuabel hi tu ziam?” ci hi. Tua zawkciangin ama in, Jesus a mu thethei natu in hanciam hi." 
Luke9:9 Herod in, “John ii ngawng tansak zo khi hi; ama thu huvau ka zaak sia akuabel hi tu ziam?” ci hi. Tua zawkciangin ama in, Jesus a mu thethei natu in hanciam hi." 
Luke9:10 Sawltakte hong cia kik uh a, amate sep sa theampo Jesus tungah ko uh hi. Ama in amate paipui in, Bethsaida a kici khuapi zuan uh hi." 
Luke9:11 Mihonte in tua thu a zaak uh ciangin, ama zui uh hi. Ama in tua mite pha takin saang a, Pathian Ngam thuhil in, a kisamh te damsak hi." 
Luke9:12 Nitum kuan ciangin, nungzuite sawm le nii ama kungah hong pai a, “Mipite khuano sungah ahizong, lo sungah ahizong, an le ngiabuk zong tu in paisak in, banghang ziam cile hi lai mun sia a tongta mama mun khat ahi hi,” ci uh hi." 
Luke9:13 Ahihang Jesus in, “Amate neak tu, bang khat pawpo noma mama in pia vun,” ci hi. Amate in “Ka nei theampo uh a kingawm anluum nga le ngasa nii hi bek hi. Hi mihon bup atu an lei tu in pai le ung hong oai ni ziam?” ci in zo kik hi." 
Luke9:14 (Pasalte tulnga bang pha hi). Jesus in a nungzuite tungah, “Mihonpite pawl khat ciang sawmnga bang veu a pawl a pawlin tosak vun,” ci hi." 
Luke9:15 A nungzuite in tua bangin a vawt zawk uh ciang," 
Luke9:16 Jesus in anluum luum nga le ngasa tawn nii la in vantung en to a, Pathian tungah lungdam a ko zawkciang tuate balneen in, mipite sungah hawm tu in a nungzuite pia hi." 
Luke9:17 Amate in ne hon a, a kham teak in a neak zawk uh ciang, a kham vaal nungzuite in khum 12 dim nga uh hi." 
Luke9:18 Ni khat Jesus ama nguak thungenin a om laitak nungzuite ama kungah hong pai uh hi. “Mihonte in kei akua hi hong ci ziam,” ci in dongh hi." 
Luke9:19 “Pawlkhat in Tuiphumpa John hi hong ci hi. A dangte in Elijah hi hong ci om a, aheap in taanghlai a kamsaangte khat hong nungta kik hi vak hong ci uh hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Luke9:19 “Pawlkhat in Tuiphumpa John hi hong ci hi. A dangte in Elijah hi hong ci om a, aheap in taanghlai a kamsaangte khat hong nungta kik hi vak hong ci uh hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Luke9:20 “Note in kei akua hi nong ci uh ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Peter in zo a, “Nang sia Pathian ii Messiah ni hi,” ci hi." 
Luke9:21 Tuaciang Jesus in hi thu kuama tungah a son ngawl natu in nasia tak thupia hi. 
Luke9:22 Ama in, “Mihing Tapa in nasia takin thuak tu a, upate, thiampi liante le thukham hil syate in nial tu hi. Ama kithatlum tu hi, ahihang ni thum zawkciangin nuntakna sungah kitho kiksak tu hi,” ci in son lai hi." 
Luke9:23 Tuaciangin amate theampo tungah hi bangin ci hi, “Kei nung hong zui nuam khat po in ama le ama kinial in a thinglamtee ni simin pua in hong zui tahen." 
Luke9:24 Banghang ziam cile a kuama po ama nuntakna a hu nuam sia in taan tu a, ahihang kei hangin a nuntakna a taan sia in a nuntakna a hu tu hi." 
Luke9:25 Mihing khat in leitung theampo a nga hangin ama nuntakna a sumh, ahibuale a taan le bang phatuamna om ziam? Phattuamna om ngawl het hi!" 
Luke9:26 Mihing khat in kei le ka hilnate tungtaang ah a mai a zum le, Mihing Tapa in ama ii vaangletna, Pa vaangletna le vantunglalang thiangthote ii vaangletna taw hong pai ciangin tua mipa tungah a maizum tu hi." 
Luke9:27 A maan takin kong ci ciang, hi lai a om pawlkhatte in Pathian Ngam a mu phot ngawlin a thi buatu hi.”" 
Luke9:28 Hi thute a son zawk nipi khat bang zawkciang, Jesus in Peter, John le James sam a, mual tungah thungen tu in paipui hi." 
Luke9:28 Hi thute a son zawk nipi khat bang zawkciang, Jesus in Peter, John le James sam a, mual tungah thungen tu in paipui hi." 
Luke9:28 Hi thute a son zawk nipi khat bang zawkciang, Jesus in Peter, John le James sam a, mual tungah thungen tu in paipui hi." 
Luke9:29 Ama thu a nget laitakin, a maitang pianzia hong kikheal a, a puansilhte kaangin tee ziazua hi." 
Luke9:30 Thakhat thu in mihing nii hong theng a, ama taw kipaupui hi. Amate sia Moses le Elijah hi a;" 
Luke9:31 amate in vantung vaangletna taw hong kilangh in, Jerusalem ah a thi natu Pathian tupna huvau a khuangkhim nai na thu Jesus taw kikum uh hi." 
Luke9:32 Peter le a kitholpuite mutthip in om uh a, ahizong a khanlaw ciangin Jesus ii vaangtaang le ama taw a ding khawmte nii mu uh hi." 
Luke9:33 Tua mihingte nii in Jesus a nusiat ciangin, Peter in, “Topa hi sungah ih om sia bangza in nuam ziam? Buk thum sa tawng, nang atu khat, Moses atu khat, Elijah atu khat sa tawng,” ci hi. (Ama in bang teng pau cisia a he tak bua hi)." 
Luke9:34 Tuabang a pau laitakin, meeikaai khat hong piang a, a limh taw amate tuam hi. A meeikaai sia nungzuite tungah zaam ahikom amate lau uh hi." 
Luke9:35 Meeikaai sung panin aw khat nging a, “Hi in ka tealsa ka Tapa ahi hi — ama aw na ngai tavun!” ci hi." 
Luke9:36 Awnging sia a tawp ciangin, Jesus ama nguak om hi. Nungzuite in pau ngawlin, a mu nate tua hun laitak kuama munah a son bua uh hi." 
Luke9:37 A zing ciangin Jesus in a nungzuite thum taw mualtung panin tuaksuk a, mihon khat in Jesus muak uh hi." 
Luke9:38 Mihon kawm panin mihing khat au a, “Sya awng! kong thuum hi. Tapa khat bek ka nei sia — hong etsak ta'n." 
Luke9:39 Doaite khat in au khat sua in, ama man a, ama ii kam pan cilphuan tha in butthi kaikinsak a, tawlnga ngawlin vawtsia a, thasua nuam ngawl hi." 
Luke9:40 Na nungzuite munah hong nawkeaksak natu ka nget hangin, hong naw keaksak thei ngawl hi.”" 
Luke9:41 Jesus in zo kik a, “Bangzata upna nei ngawl a mikhialte hi nu ziam! No taw bang tanvei hong omkhawm zo tu a, bang tanvei hong dual zo tu khi ziam? Na tapa hi sungah hong paipui ta'n,” ci hi." 
Luke9:42 Patang sia hong paipui laitakin doai in lei denna in nei a, butthi in kaikinsak hi. Jesus in thaa ngilo tungah thupia a, patang sia damsakin, a pa tungah aap kik hi." 
Luke9:43 Mihing a om theampo in Pathian ii a lian mama a vaangletna lamdang sa uh hi. A vawt theampo mihingte in lamdang a sak laitakin, Jesus in nungzuite munah hi bangin ci hi." 
Luke9:44 “Kong son tu teng na ma ngil heak vun! Mihing Tapa sia mihingte ii vaangletna khut sungah ki aap tu hi,”" 
Luke9:45 Ahizong a nungzuite in hi thu ii khiakna a tel bua uh hi. A tel zawk ngawl natu in kiphualseal a, tuaciang amate in, hi thu huvau dongh ngam ngawl uh hi." 
Luke9:46 Nungzuite sungah akua lianbel ziam ci thu kinialna piang hi. 
Luke9:47 Jesus in amate thinsung ah bang ngaisun ziam ci thu tel ahikom, patangno khat la in, ama kungah dingsak a, amate tungah hi bangin ci hi," 
Luke9:48 “Mihing khat pawpo in, hi patangno sia ka min taw a saang le keima hong saang ahi hi; tuaciang kei hong saang sia in kei hong sawlpa saang ahi hi. Banghang ziam cile, no sungah a nobel sia in, a lianbel ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Luke9:49 John hong pau a, “Topa awng, nangma min taw doaite notkeak khat ka mu a, a kheal natu ka tho uh hi, banghang ziam cile ama ei pawl ahi bua hi,”" 
Luke9:49 John hong pau a, “Topa awng, nangma min taw doaite notkeak khat ka mu a, a kheal natu ka tho uh hi, banghang ziam cile ama ei pawl ahi bua hi,”" 
Luke9:50 Jesus in ama tung le a nungzui dangte tungah, “Ama na tho heak vun, banghang ziam cile no hong langpan ngawl peuma no sang hong pawl ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Luke9:51 Jesus vantung ah a kilaak tu a nai ciangin, a thin hong khensat a, Jerusalem khua sang manaw in pai hi." 
Luke9:52 Ama mai ah kamtaite paikholsak a, Samaria khuano khat sungah tumin na theampo ama atu kinging kholsa a om natu in sawl hi." 
Luke9:53 Ahihang tua munah a mihingte in ama a saang bua uh hi, banghang ziam cile ama Jerusalem khua sang manaw in a pai ahi sia a kitel hang ahi hi." 
Luke9:54 Nungzuite James le John in hi thu a mu uh ciangin, “Topa awng, amate haltham tu in, vantung pan meikuang khat samsuk le ung nong oai ziam,” ci uh hi." 
Luke9:54 Nungzuite James le John in hi thu a mu uh ciangin, “Topa awng, amate haltham tu in, vantung pan meikuang khat samsuk le ung nong oai ziam,” ci uh hi." 
Luke9:54 Nungzuite James le John in hi thu a mu uh ciangin, “Topa awng, amate haltham tu in, vantung pan meikuang khat samsuk le ung nong oai ziam,” ci uh hi." 
Luke9:55 Jesus in kingeilee in teih hi. 
Luke9:56 Tua zawkciang Jesus le a nungzuite khuano dang khat ah pai uh hi. 
Luke9:57 Lampi ah a pai laitakin, mihing khat in Jesus tungah, “Na paina theampo ah kong zui tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke9:58 Jesus in zo kik a, “Ngiate in kua nei uh a, vacimte in bu a nei uh hi, ahihang Mihing Tapa in a lusial natu mun zongh a nei bua hi,” ci hi." 
Luke9:59 Midang khat munah, “Hong zui ta'n,” ci hi. Ahihang tua pa in, “Topa awng, ka pa hong vuisak phot ta'n,” ci hi." 
Luke9:60 Jesus in, “Mithite in amate ii mithite vui tahen, nang na hile pai in, Pathian Ngam thu thangsak ta'n,” ci hi." 
Luke9:61 Midang khat in, “Kong zui tu hi Topa awng, ahihang ka innkuanpuite taw kivaithakna vawt phot tong,” ci hi." 
Luke9:62 “Mihing khat lotho a kipan sia in, nungsang a lee et kikik le Pathian Ngam atu in, ama kimanna om ngawl hi,” Jesus in ci hi." 
Luke10:1 Hisia zawkciang Topa in, a dang sawmsali le nii teal a, nii veu kop in, ama mama ii pai natu khua le munte ah paikholsak hi." 
Luke10:2 Jesus in amate tungah, “Anlaak tu tam hi, ahihang an kaikhawm tu naseam tawm hi. A anla tu naseamte hong puak natu in, anneipa tungah thungen vun” ci hi." 
Luke10:3 “Pai tavun! Ngia hon sungah tuunote tha bangin kong tha hi. 
Luke10:4 Sumbawm ahizong, thung ahizong, peangdap ahizong keng heak vun; Lampi ah ngual paupui tu in tawlnga heak vun." 
Luke10:5 Inn khat pawpo sungah, na tum uh ciang, a masa phit in, “Hi inn ah thupha hong tung tahen!” na ci vun." 
Luke10:6 Thupha a saang nuam mihing khat po a om le na thupha piak uh kip tahen a, tuabang ahibuale, na thupha piak uh dok kik tavun." 
Luke10:7 Tua inn ah taam tavun a, hong piak pawpo ne in, dawn vun, banghang ziam cile naseam khat sia thaman a saan tu kilawm hi. Inn khat pan inn khat ah kikhiin kawkoai heak vun." 
Luke10:8 Khuapi khat sungah na tum uh ciang, no hong kisaang le, na mai ah hong kilui pawpo ne vun," 
Luke10:9 tua khua ah ciinate damsak vun a, ‘Pathian ngam, no taw hong kinai zo hi!’ ci in mite tungah son vun." 
Luke10:10 Ahihang khuapi khat sungah, na tum uh ciangin, no hong kisaang buale, lampi ah pusuak tavun a," 
Luke10:11 ‘Na khua leivui ka peang tungah hong baangte kong thin kik uh hi, ahizong Pathian Ngam, no taw kinai zo hi, ci phawk vun!’ ci tavun." 
Luke10:12 A tatak ka ci ciang, Thukhenna Ni ciangin, Pathian in, tua khua sangin, Sodom khua hesuak zaw tu hi." 
Luke10:13 “Nang atu in bangza in lauhuai ziam, Chorazin awng! nang atu in bangza lauhuai ziam, Bethsaida awng! no sungah hong kivawt nalamdangte Tyre le Sidon ah kivawt thong le tua khua mite in, a mawnate pan kisiik kikna uh, a kilangh natu in, khuangeipi pek lai panin, khau-ip puan silhin to in amate le amate vut kithe tu uh hi!" 
Luke10:14 Pathian in Thukhenna Ni ciangin, note sangin Tyre le Sidon khuate hesuak zaw tu hi." 
Luke10:15 Capernaum awng! Nang na hile nangma le nangma vantung ah kilaamto nuam ni ziam? Hell sungah hong kisepsuk tu hi!” ci hi. 
Luke10:16 Jesus in a nungzuite munah, “No thuson hong ngaite in, kei thu hong ngai ahi hi. No hong nial peuma in, kei hong nial ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Luke10:17 Sawmsali le niite in, lungdamna lianpi taw cia kik uh a, “Topa awng, na min taw thu ka piak uh ciangin doaite ngawngawn in ka thu uh hong ni hi!” ci hi." 
Luke10:18 Jesus in zo kik a, “Vantung panin Satan sia khualeng bangin a taaksuk ka mu hi." 
Luke10:19 Ngai vun! Ngulte le aikamte na totcip natu le na Ngalpa ii thahatna na zaw zawk natu in, no tungah thuneina hong pia zo khi hi, bangma in no hong susia zo ngawl tu hi." 
Luke10:20 Ahizong thaa ngilote ii na thu uh hong nit sia, lungdam heak vun, vantung a, na min uh a kiteptee hu in, lungdam zaw tavun,” ci hi." 
Luke10:21 Tua hun laitakin Jesus Thaa Thiangtho in lungdamna taw kidimsak a, hi bangin ci hi. “Van le lei ii Topa ahi Pa awng! Na tungah ka lungdam hi, banghang ziam cile mihing pilte le mihing ciimte mun panin na seal thute pilna a nei ngawlte tungah na lak hi. Hi hi, Pa awng, hi bang tu ma na deina ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Luke10:22 “Ka pa in na theampo kei hong pia zo hi. Tapa akua ziam ci sia Pa simngawl kuama in a he bua hi, tuaciang Pa akua ziam ci sia Tapa le Tapa ii heaksak tu in a tealte ngawl po in a he bua hi,” ci hi." 
Luke10:23 Tuaciang Jesus in, a nungzuite sang nga in, hi bangin ci tuam hi, “Na mu uh nate hu in, bangza in hampha nu ziam!" 
Luke10:24 Kei kong cina pan, kamsaang tam mamate le kumpite in, no ii mute mu nuam ahihang mu ngawl uh hi, za nuam ahihang za ngawl uh hi,” ci hi." 
Luke10:25 Thukham hil sya khat hong pai in Jesus aitaa nuam a, “Sya awng, tawntung nuntakna ka nga natu in bang ka vawt tu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Luke10:26 Jesus in zo kik a, “Laithiangtho in bang ci ziam, nang tua thu bangbangin na tel ziam” ci hi." 
Luke10:27 Tua pa in zo kik a, “Na Topa Pathian sia na thin theampo, na thaa theampo, na thahatna theampo le na ngaisutna theampo taw na it in. Tuaciangin nangma le nangma na ki it bangma in, na innpaamte na it in,” ci hi." 
Luke10:28 Jesus in, “Na ci teng maan hi, tuabangin ngamta lete na nungta tu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Luke10:29 Ahihang Thukham hil syapa in, ama le ama kitangsak nuam ahikom, hi bangin Jesus dongh thua hi, “Ka innpaam pa sia akua ziam?” ci hi." 
Luke10:30 Jesus in zo kik a, “Khatvei lai in pasal khat, Jerusalem panin Jericho khua ah a paisuk laitakin, ngual suam phalakte in suam a, a pum tung a om teng sutin, saat zazaan a, a thi dektakin nusia uh hi." 
Luke10:31 Thiampi khat tua lampi tawnsuk luilam ahihang, tua a liampa a mu ciangin, lampi langkhat ah pial in, paisan hi." 
Luke10:32 Tuabang ma in, Levi mi khat hong pai a, mihing liampa a mu ciangin, lam langkhat tawnin paisan hi." 
Luke10:33 Ahihang khualhaw Samaria pa khat hong pai a, mihing liampa a mu ciangin, a thinsung ah hesuakhuai sakna taw kidim hi." 
Luke10:34 Ama kungah zuan a, a liammate sathau le sapittui noisak in, tuamsak hi. Tua zawkciangin, a liampa sia a laa tungah suanhto a, zintun inn khat ah paipui in ou hi." 
Luke10:35 A zing ciangin, ama in ngun dangka pheak nii la in, zin innneipa pia hi. ‘Ama na ousak in. Kong pai kik ciangin, ama tungah na bona dang theampo zongh kong pia tu hi,’ ” ci hi." 
Luke10:36 Tuaciang Jesus in thukhupna in, “Nang ii ngaisutna ah, tua mihing thumte sung pan akuabel in, mihing suamte ii sukcippa tungah innpaamte ngamtat tu bangin, ngamta na sa ziam?” ci hi." 
Luke10:37 Thukham hil syapa in, “Ama tungah a thuthiam sia hi,” ci in zo kik hi. Jesus in, “Tua ahile va pai ta'n a, tuabangin seam ta'n,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Luke10:38 Jesus le a nungzuite a papai uh ciang, khuano khat theng a, Martha a kici numei khat in a inn ah zin do hi." 
Luke10:39 Ama in Mary a kici suapuinumei khat nei a, tua nu in Topa peang kungah to in, ama hilnate ngai hi." 
Luke10:40 Martha sia nasep theampo ama ki awn ahikom diksa ngawlin hong pai a, “Topa awng, ka suapuinu in na theampo kei sep tu in, hong nusiat sia samh sa ngawl ni ziam?” Kei hong hu natu in hong sawlsak ta'n!” ci hi." 
Luke10:41 Topa in zo kik a, “Martha, Martha awng, Na tam mama tungah thinngim in buai ni hi." 
Luke10:42 Ahihang a kisamh khat bek om hi. Mary in vawt tu a kilawm sia teal zo hi. Ama tung pan tuasia kilaaksak ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke11:1 Ni khat ni in Jesus in mun khat ah thungen hi. A man ciangin a nungzuite khat in, “Topa awng, John ii a nungzuite a hil bangin, ko zongh thunget natu hong hil ta'n,” ci hi." 
Luke11:1 Ni khat ni in Jesus in mun khat ah thungen hi. A man ciangin a nungzuite khat in, “Topa awng, John ii a nungzuite a hil bangin, ko zongh thunget natu hong hil ta'n,” ci hi." 
Luke11:2 Jesus in amate tungah, “Thu na nget uh ciangin hi bangin ci vun: ‘Pa awng, Na min thiangtho ki upat tahen; Na Ngam hong piang tahen," 
Luke11:3 Ni simin ka khamkhop tu an hong pia ta in," 
Luke11:4 Ko tung hong khialte ka maisak uh bangma in, kote khialna zongh hong maisak ta in, Ze etna haksa hong thuaksak heak in,’ ” ci hi." 
Luke11:5 Jesus in a nungzuite munah, “Sonteena in no sung pan khat in, na lawmte inn khat ah, zankim laitak pai in, ‘Lawm awng, anluum thum hong puk ta'n." 
Luke11:6 Ka lawmte khat khualhaw in ka inn ah hong tung a ka piak tu nei ngawl khi hi!’ ci le uhte tuasia ciang," 
Luke11:7 na lawmpa in a inn sung panin hong zo kik hen a, ‘Hong nawngkaisak heak in! Kongkha kikalh zo a, ka tate zongh lum siat zo hi; tho kik in bang khat po kong piak tu suak thei ngawl hi, ’" 
Luke11:8 hong cile bangbang hi tu ziam? A ngualtamh khat na hikomin hong tho kik a, anluum hong piak ngawl hang maizum ngawlin ngen kenkon po lete ama in, tho in na kitaangsap theampo hong pia tu hi." 
Luke11:9 Tua ahikom a tatakin kong ci ciang: Ngen vun, hong kipia tu hi; zong vun, na mu tu uh hi; king vun, kongkha hong kihon tu hi." 
Luke11:10 Banghang ziam cile a ngente theampo in nga tu a, a zongte theampo in mu tu hi; a king pawpo tungah kongkha kihon tu hi." 
Luke11:11 Pa ahi note khat po in, na tapa ii ngasa hong nget ciang, ngul na pia tu uh ziam?" 
Luke11:12 Aktuui hong nget ciangin, aikam na pia tu uh ziam?" 
Luke11:13 Na phat ngawl uh kawm panin, na tate atu na pha piak tu na he uh hi. Tua ahile vantung a om na Pa uh in, a ngente tungah Thaa Thiangtho pia kan ngawl tu ziam!” ci hi." 
Luke11:14 Jesus in a pau thei ngawl doai khat notkeak hi; doai hong pusua zawkciang mihingpa pau thei hi. Mihonpi in lamdang sa uh a," 
Luke11:15 ahizong pawlkhatte in, “A nawkeak thei natu vaang a pia pa sia, doaite sung pan a lianbel Beelzebul ahi hi,” ci uh hi." 
Luke11:16 A dang pawlkhatte in Jesus aitaa a, ama nasepna tungtaang ah Pathian lungkimpuina a om le a om ngawl a tel nopna in, nalamdang lakna khat ngen uh hi." 
Luke11:17 Ahihang Jesus in amate ngaisutna teng tel ahikom, amate tungah hi bangin, ci hi, “Ngam khat sia ama le ama kikhen in a kido le bangma hun in kip ngeingawl tu hi; innkuan khat zongh kikhen in a kilem buale tamhtham tu hi." 
Luke11:18 Tua ahikom Satan ngamsung teng zongh pawl tuatuamin kikhen hen a, khat le khat kido le, bang tanvei kip tu ziam? Note in kei sia Beelzebul ii vaangletna taw doaite not hi hong ci nu hi." 
Luke11:19 Kei in tuabangin doaite not ka hile, na nungzuite in bangbangin not ziam? Noma ii nungzuite in, na khial uh hunlam lak hi!" 
Luke11:20 No ci bang hi ngawl hi. Pathian vaang taw doaite not ka hi zaw hi, tuaciang Pathian Ngam sia no sungah hong theng zo hi, ci in hi thu mama in lak hi." 
Luke11:21 “Pasal thahat khat in a ngalhiamte taw kithoai sa in a inn a cing le, a neisa theampo bit tu hi." 
Luke11:22 Ahihang a hat zaw khat in ama simin a zo le, a suan a muan ngalhiam theampo sut tu a, tua pa ii neisa ngalvanh teng ama in ngual hawmsak tu hi." 
Luke11:23 “Khat pawpo kei sang hong pang ngawl sia in kei hong langpan takpi ahi hi; khat pawpo in kei hong khoptua pui buale a tatakin a thethaang ahi hi. 
Luke11:24 “Thaa ngilo khat in mihing khat sung pan a pusua zawkciangin, munko na ah vak in, tawlngak natu zong hi. Tawlngak natu a mu buale ama le ama hi bangin, ‘Ka inn ah cia kik tong,’ kici hi." 
Luke11:25 Tuabangin a cia kik ciangin, a inn sia a thiangtho in kipuua sa in a om mu hi." 
Luke11:26 Tuaciang in ama sangin a ngilo zaw thaa dang sali hong ciapui a, amate in tuasung ah teang uh hi. A tawpna ah tua mihingpa sia, a masa lai sangin lawmawk zaw hi,” ci hi." 
Luke11:27 Jesus in hi teng a ci zawkciang, mihonpi sung panin numei khat in, “Nang hong hing a noaitui hong pia numei in, bangza in thupha nga ziam!” ci hi." 
Luke11:28 Ahizong Jesus in, “Tua sangin Pathian kammal za a, a zuite in bangza in thupha nga zaw ziam!” ci in, zo kik hi." 
Luke11:29 Mipite in Jesus kiim pan in, hong uumci uh ciangin, “Tu hun mihingte bangzata in ngilo ziam! Nalamdang lakna khat hong ngengen hi. Ahizong Jonah ii nalamdang lakna sia simngawl, a dang bangma kipia ngawl tu hi." 
Luke11:30 Nineveh khua mite atu in kamsaangpa Jonah sia, lim lakna khat ahi bangma in, Mihing Tapa zong tu hun mihingte atu in, lim lakna khat hi tu hi." 
Luke11:31 Thukhenna Ni ciangin, Sheba Kumpinu hong ding tu a, tu hun mihingte hong mawsak tu hi. Banghang ziam cile ama ii ngam panin Solomon Kumpipa ii ciimna taw hilnate ngai tu in khual hong haw hi. A tatakin ka ci ciang, Solomon sangin a lianzaw khat hi sungah om hi." 
Luke11:32 Thukhenna Ni ciangin, Nineveh khua mite hong ding tu a, no hong mawsak tu hi, banghang ziam cile amate in Jonah thuhilna a zaak uh ciangin a mawna uh panin, kisiik kik uh hi; a tatakin ka ci ciang, hi sungah Jonah sangin a lianzaw khat om hi!" 
Luke11:33 “Kuama in mei a vaak ciang phual ngawl a, kuang taw zonghin khup ngawl hi. Tua hi ngawl zaw in, hong sungtang po ii mu thei tu in, meivakna khuam tungah kikoi hi." 
Luke11:34 Na mittangte uh sia na pumpi atu meivak taw kibang hi. Na mittang uh a ciidam le, na pumpi uh sia khuavak taw kidim hi; ahizong na mittang uh a pha buale na pumpi bup uh sia khuazing sungah om tu hi." 
Luke11:35 Tua ahikom na pumpi sungah khuavak sia khuazing na suaksak heak vun. 
Luke11:36 Na pumpi bup uh sia, khuavak taw kidim a khen khat po khuazing sungah a om bua nale, meivak sia na tungah hong taan bangma in, a vekpi taang tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke11:37 Jesus in a pau tu teng a man zawkciang, Pharisee khat in an ne tu in sam hi. Tua ahikom ama pai in an ne tu in to hi." 
Luke11:38 Pharisee pa in Jesus anneak ma in a khut sil ngawlin om a mu ciang lamdang sa hi. 
Luke11:39 Tua ahikom Topa in ama tungah, “Tu in no Phariseete na kuang na hai uh a puasang panin na thiangsak uh hi. Ahihang na sungsang uh ah ngitlona le ngoltolna taw na kidim uh hi." 
Luke11:40 A mawmawte awng! A puasang a vawt Pathian in a sungsang zongh vawt hi ngawl ziam? 
Luke11:41 Ahihang na kuang le na haite ii sung a omte sia a zawngte pia le uhte no atu in na theampo sia zeksa huvau in thiang tu hi. 
Luke11:42 “No Phariseete atu bangza in lauhuai ziam! Pathian atu in, ante, lonamsia, bokbawnkha le khuahun zui in a piang an tuatuamte tung pan sawm a khat na pia uh hi. Ahihang Pathian it natu le thutang khenna ngaingon nu hi. A dangte zongh ngaingon tuan ngawlin hite na sep tatak tu uh ahi hi." 
Luke11:43 “No Phariseete atu in, bangza in lauhuai ziam! Synagogue sungah a kikhealsia tokhumte na thangai uh a, vanh zuakna munah kizatak piaknate dik na sa uh hi." 
Luke11:44 Bangza in lauhuai ziam! No sia a kilangh ngawl thaan, ngual in a tungtawn a, a heak ngawlin a sicilte taw na kibang uh hi,” ci hi." 
Luke11:45 Thukham hil sya khat in, “Sya awng hi teng na ci ciangin ko zongh hong selno na hi hi,” ci hi." 
Luke11:46 Jesus in zo a, “No thukham hil syate atu zongh bangza in lauhuai ziam! Mihingte ii nungzaang ah vanhngitte na suanh uh a, ahihang tua vanhngitte puak zawk natu in, na khutme dawn beak zongh taw na hu nuam bua uh hi." 
Luke11:47 No atu in bangza in lauhuai ziam! Na taanghpupite ii suamlup kamsaangte atu in a hoi mama thaante na vawt uh hi. 
Luke11:48 Tua ahikom noma ii na sepna in na taanghpupite ii ngamtatnate a lungkimpui na suak uh hi. Amate in kamsaangte suamlum a, note in a thaan uh na vawtsak uh hi." 
Luke11:49 Hi thu hu in Pathian ii Ciimna in hi bangin ci hi. ‘Kamsaangte le kamtaite ka paisak tu hi. Amate in pawlkhat thatlum tu a, a dangte vawtsia tu uh hi.’" 
Luke11:50 Tua ahikom simlei kibitphua pan kipan a kisuamlum kamsaang theampo hangin, tu hun a mihingte daan kipia tu hi," 
Luke11:51 Abel kisuamlupna pan kipan biaknatau le Thiangtho Mun, kilaklaw ah Zechariah a kisuamlupna dong huam tu hi. Hi hi, hong son khi hi, tu hun a mihingte tuate theampo hu in, daan kipia tu hi!." 
Luke11:52 “Thukham hil syate awng, no atu in, bangza in lauhuai ziam! Heakna kikholna inn kongkha tawtangte na keam uh hi; tua inn sungah noma tatak na tum nuam bua uh a, tum tu in a hanciamte na khaktan uh hi!” ci hi." 
Luke11:53 Jesus in tua mun a nusiat ciangin, Thukham hil syate le Phariseete in ama nasia takin a maw natu zong uh a, thu tam mama dongh uh hi." 
Luke11:54 a kampau khialna khat po taw a mat thei natu, aitaa tu in hanciam uh hi." 
Luke12:1 Mihing tul tam mamate kiphulungin khat le khat peang kisiik tha in a om laitak Jesus in a nungzuite munah a masa phitbelin hi bangin ci hi, “Pharisee te ii tol panin na kikeam vun — amate kihisak theamna ka cinopna hi." 
Luke12:2 A kisiin theampo kihong tu a, thuku a minpiang kipholaak tu hi." 
Luke12:3 Tua ahikom khuazing sungah a kison peuma suntangin kiza tu a, inn doituam kikhak sungah na kihuau uh peuma innkhum dawn panin ki au keak tu hi." 
Luke12:4 “Ka lawmte awng, hong ci khi hi. Pumpi bek that thei a tua zawkciang a sia zaw a hong vawt thei ngawlte na kiita heak vun." 
Luke12:5 Kiitak tu akua ziam ci sia kong lak tu hi. Pathian na kiita vun, ama in a thalup zawkciang meikuang sungah bum thei lai hi. Hong um tavun, na kiitak tu uh sia ama ahi hi!" 
Luke12:6 “Tonbawm nga ciang dangka san pheak nii taw kizuak hi ngawl ziam? Hi nave tonbawm khat zongh Pathian in mangil ngawl hi. 
Luke12:7 Na lu tung a samzamte ngawngawn hong kisimsak siat sa ahi hi. Tua ahikom lau heak vun. No sia tonbawm tam mamate sangin manpha zaw nu hi. 
Luke12:8 “A maan takin kong ci ciang, mipite mai ah keima ii mi ahi hunlam a pualaakte sia Mihing Tapa zongh in Pathian vantunglalangte mai ah tuabang ma in a pualaak tu hi." 
Luke12:9 Ahihang mihonpi mai ah kei hong nialte sia Mihing Tapa in Pathian vantunglalangte mai ah nial tu hi. 
Luke12:10 “Mihing Tapa langpanna kam khat a pau pawpo sia kimaisak thei hi; ahizong Thaa Thiangtho langpanna kamsia a pau khat pawpo kimaisak ngawl tu hi. 
Luke12:11 “Synagogue mai ah ahizong, ngam uk maangte le hong ukte mai ah ahizong, thusit tu in hong kipaipui ciang noma bangbangin kihung tu a, bang teng pau tu ci in thinngim heak vun." 
Luke12:12 Banghang ziam cile Thaa Thiangtho in tua hun ciangin na pau natu hong hil tu hi.” 
Luke12:13 Mihon sung panin pasal khat in Jesus tungah, “Syapa awng, ka pa ii nei le lamh hong nusiatte, ka suapuipa ii hong hop natu in hong sawlsak ta'n,” ci hi." 
Luke12:14 Jesus in zo kik a, “Pasalpa awng, no nii ii kilaklaw ah neisate hawm tu le thukhen tu in akua in kei tungah thuneina hong pia ziam?” ci hi." 
Luke12:15 Amate tungah hi bangin ci thua hi. “Duhopna namcinte panin, noma le noma kikeam tavun. Banghang ziam cile bangza po in a haubel hangin mihing khat ii nuntakna tatak sia neisa lamhsate hi ngawl hi.”" 
Luke12:16 Tua zawkciang Jesus in hi thusonteena amate tungah son hi: “Khatvei lai in, sumhau khat om a, a leitang tung panin thaw an tam mama piang hi." 
Luke12:17 Ama le ama hi bangin ngaisun hi, ‘Ka an theampo ka koi natu ansaal nei ngawl khi hi. Bang law tu khi ziam?’" 
Luke12:18 ‘Hi bangin vawt tong,’ ama le ama kici hi, ‘Ka ansaal luite pheltham tong ii, a lianzaw in ka sa tu a, tua munah ka an teng le ka vanh dang teng ka khol tu hi." 
Luke12:19 Tuasia ciangin keima le keima hi bangin ka kici tu hi. Mihing hamphapa awng! Kum tam mama na khom tu na pha theampo nei zo ni hi. A ol nawno in nungta ta'n a, ne in dawn lel in. A nuam in om ta'n!’" 
Luke12:20 Ahihang Pathian in ama tungah hi bangin ci hi, ‘Mihing mawmaw pa awng! Zan ciang mama in na nuntakna na aap kul tu hi; tua hile nangma atu na kholsa hi teng sia akua in tang tu ziam?’ ” ci hi." 
Luke12:21 Tuaciang in Jesus ii a thukhupna ah, “Pathian muna ah hauna ahi ngawl leitung haunate amate atu a kholte sia tu a ih son sia pa bang ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Luke12:22 Tua zawkciang Jesus in a nungzuite munah, “Tua ahikom nuntak natu a kisamh ante atu ahizong, pumpi atu a kisamh puante atu ahizong, tuate huvau in, thinngim heak vun kong ci hi." 
Luke12:23 Nuntakna in an sangin thupizaw pek a, tuaciang pumpi in puante sangin thupi zaw hi." 
Luke12:24 Va-akte en vun: amate in anciite tu ngawlin, an le la ngawlin, ansaal le beamte a nei bua hi. Pathian in amate vaak hi! Vacimte sangin note tam mama in manpha zaw pek nu hi!" 
Luke12:25 No sungah akua in thinngimna taw na khan uh tawm na khangkhan thei uh ziam? 
Luke12:26 A son thamman ngawl tuabang thuno khat zongh, na vawt thei bua uh le, nadang tungtaang ah banghangin thinngim nu ziam?" 
Luke12:27 Unok paakte en vun, bangbangin khang ziam: amate in na le seam ngawl a, khau le zom ngawl hi. Ahizong a tatak ci leang Solomon Kumpipa a haubel sia zongh hi paakte sangin a hoi zaw puansilh nei ngawl hi." 
Luke12:28 Tuni in hing a zing ciang a vul, a kihal lopate a zeam sia Pathian ahi hi. Ama in no sia puan taw hong khu seseam ngawl tu ziam? Na nei uh upna sia bangza in no ziam!" 
Luke12:29 “Tua ahikom bang ka ne tu, bang ka dawn tu ci in thintoi heak vun." 
Luke12:30 (Banghang ziam cile leitung ah, Pathian a he ngawlte in, hi bang teng thinbot in nei uh hi.) Na Pa in hite na kisap hunlam uh hong he hi." 
Luke12:31 Ama Ngam na zong masa vun. Tua hile ama in hite theampo zongh hong pia thua tu hi. 
Luke12:32 “Tuu honnote awng, lau heak vun. Banghang ziam cile na Pa in Ngam hong pia nuam hi." 
Luke12:33 Na neisa theampo zuak vun a, na nga uh sumte a zawngte pia vun. Na hauna uh sia van ah na khol vun, tua munah a man sulh ngeingawl tu hi. Banghang ziam cile tua munah ngutate in ngu thei ngawl a, nget in ne thei ngawl hi." 
Luke12:34 Banghang ziam cile na sum na paai omna munah, na thin na lung uh zongh om tu hi." 
Luke12:35 “Hong tung tu thu khat pawpo atu in, a kingingta sa in om vun. A diang tawm tu in puansilh kholsa le meiinn vaak sa in om vun." 
Luke12:36 Mopoai panin a topa hong cia kik tu a ngak naseamte bang na hi vun. Ama hong cia a, kongkha hong kih ciangin, amate in thakhat thu in kongkha hon tu uh hi." 
Luke12:37 Ama hong cia kik ciangin a kinging sa in a om, a khuaphawk naseamte, a topa in a mu ciang amate bangzata in thupha a nga tu ziam? A maan takin kong ci ciangin, a topa in a laktong puasilh suut tu a, amate a tosak zawkciang anvaak tu hi." 
Luke12:38 Zankim laitak ahizong, tua zawkciang ahizong, ama hong cia hun in, a kinging sa a om naseamte in bangzata in thupha a nga tu ziam?" 
Luke12:39 Inn nei khat in nguta hong pai tu hun he khol le a inn sia nguta in phuulsak ngawl tu ci in na tel uh hi. 
Luke12:40 No zongh a kinging sa in om vun, banghang ziam cile, Mihing Tapa sia na muanmawk ngawl uh hun khat in hong pai tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke12:41 Peter in, “Topa awng, tu a thusonteena sia ko atu na ci ziam tua ahibuale ngual theampo atu ziam?” ci hi." 
Luke12:42 Topa in, “Tua ahile thumaan a, a ciim naseampa akua ziam? Tua pa in a inn a uk tu le, naseam dangte a hun ciang an pia tu in a topa ii sawlpa ahi hi." 
Luke12:43 A topa hong cia kik ciang, hi bangin naseampa nasep mu thong le naseampa bangzata in lungdam tu ziam?" 
Luke12:44 A tatak ka ciciang, a topa in tua naseampa sia a neisa theampo a uk tu in koi tu hi." 
Luke12:45 Ahizong tua naseampa in a topa hong cia kik tu khuangei lai tu zam ci in, naseam dang pate le numeite vel ngawp tu in kithoai hen a, anne tuidawn zukham in om le," 
Luke12:46 a topa sia muanmawk ngawl ni khat, a heak ngawl hun khat ciangin hong heak kik tu hi. A topa in ama saat zazaan tu a, thu ni ngawlte ii thuak teng thuaksak tu hi." 
Luke12:47 “A topa ii seam le a oai teng, tel napi a, a seam tu in, a kithoai ngawl tua naseampa nasia takin, velna kithuaksak tu hi." 
Luke12:48 Ahizong a topa ii deina tel ngawlin, vel thuak natu ngamtatna a nei le, ama sia a nasia lei ngawlin kivel tu hi. Tam a kipiate tung panin tam kingen tu hi; tam seseam a kipiate tung pan, a tam seseam kingen tu hi." 
Luke12:49 “Leitung a hal tu in kong pai a, tu in a kuangsa hile ka oai hi!" 
Luke12:50 Kibaptize na ka nga tu khat om a, tuasia a kimanthiang mateng in bangza in ka thin patau ziam!" 
Luke12:51 Leitung ah kilemna puak tu in hong pai hong sa nu ziam? Hi ngawl hi, kilemna hi ngawlin, kikhenna pia tu in kong pai hi." 
Luke12:52 Tu panin kipan mihing nga a pha innkuan khat sia kikhen tu a, a lang ah thum pang tu a, a lang ah nii pang tu hi." 
Luke12:53 Pate in tapate langpan tu a, tapate in pate langpan tu hi; nute in tanute langpan tu a, tanute in nute langpan tu hi; tonupite in mote langpan tu a, mote in tonupite langpan tu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Luke12:54 Mipite tungah Jesus in hi bangin ci hi. “Nitumna sang pan meeikaai khat na mu uh ciang nguazu vak thakhat thu in na ci uh a, zu takpi hi." 
Luke12:55 Tuaciang thangsang panin vui hong vak na phaw uh ciangin, nisa vak, na ci uh a, sa takpi hi." 
Luke12:56 A kihisak theamte awng! van le lei en in khuahunte na sonkhol thei uh hi; tua ahile banghangin tu hun ii a khiakna tel ngawl nu ziam? 
Luke12:57 “Thumaan thutang vawt tu in banghang khensat ngawl nu ziam? 
Luke12:58 Mihing khat pawpo in na tungah thu hong vawt in zum tungah hong then le thukhenzum na thet ma in, na kituu uh thute ama taw kilemtua tu in hanciam vun. Tua ahibuale thukhenmangte mai ah hong kai in, tuate in palikte khut sungah hong aap tu a, thong sungah hong khum tu hi." 
Luke12:59 A maan tak kong ci ciang, tua munah na om tu a, na liausum a cin dong thong na taak tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Luke13:1 Tua hun laitakin, tua munah a om mihing pawlkhat in, sangaw biakpiakna pia in Pathian a bia Galilee mite Pilate ii a thalup huvau Jesus tungah son uh hi." 
Luke13:2 Jesus in zo kik a, “Tua Galilee mite sia tuabangin a kithalup hu in, Galilee midangte sangin mawzaw ahi hunlam kilangh hi ci nuam na hi uh ziam?" 
Luke13:3 Hi ngawl het hi! A tatakin kong ci ciang, no zongh na mawna uh pan na kisiik kik bua uh le amate bangma in na thi tu uh hi." 
Luke13:4 Siloam ah tausaang khat a cipsuk lai in, sawm le liat a thina thu bangbangin na ngaisun uh ziam? Hi mite in Jerusalem midang theampo sangin mawna lianzaw nei ahi hunlam kilangh hi ci in na ngaisun uh ziam?" 
Luke13:5 Hi ngawl het hi! A tatak kong ci ciangin no zongh na mawna pan, na kisiik kik bua uh le, amate bangma in na thi siat tu uh hi.”" 
Luke13:6 Tua zawkciang Jesus in hi thusonteena amate tungah son hi. “Khatvei lai in mihing khat ii sapithuan sungah theikung khat po hi. Ama in theinga vil tu in pai ahihang bangma a mu bua hi. 
Luke13:7 Tua ahiciang huanthopa tungah hi bangin ci hi. ‘En in, theinga vil a ka pai zawk kum thum pha zo a, bangma mu ngawl khi hi. Phuktan in! lei tulsak tu in banghang kihoai ziam?’" 
Luke13:8 Ahizong huanthopa in zo kik a, ‘Topa awng, kum khat sung teng na thutha heak lai in a kung kiimkot to in eaklei kong buak tu hi." 
Luke13:9 Theikung sia hong nga le pha seseam hi, tuabang ahibuale na phuk thei tu hi,’ ” ci hi." 
Luke13:10 Sabbath ni khat Jesus in synagogue khat ah thuhilna nei hi. 
Luke13:11 Tua munah numei khat thaa ngilo vei in, kum sawm le kum liat a ciina hi. Ama bawngcip in a dingmaam thei bua hi." 
Luke13:12 Jesus in a mu ciangin biakpui a, “Numei awng na natna panin na suakta zo hi!” ci hi." 
Luke13:13 A tungah a khut nga a, tuasia ciang thakhat thu in, dingmaam a, Pathian pok hi." 
Luke13:14 Synagogue keam upa pa in Sabbath ni a, Jesus ii ciina a damsak hu in, a thin uuk hi. Tua ahikom mipite tungah, “Nipi khat sungah na ih sep natu ni luk om hi. Tua ahiciang, tua nite ah ciidam nga tu in hong pai tavun a, Sabbath ni in hong pai heak vun” ci hi." 
Luke13:15 Topa in zo a, “No mihing a kihitheamsakte awng! No sungah khat pawpo in, Sabbath ni in na khuital ahizong, na laa uh ahizong, tui pia tu in, a buk sung panin, pusua hi ngawl nu ziam?" 
Luke13:16 Tu in hi munah Abraham tanu khat Satan in kum sawm le kum liat kol bulin om hi. Sabbath ni in tua kolkhau panin suut tu in kilawm ngawl ziam?” ci hi. 
Luke13:17 A zo kikna kammalte hu in, a ngalte a mai uh zum a, mipite ahile, a lamdang nasepnate tungah lungdam uh hi." 
Luke13:18 Jesus in, “Pathian Ngam sia bang taw kibang ziam? Bang taw ka teengat tu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Luke13:19 “Tuasia in hi bang hi. Mihing khat in ankamhcii tang khat la a lo sungah tu hi. A kung khangin, thingkung khat suak hi. Vacimte in a baak kawmah bu vawt uh hi,” ci hi." 
Luke13:20 Jesus in dongh kik a, “Pathian Ngam sia bang taw teengat tu khi ziam?" 
Luke13:21 Tuasia in hi bang hi. Numei khat in tol tawm la a, anvui khum khat dim taw hel in, a vekpi in pawm hi.”" 
Luke13:22 Jesus in khuapi le khuanote kaantan kawmin, hilna nei a Jerusalem sang zuan hi." 
Luke13:23 Pawlkhat in dongh a, “Topa awng, mihing tawm bek in ngupna nga tu ahi ziam?” ci hi. Jesus in zo kik a," 
Luke13:24 “Kongkha ciakna sungah na tum thei natu in, hanciam vun; banghang ziam cile mihing tam mamate in tum tu in hanciam tu a, a tum zo buatu uh hi." 
Luke13:25 Inn nei pa in tho in, kongkha hong khak tu hi. Tuasia ciang doipua pan in, kongkha king in, ‘Topa kong hong hon ta'n,’ na ci uh hang, ‘No koisung pan hong pai ci hong he ngawl khi hi,’ ci tu hi." 
Luke13:26 Tuasia ciang, ‘Nang taw annekhawm tuidawn khawmte khu hi, ka khuapi sung a thu zongh hong hil ni hi!’ na ci uh hi." 
Luke13:27 Ahihang hi bangin hong ci tu hi. ‘Ka kung panin tai vun, mihing ngilote awng!’ hong ci tu hi." 
Luke13:28 Noma teng doipua ah hong kipuavawk laitakin Abraham, Isaac, Jacob le kamsaang dangte sia Pathian Ngam sungah na mu uh ciang, bangza in kap in ha ngoai in om tu nu ziam!" 
Luke13:29 Mihingte sia nisuana le nitumna, sak le thang panin hong pai tu a, Pathian Ngam sungah poai hong siim tu uh hi." 
Luke13:30 Tuasia ciangin tu laitakin a nungkhakte hong masa tu a, tu laitakin a masate hong nungkhak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke13:31 Tua laitak ma in Phariseete pawlkhat, Jesus kungah hong pai a, “Hi sung panin pusuak in, leidang mun khat zuan ta'n, banghang ziam cile Herod in nang hong that nuam hi,” ci hi." 
Luke13:32 Jesus in zo a, “Noma pai tavun a, tua ngia tungah hi bangin ci tavun. ‘Tuni le zing ciangin, doai ka not tu a, ciina ka damsak tu hi, a ni thum ni ciangin ka nasep ka man tu hi.’" 
Luke13:33 Ahihang tuni, zing ciang le thai ciangin ka pai tu kul hi. Jerusalem simngawl mundang ah kamsaangte kithalup tu ngeina om ngawl hi." 
Luke13:34 “Jerusalem, Jerusalem awng! Nang in kamsaangte na thatlum a, Pathian kamtaite na deanglum uh hi! Akpui in a note a tha nuai ah a huai bangin, tamvei ma na mite ka huai nuam hi. Ahizong nong oai bua hi." 
Luke13:35 Tua ahikom na Biakinnpi uh sia kinusia cip tu hi. A tatakin ka ci ciang, ‘Topa min taw hong pai pa tungah Pathian thupha tung tahen,’ na ci uh hun mateng kei nong mu buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke14:1 Jesus sia Phariseete lampui khat ii inn ah Sabbath ni khat, an ne tu in pai hi; tua munah a om mihingte in Jesus encik uh hi." 
Luke14:2 A khut le a peang a tum pasal khat Jesus kungah pai a," 
Luke14:3 tuasia ciang Jesus in Thukham hil syate le Phariseete munah hi bangin dongh hi. “Ih Thukham in Sabbath ni in ciina damsak tu oai ziam, oai ngawl ziam?”" 
Luke14:4 Ahihang amate a pau nuam bua uh a, Jesus in pasalpa sam in damsakin ciasak hi." 
Luke14:5 Tua zawkciang amate tungah “No sungah na tapa uh khat ahizong, na khuital uh khat ahizong Sabbath ni in tuikhuk sungah taak luilam le tua Sabbath ni mama in thakhat thu kaito kik ngawlin na om tu uh ziam?” ci hi." 
Luke14:6 Ahizong amate in hi thu huvau a zo thei bua uh hi. 
Luke14:7 Leangnate pawlkhat in tona nuambel teng a teal uh Jesus in a mu ciang, a om theampo ii zaak tu in hi thusonteena son hi." 
Luke14:8 “Mopoai siim tu in hong kisap ciang, tona nuambelna ah to paih heak vun. No sang in a thupi zaw mihing khat po zongh kisamh tha tu a," 
Luke14:9 no hong sam khawm innteakpa in no kungah hong pai in, ‘Ama na tona awn in,’ hong cile nuammaw sa in a niambel tona dangkhat ah na to uh hong kul tu hi." 
Luke14:10 Tua sangin hong kisap ciangin a niam belna ah to le uhte na innteakpa hong pai tu a, ‘lawmpa awng, hong pai in tona a nuam zawna ah hong to ta'n,’ hong cile leangna dangte theampo ii mai ah maipha na nga tu uh hi." 
Luke14:11 Banghang ziam cile ama le ama a kiliansakte kiniamsak tu a, ama le ama a kiniamkhiak te kiliansak tu hi.”" 
Luke14:12 Tua zawkciang Jesus in a innteakpa tungah, “Zing an ahibuale nitak an neakpui tu in na sap uh ciang, na lawmte, na suapuite, na mealheakte le na innpaam sumhaute sam heak in — banghang ziam cile, amate zongh in, hong sam kik tu a, tuabang teng taw in na vawtna bang hong kipia kik tu hi." 
Luke14:13 Anneakpoai na vawt ciangin, a zawngte, a koncipte, a peangbaite, le mittawte na sam tavun;"
