Luke14:14 tua hile thupha na saang tu hi, banghang ziam cile amate in hong thuk kik zo ngawl tu hi. Mihing phate thaw kik ni ciangin Pathian in hong thuk kik tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke14:15 Sabuai ah a to mihing khat in hi thu a zaak ciangin Jesus tungah “Pathian Ngamsung poai vawtna ah a to tute sia bangzata in thupha nga ziam?” ci hi. 
Luke14:16 Jesus in ama tungah, “Khatvei lai in mihing khat in, poai lian khat vawt a, tua munah ama in mihing tam mama sam hi." 
Luke14:17 Anneak tu hun hong thet ciangin leangnate munah hi bang a sonna tu in a naseampa sawl hi, “Hong pai tavun, na theampo a kinging sa in om zo hi!”" 
Luke14:18 Ahihang amate khat zawkciang khat in kamzong tek hi. A masabel pa in a naseampa tungah, ‘Lo khat ka lei a, pai in ka vil kul tu hi; hong hesuak tavun,’ ci hi." 
Luke14:19 A dang khat in, ‘Khuital kap nga ka lei a, nasep ka hil kul tu hi; hong hesuak tavun,’ ci hi." 
Luke14:20 A dang khat in, ‘Ka zi nei zawk hiat hi a, tua hu in hong pai thei ngawl tu khi hi,’ ci hi." 
Luke14:21 Naseampa a topa kungah pai kik a, hi thu teng son hi. A topa thin uuk mama a, a naseampa munah, ‘A manlang in khua sung lam theampo ah va pai ta'n a, a zawngte, a koncipte, mittawte, le peangbaite hong ciapui ta'n,’ ci hi." 
Luke14:22 Hai ngawlin naseampa in, ‘Topa awng, nong thupiak bangin ka seam zo hi, ahizong a tamzaw lai om thei natu mun awng lai hi,’ ci hi." 
Luke14:23 Tuasia ciang a topa in naseampa tungah, ‘Ngamsung lampi liante le lampinote ah va pai ta'n a, ka inn sung a dim tu in, mihingte hong tumsak ta'n." 
Luke14:24 A tatak ka ci ciang, khual ka hil maksakte kuama in ka nitak an tep ngawl tu hi!’ ” ci hi." 
Luke14:25 Khatvei mihonpite Jesus taw tonin, a paikhop laitak, amate tungah," 
Luke14:26 “A kuama po kei nung hong zui tu sia in, a pa, a nu, a zi, a tate, a suapuipate, a suapuinute le, ama le ama mama sang zonghin kei hong it zaw buale kei nungzui a suak thei buatu hi." 
Luke14:27 Ama thinglamtee pua in hong zui ngawl po ka nungzui a suak thei buatu hi. 
Luke14:28 No sung panin mihing khat in, tausaang khat sak a sawm le, ama in a masa phitbel in, ngeal phot tu a, sum bangza bo tu ziam ci in tuat tu hi, a sak zawk natu sum a kicing in a nei le a nei ngawl en phot tu hi." 
Luke14:29 A nei buale a phungkawng a cian zawkciang, tua tausaang a man zo buatu hi; hi thu a mu a hete theampo in a nuisan uh hi." 
Luke14:30 ‘Hisia pa in inn sa tu kipan ahihang a man zo bua hi,’ ci tu uh hi." 
Luke14:31 Kumpipa khat in mihing tulsawm taw, mihing tulkul a nei kumpi dang khat sim a sawm le, a nalh zawk natu, tha a khom nei ziam, ci sia to in, khensat phot tu hi." 
Luke14:32 Tha a khom a nei buale, kumpipa dangkhat ii kungah a kikhualat lai in, kilemna thu kikum tu in, kamtaite paisak tu hi." 
Luke14:33 Tuabang ma in note khat pawpo in na neisa theampo na nusia bua uh le, ka nungzui na suak thei buatu uh hi” ci hi." 
Luke14:34 “Ci al sia pha hi, ahihang a alna a bo le ki alsak kik thei nawn ngawl hi." 
Luke14:35 Leitang atu le pha ngawl, eaklei zong kizangh thei ngawl a; kivawk hi. Bil nei po in hi thu na za tavun!” ci in Jesus in thukhup hi." 
Luke15:1 Ni khat shiadongte le ngual ii puavawk mihing pawlkhatte in, thu ngai tu in Jesus kungah pai a," 
Luke15:2 tuasia ciangin Phariseete le Thukham hil syate phun lialua uh hi, “Hisia pa in ngual ii puavawkte taw in an ngawngawn zongh nekhawm hi!” ci uh hi." 
Luke15:3 Tua ahikom Jesus in amate tungah hi thusonteena son hi. 
Luke15:4 “No sungah khat in tuu zakhat nei hen a, tuu khat bosua le bang law tu ziam? Ama in tuu sawmkua le kua teng ngantatna ah nusia in a kibosua sia a mu dawdong zong tu hi." 
Luke15:5 A mu ciangin lungdam mama in a liangko mualsuan in," 
Luke15:6 inn ah ciapui tu hi. Tua zawkciang a lawmte le a innpaamte sam in, ‘Ka lungdam mama hi, ka bosua tuu sia ka mu zo hi. Lungdam poai vawt tawng,’ ci tu hi." 
Luke15:7 Tuasia bangma in kei kong ci ciang, a kisiik kik ngawl mihing zatak huai sawmkua le kua te sangin a kisiik kik mawnei khat hu in vantung ah lungdamna lian zaw tu hi." 
Luke15:8 “Tua ahibuale numei khat in dangkatang sawm a nei sung pan, khat bosua le — bang law tu ziam? Ama in mei de tu a, a inn sung phiat in, a mu mateng mun theampo ah pha takin zong tu hi." 
Luke15:9 A mu ciang a lawmte le a innpaamte kaikhawm in, ‘Ka lungdam mama hi, ka bosua dangkatang sia ka mu zo hi. Lungdam poai vawt tawng!’ ci tu hi." 
Luke15:10 Kei kong ci ciang, tuasia bangma in, mihing mawnei khat a kisiik kik hu in, Pathian vantunglalangte lungdam hi.”" 
Luke15:11 Jesus in a son lai na pan, “Khatvei lai in pasal khat in tapa nii nei hi." 
Luke15:12 A nauzaw sia in a pa tungah, ‘Pa awng, kei ii ka lua tu neisate tu in hong khen ta'n,’ ci hi. Tua ahikom a pa in a neisate a tapate nii khensak hi." 
Luke15:13 Ni tawmvei zawkciangin, a tapa nozaw sia in, ama ii neisa teng zuak siat a, inn nusia in a sum teng taw pusuak hi. Ngam khualana khat ah pai a, tua munah a sum teng zangh maai siat hi." 
Luke15:14 A nei theampo zangh khawng hi. Tuaciangin tua ngam ah kialpi lian khat tung a, ama bangma nei nawn ngawlin om hi." 
Luke15:15 Tuabang ahiciangin, tua ngammite khat ii kungah naseam tu in pai a, tua pa in lo sungah vokte cing tu in sawl hi." 
Luke15:16 Vokte ii neak bengapte ne nuam liang ahihang kuama in a neak tu bangma a pia bua uh hi. 
Luke15:17 A khakbel ciangin khua phawk a, ‘Ka pa inn ah a cial naseamte zongh in, a khawn laak tu dongin an nei a, kei sia hi munah pukthi tu in ka om hi!" 
Luke15:18 Ding in ka pa kungah zuan tong, Pa awng, Pathian tung le nang tungah kong khial zo hi." 
Luke15:19 Na tapa ci tu in ka kilawm nawn bua hi; na naseam khat bangin hong omsak ta'n ci tong,’ ci hi." 
Luke15:20 Tua ahikom ama dingto in a pa kung zuan kik tu in kipan hi. “A inn a thet natu khuala ma samh lai kasap, a pa in mu hi; khuangai huai sa in del a, ngawngkoai in namh hi." 
Luke15:21 ‘Pa awng, Pathian tung le nangma tungah hong khial zo khi hi. Na tapa ci tu in ka kilawm nawn bua hi,’ ci hi." 
Luke15:22 Ahihang a pa in naseamte sam a, ‘Hong manlang tavun! Puantual phabel sia la tavun a, silhsak vun. A khutme ah khutzungbu bulsak vun a, peangdap thuasak vun." 
Luke15:23 Tua zawkciang khuino thau sia hong kai tavun a, ngoin anneakpoai vawt tawng!" 
Luke15:24 Banghang ziam cile hi ka tapa sia thi zo a, ahizong tu in hong nungta kik hi; ama bo a, tu in kimu zo hi.’ Tua hu in, poai vawt tu in kipan hi." 
Luke15:25 “Tua laitakin tapa lianzaw sia lokuan hi. Hong cia lam inn hong thet dektak ciang, lapna le lasakna awte za hi." 
Luke15:26 Tua ahikom naseamte khat sam a, ‘Bang thu bang la ziam?’ ci in dongh hi." 
Luke15:27 ‘Na naupa hong cia kik a, khui thau sia na pa in ngo hi, banghang ziam cile ciidam ludam a, a tapa a nga kik hang ahi hi.’" 
Luke15:28 A tapa lianzaw sia thin uuk mama a, inn sung zongh ah a tum nuam bua hi; tua ahikom a pa pusuak a, a tapa ii hong sungtan natu kun hi." 
Luke15:29 Ahihang a pa ii kam zo a, ‘En in kum hi tanvei sal bangin na na hong sepsak a, na thu piakte hong nial ngeingawl khi hi. Kei bang nong pia ngei ziam? Keal khat beak zongh ka ngualtamhte taw ka neak tu nong pia ngei bua hi!" 
Luke15:30 Ahihang hi na tapa in pumpi zuak numeite tungah a sum teng zangh tum siat a, tuaciang inn hong thet ciangin khuino thau sia ngaw ni hi!’ ci hi." 
Luke15:31 A pa in, ‘Ka tapa awng, nang sia a tawntungin keima taw hi sungah a om ni hi. Ka neisa theampo nangma aa, ahi hi." 
Luke15:32 Ahihang na naupa sia thi zo a, tu in hong nungta kik hi; ama bo a, tu in kimu zo hi. Tua ahikom lungdam in poai ih vawt kul hi,’ ” ci hi." 
Luke16:1 Jesus in a nungzuite munah, “Khatvei lai in sumhaupa khat in a neisate a zeak tu, naseam khat nei hi. Tua naseampa in sumhaupa ii sum teng zangh tum hi, ci in sumhaupa tungah kison ahiciang," 
Luke16:2 sumhaupa in sam a, ‘Na ngamtatna kong zaak sia bangbang tatak ziam? Ka neisate na zeaknate, a cing takin hong lak ta'n, banghang ziam cile kei ii neisa zeakpa hi thei nawn ngawl tu ni hi’ ci hi." 
Luke16:3 Naseampa in hi bangin ngaisun hi, ‘Ka topa in ka nasep pan hong tawpsak tu hi. Bang law tu khi ziam? Leidum to tu in tha ka nei bua a, khutdaw nget tu le ka maizum hi." 
Luke16:4 Ka nasep ka taan ciangin ka ngualtamhte in amate inn ah hong saan natu bangbang ngamta tu ci he zo ing!’ ci hi. 
Luke16:5 Tua ahikom a topa tungah lei a ba theampo khawmtua hi. A masa phitbelpa munah, ‘Ka topa tungah nang bangza ba ni ziam,’ ci hi." 
Luke16:6 ‘Olive thau pheal zakhat ka ba hi,’ ci in zo kik hi. ‘Hi sungah na sazian om hi, to in, sawmnga ci in at in,’ ci hi." 
Luke16:7 Tua zawkciang khat ii tungah, ‘Nang bangza ba ni ziam? — ’ ‘Zungtaang seau tulkhat,’ ci in zo hi. ‘Hi sungah na sazian om hi, zaliat ci in at in,’ ci hi." 
Luke16:8 Tua hu in, a topa in a thumaan ngawl sumkeampa ii thimthel pilna teng pok hi; banghang ziam cile hi leitung mihing thimthelte sia vai tuatuam sepna ah khuavak sung om mihingte sangin pilzaw pek hi.”" 
Luke16:9 Jesus in hi bang ci thua hi. “Kei kong cina pan: leitung haunate taw ngualtamh zong vun, tuaciang, tuasia a bo ciang tawntung inn ah no hong kisaang tu hi." 
Luke16:10 Thu note tungah a thumaante sia thuliante tung zongh ah thumaan tu hi; thunote tungah a thumaan ngawlte sia thuliante tung zongh ah a thumaan buatu hi. 
Luke16:11 Tua ahile leitung haunate tungah na thumaan bua uh ahile hauna tatak ah bangbangin hong kimuang ngam tu ziam? 
Luke16:12 Ngual neisa tungah na thumaan bua uh ahile, no tungah na neisate akua in hong pia nuam tu ziam?" 
Luke16:13 “Naseam khat po in to nii ii sila sepsak thei ngawl hi; ama in khat sia ensan tu a, khat it tu hi; khat tungah thumaan tu a, khat sia ngaimaw tu hi. No sia Pathian le sum ii sila, na seam khawm thei buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke16:14 Phariseete in hi thute a zaak uh ciangin Jesus sia ciammuina in nei uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate sum deite ahi uh hi." 
Luke16:15 Jesus in, “No sia noma le noma ngual mai ah a kithutangsakte na hi uh hi, ahizong Pathian in na thinsung theampo hong he hi. Banghang ziam cile mihingte ii thupisak nate sia Pathian muna ah man a nei bua hi." 
Luke16:16 Tuiphumpa John hun ciang dongin Moses ii thukhamte le kamsaangte lai atte in thu nei hi; tuasia pan kipan Pathian ngam Lungdamna Thupha kisonin mihing sim in, tuasung ah a tum zawk natu in hanciam tek uh hi." 
Luke16:16 Tuiphumpa John hun ciang dongin Moses ii thukhamte le kamsaangte lai atte in thu nei hi; tuasia pan kipan Pathian ngam Lungdamna Thupha kisonin mihing sim in, tuasung ah a tum zawk natu in hanciam tek uh hi." 
Luke16:17 Ahizong tua Thukhamte sungah thu theklek no khat a bo tu sangin van le lei a bo tu ol zaw tu hi. 
Luke16:18 A zi a khul pasal khat in numei dang khat taw a teang kik le nupa kipalngul mawna vawt ahi hi. Tuaciangin a kikhul numei khat a teenpui pa in nupa kipalngul mawna vawt ahi hi. 
Luke16:19 “Khatvei lai in sumhau khat om a puansilh manham tatakte silh in, ni simin nuamsa mama in nungta hi." 
Luke16:20 Tua laitakin, Lazarus kici mizawngpa khat zongh om a, ama meima taw kidimin, sumhaupa ii bangkua ah kipaipui bul hi," 
Luke16:21 sumhaupa sabuai pan a taakte ne tu in lametna taw tuabangin om hi. Uite ngawngawn in a meimate liasak tu in pai hi. 
Luke16:22 Mizawngpa thi a vantunglalangte in, vantung anneakpoai Abraham kungah to tu in, puato uh hi. Sumhaupa zongh thi in kivui hi," 
Luke16:23 Hell sungah ngim nga mama in, ama in a etto le, a khuala na munah, Abraham le a kungah Lazarus a om mu hi." 
Luke16:24 Tua ahikom ama in biakpui a, ‘Pa Abraham awng! Hong hesuak ta'n. Lazarus ii khutme dawn tui sungah pap in ka leei hong votsak tahen, banghang ziam cile hi mun meikuang sungah ngim nga mama khi hi’ ci hi." 
Luke16:25 Ahizong Abraham in, ‘Na nuntak lai in nang sia na pha theampo hong kipia zo a, Lazarus ahile a sia theampo thuak hi. Tua thu phawk ta'n. Ahihang tu in ahile nang ii natna satna na thuak laitak ama in hi munah nuamsa in om hi." 
Luke16:26 Tua bek dom ngawlin ih kilaklaw ah luamthuk pui khat om a, ko kung panin no kungah kipai thei ngawl a, no kung panin ko kungah kuama hong pai thei ngawl hi,’ ci hi." 
Luke16:27 Sumhaupa in, tua ahile Pa Abraham awng, hesuak hong ngen ing, Lazarus sia ka pa inn ah va paisak ta'n," 
Luke16:28 tua munah suapui nga nei khi hi. Natna ngimna thuakna hi munah amate beak hong pai ngawl natu in pai in sonkhol le ka oai hi,’ ci hi." 
Luke16:29 Abraham in, ‘Na suapuite in Moses le kamsaangte nei hi. Tuate ii hilkholnate ngai tahen,’ ci hi." 
Luke16:30 Sumhaupa in zo kik a, ‘Tuabang bek kicing tham ngawl tu hi, pa Abraham awng! Ahizong a thisate khat tho kikin amate kungah pai le, tuasia ciangin a mawna uh pan kisiik pheang tu uh hi,’ ci hi." 
Luke16:31 Ahizong Abraham in, ‘Amate in Moses le kamsaangte ii thu a ngai nuam bua uh le mithi sa khat hong thaw kik hial hangin a um tuan buatu uh hi,’ ” ci hi." 
Luke17:1 Jesus in a nungzuite munah, “Maw thei natu ze et nate hong piang tu ma ahi hi, ahihang tua ze etna a piangsakte atu bangza in lauhuai ziam!" 
Luke17:2 Mihing khat in hi patangnote khat a puksak sangin a ngawng ah an ngoaina suang lian khat khii in tuipi sungah kivawksuk le, ama atu in phazaw hi." 
Luke17:3 Tua ahiciang nasepna po ah kidawm vun! “Na suapuipa a maw le teih in, a kisiik le maisak in." 
Luke17:4 Ama in ni khat sungah salivei hong khial a, a simin, ‘Kisiik khi hi,’ hong cile na maisak hamtang kul tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke17:5 Sawltakte in Topa tungah, “Ka upna uh hong khangsak ta'n,” ci uh hi." 
Luke17:6 Topa in zo kik a, “Ankamhtang cia upna nei le uhte hi naailung kung munah, ‘Nangma le nangma kibot in tuipi sungah kiphut in!’ ci le uhte zong na thu uh hong ni tu hi." 
Luke17:7 “Sonteena in no sungah khat in lotho ziam, tuucing ziam naseam khat nei hi, ama lo panin hong cia po ciang, manlang in na an ne in, na ci tu uh ziam?" 
Luke17:8 Tuabangin kici ngawl hi! Bang kici zaw ziam cile, ‘Ka nitak an na thuuk in, awmdap na silh zawkciang, ka neak ka dawn laitakin hong ngak ta'n, tua zawkciang, nangma ne in ci tu nu hi." 
Luke17:9 Naseampa in sawlna teng a sep hu in, ama tungah lungdam khi hi citaak ngawl hi ngawl ziam?" 
Luke17:10 No zongh tuabang ma na hi natu ahi hi; hong kisawl teng na sep zawk uh ciangin, ‘Ei sia naseam ma kihi lel a, ih sep tu teng ma a kiseam hi bek hi,’ ci tu nu hi." 
Luke17:11 Jesus in Samaria le Galilee ngamngi tawn in Jerusalem ah pai hi. 
Luke17:12 Khuano khat sungah a tum laitakin a lauhuai vun natna a vei mihing sawm taw kisi hi. Amate sia ama kung panin, tawm a khuala na ah dingin," 
Luke17:13 “Jesus awng! Topa awng! ko hong hesuak ta'n!” ci in au uh hi. 
Luke17:14 Jesus in amate a mu ciang, “Pai tavun a, na thiampite in vealsak tavun,” ci hi. Amate a pai kawkawm in, dam thiang uh hi." 
Luke17:15 A damna a kiheak ciangin, amate sung pan khat hong heak kik a, nging takin Pathian pok hi." 
Luke17:16 Ama in Jesus peang ah bokin, lungdamko hi. “Hisia pa sia Samaria mi ahi hi." 
Luke17:17 Jesus in, “A kidamsak mihing sawm pha hi; a dang teng koisungah om ziam?" 
Luke17:18 Banghangin hi minam dang pa bek in, Pathian tungah lungdamko tu in hong heak kik ziam?” ci hi." 
Luke17:19 Tuaciangin Jesus in ama tungah, “Ding in, va pai ta'n; na upna in hong damsak zo hi,” ci hi." 
Luke17:20 Pharisee te pawlkhat in Jesus munah “Pathian Ngam bang hun ciang hong tung tu ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi. A zo kikna ah, “Pathian Ngam sia, tuabangin mit a mu thei in hong theng ngawl tu hi." 
Luke17:21 Kuama in, ‘En vun, hi munah om hi!’ tua ahibuale ‘Zia sungah om hi!’ ci thei ngawl tu hi! banghang ziam cile Pathian Ngam noma sungah om hi,” ci hi." 
Luke17:22 Tua zawkciang a nungzuite munah “Hun khat ciangin note in, Mihing Tapa ii nite sung pan ni khat beak, na mu nop tu hun hong theng tu hi, ahizong na mu buatu uh hi." 
Luke17:23 Mihingte in “En vun, zia sungah!” tua ahibuale, “En vun hi sungah!” hong ci om tu hi, ahihang tuate, zong tu in pai heak vun." 
Luke17:24 Khualeng sia vanmong khat pan mong khat ah kizel in, a taankeaksak bangma in, Mihing Tapa zongh ama ii ni hong tun ciangin tuabang ma hong hi tu hi." 
Luke17:25 Ahizong ama in nasia takin hong thuak masa tu a, tu hun mihingte in hong nial tu hi." 
Luke17:26 Mihing Tapa hun zongh Noah hun lai bangma hong hi tu hi. 
Luke17:27 Mihingte in neakna le dawnnate vawt tan in, Noah ii teambaw sung a tum ni dong ma, numei le pa kiteang a, tuaciangin tuipi liim sia in, amate thatlum siat hi." 
Luke17:28 Tua hun sia Lot ii hun taw zong kibang tu hi. Mihing sim in neakna dawnna, vanh leina vanh zuakna, ankung ciinna, inn sakna taw hun zangh uh hi." 
Luke17:29 Sodom khua panin Lot a pusua ni in, van pan, meikuang le kaan nguazu bangin zusuk a, amate theampo thatlum siat hi." 
Luke17:30 Mihing Tapa hong kilaak ni ciangin, tuabang ma hi tu hi." 
Luke17:31 Tua ni in innkhum tungah a om mihing khat in, a neisa la tu in, inn sungah tuaksuk nawn heak hen; tuasia bangma in lo sung a om mihing khat in, a inn ah cia kik nawn heak hen." 
Luke17:32 Lot ii zi na phawk tavun. 
Luke17:33 A nuntakna a huu nuam sia in, taan tu hi; a nuntakna a taan sia in kihuu tu hi." 
Luke17:34 A maan takin kong ci ciang, tua zanin mihing nii lupna tungah a lumkhawmte: khat kila tu a, khat sia kinusia tu hi." 
Luke17:35 Numei nii anngoai khawm a omte: khat kila tu a, khat kinusia tu hi." 
Luke17:36 Pasal nii lo sungah a diangkhawmte: khat kila tu a, khat kikhe tu hi." 
Luke17:37 Nungzuite in ama tungah, “Koisungah hi bangin piang tu ziam, Topa,” ci in dongh uh hi. Jesus in, “Thiluang omna munah vaciikte kikhawm tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke18:1 Tua zawkciang Jesus in a nungzuite tungah thinkiam ngawl a, a thunget tawntung natu a hilna in thusonteenate son hi." 
Luke18:2 “Khua khat ah thukhenmangpa khat om a, ama in Pathian le kiita ngawl, mihing maitang le a zakta ngawlhet khat ahi hi." 
Luke18:3 Tuaciang in tua khua ma ah, nupi meingong khat om a, ama thukhenmangpa kungah pai tawntung in, “Ka ngalte kung panin hong hung ta'n,” ci in ama ii nga tu a kilawm bang ngen hi." 
Luke18:4 Khuangei hialma thukhenmangpa in bangma hisak nuam ngawl ahihang, a khakbel ciangin hi bangin ngaisun hi, ‘Pathian le kiita ngawlin mihingte zongh zakta ngawl ka hi hang," 
Luke18:5 hi meingongnu in hong nawngkaisak ahikom, ama ii nga tu a kilawm bang a nga thei natu in ka khensak tu hi. Tuabangin ka hi buale, ama hong pai tawntung tu a, a khakbel ciangin ka thuak zo buatu hi,’ ” ci hi." 
Luke18:6 “Thumaan ngawl thukhenmangpa ii kammalte ngai vun. 
Luke18:7 Tua ahile Pathian in ama ii mihingte, sun taw zan taw hu ngen in a au te ii phat tuam natu in thukhensak ngawl tu ziam? Amate a hu tu sia a haisaang tu ziam?" 
Luke18:8 A maan tak ka ci ciangin, amate sangah pangin, a manlang takin thu khensak tu hi. Ahitazong Mihing Tapa ii hong pai kik ciangin leitung ah upna a mu tu ziam?” Topa in ci thua hi." 
Luke18:9 Amate le amate pha kisa mama a, ngualdang theampo a zawngsak mihingte tungah Jesus in hi thusonteena zangh hi." 
Luke18:10 “Khatvei lai in mihing nii Biakinn ah thungen tu in pai hi: Khat sia Pharisee pa hi a, khat sia shiadongpa ahi hi." 
Luke18:11 Pharisee pa in ama nguak ding a, thungen hi. ‘Pathian awng na tungah ka lungdam hi, banghang ziam cile kei sia ngualdangte bangin ka duhop bua a, leilot ngawlin, numei le pa palngul khialna ka vawt bua hi. Zia sungah shiadongpa bang hi ngawl ka hikom na tungah ka lungdam hi." 
Luke18:12 Nipi khat sungah ni nii an ka tang a, ka nga sung panin, see sawm sua see khat nang kong pia hi,’ ci in thungen hi." 
Luke18:13 Ahihang shiadongpa ahile a khualana ah ding a, vantung zongh ento ngam ngawlin, a awm beang a, ‘Pathian awng, kei mimawpa hong hesuak ta'n!’ ci hi." 
Luke18:14 A tatak ka ci ciang, Pharisee pa bang hi ngawlin shiadongpa sia mipha tangin cia hi. Mihing simin a kiliansakte kiniamsak tu a, a kiniamkhiakte a thupi in kikoi tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke18:15 Mihing pawlkhat in a nausente tungah Jesus ii a khut nga a thupha a piak tu in paipui uh hi. Nungzuite in hi bang a ngamtatnate mu in teih uh hi," 
Luke18:16 ahihang Jesus in patangnote sam a, “Patangnote kei kungah hong pai tu khaam heak vun, banghang ziam cile Pathian Ngam sia hi bangte aa ahi hi." 
Luke18:17 Hi thu ciamtee vun! Hi patangno khat bang a, Pathian Ngam a saang thei ngawlte tua ngam sungah a tum thei buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke18:18 Jew te lampui khat in, “Sya pha awng, tawntung nuntakna ka nga natu in bang ka vawt tu ziam,” ci in dongh hi." 
Luke18:19 “Banghangin Sya pha hong ci ni ziam? Pathian khat simngawl kuama a pha om ngawl hi. 
Luke18:20 Thupiakte na heak hi: ‘Nupa kipalngul heak vun, mihing that heak vun; nguta heak vun; leilot thu taw kuama mawsak heak vun; na nu le na pa zakta vun,” ci hi." 
Luke18:21 Pasalpa in zo kik a, “Ka no lai panin hi thupiakte ka zui siat sa hi,” ci hi." 
Luke18:22 Jesus in hi thu a zaak ciangin ama tungah, “Na khat nasep tu kisamh lai ni hi. Na neisa teng zuakin a, na sum nga teng a zawngte pia in, tua hile vantung ah hauna na nei tu hi; tua zawkciangin hong pai ta'n a, ka nung hong zui ta'n,” ci hi." 
Luke18:23 Ahizong pasalpa in hi thu a zaak ciang khuangai mama hi; banghang ziam cile ama hau mama hi. 
Luke18:24 Jesus in a khuangai mama na a mu ciangin, “Sumhaute ii Pathian Ngam sungah a tum tu bangza in haksa ziam!" 
Luke18:25 Sumhau khat ii Pathian Ngamsung a tum tu sia, kalaoh khat ii phin bilvang sungah a tum tu sangin haksa zaw hi,” ci hi." 
Luke18:26 Tua thu a zate in, “Tua ahile akua peuma in ngupna nga zo thong tu ziam? ci in dongh uh hi." 
Luke18:27 Jesus in zo a, “Mihing atu a suak thei ngawlte Pathian atu in suak thei hi,” ci hi." 
Luke18:28 Tua zawkciangin Peter in, “En in! Ka inn uh nusia in nang kong zui uh hi,” ci hi." 
Luke18:29 Jesus in amate tungah, “Hi hi, A maan tatak ka ci ciangin, Pathian Ngam atu in, inn ahizong, zi ahizong, suapuite ahizong, nu le pate ahizong, tate ahizong, a nusiate in," 
Luke18:30 hi hun sung mama ah, a tamzaw in nga tu a, hong pai lai tu hun sungah tawntung nuntakna nga tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke18:31 Jesus in a nungzui sawm le niite sam tuam a, amate tungah, “Ngai vun. Mihing Tapa huvau kamsaangte ii at theampo a taangtun natu mun Jerusalem ah ih pai tu hi." 
Luke18:32 Ama Gentile te tungah hong ki aap tu a, amate in ciammuina in nei tu a, selno in cilphii tu uh hi." 
Luke18:33 Amate in saat tu a thatlum tu hi, ahihang ni thum zawkciangin nuntakna sungah tho kik tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke18:34 Ahihang hi thute khat zong nungzuite in a tel bua uh hi; tua kammalte ii khiakna sia amate mun panin kiseal a, Jesus in bang thu son ziam, ci in amate in a tel bua uh hi." 
Luke18:35 Jesus sia Jericho khua nai hong thet ciangin, lampi hui a mittaw khat khutdaw ngenin to hi." 
Luke18:36 Mihonte in kaantan in hong pai ama in a zaak ciangin, “Bang thu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Luke18:37 “Nazareth khua mi Jesus in hong kaantan hi,” amate in ci uh hi." 
Luke18:38 Ama au a, “David tapa Jesus awng! Kei hong hesuak ta'n!” ci hi." 
Luke18:39 Mai a pai mihonpite in teih a, thim in sawl hi. Ahihang ama in a nging seseam in au a, “David tapa awng! Hong hesuak ta'n!” ci hi." 
Luke18:40 Tua ahikom Jesus tawlnga a, mittaw pa ama kungah hong paipui natu in thupia hi. Ama hong nai ciangin Jesus in," 
Luke18:41 “Nang atu bang hong vawtsak leng na uuk ziam?” ci hi. “Topa awng, khua ka mu kik nuam hi,” ci hi." 
Luke18:42 Jesus in ama tungah, “Tua ahile khuamu ta'n! Na upna in hong damsak zo hi,” ci hi." 
Luke18:43 Thakhat thu in ama in khua hong mu thei a, Pathian tungah lungdamko in Jesus zui hi. Mihonpite in a mu ciangin Pathian pok tek uh hi." 
Luke19:1 Jesus in Jericho khua sungah tumin kaantan hi. 
Luke19:2 Tua munah shiadong pipa ahi sumhaupa Zacchaeus kici khat om hi. 
Luke19:3 Ama in Jesus sia a koibang mi hi a, ci in mu nuam ahihang a tuntom khat ahikom mihonte hangin Jesus a mu thei bua hi." 
Luke19:4 Ama in mihonpite mai ah tai a, tua mun kaantan in hong pai tu Jesus mu nuamin theiteak kung khat tungah kaato hi." 
Luke19:5 Jesus in tua mun a thet ciangin a tung ento in, “Zacchaeus awng, a manlangin hong tuaksuk ta'n, tuni in nangma inn ah hong taam tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
Luke19:6 Zacchaeus hong tuaksuk paih a, lungdamna lianpi taw Jesus muak hi." 
Luke19:7 A mu mihing theampo phun tek a, “Hisia pa in, mawneipa khat ii inn ah zintung thong hi!” ci uh hi." 
Luke19:8 Zacchaeus ding a, Topa tungah hi bangin ci hi. “En in, Topa awng! Ka neisa a lang mizawngte ka pia tu hi; tuaciangin khat po ka theam ngei le a zaa li in ka lo kik tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke19:9 Jesus in ama tungah, “Ngupna sia tuni in hi bangkua ah hong theng hi; banghang ziam cile hisia pa zongh Abraham ii suan khat ahi hi." 
Luke19:10 Mihing Tapa sia a bo a mangte zong tu le a ngum tu in hong pai hi,” ci hi." 
Luke19:11 Mipite in hi thu ngai in a om laitakin, Jesus in thusonteena khat son thua hi. Ama tua laitakin, Jerusalem theng dektak zo ahikom mipite in Pathian Ngam hong kilangh pal tu hi vak ci in muangmaw uh hi." 
Luke19:12 Tua ahikom ama in, “Khatvei lai in ulian khat sia ngam khualapi khat ah kumpi suak tu in pai a, tuasia zawkciang cia kik sawm hi." 
Luke19:13 A vai din ma in a naseamte sawm sam a, khamh dangka khat tek pia in hi bangin ci hi. “Ka om ngawl sung teng in hisia taw bangza na meetsak thei uh ziam kisin vun,” ci hi." 
Luke19:14 Tu in a ngammite in ama ensan uh a, kamtaite in delsak a, ‘Ko hisia pa ka kumpi tu in dei ngawl khu hi,’ cisak uh hi." 
Luke19:15 “Tua pa kumpi kisuaksak a, hong heak kik hi. Sum bangza tek meetsak ziam cisia a heak thei natu in, thakhat thu in a naseamte a mai ah samsak hi." 
Luke19:16 A masa in khat hong pai a, ‘Topa awng, nong aap khamh dangka khat ii tung panin, a dang sawm ka meetsak hi,’ ci hi." 
Luke19:17 Ama in, ‘Pha mama hi. Nang in naseam pha khat na hi hi! Thunote tung zongh ah thumaan na hi ciang, khuapi sawm kong uksak tu hi,’ ci hi." 
Luke19:18 A niina naseampa hong pai a, ‘Topa awng, kei khat nong piak sia ii tung pan khamh dangka nga ka meetsak hi,’ ci hi." 
Luke19:19 Hisia pa ii tungah, ‘Nang sia khuapi nga hong uksak tu khi hi,’ ci hi." 
Luke19:20 Naseam dang khat hong pai a, ‘Topa awng, hi lai ah na khamh dangka om hi, mainawlna puan sungah ka na phual hi." 
Luke19:21 Nang sia mihing haksa mama khat na hikom kong kiita hi; nangma neisa ahi ngawlte na la a, na poai ngawlna tung pan a at pa na hi hi,’ ci hi." 
Luke19:22 Ama in, ‘Naseam taktai ngawlpa awng! Nangma kammal taw ma in, nangma hong kiman kik tu hi. Kei mihing haksa khat hi a, ka neisa ngawl bul la a, ka poai sa ngawl bul a atpa ka hi nong he hi." 
Luke19:23 Tua ahile banghangin ka sum sia dangka kholna zum ah koi ngawl ni ziam? Tua hile kong cia kik ciang a meet taw nga kik tu khi hi,’ ci hi." 
Luke19:24 Tua zawkciangin a kungah a dingte munah, “A khamh dangka ama tung pan laaksak vun a, dangka sawm a nei naseampa pia vun,”" 
Luke19:25 Ahihang amate in, ‘Topa awng, ama in sawm nei zo hi,’ ci uh hi." 
Luke19:26 Ama in zo kik a, ‘A tatakin ka ci ciangin, bang khat po a nei mihing sia ii tungah a tamzaw kipia tu hi; ahihang bangma a nei ngawl mihing khat ii tung panin a nei sun po kilaaksak lai tu hi,’ ci hi." 
Luke19:27 Tu in a kumpipa tu in hong dei ngawl ka ngalte, hi munah hong paipui tavun a keima mai ah that vun,’ ci hi,” ci in son hi." 
Luke19:28 Jesus in hi teng ci in Jerusalem zuan tu in amate mai ah pai hi. 
Luke19:29 Olive mual ah a om Bethphage khua le Bethany khua nai a thet ciangin, a nungzuite nii paisak khol a, hi bangin thupia hi:" 
Luke19:30 “Na mai ah a om khua ah pai tavun. Khua sung na tum uh ciang, bangma hunin a tungah a kito ngeingawl lai laano khat kikhit in a om na mu tu uh hi. Hong suut tavun a, hi sungah hong paipui tavun." 
Luke19:31 Khat po in banghangin suut nu ziam ci in hong dongh le Topa in tulmaw hi ci vun,” ci hi." 
Luke19:32 Amate a pai uh ciangin na theampo Jesus ii son bangin a om mu uh hi. 
Luke19:33 Amate in laano ii khau a suut ciangin, a neipa in, “Banghangin suut nu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Luke19:34 “Topa in tulmaw hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Luke19:35 Amate in laano Jesus kungah paipui hi. Tua zawkciangin amate in a laktong puasilh suut a, laano tungah dapin, Jesus suanhto hi." 
Luke19:36 Laano tungah to in a pai ciangin, mihonpite in a laktong puasilh uh lampi tungah pha uh hi." 
Luke19:37 Ama Jerusalem nai ah hong thet ciang Olive Mual sang paisukna munah, ama nungzui mihonpite in nalamdangte a mu hu in, awnging tak taw lungdamko in, Pathian pok uh a," 
Luke19:38 “Topa min taw hong pai Kumpipa tungah Pathian in thupha pia tahen! Vantung ah thinnopna om tahen a, Pathian minthang tahen!” ci uh hi." 
Luke19:39 Tuasia ciangin mihon sung a kihel Pharisee mi pawlkhat in Jesus tungah, “Sya awng, na nungzuite a thim natu in sawl in!” ci uh hi." 
Luke19:40 Jesus in “A tatakin ka ci ciang, amate in a thim uh le, suangtumte mama in au tu in hong kipan tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke19:41 Ama khuapi taw a kinai vaialna hong theng a, khuapi a mu ciangin kapin," 
Luke19:42 “Thinnopna om thei natu in tuni in bang kisamh ziam ci in he thei thong lete maw! Ahizong tua thu mu thei ngawl ni hi! 
Luke19:43 Hun khat hong theng tu a, na ngalte in na kiimkot panin phung leecian bangin hong uumci tu a, hong khakcip in, mun theampo panin hong sim tu hi." 
Luke19:44 Amate in na khuapi lalthamsak tu a, na tate uh taw hong moncip siat tu hi; suangtum khat beak zongh a omna ngei ah hong om nawn buatu hi, banghang ziam cile Pathian in no hong ngum tu in hong pai hunlam na phawk bua uh hi,” ci in kaamal lo hi." 
Luke19:45 Tua zawkciang Jesus Biakinn sungah tum in sumzuakte not tu kipan a," 
Luke19:46 hi bangin ci hi, “Laithiangtho sung a ki atna ah, Pathian in ‘Ka biakinn sia thungetna inn kici tu hi,’ ci hi. Ahihang note in ngutate bukna mun na suaksak uh hi,” ci hi." 
Luke19:47 Ni simin Jesus in Biakinn sungah thuhil hi. Thiampi liante, Thukham hil syate, le mihon lampuite in ama thatlum nuam uh hi;" 
Luke19:48 ahihang, amate in tuabang a pian thei natu in, lampi a mu bua uh hi, banghang ziam cile mihonte in, kammal no khat zongh a zaak khial tu uh uuk ngawlin, ama pauna ngai top uh hi." 
Luke20:1 Ni khat Jesus in Biakinn sungah mihonpite Lungdamna Thu huvau hilna le thuhilna a nei laitakin, Thiampi liante, Thukham hil syate, le upate hong pai a," 
Luke20:2 ama munah, “Hi bangin na ngamtat thei natu in, bang thu nei ni ziam? Akua in tuabang thunei theina hong pia ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Luke20:3 Jesus in, “Kei zongh thu khat kong dongh tu hi." 
Luke20:4 John ii tuiphum piak theina sia Pathian ii tung panin hong pai ziam maw mihing tung pan hong pai ziam, hong son tavun” ci hi." 
Luke20:4 John ii tuiphum piak theina sia Pathian ii tung panin hong pai ziam maw mihing tung pan hong pai ziam, hong son tavun” ci hi." 
Luke20:5 Amate sung teng kam kinial a, “Bang ci tu hi ziam? Pathian tung pan ci leang, ‘Tua ahile banghangin John um ngawl nu ziam?’ hong ci tu hi." 
Luke20:5 Amate sung teng kam kinial a, “Bang ci tu hi ziam? Pathian tung pan ci leang, ‘Tua ahile banghangin John um ngawl nu ziam?’ hong ci tu hi." 
Luke20:6 Tuabang ci bua ii, ‘Mihing tung pan’ ci leang le, mihonpite in ei suangtum taw hong deanglum tu hi, banghang ziam cile amate in John sia kamsaang khat hi ci in um uh hi." 
Luke20:6 Tuabang ci bua ii, ‘Mihing tung pan’ ci leang le, mihonpite in ei suangtum taw hong deanglum tu hi, banghang ziam cile amate in John sia kamsaang khat hi ci in um uh hi." 
Luke20:7 Tua ahikom, “Koisung pan hong pai ziam ci he ngawl khu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Luke20:8 Jesus in amate tungah “Tua ahile kei zongh bang thuneina taw hi bangin ngamta khi ziam ci in kong son buatu hi.” ci hi. 
Luke20:9 Tua zawkciang Jesus in mihonpite tungah hi thusonteena son hi. “Khatvei lai in, mihing khat in sapitkungte suan in, pawlkhat in saapsak a, khuangei ma inn nusia hi." 
Luke20:10 Sapit ngate law hun ciangin a silate khat paisak a, ama tel tu sapitte ngensak hi. Ahizong huan saapte in, a silapa vel a bangma pia ngawlin heak kiksak hi." 
Luke20:11 Tua ahikom sila dangkhat paisak kik hi; ahihang huan saapte in ama zongh vel a, maizum pia in, bangma ngawl taw heak kiksak hi." 
Luke20:12 Tua zawkciangin ama in sila thumna sia paisak hi; huan saapte in tua pa zongh liamsak in huang pua ah vawk hi. 
Luke20:13 Tuasia ciangin huan neipa in, “Bang law tu khi ziam? Ka it ka tapa paisak tong: tua hile amate in na thasia nanak tu hi!” ci hi." 
Luke20:14 Ahihang huan saapte in tua pa a mu ciang, khat le khat kikum a, “Hi sia huan neipa ii tapa hi. Thatlum tawng, tua hile a neisa teng ei aa suak tu hi!” ci uh hi." 
Luke20:15 Tua ahikom sapithuan pua sangah ama not in thatlum uh hi. Jesus in hi bangin dongh hi, “Tua ci leang sapithuan neipa in huan saapte bang law tu ziam?" 
Luke20:16 Ama in hong pai tu a, tua mihingte thatlum in, sapithuan sia ngualdang in saapthawsak tu hi,” ci hi. Mihonpi in hi thu a zaak uh ciangin, “Tuabang suak thei ngawl tu hi!” ci uh hi." 
Luke20:17 Jesus in amate en a, “Tua ahile hi laithiangtho in bang ci nuam ziam? Inn sate ii mannung ngawl hi ci a, a nil suangtum sia a thupibel suangtum suak hi." 
Luke20:18 Tua suang tungah a puk peuma a bek a bekin kikhen tu a, tuaciang in tua suang sia khat po ii tungah hong taaksuk le tua pa sia leivui bangin zaantham tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke20:19 Thukham hil syate le thiampi liante in tua munah Jesus mat sawm uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate in, ama ii son thusonteena sia amate a cina ahi hunlam he uh hi. Ahizong amate in mihonpite kiita uh hi." 
Luke20:20 A mat thei natu hunpha zong uh hi. Thuneite le Rome ngamuk mangpa tungah Jesus a aap thei natu in, thinsung takpi taw thu dongh nuam bangin a kiheang tu mihing pawlkhat sumnguk pia in paisak a, Jesus aitaa uh hi." 
Luke20:21 Hi thudawpkute in Jesus tungah, “Sya awng na paunate le na hilnate maan hi, ci in ka he uh hi. Milian mino na awlmawk bua a, Pathian ii mihingte atu, a deisak thumaan thute hil hi, ci in kong he uh hi." 
Luke20:22 Tua ahile ei thukham in Rome Kumpilianpa tungah shia piak tu khaam ziam maw khaam ngawl ziam hong son ta'n,” ci hi." 
Luke20:23 Ahihang Jesus in amate thin kukal teng phawk a," 
Luke20:24 “Ngunn dangka khat hong la tavun. Akua lim le min a tungah ki at ziam?” ci hi. “Kumpilianpa aa hi,” ci uh hi." 
Luke20:25 Jesus in “Pha hi, tua ahile Kumpilianpa ii neisa Kumpilianpa pia tavun a, Pathian neisa Pathian pia tavun,” ci hi." 
Luke20:26 Tua mun mihonpite mai ah a mat thei natu thu mal khat zongh om ngawl ahikom amate thim khipkhep in om a, a zo kik nate lamdang sa uh hi." 
Luke20:27 Tuaciangin mithite tho kik nawn ngawl tu hi, a ci Sadducee te Jesus kungah hong pai a, hi bangin ci uh hi:" 
Luke20:28 “Sya awng, Moses in hi thukhamte ei atu in a at hi: ‘Mihing khat in ta nei ngawlin a thi le, tua pa ii suapuipa in, meingongnu teenpui in, mithipa ii ta tatak bangin, a kingaisun thei tu in, ta neipui tu hi,’ ci hi." 
Luke20:29 Khatvei lai in unau pa sali om hi: a ubel sia in zi nei a, ta nei ngawlin thi hi." 
Luke20:30 Tua zawkciang a niina sia in a numei sia teenpui hi. 
Luke20:31 Tua zawkciangin a thumna sia zongh tuabang ma ahi hi. A unau sali bupin, tuabang ma hi siat hi — ta nei ngawlin thi siat uh hi." 
Luke20:32 A khakbel in numeinu zongh thi hi. 
Luke20:33 Tu in mithite nungta tu in hong thaw kik ciangin numei sia akua ii zi hi tu ziam? Amate sali in teenpui tek hi,” ci uh hi." 
Luke20:34 Jesus in, “Tu hunin numeite le pate kiteang hi," 
Luke20:35 ahihang thina pan tho kikin, a nungta tu a kilawmte, hong pai pheang tu hun sungah kiteenna om nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Luke20:36 Amate vantunglalangte bang hi tu a, a thithei buatu uh hi. Amate Pathian ii tate a suak uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate thina panin tho kik uh hi." 
Luke20:37 A thite nuntakna sungah kitho kiksak tu hi, ci in Moses in thiangtho takin lak hi. Sawlpaang kuang thu huvau a sonna munah Topa sia ama in, Abraham ii Pathian, Isaac ii Pathian, le Jacob ii Pathian,” ci hi." 
Luke20:38 Ama sia a nungtate Pathian hi a, a thisate Pathian hi ngawl hi banghang ziam cile ama atu in mihing theampo nungta hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Luke20:39 Thukham hil syate pawlkhat in, “Na zo kikna pha mama hi, Sya awng!” ci uh hi." 
Luke20:40 Banghang ziam cile amate in bangma a dongh ngam nawn bua uh hi. 
Luke20:41 Jesus in, “Bangbangin Messiah sia David ii suan hi tu hi kici thei ziam?" 
Luke20:42 Banghang ziam cile David ama mama in Psalm thubu sungah, “Topa in ka Topa ii tungah: Hi sung ka ziatsang ah hong to tan" 
Luke20:43 na ngalte na peang nuai ah ka koi dong” ci hi. 
Luke20:44 “David in ‘Topa’ ci hi; tua ahile bangbangin Messiah sia David ii suan hi thei tu ziam,” ci hi." 
Luke20:45 Mihing theampo in ama thu a ngai laitakin, a nungzuite munah," 
Luke20:46 “Thukham hil syate panin kikeam tavun, amate puantual silh in, vak nuam a, vanhzuakna munah ngual ii zatak tu thangai hi; amate in synagogue te sungah a kikhaam kholsa tona ah to tha nuam uh a, anneak poaite ah mun phabelna ah to nuam hi." 
Luke20:47 Amate in meingongte zothaw uh a, a inn a lo suttol in, tuaciang, ngual ii pha a sak tu a deina in, a sau tatak thungen uh hi! Amate ii daan thuak tu sia nasia seseam tu hi!” ci hi." 
Luke21:1 Jesus in a kiim a et ciangin Biakinn sum kholna sungah sumhaute ii sumpi khiak a mu hi," 
Luke21:2 tuaciang a zawng mama meingongnu khat ii dangkasan pheak nii a khiak zongh mu hi. 
Luke21:3 Ama in, “A tatak kong ci ciang, hi a zawng meingongnu in ngual dang theampo sangin tamzaw khia hi." 
Luke21:4 Banghang ziam cile a dangte in a nei vaal uh khia a, ahihang nupinu in zawng mama hikale a nuntakna tu teng theampo pia hi,” ci hi." 
Luke21:5 Nungzuite pawlkhat in, “Biakinn sia, a suangmanphate taw ahizong, Pathian tungah biakpiakna vanhte taw ahizong bangzata in etlawm ziam,” ci uh hi." 
Luke21:6 “Hite theampo na mu uh hi — suangtum khat zongh ama omna munah a om nawn ngawl hun khat hong theng tu hi; suangtum khat sim kilawn suk tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke21:7 Amate in, “Syapa awng, hi thu bang hun ciang hong piang tu ziam? Hi thu hong pian ciangin bang lim teng taw hong kilak tu ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Luke21:8 Jesus in, “Kinging ta khol vun, ngual in theamsak heak vun. Mihing tam mamate in kei min taw hong pai tu a, ‘Kei in ama ka hi hi! A hun hong theng zo hi!’ hong ci tu hi. Ahihang amate ii nung na zui heak vun." 
Luke21:9 Ngal thu le tualngal thu na zaak uh hangin lau heak vun. Tuabangte hong piang phot tu hi. Ahizong hun bo natu hong nai zo cina hi ngawl lai hi,” ci hi." 
Luke21:10 A thuson zomto a, “Ngam khat le ngam khat kido tu a, kumpi khat le khat kisim tu hi." 
Luke21:11 A lauhuai zinliinna, kialpi tunna, pulpi tunna sia mun theampo ah om tu a, a lamdang a lauhuai nate van panin piang tu hi." 
Luke21:12 Ahizong, hi thute theampo a pian ma in, note hong kiman tu a, hong kivawtsia tu hi; synagogue te ah thu kisit tu in, hong ki aap tu a, tuaciang thong sungah hong kikhum tu hi; keima hu in no sia kumpite le ngamukte mai ah hong kithen tu hi." 
Luke21:13 Hi hun sia no atu in Lungdamna Thupha na son thei natu hunpha hong hi tu hi. 
Luke21:14 No le no na kidal natu, na thinngim ngawl natu in a hun hong tun ma in, na thin uh khensat khol tavun;" 
Luke21:15 banghang ziam cile na ngalte ii hong nial thei ngawl natu le hong nalh thei ngawl natu in, kammalte le ciimnate kong pia tu hi." 
Luke21:16 No sia na nu na pate, na suapui pate, na mealheakte le na ngualtamhte in hong aap tu a, note pawlkhat thina na thuak tu uh hi." 
Luke21:17 Kei hu in no sia mihing theampo in hong ensan tu hi. 
Luke21:18 Ahihang na lu tung pan samzam khat zong a sumsi buatu hi. 
Luke21:19 Kip takin ding vun, tuasia ciang noma le noma na kingum tu uh hi." 
Luke21:20 “Jerusalem sia ngalkaphonpite in hong kim uum na mu uh ciang, tua khuapi lalthap natu nai hi, ci in na he tu uh hi." 
Luke21:21 Tua hun ciangin Judea ngam a omte in, mualtung tu in tai tahen; khuapi sung a omte in khua a nusiat uh kul tu a, ngamsung a omte in khuapi sung zuan heak hen." 
Luke21:21 Tua hun ciangin Judea ngam a omte in, mualtung tu in tai tahen; khuapi sung a omte in khua a nusiat uh kul tu a, ngamsung a omte in khuapi sung zuan heak hen." 
Luke21:22 Banghang ziam cile tua hun “Daan piak hun” a kici Laithiangtho ii son sia a tun natu ahi hi. 
Luke21:23 Tua hun laitakin, naungaite le nau noailuai neite atu in bangza in haksa tu ziam! Hi ngam ah a kiitakhuai mama ngimna tung tu a, hi mihingte tungah Pathian daan tung tu hi." 
Luke21:24 Pawlkhat namsau taw kithat tu a, a dangte ngam theampo ah thongtaak tu in kipaipui tu hi; tuaciangin amate ii hun a cin mateng in Gentile te in Jerusalem sia a peang taw tuanhcil tu hi." 
Luke21:25 “Ni le tha le aksite tungah nalamdangte piang tu hi. Leitung ngam bupte sungah thin lalna om tu a, tuipi tuihawkte le tui kihualte kiita tu uh hi." 
Luke21:26 Leitung ah bang teng tak hong piang ziam ci in a ngak mihingte in launa taw butthi tu hi, banghang ziam cile vantung a om nate sia amate ii zin tek panin pial mang siat tu uh hi." 
Luke21:27 Tuaciang Mihing Tapa hong kilangh tu a, vaangletna le minthanna taw meeikaai sungah hong pai tu hi." 
Luke21:28 Hi thute piang tu in hong kipat ciangin, dingto vun a, vandak vun, banghang ziam cile hong kingup tu hun hong nai zo hi,” ci hi." 
Luke21:29 Tua zawkciang Jesus in hi thusonteena, amate tungah son hi. “Theikung le thingkung dangte ngaisun vun." 
Luke21:30 Tuate ii teenote hong suak na mu uh ciang, khuakhaal hun hong nai zo hi, ci in na he uh hi." 
Luke21:31 Tuasia bangma in hi nalamdangte na mu uh ciang, Pathian Ngam hong theng dektak hi, ci in na he tu uh hi." 
Luke21:32 Tu laitak a nungta teng ii thi siat ma in, hi thute hong piang tu hi, ci in ciamtee tavun." 
Luke21:33 Van le lei zongh hong bo tu hi, ahizong ka kammalte bo thong ngeingawl tu hi." 
Luke21:34 Na kidawm tavun, no sia a vaalkaai neakna dawnnate le leitung nuntak natu thinngimnate taw na hun uh na bosak heak vun, ahibuale tua Ni sia in nang sia thakhat thu in thaang sungah mat bangin na awk tu hi." 
Luke21:35 Banghang ziam cile, leitung mun theampo ah mihingte tungah tua thusia hong tung tu hi." 
Luke21:36 Hong piang tu hi thute pan suatakna taw na kaantan zawk natu uh le, Mihing Tapa mai ah na din natu in, thahatna na nei natu kinging kholsa in, om in thungen tawntung tavun,” ci hi." 
Luke21:37 Tua hunsung Jesus in ni simin Biakinn sungah thuhilna hun zangh a, zan hun ahile Olive Mual tungah zangh hi." 
Luke21:38 Zing tuungin mihing theampo in ama ii hilna ngai tu in Biakinn ah pai uh hi. 
Luke22:1 Paisan poai a kici Tol saw ngawl Anluum Poai nai zo hi. 
Luke22:2 Thiampi liante le Thukham hil syate in mipite kiita ahikom a thimtham in Jesus a suamlup thei natu lampi zon tu hanciam uh hi. 
Luke22:3 Tuasia laitakin nungzuite sawm le nii sung pan khat ahi Iscariot kici Judas ii sungah Satan tum hi. 
Luke22:4 Tua ahikom Judas pusuak a, Thiampi liante le Biakinn a cing Uliante munah Jesus a leeheak thei natu thute kikuppui hi." 
Luke22:5 Amate lungdam a, sumpiak tu thukim hi." 
Luke22:6 Amate a lungkim a, mipite heak ngawl laanin, Jesus amate khut sungah a aap thei natu hunpha zong tu in, kipan hi." 
Luke22:7 Paisan Poai an tu in tuuno a kingaw ni, Tol saw ngawl Anluum Poai Ni hong theng hi." 
Luke22:8 Jesus in Peter le John sia hi bangin kam vaitha a paisak hi: “Pai tavun a, Paisan Poai an ih neak tu in vawtkhol tavun,” ci hi." 
Luke22:8 Jesus in Peter le John sia hi bangin kam vaitha a paisak hi: “Pai tavun a, Paisan Poai an ih neak tu in vawtkhol tavun,” ci hi." 
Luke22:9 “Koi sungah vawtkhol le ung nong oai ziam,” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Luke22:10 Ama in zo kik a, “Khuapi sungah na tum uh ciangin, tuibeal khat a pua pasal khat in hong muak tu hi. Ama tumna inn ah zui tavun," 
Luke22:11 tuaciang innteakpa munah ka nungzuite taw Paisan Poai an ka neak natu inn doituam sia koisung ziam ci in Syapa in hong donghsak hi,” ci tavun." 
Luke22:12 Amate in anneak thei natu a kisamh theampo taw a vawtkhol sa inn doituam lian, inn tung dawl hong lak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke22:13 Amate a pai uh ciangin, na theampo Jesus ii son bang tatak ma in a om mu a, Paisan Poai an tu vawtkhol uh hi." 
Luke22:14 A hun hong cin ciangin Jesus in Sawltakte taw sabuai ah to hi. 
Luke22:15 “Thalup ka thuak ma in, no taw hi Paisan Poai an neakkhop tu ka uuk mama hi!" 
Luke22:16 Banghang ziam cile a tatakin ka ci ciang, Pathian Ngam sungah, hi neakna dawnna ii khiakna a kikhuangkhim mateng in hi an ka ne nawn buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke22:17 Tuaciang Jesus in hai la a, Pathian pokin hi bang ci hi. Hisia la vun a, no sungah hawm tavun." 
Luke22:18 A maan tak kong ci ciangin Pathian Ngam hong thet mateng in hi sapittui ka dawn nawn buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke22:19 Tua zawkciangin anluum bekno khat la a, Pathian pokin, a balneen zawkciang amate pia a, hi bangin ci hi. “Hisia no atu hong kipia ka pumpi ahi hi. Kei nong phawna in, hi bang na vawt vun,” ci hi." 
Luke22:20 Tuasia bangma nitak anneak zawkciang, amate hai pia a, hi bangin ci hi. “Hi hai sia Pathian thuciamna thak no atu a hong kibua ka chi taw, a kikipsak sia ahi hi." 
Luke22:21 Ahizong en vun! Kei hong leeheak tu pa sia hi sabuai ah kei taw ankuang um khawm hi! 
Luke22:22 Pathian khensatna sa om bangin, Mihing Tapa sia thi tu hi, ahihang tuabang a ama a leeheak pa atu in, bangza in lauhuai ziam!” ci hi." 
Luke22:23 Tuaciangin amate sung teng ah tuabang a ngamta tu sia akua hi ziam ci in kidongh uh hi. 
Luke22:24 Nungzuite sungah thu kinialna khat piang a, amate sungah akua lianbel in kingaisun tu ziam, ci thu ahi hi." 
Luke22:25 Jesus in amate tungah “Doai biate ii kumpite in a mite tungah vaang nei a, ngamukte sia ‘Mihingte ii Lawmte hi’ kici hi." 
Luke22:26 Ahihang no sia tuabang na hi buatu uh hi; bangbang hi zaw tu nu ziam cile, a lianbel sia in a nobel bangin na om tu uh a, a lampui sia in naseam bangin na om tu uh hi." 
Luke22:27 An ne tu in a to pa lianzaw ziam maw ankuang a lui pa lianzaw ziam? A to pa lianzaw hi. Ahizong in note sungah kei sia ankuang a lui pa bangin kong om hi. 
Luke22:28 “Haksatna ka thuak lai theampo in, kei nong ompui uh hi;" 
Luke22:29 ka Pa in ukna za hong piak bangma in no zong kong pia tu hi," 
Luke22:30 ka ngamsung ka sabuai ah no sia kei taw anne tuidawn khawm in, na om tu uh a, kumpi tokhum tungah to in, Israel minam sawm le niite na uk tu uh hi." 
Luke22:31 “Simon, Simon awng! Ngai in! Lothopa ii zungtaang le taangphawte a khen bangma in, a phate le a siate hong khen natu in, Satan in no theampo hong ze et natu thu nga zo hi." 
Luke22:32 Ahihang, Simon awng, na upna a lal ngawl natu in, thu kong ngetsak hi. Tuaciang kei sangah nong kiheak kik ciangin na suapuite a tha khosak tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
Luke22:33 Peter in zo a, “Topa nang taw thongtaak khawm tu le, a thi khawm tu in, ka kinging zo hi,” ci hi." 
Luke22:34 Jesus in, “Peter awng, a maan takin kong ci ciangin, ama ka he ngei bua hi ci in thumvei nong nial mateng, tu zanin ak khuang ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke22:35 Tua zawkciang Jesu in nungzuite munah, “Sumbawm, thung le peang dapte, ngawl taw kong paisak hunlai in, kitaangsapna na nei ngei uh ziam?” ci in dongh hi. “Bangma kitaangsap nei ngei bua ung,” ci hi." 
Luke22:36 “Ahizong tu in ahile, sumbawm ahibuale thungte a nei po in, keng tahen; namsau a nei ngawl peuma in a laktong puasilh zuak tahen a, lei tahen." 
Luke22:37 Banghang ziam cile a maan takin kong ci ciang, ‘Ama thukham paltan a, a mawte bangin, kithuaksak tu hi,’ ci a laithiangtho sungah kei ii thu a ki at teng taangtung tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke22:38 Nungzuite in, “En in! Topa awng, hi sungah namsau nii om hi!” ci uh hi. Ama in zo kik a, “Tu za pha zo hi,” ci hi." 
Luke22:39 Jesus in khuapi nusia in, a tawntung a pai ngei bangma in, Olive Mual ah pai a, nungzuite zongh ama taw pai hi." 
Luke22:40 Tua mun a thet ciangin amate tungah hi bangin ci hi, “Ze etna sungah na puk ngawl natu in, thu ngen tavun.”" 
Luke22:41 Amate kung panin, muiden khat tan bang a khuala na ah pai lai a, khupdin in thungen hi." 
Luke22:42 “Pa awng, nang deina ahile hi thuakna hai sia kei kung pan hong laksak ta'n. Ahizong kei deina bang hi ngawlin, nang deina bang hi tahen,” ci hi." 
Luke22:43 Tuaciang vantung pan in, vantunglalang khat kilangh a, ama tha khosak hi." 
Luke22:44 Thinngimna lianpi taw nasia seseam in thungen hi; a khua ulsa chimal bangin lei ah taak hi. 
Luke22:45 A thungetna pan dingto a, a nungzuite kungah a pai ciangin, amate a khuangai lei hu in, ngimin mu uh hi." 
Luke22:46 Ama in, “Banghangin mu nu ziam? Ze etna sungah na puk ngawl natu in, tho vun a thungen vun,” amate munah ci hi." 
Luke22:47 Jesus in thu a son saan laitakin, nungzui sawm le niite sung pan khat ahi Judas lampui in mihonpi khat hong theng hi. Ama in Jesus namh tu in pai hi." 
Luke22:48 Ahihang Jesus in, “Judas awng, Mihing Tapa sia kinapna taw leeheak na hi ziam,” ci hi." 
Luke22:49 Jesus taw a omkhawm a nungzuite in bang teng hong piang tu ci in a mu uh ciang, “Topa awng, ka namsaute ka zangh tu uh ziam,” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Luke22:50 Amate sung pan khat in Thiampi Lianbelpa ii sila pa bil ziatsang satansak hi. 
Luke22:51 Ahihang Jesus in, “Tu teng pha zo hi!” ci in a bil thamin damsak hi." 
Luke22:52 Jesus in thiampi liante Biakinn cing uliante le upate ama man tu in, hong paite tungah, “Mihing that taiku khat man tu bangin namsau le moltawng taw hong kuan nu ziam?" 
Luke22:53 Biakinn sungah ni simin no taw kong om a, ahizong kuama in mat nong sawm bua uh hi. Ahihang tu laitak sia khuazing vaangletna ii uk hun laitak hi a, na dian tu uh hun ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Luke22:54 Amate in Jesus man a Thiampi Lianbelpa inn ah paipui hi; tuaciang a nungsang a khuala thithimna pan Peter in zui hi. 
Luke22:55 Leitual laizang ah meiphual khat kithut a, mei kiim ah a tote kawm ah Peter zongh to hi." 
Luke22:56 Tuabangin mei oai a om a mu ciangin, naseam numei khat in, a mai salh in en a, “Hisia pa zongh Jesus taw kithawl hi!” ci hi." 
Luke22:57 Ahihang Peter in nial a, “Numei awng, kei ama ka he ngei bua hi!” ci hi." 
Luke22:58 Tawmvei zawkciang pasal khat in Peter mu a, “Nang zongh amate sung pan khat na hi hi!” ci hi. Ahihang Peter in, “Pasal pa awng, hi ngawl khi hi!” ci in zo kik hi." 
Luke22:59 Nai khat bang zawkciangin, pasal dangkhat ma in, nasia takin ci hamtang a, “Hisia pa, Jesus taw a kithawl hunlam up laak om bo, banghang ziam cile ama zongh Galilee mi khat ahi hi!” ci hi." 
Luke22:60 Ahihang Peter in, “Pasal pa awng, na son sia hong heakpui ngawl khi hi!” ci in zo kik hi. Tuabang a papau laitakin thakhat thu in ak hong khuang hi." 
Luke22:61 Topa hong ngeilee a, Peter a tangtan in en hi, tuaciang Peter in Topa ii ama tungah a sonsa sia phawk hi. “Tu zan ak khuan ma in, nang kong he bua hi, thum veina ci tu hi,” ci a, a sonsa sia phawk hi." 
Luke22:62 Peter pusuak in nasia takin kap hi. 
Luke22:63 Jesus a cing mite in ama selno in vel uh hi. 
Luke22:64 Amate in a mit tuamsak a, “Akua in hong saat ziam, son in!” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Luke22:65 Tuaciangin kamsia nawno taw a nanam in selno uh hi. 
Luke22:66 Khuavak ciangin, amate thiampi liante le thukham hil syate kisitua uh a, tuaciang Jesus sia Council te mai ah paipui uh hi." 
Luke22:67 “Nang, Messiah na hi ziam? hong son ta'n,” ci uh hi. Ama in zo a, “Hong son leng hong um ngawl tu nu hi;" 
Luke22:68 tuaciang thu hong dongh leng hong zo ngawl tu nu hi. 
Luke22:69 Ahihang tu pan kipan Mihing Tapa sia Vaanglianbel Pathianziatsang ah hong to tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke22:70 Amate theampo in, “Tua ahile nang sia Pathian Tapa na hi ziam?” ci hon uh hi. Ama in “Noma ci bang ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Luke22:71 Tuaciang amate in, “Tetti dang kul nawn bo! Ama kammalte ih zaak tek hi!” ci uh hi." 
Luke23:1 A kikhawm theampo hong ding a, Pilate mai ah Jesus paipui uh a," 
Luke23:2 tua munah amate in hi bangin mawsiat uh hi: “Hisia pa in, ka minamte lampui khial in, Kumpilianpa zongh shia piak ngawl natu in, mihingte hol in, ama le ama Messiah kumpipa ka hi hi a ci laitakin ka man uh hi,” ci hi." 
Luke23:3 “Nang sia Jew te ii Kumpipa na hi ziam?” ci in Pilate in dongh hi. “Nangma ci bang ahi hi,” ci in Jesus in zo kik hi." 
Luke23:4 Tuasia ciangin Pilate in thiampi liante le mihonte tungah “Hisia pa mawsak natu thu bangma mu ngawl khi hi,” ci hi." 
Luke23:5 Ahihang amate in nasia seseam in mawsak uh a, “A thuhilna taw Judea ngam bup mite buaisak tu in, kipan hi. Galilee ngam panin hong kipan a, tu in hi sung hong theng hi,” ci uh hi." 
Luke23:5 Ahihang amate in nasia seseam in mawsak uh a, “A thuhilna taw Judea ngam bup mite buaisak tu in, kipan hi. Galilee ngam panin hong kipan a, tu in hi sung hong theng hi,” ci uh hi." 
Luke23:6 Pilate in hi thu a zaak ciangin, “Hi pa Galilee mi ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Luke23:7 Ama in Jesus sia Herod ii ukna ngammi khat hi, ci in a tel ciang Jerusalem ah tua hun laitak hong om Herod kungah puak hi." 
Luke23:8 Herod in Jesus a mu ciangin, a lungdam mama hi, banghang ziam cile ama thu za ngei zo a, a mu nop zawk khuangei zo hi. Jesus in nalamdang lakna pawlkhat vawt tu in Herod in muangmaw hi." 
Luke23:9 Tua ahikom Herod in Jesus thu tam mama dongh a, ahihang Jesus in a zo bua hi." 
Luke23:10 Thiampi liante le thukham hil syate mai sangah pai a, nasia takin Jesus mawsak uh hi." 
Luke23:11 Herod le a ngalkapte in Jesus etsatna taw selno hi; tua zawkciang puantual pha khat silhsak in, Pilate kungah puak kik uh hi." 
Luke23:12 Tua ni mama in Herod le Pilate ngualtamh suak uh hi; tua masia hun ahile amate kingal vilvel uh hi. 
Luke23:13 Pilate in Thiampi liante, lampuite le mihonte sam a, amate munah," 
Luke23:14 “Hisia pa in, mihingte lampui khial hi, ci in nong paipui uh hi. Tu in noma mai ah thu ka sit ciangin na mawsak nop uh mawnate khat zongh ama in vawt ngawl hi, ci in ka mu hi." 
Luke23:15 Dom ngawlin Herod zongh in, a maw na tu a mu zawk ngawl hu in, hong puak kik hi. Hisia pa in thina thuakna tu taw kilawm ngamtatna bangma a vawt bua hi." 
Luke23:16 Tua ahiciang ama ka saatsak zawkciang, ka tha tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke23:17 Paisan Poai om simin, Pilate in thongtaakte khat veu amate atu in a suataksak a ngeina hi." 
Luke23:18 Mihon bup in, “Ama that in! Barabbas sia koma atu in suaktasak in!” ci in au uh hi." 
Luke23:19 (Barabbas sia khuapi sungah buaina khat a om hu le, mihing thalupna thu khat hu in, thong kitaaksak ahi hi.)" 
Luke23:20 Pilate in Jesus suatak nuam a, tua hu in mihonte tungah son kik hi." 
Luke23:21 Ahihang amate in ausan kik a, “Thinglamtee tungah thatlum in! Thinglamtee tungah thatlum in!” ci uh hi." 
Luke23:22 Pilate in a thum veina hi bangin ci hi. “Ahihang ama in bang khialna vawt ziam? Thina thuakna tu za dong ngamtatna a vawt bangma ka mu bua hi! Tua ahikom ama ka saat tu a, tua zawkciang ka tha tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke23:23 Jesus sia thinglamtee tungah thalup natu in, amate in tawlnga ngawlin au uh a, a khakbel ciangin amate auna in zo hi." 
Luke23:24 Tua ahikom Pilate in amate ii nget thidaan sia Jesus tungah pia hi. 
Luke23:25 Buaina hu le mihing thalupna hang a, thong a kitaaksak, amate ii dei sia pa suaktasak a, tuaciang a uuk babang a vawt tu in, amate tungah Jesus aap hi." 
Luke23:26 Ngalkapte in Jesus paipui uh a, tuabang a pai laitakin, ngamsung pan khuapi sungah hong pai Simon a kici Cyrene khua mipa taw kisi uh hi. Amate in tuasia pa man a, thinglamtee suan in Jesus nungzui in puasak hi." 
Luke23:27 Mihonpi khat in ama zui a, tuate sungah numei pawlkhat in ama kaa a, mau in om uh hi." 
Luke23:28 Jesus in amate sang nga in, “Jerusalem numeite awng! Kei atu in kap heak vun, noma atu le na tate atu in kap po vun." 
Luke23:29 Banghang ziam cile, ‘Numei ta nei thei ngawlte le nau noailuai a nei ngeingawlte bangza in hampha ziam?’ a kici hunte hong theng tu hi." 
Luke23:30 Tua hun sia mihingte ii, mualpite tungah, ‘Ko tungah hong cim tavun!’ mualnote tungah, ‘Hong seal tavun!’ a kici hun hi tu hi." 
Luke23:31 Banghang ziam cile a thingkung sia a hin lai in, hi bangin kivawt ahile, a ko ciang bang suak tu ziam?” ci hi." 
Luke23:32 A dang phalakte nii zong Jesus taw kithat tu in, paipui uh hi." 
Luke23:33 Amate “LUNGU” a kici na mun a thet ciangin, tua munah Jesus sia thinglamtee tungah kilh uh a, phalakte nii zongh a ziatsang ah khat, a veisang ah khat kilh uh hi." 
Luke23:34 Jesus in “Pa awng, amate mawna maisak in! Amate in bang vawt uh ci zongh a tel bua uh hi,” ci hi. Tuaciang amate in nuangtang lotna taw ama puante hawm uh hi." 
Luke23:35 Jesus sia lampuite in ciammuina in nei uh a, “Ngualdang zongh hun thei hi; Pathian ii teal Messiah ahile ama le ama kihun ve hen!” a ci uh laitakin mihonte in, dingin en hon uh hi." 
Luke23:36 Ngalkapte zongh in, selno uh hi: amate in ama kungah kaato uh a, sapittui haau pia uh hi." 
Luke23:37 “Jew te kumpipa na hile nangma le nangma kisuaktasak in,” ci uh hi." 
Luke23:38 Ama ii tungah, “Hisia in Jew te ii Kumpipa ahi hi,” ci in ki at hi." 
Luke23:39 Ama taw a kikhaikhawm phalakpa khat in selno hi. “Nang Messiah hi ngawl ni ziam? Nangma le nangma kisuaktasak in a, ko zong hong suaktasak ta'n!” ci hi." 
Luke23:40 Ahihang phalak dangkhat pa in, ama teih a, “Pathian kiita ngawl ni ziam? Nang in ama bangma in daan na thuak hi." 
Luke23:41 Ahihang ei ih hile ih ngamtatna taw a kiphu tu in, ih thuak ahiciang ahi tu ma hi; ahihang ama in khialna bangma vawt ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
Luke23:42 Tuaciang ama in Jesus munah, “Jesus awng, Kumpi in nong pai ciangin, kei hong phawk ta'n!” ci hi." 
Luke23:43 Jesus in ama munah, “A maan tak kong ci ciang, tuni in nang sia keima taw Paradise ah na om tu hi, ci in kong kamciam hi,” ci hi." 
Luke23:44 Sun nai sawm le nai nii hun bang ciangin ni taang nawn ngawl a, nitak nai thum dong ngamsung buppi khuazing hi;" 
Luke23:45 tuaciang Biakinn sungah inndoi doina puankhai sia khen nii kisua in, kizentham hi." 
Luke23:46 Jesus in nging takin hi bang hong au hi, “Pa awng! Na khut sungah ka thaa kong aap hi!” a ci zawkciang ama thi hi." 
Luke23:47 Ngalkap hon ukpa in a piang thu teng mu a, ama in Pathian pok hi. “Ama sia mihing pha tatak khat hi!” ci hi." 
Luke23:48 A en tu kikhawm mipite in, a piang sa thu teng a mu zawk uh ciangin, inn ah cia in, hee leilam in a awm beang uh hi." 
Luke23:49 Jesus taw a kihe theampo le Galilee ngam pan ama a zui numeite in, ngal et uh hi." 
Luke23:50 Judea ngam Arimathea khua mi Joseph kici khat om hi. Ama a zatakhuai mihing pha khat hi a, Pathian Ngam hong thet tu a ngakpa ahi hi." 
Luke23:50 Judea ngam Arimathea khua mi Joseph kici khat om hi. Ama a zatakhuai mihing pha khat hi a, Pathian Ngam hong thet tu a ngakpa ahi hi." 
Luke23:51 Ama Council Upa khat ahihang, a lawmte ii thukhenna le, ngamtatnate a thukim bua hi." 
Luke23:52 Ama in Pilate omna ah pai in, Jesus luanghawm ngen hi." 
Luke23:53 Tuasia zawkciangin, a luang khiasuk a, puankaang neal khat taw a tun zawkciang, kuama kisial ngeingawlna, a kikhuak suanghawng thaan khat sungah sial hi." 
Luke23:54 Tua ni sia nipi zawk ni nga ni hi a, Sabbath ni hong theng dektak hi." 
Luke23:55 Galilee ngam pan Jesus nung a zui numeite Joseph taw hong pai uh a, a thaan le Jesus luang kisialna mu uh hi." 
Luke23:56 Tua zawkciangin amate in a luang zut natu in, hel namtui le paaknamtuite vawtkhol tu in inn ah cia kik uh hi. Thukham om bangin amate Sabbath ni in tawlnga uh hi." 
Luke24:1 Nipi ni zingsang tuungin, numeite thaan vil uh a, amate helkholsa sathau namtuite keng uh hi." 
Luke24:2 Thaan kongvang panin, suangtumpui sia a kiliik sa in mu uh a," 
Luke24:3 tua ahikom amate a sungah tum uh hi; ahihang amate in Topa Jesus luang a mu bua uh hi. 
Luke24:4 Hi thu lamdang sa in, tua munah a din laitakin, thakhat thu in mihing nii, a taang mama puansilh in, amate kungah ding uh hi." 
Luke24:5 Numeite lau mama in, a kun uh ciangin, tua mihingte nii in, “A thisate ii omna munah, banghangin a nungta khat hong zong nu ziam?" 
Luke24:6 Ama hi sungah om ngawl hi; ama kitho kiksak zo hi. Galilee aa a om lai, no tung a hong thusonte phawk kik tavun." 
Luke24:7 “Mihing Tapa sia mawneite khut sungah ki aap in, thinglamtee tungah kithat tu a, a ni thum zawkciangin nuntakna sungah hong thoto kik tu hi,” ci hi." 
Luke24:8 Tuasia ciangin numeite in a kammalte phawk kikin," 
Luke24:9 thaan pan heak kik a, hi thute theampo nungzui sawm le khat te le, a dangte tungah son uh hi." 
Luke24:10 Tua numeite Mary Magdalene, Joanna, le James ii nu Mary hi a; amate teng le a dang numeite in hi thu teng sawltakte tungah son uh hi." 
Luke24:10 Tua numeite Mary Magdalene, Joanna, le James ii nu Mary hi a; amate teng le a dang numeite in hi thu teng sawltakte tungah son uh hi." 
Luke24:11 Ahihang sawltakte in, numeite ii thuson sia luithawthong hi tu in, ngaisun uh a, a um bua uh hi." 
Luke24:12 Ahizong Peter ding a, thaan sangah hong tai in; kunsuk in a et ciangin, thaan puan simngawl bangma dang a mu bua hi. Tuaciang in thupiangte huvau tumdang sa in, ama inn ah cia kik hi." 
Luke24:13 Tua ni mama in Jesus nungzuite nii sia, Jerusalem pan tai sali a khualana Emmaus khuano ah pai a," 
Luke24:14 tuaciang amate in tua hunsung thupiang teng kikum uh hi. 
Luke24:15 Tuabang a kikup laitakin, Jesus ama mama in, neak a, amate taw tonkhawm hi;" 
Luke24:16 amate in Jesus mu napi a tel bua uh hi. 
Luke24:17 Jesus in amate tungah, “Lampai kawm in khat le khat bang thu son nu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Amate maikhingin ding uh hi." 
Luke24:18 Amate ngeal sung panin Cleopas a kici pa in, “Jerusalem khual hong haw mihingte sung pan, tu sung teng a thupiangte a he ngawl sia nangma bekma hi thong ni ziam?” ci hi." 
Luke24:19 “A bang thu ziam?” ci hi. “Nazareth mi Jesus tungah thupiangte hi,” ci in zo kik hi. “Hisia pa in, kamsaang khat hi a, ama sonte le sepna theampo vaang nei hi, ci in Pathian le mihing theampo ii ngaisut pa ahi hi." 
Luke24:20 Ka thiampi liante le ngamukte in thidaan thuak tu in aap uh a, tuaciang ama thinglamtee tungah kithat hi." 
Luke24:21 Israel te suatak a pia tu pa hi tu hi ci in ka lam en uh hi! Tua banah hi thu hong pian zawk sia tu in a ni thum ni hi zo hi. 
Luke24:22 Koma pawl sungah numei pawlkhat in hong liinglawngsak hi; amate khuavak bekin thaan vil uh a," 
Luke24:23 ahihang a luang a mu zo bua uh hi. Amate hong heak kikin, vantunglalangte a muna thu le ama sia nungta kik a hina thu son uh hi." 
Luke24:24 Ka pawl uh sung pan aheap thaan ah pai uh a, numeite thuson bang tatakin om a mu uh hi; ahihang ama a mu bua uh hi,” ci hi." 
Luke24:25 Jesus in amate tungah “Bangza ta in mawmaw nu ziam? Kamsaangte son theampo bangza in um thei papaih ngawl nu ziam? 
Luke24:26 Messiah in hite a thuak phot tu kul a, tua zawkciangin vaangletna sungah tum tu hi ngawl ziam?” ci hi." 
Luke24:27 Jesus in ama huvau Moses ii laibute pan a kipan kamsaangte lai at theampo dong Laithiangtho a vekpi sungah a kison teng sonthiang hi. 
Luke24:28 A pai natu khuano sia a thet nai tu ciangin, Jesus in a paisuak tu bangin ki omsak hi." 
Luke24:29 Ahihang amate in tho uh a, hi bangin ci uh hi. “Koma kungah hong taam ta'n, ni zong tum dektak zo a, khuazing tu hi,” ci uh hi. Tua ahikom amate kungah taam tu in pai hi." 
Luke24:30 Amate taw an ne tu in to a, anluum la in thupha a piak zawkciangin, balneen in amate pia hi." 
Luke24:31 Tuasia ciangin amate ii mit hong kihongin, ama tel uh a, ahihang amate kung panin ama bo hi." 
Luke24:32 Amate khat le khat hi bangin kici uh hi, “Lampi tungah Laithiangtho hong sonthiang laitakin ih thinsung meikuang taw hal bang hi kana ngawl ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Luke24:33 Amate ding pai a, Jerusalem khua ah pai kikin, nungzui sawm le khat te le a dangte kikhawm a om a mu uh ciang," 
Luke24:34 hi bangin ci uh hi. “Topa tho takpi zo hi! Simon tungah kilak hi!” 
Luke24:35 Tuaciang amate nii in lampi tungah a piang thu le, anluum a balneen ciang, Topa ahi hunlam a telna uh bang teng son uh hi." 
Luke24:36 Mihing niite in hi thu teng a sawson laitakin, thakhat thu in Topa amate laizang ah ding a, “Thinnopna na nga tavun,” ci hi." 
Luke24:37 Thithaa khat mu kisa in amate patau mama hi. 
Luke24:38 Ahihang ama in, “Banghangin patau nu ziam? Banghangin hi up laaknate na thinsung ah hong piang ziam?" 
Luke24:39 Ka khut ka peang hong en tavun. Keima tatak ma ka hi hunlam hong en tavun. Hong tham tavun, banghang ziam cile thithaa in ngu le taang le samalte, tu a ka nei nong mu thei uh bangin a nei bua hi,” ci hi." 
Luke24:40 Hi teng ci in amate a khutte le a peangte lak hi. 
Luke24:41 Amate in a um thei bualai hi, banghang ziam cile, amate lungdamna le lamdangsakna taw kidim uh hi; tua ahikom ama in, “Neak tu khat po na nei uh ziam?” ci in ngen hi." 
Luke24:42 Amate in ngasa pumhuan bek khat pia uh a," 
Luke24:43 amate ii mu tangin la in ne hi. 
Luke24:44 Tua zawkciang ama in, “Note taw kong om lai a, kong sonsa thu teng veuma ahi hi: kei taw kisai a ki at, Moses thukhamte, kamsaangte lai atte, le Psalm te hong taangtun kul hi,” ci hi." 
Luke24:45 Tua zawkciang amate Laithiangtho a tel natu in, ama in a thinsung uh honsak a," 
Luke24:46 tuaciang ama in amate tungah, “A ki at sia hisia hi: Messiah in thuak tu hi, a ni thum zawkciangin thina pan tho kik tu a;" 
Luke24:47 tuaciang ama min taw kisiik kikna le mawmaisakna sia Jerusalem pan kipan minam theampo tungah kihil tu hi. 
Luke24:48 No sia hi thute ii tetti na hi tu uh hi. 
Luke24:49 Tuaciangin ka Pa ii hong kamciamsa sia noma sungah keima tatak ma in kong puak tu hi. Ahihang note in tungsang pan vaangletna note tungah hong thet dong khuapi sungah na ngak tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Luke24:50 Tuaciang ama in amate teng khuapi sung pan Bethany dong paipui a, tua munah khut laamin thupha pia hi." 
Luke24:51 Thupha a piak laitakin, ama sia amate taw kikhen a, vantung ah kila to hi." 
Luke24:52 Amate in, ama a biak zawk uh ciang, lungdamna lianpi taw kidim uh a, Jerusalem ah heak kik in," 
Luke24:53 a hun nei uh theampo Biakinn sung Pathian tungah lungdamkona in zangh uh hi. 
John1:1 A kipatciilin, Kammal na omkhol zo hi; tua Kammal in Pathian taw om a, tua Kammal in Pathian ahi hi." 
John1:2 A kipatciil lai mama panin Kammal in Pathian taw a omsa ahi hi. 
John1:3 Ama tungtawnin Pathian in na theampo piangsak hi; a kibitphua theampo ama ngawl taw a kipiangsak na khat beak a om bua hi. 
John1:4 Tua Kammal in nuntakna ii naak ahi hi. Tuaciang hi nuntakna in mihing a minpiang atu in khuavak hong puak hi. 
John1:5 Khuavak in khuazing sungah taang a, khuazing in sumit zo ngeingawl hi." 
John1:6 Pathian in John a kici ama kamtaipa hong paisak a," 
John1:7 mihing theampo in za a, a up natu in, tua khuavak thu mihingte tungah a son tu in hong pai ahi hi." 
John1:8 Ama tatak ahile khuavak hi ngawl hi; khuavak ii thu son tu in hong pai ahi hi. 
John1:9 Hi khuavak in khuavak tatak hi a — leitung ah hong pai in mihing sim tungah a taang hi. 
John1:10 Kammal in leitung ah om a, Pathian in leitung sia ama tungtawnin piangsak hi napi, leitung in ama a he bua hi." 
John1:11 Ama in ama ii ngamsung ma a hong pai ahihang a mite in ama a saang bua uh hi. 
John1:12 Ahizong pawlkhat in ama saangin um uh hi; tua ahikom ama in tuate tungah Pathian ii tate sua thei natu thupia hi. 
John1:13 Amate leitung pianziate taw Pathian ii tate a suak hi ngawl hi, cinopna in, pa khat ii hin tate bangin a piang ahi bua hi; Pathian mama sia amate ii Pa ahi hi." 
John1:14 Kammal in mihing hong suak a, thuthiamna le thumaan thutak taw kidimin, ei sungah hong teang hi. Eite in ama ii vaangletna, Pa ii Tapa khat bek a hina taw a saan vaangletna ih mu zo hi." 
John1:15 John in ama huvau son hi. Ama in, “Hisia pa sia a thu ka sawson pa hi a, ‘Kei nung pan hong pai hi, ahihang kei sangin lianzaw hi, banghang ziam cile kei ii pian ma in ama om zo hi,’ ka ci sia ahi hi,” ci in au hi." 
John1:16 A kidimin a om, ama ii thuthiamna sung panin, ei theampo thupha hong pia zo a, thupha khat zawkciang khat hong piak ahi hi." 
John1:17 Pathian in Moses tungtawnin Thukham pia hi. Ahihang thuthiamna le thumaan thutak sia Jesus Christ tungtawnin hong pai hi. 
John1:18 Kuama in Pathian mu ngeingawl hi. Pa kungah a om, Pathian ma ahi, Tapa khat bek in Pathian hong hesak hi." 
John1:19 Jerusalem khua a om Jew thuneite in John kungah thiampite le Levi te pawlkhat paisak a, “Nang akua ni ziam?” ci in donghsak uh hi." 
John1:20 John in a zo thada bua a, phualseal ngawlin hi bangin thiangson hi. “Kei Messiah hi ngawl khi hi,” ci hi." 
John1:21 “Tua ahile akua ni ziam? Elijah ni ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi. “Hi ngawl khi hi,” ci in John in zo hi. “Kamsaangpa ni ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi. “Hi ngawl khi hi,” ci in ama in zo kik hi." 
John1:22 “Tua ahile akua ni ziam hong son ta'n” ci uh hi. “Ko hong sawlte munah thu ka puak kik uh kul hi. Nangma le nangma bang kici ni ziam?” ci uh hi. 
John1:23 Isaiah kamsaangpa ii sonna teng doppha in, John in hi bangin zo hi: “Kei sia ‘Sennealngam sungah a au khat ii aw ka hi hi: Topa ii khualhaw natu lampi tangsak vun!’ ”" 
John1:24 Phariseete ii kamtaite in," 
John1:25 John munah, “Nang Messiah le hi ngawl, Elijah le hi ngawl, Kamsaangpa le hi ngawl na hile, banghangin tuiphum ni ziam,” ci in dongh uh hi." 
John1:26 “Kei in tui taw tui kong phum hi, ahihang no sungah na heak ngawl uh khat om hi." 
John1:27 Ama sia kei nung panin hong pai ahihang ama peangdap suut tu zong ka kilawm bua hi,” ci in John in zo hi." 
John1:28 Hi thu theampo sia John ii tui a phumna Jordan Ngun ii nisuana sangah a om Bethany khua ah piang hi. 
John1:29 A zing ciangin John in ama kungah Jesus hong pai a mu ciangin, “Leitung buppi mawna a lakhia Pathian Tuuno, zialai ah om hi!" 
John1:30 ‘Mihing khat kei nung panin hong pai tu a, ama in kei pian ma in omkhol zo ahikom, kei sangin ama lianzaw hi,’ ci in ka sawson sia pa ahi hi." 
John1:31 Ama sia akua hi tu ziam, ci in ka he bua hi, ahihang Israel mite ii ama a heak natu in, tui taw tuiphum tu in keima hong pai ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
John1:32 Tuaciang in John in hi bangin tetti pang hi: “Thaa sia vantung panin ngam vakhu bangin hong tuaksuk a, ama tungah hong tu ka mu hi." 
John1:33 Ama sia tua pa ahi hunlam telcian tatak ngawlin ka om lai hi, ahihang tui taw tuiphum a hong sawl Pathian in, ‘Thaa sia hong paisuk in mihing khat ii tungah, hong tuaksuk na mu tu hi; ama sia Thaa Thiangtho taw hong baptize tu pa hi,’ ci in hong son zo hi." 
John1:34 Tuasia mu zo khi hi, tuaciangin ama sia Pathian Tapa hi ci in hong son khi hi,” John in ci hi." 
John1:35 A zing ciangin John sia tua munah ama ii nungzuite nii taw a dinkhop kik laitakin," 
John1:36 Jesus hong pai mu hi. “Zia sia in Pathian Tuuno hi!” ci hi. 
John1:37 Nungzuite nii in tu a bangin a son za uh a, tuaciangin Jesus taw ton uh hi." 
John1:38 Jesus kiheak a, amate in a nung a zui a mu ciang, “Bang zong nu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Amate in, “Koisung a teang ni ziam, Rabbi awng,” (“Syapa” a cinopna) ci in dongh uh hi." 
John1:39 “Hong pai in hong en tavun,” ci in zo hi. (Tua hun sia nitak nai li bang hi) Tua ahikom amate in ama taw paikhawm a, a teenna a mu uh hi, ama taw tua ni hun om lai teng a zangh khawm uh hi." 
John1:40 Tuate sung pan khat in Simon Peter ii suapui Andrew ahi hi. 
John1:41 Thakhatin a suapuipa Simon mu in hi thu ko hi. “Ko Messiah mu zo khu hi,” (Hi kammal sia Christ a cinopna hi) ci in ko hi." 
John1:42 Tua zawkciang ama in Jesus kungah Simon paipui hi. Jesus in ama en in, “Na min sia Simon hi a, John ii tapa ni hi, ahihang nang sia Cephas hong kina tu hi,” ci hi. (Cephas ii khiakna sia Peter ma hi a, “suangpi khat” a cinopna hi.)" 
John1:43 A zing ciangin Jesus in, Galilee ngam ah pai tu in, khensat hi. Ama in Philip mu a, “Hong zui ta'n,” ci hi." 
John1:44 (Philip sia Andrew le Peter te ii teenna Bethsaida khua pan ahi hi.) 
John1:45 Philip in Nathanael a mu ciang, “Moses ii thukham laibu sungah a thu a at pa le, kamsaangte zongh ii a thu a at pa mu zo khu hi. Ama sia Nazareth pan Joseph tapa Jesus hi,” ci in ama munah son hi." 
John1:46 “Nazareth panin na pha khat pawpo piang thei thong tu ziam,” ci in Nathanael in dongh hi. “Hong pai in hong en ta'n,” ci in Philip in zo hi." 
John1:47 Jesus in ama kungah Nathanael hong pai a mu ciangin, ama thu hi bangin son hi. “Hi sungah, Israel mi tatak khat om hi; ama in paubanna nei ngawl hi!” ci hi." 
John1:48 Nathanael in, “Bangbangin hong he ni ziam,” ci in dongh hi. “Philip ii hong sam ma theikung nuai ah na om lai in, kong mu zo hi,” ci in Jesus in zo hi." 
John1:49 Nathanael in, “Syapa awng, nang sia Pathian Tapa na hi hi! Israel Kumpipa na hi hi!” ci hi." 
John1:50 Jesus in, “Theikung nuai ah na om lai in, kong mu zo hi kong ci hu bek in, um na hi bua ziam? Hisia sangin a lian zaw lai na tam mama na mu tu hi!” ci hi." 
John1:51 Tuaciang in amate tungah, “Thumaan hong son khi hi: vantung kihong na mu tu a, Mihing Tapa tungah Pathian ii vantunglalangte a tuaksuk a kaato kithalee in a om na mu tu hi,” ci hi." 
John2:1 Ni nii zawkciang Galilee ngam Cana khua ah mopoai khat om hi. Tua munah Jesus ii nu om a," 
John2:2 Jesus le a nungzuite zongh, tua mopoai siim tu in, khual kihil uh hi." 
John2:3 A sapittui teng a kihawm siat zawkciang, Jesus ii nu in ama munah, “Amate in sapittui nei nawn ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
John2:4 Jesus in, “Ka vawt tu sia hong son heak in, ka hun hong tung ngawl lai hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
John2:5 Jesus ii nu in, naseamte munah, “Ama hong sawl babangin vawt vun,” ci hi." 
John2:6 Jew te sia a zeksa kithiansua ngeinate nei uh a, tuaciang tuasia atu in tui litre zakhat bang veu a ta, tui thambeal luk om hi." 
John2:7 Jesus in naseamte munah, “Hi thambealte tui dimh vun,” ci hi. Amate in thambeal ngong ciang in tui dimh uh a," 
John2:8 tua zawkciang ama in, “Tu in tui hong suak tavun a, poai ukpa kungah paipui tavun,” ci hi. Tua pa kungah tui a paipui uh le," 
John2:9 tu in tua tui sia sapittui suak zo a, ama in tep hi. Ama in hi sapittui koisung pan hong pai ci in a he bua hi (ahihang tui suakin a paipui naseamte in ahile he uh hi); tua ahikom zineipa sam a," 
John2:10 “Ngualdangte in, sapittui limbel teng veu hawm masa a, leangnate ii tam mama a neak zawkciang, sapittui dang thawthong teng hawm hi. Ahihang nang na hile sapittui limbel teng tu dongin na khealsia hi!” ci hi." 
John2:11 Jesus in hi a masabel nalamdang lakna sia Galilee ngam Cana khua ah vawt hi; tua munah ama ii minthanna kilanghsak a, a nungzuite in ama um uh hi." 
John2:12 Hisia zawkciang, Jesus le a nu, a suapuipate le nungzuite sia Capernaum khua ah pai uh a, tuak ah ni tawmvei sung taam uh hi." 
John2:13 Paisan Poai hun hong theng dektak ahikomin, Jerusalem ah Jesus pai hi." 
John2:14 Tuak Biakinnpi sungah khuite, tuute, inn vakhute, zuakin a om mite le sum theakte zongh sabuai ah to in a om mu hi." 
John2:15 Tua ahikom ama in kivelna khauhual vawtin, nganhing theampo, tuu le khuite zongh Biakinnpi panin notkeak hi; sum theakte ii sabuai sawnthalsak a, a dangkatangte kithethaang hi;" 
John2:16 tuaciangin inn vakhu zuakte munah, “Hite hi sung pan lakeak vun! Ka Pa inn sia vanh zuakna mun suaksak heak vun!” ci hi." 
John2:17 A nungzuite in, laithiangtho ii, “Na inn ka thangaina in, ka sungah mei bangin kuang hi, Pathian awng,” a ci teng phawk uh hi." 
John2:18 Jew thuneite in, “Hi bang ngamtat thei natu in, na thu ngana sia bang nalamdang lakna taw hong lak tu ni ziam?” ci in thudokna taw zo kik uh hi." 
John2:19 Jesus in, “Hi Biakinnpi baltham vun, ni thum sungin sa kik tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John2:20 “Ni thum sungah sa kik thei tu ni ziam? Hi Biakinnpi sak natu sia kum sawmli le kum luk hai hi,” ci uh hi." 
John2:21 Ahihang Jesus ii son biakinn sia ama ii pumpi ahi hi. 
John2:22 Tua ahikom thina panin ama a kithaw kiksak ciangin a nungzuite in, hi thu a son sia phawk kik uh a, amate in laithiangtho le Jesus ii a sonsate um uh hi." 
John2:23 Paisan Poai sungin Jerusalem ah Jesus a om laitakin, ama ii nalamdang laknate a mu uh hu in, mihing tam mamate in ama um uh hi." 
John2:24 Ahihang Jesus in muang ngawlin amate tungah ama le ama a ki aap ngam bua hi, banghang ziam cile ama in amate he siat hi." 
John2:25 Ama tungah amate thu sia kuama ii son kul ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile ama mama in amate ii thinsung teng a heaksa hi." 
John3:1 Nicodemus a kici Jew te lampui khat om a, Pharisee pawlmi ahi hi." 
John3:2 Zan khat Jesus kungah ama pai in, “Rabbi awng, nang sia Pathian ii sawl sya khat hi ci in kong he uh hi. Pathian in hong ompui buale, na vawt nalamdang laknate, kuama in vawt thei ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
John3:3 Jesus in, “Thumaan hong son khi hi: niivei a suak kik buale, kuama in Pathian Ngam mu thei ngawl tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John3:4 “Bangbangin mihing a khanthin sa khat sia niivei suak kik thei tu ziam? A nu ngil sungah tumin niivei suak kik thei ngawl het tu hi!” Nicodemus in ci hi. 
John3:5 Jesus in “Thumaan hong son khi hi. Tui le Thaa taw a suak buale, Pathian Ngam sungah kuama tum thei ngawl tu hi." 
John3:6 Nu le pate sung panin a suak mihing khat sia cii le sa mi hi a, ahihang Thaa sung panin a suak sia in thaa mi ahi hi." 
John3:7 Note theampo na sua kik uh kul tu hi kong cina hangin, lamdang na sa heak in." 
John3:8 Vui in a uukna po ah va hi; a vak ciang a nging na za hi, ahihang koisung pan hong pai a, koisung zuan ziam ci na he bua hi. Thaa taw a suak mihing simin, tuabang ma ahi hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
John3:9 Nicodemus in, “Bangbangin hi thu suak thei tu ziam,” ci in dongh hi." 
John3:10 Jesus in, “Nang sia Israel ngamsung sya thupi khat na hi hi, hi thu tel ngawl ni ziam?" 
John3:11 Keima in nang tungah thumaan hong son khi hi: ka heak uhte kong son a, ka mu uhte hong ko khu hi, tua hi napi kuama in ko ii thupuak sia saang nuam ngawl nu hi." 
John3:12 Hi leitung nate ii thu kong son ciangin, hong um ngawl nu hi, tua ahile vantung nate ii thu kong son ciang, bangbangin hong um thei thong tu nu ziam?" 
John3:13 Tuaciangin vantung pan a hong paisuk Mihing Tapa simngawl kuama vantung ah kaato ngeingawl hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John3:14 Sennealngamsung thingkhuam tungah Moses ii taau ngul a khai bangma in Mihing Tapa zongh kikhai tu hi," 
John3:15 tuasia in ama a umte theampo ii tawntung nuntakna a nga thei natu ahi hi. 
John3:16 Pathian in leitung mite hong it mama ahikom, khat bek a nei a Tapa hong pia a, ama a um peuma in thi nawn ngawlin tawntung nuntakna a nga natu ahi hi." 
John3:17 Banghang ziam cile Pathian in a Tapa sia leitung ii a thukhenpa tu hi ngawl a, a hunpa tu in leitung ah hong paisak hi." 
John3:18 Tapa a umte thukhenna thuak ngawl hi; a um ngawlte ahile thukhenna a thuaksa hi zo hi, banghang ziam cile amate in, Pathian ii Tapa khat bek sia a um bua uh hi." 
John3:19 Hisia in thukhenzia hi: khuavak sia leitung ah hong pai zo hi, ahihang mihingte in, khuavak sangin khuazing deizaw uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate ii ngamtatnate sia hi." 
John3:20 A sia a vawt theampo in khuavak ngaimaw a, khuavak sungah hong pai ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile amate ii a tatsiatnate kilanghsak nuam ngawl hi." 
John3:21 Ahihang thumaan a seamte in, amate ii ngamtatna sia Pathian thunitna ahi hunlam tua khuavak in a lak thei natu in khuavak sungah a pai hi." 
John3:22 Tua zawkciang, Jesus le a nungzuite in, Judea ngamkhen sungah hong pai uh a, tua munah amate taw hun zangh khawmin, tuiphumna pia hi." 
John3:22 Tua zawkciang, Jesus le a nungzuite in, Judea ngamkhen sungah hong pai uh a, tua munah amate taw hun zangh khawmin, tuiphumna pia hi." 
John3:23 Salim pan a kikhuala ngawlna Aenon ah tui tam ahikom John in tui sungah tuiphumna pia hi. Mihingte in ama zuan uh a, tuaciang ama in, tuiphum hi." 
John3:24 (Hisia in thong sungah John a kikhum ma hun ahi hi.) 
John3:25 John ii nungzui pawlkhat in Jew te khat taw a zeksa kisilna huvau kam kinial uh hi. 
John3:26 Tua ahikom amate John kungah pai in, “Syapa awng, Jordan ngun nisuana sangah nang taw a om ngei ama thu na sawson sia, na ciamtee lai ziam? Tu in ama zongh in, tuiphum a, a kuama po in, ama kung zuan tek uh hi!” ci hi." 
John3:27 John in, “Pathian in a pia buale kuama in, bangma nga thei ngawl hi." 
John3:28 ‘Kei Messiah hi ngawl khi hi, ahihang ama mai ah, kei hong kipaisak khol hi’ ka ci ciang noma tatak ma keima ii tetti te na hi uh hi," 
John3:29 Mo ahile zineipa ii neisa hi. Ahihang a kungah a ding thu ngai in a om zineipa ii lawmpa in zineipa aw a zaak ciangin a lungdam hi. Hisia in keima lungdamna a pawlcinna ahi hi. 
John3:30 Ama hong thupi vaial tu a, kei sia thupi ngawl vaial tu khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John3:31 Tungsang pan hong pai sia in, a kuama theampo sangin, lian zaw hi. Leitung pan hong pai sia in, leitung neisa hi a, leitung nate thuson in nei hi. Ahihang vantung pan hong pai sia in, a kuama theampo ii tungsia ahi hi." 
John3:32 Ama in a mu sate le a zaaksate son hi, ahihang ama ii thu hong puak sia kuama in saang ngawl hi."
