John3:33 Ahihang ama ii thupuak a saang pawpo in Pathian thumaan hi, ci thu kipsak hi." 
John3:34 Pathian ii sawlpa in, Pathian ii kammalte pau hi, banghang ziam cile Pathian in ama Thaa taw kidimsak hi." 
John3:35 Pa in a Tapa it a, na theampo ama ii vaangletna sungah koi hi." 
John3:36 Tapa a um pawpo in, tawntung nuntakna nei hi; Tapa ii thu a ni ngawl po sia nuntakna a nei buatu a, Pathian ii daan piakna nuai ah om lai tu hi." 
John4:1 Jesus in John sangin, nungzui tamzaw nga a, tuiphum hi ci thu Phariseete in za uh hi." 
John4:2 (A tatakin Jesus in kuama tuiphum ngawl hi; ama ii nungzuite bek in tuiphum uh hi.) 
John4:3 Tua ahikom Jesus in tuabang a kisonna a zaak ciang, Judea ngam nusia in Galilee ah pai kik hi;" 
John4:3 Tua ahikom Jesus in tuabang a kisonna a zaak ciang, Judea ngam nusia in Galilee ah pai kik hi;" 
John4:4 tua mun a paina lampi sia Samaria ngam a kaantan tu kul hi. 
John4:5 Samaria ngam Sychar kici khuano khat ah ama theng hi, tua khua sia Jacob ii a tapa Joseph a piak lo sia taw kikhuala ngawl hi." 
John4:6 Jacob ii tuikhuk tua munah om a, Jesus sia a khualhawna pan toi in, tua tuikhuk hui ah to hi. Tua hun sia sunkim khawng ahi hi." 
John4:7 Samaria numei khat tui toai tu in hong pai a, tuasia ciang Jesus in ama munah, “Tui neak tu hong pia ta'n,” ci hi." 
John4:8 (A nungzuite khua sungah an lei tu in pai uh hi.) 
John4:9 Tua numei in, “Nang Jew mi hi a, kei Samaria mi khi hi — tua hi a, banghangin tui hong ngen thei ni ziam,” ci in zo hi (Jew te in Samaria te ii zak hai le kuangte zangh khawm ngawl hi.)" 
John4:10 Jesus in, “Pathian in bang teng pia a, nang tungah tuineak tu hong ngen sia akua ziam, ci thu tel thong lete nangma in ama munah na ngen tu hi, tuaciang ama in nuntakna tui hong pia tu hi,” ci hi." 
John4:11 Tua numei in, “Syapa awng tuipheal nei ngawl ni hi, tuaciang tuikhuk sia thuk hi. Tua nuntakna tui, koisung pan nga tu ni ziam?" 
John4:12 Hi tuikhuk hong pia sia in ih taanghpupi Jacob hi; ama le a tapate le a nganno honte, a vekpi in hi tuikhuk panin dawn tek uh hi. Jacob sangin lianzaw kisa na hi bua na ziam,” ci hi." 
John4:13 Jesus in, “A kuama po hi tui a dawn sia in, a dangko kik tu hi," 
John4:14 ahihang kei ii ka piak tui a dawn peuma a dangko kik ngei nawn ngawl tu hi. Ka piak tu tui sia ama sung pan ciktui khat hong suak tu hi, tua in nuntakna a pia tui hi tu a, tuaciangin tawntung nuntakna pia tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John4:15 Tua numei in, “Syapa awng, tua tui kei hong pia ta'n! Tua hile ka dangko kik ngei nawn ngawl tu a, tui toai tu in hi sungah ka pai kul nawn ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
John4:16 Jesus in, “Pai in, na pasal sam ta'n, tuaciang hong pai kik ta'n,” ci hi." 
John4:17 Ama in, “Kei pasal ka nei bua hi,” ci in zo hi. Jesus in, “Pasal ka nei bua hi na ci sia thumaan hi." 
John4:18 Pasal nga na teenpui ngei zo a, tu a na teenkhop puipa sia na pasal tatak hi ngawl hi. Thumaan hong son ni hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
John4:19 Tua numei in, “Syapa, nang sia kamsaang khat na hi hunlam kong he hi." 
John4:20 Ka Samaria taanghpupite in, hi mualtung ah Pathian bia hi, ahihang no Jew te in Jerusalem sia noma ii Pathian biakna tu mun hi, ci nu hi,” ci hi." 
John4:21 Jesus in ama munah, “Hong um ta'n, numei awng, Pa sia hi mual tungah ahizong, Jerusalem ah ahizong mihingte ii biak ngawl tu hun hong tung tu hi." 
John4:22 No Samaria te in na biak uh akua ziam, ci in he tatak ngawl nu hi; ahihang ko Jew te in, ka biak uh sia ka he uh hi, banghang ziam cile ngupna sia Jew te tung panin hong pai hi." 
John4:23 Ahihang, Pa sia Pathian ii Thaa vaangletna taw, ahi bang tatakin ama ii dei biakna maan taw mihingte ii biak tu hun hong tung tu a, tu mama in hi sungah hong tutung zo hi." 
John4:24 Pathian sia Thaa hi a, a Thaa ii vaangletna bekma taw mihingte in ama sia ahi bang tatakin bia thei hi,” ci hi." 
John4:25 Tua numei in, “Messiah hong pai tu a, ama hong pai ciangin, thu theampo hong son tu hi, ci in ka he hi,” ci hi." 
John4:26 Jesus in, “Nang taw a kipaupui keima in tuasia pa ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
John4:27 Tua hun laitakin Jesus nungzuite hong heak kik a, Jesus sia numei khat taw thu sawson in om a mu uh ciang, amate in lamdang sa mama uh hi. Ahihang kuama in, “Nang bang nuam ni ziam,” ci in tua numei mun ahizong, “Banghangin hisia nu taw thuson ni ziam,” ci in ama mun ahizong a dongh bua uh hi." 
John4:28 Tuasia ciangin tua numei in a tuibeal nusia in, khua sungah heak kik a, tualai mihingte munah," 
John4:29 “Keima ngamtat ngei theampo hong son sia pa en tu in hong pai tavun. Ama in Messiah ahi thei tu ziam?” ci hi. 
John4:30 Tua ahikom, amate in a khua uh nusia in, Jesus kungah pai uh hi." 
John4:31 Tua hun sungin, a nungzuite in Jesus munah, “Syapa awng, bang khat pawpo ne in!” ci uh hi." 
John4:32 Ahihang ama in, “No ii heak ngawl anneak tu ka nei hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John4:33 Tua ahikom nungzuite amate teng kidongh a, “Khat po in ama an puak zo hi tu ziam?” ci uh hi." 
John4:34 Jesus in, “Kei ii an sia, kei hong sawlpa ii deina ka zui tu le hong piak nasep ka zaw tu ahi hi." 
John4:35 Noma in ‘Tha li zawkciang sia anlaak hun hi,’ ci kam teptee nei nu hi. Ahihang lote pha tak en vun; tu in lo ante min zo a, laak tu bekin om zo hi, ci in kong son hi!" 
John4:36 Anla pa sia thaman kipia a, ama in tawntung nuntak natu ante kaikhawm hi; tua ahikom thaicii poaipa le anlapa lungdam khawm tu hi." 
John4:37 ‘Mihing khat in thaicii poai a, a dang khat in anla hi,’ a ci sia thumaan hi." 
John4:38 No ii thawna ahi ngawl lo khat sungah anla tu in hong paisak khi hi; ngualdangte in tua munah seam uh a, tuaciang in no sia amate sepna tung panin hamphatna na nga uh hi,” ci hi." 
John4:39 Tua numei ii “Keima ngamtat ngei theampo hong son hi,” a cina hangin tua Samaria khua mi tam mama in Jesus um uh hi." 
John4:40 Tua hi a Samaria mite ama kungah hong pai ciangin, amate kungah a taam natu in kunh uh hi, Jesus in tua munah ni nii taam hi." 
John4:41 Ama thusonna hu in a tamzaw seseam in um uh hi; 
John4:42 tua numei munah amate in, “Tu in um khu hi, nang nong son sia hang hi ngawl a, koma mama in ama ii thuson ka zaak uh hang hi, ama leitung Hunpa ahi takpi sia ka he uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
John4:43 Tua munah ni nii a taam zawkciang Jesus vaidingin, Galilee ngam zuan hi." 
John4:44 Banghang ziam cile ama mama in, “Kamsaangpa khat sia ama ii ngam sungah kizakta ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
John4:45 Galilee ngam a thet ciangin, tualai mihingte in muak uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate Paisan Poai siimin Jerusalem ah pai a, poai sungah ama vawt theampo mu siat zo uh hi." 
John4:46 Tua zawkciang Galilee ngam Cana khua ah Jesus pai kik hi, tua mun sia ama in tui pan sapittui a suasakna mun ahi hi. Tua munah kumpi naseam ulian khat om a, a tapa sia Capernaum khua ah a cina hi." 
John4:47 Ama in Judea ngam panin Galilee ngam ah Jesus hong pai hunlam a zaak ciangin Jesus kungah pai a, Capernaum khua ah a thi dektak a tapa a damsak natu in ngen hi." 
John4:47 Ama in Judea ngam panin Galilee ngam ah Jesus hong pai hunlam a zaak ciangin Jesus kungah pai a, Capernaum khua ah a thi dektak a tapa a damsak natu in ngen hi." 
John4:48 Jesus in, “No sungah nalamdang laknate le, a lamdangte na mu bua uh le, kuama in na um ngei buatu uh hi,” ci hi." 
John4:49 Ulianpa in, “Syapa awng, ka tapa a thi ma in hong zui ta'n,” ci in zo kik hi." 
John4:50 Jesus in ama munah, “Va pai ta'n, na tapa nungta tu hi!” ci hi. Tua pa in Jesus kammalte um in pai paih hi." 
John4:51 Inn ah a cia lamin a naseamte in, “Na tapa nungta tu hi!” ci thu taw ama muak uh hi." 
John4:52 A tapa a dam zawhiat sia bang hun ziam ci in amate tungah a dok ciang, “Zeini nitak sang nai khat hun in, a ci suk hong thai hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John4:53 Tuasia ciang Jesus ii, “Na tapa nungta tu hi,” a ci hun lian ma ahi sia a pa in phawk hi. Tua ahikom ama le a innkuanpui theampo in um uh hi." 
John4:54 Hisia in Judea pan Galilee ah hong pai zawkciang Jesus ii vawt nalamdang lakna a niina ahi hi. 
John4:54 Hisia in Judea pan Galilee ah hong pai zawkciang Jesus ii vawt nalamdang lakna a niina ahi hi. 
John5:1 Tua zawkciang, Jerusalem khua Biakna poai ah Jesus pai hi." 
John5:2 Jerusalem Tuu Kongpi hui ah, talaap nga taw kithua tuicing khat om hi; tua mun sia Hebrew kam in Bethzatha kici hi." 
John5:3 Mittaw, peangbai, pumzaw ciina honpui khat sia, tua talaapte sungah lum uh hi." 
John5:4 Amate in tui a kilok tu ngak uh hi, banghang ziam cile tu le tu in Topa ii vantunglalang khat in tua tui sungah tuaksuk a, tui sau hi. Tui kinok laitak a tuaksuk phit cina sia in, bang natna po a vei zong dam thiang hi." 
John5:5 Kum sawmthum le kum liat cina sa pasal khat tuak ah om hi. 
John5:6 Jesus in tua pa a lup sia mu a, khuangei mama a ciinat hunlam he hi; tua ahikom, “Na dam nuam ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
John5:7 Cinapa in, “Syapa awng, tui a kinok laitak kei hong khiasuk tu, hi sungah kuama ka nei bua hi; tuisung theng nuamin, ka hanciam hang, ngualdang veu tuaksuk masa hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John5:8 Jesus in “Tho in, na lupna phah luakin a, lampai in,” ci hi." 
John5:9 Thakhat thu in tua pasalpa dam hi; ama in a phah luakin, lampai tu in kipan paih hi. Hi thu a pian ni sia Sabbath ni ahi hi." 
John5:10 Tua ahikom Jew thuneite in a kidamsakpa munah, “Tuni Sabbath ni hi, na phah na puak tu sia ih thukham taw kisi ngawl hi,” ci uh hi." 
John5:11 Ama in, “Hong damsakpa in ka phah ka lua tu le lampai tu in hong sawl hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John5:12 “Hi bang ngamta a hong sawlpa akua ziam,” ci in dongh uh hi." 
John5:13 Ahihang damsakna a ngapa in, Jesus akua cisia a he bua hi, banghang ziam cile tua munah mihon khat om ahiciang Jesus kiheam hi." 
John5:14 Tuasia zawkciang Jesus in Biakinnpi sungah ama mu a, “Hong ngai ta'n, tu in dam zo ni hi; tua ahiciang, mawna vawt nawn heak in, tua ahibuale a nasia zaw thuak thei tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
John5:15 Tua zawkciang pasalpa in paisan a, ama a damsak sia Jesus ahi hunlam Jew thuneite kungah son hi." 
John5:16 Tua ahikom, amate in Jesus vawtsia tu kipan uh hi, banghang ziam cile ama in hi ciidamsakna Sabbath ni in seam hi." 
John5:17 Jesus in amate tungah, “Ka Pa a tawntungin naseam a, kei zongh ka sep kul hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John5:18 Hi bang a pauna in, Jew thuneite ii Jesus a thalup nopna khangsak seseam hi; Sabbath thukham paltan bek dom ngawlin, Pathian sia ama ii aituam Pa hi a ci ciang, ama le ama Pathian taw a za kikimsak ahi hi." 
John5:19 Tua ahikom amate kungah Jesus in, “A tatakin kong ci hi: Tapa in ama thu taw bangma vawt thei ngawl hi; a Pa ii vawt a mu teng bekma vawt hi. Pa ii vawt teng Tapa zongh in vawt hi." 
John5:20 Pa in Tapa it ahikom ama ii vawt teng theampo ma lak hi. Hite sangin a lian zaw lai, a vawtte ngawngawn lak tu a, note theampo in lamdang na sa tek tu uh hi." 
John5:21 Pa in mithite thosak a, nuntakna a piak bangma Tapa in a piak nopte tungah nuntakna pia hi." 
John5:22 Pa in kuama tungah thukhen ngawl hi. Ama in a Tapa tungah thukhen theina thu a cingin pia hi," 
John5:23 tua thu sia mihing theampo in Pa a zatak bangma in, Tapa a zatak natu ahi hi. Tapa a zakta ngawl po in ama a sawl ahi Pa sia zakta ngawl hi." 
John5:24 “A tatakin kong ci hi: ka kammalte za a, kei hong sawlpa a um pawpo tawntung nuntakna nei hi. Amate tungah thu kikhen ngawl tu a, thina pan nuntakna sungah theng zo hi." 
John5:25 A tatakin kong ci hi: a hun hong tung tu a — hong tutung zo hi — tua hun ciang a thisate in Pathian Tapa ii aw za tu a, tuaciangin a zate hong nungta tu uh hi." 
John5:26 Pa mama in nuntakna ii naak ahi bangma ama Tapa zongh nuntakna ii naak suaksak zo hi. 
John5:27 Tuaciang ama ii Tapa sia thukhen theina thupia zo hi, banghang ziam cile ama Mihing Tapa ahi hi." 
John5:28 Hi thu tungtaang ah lamdang sa heak vun; a thisate theampo in ama aw za tu a," 
John5:29 thaankuul sung panin hong pusua tu hun hong theng tu hi; na pha a seamsate tho in nungta tu a, siatna vawtte tho in mawsakna thuak tu hi." 
John5:30 “Keima aituam thuneina taw bangma ka vawt thei bua hi; Pathian hong son bang bekin thukhen ka hikom, ka thukhenna maan hi, banghang ziam cile, keima dei bangin sep tu ka hanciam bua a, hong sawl pa dei bangin ka seam hi." 
John5:31 Keima le keima tetti in ka kipang le ka son sia maan tatak hi, ci in kisaang ngawl tu hi." 
John5:32 Ahihang kei taangin tetti hong pang a dang khat om a, tuaciangin kei huvau ama sonte maan hi, ci in ka he hi." 
John5:33 John sia na kamtaite na paisakna uh pa hi a, tuaciang ama in thumaan thutak son hi." 
John5:34 Mihing khat ii tetti panna ka nei tu kul tuan ngawl hi; hisia noma ii na suatak thei natu ka ci bekma ahi hi. 
John5:35 John sia meiinn taw kibang a, kuangin taang hi, tuaciangin tawmvei sung teng ama ii khuavak sia na leaplaw nuam uh hi." 
John5:36 Ahihang John ii tetti panna sangin, a lianzaw kei taang a ding tu tetti khat ka nei hi: Pa ii sep tu hong piakte ka sepna po in kei taangin a pau hi a, kei sia Pa hong sawl ahi hunlam lak hi." 
John5:37 Kei hong sawlpa ahi Pa zongh in, keima taangin tetti pang hi. Note in ama aw na za ngei bua uh a, a maitang zongh na mu ngei bua uh hi," 
John5:38 tuaciangin ama ii thu hong puak sia na thinsung ah na keam bua uh hi, banghang ziam cile a ma ii hong puakpa na um bua uh hi." 
John5:39 Laithiangthote na entel uh hi, banghang ziam cile tuate sungah tawntung nuntakna mu tu na ki um uh hi. Tuaciangin hi Laithiangthote mama in, keima ii thu son hi!" 
John5:40 Tua hi napi nuntakna na nga natu in kei kungah nong pai nuam bua uh hi. 
John5:41 “Keima in mihingte ii pokna a zong hi ngawl khi hi. 
John5:42 Ahihang no bangbang mihing nam ci sia le na thinsung uh ah Pathian ii itna na nei ngawl uh kong he hi. 
John5:43 Pa ii thuneina tengma kengin kong pai hangin nong saang bua uh hi; ahihang khat po in ama ii thuneina taw hong pai ciang na saang tu uh hi. 
John5:44 No khat le khat kipok tu na thangai uh hi, ahihang khat bek ahi Pathian tung pan pokna nga tu na hanciam bua uh hi; tua ahile bangbangin kei hong um thei tu nu ziam?" 
John5:45 Ahihang ka Pa mai ah note maw hong pusak tu sia, kei hi tu in hong um heak vun. Na lam et uh pa Moses sia note hong mawsak tu pa ahi hi." 
John5:46 Moses na um takpi uh le kei nong up tu uh hi zo hi, banghang ziam cile ama in keima thu at hi." 
John5:47 Ahihang ama at thute um ngawl na hi uh nungsang, kei kampau bangbangin um thei tu nu ziam?” ci in zo hi." 
John6:1 Tua zawkciang, Galilee tuili (Tiberias Tuili zongh kici) kaantanin Jesus pai hi." 
John6:2 Mi honpi khat in a nungzui hi, banghang ziam cile ciina damsakna taw ama ii nalamdang laknate mu uh hi." 
John6:3 Jesus sia mual khat tungah kaato a, a nungzuite taw tokhawm hi." 
John6:4 Paisan Poai hun hong nai hi. 
John6:5 Jesus in a kiimkot a et ciangin, mi honpi khat ama kungah hong zuan mu a, tua ahikom Philip munah, “Koisung pan hi mihingte theampo ih vaak khom natu an lei thei tu hi ziam,” ci hi." 
John6:6 (Hi bangin a ci sia Philip a ze etna hi; ama in a vawt tu tatak sia a heakkhol sa hi.) 
John6:7 Philip in, “Mihing sim ii tawmno tek a neak khom tu bek zongh ngun dangka zanii vaal taw anluum lei kul tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John6:8 A nungzuite sung pan a dang khat Simon Peter ii suapuipa Andrew in," 
John6:9 “Hi sungah om patangno khat in, mangtaang anluum nga le ngasa nii nei hi. Ahihang tua teng sia hi mi theampo atu in, kicing ngawl het tu hi,” ci hi." 
John6:10 Jesus in amate tungah “Mihingte tosak vun,” ci hi. (Tua munah lopa tam om hi.) Tua ahikom mihing theampo to siat uh hi; pasal 5,000 bang pha uh hi." 
John6:11 Jesus in anluumte la a, Pathian tungah lungdamko in, tua munah a to mihing teng hawmsak hi. Ama in tuabang ma in ngasate zongh hawm a, amate a vekpi in a du zaza ne uh hi." 
John6:12 Amate a kham siat zawk uh ciang, a nungzuite munah ama in, “A kham vaal teng kaikhawm vun; bangma pakvawt bua tawng,” ci hi." 
John6:13 Tua ahikom amate in a khop siat uh ciangin, mihonte neak mangtaang anluum nga panin, a kham vaal uh khum sawm le khum nii nga uh hi." 
John6:14 Hi nalamdang lakna Jesus ii vawt a mu uh ciangin, tua munah a om mihingte in, “Hi sia leitung a hong pai tu Kamsaangpa hi takpi hi!” ci uh hi." 
John6:15 Amate hong pai in kumpi suaksak tu in zawthawk thu taw ama man tu kipan ahi sia Jesus in he hi; tua ahikom ama nguakin, mual tungah pai san kik hi." 
John6:16 Nitak sang ciangin, Jesus ii nungzuite tua tuili ah paisuk uh a," 
John6:17 ngunkuang sungah to in, Capernaum ah tuili kaantan in pai kik uh hi. Khua hong zan zo a, Jesus amate kung hong zuan ngawl lai hi." 
John6:18 Tua hun laitak, nasia takin vuiva a, tui kilok hi." 
John6:19 Nungzuite in kilometre 5 bang 6 bang ngunkuang a haw zawkciang, Jesus tui tungah lampai in, ngunkuang nai ah hong pai a mu uh ciang, amate lau uh hi." 
John6:20 Jesus in, “Lau heak vun, keima khi hi!” ci hi." 
John6:21 Tuasia ciangin amate tha lawp takin, Jesus ngunkuang tungah kaasak uh a, amate zot nopna mun ah thakhat thu in theng uh hi." 
John6:22 A zing ciangin, tuili langkhat ah a taam mihonpite in, tua mun ah ngunkuang khat bek a om hunlam phawk kik uh hi. Tua ngunkuang sungah, ama ii nungzuite taw Jesus paikhawm ngawlin amate nguak a pai hunlam phawk uh hi." 
John6:23 Topa ii lungdam a ko zawkciang mihon ii anluum neakna mun taw a kinaina tuili vaal ah, Tiberias pan hong pai ngunkuang dangte hong theng hi." 
John6:24 Mihonte in Jesus ahizong, ama ii nungzuite ahizong tua munah a mu ngawl uh ciang, ngunkuangte tungah kaa in, ama zong tu in Capernaum khua ah pai uh hi." 
John6:25 Mihingte in tuili langkhat ah Jesus a mu uh ciangin, ama munah, “Syapa awng, hi sung bang hunin theng ni ziam,” ci uh hi." 
John6:26 Jesus in, “A tatakin kong ci ciang, kei nong zon uh sia, nalamdang ka laknate na tel uh hang hi ngawlin, anluum na du uh za a na neak uh hang ahi hi." 
John6:27 A sia thei an atu in, naseam heak vun; tua sangin a kikhomsuan tawntung nuntakna an atu in seam zaw vun. Hisia in Mihing Tapa ii no hong piak tu an ahi hi, banghang ziam cile Pa Pathian in ama tungah lungkimin tepteena koi zo hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John6:28 Tua ahikom, amate in, “Pathian in kote seam le hong oai te ka sep thei natu in bang vawt thei tu khu ziam,” ci in dongh uh hi." 
John6:29 Jesus in, “Pathian ii no sep tu a dei nasep sia, ama ii a sawlpa na up tu uh ahi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John6:30 Amate in “Ko ii mu thei tu uh le nang kong up thei natu in, bang nalamdang lakna vawt tu ni ziam? Bang vawt tu ni ziam?" 
John6:31 laithiangtho in ‘Ama in vantung panin amate neak tu anluum pia hi,’ a ci bangma in, ka taanghpupite in sennealngam sungah manna ne uh hi,” ci in zo kik uh hi." 
John6:32 Jesus in “A tatakin ka ci hi: Moses ii no hong piak anluum sia vantung pan hi ngawl hi. Vantung pan no atu anluum tatak hong pia pa sia ka Pa ahi hi. 
John6:33 Banghang ziam cile, Pathian hong piak anluum sia in, hi leitung ah nuntakna a pia tu in, vantung pan hong paisuk pa ahi hi,” ci hi." 
John6:34 Amate in, “Topa awng, hi anluum hong pia tawntung ta'n,” ci in ngen uh hi." 
John6:35 Jesus in, “Keima in, nuntakna anluum ka hi hi. Kei kungah hong paite in, a ngilkial ngei nawn ngawl tu hi; kei hong umte in, a dangko ngei nawn ngawl tu hi." 
John6:36 Tu in note in kei hong mu zo napi nong um buatu uh hi, kong ci sa ahi hi." 
John6:37 Ka pa hong piak mihing theampo kei kungah hong pai tu hi. Kei kung hong zuan peuma ka nial ngei buatu hi," 
John6:38 banghang ziam cile keima aituam deina a seam tu in vantung pan hong pai ka hi bua a, hong sawlpa deina a seam tu in, hong pai ka hi hi." 
John6:39 Tuaciang kei hong sawlpa ii deina sia, hong piaksa theampo sung pan khat zongh bosua ngawl het in, ni tawpkhak ni in, amate teng nuntakna sungah, ka thawsak siat tu sia ahi hi." 
John6:40 Banghang ziam cile ka Pa ii deina sia, Tapa mu a, ama a umte theampo in tawntung nuntakna a nga natu ahi hi. Tuaciang ni tawpkhakbel ni in, amate nuntakna sungah ka thosak tu hi,” ci hi." 
John6:41 “Keima in vantung pan hong paisuk anluum ka hi hi,” a ci hu in, mihingte in ama phunsan siasua uh hi." 
John6:42 Tua ahikom, amate in “Hisia pa sia Joseph ii tapa Jesus hi kana ngawl ziam? A pa le a nu ih heak hi. Tua ahile bangbang, tu in vantung pan kong paisuk hi, ci thei ziam?” ci uh hi." 
John6:43 Jesus in, “Noma sung tengah phun teaptuup nawn heak vun." 
John6:44 Kei hong sawl Pa in kei kungah hong puak buale, kuama kei kungah hong pai thei ngawl hi; tuaciang ni tawpkhak ni ciang nuntakna sungah ama ka thosak tu hi." 
John6:45 Kamsaangte in, ‘Pathian in mihing sim hil tu hi,’ ci in at zo hi. A kuama po Pa ii hilna za a, ama kung pan heakna a ngate bek kei kungah hong pai hi." 
John6:46 Hisia ka ci ciang, khat po in, Pa mu ngei hi, cinopna hi ngawl hi; Pathian kung panin, hong pai sia bek in Pa mu ngei hi." 
John6:47 A maan takin kong ci hi: a um sia in tawntung nuntakna nga hi. 
John6:48 Keima in nuntakna anluum ka hi hi. 
John6:49 Na taanghpupite in sennealngam sungah manna ne uh hi, ahihang amate thi hi." 
John6:50 Ahihang vantung pan hong paisuk anluum sia nam tuam khat hi a, a ne peuma thi ngawl tu hi." 
John6:51 Keima in vantung pan hong pai a nungta anluum ka hi hi. Khat po in hi anluum a ne le nungta tawntung tu hi. Ama ka piak tu anluum in, leitung mite nuntak thei natu a, ka piak ka taksa ahi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John6:52 Hi thu in, amate sungah thin uuk in, kinialna kipansak hi. “Bangbangin hisia pa in, a taksa neak tu in, ei hong pia thei tu ziam?” ci uh hi." 
John6:53 Jesus in amate munah, “A maan takin kong ci hi: Mihing Tapa ii taksa na ne bua uh a, a chi na dawn bua uh le, note sungah nuntakna na nei buatu uh hi." 
John6:54 A kuama po ka taksa ne a, ka chi a dawnte in, tawntung nuntakna nga a, ni tawp khakbel ni ciangin nuntakna sungah ka thosak tu hi." 
John6:55 Banghang ziam cile ka taksa sia an tatak hi a, ka chi sia dawn tu tatak ahi hi." 
John6:56 Ka taksa ne a, ka chi a dawn pawpo in kei sungah teang a, kei amate sungah ka teang hi." 
John6:57 A nungta Pa in kei hong sawl a, ama hangin, kei zongh ka nungta hi. Tuasia bangma in, kei hong ne peuma kei hangin nungta tu hi." 
John6:58 Tua hi a, hisia in vantung pan hong paisuk anluum ahi hi; na taanghpupite neak anluum taw kibang ngawl hi. Amate in ne in thi veve hi, ahihang hi anluum a nete in, a tawntungin nungta tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
John6:59 Jesus in Capernaum khua synagogue ah hi teng hil hi. 
John6:60 A nungzuite tam mama in hi thu za uh a, “Hi kihilcianna sia haksa leih hi. Akua in hi thu ngai zo thong tu ziam,” ci uh hi." 
John6:61 Kuama ii son ngawl bulin, Jesus in amate ii phunna thu he ahikom, amate munah, “Hisia in, na thin uh hong kiamsak tu ziam?”" 
John6:62 “Tua le, sonteena, Mihing Tapa sia ama om maksakna munah a paito kik mu le uhte bang na ci tu uh ziam?" 
John6:63 Nuntakna a pia sia Pathian ii Thaa ahi hi; mihing thahatna in mannung mama ngawl hi. No tungah ka pau sa kammalte in nuntakna a pia Pathian ii Thaa hong tut ahi hi. 
John6:64 Ahihang no pawlkhat in um ngawl nu hi,” ci hi. (Jesus in a kipatciil pan ma, akua teng in um ngawl tu a, akua in ama leeheak tu cisia a heaksa ahi hi.)" 
John6:65 Tuaciangin ama in “Ama ii tuabang ahithei natu in, Pa in vawt buale, kuama kei kungah hong pai thei ngawl tu hi, kong cisia, hisia hang mama ahi hi,” ci thua lai hi." 
John6:66 Hisia hangin, Jesus ii nung a zuite tam mama heak kik uh a, ama taw tonkhawm nawn ngawl hi." 
John6:67 Tua ahiciang, nungzui sawm le niite munah ama in “No zongh, nong nusia nuam tu uh ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
John6:68 Simon Peter in, “Topa awng, akua kung pai tu khu ziam? Tawntung nuntakna a pia kammalte nangma in na nei hi." 
John6:69 Tuaciangin nang sia Pathian kung pan hong pai, a Thiangtho Pa na hi hunlam tu in kong he uh a, kong um uh hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John6:70 Jesus in, “No sawm le nii teng, keima kong teal hi kana ngawl nu ziam? Tua hi napi, no sungah khat sia doai ahi hi,” ci hi." 
John6:71 Ama in Simon Iscariot ii tapa Judas huvau son ahi hi. Banghang ziam cile Judas sia nungzui sawm le nii sungah khat hi napi ama a leeheak tu pa ahi hi. 
John7:1 Tua zawkciang, Galilee ngam sungah Jesus khualhaw hi; ama in Judea ngam sungah khualhaw nuam ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile, tuasung a om Jew thuneite in ama thatlum nuam uh hi." 
John7:1 Tua zawkciang, Galilee ngam sungah Jesus khualhaw hi; ama in Judea ngam sungah khualhaw nuam ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile, tuasung a om Jew thuneite in ama thatlum nuam uh hi." 
John7:2 Buk Poai hun nai zo hi," 
John7:3 tua ahikom Jesus munah a suapuite in, “Nang nung hong zuite in na vawvawt nate hong mu thei natu, hi mun nusia in Judea ah va pai ta'n." 
John7:3 tua ahikom Jesus munah a suapuite in, “Nang nung hong zuite in na vawvawt nate hong mu thei natu, hi mun nusia in Judea ah va pai ta'n." 
John7:4 Ngual heak tu a nuam sia in, a sepna a sealcip bua hi. Hi bang nate seam na hi ciang na thu leitung bup in hesak lete pha hi!” ci uh hi." 
John7:5 (A suapuipate ngawngawn in ama a um bua uh hi.) 
John7:6 Jesus in amate munah “Kei atu in a hun hong tung ngawl lai hi. Hun khat pawpo sia noma hun ahi hi. 
John7:7 Leitung in note hong ensan thei ngawl tu hi, ahihang kei hong ensan hi, banghang ziam cile, amate ii paiziate pha ngawl hi, ci in ka son tawntung hi." 
John7:8 Poai ah noma pai tavun. Hi poai ah kei pai ngawl tu khi hi, banghang ziam cile kei atu in a hun hong tung ngawl lai hi,” ci hi." 
John7:9 Hi teng ci in Galilee ah taam thua hi. 
John7:10 A suapuipate poai siim tu in a pai zawkciang, Jesus zongh pai hi; ahihang a kilangh ngawlin pai ku hi." 
John7:11 Jew thuneite in, poai sungah ama zong uh hi. Amate in “Ama a koisungah om ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
John7:12 Mihon sungah ama huvau kihuau tek uh hi. Pawlkhat in “Ama mihing pha khat hi,” ci hi. A dangte in “Hi ngawl hi, ama in mihingte lamlak khial hi,” ci uh hi." 
John7:13 Ahihang kuama in ama thu a kilangh in a son ngam bua uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate in Jew thuneite kiita uh hi." 
John7:14 Poai a lang bang a kiman zawkciang, Biakinn ah Jesus pai in hilcianna kipan hi." 
John7:15 Jew thuneite in lamdang sa mama uh a, “Bangbangin hisia pa in, sang ah sinna bangma nei ngeingawl napi hiza in he ziam?” ci uh hi." 
John7:16 Jesus in, “Kei kong hil thu in keima aituam hilcianna hi ngawl a, kei hong sawlpa Pathian kung pan hong pai hi." 
John7:17 Pathian dei bang a ngamta nuamte peuma in, Pathian kung pan hong pai thu ziam, tua ahibuale keima aituam thuneina taw hil khi ziam, he tu hi." 
John7:18 Ama aituam thuneina taw a paupa sia, ama atu bek minthanna nga nuam a hanciam ahi hi. Ahihang a sawlpa ii minthan natu a deisakpa sia thumaan a, ama sungah leilot thu a om bua hi." 
John7:19 Moses in note Thukham hong pia hi ngawl ziam? Ahihang note kuama in tua Thukham na zui bua uh hi. Kei banghangin thalup hong sawm nu ziam?” ci in zo kik hi. 
John7:20 Mihonte in “Na sungah doai khat om hi! Akua in nang hong thatlum nuamin hanciam na ziam?” ci in zo uh hi. 
John7:21 Jesus in, “Nalamdang lakna khat kong vawt a, lamdang mama na sa uh hi." 
John7:22 Moses in na tapate ii vunteap at natu in thu hong pia hi, (tua nasep a pan sia in Moses hi ngawl a, na taanghpupite ahi hi), tua ahikom Sabbath ni in patang khat ii vunteap na at uh hi." 
John7:23 Patang khat Sabbath ni in vunteap na atsak uh ciangin, Moses Thukham paltan kisa ngawl na hi uh le, Sabbath ni in mihing khat ka dam thiangthosak hu in, banghangin kei tungah thin uuk nu ziam?" 
John7:24 A puatham munate taw thukhennate kheal vun, thumaan munate taw thukhen vun,” ci in zo hi." 
John7:25 Jerusalem a om mihing pawlkhat in, “Thuneite ii hanciamin a thalup nop uh sia, hisia pa hi ngawl ziam?" 
John7:26 En vun! mipi mai ah a kilangh in a pau ciang zong, amate in ama langpanna kam bangma pau ngawl hi! Ama Messiah hi ci in amate in tel takpi ahithei tu ziam?" 
John7:27 Ahihang Messiah hong pai ciang ahile, ama koisung pan hong pai ci sia kuama in he ngawl tu hi. Hisia pa ahile hong paina ih he tek hi,” ci uh ih." 
John7:28 Jesus in Biakinnpi sungah a hil laitakin, awnging taw, “Kei hong he takpi nu ziam, tuaciang kei koisung pan hong pai ci in hong he nu ziam? Keima aituam thuneina taw hong pai ngawl khi hi. Ahizong kei hong sawlpa ahile thumaan hi. Note in ama na he bua uh hi," 
John7:29 ahihang keima in ka he hi, banghang ziam cile, ama kung pan kong pai a, ama in hong sawl hi,” ci hi." 
John7:30 Tuasia ciangin amate in Jesus man tu in hanciam ahihang kuama in ama a thutha bua uh hi, banghang ziam cile ama hun tung ngawl lai hi." 
John7:31 Ahihang mihon sung pan, mihing tam mama in ama um a, “Messiah hong pai ciang, ama in hisia pa ii vawtte sangin a tamzaw nalamdang laknate, a vawt tu ziam,” ci uh hi." 
John7:32 Pharisee te in Jesus huvau mihonte ii kihuauna uh a zaak uh ciang, amate le thiampite in, Jesus a man tu in, biakinn cingte paisak uh hi." 
John7:33 Jesus in, “No taw tawmvei sung kong omkhawm lai tu a, tua zawkciang, kei hong sawlpa kungah ka pai tu hi." 
John7:34 Kei nong zong tu uh a, ahihang nong mu buatu uh hi, banghang ziam cile, kei om natu munah no na pai thei buatu uh hi,” ci hi." 
John7:35 Jew thuneite in, amate teng kikum uh a, “Ei mu ngawl tu in, ama koisung pai sawm ziam? Ih mihingte teenna Greek khuapite ah ama pai in, Greek mite hilcian tu ziam?" 
John7:36 Eite in ama ih zon hang ama ih mu buatu a, ama om natu munah ei pai thei ngawl tu hong ci hi. Bang a cinopna hi tu ziam?” ci uh hi." 
John7:37 A thupibel ni poai khaam tawp ni in, Jesus dingto in awnging tak taw, “A kuama po a dangkote kei kungah hong pai in tui dawn tahen." 
John7:38 Laithiangtho ii ci bangma in, kei hong um peuma in ama sung pan nuntakna a pia luitui hong luang tu hi,” ci hi." 
John7:39 Jesus in hi bang a pau sia ama a umte ii saan tu Thaa thu son ahi hi. Tua hun laitakin Thaa kipia ngawl lai hi, banghang ziam cile minthanna sungah Jesus kithosak ngawl lai hi." 
John7:40 Mihon sung pan, mihing pawlkhat in, hi thu a son za a, “Hisia pa in Kamsaang tatak sia hi!” ci uh hi." 
John7:41 A dangte in, “Ama Messiah hi!” ci uh hi. Ahihang a dangte in, “Messiah sia Galilee pan hong pai ngawl tu hi." 
John7:42 Laithiangtho ii ci bangin Messiah sia David Kumpipa suan hi tu a, David teenna khua ahi Bethlehem ah suak tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
John7:43 Tua ahikom Jesus hangin, mihonte sungah kikhenna om hi." 
John7:44 Pawlkhat in Jesus man nuam ahihang kuama in ama a thutha bua hi. 
John7:45 Biakinn cingte hong heak kik uh ciang, thiampi liante le Phariseete in, “Banghangin ama hong paipui ngawl nu ziam,” ci in dongh uh hi." 
John7:46 Biakinn cingte in, “Hisia pa bangin, kuama kampau ngei om ngawl hi,” ci uh hi." 
John7:47 Pharisee te in “Ama in no zongh hong theam ahi ziam?” ci in dongh hi. 
John7:48 “Thuneite khat ahibuale Pharisee te khat in ama um hi ci in na he ngei uh ziam? 
John7:49 Hi mihonte in Moses Thukham he ngawl ahikom amate Pathian ii haamsiatna nuai ah a om uh hi!” ci uh hi. 
John7:50 Tua munah a om Pharisee te khat sia Jesus taw kimu tu in, a pai ngeipa Nicodemus ahi hi. Ama in a dangte munah," 
John7:51 “Ih Thukham bangin ci leang, mihing khat sia bang ngamtatna teng nei ci, ih sit ih mu mateng in, ih mawsak thei bua hi,” ci hi." 
John7:52 Amate in, “Tua ahile pha hi. Nang zongh Galilee pan ma na hi ziam? Laithiangtho pha takin sim lete, Galilee pan kamsaang hong pai ngeingawl hi, ci in na he tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
John8:1 [Tua zawkciang ngual theampo cia siat ahihang Jesus in, Olive Mualtung ah pai hi." 
John8:2 A zing ciang zing tuungin ama Biakinnpi ah pai kik hi. Mihing theampo ama ii kiim ah kikhawmtua uh a, tuaciangin ama to in amate hilcian tu in kipan hi." 
John8:3 Thukham hil syate le Phariseete in, numei le pa palngul khialna a vawt laitak a mat uh numei khat hong paipui uh a, amate theampo ii mai ah, dingsak hi." 
John8:4 Amate in Jesus munah, “Syapa awng, hi numei nu sia numei le pa palngul khialna a vawt laitakin kiman hi." 
John8:5 Ih Thukham sungah Moses in tuabang numei khat sia suang taw denlup natu in thupia hi. Tu in bang na ci tu ziam?” ci uh hi. 
John8:6 Amate in hi bangin a ci uh sia Jesus a mawsiat thei natu in a aitaana hi. Ahihang ama kunin, a khutme taw lei ah lai at hi." 
John8:7 Amate in tuabangin thu a dok ciang, ama hong dingmaam a, amate tungah, “Note sungah akua po ahizong, mawna a vawt ngeingawl het sia in ama suang taw deang masa tahen,” ci hi." 
John8:8 Tua zawkciang, kunsuk kikin lei ah lai at kik hi," 
John8:9 Amate in hi thu a zaak ciangin, nusia siat uh hi, khanghaam teng masa in, khat zawkciang khat a vekpi cia uh hi. Tua munah a ding lai numei le Jesus bek taang hi." 
John8:10 Jesus dingmaam in, ama munah, “Amate koisung om siat ziam? Nang hong mawsak tu kuama om nawn ngawl ziam,” ci hi." 
John8:11 “Kuama om nawn ngawl hi, Topa awng,” ci in ama in zo hi. “Tua ahile pha hi, kei zongh in, kong mawsak bua hi. Pai ta'n, ahihang mawna vawt kik nawn heak in,” ci hi.]" 
John8:12 Jesus in Phariseete tungah, “Keima in leitung khuavak ka hi hi. Kei hong zuite peuma in nuntakna khuavak nei tu a, khuazing sungah a vak ngei buatu hi,” ci hi." 
John8:13 Pharisee te in, “Tu in nangma le nangma tetti a kipang hi bek ni hi; na sonte in bangma a maan thu lak tuan ngawl hi,” ci uh hi." 
John8:14 Jesus in, “Hi ngawl hi, keima le keima tetti kipang hi leng zong, ka thuson teng maan hi, banghang ziam cile koisung pan kong pai a, koisung zuan tu khi ziam ka kihe hi. Kei koisung pan hong pai a, koisung zuan tu ci sia note in nong he bua uh hi." 
John8:15 Note in mihing pianzia taw bek thu na khen uh hi; kei in kuama tungah thu ka khen bua hi. 
John8:16 Ahihang tuabangin vawt tu hi leng zong, ka thukhenna maan tu hi, banghang ziam cile hisia sungah kei nguak hi ngawl khi hi; kei hong sawl Pa in keima taw omkhawm hi." 
John8:17 Noma ii thukham sungah tetti nii in a thukim ciang amate ii son sia maan hi, ci in ki at hi." 
John8:18 Keima le keima tetti in ka kipang a, hong sawl Pa zongh in kei luangin tetti hong pang hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John8:19 “Na pa koisung om ziam?” ci in amate in dongh uh hi. Jesus in, “Keima ahizong, ka Pa ahizong, na he bua uh hi. Keima hong he le uhte ka Pa zongh he tu nu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John8:20 Jesus in hi thute theampo, Biakinn sung sumpi bungte koina inndoi sungah a hilcian laitakin a son ahi hi. Tuaciangin ama kuama in a man bua uh hi, banghang ziam cile ama ii hun a tung bualai hi." 
John8:21 Tuaciang Jesus in, “Kei ka pai tu hi; nong zong tu uh a, ahizong na mawnate sungah na thi tu uh hi. Ka pai natu munah, na pai thei buatu uh hi,” ci hi." 
John8:22 Tua ahikom Jew thuneite in, “Ama paina ah ei pai thei ngawl tu hi ci hi. Ama le ama kithatlum tu a cinopna ziam,” ci uh hi." 
John8:23 “Note sia hi leitung, hisung a nuaisang ii neisa na hi uh hi, ahihang kei sia tungsang pan hong pai ka hi hi. No sia hi leitung pan na hi uh a, ahihang kei sia hi leitung pan ka hi bua hi." 
John8:24 Na mawnate sungah thi tu nu hi, kong ci sia tua hang ahi hi. Tuaciangin, ‘Keima sia keima ka hi hi,’ ci in nong um bua uh le, na mawnate sungah na thi tu uh hi,” ci in Jesus in zo hi." 
John8:25 “Nang akua ni ziam,” ci in amate in dongh uh hi. Jesus in, “A kipatciil pan ma a, kong sonsa sia ka hi hi." 
John8:26 No ii tungtaang ah ka pau tu tam mama, kong mawsak natu tam mama ka nei hi. Ahizong kei hong sawlpa thumaan a, tuaciangin, ama tung pan ka zaaksa teng bekma leitung ah ka son hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John8:27 Jesus in Pa thu sawson ahi hunlam amate in a tel bua uh hi. 
John8:28 Tua ahikom ama in amate tungah, “Mihing Tapa na lapto uh ciangin, ‘Keima sia Keima ka hi’ hunlam na he tu uh hi; tuasia ciangin, keima aituam thuneina taw bangma vawt ngawlin, Pa hong sawl bang bekin, pau ka hi sia nong he tu uh hi." 
John8:29 Tuaciangin kei hong sawlpa in kei hong ompui hi; kei nguak hong nusia bua hi. Banghang ziam cile, ama diksakte ka vawt tawntung hi,” ci hi." 
John8:30 Jesus ii a son thu teng a za mihing tam mama in ama um uh hi. 
John8:31 Tua ahikom Jesus in, ama a umte munah, “Ka hilciannate na ni uh le, ka nungzui tatakte na hi uh hi;" 
John8:32 thumaan thutak na he tu a, tua thumaan thutakin no hong suaktasak tu hi,” ci hi." 
John8:33 Amate in, “Ko in Abraham suante hi a, kuama ii sila hi ngeingawl khu hi. Tua hi a, ‘Na suakta tu uh hi’ na ci sia bang na cinopna ziam,” ci in zo hi." 
John8:34 Jesus in, “A maan takin kong ci ciang, a kuama po mawna a vawt theampo in mawna ii sila ahi hi." 
John8:35 Sila khat sia bangkua khat ii neisa hi tawntung ngawl hi, ahihang tapa khat ahile bangkua khat ii neisa hi tawntung hi." 
John8:36 Tapa in hong suaktasak le na suakta takpi tu uh hi," 
John8:37 Abraham suan le paalte na hi uh sia kong he hi. Tua hi kasap kei hong thatlum nuamin hanciam nu hi, banghang ziam cile ka hilcianna na saang thei buatu uh hi." 
John8:38 Kei sia ka Pa ii hong lak bang teng ka pau a, no sia na pa uh hong sawl teng na seam uh hi,” ci hi." 
John8:39 Amate in, “Ko ii pa sia Abraham hi,” ci in zo uh hi. Jesus in, “Abraham ii tate hi takpi le uhte, ama ii vawt teng ma vawt tu nu hi." 
John8:40 Pathian tung pan ka zaak thumaan sia ma kong son hi bek napi, hong thatlum nuamin hanciam nu hi. Abraham sia hi bangin ngamta ngawl hi!" 
John8:41 Note in, na pa sep teng na seam uh hi,” ci in zo kik hi. “Pathian bekma, kote ii khat bek ka nei ka Pa uh hi a, tuaciangin ko sia ama tate tatak ka hi uh hi,” ci in amate in zo uh hi." 
John8:42 Jesus in, “Pathian sia na Pa uh ahi takpi le kei nong it natu ahi hi, banghang ziam cile, Pathian kung panin kong pai a, tu in hi munah ka om hi. Keima aituam thuneina taw hong pai ka hi bua a, ama ii hong sawl ka hi hi." 
John8:43 Ka son teng banghangin tel ngawl nu ziam? Banghang ziam cile kong thu puak sia na ngai zawk ngawl uh hang ahi hi. 
John8:44 No sia na pa uh doaimangpa ii tate na hi uh a, tuaciangin na pa uh ii deinate na zui nuam uh hi. A kipatciil pan kipan, ama sia mi thatpa hi a, thumaan sangah a pang ngei bua hi, banghang ziam cile, ama sungah thumaan thutak a om bua hi. Ama in leilot thu a son ciangin, ama pianzia bangin pau ahi lel hi, banghang ziam cile, ama sia leilot thei pa hi a, leilotna theampo ii a pa ahi hi." 
John8:45 Ahihang kei in thumaan kong son hi, tua hu in nong um bua uh hi." 
John8:46 No sungah akua in kei sia mawnei hi ci in hong lak thei tu nu ziam? Thumaan a son ka hi nale, banghangin hong um ngawl nu ziam?" 
John8:47 Pathian kung pan hong pai pa in, Pathian kammalte ngai hi. Ahizong no sia Pathian kung pan na hi bua uh a, tua hu in hong ngai nuam ngawl nu hi,” ci hi." 
John8:48 Amate in Jesus munah, “Nang sia Samaria mi hi a, doai vei ni hi kong ci uh sia, maan hi ngawl khu ziam,” ci uh hi." 
John8:49 Jesus in, “Doai vei ngawl khi hi, ka Pa ka thasia hi, ahihang note in kei nong thasia bua uh hi." 
John8:50 Keima atu in patoaina ka zong bua hi. Ahihang tuabangin zong a, kei hong panpui in thu a khen khat om hi." 
John8:51 A maan takin kong ci hi: a kuama po ka hilcianna a nite, a thi ngei buatu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John8:52 Amate in, “Tu in nang sia doai vei na hi hunlam kong telcian uh hi! Abraham thi a, kamsaangte zongh thi hi, tua hi napi na hilcianna a nite peuma thi ngeingawl tu hi, ci ni hi." 
John8:53 Ih pa Abraham thi zo hi; Abraham sangin lianzaw khi hi a ci nuam na hi bua na ziam? Tuaciangin kamsaangte zongh thi zo hi. Nang akua kisa ni ziam,” ci uh hi." 
John8:54 Jesus in, “Keima le keima ki upat tu hi leng, tua ki upatna sia, bangma man nei ngawl tu hi. Kei hong upat sia in ka Pa hi a, ka Pathian uh hi, na ci sia pa ma ahi hi." 
John8:55 No sia ama na he ngei bua uh hi, ahihang kei in ka he hi. Ama he ngawl khi hi, ci tu hi leng, noma bangma in a leilot ka suak tu hi. Ahihang ama ka heak hi a, tuaciangin ama ii thu ka ni hi." 
John8:56 Na pa uh Abraham in kong pai hun a mu tu sia lawp hi; ama in mu zo a, a lungdam hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John8:57 Amate in ama munah, “Nang kum sawmnga zongh pha ngawl lai ni hi — Abraham sia mu zo ni ziam?” ci uh hi." 
John8:58 A maan takin kong ci hi, “Abraham pian ma in, ‘Keima’ ka om zo hi,” ci in Jesus in zo kik hi." 
John8:59 Tuasia ciangin, amate in a den natu suangte zamh ahihang Jesus kiheam a, Biakinnpi nusia hi." 
John9:1 Jesus in lam a papai laitakin, mittaw sa a, a suak, pasal khat mu hi." 
John9:2 A nungzuite in, “Syapa awng, akua mawna hangin, ama mittaw sa a suaksak ziam? Ama mawna hang ziam maw, a nu a pate ii mawna hang ziam,” ci in ama dongh uh hi." 
John9:3 “Ama mawnate hang ahizong, a nu a pa mawnate hang ahizong, a mittaw hi ngawl hi. Pathian ii vaangletna ii nasepna ama sungah a kimu thei natu in a mittaw hi." 
John9:4 Sun hun laiteng in kei hong sawlpa na ih sep kul tu hi; kuama ii na a sep thei ngawl zan hun hong theng tu hi. 
John9:5 Leitung ah ka om laiteng, leitung atu in khuavak ka hi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John9:6 Hi bangin a ci zawkciang, Jesus in lei ah cilsia a, ciltee taw buan thau hi; ama in mittawpa ii mit buan noisak a," 
John9:7 tuaciang, “Va pai ta'n a, Siloam Tuicing ah na mai phiat ta'n,” ci hi. (Siloam cisia “Kisawl” a cinopna hi). Tua ahikom mittawpa pai in, a mai a phia zawkciang, khuamu thei sa in hong heak kik hi." 
John9:8 Tuasia ciangin a innpaamte le ama khutdaw ngenin a om lai a mu ngeite in, “Hisia pa sia khutdaw ngenin a to bul pa hi ngawl ziam?” ci uh hi." 
John9:9 Pawlkhat in, “Ama hi peu hi,” ci hi, ahihang a dangte in “Ama hi ngawl hi; a kibanpui khat hi bek hi,” ci uh hi. Tua ahikom pasalpa in, “Keima in tuasia pa khi hi,” ci hi." 
John9:10 “Tu in khua na mu thei sia bangbang tatak ziam?” ci in amate in dongh uh hi. 
John9:11 Ama in “Jesus a kici pa in buan tawm vawt a, ka mitte hong noisak zawkciang, Siloam ah na maiphiat ta'n, hong ci hi. Tua ahikom, pai a, ka mai ka phia zawk po ciangin, khua ka mu thei hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John9:12 Amate in “Ama koisungah om ziam,” ci in dongh uh hi. Ama in “He ngawl khi hi,” ci hi." 
John9:13 Tuaciang amate in a mittaw ngeipa sia, Phariseete kungah paipui uh hi." 
John9:14 Jesus in buan vawt a mittawpa a damsak ni sia Sabbath ni ahi hi. 
John9:15 Tuasia ciang Phariseete in a mit khua a mu kik theina thu, pasalpa munah dongh kik uh hi. “Ama in ka mitte buan hong noisak hi; ka mai ka phiat a, tu in khua ka mu thei hi,” ci in ama in zo hi." 
John9:16 Phariseete pawlkhat in, “Hi bang a vawt, mihing in, Pathian kung pan hi thei ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile ama in Sabbath Thukham ni ngawl hi,” ci uh hi. Ahizong a dangte in, “Bangbangin mawnei mi khat in, hi bang nalamdang laknate vawt thei tu ziam,” ci uh hi. Tuaciangin amate sungah pawl kikhenna khat hong om hi." 
John9:17 Tua ahikom, Phariseete in pasalpa khatvei ma dongh kik uh hi. “Ama in na khuamu ngawlna pan hong damsak hi, ci ni hi — ama huvau bangbangin na ngaisun ziam?” “Ama kamsaang khat hi,” ci in pasalpa in zo kik hi." 
John9:18 Jew thuneite in, bang po ahizong hisia pa mittaw a, tu in khuamu thei hi ci thu, a pa le a nu samin a dok phot ngawl peuma in a um nuam bua uh hi;" 
John9:19 tuaciangin, “Hisia na tapa ahi ziam? Ama mittaw sa in suak hi ci nu hi; tua ahile tu in bangbang khuamu thei ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
John9:20 A pa le a nu in “Ama ka tapa uh hi a, tuaciangin mittaw sa in suak ci sia he khu hi." 
John9:21 Ahihang bangbangin tu in khuamu thei a, akua in damsak ziam ci zongh ka he bua uh hi. Ama dongh vun; a khan haam zo hi, ama ii thu ama in hong zo thei hi!” ci uh hi." 
John9:22 Jew biakna thuneite ii lungkimna sa khat om a, a kuama po Jesus sia Messiah hi ci in a um peuma, synagogue sung pan kihawlkhia tu hi, ci ahikom amate in Jew biakna thuneite a kiitak hu in, a nu le a pa in hi bangin ci ahi hi." 
John9:23 Tua hangin, “Ama a khan haam zo hi, ama dongh vun!” a nu le a pa in ci hi." 
John9:24 Mittaw sa a suakpa sia, a nii veina sam kik uh a, ama tungah, “Thumaan ka son tu hi, ci in Pathian mai ah kiciam in! Nang hong damsak pa sia, mimaw khat hi ci in he khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
John9:25 “Ama mimaw ahile ahi ngawl he ngawl khi hi. Ka heak thu khat sia: ka mittaw ngei a, tu in khua ka mu hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
John9:26 “Ama in bang hong law ziam? Na khuamu ngawlna pan, bangbangin hong damsak ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
John9:27 “Kong son zo a, noma in nong ngai bua uh hi. Banghangin za kikik nuam nu ziam? No zongh ama nungzuite suak nuam nu ziam?” ci in ama in zo hi." 
John9:28 Amate in ama lang a, “Tuasia pa nungzui sia nangma ni hi; ko sia Moses ii nungzuite khu hi." 
John9:29 Pathian in Moses paupui hi, ci in he khu hi; ahizong ziasia pa ahile koisung pan hong pai ziam, ci sia he beak ngawl khu hi!” ci uh hi." 
John9:30 Tua pa in, “Bangza in a lamdang thu ziam! Ama koisung pan hong pai ziam ci in he ngawl nu hi, ahihang ama in kei sia ka khuamu ngawlna pan hong damsak zo hi." 
John9:31 Pathian in mimawte ii ngetna ngai ngawl hi, ci in ih he hi; ama in ama zakta a, a sawlna bang a seamte ngetna bek ngai hi." 
John9:32 Simlei pianciil pan kipan, mittaw sa in a suak khat sia khua muna a pia kuama ii thu kiza ngeingawl hi." 
John9:33 Hisia pa Pathian kung pan hong pai hi buale, bangma vawt thei ngawl tu hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John9:34 Amate in, “Nang sia mawna sungah suak a, mawna sung ma a khangto ni hi — ko hong hil tu in hanciam ni ziam?” ci in zo uh hi. Tuaciangin amate in ama synagogue panin hawlkhia uh hi." 
John9:35 Jesus in bang thu teng piang ci in a zaak zawkciang, tuasia pa mu a, “Mihing Tapa na um ziam,” ci in dongh hi." 
John9:36 “Syapa awng, ka up thei natu in ama akua ziam hong son ta'n,” ci in zo hi." 
John9:37 Jesus in, “Ama mu zo ni hi, ama sia tu laitak nangma taw a kipaupui sia ahi hi,” ci hi." 
John9:38 “Ka um hi, Topa awng!” ci in Jesus mai ah ama khupdin hi." 
John9:39 Jesus in, “Mittawte khua a mu natu le khuamute mittaw a sua natu in, hi leitung ah thukhen tu in kong pai hi,” ci hi." 
John9:40 Ama kung a om Pharisee mi pawlkhat in, tu bang a pau za a, “Koma zongh mittaw hi hong ci nuam na hi bua na ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
John9:41 Jesus in, “Mittaw hizaw le uh te, a maw ngawl hi tu nu hi; ahihang khuamu thei khu hi, ci na hi uh kom, a maw nginge hi lai nu hi,” ci hi." 
John10:1 Jesus in, “A tatakin kong ci hi: tuukhawk sungah a kongpi pan tum ngawlin leidang pan kaato a, a tum sia nguta le ngualsuam phalakte ahi hi." 
John10:2 Kongpi pan a tum sia in, tuucingpa ahi hi." 
John10:3 Kongkhacingpa in ama atu kongkha honsak hi; ama ii neisa tuute a min taw a sam ciangin a tuute in ama aw a za uh hi, tuaciang ama in, a tuute lampui in pusua pui hi." 
John10:4 A tuute a pusuasak zawkciang, ama in a mai ah pai in, tuute in a nung zui uh hi, banghang ziam cile a tuute in a aw tel uh hi." 
John10:5 A tuute in ngualdang khat zui ngawl tu uh hi; tuabang mihing dang khat ii kung panin a tuute taikeak zaw tu hi, banghang ziam cile tuute in tua pa aw a tel bua uh hi,” ci hi." 
John10:6 Jesus in hi thu sonteena son ahihang, amate in bang ci nuam ziam, a tel zo bua uh hi." 
John10:7 Tua ahikom Jesus in hi bangin ci kik hi. “A tatakin kong ci hi: Kei sia tuute ii kongpi ka hi hi. 
John10:8 Kei mai a hong pai sa theampo sia ngutate le phalakte ahi uh hi, ahihang tuute in, amate aw a ngai bua uh hi." 
John10:9 Keima in kongpi ka hi hi. A kuama po kei hong tawnin a tumte kingum tu hi; amate sungtang si, pusuak si tu a, nganthana mun mu tu hi." 
John10:10 Ngutapa ahile a ngu tu, a that tu le a susia tu bekma in hong pai hi. Kei kong paina sia, nuntakna na nga natu uh le a kicing nuntakna na nga thei natu uh ahi hi." 
John10:11 “Keima in tuute atu in a nuntakna a pia ngam tuucing pha ka hi hi. 
John10:12 Tuu neipa a hi ngawl, a kicial tawm tuucingpa ahile ngiapui hong pai a mu ciangin, a tuute nusia in taisan hi; tua ahikom ngiapui in a tuute man a, kithethaangsak hi." 
John10:13 A kicial tawm pa banghangin tai ziam cile, ama sia a kicial tawm hi bek a, tuute a awlmawk bua hi." 
John10:14 Keima in tuucing pha ka hi hi. Pa in kei hong heak bangma in kei zongh in Pa ka he hi, tuasia bangma in ka tuute ka he a, amate in kei hong he uh hi. Amate atu in ka nuntakna ka pia ngam hi." 
John10:15  
John10:16 Hi tuukhawk sung a om ngawl keima neisa tuu dangte zongh om lai hi. Tuate zongh ka paipui kul hi; amate in ka aw hong ngai tu a, tuucingpa khat ii a cin tuuhon khat suak tu uh hi." 
John10:17 “Ka nuntakna ka nga kik natu in, keima nuntakna pia ngam ka hikomin, Pa in kei hong it hi." 
John10:18 Kuama in kei kung pan ka nuntakna hong laaksak bua hi. Keima uuk thu in ka piak ahi hi. Ka piak tu le ka laak kik tu sia keima thu ahi hi. Hisia in ka Pa ii ka sep tu hong thupiak ahi hi,” ci hi." 
John10:19 Tuaciang hi kammalte hu in mihingte sungah kikhenna om leleau hi. 
John10:20 Amate sung pan tam mama in, “Ama doaivei hi! Ama a thin amh hi! Banghangin a thuson ngangai nu ziam?” ci uh hi." 
John10:21 Ahihang a dangte in, “Doaivei pa khat in hi bangin thuson thei ngawl hi! Banghang doai khat in mittawte khuamu kiksak thei tu ziam,” ci uh hi." 
John10:22 Phalbi hun hi a, Biakinnpi Aapna Poai Jerusalem ah a kivawt hunsung ahi hi." 
John10:23 Jesus sia Biakinn huang sung Solomon Talaap sungah a vavak laitakin," 
John10:24 mihingte a kiim ah hong kikhawm uh a, amate in, “Bang tanvei thinngim hong pia tu ni ziam? Thumaan tatak sia hong son tan: nangma sia Messiah na hi ziam,” ci uh hi." 
John10:25 Jesus in “Hong son zo khi hi, ahihang kei hong um nuam ngawl nu hi. Ka Pa thuneina taw ka septe in keima luangin pau hi;" 
John10:26 ahihang nong um bua uh hi, banghang ziam cile note in ka tuute na hi bua uh hi," 
John10:27 Ka tuute in ka aw hong ngai hi; amate ka he a, amate in ka nung hong zui uh hi." 
John10:28 Amate tawntung nuntakna ka pia a, tuaciangin amate a thi ngei nawn buatu hi. Amate ka khut sung panin kuama in hong sut zo buatu hi." 
John10:29 Ka Pa hong piak sia na theampo sangin thupi zaw a, kuama in Pa ii kepcingna sung panin a sut zo buatu hi." 
John10:30 Pa le keima in pumkhat ka hi uh hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John10:31 Tuaciang mihingte in ama a den natu suang tawm kik uh hi. 
John10:32 “Ka Pa ii sep tu hong piak na pha tam mama noma mai ah kong seam zo hi; tuate sung pan koisia ka sep hu in, suang taw den hong sawm nu ziam?” Jesus in ci hi." 
John10:33 Amate in “Na pha khat pawpo nasep hu in, hong deang nuam hi ngawl khu hi. Ahihang Pathian zawnsakna kam na pau hu in suang taw hong deang nuam khu hi! Nang sia mihing ma hi napi nangma le nangma Pathian in kivawt tu na hanciam hi,” ci in zo kik uh hi." 
John10:34 Jesus in “Na Thukham sungah ki at a, Pathian in ‘Note sia pathiante hi nu hi’, hong ci hi." 
John10:35 Laithiangtho ii ci sia a tawntungin maan hi, ci in ih he hi; tuaciang Pathian ii thupuak a nga tua mite sia ‘pathiante’ ci hi." 
John10:36 Kei ka hile Pa in hong teal a, leitung ah hong paisak hi. Tua ahile, Pathian Tapa khi hi ka ci ciang, bangbangin Pathian zawnsakna kam pau hi hong ci thei nu ziam?" 
John10:37 Pa ii seam a hong oaite seam ngawl ka hile, tuasia ciangin hong um heak vun." 
John10:38 Ahihang tuate ma ka seam nale, Pa sia kei sungah om a, kei sia Pa sungah om ka hina thu na up thei natu in, kei nong um bua uh zong, ka septe beak na up tu uh ahi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John10:39 Khatvei ma amate in Jesus man tu in hanciam ahihang, amate khut taw kipeal hi." 
John10:40 Tua zawkciang Jesus in, Jordan ngun kaantan in John ii tuiphumna munah pai kik a, tua munah taam hi." 
John10:41 Mihing tam mama ama kungah hong pai uh hi. Amate in, “John in nalamdang laknate vawt ngawl hi. Ahihang hisia pa thu ama son theampo maan hi,” ci uh hi." 
John10:42 Tuaciang in, tua munah a om mihing tam mama in ama um uh hi." 
John11:1 Bethany ah a teang Lazarus a kici pa a cina hi. Tua Bethany sia Mary le a suapuinu Martha ii teenna khua ahi hi. 
John11:2 (Hi Mary sia Topa ii peang tungah sathau namtui buak a, a sam taw a nawlsak sia nu ahi hi. A cina Lazarus sia ama ii suapuipa ahi hi.)" 
John11:3 Unau numeite nii in Jesus tungah zasak a, “Topa awng, na it na lawmpa a cina hi,” ci uh hi." 
John11:4 Jesus in a zaak ciangin, “Hi natna sia Lazarus ii thi natu natna hi ngawl hi; hi thu in Pathian minthan natu a piang hi a, tuaciang, tua tungtawnin Pathian Tapa ii minthanna a nga natu ahi hi,” ci hi." 
John11:5 Martha, a suapuinu le Lazarus te sia Jesus in it hi." 
John11:6 Tua hi napi Lazarus ii natna thu a zaak zawk zong, ama omna tua munah ni nii taam lai hi." 
John11:7 Tua zawkciang a nungzuite munah, “Judea ngam ah pai kik tawng,” ci hi." 
John11:7 Tua zawkciang a nungzuite munah, “Judea ngam ah pai kik tawng,” ci hi." 
John11:8 A nungzuite in, “Syapa awng, tu nung hiat ma in, tua munah mihingte in suang taw hong deang nuam zo hi; pai kik sawm lai ni ziam?” ci in zo uh hi." 
John11:9 Jesus in, “Ni khat sungin, nai sawm le nai nii om hi kana ngawl ziam? Tua ahikom, a kuama po suntangin a vak peuma in lutu ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile ama in hi leitung khuavak mu hi." 
John11:10 Ahihang ama in zan in a vak le lutu tu hi, banghang ziam cile ama in khuavak nei ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
John11:11 Jesus in hi teng ci a, tua zawkciang, “Ih lawmpa Lazarus mutthip zo hi, ahihang pai in ka phong tu hi,” ci lai hi." 
John11:12 Nungzuite in, “Topa awng, ama mutthip ahile a ciidam tu hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
John11:13 Jesus in Lazarus thi zo hi a cinopna ahihang amate in mut ngeina bang sia a son sa uh hi. 
John11:14 Tua ahikom, Jesus in thiang takin, “Lazarus thi zo hi," 
John11:15 ahihang, no atu ka ngaisut ciang, na up thei natu in, ama taw ka omkhop ngawl sia ka lungdam hi. Ama kungah ih pai tu hi,” ci hi." 
John11:16 Thomas (Apeang cina) in, a nungzui puite munah, “Ama taw ih thi khop thei natu in Syapa taw pai tek tawng!” ci hi." 
John11:17 Jesus hong thet ciang, Lazarus a kivui zawk ni li pha zo, ci in mu hi." 
John11:18 Bethany sia Jerusalem panin kilometre 3 zongh a pha bua hi," 
John11:19 tuaciangin, Judea mi tam mama Martha le Mary taw kimu tu in pai a, amate ii suapuipa thi hu in heeneam tu in pai uh hi." 
John11:19 tuaciangin, Judea mi tam mama Martha le Mary taw kimu tu in pai a, amate ii suapuipa thi hu in heeneam tu in pai uh hi." 
John11:20 Martha in Jesus hong pai hi ci in a zaak ciang, ama muak tu in pusuak hi, Mary ahile inn sungah om hi." 
John11:21 Martha in Jesus munah, “Topa awng, hi sungah hong om hile te, ka suapuipa thi ngawl tu hi!” ci hi." 
John11:22 “Ahizong tu mama zongin, Pathian tungah na nget pawpo hong pia tu, ci in ka he hi,” ci hi." 
John11:23 Jesus in, “Na suapuipa sia nuntakna sungah tho tu hi,” ci hi." 
John11:24 Martha in, “Ni tawpkhak ni ciang ama nuntakna sungah tho tu hi, ci in ka he hi,” ci hi." 
John11:25 Tua nu munah Jesus in, “Keima in thawkikna le nuntakna ka hi hi. Kei hong um peuma a thi zongin a nungta tu hi;" 
John11:26 tuaciang kei hong um a, a nungta theampo a thi ngei buatu hi. Hi thu na um ziam,” ci hi." 
John11:27 Ama in, “Um khi hi, Topa awng! Leitung ah hong pai tu, Pathian Tapa Messiah na hi sia hong um khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John11:28 Martha in hi teng a ci zawkciang heak kik in, a suapuinu Mary sam tuam hi. “Syapa hi sungah om hi, ama in nang hong kan hi,” ci in son hi." 
John11:29 Mary in hi thu a zaak ciang dingto a, ama taw kisi tu in manlang takin pai hi." 
John11:30 (Jesus khua sung hong theng ngawl lai a, Martha taw a kimuna munah om lai hi.)" 
John11:31 Mary heeneam a inn sung a omte in ama dingin manlang tak pusuak a mu uh ciang ama zui uh hi. Thaan ah a kap tu in pai tu hi vak ci in ngaisun uh hi. 
John11:32 Jesus omna ah Mary theng hi, ama a mu po ciangin, a peang ah bok hi. Ama in “Topa awng, hi sungah hong om hile te ka suapuipa thi ngawl tu hi!” ci hi." 
John11:33 Jesus in ama kakap a, ama taw a om mihingte zongh, kakap in a om mu hi; a thin hong suu a, khuangai mama hi." 
John11:34 “Ama koisungah phum nu ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Amate in “Topa awng, hong pai in hong en ta'n,” ci in zo uh hi." 
John11:35 Jesus kap hi. 
John11:36 Mihingte in, “En vun, bangza in ama it ziam!” ci uh hi." 
John11:37 Ahihang amate sung pan pawlkhat in, “Mittawpa zongh khuamusak hi ngawl ziam? Lazarus sia a thi natu pan keam thei ngawl ziam?” ci uh hi." 
John11:38 Jesus, khatvei ma hong khuangai kik mama a, suanghawng khat ii kongvang ah suangtum khat taw a kikhak thaan khat ah pai hi." 
John11:39 “A suang lakeak vun!” ci in Jesus in thupia hi. Mithipa suapuinu Martha in “Topa awng, uih zo tu hi. Ama a kiphum zawk ni li pha zo hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John11:40 Jesus in ama munah, “Na um le Pathian minthanna na mu tu hi ci in hong son hi ngawl khi ziam?” ci hi." 
John11:41 Amate in suangtum lakeak uh hi. Jesus in khuadak to a, “Pa awng, ka thu nong ngai hu in lungdam kong ko hi." 
John11:42 Nong ngai tawntung hi, ci in kong he hi, ahizong tubangin ka ci sia hi sungah om mihingte atu in kei nong sawl ahi hunlam a up thei natu ka deina ahi hi,” ci hi." 
John11:43 Hi bang teng a ci zawkciang, awnging tatak taw au in, “Lazarus awng, hong pusuak ta'n!” ci hi." 
John11:44 Ama hong pusuak a, a khut le a peangte thaanpuan taw kituun in, a maitang puan khat taw kituam hi. “Phelsak vun, ama paisak vun,” ci in Jesus in sawl hi." 
John11:45 Mary kungah haw tu a pai mihing tam mama in Jesus vawt teng mu uh a, ama um uh hi." 
John11:46 Ahihang pawlkhat Phariseete kungah heak kikin, Jesus sep teng ko uh hi." 
John11:47 Tua ahikom Pharisee te le thiampi liante Council te taw kisitua in, “Bang law tu hi ziam? Hisia pa ii nalamdang lakna a vawt theampo en vun!" 
John11:48 Hi bangin ama ih tha thong le, mihing theampo in ama um tu a, Rome thuneite in ih Biakinn le ih minam hong susia tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
John11:49 Amate sung pan tua kumin Thiampi Lianbel ahi Caiaphas kici sia in “Bang mawmawt nu ziam! 
John11:50 Minam bup ii lal tu taangin, pasal khat sia mihingte atu thi le note atu phazaw ahi hunlam phawk ngawl nu ziam?” ci hi." 
John11:51 A tatak sia ama uuk thu taw, hi bangin pau ahi bua hi; tua taangin, ama tua kum sung Thiampi Lianbel ahi bangma, Jesus sia Jew mite atu in thi tu ci sia a sonkhol ahi zaw hi," 
John11:52 tuaciang, amate atu bek hi ngawlin, Pathian mihing a kithethaang theampo pumkhat suak tu in kaikhop natu zongh a sonkhol ahi hi." 
John11:53 Tua ni pan kipan Jew thuneite in Jesus a thalup natu, ngealnate nei uh hi." 
John11:54 Tua ahikom Jesus, Judea ngam ah a kilangh takin, khualhaw nawn ngawl hi, ahihang tua mun nusia a, sennealngam nai Ephraim a kici khua khat ah pai in, a nungzuite taw taam hi." 
John11:54 Tua ahikom Jesus, Judea ngam ah a kilangh takin, khualhaw nawn ngawl hi, ahihang tua mun nusia a, sennealngam nai Ephraim a kici khua khat ah pai in, a nungzuite taw taam hi." 
John11:55 Paisan Poai hun hong nai a, poai hun ma in ngamsung pan mihing tam mama kithiansua zeksa vawt tu in, Jerusalem ah pai uh hi." 
John11:56 Amate in Jesus zawzong uh hi, tuaciang, Biakinnpi sungah a kikhoptua uh laitakin khat le khat, “Bang na ngaisun uh ziam? Poai sungah hong pai ngawl het tu hi ngawl ziam?” ci in kidongh uh hi." 
John11:57 Thiampi liante le Phariseete in Jesus a kimat thei natu in ama omna a he a om le thu hong puak nanak tu nu hi, ci in thupia uh hi." 
John12:1 Paisan Poai tu ni luk a kisap ciangin, Bethany ah Jesus pai a, thina pan a thawsak Lazarus ii inn ah tung hi." 
John12:2 Amate in ama atu nitak an tua munah huansak uh hi. Martha in an piak hu hi; Lazarus sia Jesus taw sabuai kiim ah a tokhawmte sungah a kihel khat hi. 
John12:3 Tua zawkciang Mary in a manham mama nard sathau namtui litre lang hong paipui a, Jesus peang tungah buakin, a sam taw nawlsak hi. Sathau namtui in inn sung bup zel hi." 
John12:4 Jesus nungzuite khat ahi Judas Iscariot — ama a leeheak tu pa — in," 
John12:5 “Banghangin sathau namtui sia ngunn dangka zathum taw zuakin mizawngte kipia ngawl ziam?” ci in dongh hi. 
John12:6 Ama ii hi bang a paute sia a zawngte awlmaw takpi hi ngawl a, ngutapa khat ahihang ahi hi. Ama in sum ip keam a, sumte ama atu in a la ku tawntung pa ahi hi." 
John12:7 Ahihang Jesus in, “Ama koi po vun! Ka kiphum ni ciang atu in, ama ii neisunte keamsak po vun." 
John12:8 Mizawngte sia no taw hong omkhawm tawntung tu hi, ahihang kei sia no taw hong omkhawm tawntung ngawl tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
John12:9 Bethany ah Jesus om hi ci in a za mihing tam mama te in tua munah hong pai uh sia Jesus hang bek zongh hi ngawlin, thina pan Jesus ii a thawsak Lazarus mu nuam a, hong pai ahi uh hi." 
John12:10 Tua ahikom thiampi liante in Lazarus zongh thalup natu vaihawmna nei uh hi," 
John12:11 banghang ziam cile ama tung thupiang hu in Jew mi tam mama te in amate nial a, Jesus um uh hi." 
John12:12 A zing ciangin Paisan Poai siim tu in hong pai mihonpi in, Jerusalem khua ah Jesus hong pai natu thu za uh hi." 
John12:13 Tua ahikom amate in palm thingbaakte la in, ama muak tu in pai uh a, “Pathian pok vun! Topa min taw hong paipa, Pathian in thupha pia tahen! Pathian in Israel Kumpipa thupha pia tahen!” ci in au uh hi." 
John12:14 Jesus in laa khat mu in a tungah to hi, laithiangtho in hi bangin a at sia a taangtun natu ahi hi." 
John12:15 “Zion khuapi awng lau heak in! Hi sungah na kumpipa hong pai a, laano tungah to hi.”" 
John12:16 A nungzuite in hi thu sia tua hun laitakin a tel bua uh hi; ahihang Jesus minthanna sungah a thawtosak ciangin, laithiangtho in ama huvau, hi bangin at a, amate in hi bangin ama atu in vawt hi, ci sia phawk kik uh hi." 
John12:17 Lazarus thaan sung pan sam a, thina pan a thawsak lai in, Jesus taw a omkhawm mihingte in bang thu piang ci thu kiko tek uh hi." 
John12:18 Tuasia hu in mihon in ama muak uh hi — banghang ziam cile hi nalamdang a vawt sia amate in za zo uh hi. 
John12:19 Phariseete in khat le khat, “Na mu bang hi, eite in ih zo zo peuma bua hi! En vun, leitung bup in ama zui zo hi!” ci uh hi." 
John12:20 Jerusalem ah poai sung teng biakpiakna nei tu in a paite sungah Greek te pawlkhat om hi. 
John12:21 Amate in Philip (Galilee ngam Bethsaida khua mi) kungah pai in, “Syapa awng, ko Jesus mu nuam khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
John12:22 Philip pai in Andrew kungah a son zawkciang, a nii in pai a Jesus munah son uh hi." 
John12:23 Jesus in, “Tu in Mihing Tapa ii a lian minthanna a saan tu hun hong tung zo hi." 
John12:24 A tatakin kong ci hi: zungtaang tang khat lei ah taak a, a thi phot buale tang khat nguak hi top hi. A thi le a tang tam piangsak hi." 
John12:25 A kuama po ama ii nuntakna a it sia in taan tu hi; ama ii nuntakna hi leitung ah a ngaimaw peuma in, tawntung nuntakna a keam ahi tu hi." 
John12:26 Ka naseampa sia keima omna po ah, keima taw a om thei natu in, kei atu hong sepsak nuam peuma in kei hong zui kul tu hi. Tuaciang kei atu a seam khat pawpo sia ka Pa in patoai tu hi." 
John12:27 “Tu in ka thinngim hi — tua hi a, bang son tu khi ziam? ‘Pa awng, hi hun sia kei tungah hong tungsak heak in,’ ci tu khi ziam? Ahihang kong paina thu in hi thuakna hun a nawk tu ma in hong pai ka hi hi." 
John12:28 Pa awng, nangma min thangsak in!” ci hi. Tuaciang vantung pan aw nging khat in, “Minthangsak zo khi hi, tuaciang in minthangsak lai tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
John12:29 Tua munah a ding mihonte in tua awnging za a, amate sung pan pawlkhat in vanto hi ci a, a dangte in, “Vantunglalang khat in ama paupui hi!” ci uh hi." 
John12:30 Ahihang Jesus in, “Hi aw sia kei atu hi ngawlin no atu in hong nging ahi hi." 
John12:31 Tu hun sia hi leitung ii thukhen thuak tu hun ahi hi; tu in hi leitung a ukpa kisuanthal tu hi. 
John12:32 Leitung pan hong kilapto ciangin mihing theampo ka kungah ka kai tu hi,” ci hi." 
John12:33 (Hi bangin a pau sia ama thuak tu thina zia a sonna ahi hi.) 
John12:34 Mihonpi in “Ih Thukham in Messiah nungta tawntung tu in hong son hi. Tua ahile bangbangin Mihing Tapa kilaamto tu hi, ci thei ni ziam? Hi Mihing Tapa sia akua ziam?” ci uh hi." 
John12:35 Jesus in zo kik a, “Khuavak sia no sungah tawmvei hong om lai tu hi. Khuazing sia no tungah hong thet man ngawl natu in, khuavak na nei uh laitakin, na paina lampi ah paisuak tavun; banghang ziam cile khuazing sungah a pai khat in a zot natu mun a he bua hi." 
John12:36 Tuaciang khuavak na nei uh laitak, khuavak ii mihingte na sua natu in, khuavak na um vun,” ci hi. Jesus in hi teng a ci zawkciang amate paisan in kiheam hi." 
John12:37 Nalamdang lakna hi zata amate mai ah vawt zo hi napi amate in ama a um bua uh hi," 
John12:38 Tua in kamsaangpa Isaiah ii sonna teng a tun natu ahi hi: “Topa awng, ko ii son thu sia akua in um na ziam? Topa in a kuate tungah a vaangletna pualaak ziam?”" 
John12:39 Tua ahikom amate in um zo ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile Isaiah in hi bangin ci lai hi," 
John12:40 “Pathian in amate ii mit tawsak a, a thinsung khacipsak hi, tua in, a mit khua a mu ngawl natu, a thinsung taw a tel ngawl natu, tuaciang amate in keima ii amate ka damsak natu kei kungah hong heak kik ngawl natu, ahi hi, Pathian in ci hi.”" 
John12:41 Isaiah ii hi bangin a ci sia Jesus ii vaangletna mu a, ama huvau a son hang ahi hi." 
John12:42 Tua zawk ciang ngawngawnin Jew thuneite tam mama in Jesus um uh hi; ahihang Phariseete ii synagogue pan amate a hawlkeak ngawl natu in, a kilangh taakin a upna thu a son ngam bua uh hi." 
John12:43 Amate in, Pathian ii lungkimna sangin, mihingte lungkimna dei zaw uh hi." 
John12:44 Jesus in awnging takin, “A kuama po kei hong umte in kei bek hong um hi ngawl a, kei hong sawlpa zongh um ahi hi." 
John12:45 A kuama po kei hong mu te in kei hong sawlpa zongh a mu ahi hi. 
John12:46 Kei hong um peuma khuazing sungah a omcip ngawl natu in leitung ah khuavak bangin kong pai zo hi. 
John12:47 Kong thupuak sia za napi a ni ngawlte tungah thu ka khen buatu hi. Leitung ngum tu in kong pai a, a tungah thukhen tu in kong pai bua hi." 
John12:48 Kei hong nial a, kong thupuak a saang ngawl peuma ama tungah thukhen tu khat a nei hi. Ka pau sa kammal te in ni tawpkhak ni ciangin ama ii thukhenpa hi tu hi!" 
John12:49 Hi thu in thumaan hi, banghang ziam cile keima aituam thuneina taw ka pau bua hi, ahihang kei hong sawl Pa in ka son tu le ka pau tu thu hong pia hi." 
John12:50 Tuaciangin ama ii thupiakna in tawntung nuntakna hong puak hunlam ka he hi. Tua ahiciang ka thuson teng sia Pa ii son a hong sawl teng ahi hi,” ci hi." 
John13:1 Tu in Paisan Poai vawt tu ni khat samh lai hi. Jesus in leitung nusia in, Pa kung a pai natu hun hong thet sia he hi. ama ii neisa leitung mihingte it tawntung a, a tawp dongin it hi." 
John13:2 Jesus le a nungzuite nitak an nekhawm uh hi. Simon Iscariot ii tapa Judas thinsung ah Jesus leeheak tu ngaisutna Doaimangpa in khum zo hi. 
John13:3 Jesus in Pa ii vaangletna a cingin ama tungah a piak sia he hi; ama in Pathian kung pan hong pai a, Pathian kung a zot kik tu hunlam he hi." 
John13:4 Tua ahikom sabuai pan dingin a puan tungsilh a suut zawkciang a kawng ah dial khat vet hi. 
John13:5 Tua zawkciang kuang khat sungah tui a khomkhat sung a, nungzuite peang silsak tu le, a kawng a dial sia taw nawlsak tu in kipan hi." 
John13:6 Simon Peter kung hong thet ciangin, “Kei peang hong silsak tu ni ziam? Topa awng,” ci hi." 
John13:7 Jesus in “Tu a ka sep sia tu laitakin tel ngawl na hi uh hang nidang ciangin na tel tu uh hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John13:8 Peter in “Bang hun po ahizong kei peang hong silsak ngeingawl tu ni hi!” ci hi. “Na peang ka sil buale ka nungzui na hi nawn buatu hi,” ci in Jesus in zo kik hi." 
John13:9 Simon Peter in, “Tua ahile Topa awng, ka peang bek hong silsak heak in! Ka khut le ka lu zongh hong silsak ta'n!” ci hi." 
John13:10 Jesus in, “A kibual sa pawpo sia thiang siat a, a peang simngawl sil a kul bua hi. No teng sungah khat simngawl thiangtho nu hi,” ci hi." 
John13:11 (Jesus in ama a leeheak tu pa sia he zo hi; tua hu in, “Khat simngawl thiangtho nu hi” ci hi.)" 
John13:12 Jesus in a peang uh a silsak zawkciang a puantungsilh silh kikin a tona ngei sabuai ah to kik hi, “Tu a, no tung a kong vawt teng na tel uh ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
John13:13 “Sya awng, Topa awng, hong ci nu hi, tuabang nong ci uh sia maan hi, banghang ziam cile keima tuasia ka hi hi." 
John13:14 Kei na Topa le na Syapa in na peang uh kong silsak zawk bek ahi hi. Noma khat le khat tuabangin, na kisilsak vun." 
John13:15 No ii ettee tu ngamtatna khat kong koisak hi, tua hi a kei ii no tungah kong hi bang tatakin, no zongh khat le khat tungah na ngamta tavun." 
John13:16 A tatakin kong ci hi: sila khat sia a topa sangin lianzaw ngawl a, kamtaipa khat sia a sawlpa sangin lianzaw ngawl hi." 
John13:17 Tu in thumaan he zo na hi uh kom, seam paih le uhte bangza in a lungdamte hi tu nu ziam!" 
John13:18 “Na vekpi atu ka sonna hi ngawl hi; ka teal sate keima in ka he hi. Ahihang laithiangtho sungah, ‘Kei taw ankuang uumkhawmpa in kei hong langpan hi,’ a ci sia a tun kul tu hi." 
John13:19 ‘Keima sia Keima ka hi’ hunlam hi thu a pian ciang nong up natu in hi thu a pian ma, tu in kong son hi." 
John13:20 A tatakin kong ci hi: ka sawlpa a saang pawpo in, kei zongh hong saang ahi hi; kei hong saang pawpo in kei hong sawlpa a saang ahi hi,” ci hi." 
John13:21 Jesus in hi teng a ci zawkciang ama a thinngim mama a, a langh taakin hi bang pau hi, “A maan tak kong ci hi: no sung pan khat in kei hong leeheak tu hi,” ci hi." 
John13:22 A nungzuite khat le khat ki en a, ama ii ci nop sia akua ziam ci in lungmang mama uh hi." 
John13:23 Jesus ii it nungzui khat sia Jesus taw a kicial in to hi. 
John13:24 Simon Peter in tua pa neak phei a, “Akua ci nuam ziam dongh in,” ci hi." 
John13:25 Tua ahikom tua nungzuipa in Jesus kung neak zaw in, “Akua ziam? Topa awng,” ci in dongh hi." 
John13:26 Jesus in, “Anluum bekkhat sia meetui sungah papin ka piak tu sia pa hi,” ci in zo hi. Tua ahikom ama in anluum bekkhat la a, meetui sungah a pap zawkciang, Simon Iscariot ii tapa Judas pia hi." 
John13:27 Judas in anluum a saan po ciangin, ama sungah Satan tum hi. Jesus in ama munah, “Na vawt tu po vawt memeang ta'n!” ci hi." 
John13:28 Jesus in banghangin hi bangin ci ziam ci sia sabuai ah a to teng in a tel bua uh hi. 
John13:29 Judas sia sum ip keampa ahikom poai sungah amate kisap tu vanhte, tua ahibuale a zawngte bang khat po a piak tu vanhte lei a sawl ziam, hi tu hi ci in nungzuite pawlkhat in ngaisun uh hi." 
John13:30 Judas in anluum saang a, thakhatin pusuak paih hi. Tua hun sia zan hun ahi hi." 
John13:31 Judas ii paisan zawkciang Jesus in, “Tu in Mihing Tapa ii minthanna kilangh hi; tu in Pathian minthanna ama tungtawnin kilangh hi." 
John13:32 Tuaciang ama tungtawnin Pathian minthanna kilangh ahile, Pathian in Mihing Tapa minthanna ama mama sungah kilanghsak tu a, thakhat thu in tuabangin vawt tu hi." 
John13:33 Ka tate awng, kei sia no taw ngei hong omkhawm nawn ngawl tu khi hi. Note in kei nong zong tu uh hi; ahihang, Jew thunei mihingte munah ka ci sa bangin, ‘Kei pai natu munah note nong pai thei buatu hi,’ ci sia tu in kong son hi." 
John13:34 Tuaciang, tu in thupiak thak khat kong pia hi: Khat le khat na ki it vun. Note kong it bangma in, khat le khat na ki it hamtang vun." 
John13:35 Khat le khat na ki it uh le mihing theampo in, no sia ka nungzuite na hina uh hong he tu hi,” ci hi." 
John13:36 Simon Peter in, “Koisung pai tu ni ziam Topa?” ci in dongh hi. “Tu in kei pai natu ah nong zui thei buatu hi, ahihang nidang ciangin hong zui tu ni hi,” ci in Jesus in zo hi." 
John13:37 Peter in, “Topa awng, banghangin, tu laitak nang hong zui thei ngawl tu khi ziam? Nang atu thi tu in ka kinging hi!” ci hi." 
John13:38 Jesus in, “Kei atu thi tu in kinging tatak ni ziam? A maan tak kong ci hi: ak khuan ma in ka he bua hi ci in thumvei hong nial tu ni hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John14:1 Jesus in, “Thinngim in thin kiam heak vun,” ci hi. “Pathian um vun a, kei zongh hong um tavun." 
John14:2 Ka Pa inn sungah inndoi tuam tam mama om hi, no atu omna pua khol tu in, ka na pai tu hi. Tuabang hi buale hi bangin kong son buatu hi." 
John14:3 No atu pai in, omna ka pua khol zawkciang kong heak kik tu a, keima omna ah na om thei natu in ka kungah kong la tu hi." 
John14:4 Ka pai natu mun hong then thei lampi sia na he uh hi,” ci hi." 
John14:5 Thomas in, “Topa awng, koisung zuan tu ni ziam ci in hong he ngawl khu hi; tua ahiciang tua mun thet thei natu lampi sia koibangin he thei tu khu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
John14:6 Jesus in, “Keima in lampi ka hi hi, thumaan thutak ka hi hi, nuntakna ka hi hi; kei taw ngawlin kuama in Pa kung a theng buatu hi." 
John14:7 Tu in kei hong he zo na hi uh ciang, ka Pa zongh na he tu uh hi, tuaciang tu pan kipan ama na he uh a, na mu zo uh hi,” ci hi." 
John14:8 Philip in, “Topa awng, Pa hong lak ta'n; tuasia ka kisap uh a vekpi hi,” ci hi." 
John14:9 Jesus in, “No teng taw khuangei mama hong omkhawm zo khi hi; tua hi napi Philip awng, hong he ngawl lai ni ziam? Kei hong mu po in Pa a mu zo hi. Tua ahile banghangin ‘Ko, Pa hong lak tan’ ci ni ziam?" 
John14:10 Philip awng, Pa sungah kei ka om a, kei sungah Pa a om hunlam um ngawl ni ziam?” ci hi. Tua zawkciang Jesus in a nungzuite munah, “No tung a kong son kammalte keima sung pan hong pusuak ahi bua hi. Ka sungah a om Pa in ama nasep seam ahi hi." 
John14:11 Pa sungah kei ka om a, kei sungah Pa a om hi kong ci ciangin, hong um tavun. Tua ahibuale zong ka sep ka vawtte hangin kei hong um tavun." 
John14:12 A maan takin kong ci hi; kei hong um peuma in, ka vawt teng a vawt tu hi — hi hi, a thupi zaw zongh vawt tu hi, banghang ziam cile kei Pa kung ka zuan tu hi." 
John14:13 Tuaciangin keima min suang a nong nget pawpo, Tapa tungtawnin Pa minthan natu in kong vawtsak tu hi." 
John14:14 Na khat pawpo kei min suangin nong ngen uh le kong vawtsak tu hi. 
John14:15 “Nong it uh le ka thupiakte na ni tu uh hi. 
John14:16 Pa munah ka ngen tu a, ama in Hupa a dangkhat hong pia tu hi, ama in no taw a tawntungin hong omkhawm tu hi." 
John14:17 Ama in Pathian ii thumaan thutak hong pualaak Thaa ahi hi. Leitung in ama saang thei ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile ama mu thei ngawl a, he ngawl hi. Ahihang no in ama na he uh hi, banghang ziam cile ama note taw omkhawm in, note sungah hong om hi." 
John14:18 “Ka pai ciangin, no nguak kong nusia buatu hi; note kungah kong heak kik tu hi." 
John14:19 Tawmvei zawkciangin, leitung in kei hong mu nawn ngawl tu hi, ahizong note in nong mu tu uh hi; tuaciang keima nungta ka hikom no zongh na nungta tu uh hi." 
John14:20 Tua ni hong thet ciang, kei Pa sungah om a, no sungah kei ka om bangma in, kei sungah no na om uh hunlam na he tu uh hi." 
John14:21 “A kuama po ka thupiakte saangin, thu a nite sia kei hong it ahi hi. Ka Pa in kei hong it pawpo a it tu hi; kei zongh in ama ka it tu a, ama tungah keima le keima ka kilaak tu hi,” ci hi." 
John14:22 Judas (Judas Iscariot ahi ngawl sia) in, “Topa awng, bangbangin leitung ah kilaak ngawlin ko kungah hong kilaak tuam thei tu ni ziam?” ci hi." 
John14:23 Jesus in, “A kuama po kei hong it sia in ka hilcianna a zui tu hi. Ka Pa in tua pa it tu a, ka Pa le keima in ama kungah pai in, ama taw ka teang tu uh hi." 
John14:24 A kuama po kei hong it ngawl sia in ka hilcianna a zui buatu hi. Na zaaksa uh hi hilcianna sia kei aa hi ngawl a, kei hong sawlpa Pa kung pan hong pai ahi hi." 
John14:25 “No taw kong omkhop lai ma in, hi thu hong son zo khi hi." 
John14:26 Pa ii keima min taw hong paisak tu Thaa Thiangtho ahi Hupa in na theampo hong hil tu a, kong son teng zongh hong phawk kiksak tu hi." 
John14:27 “Thinnopna kong nusiat hi; keima aituam neisa thinnopna kong pia hi. Leitung ii piak bangin kong pia bua hi. Thinngim in thinkiam heak vun; lau heak vun. 
John14:28 ‘Hong nusia tu khi hi, ahihang no kung hong pai kik tu khi hi, ka ci sia na za zo uh hi.’ Nong it uh le Pa kung ka zot tu sia na lungdam tu uh hi; banghang ziam cile ama kei sangin lianzaw hi." 
John14:29 Hite theampo a pian ma tu laitakin hong sonkhol zo khi hi, hong pian takpi ciangin, na up thei natu uh ahi hi." 
John14:30 No taw hun sauzaw thuson thei nawn ngawl tu khi hi, banghang ziam cile hi leitung a ukpa hong pai hi. Ama in kei tungah bangma vaang hong nei bua hi," 
John14:31 ahihang Pa ka itna sia, leitung in a heak kul tu hi; tua hu in ama ii thu hong piak babangin, na theampo ka vawt hi. “Hong pai tavun, hi mun panin pai tawng." 
John15:1 “Keima in Sapitkung tatak ka hi a, ka Pa in huan neipa ahi hi." 
John15:2 Ama in kei tungah a nga ngawl baak theampo sattan tu hi, sapitnga a ngana baak pawpo a thiantho natu le tamzaw a nga thei natu ho in heu tu hi." 
John15:3 Note sia hilcianna kong piakte hangin hong kithiangthosak zo hi. 
John15:4 Kei sungah hong om po tavun, no sungah kong om tu hi. A baak khat nguak bek a nga thei bua hi; a kung taw a kizop ciang bekin nga thei hi. Tuasia bangma in kei sungah nong om bua uh le a nga na nga thei buatu uh hi." 
John15:5 Keima in sapitkung hi a, note in a baakte na hi uh hi. A kuama po in kei sungah hong om a, ama sungah kei ka om le ama in nga tam mama nga tu hi; banghang ziam cile kei ngawl taw bangma na vawt thei buatu uh hi." 
John15:6 A kuama po kei sungah hong om ngawlte thingbaak bangin kivawkin, kocip hi; tuabang a baakte kitawm in meimang sungah kibum a, kaanghtum hi." 
John15:7 Kei sungah nong om uh a, ka kammalte note sungah a om le tuasia ciang na uuk pawpo nong ngen tu a, na nga tu uh hi." 
John15:8 A nga tam na nga uh ciang ka Pa minthanna kilanghsak hi; tuabangin keima nungzuite na suak uh hi. 
John15:9 Pa ii kei hong it bangma in note kong it hi; kong itna sungah kip vun. 
John15:10 Ka Pa thupiakte ni a, ama ii itna sungah ka kip bangmain, kong thupiakte na ni uh le kong itna sungah na kip tu uh hi." 
John15:11 “Note sungah ka lungdamna a om natu le na lungdamna uh a kicin natu in hi thu kong son hi. 
John15:12 Kong thupiak in hi thu ahi hi: keima ii kong it bangma in, khat le khat na ki it vun." 
John15:13 Mihing khat ii a lawmte atu a nei thei a lianbel itna in amate atu ama ii nuntakna a piakna ahi hi. 
John15:14 Tuaciangin, ka thupiak bangin na seam uh le, ka lawmte na hi uh hi." 
John15:15 Naseamte awng, kong ci nawn bua hi, banghang ziam cile naseampa in a topa in bang teng vawt ziam, ci in a he bua hi. Tuasia taangin lawmte awng kong ci hi, banghang ziam cile Pa kung pan ka zaak thu theampo kong son zo hi." 
John15:16 Note in kei nong teal bua uh hi; keima in note a kikhomsuan a nga namte tam mama na nga natu in, kong teal a, nasep kong pia hi. Tua ahikom Pa in kei min taw, ama tungah na nget uh po, hong pia tu hi." 
John15:17 Tua hi a, hi thu in note tungah kong thupiak ahi hi: khat le khat na ki it tavun." 
John15:18 “Leitung in note hong ensan le keima hong ensan masa ahi sia phawk tavun. 
John15:19 Note leitung neisa hi le uhte leitung in ama aituam bangin hong it tu hi. Ahihang hi leitung panin note kong teal zo a, note leitung neisa na hi nawn bua uh hi; tua hu in leitung in note hong ensan hi" 
John15:20 Kong sonsa thu phawk tavun: ‘Silapa in a topa sangin lianzaw ngawl hi.’ Amate in kei hong vawtsia le no zongh hong vawtsia tu hi; amate in ka hilna a mang uh le no hilna zongh zui tu hi. 
John15:21 Ahihang amate in hite theampo note tungah hong vawt tu hi, banghang ziam cile note keima neisa na hi uh hi; banghang ziam cile amate in kei hong sawlpa he ngawl hi." 
John15:22 Amate kungah pai in thuson ngawl hi leng amate in mawna a nei buatu uh hi; tu in ahile amate a mawna huvau in kamzon natu a nei nawn bua uh hi. 
John15:23 Kei hong ensan sia in ka Pa zongh a ensan ahi hi. 
John15:24 Ngualdang ii vawt ngeingawlte amate sungah vawt ngawl hi leng amate in mawna a nei buatu uh hi; tu in ahile amate in ka sep teng hong mu zo a, kei le ka Pa hong ensan khawm hi." 
John15:25 Ahizong, amate Thukham sungah, ‘Amate in thu om ngawlpi in, kei hong ensan hi,’ ci in a ki at sia, a taangtun natu hi bang teng a pian kul hi." 
John15:26 “Thaa ahi Hupa hong pai tu a — Pathian ii thumaan thutak le Pa kung pan hong paipa sia hong pualaak tu hi. Pa kung panin ama kong puak tu a, ama in kei thu hong son tu hi." 
John15:27 Tuaciang note zongh in kei thu na son tu uh hi, banghang ziam cile a kipatciil panin note kei taw nong omkhawm zo uh hi." 
John16:1 “Na upna uh na thasua ngawl natu in, hi teng hong son khi hi." 
John16:2 Note synagogue pan hong kihawlkhia tu a, tuaciang note hong thatlum khat po in tuabang a ngamtat sia Pathian atu naseam in a kingaisut hun hong theng tu hi." 
John16:3 Mihingte in note tungah hi bang a ngamtat natu te sia amate in Pa ahizong kei ka hizong hong heak ngawl hang ahi hi. 
John16:4 Ahihang hi bang kong sonna in, amate atu in hite a sep tu hun hong thet ciang kong sonsa teng na phaw thei natu uh ahi hi. “A kipatciil in hite kong son bua hi, banghang ziam cile keima in note taw ka omkhawm hi." 
John16:5 Ahihang tu in hong sawlpa kung zuan tu khi hi, tua hi napi kuama in ka pai natu mun nong dongh bua uh hi." 
John16:6 Tuaciang tu in hi thu kong son zawkciang na thinsung uh heena taw kidim hi.
