John16:7 Ahihang thumaan thutak hong son khi hi: kei pai leng no atu phazaw hi, banghang ziam cile kei ka pai buale Hupa note kungah hong pai ngawl tu hi. Ahihang kei ka pai le ama no kungah kong paisak tu hi." 
John16:8 Tuaciangin ama hong pai ciangin, mawna thu, a maan thu le Pathian thukhenna huvau a ngaisutna uhte maan ngawl hi ci in leitung mihingte tungah kilanghsak tu hi." 
John16:9 Amate in mawna huvau ngaisun khial hi, banghang ziam cile amate in kei hong um ngawl hi." 
John16:10 Amate in a maan thu zongh ngaisun khial hi, banghang ziam cile kei Pa kung ka zuan tu a, note in nong mu nawn buatu uh hi;" 
John16:11 tuaciang amate in, thukhenna thu telkhial hi, banghang ziam cile hi leitung a ukpa tungah thu kikhen zo hi." 
John16:12 “Thu son tu tam ma ka nei lai hi, ahihang tu laitak ahile note thuciin tu in tam lei tu hi." 
John16:13 Ahizong Thaa hong pai ciangin, Pathian thumaan thutak hong pualaak pa in thumaan thutak theampo sungah lam hong pui tu hi. Ama in ama aituam thuneina taw hong son ngawl tu hi, ahizong ama zaak teng hong son tu a, hong piang tu thute hong son tu hi." 
John16:14 Ama in kei minthanna hong pia tu hi, banghang ziam cile ka sonte la tu a, tua teng note tungah hong son tu hi." 
John16:15 Ka Pa ii neisa theampo keima neisa hi; tua hu in Thaa in ka piakte la in no tungah hong son tu hi,” kong ci hi." 
John16:16 “Tawmvei no sungin kei nong mu nawn buatu uh a, tuaciang tawmvei zawkciangin nong mu tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
John16:17 A nungzuite pawlkhat in amate sungah kidongh uh a, “Bang ci nuam hi tu ziam? Tawmvei sung eite in ama mu nawn ngawl tu a, tawmvei zawkciang ih mu tu hi; tuaciang ama in, ‘Banghang ziam cile Pa kungah ka pai tu hi’ ci si hi." 
John16:18 ‘Tawmvei sung’ a ci sia bang a cinopna ziam? Ama in bang thu teng son ci sia ih he bua hi!” ci uh hi. 
John16:19 Jesus in ama thu dongh nuam ahi sia tel ahikom amate tungah, “ ‘Tawmvei sungin nong mu buatu uh a, tuaciang tawmvei zawkciangin nong mu tu uh hi,’ hong ci khi hi. Noma sung a na kidok thu in tu sia ahi ziam?" 
John16:20 A tatakin kong ci hi: note au in kap tu nu hi, ahihang leitung lungdam tu hi; note hee tu nu hi, ahihang na heena uh sia lungdamna hong suak tu hi." 
John16:21 Numei khat nau a sua tu ciangin, hee hi, banghang ziam cile a ngim natu hun hong theng ahi hi; ahihang nau hong sua ciang ama in a ngimna teng mangil hi, banghang ziam cile leitung ah nausen khat hong suak ahi hu in, ama lungdam hi." 
John16:22 Tuasia bangma na hi tu uh hi: tu in hee nu hi, ahizong kei in note kong mu kik tu a, na thinsung uh lungdamna taw kidim tu hi, tua lungdamna in kuama ii hong laaksak thei ngawlte ahi hi." 
John16:23 “Tua ni hong thet ciangin, kei tungah bangma nong ngen buatu uh hi. A maan tatak kong ci hi: Pa in kei min suangin na nget pawpo hong pia tu hi." 
John16:24 Tuciang dong kei min suangin, bangma na ngen bualai uh hi; na lungdamna uh a pawlcin thei natu in, ngen vun na nga tu uh hi." 
John16:25 “Sonteena kammalte zangh in, hi thute kong son zo hi. Ahihang sonteena kammalte zangh ngawlin, Pa ii thu thiang takin kong son tu hun hong theng tu hi." 
John16:26 Tua ni hong thet ciangin kei min suangin na ngen tu uh hi; tuaciang no luangin kong ngetsak tu hi kong ci bua hi," 
John16:27 banghang ziam cile Pa, ama mama in note hong it hi. Ama in banghang note hong it ziam cile noma in kei nong it uh a, tuaciang Pathian kung pan hong pai ka hi sia nong um uh hi." 
John16:28 Pa kung panin kong pai takpi a, leitung ah kong pai zo hi; tu in leitung nusia in, Pa kungah ka pai tu hi,” ci hi." 
John16:29 Tuasia ciang nungzuite in, “Tu ahile sonteena kamte zangh ngawlin a thiangin na son hi." 
John16:30 Na theampo na heak sia tu in kong he uh hi; kuama ii thu hong dok tu na kulsak bua hi. Hi thu in Pathian kung pan nong paina hong umsak hi,” ci uh hi." 
John16:31 Jesus in, “Tu in na um uh ziam?" 
John16:32 Note theampo kithethaang in, na inn tek zuanin, kei nguak nong nusiat tu uh hun hong theng tu hi, hi sung hong theng zo hi. Ahihang keima nguak ka hi bua hi, banghang ziam cile Pa in kei taw omkhawm hi." 
John16:33 Kei taw ih kikopna hangin thinnopna na nga natu hi thu kong sonsa hi. Leitung in ngim le kham hong thuaksak tu hi. Ahihang na thin uh liansak vun! Leitung ka zo zo hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John17:1 Jesus in hi teng a son zawkciang van ento in, “Pa awng, a hun hong theng zo hi. Tapa in nang tungah minthanna hong piak thei natu in, na Tapa tungah minthanna hong pia ta'n." 
John17:2 Banghang ziam cile ama tungah na piaksa mi teng tawntung nuntakna a piak thei natu in, mihing theampo tungah thuneina ama tungah na pia zo hi." 
John17:3 Tuaciang in tawntung nuntakna ci sia in nangma bek Pathian a maan ahi sia heakna le na sawlpa Jesus Christ heakna ahi hi. 
John17:4 Na minthanna leitung ah ka lak zo hi; sep tu a nong piak nasep sia ka man zo hi. 
John17:5 Pa awng! simlei pian ma a nangma taw a kibangin ih nei khop tua minthanna sia, tu in na mai ah kei hong pia ta'n." 
John17:6 “Leitung pan a nong piaksa mite kungah nangma kong hesak zo hi. Amate nangma neisa hi a, amate kei nong pia zo hi. Amate in na kammal hong ni hi," 
John17:7 tuaciang tu in, nong piaksa theampo nangma kung pan hong pai hi ci in amate in he uh hi." 
John17:8 Nong piak thu teng amate tungah ka pia a, amate in saang uh hi; amate in keima nang kung pan hong pai ka hi sia maan hi ci in he uh hi, tuaciangin nong sawl ka hi hunlam um uh hi." 
John17:9 “Amate atu in, thu kong ngen hi. Leitung atu thu ka ngen bua hi, nangma neisa ahi nong piakte atu in kong ngen hi." 
John17:10 Keima neisa theampo nangma aa hi a, nang neisa theampo keima aa ahi hi; ka minthanna amate tungtawnin kilak hi." 
John17:11 Tu in kei nangma kung kong zuan hi; leitung ah kei ka om nawn bua a, ahihang amate leitung ah om hi. A Thiangtho Pa awng! Nang le kei khat ih hi bangma in, amate pumkhat ahithei natu in, nong piaksa min ahi na min vaanglian taw amate keamcing ta in." 
John17:12 Amate taw ka omkhop lai in, nong piaksa min ahi na min vaanglian taw, amate ka keamcing zo hi, laithiangtho a tun thei natu, a mangthang tu in a kilaitan sa khat simngawl amate ka keam a, ka bosua bua hi." 
John17:13 Tu in nang kungah kong zuan a, hi bang teng leitung ah ka sonna sia in a thinsung uh ah ka lungdamna a cingin a nei thei natu ahi hi." 
John17:14 Na thupuak amate ka pia a, tuasia ciang leitung in amate ensan hi, banghang ziam cile keima leitung ii neisa ka hi ngawl bangma, amate leitung ii neisa ahi bua hi." 
John17:15 Hi leitung panin amate na laak natu in, kong ngen bua hi, ahihang Ngilo Pa khut sung pan na kepcing natu in kong ngen hi." 
John17:16 Keima leitung ii neisa ka hi ngawl bangma in, amate leitung ii neisa ahi bua uh hi." 
John17:17 Thumaan thutak taw nangma atu in amate na keam tuam in; na kammal in thumaan thutak hi. 
John17:18 Nangma in leitung ah kei nong sawl bangma in, amate leitung ah ka sawl hi." 
John17:19 Amate zongh maan tak a, nang tungah hong ki aap thei natu, amate atu ka ngaisutsakna in, keima le keima nang tungah kong ki aap hi." 
John17:20 “Amate atu bek ngen ngawlin, amate ii thupuak hangin, kei hong um teng atu zongh kong ngen hi." 
John17:21 Amate a vekpi in pumkhat ahithei natu in kong ngen hi. Pa awng! Nangma in keima sungah nong om a, keima in nangma sungah kong om bangma in, amate in eima sungah hong om tahen. Leitung in nong sawl ka hi hunlam hong up natu amate pumkhat suak thei tahen." 
John17:22 Nang le kei pumkhat ih hi bangma, amate pumkhat ahithei natu in, kei nong piak minthanna sia ma amate ka pia hi:" 
John17:23 Leitung in nong sawlna thu le, keima nong it bangma amate na itna thu a heak thei natu, amate pumkhat a sua bup thei natu in, keima in amate sungah om in, nangma in keima sungah nong om hi." 
John17:24 “Pa awng! Amate nong piaksa hi a, nong piaksa ka minthanna sia a mu thei natu in, ka omna munah hong om tek tu ka dei hi; banghang ziam cile, simlei a kipiansak ma in, nong it zo hi." 
John17:25 Thumaan thutang Pa awng! Leitung in nang hong he bua hi, ahihang keima in kong he hi, tuaciang hite in nong sawl ahi hunlam he uh hi." 
John17:26 Kei nong itna amate sungah a om thei natu le amate sungah kei zongh ka om thei natu in, nang sia amate in ka hesak zo a, tuabang ma in ka seam suak lai tu hi,” ci hi." 
John18:1 Jesus in hi thungetna teng a nget zawkciang a nungzuite taw Kidron luam a kici sia kaantan in pai hi. Tua munah huan khat om hi. Jesus le a nungzuite huan sungah tum uh hi. 
John18:2 Leeheakpa Judas in hi huan ii omna he hi, banghang ziam cile, Jesus in a nungzuite taw tamvei mama tua munah kisi ngei zo uh hi." 
John18:3 Tua ahikom Judas in huan sungah pai a, Rome ngalkap honkhat Thiampi liante le Phariseete ii sawl biakinn cing pawlkhat keng hi, amate ngalhiam toai a, meiinn le meila lom keng uh hi." 
John18:4 Jesus in ama tungah a piang tu na theampo he ahikom ama, mai ah pai in, “Na zon uh sia akua ziam?,” ci in dongh hi." 
John18:5 “Nazareth khua mi Jesus hi,” ci in amate in zo uh hi. “Keima khi hi,” ama in ci hi. Leeheakpa Judas sia amate taw tua munah ding hi." 
John18:6 Jesus in, “Keima khi hi,” a ci ciangin, amate nungkin uh a, lei ah puk uh hi." 
John18:7 Jesus in khatvei ma, “Na zon uh sia akua ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Amate in, “Nazareth khua mi Jesus hi,” ci uh hi." 
John18:8 Jesus in “Keima khi hi, kong ci zo hi. Kei hong zong na hi uh le hi a dang teng ciasak vun,” ci hi." 
John18:9 (“Pa awng, nong piak sate khat zongh ka bo sua bua hi,” a ci teng a taangtun thei natu in hi bang teng ci ahi hi.)" 
John18:10 Namsau khat a nei Simon Peter in a namsau dokin, Thiampi Lianbelpa ii silapa bil ziatsang satansak hi. Tua silapa ii min Malchus ahi hi." 
John18:11 Jesus in Peter munah, “Na namsau a pai sungah thun kik in! Ka Pa ii ka dawn tu a hong piak thuakna hai sia, dawn ngawl tu in hong um ni ziam?” ci hi." 
John18:12 Tua zawkciang Rome ngalkapte, ngalkap hon ukpa le Jew biakinn cingte in Jesus man uh a, khaukhii in," 
John18:13 Annas kungah paipui masa uh hi. Ama sia tua kum a Thiampi Lianbel ahi Caiaphas ii sunghpa ahi hi. 
John18:14 Mihing theampo atu in mihing khat thi le phazaw hi ci in Jew thuneite tungah ngaisutna a pia pa sia Caiaphas ahi hi. 
John18:15 Simon Peter le a dang nungzui khat in Jesus zui uh hi. Tua nungzui dang khat sia in Thiampi Lianbelpa ii heak mama pa hi a, tua ahikom ama in Jesus taw Thiampi Lianbelpa huang sung dong pai hi," 
John18:16 tua laitakin Peter kongpi puasia ah om hi. Tuaciang nungzui dangkhat sia pusuak kik a, kongpi ah a om numei sia a paupui zawkciang Peter tumpui hi." 
John18:17 Kongpi a om numei sia in Peter munah, “Nang zongh ziasia pa ii nungzui khat hi kana ngawl ni ziam,” ci hi. “Kei ka hi bua hi,” Peter in ci hi." 
John18:18 Khuasik ahikom silate le biakinn cingte in meihol thut in, a kiim ah mei oai in ding uh hi. Tua ahikom Peter zongh pai in amate taw dingin mei oai khawm hi." 
John18:19 Thiampi Lianbelpa in Jesus munah a nungzuite thu le ama ii hilcianna huvau thu dongh hi. 
John18:20 “Mihingte mai ah ka sonsa hi; ka hilcianna theampo sia mihing theampo hong paina mun synagogue te le Biakinnpi sungah kivawt hi. A thimtham in bangma ka son ngei bua hi. 
John18:21 Tua hikasap banghangin, thu hong dongh ni ziam? Ka pau hong zate dongh ta'n. Ka son thute amate munah dongh ta'n — amate in ka son thu teng he uh hi,” ci in Jesus in zo hi." 
John18:22 Jesus in hi bangin a ci ciang, tua munah biakinn cingte khat in Jesus beang a, “Bangbangin Thiampi Lianbelpa tungah tubangin pau ngam ni ziam!” ci hi." 
John18:23 “Pau khial nei ka hile hi sungah omte theampo munah ka pau khialna son in. Ahihang ka pauna sia a maan thu ahile banghangin hong vua ni ziam?” ci in Jesus in zo hi. 
John18:24 Tuasia ciang Annas in Jesus heencip sa ma in Thiampi Lianbel Caiaphas kungah puak hi. 
John18:25 Peter tua mun ma ah mei oai in om lai hi. Tua ahikom a dangte in, “Nang zongh ziasia pa ii nungzui khat hi ngawl ni ziam?” ci uh hi. Ahihang Peter in nial hi. “Kei ka hi bua hi,” ama in ci hi." 
John18:26 Peter ii a bil a satansak pa ii beete khat ahi Thiampi Lianbelpa ii sila khat in, “Ama taw huan sungah na om lai hong mu hi ngawl khi ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
John18:27 Peter in, “Kei ka hi bua hi,” a ci leleau laitak — thakhatin aklui khat hong khuang hi." 
John18:28 Zing tuungin Jesus sia Caiaphas ii inn pan ngamuk mangpa kumpi inn ah kipaipui hi. Jew thuneite in kumpi inn sungsang ah a tum bua uh hi, banghang ziam cile Paisan Poai anneak thei natu in amate zeksa vai in a thiangtho in om nuam uh hi." 
John18:29 Tua ahikom Pilate sia amate omna sangah pusuak in, “Hisia pa bang teng taw mawsak nu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
John18:30 Amate in, “Ama in khialna lian vawt buale nang kungah hong paipui ngawl tu khu hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
John18:31 “Tua ahile noma in, ama la vun a noma thukham taw kizui in thusit tavun,” Pilate in ci hi. Amate in, “Kote in kuama tungah thidaan dong piak thei natu thu nei ngawl khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
John18:32 (Jesus in a thi natu zia a sonna kammalte a tun natu hi bangin piang ahi hi.) 
John18:33 Pilate in kumpi inn sungah tum kikin Jesus sam hi, “Nang Jew mite ii Kumpipa na hi ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
John18:34 Jesus in, “Hi thu dokna sia nangma thinsung pan hong piang ziam, ahibuale kei thu ngual in nang tungah hong son ziam?” ci hi." 
John18:35 Pilate in zo kik a, “Jew mi khat hong sa ni ziam? Nangma kei tungah hong aapte sia nangma mipuite le thiampi liante ahi hi. Bang vawt nei ni ziam,” ci hi." 
John18:36 Jesus in, “Ka ngam sia hi leitung ah a om bua hi; ka ngam sia hi leitung ah om hile, Jew thuneite tungah hong ki aap ngawl natu in, ka nung hong zuite in do in hong hung tu hi. Hi ngawl hi, ka ngam sia hi sung hi ngawl hi!” ci hi." 
John18:37 Pilate in, “Tua ahile kumpipa khat na hi ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Jesus in, “Kumpipa hong ci sia nangma na hi hi. Hi leitung ah suak a, thumaan thutak sia ii thu son tu tupna khat taw in kong pai hi. Thumaan thutak ii neisa ahite peuma in kei thu hong ngai hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John18:38 “Tua ahile thumaan thutak sia bang ziam?” Pilate in dongh hi. Tua zawkciang Pilate doipua ah pai kik a, mihingte tungah, “Hisia pa mawsak natu thu bangma ka mu zo bua hi,” ci hi." 
John18:39 “Ahihang noma ngeina khat na nei uh bangin, Paisan Poai sungah thongtaak khat ka suaktasak tawntung hi. Note atu Jew te Kumpipa suaktasak leng nong oai uh ziam,” ci hi." 
John18:40 Amate au khat sua in, “Hi ngawl hi, ama hi ngawl hi! Barabbas dei khu hi!” ci in zo uh hi. (Barabbas sia ngual suampa ahi hi.)" 
John19:1 Tua zawkciangin, Pilate in Jesus pusua a, velsak hi." 
John19:2 Ngalkapte in lingnguite taw kumpilukhu khat vawtin, a lu tungah khusak uh hi; tua zawkciang puantual sandup khat silhsak uh hi," 
John19:3 tua zawkciang ama kungah hong pai uh a, “Jew te Kumpipa a khansau tahen!” ci hi. Tuaciang amate pai in beang uh hi." 
John19:4 Pilate khatvei ma pusuak kikin mihon tung ah, “En vun, ama mawsak natu bangma ka mu ngawlna thu na mu natu in, ama hi sungah hong paipui tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
John19:5 Tua ahikom Jesus sia kumpi ling lukhu khu in, puantual sandup silhin hong pusuak hi. Pilate in, “En vun! Hi sungah ama om hi!” ci hi." 
John19:6 Thiampi liante le biakinn cingte in a mu uh ciang, “Thinglamtee tungah that vun! Thinglamtee tungah that vun!” ci in au uh hi. Pilate in amate munah, “Tua ahile noma in ama la in, thinglamtee tungah that vun. Ama ka mawsak natu bangma thu mu ngawl khi hi,” ci hi." 
John19:7 Mihon in zo kik a, “Ama in Pathian Tapa ka hi ci ahikom thidaan piak tu in kilawm hi a ci thukham khat nei khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
John19:8 Pilate in hi thu a zaak ciangin, lau vaial hi." 
John19:9 Ama kumpi inn sungah tum kik a, Jesus munah, “Nang koisung pan hong pai ni ziam,” ci in dongh hi. Ahihang Jesus in zo ngawl hi." 
John19:10 Pilate in ama tungah, “Ka kam hong zo ngawl tu ni ziam? Phawk in, na suatak natu le thinglamtee tungah hong kithalup natu thu nei khawm khi hi,” ci hi." 
John19:11 Jesus in, “Pathian hong piak hu bek in, kei tungah thu na nei hi. Tua ahiciang nang tungah kei hong aap pa in, mawna nasia zaw vawt ahi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
John19:12 Pilate in hi thu a zaak ciangin, Jesus a suatak natu in lam zong hi. Ahihang mihon au kik a, “Ama na suatak le Kumpilianpa ii lawm na hi bua hi! Kumpi khat ka hi a ci pawpo in, Kumpilianpa a leedo pa ahi hi,” ci uh hi." 
John19:13 Pilate in hi thute a zaak ciangin ama in Jesus doipua ah paipuisak a, “Suangpheak Kiphana” a kici thukhente tona ah (Hebrew kam in Gabbatha kici hi) to hi." 
John19:14 Tua hun sia Paisan Poai a thet ma ni khat sunkim dektak hun ahi hi. Pilate in, “Hi sungah na Kumpipa uh om hi,” ci hi." 
John19:15 Amate in, “Ama that vun! Ama that vun! Thinglamtee tungah that vun!” ci in au uh hi. Pilate in “Na kumpipa uh thinglamtee tungah ka thalup tu dei nu ziam,” ci in dongh hi. Thiampi liante in, “Kumpipa khat bek ka nei uh sia Kumpilianpa sia hi!” ci in zo hi." 
John19:16 Tuasia ciang Pilate in Jesus thinglamtee tungah thalup tu in, amate tungah aap hi. Tua ahikom amate in Jesus la uh hi." 
John19:17 A thinglamtee pua in ama hong pusuak a, “Lungu Mun” a kici na hong theng hi. (Hebrew kam in Golgotha kici hi)" 
John19:18 Tua munah amate in thinglamtee tungah khai uh hi; pasal nii zongh Jesus lang le lang ah thinglamtee tungah khai uh hi. 
John19:19 Pilate in heaksakna laino khat at in, thinglamtee tungah taak hi. “Jew te Kumpipa Nazareth khua mi Jesus,” ci in a at hi." 
John19:20 Jew mite tam ma in sim uh hi, banghang ziam cile, Jesus a kikhaina mun sia khuapi taw a kikhuala bua hi. A lai taak sia Hebrew kam, Latin kam, le Greek kam in ki at hi." 
John19:21 Thiampi liante in Pilate mun ah, “ ‘Jew te ii Kumpipa,’ ci in at heak in, ‘Hisia pa in, Jew te Kumpipa ka hi hi, ci hi,’ ci in at zaw in,” ci uh hi." 
John19:22 Pilate in, “Ka at sa sia ka at sa bangma in kip tahen,” ci in zo hi." 
John19:23 Jesus thinglamtee tungah a kilh zawkciang ngalkapte in ama puansilh te suutin, ngalkap khat sim in, khen khat tek a cin tu in, khen li sua in hawm uh hi. Amate in puantual a silhsak sia zongh la uh hi, tua puantual sia a kikhuina om ngawl, a tuantung khat ahi hi." 
John19:24 Ngalkapte khat le khat kikum a “Hi sia balkeak bua tawng; akua in ih nga ziam, meesawk tawng,” ci uh hi. Laithiangtho sungah hi bang a ci sia a taangtun natu ahi hi: “Amate in ka puante hawm a, ka Puantual atu in kikhaam uh hi,” Hisia in ngalkapte ii ngamtatna ahi hi." 
John19:25 Jesus ii thinglamtee taw a kinaina ah, a nu, a nu ii suapuinu, Clopas ii zi Mary le Mary Magdalene te ding uh hi." 
John19:26 Jesus in a nu le ama ii it nungzuipa a ding khawm mu hi; tua ahikom a nu munah “Ama sia na tapa hi,” ci hi." 
John19:27 Tua zawkciang a nungzuipa munah, “Ama sia na nu hi,” ci hi. Tua hun pan kipan nungzuipa in, a inn ah teang tu in, ama la in ciapui hi." 
John19:28 Tu in na theampo khuangkhim siat zo hi, ci in Jesus in he hi; tuaciang laithiangtho kammal a tun natu in, Jesus in, “Ka dangko hi,” ci hi." 
John19:29 Tua munah kuang khat sungah sapittui haau om hi, tui huupna khat pap sukin, Hyssop thingbaak dawn ah a thua zawkciang, Jesus muk ah taa uh hi." 
John19:30 Jesus in tua sapittui a neak zawkciang, “Kizo zo hi!” ci hi. Tua zawkciang a lu kunsuk in thi hi." 
John19:31 Jew thuneite in, Pilate munah a kithatte ii peang a thiatan natu le, thinglamtee tung pan a luangte a laaksuk thei natu in ngen uh hi. Hi bang a nget theina uh sia banghang ziam cile tua ni sia nipi zawk Ni nga ni hi a, hong pai tu Sabbath sia a thiangtho tuam a kingaisun ahikom Sabbath ni in a luangte thinglamtee tungah a om tu a dei bua uh hi." 
John19:32 Tua ahikom a ngalkapte in, Jesus taw a kikhai khawmte a masa sia pa ii peangte thiaktan a, tua zawkciang a dang khat sia ii peangte zongh thiaktan uh hi." 
John19:33 Ahihang Jesus kung hong thet uh ciang, ama a thisa in mu ahikom, a peang a thiaktan bua uh hi." 
John19:34 Ahizong ngalkapte khat in, a tei taw Jesus pang a sut ciangin thakhatin chi le tui hong kee hi." 
John19:35 (Hi thu na up thei natu in, hi thupiang a mu pa in ama muna bangin hong son ahi hi. Ama thusonte a maan hi a, thumaan son ahi hunlam zongh a son pa in he hi.)" 
John19:36 Hi bangin a kivawt sia laithiangtho kammal a tun natu ahi hi: “Ama ii ngute khat zongh taltan ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
John19:37 Laithiangtho mundang khat ah, “Mihingte in amate ii holletpa sia a en tu uh hi,” ci si hi." 
John19:38 Hisia zawkciang Arimathea khua mi Joseph in Pilate munah, Jesus luang a laak thei natu in ngen hi. (Joseph sia Jesus nungzui khat hi a, ahizong Jew thuneite a kiitakna taw a thimtham in a zuipa khat ahi hi.) Pilate in a luang phaam thei natu thupia ahikom Joseph in a luang la in paipui hi." 
John19:39 Zan lai in Jesus taw kimu tu in, a pai masa pa, Nicodemus sia Joseph taw ton hi, ama in thing namtui myrrh le aloe te a kihel kilogramme 30 bang hong paipui hi." 
John19:40 Tua pasalte nii in, Jew te ii kiphum tu ciang, a luang a pua kholna ngeina om bangin, Jesus luang la in, hel namtui thau taw zutin, puanneal taw tun uh hi." 
John19:41 Jesus a kithalupna munah huan khat om a, tua munah kuama a kiphum ngeingawl lai thaankuul thak khat om hi." 
John19:42 Sabbath hun a tun ma ni khat ni ahi hu le, a thaankuul taw kinai si ahikom, amate in Jesus luang tualai ah sial uh hi." 
John20:1 Nipi ni zingsang tuung khuavak ma in, Mary Magdalene thaan vil tu a pai ciang, a kongvang pan suangtumpui sia kilakeak sa in a om mu hi." 
John20:2 Ama in Simon Peter le a dang nungzui, Jesus ii itpa kung zuan in tai a, “Amate in Topa sia thaan pan la zo hi, ama koisungah koi ziam ci sia he ngawl khu hi!” ci hi." 
John20:3 Tuasia ciang Peter le a dang nungzui pa sia thaan ah pai uh hi. 
John20:4 Amate nii in del khawm ahihang nungzui dangkhat sia Peter sangin a ngang zawin tai ahikom thaan theng masa hi. 
John20:5 Ama kun in thaankuul sung a et suk ciang a kituunna puannealte mu hi, ahihang a sungah tum ngawl hi." 
John20:6 Ama nung pan Simon Peter hong pai a, thaankuul sung thakhatin tum paih hi. Ama in a kituunna puannealte lei ah a om mu hi," 
John20:7 tuaciang in Jesus lutang tunna puan zongh mu hi. Tua lutang kituunna puan sia puanneal dangte taw omkhawm ngawl a, a kizialsa in om tuam hi." 
John20:8 Tuasia ciang thaan a theng masa nungzui dang khat sia zongh tum hi; ama in mu a um hi. 
John20:9 (Amate in, “Laithiangtho ii ama thina pan tho kik nanak tu hi,” a ci sia a tel bualai uh hi.)" 
John20:10 Tuasia ciang nung zuite inn ah cia kik uh hi. 
John20:11 Mary sia thaan pua sangah dingin kap hi. A kaa kawmin kun a thaankuul sung en hi," 
John20:12 tuaciang vantunglalangte nii puanpaak silh in, Jesus luang sialna ah, khat a luthung, khat a khawdop ah to in a om sia mu hi." 
John20:13 “Numei awng, banghangin kap ni ziam?” ci in amate in dongh hi. Ama in, “Amate in ka Topa la a, koisungah koi ziam, ci in ka he bua hi!” ci in zo hi." 
John20:14 Tuaciangin ama a kiheak le, ama kungah a ding Jesus mu hi; ahihang ama in Jesus ahi hunlam he ngawl hi." 
John20:15 “Numei awng, banghangin kap ni ziam? Na zon sia akua ziam?” ci in Jesus in dongh hi. Ama in huan neipa sa ahikom in, “Ama la zo na hi le, syapa awng, na koina hong son ta'n. Pai in ka la tu hi,” ci hi." 
John20:16 Jesus in, “Mary awng!” ci hi. Numeinu ama sangah nga in, Hebrew kam in, “Rabboni!” ci hi. (Hi kammal sia Syapa a cinopna hi.)" 
John20:17 “Hong len top heak in, banghang ziam cile Pa kungah paito ngawl lai khi hi. Ahihang ka suapuipate kungah pai in va son ta'n. Ka Pa le amate ii Pa, ka Pathian le amate ii Pathian kungah heak kik tu khi hi,” Jesus in ci hi." 
John20:18 Tua ahikom Mary Magdalene pai in nungzuite tungah, Topa a muna thu le ama ii son in a sawl teng son hi." 
John20:19 Nipi nitak khua niam sang hi a, nungzuite in inn kikalh in kikhawm tua uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate in Jew thuneite kiita uh hi. Tuasia ciang Jesus hong tum a, amate sungah hong ding hi. Ama in “Note sungah thinnopna om tahen,” ci hi." 
John20:20 Hi teng a ci zawkciang ama in a khutte le a pangh amate tungah lak hi. Nungzuite in Topa a mu uh hu in, lungnopna taw kidim uh hi." 
John20:21 Jesus in, “Note sungah thinnopna om tahen,” “Pa ii kei hong sawl bangma in, kei in note kong sawl hi,” ci kik hi." 
John20:22 Tua zawkciang amate tungah, a hu muutin, “Thaa Thiangtho saang vun." 
John20:23 Mihingte tungah mawmaisakna na pia uh le amate kimaisak tu hi; amate mawna na maisak bua uh le amate a kimaisak buatu hi,” ci hi." 
John20:24 Jesus hong pai lai in, nungzui sawm le niite sung pan khat ahi, Thomas (Apeang a kici) sia amate taw a omkhawm bua hi." 
John20:25 Tua ahikom nungzui dangte in, “Topa ka mu zo uh hi,” ci in ama tungah son uh hi. Thomas in, “A khut tung thikpim mapawnte mu a, ka khutme taw a mapawnte tham in ka khut taw a pangh ka tham buale ka um buatu hi,” ci hi." 
John20:26 Nipi khat zawkciang nungzuite inn sungsang ah omkhawm kik uh a, Thomas zongh om hi. Kongkhate kikalh ahihang, Jesus hong pai a, amate sungah dingin, “Note sungah thinnopna om tahen,” ci hi." 
John20:27 Tua zawkciang, Thomas tungah, “Na khutme taw hi sung hong tham ta'n, ka khutte hong en ta'n; tuaciang na khut vaan in ka pangh hong tham ta'n. Um khial heak in, um takpi in!” ci hi." 
John20:28 Thomas in, “Ka Topa le ka Pathian awng!” ci in zo hi." 
John20:29 Jesus in, “Nong mu hu in hong um ni ziam? Hong mu ngawl napi a hong umte bangza in lungdam tu ziam!” ci hi." 
John20:30 A nungzuite ii mutang in, Jesus in hi laibu sungah a kikhum ngawl, nalamdang lakna dang tam mama vawt hi." 
John20:31 Ahihang hite hong ki atna sia Jesus in Pathian Tapa Messiah a hina thu, na up natu uh le ama na upna uh tungtawnin, nuntakna na nga thei natu uh ahi hi." 
John21:1 Hisia zawkciang Jesus khatvei ma Tiberias Tuili ah nungzuite kungah kilaak hi. A kilaakzia hi bang ahi hi. 
John21:2 Simon Peter, Thomas (apeang a kici), Nathanael (Galilee ngam Cana khua mi) Zebedee ii tapate, Jesus ii nungzui dangte nii sia kikhawmtua uh hi." 
John21:3 Simon Peter in, “Kei ngasa paai in ka pai tu hi,” a dangte tungah ci hi. “Ko zong kong zui tu uh hi,” ci in a dangte in son uh hi. Tua ahikom amate in ngunkuang khat taw pai uh hi, ahihang tua zan bup bangma a man bua uh hi." 
John21:4 Ni hong sua ciangin, Jesus tui hui ah ding hi, ahihang nungzuite in Jesus ahi hunlam a he bua uh hi." 
John21:5 “Tangvalte awng, bangma man ngawl nu ziam?” ci in Jesus in dongh hi. “Bangma man ngawl khu hi,” ci in zo uh hi." 
John21:6 Ama in, “Na ngeen uh ngun kuang ziatsang ah paai le uhte pawlkhat man tu nu hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom amate in ngeen a paai uh ciang, a dawk kik zo nawn bua hi, banghang ziam cile amate in ngasa tam mama man uh hi." 
John21:7 Jesus ii it nungzuipa in, Peter munah, “Tu a sia Topa hi!” ci hi. Peter in Topa hi ci in a zaak ciang, a puantungsilh taw kituun hi, (Banghang ziam cile ama in a puante suut hi) tuaciangin tui sungah leangsuk hi." 
John21:8 Nungzui dangte in ngasa a dim ngeen sia kai kawm a, ngunkuang taw vaalbo ah hong pai uh hi. Amate omna sia lei taw a kikhuala lei ngawl, metre za khat na bang ahi hi." 
John21:9 Amate in vaalbo ah hong kaa uh ciangin, meihol kithut khat mu uh a, a tungah ngasa le anluum pawlkhat om hi." 
John21:10 Jesus in, “Na mat tawm uh ngasa pawlkhat zongh hong paipui tavun,” ci hi." 
John21:11 Simon Peter ngunkuang sungah tuakin, ngasa lian a dim ngeen sia vaalbo ah kai hi, a vekpi in 153 pha hi; tuaza in tam ahihang a ngeen ektham ngawl hi." 
John21:12 Jesus in, “Hong pai tavun a ne vun,” ci hi. A nungzuite kuama in, “Nang kua ni ziam?” ci in a dongh ngam bua uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate in Topa ahi sia he uh hi." 
John21:13 Tua ahikom amate kung zuan in, anluum la in amate pia hi, ngasa zongh tuabang ma in pia hi." 
John21:14 Hisia in Jesus ii thina pan a kithaw kiksak zawk, a nungzuite mun a kilaak a thum veina ahi hi." 
John21:15 An a neak zawk uh ciang Jesus in Peter mun ah, “John ii tapa Simon awng, hi ngualdangte ii hong it sangin, kei nong itzaw ziam,” ci hi. “Hi hi, Topa awng, nang kong it sia nangma in na he hi,” ci in ama in zo hi. Jesus in, “Ka tuunote na keam in,” ci hi." 
John21:16 A nii veina Jesus in, “John ii tapa Simon awng, kei nong it ziam?” ci hi. Ama in, “Hi hi, Topa awng, nang kong it sia nangma in na he hi,” ci in zo hi. “Ka tuute na keam in,” Jesus in ci hi." 
John21:17 A thum veina Jesus in, “John ii tapa Simon awng, kei nong it ziam?” ci hi. Peter sia Jesus ii, “Kei nong it ziam,” ci in thumvei dong a dok hu in, hee hi, tua ahikom ama munah, “Topa awng na theampo na he hi; nang kong it hunlam na he hi,” ci hi. Jesus in, ama munah “Ka tuute na keam in." 
John21:18 A maan takin kong ci hi: na khanmoi lai in, a kinging sa in na om bul a, na uukna theampo ah na pai bul hi, ahihang na khanhaam ciangin, na khutte na vaan tu a, tuaciang khat in khau hong khii in, na uuk ngawlna ah hong paipui tu hi,” ci hi." 
John21:19 (Hi bang a Jesus ii a ci sia Pathian minthan natu in Peter ii a thi natu teng a sonna hi.) Tua zawkciang Jesus in, “Kei hong zui ta'n,” ci hi." 
John21:20 Peter in, a kiheak ciang a nungah Jesus ii it nungzui dang khat sia mu hi — An a neak uh lai Topa kung to a, neal kawm in, “Topa awng nang akua in hong leeheak tu ziam?” ci in a dongh sia pa ahi hi." 
John21:21 Peter in a mu ciang, Jesus mun ah, “Topa awng, hisia pa bangbangin om tu ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
John21:22 Jesus in zo kik a, “Kong pai kik dong ama nungta in ka oai le zong nang bang nuam maw ni ziam, kei hong zui ta'n!” ci hi." 
John21:23 Tua ahikom tua nungzuipa thi ngawl tu hi, ci in Jesus nungzuite sungah thu kizel hi. Ahihang Jesus in ama a thi buatu hi, a ci hi ngawl hi; ama in “Kong pai kik dong nungta in ka oai le zong bang nuam maw ni ziam?” a ci ahi hi." 
John21:24 Ama sia hi thute a son nungzuipa hi a, lai taw zongh a atpa ahi hi; tuaciang ama ii sonte sia thumaan hi, ci in ih he hi." 
John21:25 Tu in Jesus ii a sep nadang tam mama om hi. Tuate theampo khat zawkciang khat ki atsak siat le leitung bup ah tua laibute ta zo ngawl tu hi ci in ka um hi. 
Acts1:1 Theophilus awng: Ka laibu masa sia sungah Jesus nasep a kipat pan a, kipan a sepna le hilnate theampo kong at zo a," 
Acts1:2 ama vantung ah a kilaakto ni dong, huam hi. A kilaak to ma in, sawltak tu a tealte tungah Thaa Thiangtho vaang taw thupiakna nei hi." 
Acts1:3 A thi zawk ni sawmli sungah amate tungah tamvei ma kilak a, ama sia nungta nginge ahi hunlam up laak om ngawl tu in, a nanam in kilak hi. Ama sia sawltakte in mu uh a, Pathian Ngam thu ama in sonpui hi." 
Acts1:4 Amate hong kikhoptua uh ciangin, hi bangin thupia hi: “Jerusalem nusia heak vun, no tungah kong sonsa Pa ii kamciam hong piaksa letsong sia, na ngak vun," 
Acts1:5 John in tuidam taw tui hong phum hi, ahihang ni tawmvei no sungin, note Thaa Thiangtho taw na ki baptize tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Acts1:5 John in tuidam taw tui hong phum hi, ahihang ni tawmvei no sungin, note Thaa Thiangtho taw na ki baptize tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Acts1:6 Sawltakte in Jesus taw a kisik uh ciangin, “Topa awng, Israel mite tungah a Ngam na pia kik tu ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Acts1:7 Jesus in, “Hunte le thunei theinate sia ka Pa zeak hi a, bang hun ciang hi tu cisia no heak tu thu hi ngawl hi." 
Acts1:8 Ahihang Thaa Thiangtho note tungah hong pai ciang, vaangletna taw na kidim tu uh a, Jerusalem pan kipan Judea ngam bup le Samaria ngam le leimong dongin, ka tetti na hi tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Acts1:8 Ahihang Thaa Thiangtho note tungah hong pai ciang, vaangletna taw na kidim tu uh a, Jerusalem pan kipan Judea ngam bup le Samaria ngam le leimong dongin, ka tetti na hi tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Acts1:9 Hi teng a ci zawkciang, amate mu tangin, van ah ama kilato a, meeikaai in lia hi." 
Acts1:10 Ama ii paina san vantung salh in, a om uh laitakin, puankaang silh pasal nii sia amate kungah hong ding a," 
Acts1:11 amate in, “Galilee mite awng, van ento in banghangin tua munah ding top nu ziam? Hi Jesus sia note kung pan vantung ah a kilaak to na mu uh bang tatak ma in hong pai kik tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Acts1:12 Tua zawkciang Sawltakte in Jerusalem pan kilometre khat bang a khualana Olive Mual panin, Jerusalem ah cia kik uh hi." 
Acts1:13 Amate Jerusalem khua sungah tumin, a taam ngeina mun inn tung dawl sungah om uh hi. Amate teng sia Peter, John, James le Andrew, Philip le Thomas, Bartholomew le Matthew, Alphaeus, ii tapa James, Minam it Simon, le James ii tapa Judas ahi uh hi." 
Acts1:13 Amate Jerusalem khua sungah tumin, a taam ngeina mun inn tung dawl sungah om uh hi. Amate teng sia Peter, John, James le Andrew, Philip le Thomas, Bartholomew le Matthew, Alphaeus, ii tapa James, Minam it Simon, le James ii tapa Judas ahi uh hi." 
Acts1:13 Amate Jerusalem khua sungah tumin, a taam ngeina mun inn tung dawl sungah om uh hi. Amate teng sia Peter, John, James le Andrew, Philip le Thomas, Bartholomew le Matthew, Alphaeus, ii tapa James, Minam it Simon, le James ii tapa Judas ahi uh hi." 
Acts1:13 Amate Jerusalem khua sungah tumin, a taam ngeina mun inn tung dawl sungah om uh hi. Amate teng sia Peter, John, James le Andrew, Philip le Thomas, Bartholomew le Matthew, Alphaeus, ii tapa James, Minam it Simon, le James ii tapa Judas ahi uh hi." 
Acts1:14 Jesus ii suapui pate, a nu Mary le numei dangte taw amate pawlkhat, thungen tu in kikhawmtua nithi uh hi." 
Acts1:15 Ni tawmvei zawkciangin, thu um teng kikhopna khat om a, mihing za le kul bang pha uh hi. Tuaciang Peter sia thuson tu in, ding hi." 
Acts1:16 “Ka suapuite awng, Thaa Thiangtho in David tungtawnin, Jesus a man tute, lam a lak Judas huvau a sonkholna laithiangtho kammalte a taangtut kul hi." 
Acts1:17 Judas sia koma ii pawl mi khat ahi hi, banghang ziam cile koma ii nasepna sungah, ama zongh nasep khat nei tu in, a kiteal pa ahi hi.”" 
Acts1:18 (Judas in ama ii ngitlo ngamtatna taw a nga sum taw lo khat lei a, tuasung ah pukvawk in thi hi; ama sia puaktham in, a ngil keekeak hi." 
Acts1:19 Jerusalem ah a teang mihing theampo in tua thu za ahikom, tua lo sia, amate kam in Akeldama, a khiakna sia “Chisan Lo” ci in min phuak uh hi.)" 
Acts1:20 “Banghang ziam cile Psalm late ii sungah, ‘Ama ii bangkua awngthong tahen a, kuama a teang om heak hen,’ ci in ki at a, ‘A nasepna mun zongh midang khat in laih tahen,’ ci in ki at si hi." 
Acts1:21 “Tua ahikom, Topa Jesus thaw kikna tetti in a pang tu mihing khat kote sungah hong kibelap kul hi." 
Acts1:22 Ama sia bangbang mihing hi tu ziam cile, John ii tuiphumna huvau a hil hun pan kipan Jesus van ah a kilaak to dong a kilaklaw teng, Jesus khualhawna theampo sung, ko pawl sungah hong kihel top khat ahi kul hi,” ci hi." 
Acts1:22 Ama sia bangbang mihing hi tu ziam cile, John ii tuiphumna huvau a hil hun pan kipan Jesus van ah a kilaak to dong a kilaklaw teng, Jesus khualhawna theampo sung, ko pawl sungah hong kihel top khat ahi kul hi,” ci hi." 
Acts1:23 Tua ahikom amate in, mihing nii ii min aap uh hi. Barsabbas a kici Joseph (Justus zongh kici si) khat le, Matthias ahi uh hi." 
Acts1:24 Tua zawkciang amate in, “Topa awng, mihing theampo ii thinsung na he hi. Tua ahiciang, Topa awng, hite nii sung pan koisia teal ni ziam hong lak ta'n." 
Acts1:25 Judas in a zot natu zuanin a nusiat sawltak za a awng sia dip natu in hong hesak ta'n” ci in thungen uh hi. 
Acts1:26 Tua zawkciangin amate in, tua mite nii sung pan, a kiteal natu in, lai aisaan a, Matthias kiteal ahikom, sawltak sawm le khat te ii pawl sungah ama kibelap hi." 
Acts2:1 Pentecost ni hong thet ciangin, thu um theampo mun khat ah kikhawm uh hi." 
Acts2:2 Thakhat thu in, van pan a nging khat hong om a, vui nasia tak a vak ngawp ciang, a luum himhum bang hi in, amate tona inn buppi sia tua a nging taw kidim hi." 
Acts2:3 Tuasia ciangin amate in leei taw a kibang meikuang mu uh a, tua munah a om mihing khat sim sia, tua meikuang in thutha hi." 
Acts2:4 Amate sia Thaa Thiangtho taw kidim uh a, Thaa ii a pausak bangin, kampau dangte taw pau uh hi." 
Acts2:5 Tua laitak leitung theampo pan hong pai biakna kin Jew te Jerusalem khua ah teang uh hi. 
Acts2:6 Hi awnging sia a zaak uh ciangin, mihon khat hong kikhawm uh hi. Amate liinglawng ngawp uh hi. Banghang ziam cile thu umte ii pauna sia, amate tek ii kam taw za uh hi." 
Acts2:7 Lamdangsakna taw amate in hi bangin ci uh hi. “Tu a bangin a pau mihingte sia Galilee mite ahi hi. 
Acts2:8 Tua hikasap amate pau sia, eima kam tek taw ih zaak sia bangbang ziam?" 
Acts2:9 Eite sia Parthia, Media le Elam pan hikale, Mesopotamia, Judea le Cappadocia pan, Pontus le Asia pan," 
Acts2:9 Eite sia Parthia, Media le Elam pan hikale, Mesopotamia, Judea le Cappadocia pan, Pontus le Asia pan," 
Acts2:10 Phrygia le Pamphylia pan, Egypt le Cyrene taw a kinai Libya pan, pawlkhat Rome pan," 
Acts2:11 Jew le Gentile te Jew biakna a suakte, tuaciang eite pawlkhat sia Crete le Arabia pan — hi napi ih mihing sim in eima kam tek taw Pathian nasep lianpi a sepna ih za tek hi!”" 
Acts2:12 “Hisia in bang thu ziam?” ci in lamdangsakna le lungdamna taw khat le khat kidongh uh hi. 
Acts2:13 Ahizong pawlkhatte in thu umte sia nunau a, “Hi mihingte in zukham hi!” ci uh hi." 
Acts2:14 Tuaciang Peter in a dang sawltak sawm le khat te taw ding a, mihonte tungah nging takin thuson hi: “Jew minampuite le Jerusalem ah a teang note theampo awng, hong ngai tavun, hisia in bang thu ziam ci sia hong sonsak tavun." 
Acts2:15 Hi lai a, mihingte sia no upmawk bangin, zukham hi ngawl hi. Tu laitak sia zingsang nai kua hi pheang hi." 
Acts2:16 Tua hi zaw ngawlin, hisia in kamsaangpa Joel ii sonsa thu hi a:" 
Acts2:17 ‘Hisia in ni tawpkhak sang ciangin ka vawt tu thu ahi hi, Pathian in ci hi: Ka thaa ka buak tu hi. Na tapate le na tanute in, keima thu thangsak tu uh hi. Na khangnote in mang mu tu uh hi; Na khanghaamte in, mang man tu uh hi." 
Acts2:18 Hi hi, pate zongh numeite zongh ka naseamte ngawngawn tung zongh ah tua ni ciangin, ka thaa ka buak tu a, tuaciang amate in keima ii thu thangsak tu hi." 
Acts2:19 Van ah a lamdang laknate ka vawt tu a, leitung ah a lamdang nate ka piangsak tu hi; chisan, meikuang le meikhu ciikte hong om tu hi:" 
Acts2:20 Ni hong mial a hong zing tu hi. Tha in chi bangin san tu hi. A lian a minthang Topa Ni hong thet ma in, tuabang hong piang tu hi." 
Acts2:21 Tua zawkciangin, huna ngen a, Topa a biakpui peuma kingum tu hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts2:22 “Hi kammalte ngai vun. Israel mipuite awng! Nazareth mi Jesus sia Pathian in ama tungtawnin a vawt nalamdang laknate le a lamdangte theampo hu in Pathian piak thunei pa tatak ahi hunlam kilangh hi. Noma mama in zongh, hi thu he nu hi, banghang ziam cile hi mun note sungah hi thu piang hi." 
Acts2:23 Pathian in ama thuneina le tupna taw Jesus sia no khut sungah ki aap tu in zeak zo hi; tuaciang mimawte in, ama sia thinglamtee tungah na kilhsakna uh taw note in ama na thatlum zo uh hi." 
Acts2:24 Ahihang Pathian in ama sia, a thite kawm pan phong kik a, thina vaang panin suaktasak hi, banghang ziam cile, thina in ama thong sungah a khumcip tu sia suak thei ngawl hi." 
Acts2:25 Tua ahikom, David in ama huvau ah, ‘Topa sia a tawntungin ka mai ah ka mu hi; ama sia ka kungah om ahikom, ngim ka nga buatu hi." 
Acts2:26 Hi thu hangin lungdamna taw ka kidim a, tuaciang ka kammalte in lungdamna taw kidim hi. Tuaciang kei sia a thithei ka hi hangin, muanmawkna sungah, thin muangin ka tawlnga tu hi," 
Acts2:27 banghang ziam cile, nang in ka thaa sia mithite khua ah nong nusia buatu hi; nang in na naseampa, thaan sungah a muatcip tu in nong oai buatu hi." 
Acts2:28 Nuntakna lampi nong lak zo a, tuaciang nangma nong ompuina in, lungdamna taw nong kidimsak tu hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts2:29 “Suapuite awng, a minthang ih taanghpupi David kumpipa thu sia thiangtho takin, ka son kul hi. Ama sia thi in kiphum hi. Ama thaan zongh tuni dongin, eima kungah om nginge hi." 
Acts2:30 Ama sia kamsaang khat hi a, David ii suan sung pan khat sia, David bangma in kumpi khat a suasak natu, Pathian ii kamciam a piaksa ahi hunlam ama in he hi." 
Acts2:31 David in Pathian ii a vawt tu khat mukhol zo ahikom, Messiah thaw kikna thu, hi bangin son hi. ‘Ama sia mithite khua ah kinusia ngawl hi. a pumpi thaan sungah muat ngawl hi.’" 
Acts2:32 Pathian in hi Jesus mama mithite sung pan phong a, ko theampo in hi thu ah tetti ka pang uh hi." 
Acts2:33 Ama sia Pathianziatsang ah to tu in kiphong a, ama in, a Pa kamciam bangma in, Thaa Thiangtho saang hi. Tuaciangin tu a na mu uh na zaak uh sia, ama letsong kote tungah hong buaksuk sia ahi hi." 
Acts2:34 Banghang ziam cile vantung ah a kaato pa in David hi ngawl hi, ama in, ‘Topa in ka Topa tungah: Hi sung ka ziatsang ah," 
Acts2:35 Na ngalte na peang nuai ah peang ngakna bangin kong koisak mateng in, hong to ta'n,’ ci hi." 
Acts2:36 Tua ahiciang Israel mite theampo ii telthiang tu thu in, hi Jesus thinglamtee tungah na kilh uh pa sia, Topa le Messiah tu a, Pathian vawt sa ahi hi!” ci hi." 
Acts2:37 Tua mihingte in hi thu a zaak uh ciangin, nasia takin a thin uh ngim a, Peter le sawltak dangte munah, “Suapuite awng, bang law tu khu ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Acts2:38 Na mawnate uh hong kimaisak a, Pathian ii tel, Thaa Thiangtho na saan natu in, note khat sim in, na mawnate pan kikheal nanak vun a, Jesus min taw tui kiphum tavun," 
Acts2:39 banghang ziam cile Pathian kamciam sia, no le na tate le, a khualana ah a omte atu in a kivawt hi a, tuaciangin Topa Pathian ii ama kungah a samsa theampo atu ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Acts2:40 Peter in amate tungah zolna le hanthotna kammal tam mama zangh a, “Hi mihing seksolte ii thuak tu daan pan suakta tavun!” ci hi." 
Acts2:41 Mihing tam mama in a thuson um a, tui kiphum uh hi. Tua ni in mihing tulthum bang pawlpi sungah kibelap hi." 
Acts2:42 Amate in a hun neite uh sia, sawltakte tung pan thusinna in zangh a, kipawlna sung, pawl anneakkhopna le thungetna sungah kihel tek uh hi." 
Acts2:43 Nalamdang laknate le a lamdang tam mamate, sawltakte tungtawnin kivawt a, hi thu hu in mihing theampo in lamdangsakna taw kidim uh hi." 
Acts2:44 Thu umte theampo in kithawl vadiam in, a neisate khat le khat kihawm in, om suak uh hi." 
Acts2:45 Amate in a neisate zuak a, mihing khat sim ii a kitaangsapna babang taw kizui in, a sum hawm uh hi." 
Acts2:46 Kipawlkhawm in Biakinnpi ah ni sim kikhawm uh a, lungdamna le kiniamkhiakna thin taw inn ah an zongh nekhawm uh hi," 
Acts2:47 Pathian pokin mihing theampo ii diksakna zongh nga uh hi. Topa in ni simin, ngupna nga mihing amate pawl sungah belap hi." 
Acts3:1 Ni khat Peter le John sia thunget hun, nitak nai thum in Biakinn ah pai uh hi." 
Acts3:1 Ni khat Peter le John sia thunget hun, nitak nai thum in Biakinn ah pai uh hi." 
Acts3:2 Kongpi Hoi kicina munah a khan tawntung peangzaw pasal khat om hi. Biakinnpi ah a pai mite ii tung pan sum ngen tu in ama sia nisimin tua kongpi hui ah puakin kikoi hi. 
Acts3:3 Peter le John sungtang tu a mu ciangin, bang khat po ama a piak tu in, ngen hi." 
Acts3:3 Peter le John sungtang tu a mu ciangin, bang khat po ama a piak tu in, ngen hi." 
Acts3:4 Amate in pasalpa sia a tangtan in salh uh a, Peter in, “Hong en ta'n!” ci hi." 
Acts3:5 Tua ahikom amate tung pan, na khat pawpo nga tu in, kimuanmawkna taw en hi." 
Acts3:6 Ahihang Peter in, “Sum le paai nei ngawl khi hi, ahizong ka nei sia hong pia tu khi hi: Nazareth mi Jesus Christ min taw thoto in lampai in, ci in thu kong pia hi!” ci hi." 
Acts3:7 Tua zawkciangin a khut ziatsang pan len in, dingsak hi. Thakhat thu in, pasalpa peangte le a siakmitte hat hi;" 
Acts3:8 ama sia kilawn in, a peang taw ding a, lampai tu in kipan hi. Tua zawkciangin, amate taw Biakinnpi sungah tum a, lampai in, kilawn in, Pathian pok hi." 
Acts3:9 Mihon bup in, tuabang kalsuan a, Pathian a pok laitakin, mu uh hi." 
Acts3:10 “Kongpi Hoi” kici Biakinn tumna a, khutdaw ngenpa ahi hunlam, a heak uh ciangin, ama tungah thupiang sia lamdang sa mama uh hi." 
Acts3:11 Tua pasalpa in Peter le John lenin, a om laitak, tua munah a om mihing theampo in Solomon ii Talaap a kicina mun dong del uh hi." 
Acts3:11 Tua pasalpa in Peter le John lenin, a om laitak, tua munah a om mihing theampo in Solomon ii Talaap a kicina mun dong del uh hi." 
Acts3:12 Peter in mipite a mu ciangin, “Israel mipuite awng, banghangin hi tungtaang ah lamdang sa in, ko sia hong salh ngengu nu ziam? Ko ii vaangletna, ahibuale Pathianzia ka neina uh taw, hisia pa lampaisak thei hong sa nu ziam?" 
Acts3:13 Abraham, Isaac le Jacob te ii Pathian, ih taanghpupite ii Pathian in, a Naseampa Jesus sia Pathian piak minthanna pia hi. Noma in ama sia Jew lampuite tungah na aap uh hi. Pilate in ama suaktasak tu in, a khensat zawkciang zong, Pilate mai ah na nial uh hi." 
Acts3:14 Ama sia thiangtho a, pha hi napi na nial uh a, ama taangin, mihing thatpa khat Pilate ii suatak a piak tu in, na ngen zaw uh hi." 
Acts3:15 Tua hi a, nuntakna a pia pa, note in na thatlum uh hi. Ahitazong, Pathian in ama thina panin, phongto a, hi thu huvau ah, kote in tetti ka hi uh hi." 
Acts3:16 Ama' min ii vaang in hi peangzaw pa thahatna pia hi. Na mu uhte le na heak uhte sia, ama ii min upna taw a kivawt hi; Na mu tek siat uh bangma in Jesus a upna in, ama damsak ahi hi." 
Acts3:17 “Tu in ka mipui Israel te awng, note le na lampuite ii, Jesus tungah na ngamtat uhte, tel ngawl vai ahi hunlam hong he khi hi." 
Acts3:18 Pathian in nidang lai pekin, kamsaang theampo ii muk panin, Messiah in a thuak kul tu hi, ci in a thu thangsak khol zo hi; tuaciang hi bangin tungsak hi." 
Acts3:19 Tua ahiciang kisiik kik vun a, Pathian kung zuan vun, tua hile na mawnate hong kimaisak tu hi. Tuabang na hi uh le," 
Acts3:20 Topa hong ompuina panin, thahatna hong piang tu hi, tuaciangin, no atu a kiteal kholsa Messiah ahi Jesus sia ama in hong paisak tu hi." 
Acts3:21 Pathian kamsaang thiangthote ii khuangei hunlai a, a sonkhol sa bangma in, na theampo a kithaksua siat dong, ama in vantung ah om hamtang tu hi." 
Acts3:22 Banghang ziam cile Moses in, ‘Na Topa Pathian in kei hong paisak bangma in, kamsaang khat hong paisak tu a, ama sia noma mite sung pan khat hi tu hi. Ama ii sep tu hong son thu theampo na ni tu uh hi." 
Acts3:23 Mihing khat pawpo in, tua kamsaangpa ci bang a ni ngawl sia Pathian mite sung pan kituam khenin kisusia tu hi’ ci hi." 
Acts3:24 Tuaciangin Samuel le ama zawkciang hong piangte pan kipan, thu son tu a nei kamsaang theampo in tu hun dongin a piang tawto thute son lai hi." 
Acts3:25 Kamsaangte tungtawn a, Pathian kamciamte note atu ahi hi. Pathian le na taanghpupite thuciamna a siimte na hi uh hi. Pathian in Abraham tungah, ‘Na suan, na paalte tungtawnin, leitung mihing theampo thupha ka pia tu hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts3:26 Tua ahikom note theampo in na ngitlo nate pan kikheal a, thupha hong piak thei natu in, Pathian in a Naseampa teal in note kungah hong sawl masa hi,” ci hi." 
Acts4:1 Peter le John mihingte tungah thu a son laitakin, thiampite pawlkhat, biakinn cingte a ukpa le Sadducee te pawlkhat amate kungah theng uh hi." 
Acts4:1 Peter le John mihingte tungah thu a son laitakin, thiampite pawlkhat, biakinn cingte a ukpa le Sadducee te pawlkhat amate kungah theng uh hi." 
Acts4:2 Amate lungkim ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile, mithite thaw kik tu thu a kilanghsakna in, Jesus sia thina pan tho kik zo hi, cina thu sawltakte nii in mihingte tung a hil hu ahi hi." 
Acts4:3 Tua ahikom amate in, sawltakte nii manin, ni niam zo ahikom a zing ciang dong thong sungah khum uh hi." 
Acts4:4 Ahihang a thuson a za mihing tam mama in um a, thu um mi tulnga bang khang hi." 
Acts4:5 A zing ciangin Jew lampuite, upate le Thukham hil syate, Jerusalem ah kikhawm uh hi." 
Acts4:6 Amate in Thiampi Lianbel Annas, Caiaphas, John, Alexander, le Thiampi Lianbel ii innkuanpui dangte taw kimu uh hi." 
Acts4:6 Amate in Thiampi Lianbel Annas, Caiaphas, John, Alexander, le Thiampi Lianbel ii innkuanpui dangte taw kimu uh hi." 
Acts4:7 Amate in sawltakte sia a mai ah dingsak a, “Hi sia bangbangin seam nu ziam? Note in bang vaang nei a, akua min zangh nu ziam?” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Acts4:8 Thaa Thiangtho taw a kidim Peter in zo a, “Minamte lampui le upate awng," 
Acts4:9 peangzaw pa tungah thupha vawtna le ama a kidamsakna hu in, kote tuni in, thu sit thuak ka hi uh le" 
Acts4:10 no teng le Israel mi theampo in hi mihingpa sia thinglamtee tung na thalup, Pathian ii thina pan a phok kik Nazareth mi Jesus Christ min taw dam thiang in hi sung note mai ah hong ding ahi hunlam na heak uh kul tu hi." 
Acts4:11 Jesus sia laithiangtho in hi bangin a ci pa ahi hi. ‘No inn sate ii na nil uh suang sia, a theampo sung pan a thupibel suang suak hi.’" 
Acts4:12 Ngupna sia ama bek tungtawnin kinga thei hi; leitung bup ah eite hong ngum thei tu in, Pathian piaksa midang khat zongh om ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
Acts4:13 Council upate in, Peter le John sia mihing thawthong hi a, pilna nei ngawl hi napi, tuza in a hansanna sia lamdang sa uh hi. Tuasia ciangin amate ngeal sia Jesus ii kitholpui ngeite ahi hunlam phawk uh hi." 
Acts4:13 Council upate in, Peter le John sia mihing thawthong hi a, pilna nei ngawl hi napi, tuza in a hansanna sia lamdang sa uh hi. Tuasia ciangin amate ngeal sia Jesus ii kitholpui ngeite ahi hunlam phawk uh hi." 
Acts4:14 Ahizong amate in bangma a ci thei bua uh hi, banghang ziam cile a kidamsakpa sia, Peter le John taw tua munah dingkhawm in a om mu uh hi." 
Acts4:14 Ahizong amate in bangma a ci thei bua uh hi, banghang ziam cile a kidamsakpa sia, Peter le John taw tua munah dingkhawm in a om mu uh hi." 
Acts4:15 Tua ahikom amate Council zum pan pusuak tu in sawl a, tua zawkciang amate sungah, kikum uh hi." 
Acts4:16 “Hi mite bang law tu hi ziam?” ci in amate kidongh uh hi. “Jerusalem a teang mihing sim in, hi a lamdang mama nalamdang lakna amate in vawt uh hi, ci in he siat zo uh a, ih nial thei bua hi." 
Acts4:17 Ahihang mihingte sungah, hi thu a kizel ngawl natu in, Jesus min suang a, a pau kikik nawn ngawl natu amate tawngin thupia tawng,” ci uh hi." 
Acts4:18 Tua ahikom amate sam a, sungtangsak kikin, Jesus min taw thu a son ngawl natu, a hil ngawl natu in thupia uh hi." 
Acts4:19 Ahihang Peter le John in zo kik a, “Pathian mai ah — note thu kong nit tu le, Pathian thu ka nit tu uh, koisia maan zaw ziam, noma tek in khensat tavun." 
Acts4:19 Ahihang Peter le John in zo kik a, “Pathian mai ah — note thu kong nit tu le, Pathian thu ka nit tu uh, koisia maan zaw ziam, noma tek in khensat tavun." 
Acts4:20 Banghang ziam cile ka mu sa uh, ka zaaksa uh thute son ngawlin, ka om thei buatu uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
Acts4:21 Council te in, nasia seseam in a kidop natu in, tawng a, thu a piak zawkciang suaktasak hi. Amate daan piak tu suak thei ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile mi theampo in thupiang sa sia tungtaang ah Pathian pok kim uh hi." 
Acts4:22 Hi nalamdang lakna ahi a kidamsak pa sia kum sawmli vaal pha zo hi. 
Acts4:23 A kisuataksak po ciang Peter le John sia a pawlte kungah heak kikin, thiampi liante le upate ii son teng son uh hi." 
Acts4:23 A kisuataksak po ciang Peter le John sia a pawlte kungah heak kikin, thiampi liante le upate ii son teng son uh hi." 
Acts4:24 Thu umte in a zaak uh ciang, Pathian tungah hi bangin thungen khawm uh hi: “Vantung, leitung le tuipi le a sungah a om theampo ii Topa le Bitphuapa!" 
Acts4:25 Thaa Thiangtho tungtawnin, kote taanghpupi David, na naseampa tungah hi bangin na ci hi. ‘Banghangin Gentile te sia a thin uuk ngawp ziam; banghangin mihingte in a vaal thawthongin vaihawm ku ziam?" 
Acts4:26 Leitung kumpite in amate le amate kithoai kholin, tuaciangin ukpite kikhawmtua a, Topa le ama ii Messiah langpan uh hi.’" 
Acts4:27 Banghang ziam cile Herod le Pontius Pilate in hi khuapi ah Gentile te le Israel mite taw kisitua in, a thiangtho na Naseampa Jesus, Messiah tu a, na vawt pa sia langpan takpi uh hi." 
Acts4:28 Nangma vaangletna le na deina taw tuabangin piang hen ci a, na khensat sa theampo a taangtun natu in, amate kisitua uh hi." 
Acts4:29 Tu in Topa awng, amate hong tawnnate, na za in a, ko na naseamte in, na thu hangsan tak ka son thei natu in, hong piangsak ta'n." 
Acts4:30 Cidamna a pian natu in, na khut hong vaan ta'n a, nalamdang laknate le, a lamdang vawtte, a thiangtho na Naseampa Jesus min taw a kisep thei natu, hong thukim ta'n,” ci uh hi." 
Acts4:31 A thunget a man uh ciangin amate kikhopna mun sia kingawk hi. Amate sia Thaa Thiangtho taw kidim a, Pathian thu sia hanna taw son tu in kipan uh hi." 
Acts4:32 Thu umte pawl sia thinkhat lungkhat in, om uh hi. Kuama in kei aituam neisa hi, a ci om ngawlin, a neisa uh theampo khat le khat kihawm vadiam uh hi." 
Acts4:33 Sawltakte in Topa Jesus thaw kikna thu, vaangletna lian taw, tetti pang uh a, Pathian in thupha tam mama amate theampo tungah buak hi." 
Acts4:34 Amate pawl sungah kitaangsapna a nei kuama a om bua hi. Lo neite le inn neite in, zuakin a nga uh sumte paipui a," 
Acts4:35 sawltakte tungah aap uh hi. Tuaciang, tua sumte mihing sim in, a kisapna uh bangin, hawm tek uh hi." 
Acts4:36 Tuaciang, Cyprus ah a suak, Levi mi Joseph, sawltakte ii Barnabas a nak pa (a khiakna “hanthawnpa”)" 
Acts4:37 in, a neisa lo khat zuakin, a sum teng paipui a, sawltakte tungah aap hi." 
Acts5:1 Ahihang Ananias min nei mihing khat om a, a zi Sapphira taw a neisa pawlkhat zuak hi." 
Acts5:2 A zi zongh ii thukimpuina taw sum pawlkhat amate atu keam tuam a, a om lai teng sawltakte aap hi." 
Acts5:3 Peter in, “Ananias awng, banghangin Satan in na thin uksak a, Thaa Thiangtho theam in, na neisate zuak man sum aheap banghangin keam ni ziam?" 
Acts5:4 Na neisa na zuak ma in, nangma aa ahi hi; tuaciang na zuak zawkciangin, tua sum sia nangma aa ma ahi hi. Tua hikasap banghangin tuabang ngamtat tu khensat ni ziam? Mihingte a theam na hi bua hi — Pathian a theam suak zo ni hi!” ci hi." 
Acts5:5 Hi thu a zaak po ciang, Ananias pukin thi hi; tuaciang tua thu a za theampo lau uh hi." 
Acts5:6 Khangnote hong tum a, a luang tun in, pusuapui in phum uh hi." 
Acts5:7 Nai thum bang kihal zawkciangin, bang thu piang ci he ngawlin a zi hong sungtang hi." 
Acts5:8 Peter in ama munah, “Na neisa na zuak uh sung pan, hi teng sia nang le na pasal ii na nga uh a buppi ma ahi nam, hong son ta'n,” ci hi. “Hi hi, a buppi ma hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Acts5:9 Tua ahikom Peter in ama tungah, “Banghangin nang le na pasal in, Topa ii Thaa sia ze et nu ziam? Na pasal a phumte sia tu laitakin, kongbiang ah om hi, nangma zongh amate in hong pua tu a, hong pusuapui tu hi!” ci hi." 
Acts5:10 Thakhat thu in ama sia Peter peang ah puk in thi hi. Khangnote sungtang a, ama sia a thisa in mu uh hi, tua ahikom amate in doipua ah pusua in, a pasal hui ah phum uh hi." 
Acts5:11 Pawlpi bup le hi thu a za mihing theampo lau mama tek uh hi. 
Acts5:12 Sawltakte in mihingte sungah nalamdang laknate le a lamdangte tam mama vawt uh hi. Thu um theampo Solomon Talaap ah kisitua uh hi. 
Acts5:13 Mihingte in amate sia phat son mama napi a puasang mi kuama in a pawm ngam bua uh hi. 
Acts5:14 Ahihang mihing tam vaial amate pawl sungah kibelap a — Topa a um pa le numei honkhat suak hi. 
Acts5:15 Sawltakte nasepna hangin, lampite tungah ciinate hong kipua a, Peter hong pai ciang ciinate pawlkhat tungah ama ii limh beak ii a liap thei natu dei in, lupnate tung le phahte tungah sialin lampi hui ah lumsak uh hi." 
Acts5:16 Tuaciang in Jerusalem kiim khuate pan mihonpite hong pai in, ciinate le doaiveite paipui uh hi; tuaciang amate theampo kidamsak hi." 
Acts5:17 Thiampi Lianbelpa le a pawl a lawm theampo, le tua mun a om Sadducee pawlte in sawltakte sia nasia takin eang uh hi; tua ahikom thu vawt tu in khensat uh hi." 
Acts5:18 Amate in sawltakte manin, nautaangte kikhumna thong sungah khum uh hi." 
Acts5:19 Ahihang tua zanin Topa vantunglalang khat in thong kongkha hon a, sawltakte a pusuasak zawkciangin, amate tungah," 
Acts5:20 “Pai tavun a, Biakinn sungah dingin, hi nuntakna thak thu, mihingte tungah son tavun,” ci hi." 
Acts5:21 Sawltakte in, a sawl bangin ni a, khuavak ciangin Biakinnpi sungah tumin, hilcianna nei tu in kipan uh hi. Thiampi Lianbelpa le a pawl a lawmte in Jew lampuite theampo Council bup kikhopna ah kikhawm tu in sam uh hi; tua zawkciangin sawltakte amate mai ah a paipui natu in thonginn ah thupia uh hi." 
Acts5:22 Ahihang thong ukte thonginn a thet uh ciangin, sawltakte thong sungah a mu bua uh hi, tua ahikom Council zum ah heak kikin a thu bang teng son a," 
Acts5:23 “Thonginn ka thet uh ciangin, thong kongkhate kikalh bikbek in om a, kongkhacing theampo zongh thong kongcing in ka mu uh hi; ahihang kongkha ka hon uh ciang, a sungah kuama ka mu bua uh hi!” ci uh hi." 
Acts5:24 Biakinn cingte ukpa le thiampi liante in, hi thu a zaak uh ciangin, sawltakte bang tat hi tu ziam, ci in lamdang sa uh hi." 
Acts5:25 Tuasia ciang pasal khat hong sungtang a, amate munah, “Ngai vun! Thong sung a na khum uhte in mihonte hilcian in, Biakinnpi sungah om uh hi!” ci hi." 
Acts5:26 Tua ahikom Biakinn cing ukpa sia, a khutnuai mihingte taw pai in, sawltakte paipui kik uh hi. Amate in mihingte ii suangtum taw a den tu lau ahikom, sawltakte tungah zawthawk thu a zangh ngam bua uh hi." 
Acts5:27 Sawltakte sungtan pui uh a, Council te mai ah, dingsakin, Thiampi Lianbelpa in thusit hi." 
Acts5:28 “Hisia pa min taw thu hilcian thei nawn ngawl tu nu hi, ci in nasia takin thu kong pia zo uh hi; ahihang tu in bang vawt kik nu ziam! Jerusalem khuathing ah, na thu hilcianna uh kizelsak zo a, ama thina thu kote maw hong pusak nuam nu hi!” ci hi." 
Acts5:29 Peter le sawltak dangte in zo kik a, “Pathian thu ka nit tu uh hi a, mihingte thu ka nit tu uh hi ngawl hi." 
Acts5:30 Note in Jesus thinglamtee tungah kilh in, na thalup zawk uh ciang, ka taanghpupite ii Pathian in Jesus thina panin phong kik hi." 
Acts5:31 Israel mite a mawna uh panin, kisiik kik a, mawmaisakna a nga natu hunpha pia tu in, Pathian in ama thosak kik a, a ziatsang ah koi in Lampuipa le Hunpa suaksak hi." 
Acts5:32 Ama thu a nite tungah a piak letsong ahi, Thaa Thiangtho le kote in hi thu huvau ah tetti ka hi uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
Acts5:33 Council upate sung a kihelte in, hi thu a zaak uh ciangin, a thin uh uuk mama a, sawltakte thatlum nuam uh hi." 
Acts5:34 Ahihang amate sung panin Phariseete Gamaliel kici Thukham hil syapa khat ahi ngual theampo ii zatak pa sia Council sungah hong ding hi. Ama in sawltakte tawmvei a pusuasak natu in thupia a," 
Acts5:35 tuaciang Council te tungah, “Israel mipuite awng, hi mite tungah na vawt tu uh kidawm tavun." 
Acts5:36 Tu nung hiat in, Theudas kici khat hong piang a, ama le ama sia a nasia mama mi khat in kison a, tuaciang pasal zali bang in ama pawm uh hi. Ahihang ama sia kithat a, a nungzuite kithethaang in, a vai teng a bona thu na he nginge uh hi." 
Acts5:37 Hisia zawkciangin, Galilee mi Judas kici khat mihing simna a kivawt hun lai in, hong piang hi; ama zongh nungzui mihonpi khat nei a, ahihang ama zongh kithatlum in, a nungzuite sia kithethaang hi." 
Acts5:38 Tua ahikom hi thu tungtaang ah, hi mite bangma law heak vun kong ci hi. Amate nguak koi nginge po vun! Banghang ziam cile amate ngealna le sepna in, mihing sepna ahile hong bo tu a," 
Acts5:39 ahihang tuate in Pathian kung pan hong pai ahile, zo zo ngawl tu nu hi. Noma le noma Pathian langpan a, a do kisua tu nu hi!” ci hi. Council in Gamaliel ii ngaisut piakna zui hi." 
Acts5:40 Sawltakte sungtang in sawl a, vel in, Jesus min taw a hil nawn ngawl natu thupia hi; tua zawkciang amate tha uh hi." 
Acts5:41 Sawltakte in Council a nusiat ciang, Jesus atu in maizum thuak tu, Pathian in kiphu sa ahikom lungdam uh hi." 
Acts5:42 Tuaciang ni simin Biakinnpi sung le ngual innte ah Jesus Messiah ii Lungdamna Thupha hilcianna le thuhilna nei uh hi. 
Acts6:1 Tua zawk hun khat ciangin, a nungzuite khakhang a, Greek kampau Jew te le innteak Jew te kilaklaw ah kihau na khat piang hi. Greek kampau Jew te in ni sim sum a kihawm ciangin, amate ii meingongte sia, kingaingon hi, ci uh hi." 
Acts6:2 Tua ahikom sawltak sawm le niite in, nungzui theampo khawmtua a, “Ko sia sum vai taw komlaak hu in, Pathian kammal taw thuhilna, ka ngaingon tu uh sia maan ngawl hi." 
Acts6:3 Tua ahiciang, suapuite awng, Thaa Thiangtho le ciimna taw a kidim hi ci in a kitel pasal sali noma sung pan hong teal tavun a, amate khut sungah, hi nasep sia ih aap tu hi." 
Acts6:4 Ko ka hi uh le tuasia ciangin ka hun uh a bit in thungetna le thuhilna in, ka zangh tu uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
Acts6:5 Pawl buppi ma in sawltakte ii ngaisut piakna bangin, lungkim uh ahikom, amate in, Thaa Thiangtho le upna taw a kidim Stephen, Philip, Prochorus, Nicanor, Timon, Parmenas, le Nicolaus a kici Antioch khua pan, Jew biakna ah tu mahiat in a kikheal Gentile mi khat teal uh hi." 
Acts6:6 Tua pawlte in tua mite teng sia sawltakte tungah aap uh a, sawltakte in amate lu tungah a khut nga in thungetsak uh hi." 
Acts6:7 Tuabangin Pathian kammal hong kizel to hi. Jerusalem khua ah a nungzuite khang vaial a, thiampi tam mamate in hi upna saang uh hi." 
Acts6:8 Pathian ii a thupha nasia takin a piak, vaangletna taw a kidim Stephen in, nalamdangte le a lamdangte tam mama mipite sungah vawt hi." 
Acts6:9 Ahihang pasal pawlkhat in langpan uh a, tua mite sia A Kisuatak Mite ii synagogue sungah pawlmite hi a, Cyrene pan le, Alexandria pan Jew te kihel hi. Amate sia Cilicia ngamkhen le Asia ngamkhen te pan Jew dangte taw kikopin, Stephen taw kam kinial hong kipan uh hi." 
Acts6:10 Ahihang Thaa in Stephen sia tuabang ciimna pia ahikom ama a pau ciangin a nalh zo bua uh hi. 
Acts6:11 Tua ahiciang amate in, pasal pawlkhat sumnguk pia a, “Moses le Pathian langpan in, a pauna za khu hi!” cisak hi." 
Acts6:12 Hi bang danin mihonte, upate le Thukham hil syate hol uh hi. Amate in Stephen manin Council mai ah paipui uh hi." 
Acts6:13 Tua zawkciangin, leilot tetti pang tu in, mihing pawlkhat sungtangsak hi. Amate in, “Hisia pa in, a thiangtho ih Biakinnpi le Moses Thukham sia langpan tawntung hi." 
Acts6:14 Nazareth mi Jesus in, hi Biakinnpi sutham tu a, Moses tung pan hong paisuk ih ngeina theampo hong khealsak tu hi, ci in a son laitakin za khu hi!” ci uh hi." 
Acts6:15 Council sungah a to te theampo in, Stephen en tek uh a, a maitang sia vantunglalang maitang taw kibangin mu uh hi." 
Acts7:1 Thiampi Lianbelpa in Stephen munah, “Hi thu a maan ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Acts7:2 Stephen in zo kik a, “Suapuite le pate awng, hong ngai tavun! Ih taanghpupi Abraham sia Haran ah teang tu in, a pai ma, Mesopotamia ah a ten laitakin, ama tungah vaanglian Pathian kilak a," 
Acts7:3 ‘Na innkuanpuite le na ngam nusia in, kong lak tu ngam ah va pai ta'n,’ ci hi." 
Acts7:4 Tua ahikom a ngam nusia in, Haran ah pai hi. Abraham ii pa a thi zawkciang, tu laitak note teenna hi ngam ah Pathian in kikhiinsak hi." 
Acts7:5 Tua laitak hunin Pathian in, Abraham aituam neisa tu in, leitangh metre khat kiimhuam zongh a pia bua lai hi, ahihang Pathian in piak tu in, kamciam pia hi, ama nung pan a suan a paalte atu zongh ahi hi. Pathian ii hi kamciam a piak hunin, Abraham in ta a nei bua hi." 
Acts7:6 Pathian kamciam in hi bang ahi hi: ‘Na suan na paalte sia, ngamdang ah peam tu a, amate sila suakin kum zali tawntung kivawtsia cip tu hi." 
Acts7:7 Ahihang a silate tungah a kilawm thukhenna ka tungsak tu a, tua zawkciangin amate tua ngam panin pusuak in, hi sungah amate in kei hong bia tu hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts7:8 Tuasia zawkciangin Pathian in, Abraham sia thuciamna ii lim tu in vunteap atsakna zeksa pia hi. Tua ahikom Abraham in, Isaac sua zawk nipi khat a cin ciangin, a vunteap atsak hi, Isaac in a tapa Jacob a vunteap atsak hi; Jacob in a minthang ih taanghpupite sawm le niite ii vunteap atsak hi." 
Acts7:9 “Jacob tate in a suapui Joseph sia eang uh a, Egypt ah sila in na zuak uh hi. Ahihang ama taw Pathian omkhawm hi." 
Acts7:10 Tuaciangin a ngim ngana theampo pan suatak pia hi. Egypt kumpipa mai ah, Joseph a kilak ciang, Pathian in thuzawkhuaina le ciimna pia a, tuaciang kumpipa in Joseph sia ngamuk mangpa le kumpi bangkua a uk suaksak hi." 
Acts7:11 Tua zawkciang Egypt le Canaan ngam bup ah kialpi tung a, ngimna nasia takin piang hi. Ih taanghpupite in anneak tu nei ngawl a," 
Acts7:12 tuasia ciang Jacob in Egypt ngam ah antang om hi, ci in a zaak ciang, ama in ih taanghpupite ahi a tate sia tuak ah a khat veina in paisak hi." 
Acts7:13 A nii veina a pai ciang Joseph in ama le ama a suapuite munah kison a, tuasia ciang, Egypt kumpipa in Joseph innkuanpuite huvau he hi." 
Acts7:14 Tua ahikom Joseph in, a pa Jacob tungah thupuaksak a, ama le a innkuan bup, a vekpi a kingawm mihing sawmsali le nga teng sia Egypt ngam ah a pai natu in zasak hi." 
Acts7:15 Tuaciangin Jacob sia Egypt ngam ah pai a, tua munah ama le a tate thi hi." 
Acts7:16 A luanghawmte sia Shechem ah kitua hi. Abraham ii Hamor minamte tung pan a sum taw a lei, tuak a thaan sia sungah amate kiphum uh hi." 
Acts7:17 “Abraham tungah Pathian ii kamciam teng, a tunsak tu ciangin, Egypt ngam ah ih minamte sia nasia tak khangto zo hi." 
Acts7:18 A khakbel ciangin, Joseph a he ngawl kumpi khat sia Egypt ngam uk tu in kipan hi." 
Acts7:19 Ama in ih taanghpupite theambawl in, ngitlona taw a nausente a thi tu in daaipua ah a vawk natu thupia hi." 
Acts7:20 Hi hun sia Moses ii pian hun hi a, ama in a mealhoi mama patang khat ahi hi. Ama sia inn ah tha thum kikeam a," 
Acts7:21 inn panin a hep uh ciangin, kumpipa ii tanu in, ama sung pan a piang ta bangin vawt a, vaak in taa hi." 
Acts7:22 Egypt te ciimna theampo kisinsak a, mihing thupi khat ii kampau luheakzia hong nei hi." 
Acts7:23 “Moses sia kum sawmli a phak ciangin, a minampui Israel te bangbangin kivawt ziam ci in kan tu in khensat hi." 
Acts7:24 Egypt mite khat in a minampui Israel te khat a vawtsia zazaan sia ama in mu hi, tua ahikom hun tu in pai a, Egypt pa thatlum in phulam hi." 
Acts7:25 (Ama ngaisutna ah, a minampuite suatak natu in, Pathian in ama zangh tu hi ci in a mite in tel tu in um a, ahihang amate in a tel bua uh hi.)" 
Acts7:26 A zing ciangin Israel te nii, kihau in om mu a, ama in lemtua tu in hanciampui hi. ‘Hong ngai tavun, note unau khat na hi uh hi; banghangin khat le khat kihau nu ziam?’ ci hi." 
Acts7:27 A lawmpa a vawtsia sia pa in, Moses sawn a, ‘Akua in nang sia ko hong uk tu le ko tungah, thukhen tu in hong koi ziam?" 
Acts7:28 Zeini a Egypt te khat na thalup bangin, kei hong thatlum nuam ni ziam,’ ci hi." 
Acts7:29 Moses in hi thu a zaak ciangin, Egypt ngam pan tai a, Midian ngam ah teang hi. Tua munah tapa nii nei hi." 
Acts7:30 “Kum sawmli hong kan zawkciangin Sinai mualhui sennealngam sung sawlpaang kuang khat sungah vantunglalang khat Moses mai ah hong kilak hi. 
Acts7:31 Moses in a mu teng lamdang sa in, a kitel zaw in a mu thei natu sawlpaang sang neak hi. Ahihang Topa ii aw hi bangin za hi:" 
Acts7:32 ‘Kei sia na taanghpupi Abraham, Isaac le Jacob te ii Pathian ka hi hi’ ci hi. Moses lau in liing ngawp a, en ngam ngawl hi." 
Acts7:33 Topa in ama tungah, ‘Na peangdap suut in, banghang ziam cile na dinna mun sia thiangtho hi." 
Acts7:34 Ka minamte Egypt ngam ah vawtsiat a thuakna teng ka mu zo hi. Amate tauna ka za a, amate suatak tu in kong paisuk zo hi. Tu in hong pai ta'n; Egypt ngam ah hong paisak tu khi hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts7:35 “Moses sia Israel te ii a nial pa ahi hi. ‘Akua in nang sia, ko hong uk tu le ko tungah thukhen tu in, hong koi ziam?’ ci in dongh uh hi. Sawlpaang kuang sung pan ama tungah a kilak vantunglalang ii huna taw, Pathian in amate a uk tu le a suaktasak tu in ukpa le hunpa tu in, a thataak pa ahi hi." 
Acts7:36 Ama in Israel te sia Egypt ngam pan pusua pui a, Egypt ngam le San Tuipi ah ahizong, kum sawmli sung sennealngam sungah ahizong, nalamdang laknate le a lamdangte ama in vawt hi." 
Acts7:37 Israel te tungah, ‘Pathian ii kei hong thataak bangma in, Pathian in note atu kamsaang khat hong paisak tu hi,’ tua pa in noma mi pui khat hi tu hi’ a ci pa sia Moses ahi hi." 
Acts7:38 Sennealngam ah a kikhawmtua Israel mite taw a omkhawm pa sia Moses ahi hi; Sinai mual tungah ama a paupui vantunglalang sia le ih taanghpupite taw tua munah omkhawm a, ei tungah hong piak sawn tu, Pathian ii a nungta thute ama in saang hi." 
Acts7:39 “Ahihang ih taanghpupite in ama thu a ni nuam bua uh hi; amate in Moses puavawk in, Egypt ngam ah heak kik thei le uuk uh hi." 
Acts7:40 Tua ahikom Aaron munah, ‘Eite hong lampui tu in milim pathian pawlkhat hong vawtsak ta'n. Egypt ngam pan hong pusua Moses sia bang tawk hi tu ziam he bua hing,’ ci uh hi." 
Acts7:41 Tuasia ciangin, amate in khuital khat ii lim taw a kibang milim khat vawt a, sangaw biakpiakna nei in, amate vawttawm vangiat khat sia upat piakna in poaikhaam uh hi." 
Acts7:42 Tua ahikom Pathian in amate nungngat in, kamsaangte laibu sungah, a om bangma in, van a aksite bia tu in thazau hi: ‘Israel mite awng! Kum sawmli tawntung sennealngam sungah, sa na ngo uh a, nganhing taw biakpiakna, na vawt uhte sia, kei tungah hong vawt na hi bua uh hi." 
Acts7:43 Na puak uh sia Molech pathian ii tuipuan buk le noma ii aksi pathian Rephan lim ahi hi. Tuate in noma ii na biak tu in, na vawttawm uh milimte ahi hi. Tua ahikom Babylon kalh ah sal in kong puak tu hi,’ kici hi." 
Acts7:44 “Ih taanghpupite in Pathian ompuina a kilakna Puanbuk sia sennealngam sungah keng kawkoai hi. Tua Puanbuk sia Moses tungah Pathian sawl bang le a kilak lim bangin a kivawt ahi hi. 
Acts7:45 A khaksang ciangin tua tuipuanbuk a lua, ih taanghpupite in amate mai ah, Pathian ii hawlkeak minamte ii ngam a suan tu in, Joshua taw a pai uh ciangin, tua tuipuan buk sia keng uh hi. David khan hun dong, tua munah om hi." 
Acts7:46 Ama in Pathian maipha nga a, Jacob ii Pathian inn tu khat a sak thei natu in Pathian tungah ngen hi." 
Acts7:47 Ahihang Pathian inn tu a sa pa sia Solomon ahi hi. 
Acts7:48 “Ahihang a saangbel Pathian sia mihingte sak inn sungah a teang bua hi; kamsaangpa ci bangma in," 
Acts7:49 ‘Vantung in ka kumpi tokhum hi, Topa in ci hi, tuaciangin leitung sia ka peang ngakna ahi hi. Bangbang innte, kei atu hong saksak tu ni ziam? kei teen natu mun sia koisung ziam?" 
Acts7:50 Hite theampo keima vawtsa hi ngawl ziam?’ 
Acts7:51 Stephen in, “Note bangza in thinpui nu ziam! Bangza in note thin in Pathian he ngawl ziam? Pathian kammal na zaak ngawl natu in, bangza in nangong nu ziam! Na taanghpupite bang lian hi nu hi: note zongh in Thaa Thiangtho nalh tawntung nu hi!" 
Acts7:52 Na taanghpupite ii a vawtsiat ngawl kamsaang khat beak om ngei kana ziam? Khuangei pek panin, Pathian ii a thutang Naseampa hong pai natu a sonkhol, Pathian kamtaite na thatlum uh hi. Tu in, note in ama leeheak a, suamlum nu hi." 
Acts7:53 Vantunglalangte hong piak Pathian ii thukham a saangte na hi uh hi — ahihang tua thukhamte ni ngawl nu hi!” ci lai hi. 
Acts7:54 Council sung a kihelte in, Stephen thuson a ngai uh ciangin, amate in thin uukna taw a ha ngoai san uh hi." 
Acts7:55 Ahihang Stephen sia Thaa Thiangtho taw kidim a, vantung ento in, Pathian ii minthanna le Pathianziatsang ah a ding Jesus mu hi." 
Acts7:56 “En vun! Vantung kihong mu khi hi, tuaciang Mihing Tapa sia Pathianziatsang ah, dingin om hi!” ci hi." 
Acts7:57 Council sung kihel mihingte in nging takin au a, a khut taw a bil uh hum hi. Tua zawkciang amate teng in, thakhatin ama del uh a," 
Acts7:58 khuapi pua ah lawn in, suangtum taw deang uh hi. Tua tetti te in amate puantualte sia, Saul kici tangval khat ii kep tu in, aap hi." 
Acts7:59 Amate in Stephen sia, suang taw a hawhua laitakin, ama in Topa biakpui a, “Topa Jesus awng, ka thaa hong saang ta'n!” ci hi." 
Acts7:60 Ama in khupdin a, awnging tak taw, “Topa! hi mite mawna na tepteesak heak in!” a ci zawkciangin thi hi." 
Acts8:1 Tuaciang Stephen a thalupna sia Saul in lungkimpui hi. Tua ni mama in Jerusalem a om pawlpi sia vawtsiatna nasia takin thuak tu kipan hi. Sawltakte simngawl thu um dangte theampo sia Judea le Samaria ngamkhente sungah kithethaang siat uh hi. 
Acts8:1 Tuaciang Stephen a thalupna sia Saul in lungkimpui hi. Tua ni mama in Jerusalem a om pawlpi sia vawtsiatna nasia takin thuak tu kipan hi. Sawltakte simngawl thu um dangte theampo sia Judea le Samaria ngamkhente sungah kithethaang siat uh hi. 
Acts8:2 Thu umte pawlkhat in Stephen phum uh a, hee in awnging tak taw ama kaa uh hi." 
Acts8:3 Ahihang Saul ahile Pawlpi sukthap natu hanciam hi; inn khat pan inn khat ah pai in, thu umte kaikeak a, pate zongh numeite zongh thonginn sung denna in nei hi." 
Acts8:4 A kithethaang thu umte in mun theampo ah pai in thuhil uh hi. 
Acts8:5 Philip in Samaria khuapi ah pai in tua mun mipite tungah Messiah ii thu hil hi. 
Acts8:6 Mihonpite in Philip ii thuson ngai a, nalamdang lakna a vawtte a mu uh ciang ama neakin pha tak ngai uh hi." 
Acts8:7 Mihing tam mamate sung pan doai ngilote sia a nging in au a, pusuak hi; pumzawte, peangbaite tam mama dam uh hi." 
Acts8:8 Tua ahikom tua khuapi sungah lungdamna lian om hi. 
Acts8:9 Tua khuapi ah Simon min nei pasal khat om a, tawmvei hun sung tengin Samaria te sia ama ii mitbum lakna taw lamdang sasak hi. Ama sia mi thupi khat in ama le ama kison a," 
Acts8:10 tuaciang khuapi sungah om theampo kidoidanna om ngawlin, ama thu ngai uh hi. “Ama in ‘Vaangletna Lianpi’ a kici tua Pathian ii vaang sia ahi hi,” ci uh hi." 
Acts8:11 Khuangei mama sung ama ii mitbum taw lamdang sasak ahikom, a thusonte pha takin ngai uh hi." 
Acts8:12 Ahihang Pathian Ngam lungdamna thupha le Jesus thu Philip ii sonna a up ciangin, pate zongh numeite zongh tui kiphum uh hi." 
Acts8:13 Simon mama zongh in um hi; tui a kiphum zawkciang Philip nai ah om top a, a nasia a lamdangte le nalamdang laknate a kivawt a mu ciangin lamdang sa hi." 
Acts8:14 Jerusalem a om sawltakte in, Samaria a mihingte ii Pathian kammal a saan uh sia za ahikom amate in Peter le John sia tua mite kungah paisak hi." 
Acts8:14 Jerusalem a om sawltakte in, Samaria a mihingte ii Pathian kammal a saan uh sia za ahikom amate in Peter le John sia tua mite kungah paisak hi." 
Acts8:15 Amate hong thet uh ciang, Thaa Thiangtho a nga thei natu in, thu umte atu thungetsak hi." 
Acts8:16 Banghang ziam cile Thaa Thiangtho sia amate khat ii tung zongh ah tuaksuk ngawl lai hi; amate sia Topa Jesus min taw a ki baptize hi bek hi. 
Acts8:17 Tuaciang Peter le John in, amate tungah a khut uh nga a, tuasia ciangin Thaa Thiangtho nga uh hi." 
Acts8:17 Tuaciang Peter le John in, amate tungah a khut uh nga a, tuasia ciangin Thaa Thiangtho nga uh hi." 
Acts8:18 Amate tungah sawltakte a khut a ngak uh ciangin, thu um mite tungah Thaa Thiangtho a kipiak sia Simon in mu hi. Tua ahikom Peter le John tungah sum pia in," 
Acts8:18 Amate tungah sawltakte a khut a ngak uh ciangin, thu um mite tungah Thaa Thiangtho a kipiak sia Simon in mu hi. Tua ahikom Peter le John tungah sum pia in," 
Acts8:19 “Ka khut ka ngakna pawpo tungah Thaa Thiangtho a nga natu in, hi vaangletna sia kei zongh hong pia tavun,” ci hi." 
Acts8:20 Ahihang Peter in zo kik a, “Pathian letsong sia sum taw kilei thei tu in na up hu in, nang le na sum teng sia hell ah pai tahen!" 
Acts8:21 Nang in kote nasepna taw kisai nawn ngawl ni hi, banghang ziam cile, Pathian muna ah na thin maan ngawl hi." 
Acts8:22 Tua hi a, hi a sia na ngealna panin kisiik kik ta'n a, tuaciang tuabang ngaisutna na nei hu in, hong maisak natu in Topa tungah thungen ta'n." 
Acts8:23 Banghang ziam cile nang sia ngual eenna thin taw a kidim mawna sungah, koltaang pa hi, ci in kong mu hi,” ci hi." 
Acts8:24 Simon in Peter le John tungah, “Tu a nong ci teng kei tungah hong tun ngawl natu, nong hesuakna in Topa tungah thu hong ngetsak tavun,” ci hi." 
Acts8:24 Simon in Peter le John tungah, “Tu a nong ci teng kei tungah hong tun ngawl natu, nong hesuakna in Topa tungah thu hong ngetsak tavun,” ci hi." 
Acts8:25 Amate in tetti pangin Topa thute a thansak zawkciangin, Peter le John te Jerusalem khua ah cia kik uh hi. A cia lam in, Samaria ngam khuano tam mamate ah Lungdamna Thupha hil uh hi." 
Acts8:25 Amate in tetti pangin Topa thute a thansak zawkciangin, Peter le John te Jerusalem khua ah cia kik uh hi. A cia lam in, Samaria ngam khuano tam mamate ah Lungdamna Thupha hil uh hi." 
Acts8:26 Topa vantunglalang khat in, Philip munah, “Kithoai in a, thangsang zuanin Jerusalem pan Gaza paina lampi zui in va pai ta'n,” ci hi. (Hi lampi sia kizangh nawn ngawl hi.)" 
Acts8:27 Tua ahikom Philip in kithoai in pai hi. Tu in Ethiopia kumpinu ii sum kholna a uk cil kinget Ethiopia mi a thupi ulian khat sia a inn ah cia tu in pai hi. Ama sia Jerusalem ah Pathian bia tu in a theng hi a, a siphu ngalleang taw cia kik hi. Tuabangin a cia kawmin, Isaiah thubu sim hi." 
Acts8:28  
Acts8:29 Thaa Thiangtho in Philip munah “Va pai ta'n a, tua leang taw a kinai in va om ta'n” ci in sawl hi." 
Acts8:30 Philip in del a, a phak ciangin, ama in kamsaangpa Isaiah thubu a sim sia za hi. “Na sisim teng na tel ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Acts8:31 Ulian pa in “Hong thiangson khat a om buale bangbangin tel tu khi ziam?” ci in zo kik hi. Leang tungah Philip kaato tu in sam a, amate tokhawm hi." 
Acts8:32 A sim laithiangtho mun sia hi bang ahi hi: “Ama in ngawlup tu in a kikai tuu khat taw kibang hi, ama in a mul a kimeetsak ciangin, a haam ngawl tuuno taw kibang hi. Kam khat zongh a pau bua hi." 
Acts8:33 Ama sia kizawnsak vawt a, thukhaikim thu kitaansak hi. Ama ii suan le paalte huvau sia kuama in a son thei buatu hi, banghang ziam cile, ama ii leitung nuntakna bo hi.”" 
Acts8:34 Ulianpa in, Philip munah “Kamsaangpa pauna hisia akua a cinopna ziam hong son tan? Ama le ama kici nuam ziam maw midang khat ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Acts8:35 Tuaciang Philip in son tu in kipan hi; hi Lai Thiangtho kammal pan panto in, Jesus ii Lungdamna Thupha son hi." 
Acts8:36 Tuabangin a pai susuk ciangin tui omna mun khat theng hi, tuaciang Ulianpa in, “Hi sungah tui om hi. Tui ka kiphum natu in bang in hong khak ziam,” ci hi." 
Acts8:37 Philip in ama tungah “Na thin theampo taw na um le, tui kiphum thei tu ni hi,” ci hi. Ama in “Um khi hi. Jesus Christ sia Pathian Tapa hi, ci in um khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Acts8:38 Ulianpa in a leang a tawlngak natu thupia a, amate nii tui sungah tuaksuk in, Philip in ama tuiphum hi." 
Acts8:39 Tui sung pan hong kaato uh ciangin, Topa Thaa in Philip la hi. Ulianpa in ama mu kik nawn ngawl ahihang, lungdamna taw kidim in, a pai ngei in paisuak hi." 
Acts8:40 Philip sia Azotus khua ah theng ahi hunlam ama le ama kitel hi; ama Caesarea ah pai suak a, lamdung khua theampo ah Lungdamna Thupha hil hi." 
Acts9:1 Tua hun laitak Saul in Topa nungzuite suamlup tu in nasia takin tawng tawntung hi. Thiampi Lianbelpa kungah pai a," 
Acts9:2 Topa Lampi a zui pate le numeite a mu peuma man khawmin Jerusalem ah a ciapui thei natu, Damascus khua synagogue ukte a lak tu ama thu a kisonna lai ama in ngen hi." 
Acts9:3 Damascus ah a pai lam in, khuapi a thet dektak ciang, thakhat thu in van pan a taang khat in, ama kiimkot theampo taan hi." 
Acts9:4 Ama lei ah puk a, tuaciang aw khat hi bangin za hi. “Saul! Saul awng! banghangin kei hong vawtsia ni ziam?”" 
Acts9:5 “Akua ni ziam Topa?” ci in dongh hi. “Kei sia nong vawtsiat pa Jesus ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Acts9:6 “Ahihang, tho in a, khuapi sungah va pai ta'n, Tualai ah na vawt tu a kul teng hong kison tu hi,” ci hi." 
Acts9:7 Saul taw khual a haw khawmte in, kam khat zongh pau ngawlin, ding uh hi; amate in awnging za ahihang, kuama a mu bua uh hi." 
Acts9:8 Saul sia lei panin thoto a, a mit hak ahihang bangma a mu thei bua hi. Tua ahikom amate in, a khut pan len in, Damascus khua sung zotpui hi." 
Acts9:9 Ni thum sung ama in khua a mu thei bua a, tua hun sung teng in, ama in an hikale tui hikale neak a nei bua hi." 
Acts9:10 Damascus ah Ananias kici Tapidaw khat om hi. Ama in mukholna nei a, Topa in ama munah, “Ananias awng!” ci in biakpui hi. “Hi sungah om ing, Topa” ci in zo hi." 
Acts9:11 Topa in ama munah, “Lampi Tang kicina munah, pai tu in kithoai in a, tuaciangin Judas inn ah Tarsus khua mi Saul kici khat va kan ta'n. Ama sia tu laitakin thunget saan hi," 
Acts9:12 tuaciangin ama mukholna sungah Ananias kici pasal khat hong pai a, khua a mu thei kik natu in, ama tungah a khut ngak sia mu zo hi,” ci hi." 
Acts9:13 Ananias in zo kik a, “Topa awng, mihing tam ma in, hisia pa thu hong son a, Jerusalem ah na mite tungah a cizat huai ama ngamtatna theampo hong kison hi." 
Acts9:14 Nang hong biate theampo a mat thei natu in, thiampi liante tung pan, thu ngana taw, Damascus khua ah hong pai hi,” ci hi." 
Acts9:15 Topa in ama munah, “Va pai ta'n, banghang ziam cile, ama sia Gentile te sung, kumpite sung le Israel mite sungah, ka min hong kiheak natu in, ka naseam tu in, ka teal zo hi."
