Acts9:16 Tuaciang keima mama in kei ii hu a, a thuak tu theampo zongh ka lak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Acts9:17 Tua ahikom Ananias pai a, Saul tunna inn sungah tum in, a tungah a khut nga hi. “Suapui Saul awng, hi sungah nong pai lai in, lampi ah nang tungah hong kilak — ih Topa Jesus in, khua na mu thei kik natu le Thaa Thiangtho taw na kidim natu in nang kungah kei hong paisak hi,” ci hi." 
Acts9:18 Thakhat thu in ngasa hawlip taw a kibang pawlkhat sia, Saul mittangte panin, hong taaksuk a, ama in khuamu thei kik hi. Ama ding a tui kiphum hi;" 
Acts9:19 Tuaciangin, an a neak zawkciang, a tha hat kik hi. Saul sia Damascus ah thu umte taw ni tawmvei sung om tu in taam hi." 
Acts9:20 Ama in Jew te ii synagogue ah paisuak a, Jesus sia Pathian Tapa hi ci in thuhil tu in kipan hi." 
Acts9:21 A zate theampo in lamdang sa in, “Jerusalem ah Jesus a biate a thatlum bul sia ama hi kana ngawl ziam? Tuaciangin hi lai hong paina thu zongh, thu umte man a, thiampi liante kungah ciapui tu, ngiimna taw hong pai hi ngawl ziam,” ci uh hi." 
Acts9:22 Ahihang Saul thuhilna in vaang nei vaial a, Jesus sia Messiah hi ci a, a sonthiangna sia, up huai mama ahikom, Damascus khua ah a teang Jew te in, ama a nial thei bua uh hi." 
Acts9:23 Ni tam mama hong kan zawkciang, Jew te kikhawmtua a, Saul sia thalup sawm uh hi." 
Acts9:24 Ahihang amate sawmnate, ama tungah kison hi. Ama a thalup thei natu in, sun taw zan taw khuapi kongpite, encik uh hi." 
Acts9:25 Ahihang zan khat ciangin, a nungzuite in, Saul sia khuapi luphung vang khat pan bawm khat taw in khiasuk uh hi." 
Acts9:26 Saul sia Jerusalem ah pai in, nungzuite pawl sungah tum sawm hi. Ahihang amate in, Saul sia nungzui khat hi, ci in um thei ngawl a kiita uh hi." 
Acts9:27 Tuaciang Barnabas in ama panpui a, sawltakte kungah paipui hi. Saul in lampi tungah Topa taw a kimuna thu le, Topa ii ama a paupuina thu teng zongh son hi. Damascus ah hang takin Jesus min taw thu a hil zongh son si hi." 
Acts9:28 Tua ahikom Saul sia amate kungah taam a, Jerusalem khuathing bup ah vak kawkoai in, Topa min taw hang takin thuhil hi." 
Acts9:29 Ama in Greek kampau Jew te taw zongh, kam kikum in kinialna nei a, ahihang Saul sia amate in thasawm uh hi." 
Acts9:30 Thu umte in hi thu a phaw uh ciang, Saul sia Caesaria ah paipui a Tarsus khua ah puak uh hi." 
Acts9:31 Tuabangin Judea ngam Samaria ngam le Galilee ngam bup ah pawlpite in ngammuang takin om theina hun khat nga hi. Pawlpi sia Topa min thasiana taw a nuntak bangma in Thaa Thiangtho huna tungtawnin, thakho in pawlpi mi khangto hi." 
Acts9:31 Tuabangin Judea ngam Samaria ngam le Galilee ngam bup ah pawlpite in ngammuang takin om theina hun khat nga hi. Pawlpi sia Topa min thasiana taw a nuntak bangma in Thaa Thiangtho huna tungtawnin, thakho in pawlpi mi khangto hi." 
Acts9:32 Peter sia mun theampo ah khualhaw a, khatvei sia Lydda ah a teang Pathian mite kungah haw hi." 
Acts9:33 Tua munah Aeneas a kici pasal khat taw kimu a, tua pa sia kum liat tawntung a pumzaw ahikom a tho thei bua hi." 
Acts9:34 Peter in “Aeneas awng, Jesus Christ in hong damsak hi. Tho in a, na lupna zial in,” ci hi. Tha khat thu in, Aeneas tho hi." 
Acts9:35 Lydda khua le Sharon khua a teang mihing theampo in, ama mu uh a, Topa kungah kiheak siat uh hi." 
Acts9:36 Joppa khua ah Tabitha kici numei khat om a, ama sia thu um khat ahi hi. (Ama ii Greek min sia Dorcas hi a, “sangai khat” cinopna hi) Ama in a hun nei theampo thupha vawtna le, a zawngte huna in zangh hi." 
Acts9:37 Tua hun laitakin ama, a ciina in thi hi. A luang sia kibual a, inn tung doituam khat sungah sial uh hi." 
Acts9:38 Joppa sia Lydda panin a khuala bua hi, tuaciangin thu umte in, Peter sia Lydda khua ah om hi ci in a zaak uh ciangin kamtai nii paisak a, “A manlang in hong pai ta'n,” cisak uh hi." 
Acts9:39 Tua ahikom Peter kithoai in a samte taw ton hi. Ama a thet ciangin, inn tung doituam sungah paipui a, nupi meingong theampo in bawm hon a, kap kawmin, Dorcas a nuntak lai a, a vawt laktongte le laktong puasilhte theampo lak uh hi." 
Acts9:40 Peter in amate theampo inn doituam pua sangah pusuaksak a, khupdin in thungen hi; tuaciang mithi luang maingat in, “Tabitha awng, tho in!” ci hi. Numei in a mit hak a, Peter a mu ciang, hong to hi." 
Acts9:41 Peter in a khut thaak a, ama dingsak hi. Tua zawkciang thu um theampo sam a, meingongte zongh kihel in, amate tungah, numei sia a nungta in aap hi." 
Acts9:42 Hi thupiang sia Joppa khuazaang ah thang a, mihing tam mama in, Topa um uh hi." 
Acts9:43 Peter sia Joppa ah savun vawt ahi Simon kungah ni tam mama taam hi. 
Acts10:1 Caesarea khua ah Rome kumpite ngalkap ahi “Italy Ngalkapte” kici ngalkap honkhat sungah ngalkap bu a seam Cornelius kici khat om hi. 
Acts10:2 Ama sia biakna kin khat hi; ama le a innkuan bupin Pathian bia uh hi. Ama in Jew mizawngte a hu thei za in hu a, tuaciang tatsat ngawlin Pathian tungah thungen hi." 
Acts10:3 Ni khat nitak nai thum bang hun mahiat in, ama in mang mu a, hi sitset in a muna ah Pathian vantunglalang khat in, “Cornelius awng!” ci hi." 
Acts10:4 Ama in launa taw vangtunglalang sia salh a, “Topa awng, bang ziam?” ci hi. Vantunglalang in, “Pathian in na thungetna le, a zawngte na hunate hangin lungdam a, na thunget na te uh hong zo tu kithoai hi." 
Acts10:5 Tu in mihing pawlkhat Joppa ah paisakin, Simon Peter kici mihing pa samsak ta'n." 
Acts10:6 Ama sia tuipi hui ah a teang savun vawt Simon inn ah zintung hi,” ci hi." 
Acts10:7 Tua zawkciangin, vantunglalang in paisan hi, tuaciang Cornelius in a inn sung a naseamte nii le biakna a kin, ama aituam a cing ngalkap khat sam hi." 
Acts10:8 Thupiang teng amate tungah son in Joppa ah paisak hi. 
Acts10:9 A zing ciangin, amate Joppa khua nai a thet laitak Peter in thungen tu in sun hun laitakinnkhum tungah kaato hi." 
Acts10:10 Ama in a ngilkial ahikom an ne nuam zo hi; tuabangin an neak tu a kivawt saan laitak ama in mukholna nei hi. 
Acts10:11 Van kihongin mu a, bang ziam maw puanzapui bang khat, king li panin kikhai in lei ah kikhiasuk khat mu hi." 
Acts10:12 A sungah nganhing namcin le awmtaal a, a vak theite le ngam vacimte om hi." 
Acts10:13 Aw khat in ama munah, “Peter awng tho in; hite ngo lum in a, ne in!” ci hi." 
Acts10:14 Ahihang Peter in, “Ne mama bua tong, Topa awng! Biakna taw kisai, a thiang ngawlin a kikoite le nin hi a kici sate ne ngawl het tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
Acts10:15 Tua aw taw ma in paupui kik a, “Pathian ii thiansak sate a nin in ngaisun heak in,” ci hi." 
Acts10:16 Hisia thumvei vaset a kici zawkciangin, van ah kila to kik hi." 
Acts10:17 Peter in a mukholna sia huvau ii khiakna lungmangin a om laitakin, Cornelius sawltakte in Simon inn mu uh a, kongbiang ah ding uh hi." 
Acts10:18 “Hi sungah, Simon Peter a kici zin khat hong tung ziam,” ci in dongh uh hi." 
Acts10:19 Peter in a mukholna sia ii khiakna bangbang peuma ahi katawm, ci in tel tu in a hanciam laitak Thaa in, “Ngai in! hi lai ah pasal thum in nang hong zon saan laitak hi." 
Acts10:20 Tua ahikom kithoai in a, tuaksuk in. Tuaciangin amate taw kithawl tu nakna heak in, banghang ziam cile amate in keima sawl ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Acts10:21 Tua ahikom Peter tuaksuk a, pasalte munah, “Na zon uh sia keima khi hi. Bang vai a hong pai nu ziam,” ci hi." 
Acts10:22 “Ngalkap bu Cornelius in kote hong sawl hi,” ci hi. “Ama sia Pathian a bia mihing pha khat hi a, Jew te theampo in zakta uh hi. Pathian vantunglalang khat in, ama tungah na son tu thute a zaak thei tu in nang hong sap tu in sawl hi,” ci hi." 
Acts10:23 Peter in amate sungtang tu in sam a, zan khat ngiaksak hi. A zing ciang kithoai in amate taw ding uh hi; tuaciangin Joppa pan nungzui pawlkhat taw zong, paikhawm uh hi." 
Acts10:24 A zing ciangin, Caesarea khua theng uh a, tua munah ama ii a sam mealheakte le a muan a ngualtamhte taw Cornelius in ngak hi." 
Acts10:25 Peter sia inn sung tum tu a kithoai ciangin Cornelius in muak a, a peang ah bokin ama mai ah a kun hi." 
Acts10:26 Ahihang Peter in dingsak hi. Ama in, “Ding in, keima sia mihing khat ma hi lel khi hi,” ci hi." 
Acts10:27 Peter sia Cornelius taw thuson kawmin, inn sungah a tum ciangin, mihing tam mama kikhawm mu hi." 
Acts10:28 Amate tungah, “Na heak tek uh hi a, Jew te khat sia Gentile te khat ii inn ah a haw tu ahizong, kithawl tu ahizong a biakna in oai ngawl hi. Ahihang Pathian in mihing khat pawpo biakna taw kisai in, thiang ngawl hi, nin hi, ka ci ngawl het natu in hong lak hi." 
Acts10:29 Tua ahikom nong samsak uh ciangin nial ngawlin kong pai hi. Tua ahiciang nong sapna thu sia banghang ziam ci in kong dongh hi,” ci hi." 
Acts10:30 Cornelius in, “Tu nung ni thum lai tubang hun nitak nai thum hun khawngin ka inn ah thu ka ngen hi. Thakhat thu in a tee vakil puan a silh pasal khat ka mai ah hong ding a," 
Acts10:31 ‘Cornelius awng! Pathian in na thungetna hong za a, ngual na hu thongna teng hong musak zo hi." 
Acts10:32 Mihing pawlkhat Joppa ah paisak in a, a min tatak Simon Peter kici, pasal khat sia samsak ta'n. Ama sia tuipi hui a teang savun vawt pa Simon kici khat ii inn ah tung hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts10:33 Tua ahikom thakhatin kong samsak a, na dikna hangin nong pai hi. Tu in Pathian mai ah ko teng na om ung, Topa ii nang son a hong sawl po ngai tu in hong ngak khu hi,” ci hi." 
Acts10:34 Peter sia thuson tu hong kipan a, “Tu in Pathian in mihing theampo a kibangin ngaisun hi ci in ka phawk hi." 
Acts10:35 Ama a biate le a maan a ngamtate sia, bang minam po ahizong ama in saang hi." 
Acts10:36 Israel te tungah a puak thu na heak uh hi, mihing theampo ii Topa ahi, Jesus Christ tungtawnin kilemna Lungdamna Thu thansakna ahi hi." 
Acts10:37 Tuiphumpa John in tui kiphumna thu a hil zawkciang Galilee ngam pan Israel ngam bup sungah thu lian a piang sia, na heak uh hi." 
Acts10:37 Tuiphumpa John in tui kiphumna thu a hil zawkciang Galilee ngam pan Israel ngam bup sungah thu lian a piang sia, na heak uh hi." 
Acts10:38 Nazareth khua mi Jesus tungah Pathian in Thaa Thiangtho le vaangletna a buak thu huvau tel nu hi. Ama in mun theampo ah pai in, thupha vawt a, Doaimangpa vaangletna nuai ah a om theampo damsak hi. Banghang ziam cile Pathian sia ama taw omkhawm hi." 
Acts10:39 Israel te ngamsung le Jerusalem ah a sep a vawt theampo tungtaang ah, kote in tetti ka hi uh hi. Amate in ama sia thinglamtee tungah kilh in, thisak uh hi." 
Acts10:40 Ahihang Pathian in a ni thum ni ciangin, thina pan thosak a, ama kilanghsak hi," 
Acts10:41 ahihang mihing theampo tungah hi ngawlin, Pathian ii tetti tu a hong teal sate, thina panin a thaw kik zawkciangin, ama taw an nekhawm tui dawnkhawmin a om kote tungah hong kilangh hi." 
Acts10:42 Tuaciang ama in, lungdamna thu sia mihingte tungah a hil tu le a thisate le a nungta laite tungah thukhen tu in, Pathian in ama a aap hunlam tetti pang tu in ko hong sawl hi." 
Acts10:43 Kamsaang theampo in ama huvau sonsiat uh hi. Ama a umte theampo mihing sim in ama min vaangletna taw a mawnate kimaisak tu hi ci in son uh hi,” ci hi." 
Acts10:44 Tuabangin Peter a papau laitakin, thu ngai theampo tungah, Thaa Thiangtho tuaksuk hi." 
Acts10:45 Peter taw Joppa khua pan hong pai, Jew thu umte in, Gentile te tung zongh ah, Pathian Thaa Thiangtho letsong a buak sia lamdang sa uh hi." 
Acts10:46 Banghang ziam cile amate in, kam tumdangte taw pau in, Pathian letna pok uh hi. Peter in," 
Acts10:47 “Hi mite in, eima saan bangma in, Thaa Thiangtho saang zo uh hi. Tua ahile amate tui taw ki baptize tu, akua in khaam thei tu ziam?” ci hi." 
Acts10:48 Tua ahikom Jesus Christ min taw, a ki baptize natu in thupia hi. Tua zawkciangin, ni tawmvei amate kungah a taam lai natu in, Peter tho uh hi." 
Acts11:1 Judea ngam bup a om sawltakte, le thu um dangte in, Gentile te zongh ii Pathian kammal a saanna thu za uh hi." 
Acts11:1 Judea ngam bup a om sawltakte, le thu um dangte in, Gentile te zongh ii Pathian kammal a saanna thu za uh hi." 
Acts11:2 Peter sia Jerusalem ah a cia ciangin, Gentile te vunteap atna a deite in, Peter ngamtatna sit uh a," 
Acts11:3 “Vunteap at ngawl Gentile te inn ah zintung in, an ngawngawn nekhawm nu hi!” ci hi." 
Acts11:4 Tua ahikom Peter in thupiang teng sia a patna panin son hi: 
Acts11:5 “Joppa khua ah thu ka nget laitakin mukholna khat ka nei hi. Van panin puanza bang na khat a king li pan kilen in, a kikhiasuk ka mu a, tuaciang ka kungah hong tawlnga hi." 
Acts11:6 Pha takpi ma in a sung ka en a, innsa, ngamsa, le awmtaal in a vak nganhingte le ngam vacimte ka mu hi." 
Acts11:7 Tuaciang aw khat in hong paupui a, ‘Peter awng, tho in; hite ngo in a, ne in!’ hong ci hi." 
Acts11:8 Ahihang keima in, ‘Ne peuma bua tong Topa awng! Biakna taw kisai a nin le a thiang ngawlin a kisepte sia, ka kam sungah tum ngeingawl lai hi,’ ka ci hi." 
Acts11:9 Tua aw taw vantung panin, hong pau leleau a, “Pathian thiansua sate sia bang po ahizong, a thiang ngawlin ngaisun heak in,” hong ci hi." 
Acts11:10 Hi bangin thumvei hong kilak a, a khakbel ciangin, vantung ah kidok to kik hi." 
Acts11:11 Tua hun laitak lian in, Caesarea pan a hong kipaisak mihing thum sia, ka zintunna inn ah hong theng hi." 
Acts11:12 Thaa in, amate taw haisaang ngawlin, ka tonkhop natu hong sawl hi. Joppa khua a thu uppui luk teng zongh in, Caesarea ah hong zui a, ka vekpi in Cornelius inn ah ka tum uh hi." 
Acts11:13 Vantunglalang khat a inn ah na ding a, ama in, ‘Joppa khua ah mihing pawlkhat paisak ta'n a, Simon Peter kici khat sia samsak ta'n." 
Acts11:14 Ama in nang le na innkuanpui theampo ngupna na nga natu kammalte hong son tu hi,’ ci in son hi." 
Acts11:15 Tuabangin thuson ka kipat ciangin, Thaa Thiangtho sia eite tungah a masa a hong pai bang tatakin, amate tungah tuaksuk hi." 
Acts11:16 Tuaciang ‘John in tui taw hong baptize hi. Ahihang no sia Thaa Thiangtho taw hong ki baptize tu hi,’ a ci Topa kam sia ka phawk hi." 
Acts11:16 Tuaciang ‘John in tui taw hong baptize hi. Ahihang no sia Thaa Thiangtho taw hong ki baptize tu hi,’ a ci Topa kam sia ka phawk hi." 
Acts11:17 Topa Jesus ih up ciang ei tungah letsong hong kipiak bangin, Pathian in tua letsong sia Gentile te tung zongh ah pia hi, ci in thiangtho takin kimu hi; tua ahile kei sia akua hi a, Pathian nasepna a khaktan zo tu pa, hi na khi ziam!” ci hi." 
Acts11:18 Hi thu a zaak uh ciangin, Peter sia mawsak nawn ngawlin, Pathian pok uh hi. “Tua ahile Pathian in, Gentile te tung zongh ah, kisii kik natu le nuntak natu hunpha pia zo hi!” ci uh hi." 
Acts11:19 Stephen a suamlup zawkciang vawtsiatna hangin a kithethaang thu umte pawlkhat sia Phoenicia, Cyprus le Antioch dongin pai uh a, Jew te tung bek ah thuhil uh hi." 
Acts11:20 Ahihang Cyprus le Cyrene pan a, thu umte pawlkhat in Antioch khua ah pai in, Gentile te tung zongh ah Topa Jesus Lungdamna Thupha hil uh hi." 
Acts11:21 Topa vaangletna sia amate taw kop a, mihing tam mama in thu um in, Topa sangah kiheak uh hi." 
Acts11:22 Hi thupha Jerusalem Pawlpi dong theng a, tua ahikom amate in, Barnabas sia Antioch khua ah paisak hi." 
Acts11:23 Ama a thet ciang, Pathian ii a mite thupha a piakzia mu ahikom ama lungdam a, Pathian tungah thin tak lung tak taw a thumaan natu in, amate theampo hanthawn hi." 
Acts11:24 Barnabas sia mihing pha khat hi a, Thaa Thiangtho le upna taw kidim in, mihing tam mama Topa kung then hi." 
Acts11:25 Tua zawkciangin Barnabas in Saul zong tu in, Tarsus khua ah pai hi." 
Acts11:26 A zon pa a mu zawkciangin Antioch khua ah paipui a, amate nii in, pawlpi mite taw kum khat bup omkhawmin, Pawlpi mihon khat hilcianna nei hi. Tuabangin Antioch khua ah thu umte sia Tapidawte ci in kina masabel hi." 
Acts11:27 Tua hun laitakin, kamsaang pawlkhat in Jerusalem pan Antioch ah pai uh hi." 
Acts11:28 Amate sung panin, Agabus min nei khat hong ding a, simleitung theampo ah kialpi a tun natu Thaa vaangletna taw ama in sonkhol hi. (Kumpilianpa Claudius maan hun laitakin, tua kialpi tung hi.)" 
Acts11:29 Nungzuite in amate hi zawk zaza tek, Judea ngam ah a teang a thu up puite atu a neisate puak tu in, khensat uh hi." 
Acts11:29 Nungzuite in amate hi zawk zaza tek, Judea ngam ah a teang a thu up puite atu a neisate puak tu in, khensat uh hi."

Acts12:1 Hi hun laitakin, Kumpipa Herod in, pawlpi mi pawlkhat vawtsia tu in kipan hi." 
Acts12:2 Ama in John suapuipa James namsau taw thatlumsak hi. 
Acts12:2 Ama in John suapuipa James namsau taw thatlumsak hi.

Acts12:3 Hi bang a, a ngamtat ciangin, Jew te thukim hi ci in a mu ciang, Peter zongh mansak hi. (Hi hun sia Tol saw ngawl Anluum Poai sung ahi hi.)" 
Acts12:4 Peter sia a kimat zawkciang thonginn sungah khum a, ngalkap li veu pawl li kisua a, tuate in cingsak hi. Ama mipite mai ah Paisan Poai zawkciangin thusit tu in Herod in ngealna nei hi." 
Acts12:5 Tua ahikom Peter thong sungah koi a, ahihang pawlpi mite in Pathian munah ama atu in nasia tak thu ngengen uh hi." 
Acts12:6 Mipite mai ah Herod in Peter thusit tu ni ma zanin Peter sia thongcingte nii ii kilaklaw ah mutthip hi. Ama sia thikkhau nii taw kikhii a, a thong kongkha ah thongcingte in cing hi." 
Acts12:7 Thakhat thu in Topa vantunglalang khat tua munah ding a, thonginn doituam sung khuavak taang khat hong om hi. Vantunglalang in, Peter liangko panin lokin phong a, “Manlang in! Tho in!” ci hi. Thakhat thu in, thikkhaute Peter khut panin kizuk hi." 
Acts12:8 Tua zawkciangin vantunglalang in, “Na kawngkhau sawm in a, na peangdap thua in,” ci hi. Peter in tuabangin a vawt zawkciangin, vantunglalang in, “Na puantual silhin hong zui ta'n,” ci hi." 
Acts12:9 Peter in thonginn doipua ah zui hi, ahizong ama in vantunglalang ii ngamtatna sia a takpi ma ziam ci in a tel bua hi; mukholna khat a mu kisa hi." 
Acts12:10 Amate in thongcingte ii phual masa sia a kaantan zawkciang a niina sia zongh kaantan uh a, a khakbelin khuapi sung tumna thik kongkha ah theng uh hi. Amate atu in kongkha sia ama thu in kihong a, amate pusuak hi. Tuaciang khuapi sung lampi khat a totsuk laitak thakhat thu in vantunglalang in Peter nusia hi." 
Acts12:11 Tua zawkciang Peter in ama tungah bang thu piang, ci in phawk a, “Tu in a maan tatak sia ka he hi!” ci hi. “Topa in a vantunglalang khat sia, Herod ii vaangletna pan le Jew te ii kei tungah hong piang tu a upna theampo pan hong suatak tu in, hong paisak hi,” ci hi." 
Acts12:12 Ama in a dinmun kitel ahikom, John Mark ii nu Mary inn ah pai hi, tua munah mihon kikhawm a, thungen uh hi." 
Acts12:12 Ama in a dinmun kitel ahikom, John Mark ii nu Mary inn ah pai hi, tua munah mihon kikhawm a, thungen uh hi."

Acts12:13 Peter in kongkha puanung sia king a, Rhoda kici numei naseam khat in inn hon tu in pai hi." 
Acts12:14 Ama in Peter aw tel a, lungdam leilam in, kongkha zongh hon meal ngawlin, heak kik hi. Inn sung a omte munah, Peter doipua ah ding hi, ci in son hi." 
Acts12:15 Amate in, “Na thin amh hi!” ci uh hi. Ahihang numei nu in, a takpi ma hi, ci veve hi. Tua ahikom amate in, “Ama a keam vantunglalang hi vak,” ci uh hi." 
Acts12:16 Tua lan tengin, Peter in kongkha king top hi. A khakbel ciangin, amate in kong hon uh a, Peter a mu uh ciangin, lamdang sa uh hi." 
Acts12:17 Amate a thim natu in a khut taw lak a, thonginn sung pan Topa ii ama a pusuasakna thu teng son hi. “Hi thu James le thu um dangte munah son tavun,” a ci zawkciangin amate nusia in mun dang khat ah pai hi." 
Acts12:17 Amate a thim natu in a khut taw lak a, thonginn sung pan Topa ii ama a pusuasakna thu teng son hi. “Hi thu James le thu um dangte munah son tavun,” a ci zawkciangin amate nusia in mun dang khat ah pai hi." 
Acts12:18 Zingsang khuavak ciang, thongcingte sungah — Peter bang tawk ziam, ci in nasia takin buai uh hi." 
Acts12:19 Herod in ama a zon natu thupia hikale, a mu zo bua uh hi. Tua ahikom ama in thongcingte thu donghsakin amate thalup tu in thupia hi. Hisia zawkciang, Herod in, Judea ngam nusia in, Caesarea ah hun tawmvei zangh hi." 
Acts12:19 Herod in ama a zon natu thupia hikale, a mu zo bua uh hi. Tua ahikom ama in thongcingte thu donghsakin amate thalup tu in thupia hi. Hisia zawkciang, Herod in, Judea ngam nusia in, Caesarea ah hun tawmvei zangh hi." 
Acts12:20 Herod in Tyre le Sidon mite tungah a thin uuk mama hi, tua ahikom amate in Herod taw kimu tu in, pai hon uh hi. A masa in kumpi inncingpa Blastus sia amate a hu tu in, a thinzosak phot uh hi. Tua zawkciang amate in Herod kungah pai in kilemna ngen uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate ngam ii anneak tu sia kumpipa ii ngam panin nga uh hi." 
Acts12:21 A kiciam ni a thet ciangin, Herod in a kumpi puantual silhin kumpi tokhum tungah to a, mipite tungah thusonna khat nei hi." 
Acts12:22 “A papau sia mihing hi ngawl a, pathian khat hi!” ci in amate au uh hi." 
Acts12:23 Thakhat thu in Topa vantunglalang khat in Herod velvawk hi, banghang ziam cile ama in Pathian vaang a pia bua hi. Ama sia lungte in ne a thi hi." 
Acts12:24 Tua hun sungin, Pathian kammal kizel suak a, khang vaial hi."

Acts13:1 Antioch khua pawlpi sungah, kamsaang pawlkhat le syate om hi: Barnabas, (Civompa kici) Simeon, (Cyrene pan) Lucius, (Ngamuk mangpa Herod taw a no ciang a khang khawm) Manaen le Saul ahi uh hi." 
Acts13:2 Topa ii na seamin antangin a om laitak, Thaa Thiangtho in, “Barnabas le Saul sia, amate ka sapna bangin nasep seam tu in, kei atu koituam tavun,” ci hi." 
Acts13:3 Amate an tangin thungen a, amate tungah a khut uh a ngak zawkciangin, paisak hi." 
Acts13:4 Barnabas le Saul sia, Thaa Thiangtho in tuabangin sawl ahi bangma, Seleucia khua ah pai a tua mun panin, Cyprus tuikulh ah teambaw taw ding uh hi." 
Acts13:5 Salamis khua a thet uh ciangin, Jew te ii synagogue te ah Pathian thuhil uh hi. A nasepna hu tu in, John Mark zongh amate taw omkhawm hi." 
Acts13:5 Salamis khua a thet uh ciangin, Jew te ii synagogue te ah Pathian thuhil uh hi. A nasepna hu tu in, John Mark zongh amate taw omkhawm hi."

Acts13:6 Amate in tuikulh kaantan in, Paphos ah pai uh a, tua munah mitbum thiampa Bar-Jesus min nei, kamsaang ka hi a ci Jew te khat taw kisii uh hi." 
Acts13:7 Ama in tuikulh ngamuk mangpa Sergius Paulus ii ngualtamh khat hi a, tua pa in mihing ciim khat ahi hi. Ngamukpa in Barnabas le Saul ama mai ah sam hi, banghang ziam cile, ama in Pathian thu za nuam hi." 
Acts13:8 Ahihang mitbum thiampa Elymas (Greek min) in amate langpan hi, ama in ngamuk mangpa sia tua upna panin, a lampial natu in, hanciam hi." 
Acts13:9 Tuasia ciangin Paul a kici Saul in Thaa Thiangtho taw kidim hi; ama in mitbum thiampa tangtan in salh a," 
Acts13:10 “Nang Doaimangpa tapa awng! Nang in a pha ci theampo ii ngalin pang ni hi. Nang in ngitlo thimthel pilna theampo taw kidim ni hi, tuaciangin, Topa ii thumaan thutakte sia leilot thu suaksak tu in hanciam tawntung ni hi!" 
Acts13:11 Topa khut in tu in, nang tungah hong paisuk tu hi; na mit tawcip tu a, tuaciangin, sun khuavak sia hun khat sung teng na mu thei buatu hi,” ci hi. Thakhat thu in, Elymas in, ama mittangte khuavui tuamcip bangin, thuak a, ama khut lenin lamlak tu mihing zongin, vak kawkoai hi." 
Acts13:12 Ngamuk mangpa in, thupiang teng a mu ciangin, ama in um hi. banghang ziam cile Topa thu a kihilciannate nasia takin, lamdang sa hi." 
Acts13:13 Paul le a pawl a lawmte sia Paphos khua panin, teambaw taw ding a, Pamphylia ngam khuapi khat ahi Perga a thet uh ciangin, tuak ah John Mark in amate nusia in Jerusalem ah heak kik hi." 
Acts13:13 Paul le a pawl a lawmte sia Paphos khua panin, teambaw taw ding a, Pamphylia ngam khuapi khat ahi Perga a thet uh ciangin, tuak ah John Mark in amate nusia in Jerusalem ah heak kik hi." 
Acts13:13 Paul le a pawl a lawmte sia Paphos khua panin, teambaw taw ding a, Pamphylia ngam khuapi khat ahi Perga a thet uh ciangin, tuak ah John Mark in amate nusia in Jerusalem ah heak kik hi." 
Acts13:14 Amate sia Perga pan paisuak in, Pisidia ngam Antioch khua theng a, tuaciang Sabbath ni in synagogue sungah tum in to uh hi." 
Acts13:15 Moses Thukham le kamsaangte lai atte a sim zawk uh ciangin, synagogue uliante in: “Suapuite awng, hanthot nopna thupuak nong nei uh le, mihingte tungah nong son tu ka dei uh hi,” ci hi." 
Acts13:16 Paul dingto in, a khut vaan a, thuson tu in kipan hi: “Hiak ah Pathian bia in a om, Israel minampuite le Gentile theampo awng: hong ngai tavun!" 
Acts13:17 Israel minamte ii Pathian in ih taanghpupite na teal a, Egypt ngam ah peamta in a teen hun sungin, minam lian khat in, na siam hi. Pathian in amate sia Egypt ngam panin, vaangletna lian taw pusua pui a," 
Acts13:18 kum sawmli sung sennealngam sungah, amate a thuak kenkon hi." 
Acts13:19 Amate in Canaan ngam ah, minam salite lalsak in ama minamte in, a ngam uh luasak hi." 
Acts13:20 Hi hun sung theampo kum zali le kum sawmnga sung bang ahi hi. “Tuasia zawkciang Pathian in amate sia, kamsaangpa Samuel hun dong, thukhenmangte pia hi." 
Acts13:21 Tuaciang amate in, kumpi khat a nget uh ciang Pathian in Benjamin suan Kish ii tapa Saul sia kum sawmli sung kumpi seam tu in pia hi." 
Acts13:22 Saul a hep zawkciang Pathian in David sia kumpipa suaksak hi. Pathian in tua pa huvau hi bangin ci hi: ‘Jesse tapa David in ka thin taw a kisi mihing nam hi a, seam a ka oai theampo a seam tu pa khat hi ci in ka mu zo hi.’" 
Acts13:23 David ii suan Jesus sia Pathian in kamciam a piaksa bangma in, Israel mite ii Hunpa hisak hi." 
Acts13:24 Jesus in a nasep a kipat ma in, John in Israel te theampo a mawnate uh pan, kisiik kik hamtang in, tui a kiphum uh kul tu hi, ci in thuhil hi." 
Acts13:24 Jesus in a nasep a kipat ma in, John in Israel te theampo a mawnate uh pan, kisiik kik hamtang in, tui a kiphum uh kul tu hi, ci in thuhil hi." 
Acts13:25 Tuaciang, John in a nasep a zaw kuan sang ciangin, mihingte munah, ‘Kei sia akua hong sa nu ziam? Kei sia note ii lamen a na ngak uh pa hi ngawl khi hi. Ahihang ngai vun! Ama in kei nungah hong pai lai tu a, ama peangdap suut tu in, ka kilawm bua hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts13:25 Tuaciang, John in a nasep a zaw kuan sang ciangin, mihingte munah, ‘Kei sia akua hong sa nu ziam? Kei sia note ii lamen a na ngak uh pa hi ngawl khi hi. Ahihang ngai vun! Ama in kei nungah hong pai lai tu a, ama peangdap suut tu in, ka kilawm bua hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts13:26 “Abraham suan Israel ka mipuite le, hi sungah Pathian a bia Gentile te theampo awng, hi ngupna thu ei tungah hong kipuak zo ahi hi!" 
Acts13:27 Tua in banghang ziam cile, Jerusalem ah a om mihingte le a lampuite in ama sia Hunpa ahi hunlam he ngawl a, Sabbath ni sim a kisim kamsaangte ii kammalte zongh a tel bua uh hi. Ahihang amate in Jesus a puavawk na uh taw, kamsaangte sonna teng, a taangtungsak a suak hi." 
Acts13:28 Amate in, Jesus tungah thidaan a piak natu thu mu zo ngawl ahihang Pilate munah, a thalupsak natu in ngen uh hi." 
Acts13:29 Laithiangtho sungah ama huvau a kison theampo a vawt zawkciang amate in thinglamtee tung pan khiasuk a, thaankuul khat sungah koi uh hi." 
Acts13:30 Ahihang Pathian in thina pan thosak kik hi. 
Acts13:31 Tuaciang Galilee pan Jerusalem ah a khualhaw puite tungah ni tam ma kilak hi. Tu in amate in Israel mite tungah ama ii tetti te ahi uh hi. 
Acts13:32 Tuaciangin Lungdamna Thupha no tungah hong puak tu in, kote hi sungah kong om uh hi: Pathian ii ih taanghpupite tungah a sep a vawt tu kamciam a piak sia, Jesus nungta kik tu in, a thaw kiksakna taw, ei a suan a paalte tungah, tu in tua kamciam hong tungsak ahi hi. Psalm a niina sungah hi bangin ki at hi, ‘Nang in ka Tapa na hi hi; tuni in na Pa ka suak zo hi.’" 
Acts13:33  
Acts13:34 Thina sung pan a thaw kik natu le, thaan sungah a muat ngeingawl natu in, Pathian sonna in hi bangin ci hi, ‘David tungah ka kamciam ahi a thiangtho le a maan thupha sia no tungah kong pia tu hi.’" 
Acts13:35 Laithiangtho mundang khat ah zongh hi bangin ci takpi hi. ‘Nang tungah a thumaan na naseampa thaan sungah na muatsak nuam buatu hi.’ 
Acts13:36 Banghang ziam cile David in a nuntak lai in Pathian ii deinate a sepsak zawkciang thi a, a taanghpupite taw kivui khawmin thaan sungah muat hi." 
Acts13:37 Ahihang Pathian ii thina pan a thaw kiksak pa sia thaan sungah muat ngawl hi. 
Acts13:38 Ka mipui Israel te awng, na heak tu ka dei uh thu sia Jesus tungtawnin mawnate kimaisakna hong kihilna thu hi; ama a um peuma in, Moses thukham ii hong suataksak zawk ngawl mawnate theampo panin, hong kisuataksakna thu ahi hi." 
Acts13:39  
Acts13:40 Tua ahikom kamsaangte ii hi bangin a ci teng sia, no tungah hong tun ngawl natu in, kidawm tavun;" 
Acts13:41 ‘En vun, ngual selno theite awng! Lamdang sa in thi tavun! Banghang ziam cile tuni in ka nasep sia a khiakna hong son a om hial zong, na um thei buatu hi!’ ” ci hi." 
Acts13:42 Paul le Barnabas in synagogue a nusiat uh laitakin, Sabbath ni kik ciang, amate pai kik a, hi thute a son thua lai natu in mite in sam uh hi." 
Acts13:43 Kikhopna panin mipite a cia zawkciangin, Paul le Barnabas sia Jew mi tam mama le Jew te biakna sungah a tum Gentile mi tam mama in zui uh hi. Pathian ii thuthiamna sungah kip in, a nuntak natu sawltakte in, amate sonpui in hanthawn uh hi." 
Acts13:44 Sabbath ni kik ciangin, khuapi sungah a om mihing theampo phial in Topa kammal ngai tu in pai uh hi." 
Acts13:45 Jew te in mihonpite a mu ciangin, eenna thin taw kidim uh a; Paul thusonte nialin, selno uh hi." 
Acts13:46 Ahihang Paul le Barnabas in, hang seseam in thuson uh hi: “Pathian thu, no kungah hong kihil maksak tu kisamh hi. Ahihang tuasia nialin tawntung nuntakna taw noma le noma kiphu na kisak ngawl uh hu in, no hong nusia in, Gentile te kungah pai tu khu hi,” ci hi." 
Acts13:47 Banghang ziam cile hi sia Topa ii hong thupiak ahi hi; ‘Leitung bup a kingup thei natu, Gentile te atu in nang sia khuavak khat in kong vawt zo hi,’ ci hi." 
Acts13:48 Gentile te in hi thu a zaak uh ciangin, lungdam a, Topa ii thupuak a pok uh hi; tuaciangin tawntung nuntakna nga tu a, a kiteal sate thu umte suak uh hi." 
Acts13:49 Tua ngamsung mun theampo ah Topa kammal kizel hi. 
Acts13:50 Ahihang Jew te in khuapi sung lampui upate le Pathian a bia Gentile numei a ci thei thu neite hol uh hi. Amate in Paul le Barnabas vawtsiat kipan a, ngam puasia ah hawlkeak uh hi." 
Acts13:51 Sawltakte in amate a nalhna in, a peang tungah a baang leivuite thin san uh a, Iconium ah paitan uh hi." 
Acts13:52 Antioch khua ah thu umte in lungdamna le Thaa Thiangtho taw kidim uh hi. 
Acts14:1 Iconium khua zongh ah tuabang ma in thu piang hi: Paul le Barnabas sia synagogue ah pai in thu a son uh ciangin, Jew te le Gentile mihing tam mama thu um hong suak uh hi." 
Acts14:2 Ahihang a um nuam ngawl Jew te in, Gentile te holin thu umte langpansak hi." 
Acts14:3 Sawltakte tua munah khuangei ma taamin, Topa huvau hangsan takin hil uh hi; Topa thuthiamna huvau amate ii thupuakna maan hi sia le nalamdang lakna te le a lamdangte vawt thei na vaang Topa in amate tungah a piakna taw kiciansak hi." 
Acts14:4 Khuapi sungah mihingte kikhen uh a: pawlkhat in Jew te panpui a, a dang teng in sawltakte sangah pang uh hi." 
Acts14:5 Tua zawkciang, Gentile te le Jew te pawlkhat in amate ii lampuite taw kopin, sawltakte vawtsiat tu khensat a, suangtum taw den sawm uh hi." 
Acts14:6 Sawltakte in hi thu a phaw uh ciangin, Lycaonia ngam khuapi liante ahi Lystra le Derbe khuate le a kiim ngam teng ah tai uh hi." 
Acts14:7 Tua munah amate in Lungdamna Thupha hil uh hi. 
Acts14:8 Lystra khua ah a pian pan kipan, a peangbai a, lampai thei ngeingawl, pasal khat om hi." 
Acts14:9 Tuak ah Paul ii thuson ngai in to hi. Paul in ama ii upna mu a, kidamsak thei tu ci in mu ahikom ama tangtan in en a," 
Acts14:10 “Na peang taw dingmaam in!” nging takin ci hi. Pasalpa zongh kilawn to in, vak kawkoai hi." 
Acts14:11 Mihonpite in Paul nasepna a mu uh ciangin, amate in Lycaonia kam taw au tek uh a, “Pathiante sia mihing bang suakin, ei kungah hong paisuk hi!” ci uh hi." 
Acts14:12 Amate in Barnabas sia Zeus ci in min pia a, Paul sia a thusonpipa ahikom, Hermes ci in min pia uh hi." 
Acts14:13 Zeus pathian biakinn sia khuapi pua sangah om a, a thiampipa in khuitalte le paakte taw biakpiakna vawt natu in, khuapi kongbiang ah paipui hi. Banghang ziam cile, ama le mihonpite in sawltakte sangaw biakpiakna pia nuam uh hi." 
Acts14:14 Tua mite in bang vawt sawm ci thu a zaak ciangin Barnabas le Paul in, amate puansilh lai uhte baltham in tai a, mihonpite laizang tuu in," 
Acts14:15 “Banghangin hi bangin, ngamta thong nu ziam? Ko zongh mihing thawthong hi a, noma bangma hi lel khu hi! Ko sia hi sungah, Lungdamna Thupha thangsak tu, hi a man nei ngawl nate panin a nungta Pathian sangah hong kiheaksak tu ka hi uh hi. Tua Pathian in vantung, leitung, tuipi, le tuate sung a om theampo a vawtpa ahi hi." 
Acts14:16 A bosa hunte sungah, ama in mihing theampo a uuk bang tek po in ngamtasak hi." 
Acts14:17 Ahihang, ama ii na pha a vawtte taw ama a om hunlam sia kitelthiangsak tawntung hi: Ama in note vantung pan nguatui hong pia a, lo ante a hun maanin hong pia hi. Ama in an hong pia a, na thinsung uh lungdamna taw, hong kidimsak hi,” ci in au hi." 
Acts14:18 Sawltakte in, hi bang teng pau napi mihonte ii amate sangaw biakpiakna a piak nopna pan khaam la dektak uh hi." 
Acts14:19 Pisidia ngam Antioch khua pan le Iconium panin Jew te pawlkhat hong pai hi; amate sangah mihonpite zol zo in Paul sia suang taw deang a, tuaciang thi zo sa ahikom khua pua ah taalkai uh hi." 
Acts14:20 Ahihang thu umte ama kiimkot ah hong kikhoptua uh ciangin, ama thoto a, khua sungah pai kik hi. A zing ciangin ama le Barnabas sia Derbe khua zuan uh hi." 
Acts14:21 Paul le Barnabas in Derbe khua ah Lungdamna Thupha hil uh a, nungzui tam mama nga uh hi. Tua zawkciangin amate Lystra ah pai kik a, tua mun panin Iconium ah, tua zawkciang Pisidia ngam Antioch khua ah paisuak uh hi." 
Acts14:22 Amate in thu umte thakho sua uh a, upna sungah thumaan in a kip natu uh hanthawn uh hi. “Pathian Ngam sungah ih tum thei natu in, ngimna tam mama ih kaantan kul tu hi,” ci in hil uh hi." 
Acts14:23 Amate in pawlpi sim ah pawlpi upate tealin koi uh a, thungetna le an tanna taw amate ii muan ahi Topa tungah tua upate aap uh hi." 
Acts14:24 Pisidia ngam a kaantan zawk uh ciangin, Pamphylia ngam theng uh hi." 
Acts14:25 Perga khua mite tungah thu a hil zawkciangin, Attalia khua ah pai uh hi." 
Acts14:26 Tua mun panin Antioch khua ah teambaw taw ding kik uh hi. Tua khua sia, tu a, amate ii nasep a mansa uh sia atu in Pathian ii thuthiamna sungah a ki aapna khua ahi hi." 
Acts14:27 Antioch a thet uh ciangin, amate in, pawlpi mite khawmtua a, amate tungah, Pathian nasepna theampo le Gentile te ii thu a up natu lampi a honsakna thute son uh hi." 
Acts14:28 Amate tua munah thu um mite taw khuangei ma taam uh hi. 
Acts15:1 Judea panin, Antioch ah mihing pawlkhat hong pai a, thu umte tungah, hi bangin hilcian tu in hong kipan in, “Moses thukham om bangin, na vunteap uh na at bua uh le, ngupna na nga thei buatu uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
Acts15:1 Judea panin, Antioch ah mihing pawlkhat hong pai a, thu umte tungah, hi bangin hilcian tu in hong kipan in, “Moses thukham om bangin, na vunteap uh na at bua uh le, ngupna na nga thei buatu uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
Acts15:2 Paul le Barnabas in hi thu huvau ah, amate taw nasia takin, kinial uh hi. Tua ahikom Paul, Barnabas le Antioch khua a om pawlkhat, Jerusalem ah hi thu taw kisai in pai a, sawltakte le upate taw kimu tu in, khensat uh hi." 
Acts15:3 Pawlpi ii sawlna taw amate a pai hi a, Phoenicia le Samaria kaantan in, a pai uh ciangin, Gentile te ii Pathian sangah a kikhealna thu ko uh hi. Tua thu in thu um theampo, nasia takin lungdamsak hi." 
Acts15:4 Jerusalem a thet uh ciangin, pawlpi in amate vai na dawn uh a, sawltakte le pawlpi upate tungah amate tungtawnin Pathian ii a sepna theampo son uh hi." 
Acts15:5 Ahihang Phariseete pawlsung panin, thu um mi pawlkhat ding a, “Gentile te in, vunteap a at uh kul tu hi. Moses Thukham a nit natu son kul tu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Acts15:6 Sawltakte le pawlpi upate, hi thu huvau kikum tu in, kisitua uh hi." 
Acts15:7 Ngei ma a kinial zawk uh ciang, Peter ding a, “Ka suapuite awng, khuangei pek lai in, Gentile te ii a zaak thei natu le a up thei natu in, Lungdamna Thupha hil tu in, no sung pan Pathian in keima hong teal ahi hunlam sia na heak uh hi." 
Acts15:8 Tuaciang, a kuama po ii thinsung a tel Pathian in, Gentile te a saanna, a lakna in ei tungah hong piak bangma in, amate tungah Thaa Thiangtho pia hi." 
Acts15:9 Ama in ei le amate hong doi tuan ngawl hi. Amate in um ahikom a mawnate maisak hi. 
Acts15:10 Tua ahile eite ih hizong, taanghpupite ahizong, a puak zawk ngawl vanhte thu umte nungzaang ah suanhin, banghang tu in Pathian ze et sawm nu ziam?" 
Acts15:11 Suak ngawl hi! Eite in zongh amate bangma ih um a, Topa Jesus thuthiamna taw ngupna ih nga hi,” ci hi." 
Acts15:12 Paul le Barnabas in Pathian ii amate tungtawn a, Gentile te sungah, nalamdang laknate le a lamdang theampo a sep a vawt a ko uh a zaak uh ciangin, a pawl bup thim dide in om uh hi." 
Acts15:13 A son tu teng a man zawkciangin, James hong pau a “Hong ngai tavun, suapuite awng!" 
Acts15:13 A son tu teng a man zawkciangin, James hong pau a “Hong ngai tavun, suapuite awng!" 
Acts15:14 Amate sung panin, ama atu minam tuam khat a laakna taw Pathian in Gentile te a thinbotna a lak phitna thu sia, Simon in a son zawk bek ahi hi." 
Acts15:15 Kamsaangte kammalte zongh hi thu taw kisi siat hi. Laithiangtho in hi bang ci hi. 
Acts15:16 ‘Hisia zawkciangin Topa in kong heak kik tu ci hi, tuaciangin David kumpi ngam ka pua pha kik tu hi. A lalcipna pan ka sa kik tu a, ka thahatsak kik tu hi." 
Acts15:17 Tuaciangin midang theampo le, keima neisa tu in ka sapsa Gentile mi theampo in kei hong zuan tu hi ci in," 
Acts15:18 hi thu taangh tawngh laipek pan a hesak Topa in son hi.’ 
Acts15:19 James in, “Kei ngaisutna ah, Pathian sangah a kiheak ahi Gentile te, ih buaisak ngawl tu sia thupi ka sa hi." 
Acts15:19 James in, “Kei ngaisutna ah, Pathian sangah a kiheak ahi Gentile te, ih buaisak ngawl tu sia thupi ka sa hi." 
Acts15:20 Tua hi ngawl zawin, amate tungah lai ih thaak tu a, milim biakna in a kizak hu in a thiangtho ngawl ante a neak ngawl natu; numei le pa khialna panin, a kikep natu; nganhing a tawl kimeaklumte sa a neak ngawl natu le sachi neak ngawl natu, lai thaakin ih son tu hi." 
Acts15:21 Banghang ziam cile, Moses Thukham sia Sabbath ni simin, synagogue te ah khuangei hialma kisim zo a, ama kammalte sia khua sim ah kihil zo hi,” ci hi." 
Acts15:22 Tua zawkciangin, sawltakte le pawlpi upate in pawlpi mi bup taw kikum a, Paul le Barnabas taw Antioch ah pai tu in, pawl sung pan mihing pawlkhat a teal natu khensat uh hi. Amate in Barsabbas kici Judas le Silas teal uh hi. Amate ngeal sia thu umte ii a zatak mama ahi uh hi," 
Acts15:23 amate in hi laithakte puasak uh hi: “Ko sawltakte le pawlpi upate, na suapuite in Antioch, Syria le Cilicia a teang Gentile suapuite theampo tungah, kipaupuina lai kong thaak uh hi." 
Acts15:24 Eima pawl sung panin, mihing pawlkhat in, amate ii sonna taw no hong thinngimsak, hong nawngkaisak tu in, hong pai hi, ci in za khu hi; ahihang hi bangin hong ngamtat natu in, ko tung pan amate in bangma sawlna nga ngawl uh hi." 
Acts15:25 Tua ahikom ka kikhawm uh a, thataak pawlkhat tealin no kungah paisak tawng, ci in ka thukim siat uh hi. Amate sia ih it ih lawmte ahi Barnabas le Paul taw hong paikhawm tu hi," 
Acts15:26 amate sia Topa Jesus Christ nasepna atu, a nuntakna uh a bo tu a lauhuai dongin, a kipumpiakte ahi hi." 
Acts15:27 Tua ahikom, Judas le Silas kong paisak uh hi. Amate in lai taw kong at uh teng, kam taw hong son tu uh hi." 
Acts15:28 Thaa Thiangtho le ko ii thukimna pan, hi zui tu a kul ngeinate ngawl buang a dang vanhngit kong suan nuam bua uh hi:" 
Acts15:29 milim biakna ah a kipiasa an peuma na ne heak vun; sachi na ne heak vun; a tawl a kimeaklum nganhingte sa na ne heak vun. Numei le pa khialna panin, na kikeam tavun. Hi teng na tang zo po le uhte pha tu hi. Dam tek tawng.” ci in at uh hi." 
Acts15:30 Thataakte kipaisak a, Antioch khua theng uh hi. Tua munah thu umte pawl bupin kikhawm a, a laithak sia pia uh hi." 
Acts15:31 A laithak a sim uh ciangin, hanthotna kam in, amate lungdamna taw kidimsak hi." 
Acts15:32 Amate mama kamsaang ahi Judas le Silas in, thu umte taw ngei ma thuson khawm uh a, thin letna le tha ngana neisak uh hi." 
Acts15:33 Tua munah hun tawmvei a zak zawk uh ciangin, thu umte in amate thinnuam takin tha kik uh a, amate in pai tu a sawlte kungah heak kik uh hi." 
Acts15:34 Ahihang Silas in tua munah taam tu in khensat hi. 
Acts15:35 Paul le Barnabas in, Antioch ah hun tawmvei sung zangh uh a, mi dang tam mama taw kikop in, Topa kammal hilcian in thuhil uh hi." 
Acts15:36 Tawmvei zawkciang Paul in Barnabas tungah, “Heak kik tawng i, Topa kammal ih thuhilna khua sim ah a om ih suapuite munah haw kikin, amate bangbang om ziam, ci in dawp tawng,” ci hi." 
Acts15:37 Barnabas in, John Mark sia amate taw tonpui nuam hi." 
Acts15:37 Barnabas in, John Mark sia amate taw tonpui nuam hi." 
Acts15:37 Barnabas in, John Mark sia amate taw tonpui nuam hi." 
Acts15:38 Ahihang Paul in, tua pa a kaizot tu sia suak a sa bua hi. Banghang ziam cile, a nasep man dong, ompui ngawlin, John Mark in amate sia Pamphylia ah nusia in heak kik hi." 
Acts15:38 Ahihang Paul in, tua pa a kaizot tu sia suak a sa bua hi. Banghang ziam cile, a nasep man dong, ompui ngawlin, John Mark in amate sia Pamphylia ah nusia in heak kik hi." 
Acts15:38 Ahihang Paul in, tua pa a kaizot tu sia suak a sa bua hi. Banghang ziam cile, a nasep man dong, ompui ngawlin, John Mark in amate sia Pamphylia ah nusia in heak kik hi." 
Acts15:39 Amate nasia takin kinial a, kikhen uh hi: Barnabas in Mark samin Cyprus zuan tu in, teambaw taw ding hi." 
Acts15:39 Amate nasia takin kinial a, kikhen uh hi: Barnabas in Mark samin Cyprus zuan tu in, teambaw taw ding hi." 
Acts15:40 Thu umte in Topa ii a thuthiamna sungah a kepcing natu in, a aap zawkciang, Paul ahile Silas teal a, ding hi." 
Acts15:41 Ama in Syria le Cilicia kaantan in pai a, pawlpite tha kho sak hi." 
Acts16:1 Paul in Derbe le Lystra khua Timothy kici Tapidaw khat ii teenna ah khualhaw suak hi. A nu zongh Jew minam Tapidaw khat hi a, ahihang a pa sia Greek te ahi hi." 
Acts16:2 Lystra le Iconium khua thu umte theampo in Timothy sia phat son tek uh hi. 
Acts16:3 Paul in Timothy tonpui nuam ahikom a vunteap atsak hi. Ama in tuabang a vawtsak sia, banghang ziam cile, tua munah a teang Jew theampo in Timothy ii pa sia Greek ahi hunlam he uh hi." 
Acts16:4 Amate in khuate kaantan in a pai uh ciangin, Jerusalem a sawltakte le pawlpi upate ii a khensat zui tu ngeinate thu umte tungah pia uh a, tua ngeinate a zui natu in sawl hi." 
Acts16:5 Tua ahikom Pawlpite upna sungah kithakhosak vaial a, mihing zongh ni simin khangto hi." 
Acts16:6 Amate in Phrygia le Galatia ngamte kaantan in, khualhaw uh hi, banghang ziam cile, Asia ngamkhen sungah amate ii thuhil tu Thaa Thiangtho in a oai bua hi." 
Acts16:7 Mysia ngamngi a thet uh ciangin, amate in Bithynia ngamkhen sungah, pai tu in kithoai hi. Ahihang Jesus ii Thaa in a oai bua hi." 
Acts16:8 Tua ahikom Mysia ngam kaantan in khualhaw a, Troas khua ah amate paisuak uh hi." 
Acts16:9 Paul in tua zanin a mukholna sungah Macedonia te pasal khat a ding mu in, ama tungah “Macedonia ngam ah hong pai ta'n a, hong hu ta'n!” ci in hesuak ngen hi." 
Acts16:10 Paul in hi mukholna a mu zawk po ciang, Macedonia ah pai tu in, ka kithoai uh hi, banghang ziam cile Pathian in, Lungdamna Thupha sia tua mun mite tungah hil tu in hong sam zo hi, ci in ka khensat uh hi." 
Acts16:11 Troas panin teambaw taw ka ding uh a, Samothrace tuikulh kan in, a zing ciangin Neapolis ka theng uh hi." 
Acts16:12 Tua mun panin lei lam taw Philippi ah ka pai uh a, tua khuapi sia Macedonia ii ngamkhen masabel sia ii khuapi ahi hi. Tua in Rome kumpite ukna ngam khat hi si hi. Tua munah ni tam mama ka taam uh hi." 
Acts16:13 Sabbath ni in khuapi puasia ah pusuak in, ngun hui ah Jew te thungetna mun khat om tu ka ngaisutna munah ka pai uh hi. Ka to uh a, tua munah a kikhawm numeite thu ka sonpui uh hi." 
Acts16:14 Thu hong ngaite khat sia Thyatira khua pan Lydia hi a, ama in puan sandup zuak nu khat ahi hi. Ama in Pathian a bia numei khat hi a, Paul thusonna teng a ngai tu in, Topa ii a thinsung a honsak nu ahi hi." 
Acts16:15 Ama le a innkuanpuite in tui a kiphum zawkciangin, ama in ko hong sam hi, “Kei sia Topa a um tatak mihing khat ci in na khensat uh le, hong pai tavun a, ka inn ah hong taam tavun,” ci hi. Ama inn ah ka pai natu in hong zol hi." 
Acts16:16 Ni khat thungetna munah pai tu in ka pai uh laitakin maisang a hong piang pheang tu, thu a sonkhol thei doai ngilo vei innteang naseam numei khat taw ka kisi uh hi. Mai lamsang thu tu a sonkhol theina taw a tote atu sum tam mama thalawsak hi." 
Acts16:17 Ama in Paul le ko hong zui a, “Hi mite in A saangbel Pathian naseamte hi! Note bangbangin kingum thei tu ci thu amate in hong thangsak hi!” ci in au hi." 
Acts16:18 Ni tam mama sung hi bangin, Paul a thin uuk dong au a, Paul a thin uuk ciang kingeilee in, doai munah, “Jesus min taw numei nu sung pan na pusua natu thu kong pia hi,” ci hi. Tua hun lian laitakin, doai in numei nu sung panin pusuak hi!" 
Acts16:19 A tote in amate sum nga natu lampi bo ahi hunlam a phaw uh ciangin Paul le Silas sia pummat uh a, mihon kikhopna tual thunei upate mai ah kai uh hi." 
Acts16:20 Rome kumpi uliante mai ah paipui uh a, “Hi mite in Jew te hi a, koma khuapi sungah buaina piangsak hi." 
Acts16:21 Amate in ko thukham a langpan ngeinate hil uh hi; ko sia Rome ngammite khu hi, hi ngeinate saang thei ngawl, zangh thei ngawl tu khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Acts16:22 Mihon zongh in, Paul le Silas a ngal vawtte sangah pang uh hi. Tua zawkciang uliante in, Paul le Silas te ii puan laaithapsak a, saat tu in thupia uh hi." 
Acts16:23 Nasia takin, a kisaat zawkciang amate sia thonginn sung denna in kinei a, thong ukpa munah kho bikbek in a kalh natu thupia hi." 
Acts16:24 Hi thupiakna a nga ciangin, thong ukpa in, amate sia thonginn sungsang doituam sungah, khumin, a peangte thingkol bulsak hi." 
Acts16:25 Zankim hun ciangin, Paul le Silas in Pathian tungah thungen in, biakna late sa in om a, thongtaak dangte in ngai uh hi." 
Acts16:26 Thakhat thu in, nasia tak zinliing a, thonginn phungkawng tawdap theampo dong ngawk hi. Thakhat thu in, kongkhapi theampo kihong a, thongtaak theampo tung pan thikkolte peal siat hi." 
Acts16:27 Thong ukpa khanglo a, thong kongkhapi theampo kihong sa in, a om a mu ciang, thongtaak theampo suakta siat zo sa hi; tua ahikom, ama le ama kithatlum tu in, a namsau dok hi." 
Acts16:28 Ahihang Paul in, a aw nei za taw oksan in, “Nangma le nangma bangma kilaw heak in! Hi sungah kote om siat khu hi!” ci hi." 
Acts16:29 Thong ukpa in meivak khat ngen a, thonginn doituam sungah tai kawm in tum a, Paul le Silas te peang ah liingin bok hi." 
Acts16:30 Tua zawkciang, amate ngeal pusua in, “Tote awng, ngupna ka nga natu in bang vawt tu khi ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Acts16:31 “Topa Jesus um in, tuaciang, nang hong kingum tu hi — nang le na innkuanpuite ngupna na nga tu uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
Acts16:32 Tuaciang amate in ama le ngualdang ama inn ah a omte tungah Topa kammal hil uh hi. 
Acts16:33 Tua zan tua hun mama in, thong ukpa in, amate pusuapui in, a liamna mate silsak hi; tuaciangin ama le a innkuan bupin tui kiphum paih uh hi." 
Acts16:34 Ama in Paul le Silas a inn ah ciapui a, anvaak hi. Ama le a innkuanpuite in lungdamna taw kidim uh hi, banghang ziam cile, tu in amate in Pathian um zo uh hi." 
Acts16:35 A zingsang ciangin Rome kumpi thuneite in, palik bute paisak a, “Tua mihingte pusua vun,” ci in thupia uh hi." 
Acts16:36 Tua ahikom thong ukpa in, Paul munah, “Uliante in nang le Silas hong kisuataksak natu thu hong pia hi. Pusuak thei tu nu hi, tua hi a, thinnuam in na pai tavun,” ci hi." 
Acts16:37 Ahihang Paul in palik bute munah, “Ko bangma khialna lian nei ngawl khu hi. Ahihang mihonpite mai ah velna thuak khu hi — ko sia Rome ngammite hi khu hi! Tua zawkciang thonginn sung denna in hong kinei hi. Tuaciang tu leleau in a thimtham in, hong suaktasak nuam nu ziam. Suak thei ngawl tu hi! Rome uliante amate mama hi sungah hong pai hamtang tahen a, hong pusuaksak tahen,” ci hi." 
Acts16:38 Palik bute in hi kammal teng, Rome uliante munah ko uh hi; tuaciang amate in, Paul le Silas sia Rome ngammi ahi hunlam a zaak uh ciangin, amate lau uh hi." 
Acts16:39 Tua ahikom amate pai in, Paul le Silas te tungah pakaai uh hi; tua zawkciang, thonginn sung pan pusuak in khuapi a nusiat natu in sawl uh hi." 
Acts16:40 Paul le Silas in thonginn nusia in, Lydia ii inn zuan uh hi. Tua munah thu umte taw kimu uh a, hanthotna kammalte a son zawkciang nusia uh hi." 
Acts17:1 Paul le Silas in Amphipolis le Apollonia kaantan in khualhaw a, synagogue khat omna Thessalonica khua theng uh hi." 
Acts17:2 Ama ii hun a zak ngei tawntung bangma in, Paul in tua synagogue ah pai hi. Tua munah Sabbath ni thum sung Laithiangtho sisanh in, mipite taw thu kikum a," 
Acts17:3 Messiah in ngim thuak tu a, thina panin tho kik tu hi, ci in Laithiangtho taw kipsakin sonthiang hi. Paul in, “No tungah kong pualaak hi Jesus sia Messiah ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Acts17:4 Amate sung panin pawlkhat in um a, Paul le Silas te pawm uh hi; tuabang ma in Pathian a bia Greek te honkhat le numei lampui tam mama te zongh in um a pawm uh hi." 
Acts17:5 Ahihang Jew te in eang a, lamdung ah a vakthap mihing mannung ngawl pawlkhat khawmtua in, mihing ngilo nuam honkhat piangsak hi. Amate in a khuathing in buaisak uh a, Paul le Silas zongin mipite mai ah a kaikeak thei natu in Jason ii inn sim uh hi." 
Acts17:6 Ahihang amate a mu ngawl uh ciang, Jason le thu um dang pawlkhat khuapi thuneite mai ah kai a, “Hi mite in mun theampo ah nawngkaisak uh hi! Tu zonghin amate ei khua ah hong pai uh a," 
Acts17:7 tuaciang Jason in, amate sia ama inn ah keam hi. Amate theampo in, Kumpilianpa ii thukhamte paltan a, Jesus a minnei kumpipa dang khat om hi ci uh hi,” ci in au uh hi." 
Acts17:8 Hi kammal teng taw khuapi sungah mihonte le khuapi thuneite buaisak uh hi. 
Acts17:9 Thuneite in Jason le a dang teng a suatak natu in, a kisamh za sum piasak a, tua zawkciangin amate paisak uh hi." 
Acts17:10 Khuazan po ciang, thu umte in Paul le Silas sia, Berea khua ah puak uh hi. A thet ciangin, amate synagogue ah pai uh hi." 
Acts17:11 Tua khua mite in Thessalonica khua mite sangin ngaisun kaak thei zaw uh hi. Amate in lawpna lian taw thusonte ngai in, Paul thusonte maan tatak ziam ci in a heak natu in ni simin Laithiangtho en uh hi." 
Acts17:12 Amate sung pan mihing tam mama in thu um a; Greek te a ci thei numei tam mama le Greek te pasal tam mama zongh in um uh hi. 
Acts17:13 Ahihang Thessalonica ah a om Jew te in, Pathian kammal sia Bereate tung zongh ah, Paul in hil zo hi ci in, a zaak uh ciangin, hong pai a, mihing ngilo nuam honkhat hol hi." 
Acts17:14 Thu umte in thakhat thu in, Paul sia tuipivaal ah puak uh hi; ahihang Silas le Timothy te ngeal Berea ah taam uh hi." 
Acts17:15 Paul a thate in Athens dong zui uh a, tua zawkciang Berea ah heak kikin, Silas le Timothy in, a manlang thei zaza in, a del natu Paul ii kam vaithak teng son uh hi." 
Acts17:16 Silas le Timothy ngakin, a om laitak Paul in Athens khua ah milim biakna a dim in om a mu ciangin Paul sia nasia takin a thinkiam hi." 
Acts17:17 Tua ahikom Jew te le Pathian a bia Gentile te taw synagogue sung le, ni simin hong pai pawpo taw zongh mipi kikhopna leitual ah Paul in thu kikuppui hi." 
Acts17:18 Epicurean syate le Stoic syate zongh in, ama taw thu kinial uh hi. Pawlkhat in, “He ngawl napi, a kihesak hisia pa in, bang teng son nuam ziam,” ci in dongh hi. A dangte in, “Ama ii son sia, ngamdangte pathiante hi tuak hi,” ci in zo kik hi. Banghang hi bangin ci ziam cile, ama in Jesus thu le a thaw kikna thu a hil hang ahi hi." 
Acts17:19 Tua ahikom amate in Paul sia Areopagus kici Athen te ii council kikhopna munah paipui a, hi bangin ci uh hi, “Hi hilna thak na sawson sia, he nuam khu hi." 
Acts17:20 Thu pawlkhat na son kong zaak uhte sia, ko atu in tumdang ahikom, a khiakna he nuam tu khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Acts17:21 (Banghang ziam cile, Athens khua mi theampo le tuak ah a teang ngamdangmite in, thuthak sonna le zaakna taw a hun theampo zangh nuam uh hi.)" 
Acts17:22 Khuapi council kikhopna mai ah Paul ding a, “Athen te awng, na theampo sungah biakna lamsang kin mamate na hi hunlam ka mu hi." 
Acts17:23 Banghang ziam cile na khuapi sung kaantan in, ka pai a, na biakna munte ka et ciangin, ‘A kihe ngawl Pathian khat Atu,’ ci in biaknatau khat tungah, lai ki at ka mu hi. Tua ahiciang na heak ngawl bul na biak uh Pathian sia, tu in a thu kong thansak sia ahi hi." 
Acts17:24 Leitung le a sung a om theampo a vawt, Pathian sia vantung le leitung ii Topa hi a, mihing khutte taw a kivawt biakinnte sungah a teang bua hi." 
Acts17:25 Mihingte ii ama atu ih sepsakna pan, ih piak thei tu na khat zongh, ama atu in a kitaangsamh bua hi, banghang ziam cile mihing theampo atu nuntakna, husanna le na theampo ama ii hong piaksa hi zaw hi." 
Acts17:26 Ama in mihing khat panin, mihing nam theampo bitphua a, leitung buppi ah teangsak hi. Ama in amate teen natu a hunte le a munte see kholsa in koi hi." 
Acts17:27 Mihingte ii ama a zon thei natu le ama a mu thei thaak natu in hi bangin vawt hi. Ahizong a tatakin Pathian in ei khat pawpo kung panin khuala ngawl hi; 
Acts17:28 mihing khat in, ‘Ama sungah ei ih nungta a, ngamta in ih om hi’ a ci bangma ahi hi. Noma ii la phua pawlkhat zongh in, ‘Ei zongh ama tate ih hi hi’ ci hi." 
Acts17:29 Ei sia Pathian ii tate ih hi zawk nungsang in, ama pianzia sia mihingte pilna le thiamna taw a kivawt khamh, ngunn le suang milim khat pawpo bangin ih ngaisun buatu hi." 
Acts17:30 Mihingte ii ama ih heak ngawl lai hunte, Pathian in heak ngawl bawl hikale tu hun ciang, mihingte a vekpi in mun theampo ah, amate tatsiatnate pan a kikheal natu ama in thupia hi." 
Acts17:31 Banghang ziam cile ama in, leitung bup ah thukhaikim thu taw, ama ii tealsa mihing khat zangh in, thu a khen natu in, ni khat, ciangtan sa in koi hi. Hi thu a maanna thu sia, tua pa thina panin a thawsak kikna taw mihing sim tungah a lak zo hi!” ci hi." 
Acts17:32 Thina panin a thawsak kikna huvau, Paul ii son a zaak uh ciangin, pawlkhat in nunauna in nei uh a, ahihang a dangte in, “Hi thu huvau na son sia za kik nuam lai khu hi,” ci uh hi." 
Acts17:33 Tua ahikom Paul in kikhopna nusia hi. 
Acts17:34 Pasal pawlkhat in ama pawmin thu um uh hi, tuate sungah council mi ahi Dionysius om a; Damaris a kici numei khat le a dang pawlkhat zongh kihel hi." 
Acts18:1 Hisia zawkciang, Paul in Athens nusia in Corinth ah paisuak hi." 
Acts18:2 Tua munah ama in Italy pan a zi Priscilla taw hong pai tawm Pontus khua ah a suak Jew te Aquila a kici khat taw kimu hi, banghang ziam cile Kumpilianpa Claudius in Jew te theampo Rome khua a nusiat natu in, thupia hi. Paul in amate taw kimu tu in pai a," 
Acts18:3 amate taw taam khawm naseam khawm in om hi, banghang ziam cile amate bangma in, Paul in a nuntak natu in tuipuan buk khui hi." 
Acts18:4 Ama in Jew te le Greek te a telsak thei natu in, Sabbath ni simin synagogue ah thu kikum khawm uh hi." 
Acts18:5 Macedonia pan Silas le Timothy a thet ciang, Paul in hunbit in thuhilna zangh a, Jesus sia Messiah hi ci in Jew te tungah tetti pang hi." 
Acts18:6 Amate in nalh in, ama huvau kamsia a pau uh ciang, ama in a lungkim ngawlna a lakna in, a puan tungah leivui baangte thin a, “Na mangthang uh le noma mawna hang hi tu hi! Kei hang hi ngawl tu hi. Tu pan kipan Gentile te kungah pai tu khi hi,” ci hi." 
Acts18:7 Tua ahikom amate nusia in, Titius Justus kici Pathian a bia Gentile mite khat ii inn ah teang tu in, pai hi; tua pa ii inn sia synagogue hui ma ahi hi." 
Acts18:8 Jew te ii synagogue ah a lampuipa Crispus le a innkuanpui theampo in Topa um uh hi; Corinth a midang tam mama in ngupna thu za uh a, um in tui kiphum uh hi." 
Acts18:9 Zan khat Paul in mukholna nei a, Topa in ama tungah, “Lau heak in, na son ngei bangma in son in a, tua thu thasua heak in," 
Acts18:10 banghang ziam cile keima in nang hong ompui ka hikom, kuama in nang hong susia thei ngawl tu hi. Hi khuapi sung a om mihing tam mamate sia keima mi ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Acts18:11 Tua ahikom Paul in tua munah kum khat le kum lang taam a, mihingte tungah Pathian kammal hil hi." 
Acts18:12 Gallio sia Rome kumpite in Achaia ngamuk mangpa tu in a koi uh ciangin, Jew te hong kikhawmtua a, Paul manin, thukhenzum ah paipui uh hi." 
Acts18:13 “Hi sia pa in thukham taw a kisi ngawl biaknazia taw Pathian biak natu mihingte zol tu in hanciam hi!” ci uh hi. 
Acts18:14 Paul in thuson tu in a kithoai laitak, Gallio in Jew te tungah, “Hi thu sia ngitlo khialna lian ahibuale khialna khat po a vawt ahi tha le, no Jew te tungah kong thinsau kenkon natu kilawm hi." 
Acts18:15 Ahihang hi thu sia kammalte, minte le noma thukham taw kisai thu kinialna ahikom noma tek ma in khensat hamtang tavun. Tuabangte tungtaang ah thukhenpa seam ngawl tu khi hi!” ci hi." 
Acts18:16 Tuaciangin amate sia zum sung panin, not hi." 
Acts18:17 Amate theampo in synagogue lampuipa Sosthenes man uh a, zum mai ah vel uh hi. Ahihang Gallio in tuasia tawm zongh a awlmaw bua hi." 
Acts18:18 Paul in Corinth khua ah thu umte taw ni tam ma taam a, tua zawkciang amate nusia in Priscilla le Aquila taw Syria ah teambaw taw ding uh hi. Cenchreae pan teambaw taw a din ma in, a kiciamna khat hu in, a lu a tol in meet hi." 
Acts18:19 Amate in Ephesus khua theng a, tua munah Paul in Priscilla le Aquila nusia hi. Ama in synagogue ah pai a, Jew te taw thu kikum hi." 
Acts18:20 Amate in khuangei zaw a taam lai natu in ama tho uh hi. Ahihang ama a thukim bua hi. 
Acts18:21 Taam ngawl zaw in a din tu ciang, “Pathian ii deina ahile no kungah kong pai kik tu hi,” ci hi. Tuabangin ama Ephesus panin teambaw taw ding hi." 
Acts18:22 Caesarea a thet ciangin, Jerusalem ah pai a, pawlpi mite paupui in, tua zawkciang Antioch ah pai hi." 
Acts18:23 Tua munah hun tawmvei a zak zawkciang ding kik hi. Ama in Galatia le Phrygia ngamte kaantan in pai a, thu um theampo thakhosak hi." 
Acts18:24 Tua hun laitakin Alexandria khua ah a suak Apollos kici Jew te pasal khat Ephesus khua ah hong pai hi. Ama in thuson thiam khat hi a, Laithiangtho zongh a khawng a kheakin he hi." 
Acts18:25 Ama sia Topa Lampi a kihil sa khat hi a, tha lawpna lianpi taw Jesus thu thangsak a, maan takin hil hi. Ahitazong ama ii heak sia in John ii tuiphumna bek ahi hi." 
Acts18:25 Ama sia Topa Lampi a kihil sa khat hi a, tha lawpna lianpi taw Jesus thu thangsak a, maan takin hil hi. Ahitazong ama ii heak sia in John ii tuiphumna bek ahi hi." 
Acts18:26 Jew te ii synagogue ah hangsan takin thuson tu in kipan hi. Priscilla le Aquila in ama thu a zaak uh ciang, amate inn ah ciapui uh a, Pathian Lampi a maan zaw lai in hil thiang uh hi." 
Acts18:27 Tuasia ciang Apollos in Achaia ah pai tu in khensat ahikom, Ephesus ah thu umte in, ama a huna in Achaia ngam a om thu umte laithaksak a, pha takin vai a mua natu in hanthawn uh hi. Ama a thet ciangin, Pathian ii thuthiamna taw thu um a suakte atu in, a huna lian mama hi." 
Acts18:28 Banghang ziam cile, Jesus sia Messiah a hina thu, Laithiangtho sisanh in a lak telna taw in mihonte mai ah, Jew te taw kam kinialnate sungah a mawngnei mama kam nialnate taw Jew te a zo ngawp hi." 
Acts19:1 Corinth khua ah Apollos a om laitak, Paul sia tua ngamkhen sungsang kaantan in khualhaw a, Ephesus theng hi. Tua munah nungzuite pawlkhat mu a," 
Acts19:2 tuaciang, ama in “Thu um mite na sua uh ciang, Thaa Thiangtho na nga uh ziam?” ci in dongh hi. Amate in “Thaa Thiangtho a om hunlam za zongh za bua ung,” ci in zo uh hi." 
Acts19:3 “Pha hi, tua ahile bang tui kiphumna nam sia na saang uh ziam?” ci in Paul in dongh hi. “John ii tuiphumna sia hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Acts19:3 “Pha hi, tua ahile bang tui kiphumna nam sia na saang uh ziam?” ci in Paul in dongh hi. “John ii tuiphumna sia hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Acts19:4 Paul in, “John ii tuiphumna sia in mawnate pan a kisiikte atu ahi hi; tuaciang ama in Israel te tungah, ama nung pan hong paipa na um vun — - tua pa in Jesus hi,” ci hi." 
Acts19:4 Paul in, “John ii tuiphumna sia in mawnate pan a kisiikte atu ahi hi; tuaciang ama in Israel te tungah, ama nung pan hong paipa na um vun — - tua pa in Jesus hi,” ci hi." 
Acts19:5 Amate in hi thu a zaak uh ciangin, Topa Jesus min taw tui kiphum uh hi." 
Acts19:6 Paul in amate tungah a khut nga a, Thaa Thiangtho amate tungah hong theng hi; amate in kam tumdangte taw pau uh a, Pathian ii ngupna thute zongh thangsak uh hi." 
Acts19:7 Amate a vekpi in, sawm le nii khawng pha uh hi." 
Acts19:8 Paul in Jew te synagogue ah pai a, tha thum sung hangsan takin mihingte tungah thuson a, amate taw thu kikum in, Pathian Ngam thu a upsak zawk natu hanciam hi." 
Acts19:9 Ahihang pawlkhatte a thinpui in, a um nuam bua uh a, mihon bup mai ah amate in Topa Lampi sonsia uh hi. Tua ahikom Paul in amate nusia in, thu umte paipui a, ni simin Tyrannus laihilna inndoi lian sungah kikupna nei uh hi." 
Acts19:10 Hi bangin kum nii tawntung a kalsuanpui ciangin Asia ngamkhen a teang Jew te le Gentile te in Topa kammal za uh hi. 
Acts19:11 Paul tungtawnin Pathian in nidang in a om ngeingawl, nalamdang laknate vawt hi." 
Acts19:12 Ama zak mai nawlna le awmdap puante ngawngawn ciinate kungah a kipaipui ciangin a natnate dam a, thaa ngilote zongh amate sung pan pusuak uh hi." 
Acts19:13 Jew te pawlkhat khualhaw in vakkot a, thaa ngilo a notte zongh in thaa ngilo a naw natu in, Topa Jesus min zak tu hanciam uh hi. Amate in thaa ngilo te munah, “Paul ii a hil Jesus min taw keima in thu kong pia hi,” ci hi." 
Acts19:14 Unau salite ahi, Jew te Thiampi Lianbel Sceva a kici sia ii tapate in hi bang seam uh hi." 
Acts19:15 Ahihang thaa ngilo in amate tungah, “Jesus sia he khi hi, tuaciang Paul zongh he khi hi; ahihang no akua te nu ziam?” ci hi." 
Acts19:16 Thaa ngilo veipa in amate nasia takin buan ngawp a, zocip siat hi. Tua ahikom a liam a bai le puan ekkeak sa in tua pa inn panin tai uh hi." 
Acts19:17 Ephesus khua a teang Jew te le Gentile te theampo in hi thu za uh hi; amate sia launa taw kidim in, Topa Jesus min kipatoai seseam hi." 
Acts19:18 Thu um mite sung pan tam mama hong pai a, amate ngamtatnasate mipi mai ah kheet nei ngawlin pualaak uh hi." 
Acts19:19 Mitbum thiam tam mama in a laibute khawmtua in hong paipui uh a, mipi mu tangin, mei taw haltham uh hi. A laibu man teng a kingawm ciang, ngunntang tul sawmnga pha hi." 
Acts19:20 Topa thu sia hi bangin vaangletna taw kizel a, hat vaial hi." 
Acts19:21 Hi thu teng a pian zawkciang Paul in Macedonia le Achaia ngam kaantan in khualhaw a, Jerusalem ah paitan tu in, khensat hi. Ama in “Tua munah ka pai zawkciang, Rome khuapi zongh ah ka haw kul tu hi,” ci hi." 
Acts19:22 Tua ahikom ama a hute nii Timothy le Erastuste zongh Macedonia ngam ah paisak a, ama ahile, Asia ngamkhen ah hun a tamzaw zangh thua hi." 
Acts19:23 Hi hun laitakin, Ephesus khua ah Topa ii Thu hangin buaina nasia khat hong om hi." 
Acts19:24 Demetrius min nei ngunn seakpa in, a numeipathian Artemis ii biakinn limte veu, ngunn taw vawt a, ama nasepna pan a naseamte meetsak mama hi." 
Acts19:25 Tua ahikom ama in, a naseam theampo le, tua nasepna taw a kibang a seam mihing dangte khawmtua in, “Pasalte awng, eite nopsakna in hi nasepna pan hong piang hi, ci in na heak tek uh ahi hi." 
Acts19:26 Tu in hi Paul a ci sia pa ii ngamtatna babang noma tek in mu thei a, za thei nu hi. Ama in khut taw vawttawm pathian in pathian hi peuma ngawl hi ci a, hi sung Ephesus khua le Asia ngamkhen bup phialma ah mihing tam tatak umsak zo hi." 
Acts19:27 Tuaciang ih nasepna a minsiat tu lauhuai hi. Tua bek dom ngawlin, Asia ngam le leitung mun theampo ii a biak tua a lian numeipathian Artemis ii biakinn zongh a luithawthong suakin — a letna teng a kisuksiat tu lauhuai hi!” ci hi." 
Acts19:28 Mihonpite in hi kamte a zaak uh ciangin, a thinso a, “Ephesus khua ah om Artemis ma lian hi!” ci in au uh hi." 
Acts19:29 Tua ngamlumna sia khuapi bup kilaw hi. A ngilo nuam mihon in, Paul ii khualhawpui Macedonia te nii Gaius le Aristarchus pummat a, poai lakna inn ah taipui uh hi." 
Acts19:30 Paul in mihonte mai ah, pai nuam ahihang, thu um mite in a oai bua uh hi." 
Acts19:31 Ama lawm ngamkhen sungah thunei pawlkhatte in zongh poai inn ah ama le ama a kilaak ngawl natu in thu zasak uh hi. 
Acts19:32 Tua laitakin a kikhopna buppi sungah ngamlum seseam hi; pawlkhat in thu pawlkhat taw au a, a dangte in thudang khat taw au uh hi, banghang ziam cile mihing a tamzaw in, amate banghangin kikhawmtua ziam ci zongh a tel bua uh hi." 
Acts19:33 Mihing pawlkhat in Alexander maw hi vak ci uh hi, banghang ziam cile Jew te in ama sia mai ah paisak uh hi. Tuasia ciangin, Alexander in mihonpi a thim natu a khut vaanin ama a kihuk natu in, thuson tu hanciam hi." 
Acts19:34 Ahihang ama sia Jew te hi ci in a tel uh ciangin, a au ngei uh bangin, “Ephesus khua ah, Artemis lian hi!” ci in nai nii sung au hon uh hi." 
Acts19:35 A khakbel ciangin khuapi lai atpa in, mihonte thimsak thei hi. Ama in “Ephesus khuapuite awng! Ephesus khuapi sia a lian Artemis biakinn le vantung pan hong taaksuk suang thiangtho a keam sia ahi hunlam a kuama po in, ih heak ahi hi." 
Acts19:36 Hi thute kuama in nial thei ngawl tu hi. Tua ahikomin, note thim vun a, maitatna bangma vawt heak vun." 
Acts19:37 Amate in, biakinnte le phuul ngawl a, ih numeipathian huvau, kamsia le pau ngawl hi napi, note in pasal hite hi sungah hong paipui nu hi." 
Acts19:38 Demetrius le a naseamte in, mi pawlkhat tungah thu vawt nopna nei na hi uh le, thu neite le zumhon hun a maan thukhenzum ih nei hi; tua munah thu kivawt thei hi." 
Acts19:39 Ahihang tua sangin na dei zawk uh a om le, upadi bangin ngammite kikhopna ah khensat kul tu hi." 
Acts19:40 Banghang ziam cile, tuni a thupiang teng zawkciang, ei tungah buaina piangsak hi, ci in maw hong kizon kik tu lauhuai hi. Hi bangin buai natu bangma thu om ngawl a, hisia hang ci zongh ih son thei tu bangma om ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
Acts19:41 Hi teng a ci zawkciangin, a ma in kikhopna tawpsak hi." 
Acts20:1 Tua buaina a thim zawkciang Paul in thu umte khawmtua a, hanthotna kammalte taw vaithakna nei hi. Tuaciang ama vaiding in Macedonia ah paisuak hi." 
Acts20:2 Ama in tuak a ngamte kaantan in pai a, thu tam mamate taw hanthawn hi. Tua zawkciangin Achaia ah pai in," 
Acts20:3 tua munah tha thum taam hi. Syria ah pai tu in a kingin laitak, tuak ah Jew te in ama a thasawm hunlam phawk hi; tua ahikom Macedonia tawnin, heak kik tu khensat hi." 
Acts20:4 Berea khua mi Pyrrhus ii tapa Sopater in ama tonpui hi; Thessalonica khua pan Aristarchus le Secundus; Derbe khua panin Gaius; Asia ngamkhen panin Tychicus le Trophimus; Timothy zongh in tonpui uh hi. 
Acts20:5 Amate pai masa a, Troas panin ko hong ngak hi." 
Acts20:6 Tol saw ngawl Anluum Poai zawkciang Philippi panin, teambaw taw ka ding uh a, ni nga zawkciangin amate taw Troas ah kisitua in, tua munah nipi khat sung hun ka zangh uh hi." 
Acts20:7 Nino nitakin neakkhopna nei tu in, ka kikaikhawm uh hi. Paul in a zing ciang vaiding tu ahikom, mite paupui a, zankim dong thuson hi." 
Acts20:8 Ka kikhopna uh inn tung dawl sungah meiinn tam ma kide hi. 
Acts20:9 Eutychus kici tangval khat khelki tungah to a, Paul in tatsat ngawlin thuson ahikom, Eutychus zongh a mut suak vaial a, a khakbel ciangin, mutthip in, inn tung dawl thum panin, lei ah taaksuk hi. Amate in a top ciang, ama thi zo hi." 
Acts20:10 Ahihang Paul tuaksuk a, ama tungah bok in koai a, “Patau heak vun, ama nungta lai hi!” ci hi." 
Acts20:11 Tuaciang ama in inn tungah kaato in, anluum baltham in ne hi. Nisua dong amate taw ngei ma thu a son zawkciang, Paul in paisan hi." 
Acts20:12 Amate in tangvalpa sia a inn ah, a nungta in ciapui a, a thin uh nuam mama hi." 
Acts20:13 Koma in teambaw kungah ka pai masa uh a, teambaw taw Assos ka zuan uh hi. Tua munah, Paul in teambaw tungah hong kaa tu ahi hi. Ama in hi bang tu ma in, hong sonsa hi a, ama in lei lam tawnin tua munah pai hi." 
Acts20:14 Assos ah ka kisik uh ciangin, teambaw tungah ama hong kaato a, Mitylene khua ah ka paisuak uh hi." 
Acts20:15 Tua mun panin teambaw taw ka ding uh a, a zing ciangin, Chios ngal ka theng uh hi. Ni khat zawkciangin, Samos ka theng uh a, a zing ciangin, Miletus ka theng uh hi." 
Acts20:16 Asia ngamkhen sung tengah hun a bo thong ngawl natu in, Paul in Ephesus khua kaantan in, teambaw taw pai tu khensat hi. Hi thei le Pentecost ni lapin, ama Jerusalem khua a theng tu in pai memeang hi." 
Acts20:17 Paul in Miletus panin, Ephesus ah thu zasak a, pawlpi upate ama taw a kimu natu in vaitha hi." 
Acts20:18 Amate hong thet ciangin, Paul in amate tungah, “Asia ngamkhen ah kong thet phit ni pan kipan no taw hun bup bangbangin zangh khi ziam, ci sia na heak uh ahi hi." 
Acts20:19 Jew te ii hong thasawm hu in, haksatna hunte sungah Topa ii naseam bangin kiniamkhiakna theampo le, thitui tam mama taakin na ka seam zo hi." 
Acts20:20 Mipite mai le noma inn uh ah thuhilna le hilciannate kong nei ciangin, note phattuam natu in bangma kheet ka nei ngawl sia na heak uh ahi hi." 
Acts20:21 Jew te le Gentile te tungah a kibangin a mawna tetek pan Pathian sangah kiheak kik a, ih Topa Jesus a up natu in, thupi takin kong phawksak hi." 
Acts20:22 Tu in Thaa Thiangtho thu ka nitna taw Jerusalem ah pai tu khi hi, tua munah bang tat tu khi ziam he ngawl khi hi." 
Acts20:23 Ngimnate le thonginn in, keima hong ngak hi, ci in khuapi sim ma ah Thaa Thiangtho in hong phawksak hi ci sia bek ka he hi." 
Acts20:24 Ahihang keima nuntakna sia bangma man nei ka sa bua hi; keima vaipuak ka khuangkhim natu le Topa Jesus ii nasep hong piak ahi, Pathian ii thuthiamna Lungdamna Thupha ka thansak tu ka man thiang tu bek ka uuk hi." 
Acts20:25 “Pathian Ngam thuhil in, note theampo sungah kong vak zo hi. Tuaciang note sung pan kuama in, kei nong mu kik ngei nawn ngawl tu uh sia tu in ka he hi." 
Acts20:26 Tua ahikom tuni mama in, no tungah a ciliaphuai takin kong taangko hi: a mangthang khat po na om uh le, kei ii ka vaipuak lel hu hi ngawl tu hi." 
Acts20:27 Banghang ziam cile Pathian tupna a buppi in kong sonna ah bangma kheet nei ngawl khi hi. 
Acts20:28 Tua ahikom noma le noma kikeam tavun a, Thaa Thiangtho ii noma khut sung a hong aap tuuhonte zongh en in keam tavun. A Tapa ii chisan tungtawnin, ama atu a piansak Pathian ii pawlpi ii tuucingte na hi tavun." 
Acts20:29 Kong nusiat zawkciangin, a kiitakhuai ngiate, no sungah hong pai tu a, tua tuuhon a khoaikhet ngawl tu sia ka he hi." 
Acts20:30 Noma pawlsung pan ma in, pawlkhat in thu umte sia leilot thu taw amate a zui tu in, a zol tu hun hong theng tu hi." 
Acts20:31 Tua ahiciang encik tavun, kum thum sung sun taw zan taw thitui tam ma taakin note khat sim kong hilcian sia ciamtee tavun." 
Acts20:32 “Tu in no sia Pathian kepna sung le a thuthiamna thu sungah kong aap hi, tuasia in ama mihing theampo hong puuato thei a, Pathian thuphate hong pia thei hi." 
Acts20:33 Khamh ahizong, ngunn ahizong, puansilhte ahizong, kuama ii neisa ka dungawk ngei bua hi." 
Acts20:34 Ka kitholpuite le keima kitaangsapna teng ka sik natu in hi ka khutte taw na ka sep sia noma tatak ma in, na he uh hi." 
Acts20:35 Topa Jesus mama in, ‘Saanna sangin piakna in lungdamna tamzaw hi’, a ci thu phawk kawmin, hi bangin nasia tak na sepna taw na theampo ah, a thazawmte ih hu nanak tu hi, ci in no tungah kong lak zo hi,” ci hi." 
Acts20:36 Paul in a son tu teng a man ciang, amate taw khupdin in, thungen hi." 
Acts20:37 Amate in ama koai a namhin, a vaithak uh ciang, a vekpi ma in kap uh hi." 
Acts20:38 Ama a mu kik nawn ngawl natu, a son hu in, amate a tuanin khuangai uh hi. Tuaciang amate in teambaw kungah ama tha uh hi." 
Acts21:1 Amate ka vaitha uh a, ka nusia uh hi. Teambaw taw a tangtan in, ka pai uh ciang, Cos ka theng uh hi; a zing ciangin Rhodes ka theng uh a, tua mun panin Patara ka zuan suak uh hi." 
Acts21:2 Tua munah Phoenicia ah a pai tu teambaw khat ka mu uh hi, tua ahikom teambaw tungah kaato in, ka zui uh hi." 
Acts21:3 Cyprus a kimu theina mun ka theng uh a, tua zawkciang a thangsang Syria ah ka pai uh hi. Tyre khua ah ka kaa uh a, tua mun sia teambaw vanh sua natu mun ahi hi." 
Acts21:4 Tua munah thu um mi pawlkhat ka mu uh a, amate kungah nipi khat ka taam uh hi. Amate in Paul sia Jerusalem ah a pai ngawl natu in, Thaa vaangletna taw tho uh hi." 
Acts21:5 Ahihang amate taw hun ka zak zawkciangin, vai ka ding uh a, koma pai natu ah ka pai uh hi. Amate in a zite a tate taw khuapi puasia dong hong tha in, vaalbo ah ka vekpi khupdin in thu ka ngen uh hi." 
Acts21:6 Tua zawkciang, khat le khat kivaitha in teambaw tungah ko ka kaa uh a, amate inn ah a cia kik uh hi." 
Acts21:7 Tui tung ka khualhawna uh ka zom uh a, Tyre pan, Ptolemais ah pai in, tua munah thu umte ka nukset uh a, amate kungah ni khat ka taam uh hi." 
Acts21:8 A zing ciangin ka ding uh a, Caesarea ka theng uh hi. Tua khua ah thupha puak syapa Philip ii inn ah ka taam uh hi. Ama sia Jerusalem ah a kiteal husya sali sungah khat ahi hi." 
Acts21:9 Ama in Pathian thu a thangsak, pasal a nei ngawl tanu li nei hi." 
Acts21:10 Tua munah ni tam ma ka taam uh sungin, Judea ngam panin, Agabus a kici kamsaang khat hong theng hi." 
Acts21:10 Tua munah ni tam ma ka taam uh sungin, Judea ngam panin, Agabus a kici kamsaang khat hong theng hi." 
Acts21:11 Ama ko kungah hong pai a, Paul kawngkhau la in, ama le ama a khut a peang kisawm a, “Thaa Thiangtho cina pan: Hi kawngkhau a neipa sia Jerusalem ah hi bang danin Jew te in khaukhii tu a, Gentile te khut sungah aap tu hi,” ci hi." 
Acts21:12 Hi thu ka zaak uh ciangin ko le a dang teng in Paul tungah Jerusalem ah a pai ngawl natu in ka thuum uh hi. 
Acts21:13 Ahihang Paul in, “Bang son nu ziam? Hi bangin kapin ka thin hong tamhsak nu ziam? Jerusalem ah khau kikhii bek dom ngawlin, Topa Jesus hangin, tua munah a thi tu ngawngawn zong kingingta zo khi hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Acts21:14 A thin zaw natu in ka sonpui zo bua uh a, ka ci ka law he ngawlin “Topa deina bang hi tahen,” ka ci uh hi." 
Acts21:15 Tawmvei tua munah hun ka zak zawk uh ciangin, vanh teng kithoai in, Jerusalem ka zuan uh hi." 
Acts21:16 Caesarea pan nungzuite pawlkhat zongh in hong tonpui a, ka taam natu uh Cyprus ngammi thu um ciil khat ahi Mnason inn ah hong then hi." 
Acts21:17 Jerusalem ka thet uh ciangin, thu umte in, nuam takin vai hong muak uh hi." 
Acts21:18 A zing ciangin, Paul taw James kungah ka haw uh hi; tua munah pawlpi upa theampo om uh hi." 
Acts21:18 A zing ciangin, Paul taw James kungah ka haw uh hi; tua munah pawlpi upa theampo om uh hi." 
Acts21:19 Paul in amate a nukset zawkciang, ama nasepnate tungtawnin, Pathian ii Gentile te sungah a sep a vawt theampo cing takin ko hi." 
Acts21:20 Ama thuson a zaak zawk uh ciangin, amate theampo in, Pathian pok uh hi. Tua zawkciangin, amate in Paul tungah, “Suapui Paul awng, Jew te mihing tul tam mama thu um hong suak zo uh a, amate theampo Thukham nasia takin, a zuite ahi sia na mu thei hi." 
Acts21:21 Amate tungah nang ii thu a kisonna panin, Gentile ngamsung teng ah a teang Jew theampo ma in, Moses Thukham a nusiat natu, nangma in hilcian a, a tate ii vunteap a at ngawl natu le, Jew ngeinate a zui ngawl natu in sawl hi, ci thu ahi hi." 
Acts21:22 Amate in nang nong thet hunlam za nanak tu hi. Tua ahiciang bang law tu hi ziam? 
Acts21:23 Hi bangin na ngamtat tu in, kong dei uh hi. Kiciamna a vawt sa pasal li hi sungah om hi." 
Acts21:24 Amate taw va paikhawm ta'n a, amate ii kithiansuana poai sungah kihel in, sum bona teng zongh piaksak ta'n; tuasia ciangin, amate in a lu uh meettol thei tu hi. Hi bangin hi leang nang thu huvau hong kisonna sia thumaan a hi ngawl hunlam le, nangma mama sia Moses Thukham bang a, a nungta pa na hina thu a kuama po in hong he tu hi." 
Acts21:25 Gentile te sung pan thu um a suakte ahile, lai khat thaak zo khu hi, milim biakna in a kizangh an lamsangte neak ngawl natu, chisan ahibuale nganhing a kitawlmeakte ii sa a neak ngawl natu, tuaciang numei le pa paktatna pan a kikep natu in, thu ka khensat uh te, ka son uh hi,” ci hi." 
Acts21:26 Tua ahikom Paul in, tua pasalte paipui a, a zing ciangin amate taw a kithiansua hi. Tua zawkciang, ama sia Biakinnpi sungah tum a, kithiansuana hun a man tu dong le amate khat sim atu in sangaw biakpiakna a piak thei tu hun sia zongh ni bangza hi tu ziam ci sia zasak hi." 
Acts21:27 Ahihang, a ni sali hun a bo dektak laitakin, Asia ngamkhen pan hong pai Jew te pawlkhat in, Paul sia Biakinnpi sungah mu uh hi. Amate in mihon bup hol in, Paul pummat uh hi." 
Acts21:28 “Israel pasalte awng! Hong hu tavun! Hisia pa sia mun theampo ah pai in, Israel te, Moses Thukham le hi Biakinnpi langpan in, hilcianna a neipa hi. Tu zonghin, ama in Gentile te pawlkhat Biakinnpi sungah paipui in, hi a thiangtho mun sia ninsak hi!” ci in au uh hi." 
Acts21:29 (Hi bangin a ci theina sia Ephesus khua mi Trophimus sia Paul taw khuapi sungah kithawl khawm in mu uh a, Paul in, tua pa sia Biakinnpi sungah tumpui hi tu in muangmaw uh hi.)" 
Acts21:30 Telmeal om ngawlin khuapi bup thu kizel a, mihingte tai lialua in, Paul man uh a, Biakinnpi pan kaikeak uh hi. Thakhat thu in Biakinnpi kongkhate kikhak hi." 
Acts21:31 A ngilo nuam mihonpi in Paul thalup a sawm uh laitakin, Rome ngalkap hon ukpa tungah Jerusalem khua bup buai hi, ci in kiko hi." 
Acts21:32 Thakhat thu in tua ngalkap hon ukpa in ngalkap bu pawlkhat le ngalkap te samin mihonpite del uh hi. Mite in ngalkap bupa le a ngalkapte a mu ciangin, Paul sia a vel nawn bua uh hi." 
Acts21:33 ngalkap hon ukpa in Paul kungah pai a, ama manin thikkhau nii taw khit tu in thupia hi. “Hi sia pa akua ziam? Ama in bang ngamtatna nei ziam,” ci in dongh hi." 
Acts21:34 Mihon sung pan pawlkhat in thu khat son a, a dangte in thudang taw au uh a, telmeal om ngawl ahikom, ngalkap hon ukpa in, bang thu tatak piang cisia a tel zo bua hi, tua ahikom ngalkapte teenna kulh huang sungah Paul paipui tu in, a mite sawl hi." 
Acts21:35 Keallei dong paipui uh a, tua zawkciangin ngalkapte in, a puak kul hi, banghang ziam cile a ngilo nuam mihonpite thinso ngawp uh hi." 
Acts21:36 Amate theampo in, ama nung pan hong pai uh a, “That vun!” ci in aukeak uh hi." 
Acts21:37 Ngalkapte in kulh huang sungah Paul a tumpui dektak laitakin, ngalkap hon ukpa tungah, “Thu tawm kong son thei tu ziam?” ci hi. “Greek kampau hi ngawl ni ziam?” ci in ngalkap hon ukpa in dongh hi." 
Acts21:38 “Tua ahile nang sia khatvei lai a, ngalphuang in sennealngam sungah ngalhiam toai mi ngilo tul li a lampui Egypt pa sia na hi bua na ziam?,” ci hi." 
Acts21:39 Paul in, “Keima in Jew mi ka hi a, Cilicia ngam Tarsus khua ah suakin, khuapi thupi khat ii ngammi ka hi hi. Hi mihingte tungah nong hesuakna in, thu hong sonsak ta'n,” ci hi." 
Acts21:40 Ngalkap hon ukpa in a khuan pia ahikom Paul in keallei tungah ding a, mihonte a thim natu in, a khut vik hi. Amate a thim uh ciangin, Paul in amate tungah Hebrew kam taw thuson hi:" 
Acts22:1 “Ka mipui Jew te awng, note mai ah keima le keima ka kihuukna kammalte hong ngai tavun!”" 
Acts22:2 Hebrew kam in a pau a zaak uh ciang, amate thim seseam uh hi; tuaciang Paul in zom to lai a:" 
Acts22:3 “Kei sia Jew mi khat hi in, Cilicia ngam Tarsus khua ah ka suak a, ahihang hi sung Jerusalem ah, Gamaliel ii sangpatang khat in a khangto ka hi hi. Ih taanghpupite ii nasia takin Thukham kihil nate, ka sin zo hi, tuaciang tuni in hi sungah a om no theampo taw ma kibangin, kei zongh Pathian atu a ki aap mama pa ka hi hi." 
Acts22:4 Hi Lampi a zuite sia a thi dongin, a vawtsiapa ka hi hi. Pate le numeite manin, thong sung denna in, a neipa ka hi hi." 
Acts22:5 Thiampi Lianbelpa le Council buppi in, ka son teng sia, thumaan hi ci in hong lak thei tu hi. Amate kung panin, Damascus a om, ih mipui Jew te a laithakte zongh keima in ka nga hi. Tua ahikom, tua munah a om hi mite man tu in ka pai a, tuaciang amate thikkol bul sa in, Jerusalem ah daan piak tu in ka ciapui kik hi." 
Acts22:6 “Tuabangin khualhaw a, Damascus khua ka thet dektak sunkim laitak hun khawngin, thakhat thu in van pan, a taang mama khuavak khat in ka kiimkot hong taankeak hi." 
Acts22:7 Lei ah ka puk a, ‘Saul, Saul awng! Banghangin kei hong vawtsia ni ziam?’ hong ci aw khat ka za hi." 
Acts22:8 ‘Akua ni ziam Topa?’ ci in ka dongh hi. ‘Keima in nong vawtsiat Nazareth khua mi Jesus ka hi hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts22:9 Kei taw a omkhawm mite in, khuavak taang sia mu ahihang, kei hong paupuipa aw a za bua uh hi."
