Acts22:10 ‘Bang vawt tu khi ziam, Topa’ ci in ka dok ciangin, Topa in kei tungah, ‘Tho in a, Damascus khua sungah va pai ta'n, tua munah Pathian ii nangma sep tu hong seesak theampo hong kison tu hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts22:11 khuavak taang mama sia hu in, ka mit hong taw a, tua ahikom ka kitholpuite in, Damascus khua sung dong ka khut panin, hong len a hong paipui hi." 
Acts22:12 “Tua khuapi sungah Ananias minnei pasal khat om a, ama sia biakna mi Thukham a zui tua munah a teang Jew te theampo ii a zatak pa ahi hi." 
Acts22:13 Ama hong pai a ka kungah dingin, ‘Suapui Saul awng, khuamu kik in!’ hong ci hi. Tua hun lian laitakin, khua ka mu thei kik a, ama ka en hi." 
Acts22:14 Ama in, ‘Ih taanghpupite ii Pathian in, ama deina a tel tu, a thutang a Naseampa a mu tu le ama aw taw a pau a za tu in nang hong teal zo hi." 
Acts22:15 Banghang ziam cile na mu le na zaak teng mihing theampo tungah a son tu in nang sia ama ii tetti khat na hi tu hi. 
Acts22:16 Tu in banghang ngangak lai ni ziam? Tho in a, tui kiphumin, ama tung thungetna taw, na mawnate, kisilthiangsak in,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts22:17 “Jerusalem khua ah ka cia kik a, Biakinn sungah thungen in ka om laitakin, mukholna khat ka nei a," 
Acts22:18 tua ii sungah Topa ka mu a, ama in, ‘Manlang takin Jerusalem nusia zok in, banghang ziam cile hi sungah a om mihingte in, kei huvau tetti na pan nate hong saang ngawl tu hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts22:19 ‘Topa awng, synagogue te ah ka pai a, nang hong umte manin ka vel bul sia, amate in pha takin hong he nginge hi." 
Acts22:20 Tuaciang, na tettipa Stephen a kithalup lai in keima mama zongh tua munah ka om a, a thalup tu thukim in, a thatte ii puantualte zongh kepsak lai khi hi,’ ci in ka zo hi." 
Acts22:21 Kei tungah Topa in ‘Va pai ta'n,’ ‘banghang ziam cile a khualana Gentile te kungah kong puak tu hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts22:22 Paul ii hi bang teng a son ciang dong, amate in ngai uh hi; ahihang tua zawkciangin, amate in a aw nei za taw au a, “Ama heam vun! Thatlum vun! A nungta tu in kilawm ngawl hi!” ci uh hi." 
Acts22:23 Amate in ciik au uh a, a puansilh uh vik in, vui sungah leivui lawn uh hi." 
Acts22:24 Rome ngalkap hon ukpa in Paul sia kulh huang sungah paipuisak in, banghangin Jew te in hi bangin, ciik au in oksan ziam ci sia a kiheak thei natu ama vel in thu dongh tavun, ci in a mite thupia hi." 
Acts22:25 Ahihang vel tu in a sawmcip uh ciang, a kung a ding ngalkap bupa munah Paul in, “Rome ngammi khat sia khialna lian khat pawpo atu thu kisit pepeu ngawl lai in, vel tu sia, no atu upadi taw kisi na ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Acts22:26 Ngalkap bupa in tua thu a zaak ciang, ngalkap hon ukpa kungah pai in “Bang law tu ni ziam? Tuasia pa sia Rome ngammi khat hi!” ci hi." 
Acts22:27 Tua ahikom ngalkap hon ukpa Paul kungah pai in, “Hong son ta'n, Rome ngammi khat na hi ziam,” ci in dongh hi. “Hi khi hi,” ci in Paul in zo hi." 
Acts22:28 Ngalkap hon ukpa in, “Sum tam mama ka piak ciangin kei zongh ngammi khat ka suak thei pheang hi,” ci hi. Paul in “Ahihang kei ka hile ka pian panin Rome ngammi khat khi hi,” ci in zo hi." 
Acts22:29 Thakhat thu in, Paul thu a dongh tute ama kung pan heak kik uh hi; Paul sia Rome ngammi khat hi ci in a heak ciang, thikkol a bulsak huvau ngalkap hon ukpa patau hi." 
Acts22:30 Ngalkap hon ukpa in, Jew te in Paul sia bang teng tatak taw mawsiat ziam, ci in he nuam hi; tua ahikom a zing ciangin, a thikkol suusak a, tuaciang thiampi liante le Council bup kikhop natu in, thupia hi. Tuaciang, ama in Paul paipui a, amate mai ah dingsak hi." 
Acts23:1 Paul in Council te tangtan in en a, “Ka Israel mipuite awng! Pathian mai ah ka nuntakzia sia tuni mama dong ka thin thiangtho a, kithasunna nei ngawl khi hi,” ci hi." 
Acts23:2 Thiampi Lianbel Ananias in, Paul nai ah a dingte munah, a muk beksak vun, ci in sawl hi." 
Acts23:3 Paul in, “Pathian in note hong vel tatak tu hi — no leikaang taw a kizut innpangte awng! Thukham taw kizui in, kei thu hong khen tu in, tuak ah na to uh a, ahihang kei vel tu a, na kisawl uh ciangin, Thukham paltan na hi uh hi!” ci hi." 
Acts23:4 “Pathian Thiampi Lianbelpa selno ni hi!” ci in Paul kungah a om pasalte in ci uh hi. 
Acts23:5 Paul in “Ka Israel mipuite awng, ama Thiampi Lianbel ahi hunlam ka he bua hi. Laithiangtho in, ‘Note ii na mite a ukpa sia sonsia thei ngawl tu nu hi,’ ci hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Acts23:6 Tuate sungah pawlkhat Sadducee te hi a, a dangte sia Phariseete hi ci in, Paul in a mu ciangin, Council te tungah, “Ka Israel mipuite awng! Kei in Pharisee te suan Pharisee khat ka hi hi. Hi sungah thusit ka thuak theina ii ahang sia mithi sa te tho kik tu hi, ci in lametna ka nei hang ahi hi!” ci hi." 
Acts23:7 Hi thu a son po ciangin, Phariseete le Sadducee te kihau tu in, hong kipan paih a, tuaciang, Council upate sia hong kikhen hi." 
Acts23:8 (Banghang ziam cile Sadducee te in thina panin mihingte tho kik ngawl tu hi, tuaciang, vantunglalang ahizong, thaa ahizong om ngawl hi, ci uh hi; ahihang Phariseete in, hi thu nam thum teng sia um siat hi.)" 
Acts23:9 Auna aw nging vaial a, Pharisee pawl mi Thukham hil sya pawlkhat hong ding a, nasia takin nalh uh hi: “Hisia pa tungah bangma khialna mu zo ngawl khu hi! Vantunglalang khat ziam, thaa khat ziam in, ama paupui takpi hi thei tu hi!” ci uh hi." 
Acts23:10 Kam kinialna uh a aw hong ngam vaial a, ngalkap hon ukpa in, Paul pumpi mama a kilaaithap tu lau hi. Tua ahikom tu a mipawlte sungah ngalkapte paisak a, amate kung pan Paul la keak in, ngalkap huang sungsang ah paipui uh hi." 
Acts23:11 A zan ciangin, Topa in Paul kungah ding a, “Lau heak in! Hi sung Jerusalem ah kei atu tetti pang zo ni hi, Rome khua sung zongh ah tuabang ma in, seam nanak lai tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
Acts23:12 A zingsang ciangin Jew te pawlkhat kisitua in, ngealna khat nei uh hi. Amate in Paul a thalup mateng in an le tui ne ngawl tu hi, ci in kiciamna vawt uh hi." 
Acts23:13 Hi bangin a ngeal khawmte mihing sawmli vaal pha uh hi. 
Acts23:14 Tuaciang amate in thiampi liante le upate kungah pai a, “Paul ka thalup uh mateng bangma ne ngawl tu, ci in thupi takin, ka kiciam uh hi." 
Acts23:15 Tuaciang, tu in, noma le Council te in, Paul ii thu a maanzaw a kan nuam bangin, nong kiheang tu uh a, Rome ngalkap hon ukpa munah Paul hong paipui suk natu in na son tu uh hi. Ahihang hisung hong thet suk ma in, ama thatlum tu in ka kingingkhol tu uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
Acts23:16 Ahihang Paul suapuinu ii tapa in, hi kisuam nopna thu za hi; tua ahikom kulh huang sungah pai in a thu bang teng Paul munah son hi." 
Acts23:17 Tuaciang Paul in ngalkap bute khat sam a, “Ngalkap hon ukpa kungah hi tangvalpa paipui ta'n; ngalkap hon ukpa munah son tu thu khat ama in nei hi,” ci hi." 
Acts23:18 Ngalkap bupa in paipui in, ngalkap hon ukpa kung then a, “Thongtaak Paul in hi tangvalpa nang kungah paipui tu in hong sawl hi. Banghang ziam cile ama in nang tungah son tu thu khat nei hi,” ci hi." 
Acts23:19 Ngalkap hon ukpa in a khut panin len a, ama mama in paipui in, “Kei tung nong son tu, bang thu nei ni ziam?” ci in dongh hi." 
Acts23:20 Ama in, “Jew upa thuneite in, thukimna khat nei a, Paul ii thu a maan zaw kan nuam bangin, kivawt theam in, Council te kungah Paul na paipuisuk natu in, zing ciang hong ngen tu hi." 
Acts23:21 Ahihang amate thu na um heak in, banghang ziam cile mihing sawmli vaal in, ama pangin ngak tu uh hi. Ama a thalup mateng, anne ngawl tuidawn ngawlin, om tu in kiciamna vawt zo hi. Tu in amate in tuabang vawt tu in, kingingta zo a, nangma thukhensatna hong ngak lai hi,” ci hi." 
Acts23:22 Ngalkap hon ukpa in, “Hi thu teng nong ko hunlam kuama tungah son heak in,” ci in tangvalpa ciasak hi." 
Acts23:23 Tua zawkciangin, ngalkap hon ukpa in, ngalkapbu nii sam a, “Tu nitak nai kua in ngalkapte zanii Caesarea ah pai tu in, kithoaisak vun a, tuate taw a kop tu in, siphu ngalkap sawmsali le tei toai zanii taw a ding tu in kithoaisak vun," 
Acts23:24 Paul to natu siphu pawlkhat zongh, vaihawmsak tavun a, ngamuk mangpa Felix kungah a pha takin then tavun,” ci hi." 
Acts23:25 Tua zawkciangin, ngalkap hon ukpa in, hi bangin lai khat at hi." 
Acts23:26 “Claudius Lysias in a zatak huai ngamuk mangpa Felix kong paupui hi. 
Acts23:27 Jew te in hisia pa man a, thatlum tu in kithoai hi. Ama sia Rome ngammi khat hi ci in ka heak hu in, ka ngalkapte taw pai in ka suatak uh hi." 
Acts23:28 Amate in bang teng mawsak nuam ziam ci in ka heak nopna taw amate ii Council ah ka paipui suk hi. 
Acts23:29 Kei muna pan ama in thi natu ahizong, thongtaak natu ahizong, a thuak natu za dongin ngamtat khialna bangma nei ngawl hi; a maw zonna uh sia amate thukham taw bek kisai ahi hi." 
Acts23:30 Tuaciang Jew te pawlkhat in a thasawmna uh ka zaak ciangin, nangma kungah puak tu in thakhat thu in ka khensat hi. Ama a mawsakte munah, ama sia nangma mai ah thu vawt tavun ka ci hi,” ci hi." 
Acts23:31 Ngalkapte in thupiaknate seam suak uh hi. Amate in, Paul la a, tua nitakin, Antipatris dong paipui uh hi." 
Acts23:32 A zing ciangin peang a pai ngalkapte sia kulh huang ah heak kikin, siphu ngalkapte taw paisuak tu in aap uh hi." 
Acts23:33 Amate in Caesarea ah paipui uh a, ngamuk mangpa lai pia in, Paul sia ama tungah aap uh hi." 
Acts23:34 Ngamuk mangpa in, laithak sim a, Paul munah bang ngamkhen sung pan ni ziam ci in dongh hi. Cilicia ngam pan ahi hunlam a tel ciangin," 
Acts23:35 ama in “Thu hong sua nuamte hong thet ciangin, na thu kong sit tu hi,” ci hi. Tua zawkciangin ama in, Paul sia ngamuk mangpa phualpi ah a cingte taw a kikoi natu thupia hi." 
Acts24:1 Ni nga zawkciangin, Thiampi Lianbel Ananias in Caesarea ah upa pawlkhat le sitni Tertullus taw pai hi. Amate in Felix mai ah pai in, Paul a mawsakna thute son uh hi." 
Acts24:2 Tuasia ciang, Paul samin, Tertullus in Paul a mawsakna thu hi bangin son hi: “A zatakhuai pa awng! na ciimna taw nong lampui hu in, khuangei mama sung kilemna om a, ih ngam phattuam natu, a kul kipuuaphatna tam ma kivawt saan hi." 
Acts24:3 Mun theampo ah a tawntungin, hi thu kiza nuam a, nangma tungah kilungdam mama hi." 
Acts24:4 Ahizong na hun tam lei hong laaksak nuam ngawl khi hi, tua ahitazong, koma thu tawm kong son tu sia, nong ngai natu hesuak kong ngen hi." 
Acts24:5 Hisia pa sia a kiitakhuai mihing nawngkai khat in ka mu uh hi; ama in leitung mun theampo ah a om Jew te sungah, buaina phuang pa hi a, Nazarenes pawl ii lampuipa ahi hi." 
Acts24:6 Ama in Biakinnpi ninsak tu in zongh hanciam ahi hu in ka man uh hi. Koma thukham taw kizui in, ama tungah thukhen tu ci in ka ngeal uh hang," 
Acts24:7 ngalkap hon ukpa Lysias hong pai a, zawthawk thu taw ko khut sung pan hong sut hi. Tuaciang ama a mawsak nuamte in nangma mai ah hong pai natu in, Lysias in thupia hi." 
Acts24:8 Hisia pa thu dongh lete, nangma ma in, ama ka mawsakna uhte tel siat tu ni hi,” ci hi." 
Acts24:9 Jew te in hi mawna a kisotna sungah, hong pawm hon uh a, hi thu theampo maan hi, a ci uh hi." 
Acts24:10 Ngamuk mangpa in, Paul ii pau natu in, a khut taw sawl hi. Paul in, “Hi minam tungah kum tam mama thukhenin na om kong he a, tua ahikom nangma mai ah keima le keima ka kihuk tu sia ka lungdam hi." 
Acts24:11 Nangma hantang in thu kan theipa na hi bangma, tu nung ni sawm le ni nii sangin a tamzaw ngawl hun lai, biakpiakna vawt tu in Jerusalem ah ka pai hi." 
Acts24:12 Biakinnpi sungah khat po taw kam kinialna ahizong, synagogue le khuapi sung mundang ah, mite hol in ngamlumsak natu hanthotna ahizong, ngamta ka hi hunlam Jew te in hong mu ngeingawl hi." 
Acts24:13 Tu in hong mawsiat nate zongh maan hi ci in, hong lak thei ngawl tu hi." 
Acts24:14 Na mai ah ahi bang ka pualaak nop thu panin, amate ii maan ngawl hi a ci tua Lampi zui in ka taanghpupite ii Pathian ka bia hi. Ahihang Moses Thukham le kamsaangte thubute sung a ki at theampo sia kei zongh in ka um hi." 
Acts24:15 Hi lai ah a om mihingte bangma in Pathian sungah lametna kibang khat ka nei thu sia, a pha taw a sia taw mihing theampo in thina pan tho kik tu ci thu ahi hi." 
Acts24:16 Tua ahikom, Pathian mai le mihingte mai ah, kithasunna om ngawl thinsung thiangtho ka nei natu in, ka hanciam thei za in ka seam tawntung hi." 
Acts24:17 “Kum tam mama sung Jerusalem ka nusiat zawkciang, ka mite kungah sum pawlkhat kengin, sangaw biakpiakna vawt tu in, tua munah ka pai hi." 
Acts24:18 Biakinnpi sungah kithiansuana a zeksa nate, ka man zawkciang, tua biakpiakna ka vawt laitakin, amate in hong mu hi. Tua munah keima taw mihon om ngawl a, buaina bangma om ngawl hi." 
Acts24:19 Ahihang Asia ngamkhen panin, Jew te pawlkhat om hi; tua mite in kei langpan natu nei ahile, amate mama hi sung na mai ah hong pai kul tu hi." 
Acts24:20 Tua ahibuale zong, Council mai ah ka din lai in, bangbang khialna lian ka vawt hong mu ziam ci in hi sungah a om mite in sonsak in —" 
Acts24:21 amate mai ah ka din lai in: ‘Mithite in tho kik tu hi, ci thu ka up hangin, tuni in nong thusit uh ka thuak hi,’ ci in ka son tu simngawl ka son tu dang om ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
Acts24:22 Tuaciang Felix in, Lampi ii thu a heak siat sa ahiciang, thusitna tawlngasak hi. Ama in “Ngalkap hon ukpa Lysias hong thet ciangin, na thu uh kong khensak tu hi,” ci hi." 
Acts24:23 Ama in Paul a keam ngalkap bupa munah, Paul sia a kepcing natu thupia ahihang, ama suatakna pawlkhat le a kitaangsapte a lawmte in a piak thei natu thupia hi." 
Acts24:24 Ni tawmvei zawkciangin, Felix le Jew mi ahi a zi Drusilla hong pai uh hi. Ama in Paul samsak a, Jesus Christ ih upna huvau a thusonna ngai hi." 
Acts24:25 Ahihang Paul in ngamtat phatna, pumpi kitekna le, Thukhen Ni hong thet natu thute kikuppui top a, Felix sia lau hi. “Tu in na pai phot ta'n, hunpha ka nga ciangin, kong sam kik tu hi,” ci hi." 
Acts24:26 Tua laitak ma in, Paul in ama sumnguk pia tu in muangmaw hi; tua hu in ama samsak nithi in thu son pui hi." 
Acts24:27 Kum nii a kan zawkciangin, Porcius Festus in ngamuk mangpa Felix ii za laih hi. Felix in Jew te tung pan, maipha nga nuam ahikom, Paul sia thong sungah nusia hi." 
Acts25:1 Ngamkhen sungah hong thet zawk ni thum ni ciangin, Festus in Caesarea panin Jerusalem zuan a," 
Acts25:2 tua munah thiampi liante taw kikopin, Jew lampuite in, Paul langpanin thu vawt uh hi. Amate in Festus munah," 
Acts25:3 Paul sia Jerusalem ah a paisak natu ngen uh hi, banghang ziam cile amate in, lampi ah suamlup sawm uh hi." 
Acts25:4 Festus in, “Paul sia Caesarea ah thongtaak in kikoi hi. Keima mama zongh hai ngawlin tua munah heak kik tu khi hi." 
Acts25:5 Na lampuite sia Caesarea ah keima taw paikhawm in, Paul in khialna khat po vawt ahile, ama tungah maw kisuanh tahen,” ci hi." 
Acts25:6 Festus in amate kungah ni liat pan ni sawm dong bang a taam zawkciangin, Caesarea ah pai hi. A zing ciangin thukhenna zum ah to in Paul a sungtan pui natu in thupia hi." 
Acts25:7 Paul a thet ciangin Jerusalem pan hong pai Jew te in, a kiimkot ah dingin, a nasia mawsakna tam mama nei ahihang amate in, a maan takin a lak thei bua uh hi." 
Acts25:8 Ahihang Paul in ama le ama kihung a, “Jew te Thukham langpanna ahizong, tua ahibuale Biakinnpi langpanna ahizong, Rome Kumpilianpa langpanna ahizong, bangma sep khial nei ngawl khi hi,” ci hi." 
Acts25:9 Festus in Jew te ii maipha nga nuam ahikom, Paul munah “Jerusalem ah pai in, hi maw kisotnate huvau sia, tualai keima mai ah thusitna na thuak nuam ziam,” ci in dongh hi." 
Acts25:10 Paul in, “Kumpilianpa ii thukhenna zummai ah thusit thuak tu in ka ding hi. Nangma mama ii na heak bangin, Jew te tungah bangma sep khial nei ngawl khi hi." 
Acts25:11 Thi daan taw kiphu in, thukham paltanna le sepna khat po nei hi leng suatak natu kong ngen bua hi. Ahihang amate ii kei tungah, maw hong sot nopnate sungah thumaan om ngawl ahile, amate khut sungah kuama in kei hong aap thei ngawl tu hi. Kumpilianpa tungah a zukhaan khi hi,” ci hi." 
Acts25:12 Tuasia ciangin Festus in, ama ngaisutna a pia upate taw a kikup zawkciangin, “Kumpilianpa tungah a zukhaan zo na hikom Kumpilianpa kungah pai tu ni hi,” ci in zo kik hi." 
Acts25:13 Hun tawmvei zawkciangin, Kumpipa Agrippa le Bernice sia Festus taw kimu nuam in Caesarea ah haw uh hi." 
Acts25:14 Tua munah ni tam ma a om zawkciang, Festus in Paul omzia sia kumpipa tungah sonthiang hi. “Hi sungah Felix ii a nusiat thongtaak pasal khat om hi," 
Acts25:15 tuaciang, Jerusalem ah ka pai ciangin, Jew te ii thiampi liante le upate in, ama tungah thu vawtin, mawsak natu hong ngen uh hi." 
Acts25:16 Ahihang ko Rome mite in khialna lian khat taw a kimawsiat mihing khat pawpo sia ama tungah maw a suanhte taw maitang kisi in, ama tungah a kisuanh mawnate panin, ama le ama a kihuk natu hun a nga mateng, kuama khut sungah aap thei ngawl ka hi uh hunlam ka son hi." 
Acts25:17 Amate hi sungah hong pai ciangin, hun bosak thong ngawlin, a zing ciang mama in, thukhenna zum ah ka to a, a mihing pa sia hong paipui natu in ka sawl hi." 
Acts25:18 Ama a langpante hong ding a, ahihang ka muanmawk bangin, a sia khialna liante taw a mawsiat bua uh hi." 
Acts25:19 Amate vai theampo sia a biakna le Jesus min nei mihing thisa khat ii thu huvau a kinial uh teng ahi hi; Paul in tua pa sia nungta hi, ci hi." 
Acts25:20 Hi thute tungtaang ah thu a cingin ka nga thei natu lam sia, ka khensat thei paih bua hi, tua ahikom Paul munah hi mawsiatnate huvau in Jerusalem ah, thu na kisit nuam ziam, ci in ka dongh hi." 
Acts25:21 Ahihang Paul in a zukhaan hi; ama a kicin lai natu le, Kumpilianpa ii thu a khen natu, ngen hi. Tua ahikom Kumpilianpa kungah ka puak thei dong, ama a kicin lai natu in, thu ka pia hi,” ci hi." 
Acts25:22 Agrippa in Festus munah, “Kei mama in hisia pa ii thuson za nuam khi hi,” ci hi. “Zing ciangin ama ii thuson za tu ni hi,” ci in Festus in zo hi." 
Acts25:23 A zing ciangin Agrippa le Bernice sia, mipi kikhopna inndoi sungah ngalkap ukpite le khuapi lampui upate taw, nasia tak kithoai in hong pai a, kiletsakna taw hong tum uh hi. Festus in thupia a, Paul tumpui hi." 
Acts25:24 Festus in, “Kumpipa Agrippa le hi sungah ko taw a omkhawmte theampo awng: hi sung le Jerusalem a om Jew te theampo ii kei tungah hong khiakpa sia hisia pa hi a, mu tek nu hi. Amate in ciik au uh a, nungta nawn mama heak hen, ci uh hi." 
Acts25:25 Ahihang thidaan taw a kiphu tu ngamtatna nei hi, ci in ka mu zo bua hi. Tuaciang, ama mama in Rome Kumpilianpa tungah a zukhaan ahiciang puak tu in ka khensat zo hi." 
Acts25:26 Ahihang Kumpilianpa tungah ama thu huvau a kician lai at tu bangma ka nei bua hi. Tua ahikom noma mai hi sungah kong paipui hi — a tuanin Kumpipa Agrippa mai ah kong paipui hi! tua hile a thu a kikat zawkciangin, thu pawlkhat ka at tu om thei tu hi." 
Acts25:27 Banghang ziam cile, ama mawna hi bang teng hi ci in, a kician om ngawl pipi in, thongtaak pa khat ka puak tu sia, suak thei ka sa bua hi,” ci hi." 
Acts26:1 Agrippa in Paul munah, “Nangma thu sia nangma mama ii son thei natu thu kong pia hi,” ci hi. Paul in a khut laam in, ama le ama sia hi bangin kihung hi." 
Acts26:2 “Kumpipa Agrippa awng! Jew te ii maw hong zonna theampo pan, tuni in na mai ah keima le keima ka kihun thei tu le," 
Acts26:3 a tuanin Jew te ngeinate le a thu kinial theina theampo pha takpi in tel na hikom hampha ka kisa hi. Tuaciang thinsau takin nong ngai natu in kong thuum hi. 
Acts26:4 “Jew te theampo in ka no tuung a kipan, ka nuntakzia hong he hi. A masa in keima pianna ngam le tua zawkciang Jerusalem khua ah ka nuntakzia theampo hong he uh hi." 
Acts26:5 Amate in tetti hong pansak nuam thong le, a ciil panin, biakna sungah a phinciingbel Pharisee pawlmi khat ka hi sia, hong heak tawntung sa hi." 
Acts26:6 Tuaciang tu in hi sungah thusit ka thuakna ii ahang sia Pathian ii taanghpupite tungah kamciam a piakte ka lamet hu ahi hi — 
Acts26:7 koma minam sawm le niite ii a sun a zanin Pathian ka biak uh ciang tua kamciam bangin nga tu sia ko ii lamet thu ahi hi. Vaangnei Kumpi awng, hi lametna hangin, Jew te in kei sia hong mawsak hi!" 
Acts26:8 Banghangin no hi sungah a omte in, a thisate sia Pathian in thosak kik tu in um thei ngawl nu ziam?" 
Acts26:9 Keima mama in Nazareth mi Jesus thu langpanin ka sep thei za in seam tong a ci pa ka hi hi. 
Acts26:10 Tuabang sia Jerusalem ah ka ngamtatna ahi hi. Thiampi liante tung panin, thu ka nga a, Pathian ii mihingte tam ma thong sungah ka khum hi; tuaciangin, amate sia thidaan a kipiak ciangin, kei zongh in ka thukimpui hi." 
Acts26:11 Tamvei ma, synagogue te ah daan ka piasak a, a upna uh a kheal thei natu in, ka hanciam hi. Amate tungah ka thin uuk mama ahikom, ngamdang a khuapite ngawngawn ah, ka pai a ka vawtsia hi." 
Acts26:12 “Hi bang tupna le sawmna seam tu in, Damascus khua ah ka pai a, thiampi liante ii thuneina le thupiaknate ka keng hi." 
Acts26:13 Kumpipa awng, lampi tungah sun laitakin ni sangin, a taang zaw khuavak taang khat in kei le ka khualhawpuite, kiim ah van panin hong taangsuk keak hi." 
Acts26:14 Ka vekpi in lei ah ka puk uh hi. Tuaciang aw khat ka za a, kei tungah Hebrew kam in, ‘Saul, Saul awng! Banghangin hong vawtsia ni ziam? Khuital khat in a neipa ii toai ngan hawlna ciang sia a peak kik bangin, nangma le nangma kikha kik in kiliamsua ni hi,’ hong ci hi." 
Acts26:15 ‘Akua ni ziam? Topa’ ci in ka dongh hi. Tuaciang Topa in, ‘Kei sia nong vawtsiat Jesus khi hi." 
Acts26:16 Ahihang tho in a ding in, nang tungah kong kilakna sia ka naseam tu a, kong koi nop hang ahi hi. Tuni a keima nong mu teng le maisang a kong lak pheang tu teng midangte munah son tu ni hi." 
Acts26:17 Keima in Israel te khut sung pan le nangma kong puak natu Gentile te khut sung panin kong suatak tu hi. 
Acts26:18 Nang in amate mit na honsak tu a, amate sia khuazingna sung panin, khuavakna ah, Satan vaangletna panin, Pathian kungah na kiheaksak tu hi. Tua hile amate in keima hong upna tungtawnin, a mawnate uh kimaisak tu a, Pathian tealsa mite sungah amate in omna nga tu uh hi.’" 
Acts26:19 “Tua ahikom, Kumpipa Agrippa awng, vantung pan ka nga mukholna sia ni ngawlin ka om bua hi." 
Acts26:20 A masa phitbel in Damascus le Jerusalem ah, tua zawkciangin, Judea ngam bup le Gentile te sungah, amate in a mawnate kisiik nanak a, Pathian sangah kiheak in, a kisii kikna thu a lak tu nasepte a sep natu in, thu ka hil hi." 
Acts26:20 A masa phitbel in Damascus le Jerusalem ah, tua zawkciangin, Judea ngam bup le Gentile te sungah, amate in a mawnate kisiik nanak a, Pathian sangah kiheak in, a kisii kikna thu a lak tu nasepte a sep natu in, thu ka hil hi." 
Acts26:21 Hi thu hangin, Jew te in Biakinnpi sungah ka om laitakin hong man a, thatlum tu in, hanciam uh hi." 
Acts26:22 Ahihang tuni mama dong Pathian in hong hu top zo ahikom, hi sungah dingin a lian a no mi theampo tungah a kibangin, tetti ka pang hi. Tuabang ka son sia in kamsaangte le Moses ii hong tung tu hi ci in a sonkhol teng ma ahi hi:" 
Acts26:23 Jew te le Gentile te tungah ngupna khuavak thu thangsak tu in, Messiah in hong thuak kul tu a, thina panin a tho kik phitbel ahi tu hi, ci sia thu ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Acts26:24 Paul in ama le ama hi bang a kihuk ciangin, Festus in oksan a, “Paul awng, na thin amh hi! pilna tam na sinna in na thin hong amhsak hi!” ci hi." 
Acts26:25 Paul in, “Kei ka thin amh ngawl hi, A zatakhuai pa awng, keima in thumaan thutak ka son hi." 
Acts26:26 Kumpipa Agrippa awng! Nang tungah hang takin hong son thei khi hi; banghang ziam cile nangma in hite huvau he ni hi. A piang sa nate khat simin, ciamtee tu in kong um hi, banghang ziam cile, hi thu sia a kingsong khat ah a piangku thu hi ngawl hi." 
Acts26:27 Kumpipa Agrippa awng, kamsaangte na um ziam? Na up sia hong he khi hi!” Paul in ci hi." 
Acts26:28 Agrippa in Paul munah, “Hi hun tomno sungah Tapidaw hong suaksak zo tu in ki um ni ziam?” ci hi." 
Acts26:29 “Hun tom kale, sau kale, nang le tuni a ka thuson hong ngaite theampo, hi thikkolte kihel ngawlin, keima bang na hi thei natu uh sia Pathian tungah ka thungetna ahi hi!” ci in zo hi." 
Acts26:30 Tua zawkciangin Kumpipa, ngamuk mangpa, Bernice le a dang teng ding a," 
Acts26:31 a nusiat zawk uh ciangin, khat le khat tungah, “Hisia pa in thongtaak natu ahizong, thi natu ahizong, bangma vawt nei ngawl hi,” kici uh hi." 
Acts26:32 Agrippa in Festus munah, “Kumpilianpa tungah a zukhaan ngawl hile, hisia pa kisuatasak thei tu hi,” ci hi." 
Acts27:1 Italy ah teambaw taw pai tu in a kikhensat zawkciang Paul le thongtaak dang pawlkhat sia “Kumpilianpa ii ngalkaphon” a kici Roman ngalkapte ii ngalkap bu Julius tungah amate in aap hi. 
Acts27:2 Adramyttium pan teambaw khat tungah ka kaato uh hi, tuasia in Asia ngamkhen a teambaw tawlngakna sang zuan tu in a kithoai teambaw hi a, tua taw ka ding uh hi. Thessalonica khua pan, Macedonia mi Aristarchus taw ka ton uh hi." 
Acts27:3 A zingsang ciangin, Sidon ka theng uh hi. Julius sia Paul tungah hong dik a, a kitaangsap pawpo a kipiak thei natu in, a lawmte kungah hawsak thei hi." 
Acts27:4 Tua mun panin ka paisuak uh a, ko sangah vui hong lee vak ahikom, a kibeal theina Cyprus tuikulh pangh vui kidalna mun tawnin ka pai uh hi." 
Acts27:5 Cilicia le Pamphylia hui panin, tuipi ka kan uh a, Lycia ngam Myra khua ka theng uh hi." 
Acts27:6 Tua munah ngalkap bupa in, Alexandria pan Italy ngam a zuan tu teambaw khat mu a tua teambaw tungah hong kaasak hi." 
Acts27:7 Ni tam ma dam takin, ka pai uh a, a khakbel ciangin, Cnidus khua hui dong haksa pi in ka theng uh hi. Tuak sangah ka paitan thei ngawl natu in, vui in hong khak ahikom, Salmone leidok hui panin Crete tuikulh pangh vui kidalna mun bealhin ka paisuk uh hi." 
Acts27:8 Tuipi vaalbo ka neak uh a, Lasea khua pan a kikhuala ngawl Muanhuai Teambaw tawlngakna kicina mun haksa pi in ka theng uh hi." 
Acts27:9 Tua munah ni tam mama taam ka hi uh kom, tu in Mawsuutna Ni zongh kan zo a, tui lam taw khualhaw tu sia lauhuai hi. Tua hikom, Paul in amate sia hi ngaisutna pia hi." 
Acts27:10 “Pasalte awng, ih khualhawna sia, hi sung pan kipan, lauhuai tu in ka mu hi; vanhte le teambaw ii tungah siatna lian piang tu a, mihing thina zongh om tu hi,” ci hi." 
Acts27:11 Ahihang ngalkap bupa in, teambaw ukpa le a neipa thuson um zaw a, Paul sonte sia a thupi laak bua hi." 
Acts27:12 Teambaw tawlngakna mun in phalbi sung om natu a phabel mun ahi bua hi; tua ahikom, mihing a tamzaw in, ahithei le, tuipi tungah paisuakin phalbi sung teng a om thei natu mun Phoenix thet tu hanciam nuam uh hi. Crete a om Phoenix teambaw tawlngakna sia nitumna thangsang le nitumna saksang maingat hi." 
Acts27:13 Thangsang panin vui hong va vahiau a, mihingte in a tupna uh bangin, pai thei tu in ki um uh hi. Tua ahikom tawlngaksakna thikkip dokto in, Crete vaalbo hui a neak thei zaza neakin pai uh hi." 
Acts27:14 Ahihang hai ngawlin, “Nisuana saksang vuipi” kici, vui thahat khat tuikulh panin hong vasuk hi." 
Acts27:15 Vui in teambaw sawn a, vui sang maingat in, kipai thei nawn ngawl ahikom, hanciam tuan nawn ngawlin, vui ii seamna pawpo ah ka pai uh hi." 
Acts27:16 Cauda tuikulh no ii thangsang ka kan uh ciangin, belh natu tawm om hi. Tua munah teambaw taw a kikop ngunkuang sia haksa pi in, a lal ngawl natu in ka huu zo uh hi." 
Acts27:17 Amate in teambaw tungah tuasia kaito in, teambaw kiimkot khauzeen pawlkhat taw sawmcip uh hi. Amate in, Libya ngam sen vaalbote phulin teambaw a awk tu lau uh hi. Tua ahikom amate in, teambaw puankhakte, luak in, vui ii sawnna pawpo ah pai tu in a om uh hi." 
Acts27:18 Suangval thahat sia, hong kizom tan ahikom, a zing ciangin, teambaw sungah a puak uh vanh pawlkhat tuipi sungah khia uh hi," 
Acts27:19 a zing ciangin teambaw taw kisai vanhzak pawlkhat tuipi sungah khia uh hi. 
Acts27:20 Ni tam mama hun sung, ni ahizong, aksi ahizong, ka mu thei bua uh hi. Tuaciang vui nasia takin hong va tan hi. A khakbel ciangin, suatak natu lametna bangma ka nei nawn bua uh hi." 
Acts27:21 Mihingte sia an ne ngawlin, khuangei a om zawkciang, Paul in amate mai ah dingin, “Pasalte awng, ka thuson hong ngai pole uhte a, Crete panin din awl hi po leang hiza supna le lalna taw kipeal tu ve hing." 
Acts27:22 Ahihang tu in kong thuum hi. Na thin uh liansak vun! Note khat zongh in, na nuntakna taan ngawl tu nu hi; teambaw bekma kisumh tu hi." 
Acts27:23 Banghang ziam cile ama ii neisa ka hi a, ka biak Pathian ii vantunglalang khat tu zanin hong pai a," 
Acts27:24 ‘Paul awng, lau heak in! Kumpilianpa mai ah na din kul tu hi. Pathian in nang tungah hong phatna taw na khualhaw pui theampo ii nuntakna suatak zo ni hi’ hong ci hi." 
Acts27:25 Tua ahikom, pasalte awng, thinlian vun! Banghang ziam cile, Pathian ka muang a, kei tungah hong kison bangin, tung tu hi, ci in ka um hi." 
Acts27:26 Ahihang eite sia tuikulh khat ii vaalbo ah hong kisawn tu hi,” ci hi." 
Acts27:27 Ni sawm le ni li ni zanin, vuipi suangval in, Mediterranean tuipi sungah ko hong then hi. Zankim hun khawngin, teambaw naseamte in, lei taw kinai zo vak hing, ci in ummaw uh hi." 
Acts27:28 Tua ahikom khau khat ii tungah, a ngit khat sawm a, a khiaksuk uh le, metre 40 thuk hi ci in mu hi; tawmvei zawkciangin, a tee kik uh le metre 30 thuk hi." 
Acts27:29 Amate in teambaw sia suangpi tung a tot thaak tu lau ahikom, teambaw nungsang panin, tawlngaksakna thikkip li khia suk a, khuavak natu in, thungen uh hi." 
Acts27:30 Tua zawkciang teambaw naseamte in, teambaw panin a suatak natu in, hanciam uh hi; ngunkuang sia tui sungah khiasuk in, teambaw maisang panin, tawlngaksakna thikkip pawlkhat khia tu bangin kiheang uh hi." 
Acts27:31 Ahihang Paul in ngalkap bupa le ngalkapte munah, “Hi teambaw naseamte sia teambaw tungah a om po bua uh le, no suatak natu lamet om ngawl hi,” ci hi." 
Acts27:32 Tua ahikom a ngunkuang khii na khau attan uh a, ngunkuang sia tui in taisak uh hi." 
Acts27:33 Khua hong vak mahiat in, Paul in a vekpi in, an tawm tek a neak natu in thuum a: “Tu in ni sawm le ni li ngak zo nu hi. Hi hunsung teng bangma neak nei ngawl nu hi." 
Acts27:34 Tua ahiciang an tawm tek na neak natu uh in, kong thuum hi; na thi ngawl natu in, an kitaangsamh hi. Na lu tung a samzam khat zongh, sum ngawl tu nu hi,” ci hi." 
Acts27:35 Hi bangin a ci zawkciang, Paul in anluum pawlkhat la in, Pathian pok in, amate theampo mai ah balneen in ne tu in kipan hi." 
Acts27:36 Amate a thinlian a, mihing simin anluum ne uh hi." 
Acts27:37 A vekpi kingawm in, mihing 276 teambaw tungah ka om uh hi." 
Acts27:38 Mihing simin, an a neak siat zawk uh ciangin, amate in zungtaang teng tuipi sungah vawkin teambaw vanh zaangsak uh hi." 
Acts27:39 Khua hong vak ciangin, teambaw naseamte in, vaalbo a tel meal bua uh hi. Ahihang amate in, vaalbo a nei tuidok khat mu ahikom, ahithei le tua munah teambaw sia kingaksak sawm uh hi." 
Acts27:40 Tua ahikom amate in tawlngaksakna thikkipte ii khau attan in, tui sungah khiasuk uh a, teambaw heaknate sawmna khau a phel paih uh hi. Tua zawkciang vui in teambaw sia, a mai sangah a sawn natu, amate in teambaw mai sangah puan khai a, tuaciang vaalbo sang ka manaw uh hi." 
Acts27:41 Ahihang teambaw in sen bo khat phul a, lei ah kinga hi; teambaw maisang sia awk in, a tung thei nawn bua hi. Tua laitakin tuihual nasia mama ahikom, teambaw nungsang teng a bebek in tamhtham hi." 
Acts27:42 Ngalkapte in, thongtaak theampo tui op a, vaalbo ah a suatak ngawl natu in, thalup sawm uh hi." 
Acts27:43 Ahihang ngalkap hon ukpa in, Paul hunnuam ahikom, tuabangin a ngamtat ngawl natu in tho hi. Tua hi ngawl zaw in, tui op thei peuma, teambaw tung panin, leangin, vaalbo dong tui a op natu thupia hi;" 
Acts27:44 a dangte in zui in, thingpheak ahizong, teambaw bek ahizong, a pom tek natu thupia hi. Hi bangin ka vekpi ma vaalbo ah ngammuang takin ka theng uh hi." 
Acts28:1 Ngammuang in vaalbo tung ka thet uh ciang, tua tuikulh sia Malta hi ci in ka he uh hi." 
Acts28:2 Tua munah a teang mihingte in, hong pawlvawt mama uh hi. Nguazu tu kithoai in khuasik mama ahikom, amate in meimang sep in, hong muak uh hi." 
Acts28:3 Paul in thingkang lom khat toai in, mei sungah a thut ciangin, meisa thuak la in, ngul khat hong pusuak a, ama khut tungah hong kivial hi." 
Acts28:4 A khua mite in, Paul khut tungah a kaai ngul a mu uh ciangin khat le khat sia, “Hi sia pa in tualthat khat hi nak tu hi. Tuipi pan suakta ahihang a nuntak tu sia Thumaan in oai ngawl hi,” ci uh hi." 
Acts28:5 Ahihang Paul in, tua ngul sia mei sungah thing a, ama bangma tat ngawl hi." 
Acts28:6 Amate in Paul sia a ci a sa tum keak tu a, tua ahibuale, pukvawk in a thi tu ngak hi. Ahihang ngei hialma a thi tu a ngak zawk uh ciang, a tumdang piang ngawl ahikom, a ngaisutna uh kheal kik a, “Ama sia pathian khat hi ei!” ci uh hi." 
Acts28:7 Tua mun panin a khuala ngawlna ah tuikulh ukpa Publius ii neisa lo pawlkhat om hi. Ama in hong muak a, ni thum sung zin hong do hi." 
Acts28:8 Publius ii pa sia ciisuk natna le ngilsan natna taw lupmuntung ngak hi. Paul in, ama ii inndoi sungah tumin, thungen a, ama tungah a khut nga in damsak hi." 
Acts28:9 Hi bangin hong pian ciangin, tuikulh tung a cina dang theampo zongh hong pai tek a, dam siat uh hi." 
Acts28:10 Amate in letsong tam ma hong pia a, teambaw taw ka din uh ciangin, khualhawna sung a ka kisap uh nate amate in teambaw tungah hong koisak uh hi." 
Acts28:11 Tha thum zawkciangin, Alexandria panin, phalbi hunsung tua tuikulh tungah a taam “The Twin Gods (Apeang Pathiante)” a kici teambaw khat taw ka ding uh hi." 
Acts28:12 Syracuse khuapi ka theng uh a, ni thum ka taam uh hi." 
Acts28:13 Tua mun panin ka ding suak uh a, Rhegium khuapi ka theng uh hi. A zing ciang, thangsang panin, vuiva tu in hong kipan hi, tuaciangin ni nii sungin Puteoli khua ka theng uh hi." 
Acts28:14 Tua munah thu um pawlkhat ka mu uh a, amate in nipi khat taamin hong sawl hi. Tua mun panin, Rome khua ka theng uh hi." 
Acts28:15 Rome a thu umte in ko thu hong za a, Appius Sumbuk le Zin inn Thum a kicina khuate dong hong muak uh hi. Paul in amate a mu ciangin, Pathian tungah lungdamko in, tha nga tuam mama hi." 
Acts28:16 Rome khua sungah ka thet uh ciangin, Paul sia ama nguakin, a cing ngalkap khat taw kikoi hi." 
Acts28:17 Ni thum zawkciangin, Paul in tua munah a om Jew lampuite sam a, kikhopna khat vawt hi. Amate hong kikhop ciang, amate tungah, “Ka Israel mipuite awng, ih mite tungah ahizong, taanghpupite tung pan ih lua ngeina zeksate tung ahizong, langpanna bangma nei ngawl napi, Jerusalem ah kei thong hong taaksak a, Rome mite tungah hong aap uh hi." 
Acts28:18 Rome mite in kei thu hong sit zawkciang, thi natu kilawm bangma sep nei ngawl ka hi komin, hong tha nuam hi." 
Acts28:19 Ahihang Jew te in tuabang tu sia nial ahikom, Kumpilianpa tungah ka zukhaan kul hi, tua ahihang, ka mipuite langpanin mawsak natu ka nei bua hi." 
Acts28:20 Tua hangin, no taw kimu in kong paupui natu ka nget ahi hi. A tatak ci leang, Israel mite ii a lamet uh pa hu in, hi bangin kei thikkol hong kibul hi,” ci hi." 
Acts28:21 Amate in ama munah, “Kote in nang thu huvau sia Judea panin, laithak ka nga bua uh hi, tua mun panin, ih mipuite hong pai in, nang taw kisai thupiang khat pawpo ahibuale a sia son tu khat po hong puak bua uh hi." 
Acts28:21 Amate in ama munah, “Kote in nang thu huvau sia Judea panin, laithak ka nga bua uh hi, tua mun panin, ih mipuite hong pai in, nang taw kisai thupiang khat pawpo ahibuale a sia son tu khat po hong puak bua uh hi." 
Acts28:22 Ahihang nangma ngaisut nate ka za nuam uh hi, banghang ziam cile, mun theampo ah mihingte in, na pawl puite a siatson tek sia ka he uh hi,” ci uh hi." 
Acts28:23 Tua ahikom, Paul taw a ni kiciam a, tua ni in mihing tam mama Paul omna ah hong pai uh hi. Zingsang pan zan dong, amate tungah Pathian Ngam thu hil thiang a, Moses Thukham le kamsaangte lai at nate sisanh in, Jesus thu a tel thei natu hanciam in son hi." 
Acts28:24 Pawlkhatte sia ama kammalte um uh a, ahihang a dangte in, a um bua uh hi." 
Acts28:25 Tua ahikom, amate kithukim thei ngawlin, Paul ii hi bangin, a ci zawkciang nusia uh hi. “Thaa Thiangtho in, Isaiah kamsaangpa tungtawnin, na taanghpupite tungah a sonna sia bangza in pha ziam!" 
Acts28:26 Banghang ziam cile ama in, ‘Pai in hi mite tungah son in: No in na ngangai, na ngangai tu a, ahihang na tel buatu uh hi; Na e en, na e en tu uh a, ahihang na mu buatu uh hi," 
Acts28:27 banghang ziam cile, hi mite ii thin sia bulthu hi, amate in a bil uh humcip a, a mit uh si hi. Tua hi buathong le, amate ii mit in mu tu a, a bil taw a za tu uh hi, tuaciang a thinsung in a tel tu uh hi, tuaciangin kei sangah hong kiheak tu a, amate ka damsak tu hi,’ Pathian in ci hi,” a ci hi." 
Acts28:28 Tuaciang Paul ii thukhupna ah: “Tuasia ciang, Pathian ii ngupna thu sia Gentile te tungah, kipuak zo hi ci in note in na heak tu uh ahi hi. Amate in ngai tu hi!”" 
Acts28:29 Paul in hi teng a ci zawkciang Jew te amate teng nasia tak kinialin a cia uh hi. 
Acts28:30 Paul in kum nii sung atu a saap inn sungah teang a, ama taw a kimu tu in a pai theampo leangna do hi." 
Acts28:31 Ama in hangsan tak le suakta takin Pathian Ngam thuhil a, Topa Jesus Christ thu hilcian hi." 
Romans1:1 Lungdamna Thupha hil tu in Pathian ii a sap, sawltak khat tu in a teal, Jesus Christ ii naseampa ahi Paul ii laithak ahi hi." 
Romans1:2 Tua Lungdamna Thupha sia Lai Thiangtho sungah a ki at sa bangma taanghlai pek panin a kamsaangte tungtawnin Pathian ii kamciam a piaksa ahi hi. 
Romans1:3 Tua in ih Topa Jesus Christ, ama Tapa huvau ahi hi: cii le sa panin ama David suan hi a;" 
Romans1:4 Pathian pianzia taw ci leang thina panin a lian vaangletna taw a kithawsak kikna in Pathian Tapa a hina kilanghsak hi. 
Romans1:5 Ama tungtawnin mi namcin sung pan mihing theampo ii a up thei natu le a thu a nit thei natu in Christ hu in Pathian in kei sia sawltak khat sua theina thupha hong pia hi. 
Romans1:6 Jesus Christ neisa a suak tu in Pathian hong sapsa Rome khua a om note zongh hi thu in hong huam hi. 
Romans1:7 Tua ahikom Pathian in hong it a, ama minam suak tu in, hong sapsa no Rome khua a omte theampo tungah lai kong thaak hi. Ih Pa Pathian le ih Topa Jesus Christ in thuthiamna le thinnopna hong pia tahen." 
Romans1:8 A masa phitbel in no tungtaang ah Jesus Christ tungtawnin Pathian tungah lungdam ka ko hi, banghang ziam cile leitung theampo in na upna thu uh hong za hi." 
Romans1:9 A Tapa ii Lungdamna Thupha ka hilsak, ka thin theampo taw ka sepsak, tu a ka son teng sia thumaan a hina thu ah — Pathian sia ka tetti ahi hi. No kong phawna sia Pathian in," 
Romans1:10 thu ka nget simin hong he hi. Pathian ii deina ahi nale tu in no kungah kong haw tu sia hong suaksak thei takpi le ci in ka ngen hi. 
Romans1:11 Note hong thakhosak tu, Thaa thupha hong hawm sawn tu in kong mu nuam mama hi." 
Romans1:12 Ka cinopna pan kei upna hu in note phat tuamna nga in, note upna hu in kei zongh phat tuamna nga tu a, hun khat sungah a kihu tetek ih hina thu ka son nopna hi." 
Romans1:13 Suapuite awng hi thu na teptee tu ka dei a, tamvei ma note kungah hong haw tu in ka ngeal zo hi, ahihang tuabang ka hi thei natu in na khat po in hong khak tawntung hi. Gentile te sung panin a kikheal ka omsak bangma in, no sung pan zong kikhealsak zawk nei leng ka uk hi." 
Romans1:14 Banghang ziam cile heakna nei te ahizong a nei ngawlte ahizong, pilna neite ahizong a nei ngawlte ahizong mihing theampo ii tungah vaipuak ka nei hi." 
Romans1:15 Tua ahikom Rome khua ah a teang no tung zongh ah Lungdamna Thupha hil tu ka lawp hi. 
Romans1:16 Lungdamna thupha sungah a kicingin muanna ka nei hi; tua in a umte theampo kingup natu Pathian ii vaangletna hi a Jew mite atu hi photin, tua zawkciang Gentile te atu zongh ahi hi." 
Romans1:17 Banghang ziam cile lungdamna thupha in Pathian le mihingte bangbangin kilemzawng thei tu ziam ci in hong pualaak hi: a patna panin a tawp dong upna tungtawnin a piang ahi hi. Laithiangtho sungah “Upna tungtawnin Pathian mai ah thutang a kisuaksak sia in nungta tu hi,” ci hi." 
Romans1:18 Thumaan thu a kiheak tu a khaktan mihingte ngitlona le mawnate hu in Pathian thin uukna sia vantung panin hong kilanghsak hi. 
Romans1:19 Pathian in amate daan pia hi, banghang ziam cile mihingte ii Pathian a heak natu sia Pathian mama in amate tungah telthiangsak hi." 
Romans1:20 Pathian ii simlei a bitphua pan kipan a kimu thei ngawl Pathian phatna ahi, ama ii tawntung vaangletna le thaa pianziate thiang takin kimu a; tuate sia Pathian ii vawt nate tung panin kitel thei hi. Tua ahikom mihingte in kam zon natu bangma a nei bua uh hi." 
Romans1:21 Amate in Pathian he ahihang a upat tu bangin upat ngawl uh a, ama tungah lungdam a ko tu bangin ko ngawl uh hi. Amate khua ngaisutna mannung mama ngawl a, amate thinsung hawmin, khuazing taw kidim hi." 
Romans1:22 Amate ciim kisa ahihang mawmaw uh hi; 
Romans1:23 a nungta tawntung Pathian a biak tu luangin a thithei mihing, vacim, ngamsa, awmtaal in a vak nganhingte meal taw kibang limte bia uh hi." 
Romans1:24 Tua ahikom, amate thinsung ah a uuk kiihuai ngamtatnate vawt tu in, Pathian in amate thazau a, tuaciangin amate khat le khat tungah maizumhuai nate kivawt uh hi." 
Romans1:25 Pathian huvau thumaante sia leilot thu suaksak uh a, Bitphuapa Pathian bia ngawlin a bitphua sa nate bia zaw uh hi. Pathian a tawntungin kipok tahen! Amen." 
Romans1:26 Amate hi bangin ngamta ahikom, Pathian in amate sia a maizumhuai cii le sa deina sungah thazau hi. A numeite ngawngawn in amate pumpi zak tu bangin zangh ngawlin ngeina ngawl bangin zangh uh hi." 
Romans1:27 Tuabang ma in pate zongh in numei taw omkhop tu sangin, pa le pa khial nopna thin nei uh hi. Pate in a maizumhuai pa le pa khialnate vawt a, tua hu in amate taw a kiphu daante kipia hi." 
Romans1:28 Pathian huvau heakna maante sia mihingte in khua ngaisut in nei nuam ngawl ahikom Pathian in amate ngamtat tuak ngawlte ngamtat theina ngaisutna sungah thazau hi. 
Romans1:29 Amate in ngitlona, siatna, duhopna le kilalsak theina namcinte taw kidim a; ki eenna, kisuamlupna, kihauna, ngualtheamna le siatvawt nopna thin taw kidim uh hi. Amate nawnsan a," 
Romans1:30 khat le khat kingensia hi; amate in Pathian ensan a, sisuak in, kiphasak a kisuangtaak hi; siatna namcin phuang a; nute pate thu ni ngawl uh hi;" 
Romans1:31 A pha le a sia khentel theina thinsung nei ngawl, kamciam len ngawlin ngual hesuak theina le thuthiamna nei ngawl uh hi." 
Romans1:32 Hi bangin a nungtate sia Pathian thukham in thidaan thuak hen a ci hunlam zongh amate in he uh hi. Ahitazong, a ngamtatna kheal ngawl bek dom ngawlin, tuabang a ngamtate zongh thukimpui lai uh hi." 
Romans2:1 Note in ngual tungah thukhen hi ngawl nu ziam? Akua po na hi uh zong na paulap tu om ngawl hi. Banghang ziam cile ngual tungah thu na khen uh ciangin noma zongh amate ngamtat bangma in na ngamta veve uh le noma le noma thu kikhen na suak uh hi. 
Romans2:2 Pathian in hi bang a ngamtate tungah thu a khen ciangin thutang taw thukhen hi ci in ka he uh hi. 
Romans2:3 Ahihang no, ngual tung a thukhente awng, noma zongh in amate ngamtat bangma in ngamta na hi uh hi! Pathian thukhenna taw kipeal thei tu ki um na hi uh ziam?" 
Romans2:4 Tua ahibuale ama ii cikna, thiamna le dual zawknate zawnsak vawt na hi uh ziam? A tatakin Pathian cingh mama hi, banghang ziam cile na kisiik kik natu in ama in hanciam in lam hong pui hi." 
Romans2:5 Ahihang note na thin uh pui in na lungtang uh sak hi, tua ahikom Pathian sia thin uukna le thutang taw thu a khen Ni ciangin na daan khak tu uh sia a nasia seseam in hong kilangh tu hi." 
Romans2:6 Banghang ziam cile Pathian in mihing sim in a sep a vawt bangin thaman a pia tu hi. 
Romans2:7 Mihing pawlkhat in nasep pha seam zomin minthanna, upatna le thi mawk nuntaknate Pathian kungah zong uh hi. Tuate tungah Pathian in tawntung nuntakna pia tu hi." 
Romans2:8 Midangte ahile amate atu bek ngaisun in, thumaan nial in a maan ngawl thu zui uh hi; tuate tungah Pathian in a thangsiatna le a thin uukna buak tu hi." 
Romans2:9 Siatna a vawt mihing theampo tungah thuakna le natna hong om tu a, Jew te masa phot tu a tua zawkciangin Gentile te zongin thuak tu hi." 
Romans2:10 Ahihang Pathian in minthanna, upatna le thinnopna sia thupha vawtte theampo tungah, Jew te masa photin Gentile te zongh pia tu hi." 
Romans2:11 Banghang ziam cile Pathian in mihing khat sim tungah a kibang khaiteena taw thukhen hi. 
Romans2:12 Gentile te in Moses Thukhamte a nei bua uh hi; amate in Thukham puasia ah om in, mawna vawtin mangthang uh hi. Jew te in Thukham nei uh hi; amate maw a Thukham in amate thukhen hi." 
Romans2:13 Banghang ziam cile Pathian mai ah thutang suana in Thukham zaakna taw piang ngawl a Thukham sawlnate zuina taw piang hi. 
Romans2:14 Gentile te in Thukham nei ngawl hi; ahihang Thukham sawl bangin ngamta tu in amate le amate in a thinsung uh ah a khensat uh simin Thukham nei suak uh hi. Thukham nei ngawlte hi phot ahihang a neite suak uh hi. 
Romans2:15 Amate ngamtatna in Thukham sawlnate a thinsung ah ki at hi ci in lak hi. A thinsung uh ah, kithasun theina le kithutangsak theina a nei theina zongh in, hi thu maan hi ci in lak hi." 
Romans2:16 Tua ahikom Lungdamna Thupha ka hilna bangin ci leang, mihing theampo ii a thimtham ngaisutnate tungah Jesus tungtawnin Pathian in thu a khen Ni ciang, tu a ih son bangin hong piang tu ahi hi." 
Romans2:17 No, Jew te ka hi uh a cite awng, note sia Thukham suangin Pathian huvau ah a kisuangtaakte na hi uh hi;" 
Romans2:18 Pathian in bangbangin ngamta le hong oai ziam ci in na he uh a, Thukham panin a maan le a maan ngawl thute teal thei natu na sin zo uh hi;" 
Romans2:19 note in mittawte lamlak tu, khuazing sung a omte atu khuavak," 
Romans2:20 a mawmawte atu a hilpa, khuatel ngawlte atu syapa na hi uh hi. Thukham sungah thumaan le heakna kicing in om hi ci in a kholette na hi uh hi." 
Romans2:21 Ngual zongh hil thei na hi uh le noma le noma banghangin kihil ngawl nu ziam? “Nguta heak vun,” ci in na hil uh hi. Ahihang noma mama in na ngu uh ziam?" 
Romans2:22 “Palngul mawna na vawt heak vun,” na ci uh hi — Noma in palngul mawna na vawt uh ziam? Milim biakna na ngaimaw uh hi — ahihang, biakinnte zawthawk thu taw na phuul uh ziam?" 
Romans2:23 Pathian Thukham nei hing ci in kisuangtaak nu hi — ahihang a thukham na paltanna uh taw Pathian min na paansak uh ziam? 
Romans2:24 Laithiangtho in, “No Jew te hu in Gentile te in Pathian sonsia hi,” ci hi." 
Romans2:25 Thukham na tang uh le na vunteap atna in man nei hi; ahihang Thukham na tang bua uh le na vunteap at bua le uhte phazaw hi. 
Romans2:26 Gentile mite vunteap a at ngawlte in Thukham thupiakna a ni uh le Pathian in vunteap atte bangma in ngaisun ngawl tu ziam? 
Romans2:27 Tua ahikom Thukham nei a vunteap at napi in, tua Thukham a zui ngawl no Jew te sia vunteap at ngawl napi thukham a zui Gentile te in hong ningkhiin tu hi." 
Romans2:28 Vunteap ki at takpi a, Jew tatak a kicite sia akua bangte hi peuma tu ziam? A puatham bek Jew hi a vunteap atna in cii le sa bek ahite Jew tatak kici ngawl hi." 
Romans2:29 Jew tatak a kicite sia a sungsang Jew hi a, a thinsung vunteap a ki at, tua zongh Pathian Thaa ii sepna taw a ki at hi in, thukham ii sep le vawt ahi ngawlte hi. Hi bang mite in mihingte pokna hi ngawlin Pathian pokna saang uh hi." 
Romans3:1 Tua ahile Jew te in Gentile te sangin hamphat zawkna khat po a nei ziam? Tua ahibuale vunteap atna ah bang phat tuamna om ziam? 
Romans3:2 Phat tuamna nam tam mama om hi! a masa phitbel in Pathian in a thu a kizaaksak natu in Jew te muang phot hi. 
Romans3:3 Ahihang hi thu huvau ah amate sungah thumaan ngawl pawlkhat om le, bang suak tu ziam? Hisia in Pathian thumaan ngawl tu hi cina hi tu ziam?" 
Romans3:4 Tuabang hi ngawl het hi. Mihing sim in leilot kale zong Pathian ahile a thumaan kul veve tu hi. Laithiangtho in hi bangin ci hi. “Na pau ciangin thumaan na hi hunlam kilak tu a, thu hong kisit ciangin a thu na zaw kul hi.”" 
Romans3:5 Ahihang eite thutang ngawl ih hina in Pathian sia thutang ahi hunlam kiciansak ahile eite in bang ih son tuan nawn tu ziam? Pathian in daan hong piak ciangin ama sia thutang ngawl hi ih ci thei ziam? (Tu a teng sia mihing ngeina bangin ka pau hi.) 
Romans3:6 Hi vet ngawl hi! Pathian thutang ngawl hile bangbangin ama in leitung buppi thukhen thei tu ziam? 
Romans3:7 Ahihang keima ii thumaan ngawlna in Pathian thumaanna kiciansak zaw kan a, ama ii minthanna suaksak le bangbang hi tu ziam? Tua ahile banghangin kei mawnei hi ci in hong kipuavawk lalai tu ziam?" 
Romans3:8 Tua ahile banghangin “Thupha pianna tu in thusia vawt tawng,” ci ngawl hi ziam? Mihing pawlkhat in tu a ka ci bangin pau hi ci in mawsiatin hong lang hi! Tuabang mihingte in a kiphu bangin puavawkna thuak tu hi." 
Romans3:9 Tua ahile ei Jew te in Gentile te sangin phazaw ih hi ziam? Hi tuan ngawl hi! Ka sonsa bangma in Jew te le Gentile te sia a kibangin mawna vaangletna nuai ah om siat hi. 
Romans3:10 Laithiangtho in, “A thumaan thutang kuama om ngawl hi." 
Romans3:11 A ciim kuama om ngawl a, Pathian a bia kuama om ngawl hi." 
Romans3:12 Mihingte a vekpi in Pathian sang panin lampial zo a, amate lamkhial siat zo uh hi. A maan na a seam, kuama om ngawl a, khat bebeak zongh om ngawl hi." 
Romans3:13 A kampau te in thi theina kitheamna thu taw kidim a; a leei uh panin leilot thu pusuak hi, a lauhuai tawnnate ngulnguu bangin a muk uh panin pusuak hi;" 
Romans3:14 a kam uh sia longsia khakngal taw kidim hi. 
Romans3:15 Amate in ngual liamsua tu le a thatlum tu in palvang a," 
Romans3:16 a paina theampo ah amate in siatna le lalna piangsak uh hi. 
Romans3:17 Amate in kilemna lampi a he bua uh hi," 
Romans3:18 Pathian thasia natu zongh a sin ngei bua uh hi,” ci hi." 
Romans3:19 Leitung buppi Pathian thukhenna sungah a thet natu le mihingte kam zon theina theampo a bo thei natu in Thukham sungah thu omte theampo in Thukham khutnuai ah a omte atu ahi hunlam ka he uh hi. 
Romans3:20 Banghang ziam cile Pathian mai ah Thukham tanna hangin kuama thutang suak zo om ngawl a; Thukham nasepna in mihing khat mawnei ahi hunlam a kiheak natu ahi hi. 
Romans3:21 Ahihang tu in Pathian ii mihingte thutang a suasakzia hong kipualaak zo hi. Thukham le kamsaangte lai atte in maan hi ci in tetti pang ahitazong, tuasia in thukham taw kisai ngawl hi." 
Romans3:22 Pathian in mihingte sia Jesus Christ a upna uh tungtawnin thutang suaksak hi. Christ a umte theampo tungah Pathian in hi bangin vawt hi, banghang ziam cile kuama a kilamdang tuatuan a om bua uh hi." 
Romans3:23 Mihing theampo maw siat zo a Pathian ii ngum tu in hong ompuina pan kikhuala siat uh hi. 
Romans3:24 Ahihang amate a suaktasak Jesus Christ tungtawnin, Pathian ii man piak ngawlin hong piak thuthiamna letsong taw amate thutang kisuaksak hi." 
Romans3:25 Ama ii kipumpiak biakpiak natu in hong thina taw amate upna tungtawnin, mihingte mawna kimaisakna a pian natu in, Pathian in ama hong pia hi. Pathian in thutang ahi hunlam hong lak natu in, hi bangin a vawt hi. A bosa hun sungah ama a thin uai a, mihingte mawnate hong tha thong hi; ahihang tu in ama sia, thutang ahi hunlam a kilak natu in, mihingte mawna tungtaang ah na hong seam hi. Hi bangin Pathian in ama sia thutang ahi hunlam le Jesus Christ a um peuma thutang a suasakna thu hong lak hi." 
Romans3:26  
Romans3:27 Tua ahiciang eite kisuantaak natu bang om ziam? Bangma om ngawl hi! Tua hile thutang suana in koisung pan hong piang ziam? Thukham nitna sepna pan ziam? Hi ngawl hi, upna pan bek hi." 
Romans3:28 Banghang ziam cile mihing khat sia Pathian mai ah upna tungtawn bek in thutang suak thei bek a, Thukham sawl bang a sepna pan hi ngawl hi ci in ih he hi." 
Romans3:29 Tua ahibuale Pathian sia Jew te ii Pathian hi bek ziam? Gentile te Pathian zongh hi ngawl ziam? Hi leilam hi. 
Romans3:30 Pathian sia khat hi a, Jew te zongh a upna uh tungtawnin, thutang suaksak a, Gentile te zongh a upna tungtawnin, thutang kisuaksak hi." 
Romans3:31 Upna in Thukham phiat hi cinopna ahi ziam? Hi ngawl het hi; eite in Thukham ih kipsak zaw hi. 
Romans4:1 Tua ahile ih pianna pa ahi Abraham thuakna sa tungtaang ah bang ih son tu ziam? 
Romans4:2 Ama ii ngamtatna tung panin Pathian in thutang suaksak ahile a kisuantaak natu nei tu hi — ahihang Pathian mai ah ama in bangma kisuantaak natu om ngawl hi. 
Romans4:3 Laithiangtho in, “Abraham in Pathian um a, tua a upna hu in Pathian in thutang suaksak hi,” ci hi." 
Romans4:4 Naseam khat in sep thaman saang hi, tua thaman sia letsong kici thei ngawl hi; a thalaw sa hi ci in kingaisun hi." 
Romans4:5 Ahihang sepna hi ngawl a upna a nei sia in, mimawte maw ngawl hi a ci Pathian a up hu in, a upna sia Pathian in saang a, thutang suaksak hi." 
Romans4:6 Hi thu in sepna kihel ngawl Pathian ii thutang hi ci in a saan, mihingte ii lungdamna, David ii son sia ahi hi." 
Romans4:7 “Tatkhialnate kimaisak a, a mawna pan a kisuatak te bangza in a lungdam ziam!" 
Romans4:8 Topa ii a mawnate sazian in a teptee ngawl tu sia in mihing lungdam ahi hi!” 
Romans4:9 Hi lungdamna David ii son sia vunteap atte bek atu ahi ziam? Hi ngawl hi! Vunteap at ngawlte atu zongh ahi hi. Banghang ziam cile laithiangtho sungah a ki at bangin ih sonsa hi a, “Abraham in Pathian um a, tua a upna hangin Pathian in ama thutang hi, ci in saang hi.”" 
Romans4:10 Hi thu bang hun laitakin piang ziam? Abraham vunteap a at zawkciang ziam? A at ma ziam? A at ma hi a, a at zawk hi ngawl hi." 
Romans4:11 Ama sia a khak sang ciangin a vunteap at pheang hi. Vunteap a atna zongh, Abraham in Pathian um ahikom Pathian in ama a vunteap a at ma in thutang hi ci a tepteena lim ahi hi. Tua ahikom Abraham in Pathian um a, thutang hi ci in ama ii a saante theampo, a vunteap at vateal ta buale kuama theampo ii thaa lamsang ah a pa uh ahi hi." 
Romans4:12 Ama in vunteap atte ii pa zongh hi a, vunteap a at bek dom ngawlin, ih pa Abraham vunteap a at ma a, upna taw a nuntakna sungah ama bangma in a nungta te ii pa zongh ahi hi." 
Romans4:13 Pathian in Abraham le a suan a paalte munah hi leitung sia amate atu hi ci in kamciam pia hi, hi kamciam in Abraham ii thukham a nit hu hi ngawl a, a up hangin thutang hi ci a, Pathian in a teptee hu ahi hi." 
Romans4:14 Banghang ziam cile Pathian ii kamciam sia Thukham a tangte atu hi thong le mihingte upna sia a lui thawthong suak tu a, Pathian kamciam zongh man nei ngawl hi tu hi." 
Romans4:15 Thukham in Pathian thin uukna piangsak hi; Ahihang thukham om ngawlna munah thukham paltanna om ngawl hi. 
Romans4:16 Pathian kamciam in upna bulphu in nei a, tua ahikom Abraham suan le paal Thukham tangte bek hi ngawlin — Abraham up bangin a umte theampo tungah man nei ngawlin a piak tu in kho takin vawt hi. Banghang ziam cile Abraham in eite theampo ii thaa lam sangah ih pa ahi hi." 
Romans4:17 Laithiangtho in, “Minam tam mama ii pa kong suaksak zo hi,” a ci bangma ahi hi. Tua ahikom a thisa a nungtasak kik thei, a om ngeingawl laite thupiakna taw a piangsak thei, Abraham ii a up Pathian ii a muna ah tua kamciam sia kip hi." 
Romans4:18 Muanmawk lamet natu om ngawl kawm panin Abraham in um a muangmaw ahikom ama sia “minam tam mamate pa” suak hi. Laithiangtho in “Na suan na paal te aksi za in tam tu hi,” ci hi." 
Romans4:19 Tua hun lai in ama kum zakhat pha dektak zo a, a pumpi sia a thithi ma hi zo in, tua bek dom ngawlin Sarah in ta nei thei ngawl ahitazong a upna a thaneam tuan bua hi." 
Romans4:20 Ama in a upna thasua ngawl a, Pathian kamciam zongh a muang la bua hi. A upna in ama thahatna taw kidimsak a, ama in Pathian pok hi." 
Romans4:21 Ama ii a thinsung tawngh pan a upna sia, Pathian in kamciam a piak bangin tungsak tu hi ci in um hi." 
Romans4:22 Tua thu hangin Abraham in upna tungtawnin, “Pathian in thutang hi ci in saang hi.”" 
Romans4:23 “Ama sia thutang hi ci in kisaang hi,” ci kammal zongh ama bek atu a kici ahi bua hi." 
Romans4:24 Ih Topa Jesus thina pan a tho kiksak ama a um, thutang hi ci in hong kiciamtee ei atu zonghin a ki at kammal ahi hi." 
Romans4:25 Jesus sia eite ii mawna hu in a thi tu in ki aap a, Pathian mai ah thutang ih sua natu in nuntakna sungah ama kinungta kiksak hi." 
Romans5:1 Tu in eite upna tungtawnin Pathian in thutang hong suaksak a, ih Topa Jesus Christ tungtawnin, Pathian taw kilemna ih nei hi." 
Romans5:2 Tu laitak a ih dinmun ahi Pathian ii thuthiamna sung a theng tu in upna tungtawnin ama in tua munah hong then hi. Tua ahikom eite in Pathian minthanna ih siim natu lametna ih nei hu in ih kisuangtaak hi! 
Romans5:3 Ih ngimnate hu zonghin ih angtang hi, banghang ziam cile ngimna in thuak zawkna piangsak a," 
Romans5:4 thuak zawkna in Pathian thukimna piangsak in, ama hong thukimpuina in lametna piangsak hi." 
Romans5:5 Hi lametna in hong thinkiamsak bua hi, banghang ziam cile Pathian hong piakthong letsong ahi Thaa Thiangtho zangh in ih thin sungah ama ii itna hong buak hi." 
Romans5:6 Banghang ziam cile cimaw a ih om laitakin Pathian ii a teal hun ciangin Christ sia mi ngilote atu in hong thi hi. 
Romans5:7 Mihing thutang khat atu thina thuak tu sia thu haksa ahi hi. Mihing pha khat atu a thi ngam khat po zongh om tha tu hi. 
Romans5:8 Ahihang eite mimaw ih hi laitak ma in eite atu Christ hong thina taw Pathian in eite bangzata in hong it ziam ci hong lak hi. 
Romans5:9 Tua ahiciang, tu in ama chisan taw eite Pathian mai ah thutang ih suak hi; tua ahile Pathian thin uukna pan ama in bangza in eite hong ngum zaw kan lai tu ziam!" 
Romans5:10 Eite in Pathian ngalte ih hi laitakin, a Tapa thina tungtawnin eite sia ama taw a kilem a lawmte hong suaksak hi. Tu in Pathian lawmte hi zo ih hi le Christ nuntakna in bangza in hong ngum zaw kan lai tu ziam!" 
Romans5:11 Ahihang tua teng bek hi ngawl hi; Pathian lawmte hong suaksak Topa Jesus Christ tungtawn a Pathian sepna tungah ih lungdam hi. 
Romans5:12 Mihing khat tungtawnin mawna leitung ah hong theng a, tuaciang ama mawna in thina hong puak hi. Tua taw kizui in mihing suan theampo tungah thina hong kizel hi. Banghang ziam cile mihing theampo maw zo uh hi." 
Romans5:13 Thukham a kipiak ma in leitung ah mawna om zo hi; ahihang thukham om ngawlna ah mawna sazian kikoi ngawl hi. 
Romans5:14 Ahihang Adam hun pan kipan Moses hun dongin thina in mihingte uk a, Adam bang a Pathian thupiakna a ni ngawlte bek hi ngawlin a dangte zongh thi uh hi. Adam sia hong pai pheang tu mihing khat ii lim ahi hi." 
Romans5:15 Ahihang tuate ngeal kibang ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile Pathian ii a thong a hong piak letsong in Adam ii mawna taw kibang ngawl hi. Tua mihing khat ii hu in mihing tam mama thi hi. Ahihang Pathian ii thuthiamna lian zaw pek a, tuasia bangma in mihing khat ahi Jesus Christ ii thuthiamna tungtawnin a thong a hong piak letsong sia lian zaw hi." 
Romans5:16 Tuabangin Pathian piak letsong le mihing khat ii mawna kilaklaw ah kilamdanna om hi. Mawna khat hang “maw hi” ci a thukhenna piang a, ahihang mawna tam mama kale zong “maw ngawl hi” cina letsong sia kilawm ngawlin hong piang hi!" 
Romans5:17 Mihing khat ii mawna tungtawnin thina in hong uk hi. Ahihang Jesus Christ a kici mihing khat ii sepna taw kizui in bangza in a lianzaw thu piang ziam! Pathian ii a kicing thuthiamna le man nei ngawl a hong piak thutang suana a saangte in Christ tungtawnin a ngualzo nuntakna nga tu hi. 
Romans5:18 Tua ahikom mawna khat in mihing theampo hong puavawk a, thukhenna a piansak bangma in thutang nasepna khat in mihing theampo suaktasak a, nuntakna pia hi." 
Romans5:19 Mihing khat ii thunit ngawl hu in mihing theampo mawnei a kisuasak bangma in, mihing khat thunit hu in mihing theampo Pathian mai ah thutangte kisuaksak hi." 
Romans5:20 Mawna ngamtatna a khanto vaial natu in thukham kipia hi, ahihang mawna a khantona munah, Pathian ii thuthiamna khangto seseam hi." 
Romans5:21 Tua ahikom mawna in thina taw hong uk bangma in, Pathian ii thuthiamna in thutang suana taw hong uk a, ih Topa Jesus Christ tungtawnin tawntung nuntakna sungah hong then hi." 
Romans6:1 Tua ahile bang ih son tu ziam? Pathian ii thuthiamna a khanto vaial natu in mawna sungah ih nungta tan lai tu ziam? 
Romans6:2 Hi ngawl het hi. Eite in mawna thi san zo ih hi ciang bangbangin mawna sungah nungtata lai tu hi ziam? 
Romans6:3 Banghang ziam cile hi thu na heak uh ahi hi. Eite Christ taw kikopkhawm tu in ih ki baptize ciang ama thina sung zongh ah a kikopkhawm tu in a ki baptize ih hi hi. 
Romans6:4 Tua ahiciang ih ki baptize na taw eite ama taw kivuikhawm a, ama thina ih siim hi. Banghang ziam cile Pa ii minthan thahatna taw Christ sia thina panin a kithawsak kik ciang eite zongh nuntakna thak sungah a nungtate ih sua natu ahi hi." 
Romans6:5 Banghang ziam cile ama ii a thi bangma in ih thi ciangin ama taw pumkhat suak ih hile, ama a kinuntaksak kik bangma in, eite hong kinuntaksak kikna taw ama taw pumkhat ih suak tu hi." 
Romans6:6 Tuaciangin hi thu ih he hi, ih nuntakna a lui sia thinglamtee tungah Christ taw ih thisak zo a, mawna silate ih hi nawn ngawl natu, mawna vaangletna a kilalcipsak natu in ih nuntakna lui sia Christ taw ama thinglamtee tungah kithisak zo ci in ih he hi." 
Romans6:7 Banghang ziam cile mihing khat a thi ciangin mawna tha hatna panin a kisuaktasak ahi hi. 
Romans6:8 Christ taw thi khawm zo ih hi nungsang, ama taw ih nungta khawm tu hi, ci zonghin ih um hi." 
Romans6:9 Banghang ziam cile Christ sia thina panin kitho kiksak zo a, bangma hunin a thi kik ngei nawn buatu hi — thina in ama uk ngei nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Romans6:10 Tua ahiciang ama thi ahi hu in, mawna in ama tungah vaang nei nawn ngawl hi; tu in ama nuntakna in Pathian taw kipawlkhawm in nungta ahi hi." 
Romans6:11 Tuasia bangma in no zongh mawna taw kipee thute ah a thisa in, na kituat vun a, ahizong, Christ Jesus tungtawnin Pathian taw kipawlkhopna sungah a nungta in na kituat vun." 
Romans6:12 Na cii le sa deina na zui ngawl natu in, a thithei na pumpi sia mawna in hong uk nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Romans6:13 Tua bek dom ngawlin, a pha ngawl tupnate sungah a kizangh tu in na pumpi nate khat pawpo aap thei ngawl tu nu hi. Tua hi ngawl zaw in thina pan a kinungtasak kik mihingte bangin na pumpi uh thumaan thutang taw a kizak natu in, Pathian tungah kipia vun." 
Romans6:14 Mawna in hong uk nawn ngawl tu hi; banghang ziam cile note in thukham nuai ah nungta nawn ngawl a, Pathian ii thuthiamna nuai ah a nungta na hi zo uh hi." 
Romans6:15 Tua ahile bang ci tu hi ziam? Thukham khutnuai ah om nawn ngawl a Pathian ii thuthiamna khutnuai ah om zo ih hile mawna ih vawt lai tu ziam? Hi ngawl hi! 
Romans6:16 Mihing khat pawpo ii thu ni tu in noma le noma na ki aap uh ciangin a sila na suak uh sia maan takin na he uh hi — mawna sila na hi uh le thina taw kizom a, tua ahi bua a, thunitna sila na hi uh le Pathian mai ah thutang suana taw kizom hi." 
Romans6:17 Bangpo ahizong Pathian tungah lungdamko tawng! Banghang ziam cile khatvei lai in note in mawna silate na hi uh a, na saansa uh hong kihil thumaan thutakte na thin theampo uh taw na ni zo uh hi." 
Romans6:18 Note mawna panin hong kisuaktasak zo a, thutang ii silate na hi zo uh hi." 
Romans6:19 (A zawngkhal mihing na hi uh hu in na tel thei tu in, ni sim ih zak kammal ol te kong zangh hi.) Khatvei lai in siatna le thiangtho ngawlna sungah a sia tu le a nin tu in noma le noma silate bangin na kipum aap uh bangma in, tu in thutang ii silate bangin tupna thiangtho sungah na kipia tavun." 
Romans6:20 Mawna silate na hi uh laitakin thumaan thutang taw na kipeal uh hi. 
Romans6:21 Maizum huai na saknate na vawt uh ciangin, bang meetna na nga uh ziam? Tuate taw a kizom thu in thina ahi hi!" 
Romans6:22 Ahihang tu in note sia mawna panin hong kisuaktasak zo a, Pathian silate na hi uh hi. Na meetna uh sia nuntakna a cialcingin ama tungah na kipum aapna uh hi a, tua taw kizom thu in tawntung nuntakna ahi hi." 
Romans6:23 Banghang ziam cile mawna thaman in thina hi a; ahihang tawntung nuntakna sia, ih Topa Jesus Christ taw ih kikopna hangin a thong a hong piak letsong ahi hi." 
Romans7:1 Suapuite awng, thukham huvau tel siat na hi uh ciang, son tu a kong kipat thu zongh tel mama tu nu hi. Mihing khat a nuntak laiteng bekma in thukham in uk hi." 
Romans7:2 Sonteena in numei pasal nei khat sia, a pasal nuntak lai teng bekma in thukham in khii hi; ahihang a pasal a thi le a zi sia tua pasal taw a kikhii khawm tua thukham panin suakta hi." 
Romans7:3 Tua ahikom a pasal nungta nginge lai in, numei in pa dang khat taw a teang le a pasal palngul hi kici tu hi; ahihang a pasal a thi le, thukham panin a suakta numei hi a, ngualdang khat a teenpui hangin ama in palngul mawna vawt ahi bua hi." 
Romans7:4 Ka suapuite awng, note zongh tua taw kibang nu hi. Thukham tungtaang ah note zongh thi zo nu hi, banghang ziam cile note in Christ ii pumpi khen khat veu na hi tek uh hi; tuaciang tu in Pathian tungah a taktai sepnate ih nei thei natu in thina pan a, a kitho kiksak Pa ii neisate na hi uh hi." 
Romans7:5 Banghang ziam cile mihing pianzia bangin ih nuntak laitakin Thukham ii holna taw maw nopnate in ih pumpi sungah na hong seam a, tuaciang thi theina nasepna sungah eite ih kiva mama hi." 
Romans7:6 Bangpo ahizong, tu in eite Thukham taw ih kipeal zo hi, banghang ziam cile khatvei lai a hong luangtasak tua Thukham ih thi san zo hi. A ki at thukham ngeina lui bangin na ih seam nawn bua a, Thaa ii ngeina thak bangin ih seam hi." 
Romans7:7 Tua ahile bang ih ci tu ziam? Thukham mama pha ngawl hi ih ci tu ziam? Hi ngawl het hi! Thukham in mawna a ci sia hong hesak hi zaw hi. Thukham in, “Ngual khat ii neisa na dungawk heak vun,” ci buale dungawk ci sia bang ziam ci in ka he buatu hi." 
Romans7:8 Thupiakna ii sawl hu in mawna in ka sungah dungawk nopna tuatuam hong piansak natu hunpha nga hi. Thukham om ngawlna munah mawna sia a thi ahi hi. 
Romans7:9 Keima ma zongh khatvei lai in thukham ngawl taw ka nungta ngei hi; ahihang thupiakna a om hunlam ka heak tak ciangin, maw nopna hong thahat a," 
Romans7:10 tuaciang kei ka thi hi. Tuasia ciangin nuntakna a piangsak tu thupiak sia kei atu thina ahi hi. 
Romans7:11 Mawna in hunpha nga in thupiakna tungtawnin na hong seam a, kei hong theam in hong thatlum hi." 
Romans7:12 Tua ahikom Thukham in thiangtho a, thupiakna zongh thiangtho in pha a, tang hi." 
Romans7:13 Tua ahile hi bangin a pha thu khat in, kei thina hong piangsak hi ci tu hi ziam? Hi ngawl hi! Hong thisak sia in mawna hi, mawna in a pianzia tatak sia a kilangh natu in a pha khat hong zangh a, kei tungah thina hong piangsak ahi hi. Tua ahikom thupiakna a om hu in mawna ii a lauhuai a phat ngawlna kician seseam hi." 
Romans7:14 Thukham sia thaa taw kisai hi ci in ih he hi; ahihang keima in a thithei mihing hi a, mawna sungah sila bangin a kizuak sa ka hi hi." 
Romans7:15 Ka sep ka vawt sia bang ziam ci in ka tel bua hi; banghang ziam cile ka vawt nopte ka vawt bua a, ka vawt nop ngawl teng ka vawt hi." 
Romans7:16 Ka vawt nop ngawlte ka vawt ciangin, Thukham sia maan hi ci in ka thukimpuina hong kilangh hi." 
Romans7:17 Tua ahikom hite a vawt sia in kei tatak ka hi bua hi; ka sung a teang mawna sia ahi hi. 
Romans7:18 Mihing ka hina sungah — a pha bangma om ngawl hi ci in ka he hi. Banghang ziam cile a pha vawt nopna ka sungah a om bel hangin ka vawt thei bua hi. 
Romans7:19 A pha ka vawt nopte ka vawt bua a, ka vawt nop ngawl a siate ka vawt zaw hi." 
Romans7:20 Ka vawt nop ngawlte ka vawt le tuabangin a vawt sia kei ka hi bua hi. Ka sung a teang mawna in vawt ahi hi. 
Romans7:21 Tua ahikom ngeina khat om hi ci in ka phawk hi. A pha khat ka vawt nop ciangin, a sia vawt tu bek teal theina ka nei hi." 
Romans7:22 Ka sungah a nungta sia in Pathian thukham diksa hi. 
Romans7:23 Ahihang ka pumpi sungah ngeina dangkhat in na hong seam hi — ka thinsung ii dik a sak ngeina sia a langpan ngeina khat sia ahi hi. Ka pumpi sung a na hong seam mawna taw kisai thukham ii thongtaakpa hong suaksak hi. 
Romans7:24 Bangza in a thinngim mihing khi ziam! Thina sung hong zotpui hi pumpi panin akua in hong suatak tu ziam? 
Romans7:25 Ih Topa Jesus tungtawnin hong suaktasak Pathian tungah lungdamko tawng! Tua ahikom ka dinmun sia hi bang hi: keima hantang in ci leang Pathian thukham sia ka thinsung bek in zui zo a, ka mihing pianzia ahile mawna ngeinate zui hi." 
Romans8:1 Tu in Christ taw pumkhat in a nungtate atu in kipuavawkna a om bua hi. 
Romans8:2 Banghang ziam cile Jesus Christ taw kop a nuntakna sungah hong then thaa ngeina in mawna le thina ngeinate panin hong suaktasak hi. 
Romans8:3 Mihing thaneamna hu a Thukham ii vawt zawk ngawlte Pathian in vawt zo hi. Ama in mihing pianzia sungah mawna a bo cimitsak natu in mihingte mawna pianzia teng ma hong keng a, ama Tapa sia mawna kitat natu in hong pia hi." 
Romans8:4 Pathian ii hi bangin a sepna in ei, mihing pianzia bangin nungta ngawl a, Thaa ngeina bangin a nungtate in Thukham ii thutang sua natu a deina sia a khuangkhim natu in seam ahi hi." 
Romans8:5 Mihing pianzia bangin a nungtate thinsung sia cii le sa deina in uk hi. Thaa ii sawl bangin a nungtate thinsung sia Thaa ii deina in uk hi. 
Romans8:6 Mihing pianzia in na uksak uh le thina piang a; Thaa in na uksak uh le, nuntakna le thinnopna piang hi." 
Romans8:7 Tua ahiciang mihing khat sia mihing pianzia in a uk le Pathian ngal suak hi; banghang ziam cile ama in Pathian thukham ni ngawl hi, a tatakin ni thei ngawl hi." 
Romans8:8 Mihing pianzia a zuite in Pathian a lungdamsak thei bua hi. 
Romans8:9 Ahihang note in mihing pianzia ii hong sawl bangin na nungta bua uh hi; Pathian Thaa note sungah hong nungta takpi ma ahi nale — Thaa ii sawl bangin na nungta uh hi. A kuama po Christ ii Thaa a nei ngawl sia in, Christ ii neisa ahi bua hi." 
Romans8:10 Ahihang Christ note sungah hong teang le Thaa sia no atu in nuntakna ahi hi, banghang ziam cile na pumpi uh mawna hangin thi tu ahitazong note Pathian taw hong kilemzawngsak hi." 
Romans8:11 Jesus thina pan a thosak kik Pathian Thaa note sungah hong teang le thina pan Christ a tho kiksak pa in, a Thaa note sungah a om hu in a thithei na pumpi uh nuntakna hong pia tu hi." 
Romans8:12 Tua ahikom ka suapuite awng, mihing pianzia ii deina bangin ih nuntak ngawl natu in zui tu vaipuak ih nei hi." 
Romans8:13 Banghang ziam cile mihing pianzia bangin na nungta uh le na thi takpi tu uh hi; ahihang mawna ngamtatnate Thaa taw na thatlum uh le na nungta tu uh hi. 
Romans8:14 Pathian Thaa ii lampuina a nga mihing peuma Pathian ii tate ahi uh hi. 
Romans8:15 Banghang ziam cile Pathian hong piak Thaa in nang sia sila hong suaksak ngawl a, hong kiitasak ngawl hi; tua hizaw ngawlin, Thaa in Pathian ii tate hong suaksak a, Thaa vaangletna taw eite in Pathian tungah “Pa awng, ka Pa awng!” ih ci thei hi." 
Romans8:16 Pathian Thaa in eima thaa taw kikopin, Pathian ii tate ih hina tetti in hong pang khawm hi." 
Romans8:17 A tate ih hi zawk nungsang a mite atu a khealsia thuphate ih lua tu a, Christ atu a Pathian ii a koi nate zongh ih lua tu hi; banghang ziam cile Christ ii thuakna ih thuakpui le a minthanna zongh ih lua tu hi." 
Romans8:18 Tu hun a ih thuakte in hong kilangh pheang tu, a minthanna taw kiteengat thei ngawl hi." 
Romans8:19 A kibitphua sa theampo in Pathian ii tate sia akua bang teng hi tu ziam ci in hong kilaak tu kaal ngakla in om uh hi. 
Romans8:20 Banghang ziam cile bitphua sate sia amate ii tupna le sawmnate a taan natu in, amate ii uuk thu hi ngawlin Pathian ii deina taw puavawkna a thuak uh hi. Ahitazong lametna om lai hi," 
Romans8:21 bitphua sate in ni khat ni ciangin a muatcip theina sungah sila a tanna sung panin kisuaktasak tu a Pathian ii tate in suatak minthanna nga khawm tu uh hi. 
Romans8:22 Banghang ziam cile nausuak tun a nat bangin tu hun dong ma bitphuasa theampo in na a sakna taw tau in om hi ci ih he hi. 
Romans8:23 Ahihang bitphua sate bek hi ngawlin Pathian ii a leap a letsong hong piak ahi ei Thaa a neite zongh in, Pathian ii tate hong suaksak a, ih nuntakna buppi hong suataksak tu ngakin ih sung sangah ih tau tek hi." 
Romans8:24 Banghang ziam cile eite sia lametna hangin hong hun a; ahizong ih lametna sia ih mukhol thei le tuasia in lametna kici thei ngawl tu hi. A mu, nate a muangmaw lai akua om ngei nu ziam?" 
Romans8:25 Ahihang ih mu ngawl lai khat muangmaw ih hile, thinsauna taw ih ngak hi." 
Romans8:26 Tua bangma in eite in bangza in tha zawngkhal hi ka leang, eite hong hu tu in Thaa hong pai hi. Banghang ziam cile eite in thu ih ngetzia tu ih he bua hi; kammal taw a kilo thei ngawlte tauna taw Pathian tungah Thaa in hong maangkaasak hi." 
Romans8:27 Tuaciangin mihingte thinsung a mu thei Pathian in Thaa ii khua ngaisutnate he hi; banghang ziam cile Thaa in Pathian tungah a mite atu in ama dei babangin maangkaasak hi. 
Romans8:28 Pathian ii tupna taw a sam sa ahi ama a itte atu in na theampo Pathian in a phabel in piangsak hi. 
Romans8:29 Pathian teal sate a Tapa taw a kiban natu in, doituam a, tua hu in a Tapa in unau tam mama sung panin ta upabel suaksak hi." 
Romans8:30 Tua ahikom Pathian in a tuamin a koi sate sam a, a samte thutang suaksak hi, tua thutang a suasakte ama ii minthanna hawm hi." 
Romans8:31 Hi teng zawkciangin ih son tu, bang om lai tu ziam? Pathian ei sangah hong pang le akua in eite hong langpan thei tu ziam?" 
Romans8:32 Pathian in hong langpan ngawl het tu hi. Ama in a Tapa takpi khoaikhe ngawlin, ei atu in hong pia hi! A Tapa ngawngawn hong pia ahile — na theampo a thongin hong pia ngawl tu ziam?" 
Romans8:33 Pathian tealsa mihingte tungah akua in, mawna zong thei tu ziam? Pathian mama in amate mawnei ngawl a suasakte ahi hi!" 
Romans8:34 Tua ahile amate akua in maw pusak thei tu ziam? Thina thuak a, a kinungtasak kik pa, Pathianziatsang ah to a, Pathian tungah ei atu in hong ngetsakpa Christ Jesus in hong mawsak ngawl tu hi." 
Romans8:35 Tua ahile Christ ii eite hong itna panin, akua in hong khen thei tu ziam? Ngimna, haksatna, vawtsiatna, ngilkialna, zawnna, lau huaina, thinate khat pawpo in, hong khen thei tu ziam?" 
Romans8:36 Laithiangtho in hi bangin a ci bangma “Nang hu in kote thina ii lauhuaina sungah a ni bup in ka om uh hi; kote sia a kingolum tu tuute bangin hong kivawt hi,”" 
Romans8:37 Hong itpa tungtawnin eite in hi thute theampo sungah zawna kicing ih nga hi! 
Romans8:38 Banghang ziam cile ama hong itna panin, bangma in hong khen thei ngawl tu hi ci in maan takin ka mu hi: thina ahizong nuntakna ahizong, vantunglalangte ahizong, vantung ukna le thahatna nei dangte ahizong, tu hun hikale mailam hikale," 
Romans8:39 leitung a saangbelna mun ahizong, leinuai a thuk belna mun ahizong, bitphua sa a minpiang bangma in ih Topa Jesus Christ sungah ih neisa ahi Pathian hong itna taw hong khen zo a om buatu hi." 
Romans9:1 Thumaan ka son hi; Christ neisa ka hi a, ka leilot bua hi. Thaa Thiangtho ii a uk ka thinsung zongh in leilot ngawl ka hina hong telthiangsak hi." 
Romans9:2 Ka chi ka sa ahi ka mite atu in bangza in khuangai khi ziam! A kizom tan in bangza in lainat law khi ziam," 
Romans9:3 a phattuamna om tu hi thong le amate atu in Pathian haamsiatna thuak leng a, Christ taw zong kikhen law leng zong ka uk hi." 
Romans9:4 Amate in Pathian ii mihingte hi uh a; ama in amate sia a tapate suaksak in, a minthanna kilanghsak hi; amate taw kamciamna vawtin Thukham pia hi; amate in a maan biakpiakna nei uh hi; amate in Pathian kamciam saang uh hi." 
Romans9:5 Amate in khanglui Hebrew minthangte ii suan le paal te hi uh a, Christ ii mihing a hina taw amate ii minampui ahi hi. Na theampo a uk Pathian sia a tawntungin kipok tahen! Amen." 
Romans9:6 Pathian kamciam taangtung ngawl hi ci ngawl khi hi; banghang ziam cile Israel mi theampo Pathian tealsa hi siat ngawl hi. 
Romans9:7 Abraham ii suan theampo zongh Pathian ii tate hi siat ngawl hi. Pathian in Abraham tungah “Nang kong kamciamna panin na suan le na paalte Isaac tungtawnin na nei tu hi,” ci hi." 
Romans9:8 Hisia a khiakna in mihing pian ngei bangin a piang thawthongte sia Pathian ii tate hi ngawl a, Pathian kamciam panin a piangte bek a suan le a paal tatakin kingaisun hi." 
Romans9:9 Banghang ziam cile Pathian kamciam sia, hi kammalte bangin kipia hi. “A hun ciangin kong pai kik tu a, Sarah in tapa khat hing tu hi.”" 
Romans9:10 Hisia bek hi ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile Rebecca in ih pu Isaac ahi a pasal taw tapa nii nei hi." 
Romans9:11 Ahihang tapa khat tealtuam tu sia Pathian ii deina vingveng ahi natu thu huvau in, Pathian in a nu munah, “A u zaw in a nau zaw ii na sepsak tu hi,” ci hi. Ama in hi thu a pau laitakin amate ngeal sia piang ngawl lai a, a sia a pha bangma vawt a nei bualai hi. Tua ahikom Pathian tealna in ama sapna tung pan hi a, amate sepna tung pan hi ngawl hi." 
Romans9:12  
Romans9:13 Laithiangtho in, “Jacob ka it a, Esau ka ensan hi,” ci in a ki at bang ahi hi." 
Romans9:14 Tua ahile bang ih ci tu ziam? Pathian in a kilawm tu bang a thukhen ngawl hi ih ci tu ziam? Kici thei ngawl hi. 
Romans9:15 Banghang ziam cile Moses tungah, “Ka hesuak nopte ka hesuak tu a; ka mulkim nopte ka mulkim tu hi,” ci hi." 
Romans9:16 Tua ahikom mihing deina le sepna thu hi ngawlin, Pathian ii hesuakna tungah thu om zaw hi." 
Romans9:17 Banghang ziam cile Laithiangtho in Egypt kumpipa tungah a cina pan, “Hi tupna hang le ka vaangletna lak in, leitung theampo ah ka min a kiheak natu in, kumpi kong suaksak a nang kong zangh hi,” ci hi." 
Romans9:18 Tua ahikom Pathian in a hesuak nopte tungah hesuak a, thin sahna a piak nopte tungah thin sahna pia hi." 
Romans9:19 Note sung pan khat po in hong ci tu nu hi. “Hi bang ahile Pathian in mihing khat po tungah mawsakna pia thei tu ziam? Pathian ii deina akua in nial thei tu ziam? 
Romans9:20 Ahihang lawmpa awng, Pathian kam a zo kik tu in nang akua na hi ziam? Tungbeal khat in a vawtpa munah, “Banghangin kei hi bangin hong vawt ni ziam?” ci in a dongh thei bua hi." 
Romans9:21 A tatak ci leang bealte a vawtpa in tungmante a dei babangin a zak thei natu thunei a, tungman lom khat panin beal nii vawtin, khat sia hun thupi sung a zak tu, a khat sia hun thawthong sung a zak tu in vawt theina thunei hi." 
Romans9:22 Pathian nasepna zongh tuasia bangma ahi hi. Ama in a thin uukna lak nuam a, a vaangletna kihesak nuam hi. Ama a thin a uuksak, lalcipna sung a theng tu mihingte thinsauna tatak taw thuak hi." 
Romans9:23 A kicing ama ii vaangletna zongh hong pualaak nuam a, a minthanna a nga tu in hong vawt sa eite a hesuakna a saang tu mihingte tungah tua a vaangletna hong buak hi." 
Romans9:24 Banghang ziam cile eite sia Jew te sung pan bek hi ngawlin, Gentile te sung pan zong hong sap a minamte ih hi hi." 
Romans9:25 Hi thu in Hosea laibu sungah a son teng ahi hi, “Ka mihing ahi ngawlte ‘keima ii mihing’ ka ci tu hi. Ka it ngawl minamte sia ‘ka itte’ awng ka ci tu hi." 
Romans9:26 “Tuaciangin, note sia ka mihing hi ngawl nu hi,” a kicina mun mama ah amate sia a nungta Pathian ii tate kici tu hi.”" 
Romans9:27 Tuaciangin Israel mite huvau Isaiah in hi bangin ci hi: “Israel mite tuipi hui ah senvui za in a tam hial zong, amate sung panin tawm bek kingum tu hi;" 
Romans9:28 banghang ziam cile Topa in leitung bup ah hai ngawlin a vai theampo thiangsak tu hi.” 
Romans9:29 Isaiah in a masa in hi bangin ci hi. “Vaanglianbelpa Topa in suan le paal tawm hong kheetsak ngawl hi kapo le, eite Sodom bang ih hi tu a, Gomorrah bang ih suak tu hi.”" 
Romans9:30 Pathian mai ah thutang sua natu a hanciam ngeingawl Gentile te sia a upna tungtawnin thutang suak uh hi, ih ci hi;" 
Romans9:31 Tua laitakin Pathian ii mihingte in Pathian mai ah thutang suana tu in thukham khat zong uh a, a mu bua uh hi." 
Romans9:32 Banghangin mu ngawl ziam? Banghang ziam cile amate in upna bulphu ngawl a, sepna bulphu uh hi. Amate in laithiangtho sungah a kison “Lutuna Suang” tungah lutu uh hi:" 
Romans9:33 “En vun, Zion ah suang khat ka koi a, tua in mihingte lutusak hi, amate a puksak tu suangpi ahi hi. Ahihang ama a umte a thin a kiam buatu hi.”" 
Romans10:1 Suapuite awng, ka minamte ngupna a nga natu in ka thinsung theampo taw deisak in Pathian tungah thu ka ngetsak hi!" 
Romans10:2 Amate sia Pathian thu sungah a kipia mama ahi hunlam tetti ka pang hi; ahihang amate kipiakna in heakna tatak bulphu ngawl hi. 
Romans10:3 Pathian mai ah mihingte thutang a suasakzia he ngawl a, lampi tuam dang khat sial tu hanciam uh hi. Tua ahikom amate in Pathian ii mihingte thutang a suasakna sungah a ki aap bua uh hi." 
Romans10:4 Banghang ziam cile a umte theampo Pathian mai ah thutang a sua natu in Christ in thukham bosak zo hi. 
Romans10:5 Pathian tungah a thutang na sua natu in, Thukham nitna taw kisai in, Moses ii lai at in hi bang ahi hi: “Thukham sawl bangin a ngamta theampo in tua taw nungta tu hi.”" 
Romans10:6 Ahihang upna hang a Pathian mai ah thutang suana taw kisai in laithiangtho in hi bangin ci hi. “Noma le noma vantung ah akua kaato tu ziam?” ci in kidongh heak vun. (Tuasia Christ khiaksukna, a cinopna hi.)"
