Romans10:7 “Akua leinuai ah tuaksuk tu ziam?” ci in kidongh heak vun. (Tuasia in Christ thina pan a thawsak kikna, a cinopna hi.)" 
Romans10:8 Hi bangin ci zaw hi: “Pathian hong piak kammal sia na kung nai ah om a, na muk tung le na thinsung ah om hi.” — Tua in upna thu ka hil uh sia ahi hi." 
Romans10:9 “Jesus in Topa hi ci in na kam taw pualaak a, na thinsung panin, Pathian in ama sia thina pan thosak kik hi ci in na um le ngupna na nga tu hi." 
Romans10:10 Banghang ziam cile ih thinsung pan ih up ciangin thutang ih suak a, ih kam taw ih pualaak ciangin hong kingum hi." 
Romans10:11 Laithiangtho in, “A kuama theampo ama a umte in a thin a kiam buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Romans10:12 Hi thu in a kuama po huam siat hi. Banghang ziam cile Jew te le Gentile te kilaklaw ah lamdanna a om bua hi. Pathian in mihing theampo ii Topa hi a, ama tungah a ngen theampo atu in a kicing takin thupha pia hi." 
Romans10:13 Laithiangtho ci bangma in Topa tungah huna a ngen theampo kingum tu hi. 
Romans10:14 Ahihang ama a um bua uh le amate in bangbangin huna ngen thei tu ziam? A thupha puak a za bua uh le, amate in bangbangin um thei tu ziam? A thupha a kithangsak buale amate in bangbangin za thei tu ziam?" 
Romans10:15 Thuhil tute a kipaisak buale a thupha bangbangin kithangsak thei tu ziam? Laithiangtho ci bangma in, “Lungdamna thupha puak a hong paite peang sia bangza in etlawm ziam?”" 
Romans10:16 Ahihang amate theampo in Lungdamna Thupha saang thei ngawl uh hi. Isaiah mama in, “Topa awng, ko thupuakte akua in hong um ziam?” ci hi." 
Romans10:17 Tua ahikom upna in a thu zaakna pan piang a, a thu zaakna in, Christ ii thuhilna pan piang ahi hi." 
Romans10:18 Tua ahile amate in a thu za ngawl hi tu ziam?, ci in kong dongh hi. Za hi — laithiangtho in hi bangin ci hi: “Leitung theampo ah amate ii aw theng hi; Amate ii kammal leimong dong theng hi.”" 
Romans10:19 Tua ahile: Israel mite in he ngawl ziam? ci in kong dongh kik hi. Moses ama mama in hong zo phit hi: “Minam in a kisim ngeingawl mihingte in, eenna thin hong neisak tu hi. A mawmaw minam khat zanghin na thin uh kong uuksak tu hi.”" 
Romans10:20 Isaiah in hangsan seseam in hi bangin ci hi. “Hong zong ngawlte in kei hong mu hi; Hong kan ngawlte tungah ka kilak hi.” 
Romans10:21 Ahihang Israel taw kisai in ama in, “Thu ni ngawlte le hong langpante tungah nitangtum in muakin ka khut ka thaak hi,” ci hi." 
Romans11:1 Tua ahile Pathian in ama ii minamte nial hi ci tu hi ziam? Nial ngawl hi! Keima mama zongh Israel te ka hi a, Abraham suan, Benjamin nam sung a kihel khat ka hi hi." 
Romans11:2 A kipat pan a tealsa ahi a minamte Pathian in nial ngawl hi, Pathian tungah Israel te sia Elijah in mawsak a, tua Laithiangtho kammalte na heak uh ahi hi:" 
Romans11:3 “Topa awng, amate in na kamsaangte thatlumin, na biaknataute susia hi; keima bekma taanglai khi hi. Tuaciang keima ngawngawn thalup hong sawm lai hi,” ci hi." 
Romans11:4 Pathian in bangbangin zo kik ziam? “Keima atu in Baal pathian a bia ngawl mihing tulsali koi lai khi hi,” ci hi." 
Romans11:5 Tu laitakin zongh tuabang ma ahi hi. Thuthiamna taw Pathian tealsa mihing tawm om lai hi. 
Romans11:6 A tealna in ama thuthiam hu hi a, amate sepna hang hi ngawl hi. Banghang ziam cile Pathian tealna sia mihing sepna tung pan hi thong le thuthiamna ih ci sia in thuthiamna maan hi ngawl tu hi." 
Romans11:7 Tua ahile bang ih ci tu ziam? Israel mite in a zon uh sia mu ngawl hi. Pathian tealtuam mi pawlkhat in mu bek hi. A dangte ahile Pathian samna nangonthaak hi. 
Romans11:8 “Pathian in a thinsung uh le, a khua ngaisutna bulthusak hi; tuni dong mama in, amate in a mit uh taw mu thei ngawlin a bil uh taw a za thei bua uh hi,” laithiangtho in ci hi." 
Romans11:9 Tuaciang David in, “Amate in a poaipi khaamna sungah thaang kisia tahen a, kiman tahen; amate puk hen a, daan kipia tahen!" 
Romans11:10 Khua a mu thei ngawl natu in a mit uh kitawcipsak tahen a, ngimna nencipna taw a tawntungin bawngcip tahen,” ci hi." 
Romans11:11 Tua ahile Jew te a lutu uh ciangin a lalcip tu in a liik ziam? ci in kong dongh hi. Hi ngawl hi! Amate maw ahikom ngupna sia Gentile te tungah theng a Jew te ii een tu in kivawt ahi hi. 
Romans11:12 Jew te ii mawna hu in leitung bup in thupha nasia takin saang hi. Tuaciang amate ii thaa zawngkhalna hu in Gentile te thupha nasia takin kipia hi. Tua ahile Jew te sia a pawlcing in a kihuam siat ciangin thupha saanna bangza in lianzaw seseam tu ziam! 
Romans11:13 Tu in no Gentile te tungah hong son ka hi hi: Gentile te atu a sawltakpa khat ka hi laiteng in, keima nasepna sungah ka kiphasak tu hi." 
Romans11:14 Ka minampuite in eenna thin neisakin, pawlkhat beak amate ii sung pan ka suatak thei katawm maw ka ci hi." 
Romans11:15 Banghang ziam cile amate tuabangin a kinial ciangin leitung mihing dangte Pathian ngal dinmun panin, Pathian lawmte cina dinmun ah theng uh hi. Amate a kisaan ciangin bangbang hi tu ziam? A thite atu in nuntakna suak tu hi." 
Romans11:16 Anluum a kileap masa sia Pathian atu in a kipia le a anluum buppi zongh ama aa ahi hi. Thingzungte Pathian atu in a kipia le a baakte zongh ama aa ahi hi. 
Romans11:17 Inn olive baak pawlkhat kithiaktan a, ngam olive baak sia inn olive kung tungah kipee hi. No Gentile te sia tua ngam olive baakte taw na kibang uh hi, tu in Jew te ii a kho thaa nuntakna na nga uh hi." 
Romans11:18 Tua ahikom thingbaak bangin a kithiaktante sia na zawngsak bua het tu uh hi. Banghangin note kiphasak thei tu nu ziam? Note in a baak khat na hi bek uh hi. Note in a zung na vaak na taa bua uh hi — a zung in note hong vaak hi. 
Romans11:19 “Hi hi, ahihang kote om thei natu in a baakte kithiaktan hi ngawl ziam,” ci tu nu hi." 
Romans11:20 Hi hi, amate a kithiaktan sia banghang ziam cile amate in a up ngawl uh hang ahi hi. Note, tu a na dinmun uh ah na om theina in, na up uh hang ahi hi. Ahihang kiphasak heak vun; tua hi ngawlin kiitakna thin nei tavun." 
Romans11:21 A pianpui a baak ahi Jew te Pathian in dual tuan ngawl hi; no hong dual tu in na um uh ziam? 
Romans11:22 Hisia san ah Pathian in bangza in cingh a, bangza nasia takin thukhen thei ziam ci in ih mu thei hi. Ama in a puk sate tungah nasia takin thukhen hi — ahihang ama ii cikna le thiamna sungah na om uh le ama cingh hi. Tuabang na hi bua uh le, no zongh hong kithiaktan tu hi." 
Romans11:23 Tuaciang Jew te in a up thei ngawlna uh teng nusia hile, amate a om natu san ah kikoi kik tu hi; banghang ziam cile Pathian in amate koi kik thei hi." 
Romans11:24 No Gentile te ahi ngam olive thingbaak sia kithiaktan a, ngeina om ngawlin, inn olive thingkung tungah hong kipee hi. Jew te sia inn olive thingkungte taw kibang hi, tua ahikom Pathian atu in, hi a kithiaktan a baakte amate kung tek tungah a pee kik tu ol zaw lai tu hi." 
Romans11:25 Suapuite awng, thumaan thutak ahi thuku khat a om sia na heak tu uh ka dei hi. Tua in noma le noma ciim na kisakna uh hong khaam tu hi. Hi thu ahi hi. Israel mite thinpuina sia a tawntungin a om tu hi ngawl hi. Ahihang Pathian kungah Gentile mite a theng tu in a kisee za a cin dong bek hi tu hi." 
Romans11:26 Tuaciang hi thu in Israel mite theampo a kihut tu zia hi tu hi. Laithiangtho in: “Hunpa Zion panin hong pai tu a, Jacob suante tung panin ngitlona theampo heam tu hi." 
Romans11:27 Amate ii mawna ka maisak ciangin, amate taw hi thuciamna ka vawt tu hi,” ci hi." 
Romans11:28 Jew te in Lungdamna Thupha a nial uh hu in no Gentile te phattuam natu in Pathian ngalte suak uh hi. Ahihang Pathian tealna hangin a pute a pate hu in amate in, Pathian ii lawmte ahi uh hi." 
Romans11:29 Banghang ziam cile tealin thupha a piakte tungtaang ah Pathian in a thin a kheal bua hi. 
Romans11:30 No Gentile te na hi uh le a bosa hun sungah Pathian thu na ni bua uh hi; ahihang tu in Jew te thu nit ngawl hu in Pathian ii hesuakna na saang uh hi. 
Romans11:31 Tuasia bangma in, note saansa hesuakna hu in amate zongh Pathian ii hesuakna a saan thei natu, tu in Jew te in Pathian thu a ni bua uh hi." 
Romans11:32 Banghang ziam cile amate theampo tungah a hesuakna a lak natu in Pathian in mihing theampo thunit nop ngawlna ii kol a bul luangtaate suaksak siat hi. 
Romans11:33 Pathian hauna bangza in lian ziam! a ciimna le a heakna bangza in thuk ziam! Ama ii thukhensat nate akua in sontel thei tu ziam? Ama zia akua in he ziam? 
Romans11:34 Laithiangtho in: “Topa ii khua ngaisutna akua in he ziam? Akua in ama, ngaisutna pia thei ziam?" 
Romans11:35 Hong lo kik tu in akua in ama tungah bang pia ngei ziam?” ci hi. 
Romans11:36 Banghang ziam cile na theampo ama bitphua sa hi a, na theampo ama tungtawnin piang a, ama atu ahi hi. Pathian tungah minthanna a tawntungin om tahen! Amen." 
Romans12:1 Tua ahikom suapuite awng, Pathian ii a lian mama hong hesuakna hu in hi bangin note tungah kong ngen hi; noma le noma Pathian tungah a hingtang biakpiakna in kinei tavun a, ama ii dik a sak naseam tu in na ki aap tavun. Na piak tu uh biakna maan sia hisia ahi hi." 
Romans12:2 Hi leitung pianzia zil in na om heak vun a, na thinsung uh kikhealthiangna taw Pathian in na sungsang uh panin na puuathaksak sitset vun. Tua hile a pha, dik a sak kicing a sak Pathian ii deinate na he tu uh hi." 
Romans12:3 Tuaciang Pathian ii thuthiamna letsong hong piak hu in, note theampo tungah hi bangin kong ci hi: Noma le noma a kilawm za sangin a saangzaw in na kingaisun heak vun. Tua hi ngawl zaw in, na khua ngaisutna sungah na hina bangin kingaisun tavun, tuaciangin mihing sim in Pathian piak upna za taw khat tek kisitna nei tahen." 
Romans12:4 Ih pumpi sungah na tam mama om hi, tuaciang hi nate in sepna tuatuam tek nei uh hi." 
Romans12:5 Tuasia bangma in eite mihing tam ih hi hangin Christ sungah kipawlin pumkhat ih hi hi. Khat le khat pumpi sung nate bangin ih kizom hi. 
Romans12:6 Tua ahikom ih saan letsong tuatuamte Pathian ii hong piak thuthiamna taw kizui in ih zangh tu hi. Ih letsong sia Pathian thupuakte son natu ahile upna ih neiza ciaciang taw ih son tu hi. 
Romans12:7 Sepsak natu ahile zong ih sepsak tu hi. Hil natu ahile zong ih hil tu hi. 
Romans12:8 Ngual hanthot natu ahile tuabang ma in ih seam tu hi. A neisa ngual a hawmte in ngo takin hawm tu hi. Thuneina neite in nasep hanciam tahen a, ngual tungah cikna le thiamna a zanghte in maitai takin zangh tu hi." 
Romans12:9 Ki itna in thin tak ahi tu thupi hi. A sia theampo ensan vun a, a pha ci theampo keamcing tavun." 
Romans12:10 Khat le khat Tapidaw unau khat bangin ki it in, khat le khat kizatak vawt vun." 
Romans12:11 Nasep hanciam vun a, datham heak vun. Thinsung bup kipiakna taw Topa atu seam vun." 
Romans12:12 Na lametna in hong lungdamsak tahen a, ngim ngana sungah thinsau tavun. Tuaciang a tawntungin thungen tavun." 
Romans12:13 Na neisa uhte na suapui a cimaw na Tapidaw puite hawm vun a, khualmite zindo tavun." 
Romans12:14 Hong vawtsiate thupha a saan natu in Pathian munah thungetsak vun — hi hi, Pathian in haamsiat ngawlin thupha a piak natu ngen vun." 
Romans12:15 A lungdamte taw na lungdam khawm vun a, a kapte taw na kap khawm vun." 
Romans12:16 A kuama theampo atu a kibangin thinbotna na nei vun. Kiphasak heak vun a, nasep a niamte zongh seam thada heak vun. Noma le noma ciim kisa heak vun." 
Romans12:17 A sia in hong vawt a om le a sia taw thuk heak vun. Mihing theampo ii pha hi ci in a ngaisutte sep tu hanciam vun. 
Romans12:18 Mihing theampo taw kilem a na nuntak thei natu in, noma sang panin na vawt thei theampo na vawt vun." 
Romans12:19 Lawmte awng, phu kilam heak vun. Pathian thin uukna ii a sep tu in koi zaw vun. Banghang ziam cile laithiangtho in, “Phu ka lam tu a, ka thuk kik tu hi, Topa in ci hi,” ci hi." 
Romans12:20 Laithiangtho ii ci bangma in phulam luangin, “Na ngalpa a ngil a kial le an na vaak in, a dang a ko le a dawn tu khat na pia in, banghang ziam cile hi bangin na sep hu in, a maizumna in meikaang bangin kaangh tu hi.”" 
Romans12:21 Siatna in zosak heak vun; siatna sia phatna taw na zozaw vun. 
Romans13:1 Mihing khat simin ngam uk thuneite thu na ni vun, banghang ziam cile Pathian oai ngawl po kuama in thuneina nei thei ngawl hi, tua thuneite sia amate sepna san tek ah Pathian ii a koi ahi hi." 
Romans13:2 A seam nginge lai thuneite a nalh sia in Pathian thupiak nalh suak hi; tuabangte in amate le amate tungah thukhenna a tungsak suak hi. 
Romans13:3 Banghang ziam cile ngamukte sia mihing phate ii kiitak tu hi ngawl a, mihing ngilote ih kiitak tu hi bek hi. Thuneipa kiita ngawlin na om nuam ziam? Tua ahile na pha khat seam in, ama in hong pok tu hi," 
Romans13:4 banghang ziam cile amate in Pathian naseam hi a, nangma phattuam natu in naseam hi. Ahihang ngitlona na vawt le lauthawng in, banghang ziam cile ama in daan piak theina vaang nei tatak hi. Amate sia Pathian naseam hi a, mihing ngilote tungah Pathian daan tungsak hi." 
Romans13:5 Hi thu hu in thuneite thu na ni tavun — Pathian ii daan hong piak thei hang bek zongh hi ngawlin noma in khentel theina thin na nei uh hang zongh hi tahen. 
Romans13:6 Hi thu hu in shia na pia vun, banghang ziam cile, tua thuneite in a kicing takin a sep uh ciangin, amate in Pathian atu seam a suak uh hi." 
Romans13:7 Amate tungah na batte uh na lo vun, nangma pumpi tung pan ahizong na neisa tung pan ahizong shia cite peuma na pia vun, zatak tute na zakta vun a, upat tute na upat vun." 
Romans13:8 Ki itna khat simngawl kuama tungah leei na ba heak vun. Hi bangin a ngamta te Thukham zui ahi hi. 
Romans13:9 Thupiak sungah, “Na kipalngul heak vun; mihing na that heak vun; na nguta heak vun; midangte neisa dungawk thin na nei heak vun,” hite theampo le a dangte sia, “Na innpaamte nangma na ki it bangin na it in,” ci thukham in huam siat hi." 
Romans13:10 Ki itna in a innpaamte tungah, a ngamta khial ngei buatu hi; tua ahikom ki itna in Thukham buppi nitna ahi hi." 
Romans13:11 Hisia na vawt uh kul hi, banghang ziam cile, na mutna uh panin, na khanlaw natu a hun cing zo hi, ci in na he uh hi. Ih upciil lai sangin tu in ih kingup natu naizaw zo hi." 
Romans13:12 Zan hun bo dek zo a, sun hun hong theng dektak zo hi. Khuazing taw a kisai nate ih sepna panin tawp tawng; khuavak sungah kidona ngalvanhte zamh tawng." 
Romans13:13 Sun khuavak sungah a teangte bangin, eite a kilawmin ih ngamta tu hi — Lawplaina, zukhamna, a maizumhuai ngamtatna, kihauna tua ahibuale ki eennate ih vawt buatu hi." 
Romans13:14 Tuate taangin Topa Jesus Christ ngalhiamte zamhin, cii le sa deina a lungkimsak thei lungngulnate na kheal tavun." 
Romans14:1 Note sungah upna zawngkhalte na saang vun. Ahihang amate ii aituam ngaisutnate tungtaang ah na kinial heak vun. 
Romans14:2 Mihing khat in a upna hu in, neak thei theampo a ne hi, ahihang upna zawngkhal khat in nga le tee bek ne hi." 
Romans14:3 Neak thei theampo a nepa in, tuabangin a ne ngawl pa zawngsak heak hen; tuabang ma in nga le tee te bek a nepa in a sik theampo a nepa sit heak hen, banghang ziam cile Pathian in ama zongh saang zo hi." 
Romans14:4 Ngualdang khat ii naseamte a sit tu in nang in bang thu nei ni ziam? Amate nasepna a zaw le a lel huvau a sit tu in a Topa om hi. Amate in zo tu hi, banghang ziam cile Topa in amate zosak tu hi." 
Romans14:5 Mihing khat in ni tuam khat sia a dang nite sangin thupi zaw in ngaisun hi, tua laitakin mihing dang khat in ni theampo a kibangin ngaisun hi. Amate khat simin a thinsung uh khensat tahen." 
Romans14:6 Ni tuam khat a thupi tuamin a ngaisun sia in Topa upatna taw ngaisun ahi hi; bang khat po a ne khat in Topa upatna taw ne ahi hi; banghang ziam cile ama in Pathian ii a piak an atu in lungdamko hi. Bang khat po neak tu a ten sia zongh in Topa upatna taw a ten hi a, ama zongh in Pathian tungah lungdamko hi." 
Romans14:7 Eite sungah khat zongh in ama nguak atu in a nungta ih om bua a — ama nguak atu in a thi zongh ih om bua hi. 
Romans14:8 Ih nungta le Topa atu a nungta ih hi a, ih thi le zong Topa atu a thi ih hi hi. Tua ahikom ih thi a ih nungta zong Topa ii neisa ih hi hi." 
Romans14:9 Banghang ziam cile a thite le a nungtate ii Topa ahi natu in Christ thi a nuntakna sungah tho hi. 
Romans14:10 Tua ahile note antee bek a nete in — na suapuite tungah banghangin thusit nu ziam — Banghangin no na theampo a nete in na suapuite zawngsak nu ziam? Eite theampo thusitna thuak tu in, Pathian mai ah ih ding tu hi." 
Romans14:11 Banghang ziam cile laithiangtho in, “A nungta Pathian ka hi bangma in, mihing theampo ka mai ah khupdin tu a, tuaciangin mihing theampo in kei sia Pathian ka hina pualaak tu uh hi, Topa in ci hi,” ci hi." 
Romans14:12 Tua ahikom eite khat simin ih hi babang Pathian tungah ih pualaak tu hi. 
Romans14:13 Tua ahikom khat le khat, thu ih kikhen buatu hi. Tua hi ngawl zaw in na khensat tu uh sia in hisia ahi hi. Na suapuipa lutu natu ahizong, mawna sung a pu natu ahizong bangma vawt heak vun." 
Romans14:14 Topa Jesus taw ka kikopna panin ka heak thu khat in bang ziam cile an khat pawpo in ama nguakin a nin om ngawl hi; ahihang mihing khat in an khat nin hi ci in a um le ama atu in tua an sia nin hi. 
Romans14:15 Bang khat po na neak uh sia in na suapuipa thin nop ngawlna a piangsak le ki itna taw ngamtatna hi nawn ngawl hi. Na neakna uh taw Christ ii thina taw a tat sa mihing khat na lalsak heak vun. 
Romans14:16 Pha hi ci in na ngaisutte uh na zangh khial heak vun. 
Romans14:17 Banghang ziam cile Pathian Ngam in neakna le dawnna thu hi ngawl a, Thaa Thiangtho ii piak thutang suana, thinnopna le lungdamna thu ahi hi." 
Romans14:18 A kua po ahizong hi bang a, Christ atu nasep a seamte in Pathian lungdamsak a, mihingte in lungkim pui hi." 
Romans14:19 Tua ahikom khat le khat atu in thinnopna le kithahatsak nate a piangsak nate na ngiim tawntung tu uh hi. 
Romans14:20 Anneak huvau taw Pathian nasepna lalsak heak vun. An theampo neak thei ahihang, mihing khat po mawna sungah a puksak tu an ne heak vun." 
Romans14:21 Na suapuipa a puk natu a piangsak thei sa ahizong, sapittui ahizong, ngamtatna khat pawpo ahizong, tang le uhte ngamtatna maanbel ahi hi." 
Romans14:22 Hite huvau ah na upnate in nangma le Pathian kilaklaw thu ahikom na thinsung ah keam po tavun. Maan a sakte a sep ciangin a kithasung ngawl pa sia a lungdampa ahi hi. 
Romans14:23 Ahihang ama in a neak a dawnte tungah thinnop ngawlna a nei le, tuate a neak laitak mama in, Pathian in ama mawsak hi, banghang ziam cile ama ngamtatna in upna tungah a kibulphu bua hi. Upna a kibulphu ngawl na khat pawpo in mawna ahi hi." 
Romans15:1 Upna sungah a thahat eite in, upna note vanh ngit dawnin ih hu natu ahi hi. Eima nop bek ih zong buatu hi." 
Romans15:2 Tua hi ngawlin eite khat simin ih suapuipa phattuam natu le upna sungah ih khantosak natu in, ama diksak tu in ih ngamta tu hi." 
Romans15:3 Banghang ziam cile Christ in ama ii nop a kizui bua hi. Tuabang hi ngawlin, laithiangtho ci bangin, “No hong selnote ii hong selnona sia kei tungah hong tu hi,” a ci bangin ngual atu in nungta hi." 
Romans15:4 Eite thin sauna le hanthotna tungtawn a, upna ih nei natu in, Laithiangtho sungah a ki atte theampo in eite hong hil natu a ki at ahi hi." 
Romans15:5 Thuak zawkna le hanthotna ii a naak ahi Pathian in, Jesus Christ zia na zuina uh taw note sungah tuabang khua ngaisutna hong piangsak tahen." 
Romans15:6 Note theampo in aw khat sa in, ih Topa Jesus Christ ii pa ahi Pathian na pok vun." 
Romans15:7 Pathian minthan natu in Christ ii note hong saan bangma in, note zongh khat le khat na kisaang vun." 
Romans15:8 Banghang ziam cile Pathian in thumaan a, amate ii pute pate tungah a kamciamte tungsak tu ahikom," 
Romans15:9 Gentile te ngawngawn zongh in Pathian ii hesuakna a pok thei natu in Christ in Jew te naseampa suak hi kong ci hi. Laithiangtho in, “Tua ahikom Gentile te sung pan ka lungdamna nang tungah kong ko tu a, pokna la ka sa tu hi,” ci hi." 
Romans15:10 Hi bangin ci thua hi, “Gentile te awng, Pathian ii mite taw lungdam vun!”" 
Romans15:11 A ci kikna panin, “Topa pok vun, Gentile theampo awng; Pok vun, mihing theampo awng!”" 
Romans15:12 Isaiah zongh in, “Jesse suan khat hong piang tu a; ama in Gentile te a uk tu in hong pai tu hi, tuaciangin amate in ama ii tungah, lametna nei tu hi,” ci hi." 
Romans15:13 Thaa Thiangtho thahatna taw, na lametna sungah na khanto natu in, lametna ii naak ahi Pathian in ama na upna uh hu in, lungdamna le thinnopna taw hong kidimsak tahen." 
Romans15:14 Suapuite awng, note phatna taw kidim tu in kong um a, heakna ci theampo zongh nei in, khat le khat kihil thei tawntung tu in kong um hi." 
Romans15:15 Ahihang kong phawksak ngei thute tungtawnin hi laithak sungah ka hangsan mama hi. Tuabangin ka han ngawpna in banghang ziam cile Pathian in hunpha hong pia a, Gentile te atu a diang tu in," 
Romans15:16 Jesus Christ ii naseampa hong suasak hang ahi hi. Thaa Thiangtho ii a aap Gentile te, Pathian ii saan thamman biakpiakna ahi thei natu in Pathian tung panin hong pai Lungdamna Thupha hil in thiampi khat bangin ka diang hi." 
Romans15:17 Jesus Christ taw pumkhat ka hina hangin Pathian nasep ka sepna huvau ah ka kisuangtaak thei hi. 
Romans15:18 Gentile te ii Pathian thu a nit natu lamhil tu in Christ in kei tungtawnin na hong sepna sa hang bekin hang takin ka pau ngam hi. Tua nasepna sia kammal le ngamtatna taw hong seam zo a," 
Romans15:19 nalamdang lakna le a lamdang nate ii vaangletna le Pathian Thaa ii vaangletna taw hong seam zo hi. Tua ahiciang Jerusalem pan Illyricum ah khualhaw in ka paina ah Christ huvau Lungdamna Thupha a cingin ka thangsak zo hi. 
Romans15:20 Ka tup ka sawm sia in, ngualdang khat po ii cian sa phungkawngte tungah inn a sa ka sua ngawl natu in Christ min a kiza ngeingawlna munte bek ah Lungdamna Thupha thansak tawntung tu ahi hi." 
Romans15:21 Laithiangtho zongh in, “A thu a kihil ngeingawl mite in ama a mu tu hi, tuaciangin a za ngeingawlte in a tel tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
Romans15:22 Hi bangin note kungah kong pai tu tamvei ma hong kikhak zo hi. 
Romans15:23 Ahihang tu in hi ngamkhente sungah ka nasepte ka man zo a, kum tam mama note taw kimu tu in hong pai nuam top ka hi hu in," 
Romans15:24 tu in hong pai thei tu in ka kilamen hi. Spain ngam ah ka pai lamin note taw ka kimu nuam a, tawmvei kong taam zawkciangin, tua munah ka pai natu hong hu le uhte ka uk hi." 
Romans15:25 Ahitazong, tu laitak Jerusalem ah a om Pathian mite atu seam tu in ka pai tu hi." 
Romans15:26 Banghang ziam cile Macedonia le Achaia pawlpite in Jerusalem ah Pathian mi a cimawte huna tu sum pia tu in, amate thu in khensat zo uh hi." 
Romans15:27 Hisia amate mama ii khensat ahi hi; ahihang a tatakin ci leang amate in tua mizawngte a hu tu sia a sep tu ahi hi. Jew te in thaa lam sangah thuphate Gentile te a hop bangma, Gentile te zongh in Jew te sia a leitung neisate taw a hu kik kul hi." 
Romans15:28 Hi nasep ka man zawkciang amate atu a kikhon sumte a bup in, amate tungah ka aap zawkciang Spain ngam ah ka pai tu a, ka pai lam in kong baang tu hi." 
Romans15:29 Kong pai ciangin Christ thupha a kicing taw kong pai tu sia ka he hi. 
Romans15:30 Suapuite awng, ih Topa Jesus Christ hang le, Thaa ii hong piak itna hu in, Pathian tungah kei atu in nasia takin thu nong nget pui natu in kong thuum hi." 
Romans15:31 Judea ngam thu um ngawlte khut sung pan hong kep natu le Jerusalem ah ka nasepna in Pathian ii mihingte atu a kisaang thei ahi natu in thu hong ngetsak tavun. 
Romans15:31 Judea ngam thu um ngawlte khut sung pan hong kep natu le Jerusalem ah ka nasepna in Pathian ii mihingte atu a kisaang thei ahi natu in thu hong ngetsak tavun. 
Romans15:32 Tua hi a, lungdam in note kungah kong pai tu a, Pathian ii deina ahile, thathak laakna in note kungah kong haw tu hi." 
Romans15:33 Ih thinnopna ii naak ahi, Pathian in note theampo taw hong om tahen. Amen." 
Romans16:1 Cenchreae pawlpi ah a seam ih suapuinu Phoebe sia note tungah ka pokna kam kong thaak hi. 
Romans16:2 Pathian ii mihingte ngamtat tu bangin Topa min taw ama na saang vun a, tuaciangin huna zongh note tung panin a kisap babang na pia vun; banghang ziam cile ama in mihing tam ma ii lawm pha hi a, kei atu zong lawm pha khat ahi hi." 
Romans16:3 Jesus Christ sungah ka naseppui Priscilla le Aquila tungah paupuina kam ka thaak hi; 
Romans16:4 Amate in kei atu in a nuntakna aitaa ngam hi; amate tungah ka lungdam hi — kei nguak bek zongh hi ngawlin, Gentile pawlpi mite theampo zongh a lungdam uh hi." 
Romans16:5 Amate inn ah a kikhawm pawlpi tung zongh ah paupuina kam ka thaak hi. Asia ngamkhen pan Christ a um phitbelpa, ka it ka lawm Epaenetus tung zongh ah paupuina kam ka thaak hi." 
Romans16:6 Note atu in nasia takin na a seam Mary ka paupui hi. 
Romans16:7 Ka Jew mipui, kei taw thongtaak khawm Andronicus le Junia tungah paupuina kam ka thaak hi; amate sia sawltakte in pha takin a heak uh hi a, kei sangin Tapidaw a suak masazawte ahi uh hi." 
Romans16:8 Topa kipawlna sungah ih seppui Ampliatus ka it ka lawm zongh ka paupui hi. 
Romans16:9 Christ nasepna sungah ih seppui Urbanus le Stachys ka it ka lawmte zongh ka paupui hi. 
Romans16:10 Apelles ka paupui hi, ama ii Christ tungah a thumaanna sia sit natu om ngawl hi. Aristobulus innkuanpuite tungah paupuina kam ka thaak hi." 
Romans16:11 Ka Jew mipui Herodion le Narcissus innkuanpuite sung Tapidaw suapuite ka paupui hi. 
Romans16:12 Topa nasepna sungah a seam Tryphaena le Tryphosa luangin, Topa nasepna sungah nasia takin a seam ka it ka lawm Persis ka paupui hi." 
Romans16:13 Topa nasepna sungah a kician tuamin a seam Rufus le a tapa bang tatak a hong vawt, a nu tungah paupuina kam ka thaak hi." 
Romans16:14 Ka paupuina kam Asyncritus, Phlegon, Hermes, Patrobas le Hermas le a dang amate taw a om Christ mite ka thaak hi." 
Romans16:15 Philologus le Julia, Nereus le a suapuinu le Olympas le amate taw a om Pathian mite theampo ka paupui siat hi." 
Romans16:16 Khat le khat unau ki itna taw kipaupui in na kinamh vun. Christ pawlpite theampo in no hong paupui hi. 
Romans16:17 Suapuite awng: pawl khenna piangsak a, mihingte upna a lumlette, tuaciang na saansa kihilnate a langpante encik tavun a, amate kung pan na kikeam tavun." 
Romans16:18 Banghang ziam cile tuabangin a ngamtate in ih Topa Christ atu in a seamte hi ngawl a, amate ngilpi atu in a seamte ahi uh hi. Amate in kamneal le kisialpoknate taw bangma a he ngawl mihing pawlkhat a theam uh hi." 
Romans16:19 Lungdamna thu tungah na thumaan uh sia a kuama po in hong he a, tua hu in note huvau in ka lungdam hi. A pha nate ah na ciim tavun a, a sia tungtaang ah na paubaang heak vun." 
Romans16:20 Tuaciang ih thinnopna ii naak ahi Pathian in Satan sia hai ngawlin na peang nuai ah siiktham tu hi. Ih Topa Jesus thuthiamna in note taw hong om tahen. 
Romans16:21 Ka naseppui Timothy in hong paupui hi; tuasia bangma Lucius, Jason le Sosipater, ka Jew minampuite zongh in hong paupui hi." 
Romans16:22 Hi lai a atpa keima, Tertius in Tapidaw kipaupuina lai kong thaak hi." 
Romans16:23 A inn sia pawlpi kikhopna in a kizangh ka zintunna pa Gaius zongh in hong paupui hi; khuapi sumkeampa Erastus le ih suapui Quartus in hong paupui hi. 
Romans16:24 Ih Topa Jesus Christ ii thuthiamna note theampo taw hong om tahen. 
Romans16:25 Eite in Pathian tungah minthanna pia tawng. Jesus Christ huvau Lungdamna Thupha ka hilna bang le a bosa hun sau mama sungah a kiseal thumaan thutak hong kilak bangin Ama in na upna uh sungah kip takin na din thei natu in vawt thei hi. 
Romans16:26 Tu in ahile kamsaangte lai atna sung panin tua thumaan thutak sia a kilanghtakna ah kikoi zo hi; tuaciangin a nungta tawntung Pathian sawlna taw minam theampo in um a, a nit thei natu in amate tungah kihesak zo hi." 
Romans16:27 Ciimna namcin a nei, khatbek ahi Pathian tungah Jesus Christ tungtawnin minthanna kip tawntung tahen! Amen." 
1Corinthians1:1 Pathian ii deina taw Jesus Christ sawltak tu in a kisam Paul le ih suapuipa Sosthenes in — 
1Corinthians1:2 Corinth khua ah a om Pathian ii pawlpi tung le Pathian ii mi thiangthote suak tu in a kisam sa, Jesus Christ taw kipumkhatna ah ama ii neisa a suak mi theampo, mun theampo ah amate le eite ii Topa ahi ih Topa Jesus Christ a bia mihing theampo tungah lai kong thaak hi:" 
1Corinthians1:3 Ih Pa Pathian le Topa Jesus Christ in thuthiamna le thinnopna hong pia tahen. 
1Corinthians1:4 Jesus Christ tungtawnin note a thuthiamna hong piak hu in, ka Pathian tungah note atu lungdam ka ko tawntung hi." 
1Corinthians1:5 Banghang ziam cile Christ taw na kipumkhat uh hu in, kampauna le heakna theampo pan kipan na theampo ah a hau na suak zo uh hi." 
1Corinthians1:6 Christ ii thu sia no sungah kip takin kiphut zo ahikom," 
1Corinthians1:7 ih Topa Jesus Christ hong kilangh tu ngakin na om laitakin, thupha khat beak zongh na taan bua uh hi." 
1Corinthians1:8 Topa Jesus Christ ii Ni hong thet ni ciang, na pauban ngawl natu in ama in a tawpna dong kip takin hong keam si tu hi." 
1Corinthians1:9 Eima ii Topa ahi a Tapa Jesus Christ taw kipawl khawm tu a, note hong sam Pathian sia ih muan tu Pathian ahi hi." 
1Corinthians1:10 Ih Topa Jesus Christ thuneina taw, ka suapui note theampo tungah kong maangkaa hi, note sungah kikhenna a om ngawl natu in, na ci uh po kithukim vadiam vun. Ngaisutna khat le tupna khat bek taw na kipawl siat vun." 
1Corinthians1:11 Banghang ziam cile, ka suapuite awng, note sungah kihauna om hi ci in Chloe ii innkuanpui pawlkhat in thiang takin hong son zo hi." 
1Corinthians1:12 Kong cinopna pan, note khat simin thu tuatuam son nu hi. Khat in “Kei sia Paul ii nungzui ka hi hi,” ci a; a dang khat in, “Kei sia Apollos ii nungzui ka hi hi,” ci a; a dangkhat in, “Kei sia Peter ii nungzui ka hi hi,” ci a; tuaciang a dangkhat in, “Keima sia Christ ii nungzui ka hi hi,” na ci uh hi." 
1Corinthians1:13 Christ sia pawl tuatuamin kikhentham hi! No atu in thinglamtee tungah a thi sia in Paul hina ziam? Paul nungzui tu in tui na kiphum uh ziam? 
1Corinthians1:14 Crispus le Gaius simngawl, note kuama tui kong phum ngawl hu in, Pathian tungah lungdam ka ko hi." 
1Corinthians1:15 Tua ahikom kuama in note sia kei nungzui suak tu in tui kiphum hi hong ci thei ngawl tu hi. 
1Corinthians1:16 (Oh hi peu hi, Stephanas le a innkuanpuite zongh tuiphum peu khi hi; tua ngawl po kuama dang tui ka phum le ka phum ngawl ciamtee ngawl khi hi.)" 
1Corinthians1:17 Christ in tuiphum tu in kei hong sawl bua hi. Ama in Lungdamna Thupha son tu in, hong sawl hi, tuaciang thinglamtee tungah Christ a thina ii vaangletna a bo thong ngawl natu in, mihing ciimna kam zangh ngawlin son tu in hong sawl hi." 
1Corinthians1:18 Banghang ziam cile a mangthang mihingte atu in thinglamtee tungah Christ ii thina thu sia, luithawthong thu ahi hi, ahizong ngupna a nga eite atu in Pathian ii vaangletna ahi hi." 
1Corinthians1:19 Laithiangtho in, “Mihing a ciimte ii ciimna ka lalsak tu a, pilna saang neite ii heakna sia ka hepsak tu hi,” ci hi." 
1Corinthians1:20 Tua ahile mihing ciimte, pilna saang neite, ahibuale leitung ah thu kinialna a thiamte sia bang suak tu ziam? Hi leitung ciimna sia mawmawtna hi ci in Pathian in lak zo hi!" 
1Corinthians1:21 Banghang ziam cile Pathian in ama ii ciimna hong zangh a, mihingte in amate ciimna taw Pathian a heak zawk ngawl natu in vawt hi. “Mawmawt” thu hi a ci uh kote thuhilna taw, Pathian in thu umte ngup tu in khensat zaw hi." 
1Corinthians1:22 A up thei natu in Jew te in nalamdang laknate kalhsuut uh a, tuaciang Greek te in ciimna zong uh hi." 
1Corinthians1:23 Ko ka hi uh le thinglamtee tung a kithat Christ thu ka thangsak uh a, tua thu sia Jew te atu in a maktak huai thu le Gentile te atu in a luithawthong thu ahi hi;" 
1Corinthians1:24 ahizong Pathian ii sapsa Jew te le Gentile te atu in hi thu sia Pathian ii vaangletna le Pathian ii ciimna ahi Christ ahi hi. 
1Corinthians1:25 Banghang ziam cile Pathian ii mawmawtna bang ahi sia in mihingte ciimna sangin ciimzaw a, tuaciangin Pathian ii thazawmna bang ahi sia in mihingte thahatna sangin hat zaw hi." 
1Corinthians1:26 Suapuite awng, Pathian in note hong sap laitakin, na omzia uh ngaisun vun. Mihingte hong muna ah note sungah a ciim, ahibuale a vaanglian, ahibuale a ci thei tawm bek na om uh hi." 
1Corinthians1:27 Pathian in mihing ciimte maizumsak natu in, leitung mite ii lui thawthong a sakte teal a, mihing thahatte a maizumsak natu in, leitung mite ii thazawm a sakte teal luih hi." 
1Corinthians1:28 Leitung ii thupi a sakte, a lalsak natu in leitung ii a nomu, a zawnsak le bangma in a hen ngawlte teal hi." 
1Corinthians1:29 Tua sia in, Pathian mai ah a kisathei tu kuama a om bua hi, a cinopna hi." 
1Corinthians1:30 Ahihang, Pathian in note Christ Jesus taw hong kipumkhatsak zo hi; Pathian in Christ sia eite ii ciimna suaksak zo hi. Ama hangin Pathian mai ah thutang in hong koi hi; eite Pathian ii mi thiangthote suakin, hong suaktasak hi." 
1Corinthians1:31 Tua ahiciangin laithiangtho in, “A kisuangtaak nuamte in, Topa vawtsate tungah a kisuangtaak kul tu hi,” a ci bangma ahi hi." 
1Corinthians2:1 Suapuite awng, Pathian ii a thumaan thuku hil tu in note kungah kong pai lai in kamthukte le pilna thiamna kong zangh bua hi." 
1Corinthians2:2 Banghang ziam cile note taw ka om laitakin, Jesus Christ thu, a tuanin thinglamtee tungah hong thina thute simngawl po thudang teng makngil natu ka khensat sa hi." 
1Corinthians2:3 Tua ahikom note kungah kong pai lai in, thazawmin launa taw ka liingcip a," 
1Corinthians2:4 thu kong hil ciangin mihing ciimna thiamna kammalte kong zangh bua hi, ahizong Pathian Thaa vaangletna hong lakna taw kong hil ahi hi." 
1Corinthians2:5 Tua ahikom note upna sia mihing ciimna tungah kinga ngawlin Pathian ii vaangletna tungah kinga zaw hi. 
1Corinthians2:6 Ahizongin thaa lamsang ah a khanthin sate tungah ciimna thu ka thangsak hi. Ahihang tua ciimna in hi leitung ciimna, ahibuale a bo kuan ahi, hi leitung vaangletna a nei leitung ukte ciimna ahi bua hi." 
1Corinthians2:7 Tua ka thansak ciimna thu sia mihingte ii heak ngawl tu in a kiseal Pathian ii ciimna thuku hi a, ahihang eite minthanna tu in, leitung pian ma ngawngawn in, Pathian koi sa thu ahi hi." 
1Corinthians2:8 Hi leitung a uk mihingte kuama in, hi ciimna thu a he bua uh hi. He hile, a minthang Topa sia thinglamtee tungah a thatlum buatu uh hi." 
1Corinthians2:9 Ahitazong, laithiangtho in, “Kuama ii a mu ngeingawl a zaak ngeingawl, suak thei tu in a ngaisut ngeingawl thu sia, ama a itte atu in Pathian ii a vawtkhol sa ahi hi,” a ci bangma ahi hi." 
1Corinthians2:10 Ahihang Pathian in a Thaa taw tua thuku sia eite hong telsak hi. Tua Thaa in Pathian tupnate ii a kiseal a thuthukte dong ngawngawnin na theampo a kan hi. 
1Corinthians2:11 Mihing khat ii thu theampo sia ama sungah a om a thaa bekma in he hi; tuabang ma in Pathian thu theampo zongh, Pathian Thaa bekma in he hi." 
1Corinthians2:12 Eite in hi leitung ii thaa ih saang bua hi; Pathian ii hong piaksa thu theampo ih heak thei natu in, Pathian hong puak Thaa a saangte ih hizaw hi." 
1Corinthians2:13 Tua ahikom, Thaa a neite tungah thaa taw kisai thumaan thutakte ka hil uh ciangin mihing ciimna ii hong hil kammalte ka pau bua uh a, Thaa ii hong hil kammalte ka pau uh hi." 
1Corinthians2:14 Tua Thaa a nei ngawl peuma in, Pathian Thaa kung pan hong pai thute a saang thei bua hi. Tuabang mihing khat in tua thute tel tatak ngawl hi; ama atu in tuate luithawthong thu ahi hi, banghang ziam cile thaa bulphuna taw bekin a man neina kikhentel thei ahihang hi." 
1Corinthians2:15 Tua Thaa a nei peuma in na theampo ii man neina khentel thei ahihang kuama in ama tungah thu a khen thei bua hi. 
1Corinthians2:16 Laithiangtho in, “Topa thinsung akua in he ziam? Akua in ama, ngaisutna pia thei tu ziam?” a ci bangma ahi hi. Ahizong, eite in Christ thinsung ih nei hi." 
1Corinthians3:1 Suapuite awng, a tatakin ci leang, Thaa a nei mihingte tungah ka pau bangin note tungah kong pau thei bua hi; hi leitung ii neisa, Tapidaw upna sungah patang a hite bangin note tungah kong pau kul hi." 
1Corinthians3:2 No sia noaitui bek taw kong vaak a, antak kong pia bua hi, banghang ziam cile antak ne thei tu na hi bualai uh hi. Tu ma zonghin antak a ne thei tu hi ngawl lai nu hi," 
1Corinthians3:3 banghang ziam cile note in hi leitung mihingte nuntak zia taw ma in na nungta lai uh hi. Note sungah ki eenna om a, khat le khat na kihau uh ciangin, hi thu in note leitung neisa na hi na uh le leitung om zia taw nungta na hina uh hong lak hi ngawl ziam?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Note sung pan khat in, ‘Kei Paul nung ka zui hi,’ a dang khat in, ‘Kei Apollos nung ka zui hi,’ na ci uh ciang leitung mihingte pianzia bangin a ngamta hi ngawl nu ziam?" 
1Corinthians3:5 A tatakin Apollos sia akua ziam? Tuaciang Paul sia akua ziam? Kote in note ii thu na up thei natu uh in hong lampui Pathian naseamte hi bek lel khu hi. Topa ii seam a hong sawl bangin koma khat simin a seam ka hi uh hi. 
1Corinthians3:6 Kei in thaicii ka poai a, Apollos in a kung tuibuak in, ahihang a khangtosak sia Pathian ahi hi." 
1Corinthians3:7 A poaipa le tui a buakpa sia a thupi tatak bua hi. A thupi sia in Pathian ahi hi, banghang ziam cile ama in a kung khangsak hi." 
1Corinthians3:8 A poaipa le tui a buakpa in kilamdanna nei ngawl hi; Pathian in amate sep babangin tel pia tek tu hi. 
1Corinthians3:9 Banghang ziam cile kote sia Pathian taw kipawlin naseam khawmte ka hi uh a, note in Pathian ii lo na hi uh hi. Note in Pathian inn na hi si uh hi." 
1Corinthians3:10 Pathian hong piak hesuakna thupha zangh in, inn sa thiampa ii nasep teng ka seam a, a tawdap phungkawng ka phasak hi, tuaciangin ngualdang khat in tua ii tungah sa to hi. Ahihang mihing sim in, bangbangin inn kisa ziam, ci in a kidop kul hi." 
1Corinthians3:11 Banghang ziam cile Pathian in Jesus Christ sia khat bek ahi tawdap phungkawng tu in pha zo a, a dang tawdap phungkawng a kipha thei nawn buatu hi." 
1Corinthians3:12 Pawlkhatte in khamh, ahibuale ngunn, ahibuale suangmanpha sia phungkawng tungah inn sakna in zangh tu hi; a dangte in thing, ahibuale lopa, ahibuale taangphaw zangh tu uh hi." 
1Corinthians3:13 Tuaciang mihing khat sim ii nasepna a phat le a phat ngawl sia Christ Ni in a pholaak ciangin kimu tu hi. Banghang ziam cile tua Ni in meikuang in mihing sim ii nasepna kilanghsak tu hi; meikuang in tua nasepnate sittel tu a, a phatna le a siatna lak thiang tu hi." 
1Corinthians3:14 Phungkawng tungah a kisa sia meikuang in a kaanghsak zo buale, inn sapa in tel nga tu hi." 
1Corinthians3:15 Ahihang khat po ii nasepna sia a kaanghtum le, a nasep teng sumh tu hi; ahihang ama ahile kaanghmei sung pan a suakta khat bangin ngupna nga tu hi." 
1Corinthians3:16 Note in Pathian biakinn na hi uh a, no sungah Pathian Thaa hong teang nginge ahi sia na he takpi uh hi!" 
1Corinthians3:17 Tua ahikom khat po in Pathian biakinn a susia le, Pathian in ama susia tu hi. Banghang ziam cile Pathian biakinn sia thiangtho a, note mama in ama biakinn na hi uh hi." 
1Corinthians3:18 Kuama in ama le ama kitheam heak hen. Note sungah khat po in ama le ama sia, leitung paizia taw etna in, ciim a kisa le a ciim takpi ahi natu in a mawmawt phot kul tu hi." 
1Corinthians3:19 Banghang ziam cile hi leitung ii ciimna hi ci in a ngaisutte sia Pathian muna ah luithawthong ahi hi. Laithiangtho in, “Pathian in a ciimte sia amate pilna thaang sungah man hi,” ci hi;" 
1Corinthians3:20 tuaciang Laithiangtho dangkhat in, “Topa in a ciimte ngaisutna sia mannung ngawl hi, ci in he hi,” ci hi." 
1Corinthians3:21 Tua ahikom kuama in mihingte vawt thei thute sungah kisuangtaak heak hen. A tatakin na theampo note neisa ahi hi: 
1Corinthians3:22 Paul, Apollos le Peter; hi leitung, nuntakna le thina, tu hun le maisang hun — hite theampo noma aa ahi hi," 
1Corinthians3:23 tuaciangin note sia Christ neisa na hi uh a, Christ sia Pathian neisa ahi hi." 
1Corinthians4:1 Kote sia Pathian thumaan thukute a keamcing tu a, hong kikoi Christ ii naseamte hi ci in nong ngaisut tu uh ahi hi." 
1Corinthians4:2 Tuabang naseam khat ii a taangsap thu sia a topa tungah a thumaan tu bek ahi hi. 
1Corinthians4:3 Tu in kei tungah note na hi uh zong, mihing muna bang ahizong thu nong khen uh hang ka awlmaw bua hi; keima le keima zongh thu ka kikhen bua hi." 
1Corinthians4:4 Kithasunna ka nei bua hi, ahihang tuasia in mawnei ngawl tatak hi ci na ahi bua hi. Kei tungah thu hong khen sia in Topa ahi hi." 
1Corinthians4:5 Tua ahikom note in a hun tatak hong thet ma in kuama tungah thu na khen heak vun. Thukhenna a khakbel sia in Topa hong pai dong a ngak kul tu hi; ama in khuazing sungah a om thukute, khuavak sungah kilanghsak tu a, tuaciang mihingte thinsung ah a kiseal tupnate a pholaak tu hi. Tuaciang mihing sim in ama taw kilawm Pathian ii pokna nga tu hi." 
1Corinthians4:6 Tua ahiciang, suapuite awng, “Ngeina maante na zui vun,” a ci kam tepteena sia ii a cinopna na heak thei natu uh in hi teng theampo sia Apollos le keima tungah ka sin zo uh a, koma nii sia ettee tu lim bangin ka kizangh uh hi. Note in mihing khat pawpo kiphatsak pui in, midang khat pawpo zawngsak heak vun." 
1Corinthians4:7 Akua in note ngualdangte sangin a thupizaw in hong piangsak ziam? Na neisa uh theampo Pathian hong piaksa hi ngawl ziam? Tua ahile pha hi, na neisa uhte sia letsong ahi ngawl bang phetin, bangbangin kiphatsak pui thei tu nu ziam?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Na kisap uh theampo nei zo nu ziam? A hau sa hi zo nu ziam? Ko zongh kumpi suak ngawl lai a, no kumpipate suak zo nu ziam? Pha hi, kote noma taw kumpipate ka sua khop thei natu in kumpi suak takpi le uhte kong oai hi." 
1Corinthians4:9 Ko sawltakte sia vantunglalangte le mihing nam bup ii a et tu in mihon mai ah thidaan thuak tu mite bangin Pathian in a tawp khakna mun ma ah hong koi taw kibang ka sa hi. 
1Corinthians4:10 Christ atu in kote a mawmaw ka suak uh a, ahihang note in Christ taw na kipumkhatna uh hu in, mihing ciimte na hi uh hi! Kote ka tha uh zawm a, ahihang note sia na hat uh hi: Kote hong kizawngsak ahihang note hong kizatak vawt hi!" 
1Corinthians4:11 Hi hun dong mama in kote ngilkial dangtaak in ka om uh hi; puansia ngapkaai ka sil uh a; kote hong kisaat hi; mun khat pan mun khat ah ka vak kawkoai uh hi; 
1Corinthians4:12 nasep haksate ka sep uh manin ka zawm dikdek uh hi. Hong kitomlaw ciangin thupha ka pia uh hi; hong kivawtsiat ciangin ka thuak uh hi; 
1Corinthians4:13 hong kilan ciangin kamthiam taw ka zo kik uh hi. Kote in hi leitung ninteakte bang ka hi lel uh a; tu hun dong mama in, ko sia leitung mihing nilnamte ka hi uh hi!" 
1Corinthians4:14 Hisia note tungah kong atna in, no hong maizumsak nuam hi ngawlin, keima ii ka it ka tate bang a, kong pau nop hang ahi hi." 
1Corinthians4:15 Banghang ziam cile, na Tapidaw nuntakna sungah hong keam hong en tu 10,000 na nei hial uh zong pa khat bek na nei uh hi. Banghang ziam cile Christ taw kipumkhat in na nuntakna sungah Lungdamna Thupha note tungah kong puak hu in note ii pa ka suak zo hi." 
1Corinthians4:16 Tua ahiciang keima ettee in nong zui tu uh kong dei hi. 
1Corinthians4:17 Hi thu hu in, Tapidaw nuntakna sungah ka it a thumaan ka tapa Timothy kong paisak hi. Christ Jesus taw kipumkhat a, nuntakna thak sungah ka zui thubulphute le, mun theampo ah a om pawlpi teng tungah ka hil thu sia ama in hong phawksak tu hi." 
1Corinthians4:18 Keima sia note kungah hong haw ngawl tu hi ci in nong ngaisut uh hu in, mihing pawlkhat kiphasak zo uh hi." 
1Corinthians4:19 Ahizong Topa deina a om le, note kungah hong pai pal tu khi hi, tuasia ciang, hi mihing kiphasakte in a kam teng bek hi ngawl a, bangza vaangletna nei ziam, ci sia keima tatak ma in ka mu tu hi." 
1Corinthians4:20 Banghang ziam cile Pathian Ngam in kammal taw hi ngawlin vaangletna taw kip hi. 
1Corinthians4:21 Ciang uai taw kong pai tu ahibuale ki itna le cikna taw kong pai tu a koisia deizaw nu ziam? 
1Corinthians5:1 Tu in, Pathian he ngawlte sung zongh ah a om ngeingawl, a patau huai numei le pa paktatna note sungah om hi, ci in kison takpi hi. Pasal khat sia a nu kik taw lumkhawm hi, ci in hong kison hi!" 
1Corinthians5:2 Tua ahile bangbangin kiphasak thei tu nu ziam? Tua ci thada, na khuangai mama natu uh hi a, tuabang a ngamta pasal sia zongh no kipawlna sung panin na hawlkhiat tu uh ahi hi." 
1Corinthians5:3 Ka pumpi sia note taw kikhuala hi kaleng, ka thaa sia note taw omkhawm nginge hi. Note taw keima hong om khawm bang keakin, hi a patau huai mama ngamtatna a neipa tungah Topa Jesus min suangin thukhenna ka pia zo hi. Na kikhop uh ciang kei zongh ka thaa taw kong kingawm a, Topa Jesus vaangletna ei sungah a om sia taw," 
1Corinthians5:4  
1Corinthians5:5 Topa Ni ciang a thaa a suatak natu in, a pumpi Satan suksiat natu in tua pa ii pumpi Satan na aap vun." 
1Corinthians5:6 Note na kiphatsak thei natu bangma om ngawl hi! Kam teptee khat ah “Tol tawmno khat in anvuinoai bup pawmsak hi,” ci hi." 
1Corinthians5:7 Na thiantho sinsen natu in, mawna tol lui sia na lakeak vun. Tua hile tol saw ngawl anvuinoai thak bang na hi tu a, tuabang takpi ma hi ci in, kong heak bang tatak ma na hi tu uh hi. Banghang ziam cile tu in Christ, ih Paisan Poai tuuno sia sangaw biakpiakna in kinei zo ahikom, ih Paisan Poai sia a kinging sa in om zo hi." 
1Corinthians5:8 Tua ahikom ih ngitlona le mawna tol lui taw a kivawt anluum taw hi ngawlin tol saw ngawl thumaanna le thianthona anluum taw ih Paisan Poai khaam tawng. 
1Corinthians5:9 Laithak kong at sa sia sungah mihing paktatte taw na kipawl heak vun ci in kong son zo hi. 
1Corinthians5:10 Tu in doai bia a, mihing paktat a duhop, ahibuale a nguta, ahibuale milim a biate ka cinopna hi ngawl hi. Tuate pial natu sia, leitung pan na pusua siat uh kul tu hi." 
1Corinthians5:11 Thu um mi khat ka hi a ci hang a paktat, a duhop, milim bia, ngual a siatson, zukham, a nguta sia taw na kipawl heak vun, ka cinopna ahi hi. Tuabang mihing khat taw ankuang uum khawm tu in na to heak vun." 
1Corinthians5:12 A tatakin a pua a om mihingte tungah thukhen tu sia kei taw kisai ngawl hi. Pathian in amate tungah thukhen tu hi. Ahihang noma pawl sung na pawlpuite tungah thu na khen tu uh hi ngawl ziam? laithiangtho sungah, “Note sung panin a ngilo mihing pa na heam vun,” a ci bang ahi hi." 
1Corinthians5:13  
1Corinthians6:1 Mihing khat in a Tapidawpuite khat taw thu a nei ciangin, Pathian ii mihingte ii a khensak tu luangin, bangbangin Pathian he ngawl thukhenmangte mai ah pai ngam ziam?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Pathian ii mihingte in leitung ii thukhen tu ahi hunlam he ngawl nu ziam? Pha hi, leitung ii thukhen tu na hi uhle, thunote tungtaang ah thukhen zo ngawl nu ziam?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Vantunglalangte tungah thukhen tu na hi uh hunlam kihe ngawl nu ziam? Tua ahile hi nuntakna sungah thute na khen thei zaw kan tu uh hi! 
1Corinthians6:4 Tuabang thute hong piang le, pawlpi sungah dinmun a nei ngawl mihingte ii thukhen tu in paipui tu nu ziam?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Note atu in maizumhuai mama hi! Thu kinei Tapidaw puite kilaklaw ah thu a khen thei tu mihing ciim khat beak na pawl sungah om nanak tu hi. 
1Corinthians6:6 Tua hi napi in Tapidaw thunei khat in a dang khat sia thukhenzum then a, thu um ngawlte in tua thu na khensak zawpum uh hi!" 
1Corinthians6:7 Note sungah na thu kineina uh mama in na nginat ngawlna uh lak hi. Ngual in no tungah hong khial le no atu phazaw ngawl ziam? Ngual in hong suttol le no atu phazaw ngawl ziam? 
1Corinthians6:8 Tuabang hi tu kimlai, khat le khat tungah khialna na kivawt uh a, suapui tatakte ngawngawn na kisuttol uh hi!" 
1Corinthians6:9 Mihing ngilote in Pathian Ngam lua ngawl het tu ci in he nu hi. Noma le noma kitheam heak vun; mihing a paktatte le milim a biate, palngul mawna a vawtte, pa le pa, numei le numei a khialte," 
1Corinthians6:10 na ngu theite, a duhopte, zukhamte, ngual ngensia theite, ngutate, hite kuama in Pathian Ngam lua ngawl tu hi." 
1Corinthians6:11 Note pawlkhat in tuabang na ngamta ngei uh hi. Ahihang note sia mawna panin hong kithiansua zo hi; Pathian tungah hong ki aaptuam zo hi. Topa Jesus Christ le eite Pathian ii Thaa in Pathian mai ah note thutang hong suaksak zo hi. 
1Corinthians6:12 Khat po in, “Na khat pawpo ka vawt thei natu thu om hi,” ci tu hi. Hi hi; ahihang na theampo sia nang atu pha siat ngawl hi. Kei zongh na theampo ka vawt thei natu thu om hi ci thei khi hi, ahihang kei sia na khat pawpo ii sila ka kisuaksak buatu hi." 
1Corinthians6:13 Khat po in, “An sia ngilpi atu hi a, ngilpi sia an atu hi,” ci tu hi. Hi hi; ahihang tuate ngeal sia Pathian in bosak tu hi. Pumpi sia numei le pa paktatna a zak tu hi ngawl a, Topa ii na seam tu ahi hi; tuaciang Topa in pumpi sia vaakin taa hi." 
1Corinthians6:14 Pathian in Topa sia thina pan tho kiksak a, tuaciang ama ii vaangletna taw eite zongh hong tho kiksak tu hi." 
1Corinthians6:15 Na pumpite uh sia Christ' pumpi ii a khen tuatuamte ahi hunlam na he uh hi. Christ ii pumpi sungah a kihel khen khat la in pumpi zuak numei ii khen khat, suaksak tu khi ziam? Tuabang suak thei ngawl hi!" 
1Corinthians6:16 Ahibuale pumpi zuak numei taw a pumpi a ngawm sia in ama taw cii le sa in pumkhat tak khat suak ahi hunlam he ngawl na hi bua uh ziam? Laithiangtho in, “Tuate nii in pumkhat suak tu hi,” ci in thiang takin son hi." 
1Corinthians6:17 Topa taw a kingawm khat sia ahile ama taw Thaa thu sungah pumkhat suak tu hi. 
1Corinthians6:18 Paktatnate na pial vun. Mihing khat ii mawna dang khat a vawt sia in a pumpi a lalsak bua hi; ahihang numei le pa lamsang a paktatna taw a maw sia ama pumpi tungah maw ahi hi. 
1Corinthians6:19 Na pumpi uh sia Pathian hong piak, note sungah a teang Thaa Thiangtho ii biakinn ahi hunlam he ngawl nu ziam? Note pumpi sia noma neisa hi ngawl a, Pathian neisa ahi hi;" 
1Corinthians6:20 ama in note man pia a, hong leisa na hi uh hi. Tua ahikom na pumpi uh sia Pathian minthan natu in zangh tavun." 
1Corinthians7:1 Tu in, nong laithakna uh thute huvau kong son tu hi. Pasal khat sia zi nei ngawlin om le pha hi." 
1Corinthians7:2 Ahihang paktat ngamtatna tam mama ahikom, pasal khat simin zi khat a nei tu hi a, numei khat simin pasal khat a nei tu ahi hi." 
1Corinthians7:3 Pasal in a zi tungah a vaipuak zo a, zi in pasal tungah a vaipuak zo in, a kitaangsapna tetek ah kilungkimsak tu hi." 
1Corinthians7:4 Zi in ama ii pumpi a uk hi ngawl a, a pasal ii uk ahi hi; tuasia bangma in a pasal in ama ii pumpi a uk hi ngawl a, a zi ii uk ahi hi." 
1Corinthians7:5 Hun khat sung thungetna in hun na zak thei natu uh thukimna nei masa na hi bua na uh le, khat le khat na kinial heak vun; ahihang tua zawkciangin nupa ngeinate zom kik vun. Hi bangin hi le uhte pumpi kitek laakna hangin, a piang Satan ze etna na lel natu uh pan kikeam zo tu nu hi." 
1Corinthians7:6 Hi bang kong ci ciang thu hong pia hi ngawl a, a zangh nuamte zak thei hi cina ahi hi." 
1Corinthians7:7 A tatakin ci leang note theampo, keima bangin om thei le uhte kong oai zaw hi; ahitazong, mihing sim in Pathian tel ih saan tuam tek om a, khat atu in hi tel, a dang khat atu in tua tel, ci in om hi." 
1Corinthians7:8 Tu in zi le pasal nei ngawl laite le meingongte atu in keima bangin, noma nguak ma om suak le uhte phazaw hi ka ci hi." 
1Corinthians7:9 Ahihang cii le sa deina, na kitek zo bua uh le, zi le pasal nei vangiat tavun — uukna taw ommawk sangin kiteenna in phazaw hi." 
1Corinthians7:10 A kiteang sa mite atu in keima aituam thupiakna hi ngawlin, Topa thupiakna taw thu kong pia hi: zi in a pasal nusia ngawl het tu hi;" 
1Corinthians7:11 ahihang a nusia le ama nguakin tang om top tu hi, tua ahibuale a pasal taw kilem kikna vawt tu hi; tuaciang pasal khat in a zi khul thei ngawl tu hi." 
1Corinthians7:12 A dangte tungah (Topa ci hi ngawl a, keima ci hi): Christ mihing khat in thu um ngawl zi a nei a, tua nu in ama taw a teang tan tu in a thukim le, ama in a zi khul thei ngawl tu hi." 
1Corinthians7:13 Tuaciangin Tapidaw numei khat ii pasal sia thu um ngawl khat hi a, ahihang a zi taw a teang tan tu in a thukim le a zi in khul thei ngawl tu hi." 
1Corinthians7:14 Banghang ziam cile a zi taw a kingawmna hangin thu um ngawl pasal khat sia Pathian in saang thei hi, tuaciang thu um ngawl zi khat sia Tapidaw pasal khat taw a kingawm uh hu in Pathian in saang thei hi. Hi bang hi ngawl hi thong le a tate sia doai biate tanote taw kibang tu uh hi; ahihang tu a bangin, Pathian in tua tate saang thei hi." 
1Corinthians7:15 Ahizong thu um ngawl sia in, a teenpui Tapidaw sia a nusia nuam le, nusia thei hi. Tuabang thute sungah Tapidaw ahi zaw sia in, zi ahizong, pasal ahizong, ama uuk bangin ngamta thei hi. Pathian in thinnopna sungah nungta tu in nang hong sam zo hi." 
1Corinthians7:16 Tapidaw zi khat in a pasal ngupna a ngasak zawk tu le a ngasak zawk ngawl tu ahizong, Tapidaw pasal khat in a zi ngupna a ngasak zawk tu le a ngasak zawk ngawl tu sia, he natu ziam?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Note khat simin Topa ii tel hong piak bang le Pathian ii hong sap lai na om uh bangin nungta suak tavun. Hisia in pawlpi theampo tungah zui tu ka hil thu ahi hi. 
1Corinthians7:18 Vunteap ki at sa khat in Pathian sapna a saang le ama in vunteap at kitepteenate vawk tu hanciam kul ngawl hi. Vunteap a ki at ngawl khat in, Pathian sapna a saang le, vunteap at kul ngawl hi." 
1Corinthians7:19 Banghang ziam cile pasal khat vunteap at le at ngawl sia bangma thupi ngawl hi; Pathian thupiakte zui tu sia a thupi ahi hi. 
1Corinthians7:20 Pathian ii sapna a saan hun lai a, a omzia babangin, mihing khat simin om tahen." 
1Corinthians7:21 Pathian hong sam laitakin sila khat na hi ziam? Phamaw ngawl hi; ahihang a suakta khat na sua thei natu hunpha na nga le tuasia zangh in. 
1Corinthians7:22 Banghang ziam cile Topa ii a sapsa sila khat sia Topa atu a suakta ahi hi; tuasia bangma in, Christ ii a sapsa a suakta mihing khat sia Christ ii sila ahi hi." 
1Corinthians7:23 Pathian in man pia in hong leisa na hi uh hi; tua ahikom mihingte sila na suak heak vun. 
1Corinthians7:24 Ka suapuite awng, note khat simin hong kisap lai hun a na omzia uh bangin, Pathian taw kithawlin na om top tu uh ahi hi." 
1Corinthians7:25 Tu in zi nei ngawl pasal nei ngawlte huvau nong dokna taw kisai in: Topa tung panin thupiakna nga ngawl khi hi. Ahihang Topa hesuakna taw a muan taak khat bangin keima ngaisutna kong pia hi. 
1Corinthians7:26 Tu a thinngimna a om sia ngaisun leang, pa khat in ama om babangin a om po tu sia phazaw ka sa hi." 
1Corinthians7:27 Zi na nei zo ziam? Tuabang na nei zo le kikhen tu sawm heak in. Zi nei ngawl lai ni ziam? Tua ahile zi zong heak in. 
1Corinthians7:28 Ahihang zi na nei le mawna khat a vawt na hi bua hi; pasal nei ngawl numei khat in, pasal a nei le ama in mawna vawt ahi bua hi. Ahihang a kiteang mihingte ii ni simin a thuak thei ngimnate taw kipeal le uhte hong oai ka hi hi." 
1Corinthians7:29 Ka suapuite awng, ka ci nop sia in hisia ahi hi: hun tam om nawn ngawl ahiciang, tu pan kipan zi nei pasal neite in a nei ngawl bangin om tu uh hi;" 
1Corinthians7:30 a kapte, a hee ngawl bang; a nuite, a lungdam ngawl bang; na a leite, a leisa nate a nei ngawl bang," 
1Corinthians7:31 leitung thil le vanhte taw kisai in nasep neite in tuate taw hunbit a komla ngawl bangin a om uh kul tu hi. Banghang ziam cile hi leitung in tu a bang ahile, ngei kip nawn ngawl tu hi." 
1Corinthians7:32 Thinngimna pan na suatak tu sia kong deisak hi. Zi nei ngawl khat in Topa nasepna thinbot hi, banghang ziam cile ama in Topa lungkim natu hanciam hi." 
1Corinthians7:33 Ahihang zi nei khat in leitung nate thinbot hi, banghang ziam cile, a zi lungkimsak nuam hi;" 
1Corinthians7:34 tua ahikom ama sia a lang le a lang mun nii panin kikai hi. Pasal nei ngawl numei ahibuale ngaknu thiangtho khat in Topa ii nasepna thinbot hi, banghang ziam cile ama in a pumpi le a thaa kipum aap nuam hi; ahihang pasal nei numei khat in leitung nate thinbot hi, banghang ziam cile ama in a pasal lungkimsak nuam hi." 
1Corinthians7:35 Hi bang teng kong sonna in, noma kong hu nopna hang ahi hi. Note tungah kikhaatnate hong pia nuam hi ngawl khi hi. Tua hizaw ngawlin, a maan le ahi tu bangin seamin, Topa ii na, na sepna sungah kheet nei ngawlin noma le noma na kibuppiak tu ka deina ahi hi." 
1Corinthians7:36 Nupa kop tu in a kilungkim sa, a teang ngawl tu in a khensatte thu huvau: a pa sia in a teenpui buale numei tungah a kilawm bangin ngamta ngawl kisa a, tuaciangin cii le sa uukna nasia mama ahikom a kiteen ngawlin phamaw hi ci in a ngaisun kik le, ama uuk bangma in amate kiteang tahen. Hisia sungah khialna mawna om ngawl hi." 
1Corinthians7:37 Ahihang pa khat sia zawthawk thu taw hi ngawlin, kiteang ngawl tu in a thin a khensat le, tuaciang ama deina ki uk takpi zo a, a vawt tu sia khensat zo ahi nale, tua numei a teenpui buale a pha in ngamta ahi hi." 
1Corinthians7:38 Tua ahikom zi nei sia zongh thupha seam hi a, ahihang zi nei ngawl pasal sia in thupha seam zaw lai ahi hi." 
1Corinthians7:39 Pasal nei numei khat in a pasal nuntak laiteng a suakta bua hi; ahihang a pasal a thi le a teenpui nop pawpo taw a kiteen thei natu in suakta hi, ahizong Tapidaw khat ahile bek teenpui thei tu hi." 
1Corinthians7:40 Ahihang ama ii om ngei in om pole pasal a nei kik sangin a lungdam zaw tu hi. Tua in keima ngaisutna hi a, tuaciang keima zongh Pathian ii Thaa nei in ka kingaisun hi." 
1Corinthians8:1 Tu in milim biakna ah a kizangh an huvau lai nong thaak uhte kong son tu hi. Amate ci bangma in, “Eite theampo in heakna ih nei hi,” ci thu in thumaan ahi hi. Ahizong tuabang heaknate in mihing khat kisatheisak hi; ahihang itna in lemh tawto hi." 
1Corinthians8:2 A kuama po he a kisa sia in a heak tu bang tatakin he ngawl ahi hi. 
1Corinthians8:3 Ahihang Pathian a it mihing khat sia Pathian in he hi. 
1Corinthians8:4 Tua ahiciang, milim biakna in a kizangh an neakna huvau ah: milim ih ci sia a om takpi ngawl khat ii taang ahi sia ih he hi; eite in Pathian khat bek om ahi hunlam ih he hi." 
1Corinthians8:5 Vantung ah ahizong leitung ah ahizong “pathiante” a kicite a om hial zong, tuaciang “pathiante le topate” tam ma om kale zong," 
1Corinthians8:6 eite atu in Pa ahi Pathian khat bek om hi, ama sia na theampo a Bitphuapa hi a, ama atu in eite a nungta ih hi hi; tuaciangin Topa khat bek ahi Jesus Christ om a, ama tungtawnin na theampo kibitphua a, ama tungtawnin eite ih nungta hi." 
1Corinthians8:7 Ahihang hi thumaan thutak sia mihing sim in he ngawl hi. Tuni dong ma mihing pawlkhat te in milimte huvau ah kingeinasee zo a, tua a piaksa an a neak uh ciang milim khat ii neisa an ne bangin kingaisun lai uh hi; amate sia thu tel zo ngawl ahikom, tua an in amate ninsak ci in ngaisun uh hi." 
1Corinthians8:8 Ahizong an in Pathian taw kizopna phatuamsak ngawl tu hi; ih neak ngawl hang bangma ih sumh buatu a, ih neak hang zong bangma kimeet tuan ngawl tu hi." 
1Corinthians8:9 Ahizong note suakta in na ngamtatna in, upna ah a thaneam mihingte mawna sungah na puksak ngawl natu in na kidawm tavun." 
1Corinthians8:10 Sonteena in hi thu huvau ah “heakna” a ci sia a nei note ii milim biakbuk ah na anneak uh, ngaisutna thazawm mihing khat in hong mu tu ci leang; tuasia in milim biakna ah a kizangh an a neak ngam natu in thapia suak ngawl tu nu ziam?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Tua ahikom ama atu in Christ a thi, hi a thaneam na suapuipa sia nang ii “heakna” hu in lal tu hi!" 
1Corinthians8:12 Hi bangin, na Tapidaw suapuite tungah na maw uh ciang le amate ii a thazawm ngaisutna na belap uh ciangin Christ tungah a maw na tang uh hi." 
1Corinthians8:13 Tua ahikom an in ka suapuipa a khialsak le, ka suapuipa sia mawna sungah ka puksak ngawl natu in, sa ka ne kik ngei nawn buatu hi." 
1Corinthians9:1 Keima sia a suakta mihing khat hi ngawl khi ziam? Sawltakpa khat hi ngawl khi ziam? Ih Topa Jesus mu ngei hi ngawl khi ziam? Topa atu ka sepna ii a nga sia note hi ngawl nu ziam? 
1Corinthians9:2 Ngualdangte in sawltak khat bangin hong saang bua phial zong, note in nong saan tu uh ahi hi! Topa taw kipumkhat a na nuntak uh hu in, noma mama sia sawltak khat ka hina a kilakna ahi hi." 
1Corinthians9:3 Mihingte in hong sit ciang, hisia in keima le keima ka kihuukna ahi hi:" 
1Corinthians9:4 Ka nasepna hu in kei in an le tuite hong kipiak natu thu om hi ngawl ziam? 
1Corinthians9:5 Sawltak dangte, Topa suapuite le Peter ettee in, ka khualhaw ciang ka kitholpui tu Tapidaw zi khat nei thei natu thu om hi ngawl ziam?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Tua ahibuale koma kivaak natu zongin na a seam sia Barnabas le kei bek hi khu ziam? 
1Corinthians9:7 Ama ii sum zangh a, ngalkap sung a seam ngalkap om ngei na ziam? A sapithuan sung pan a piang sapitnga a ne ngawl lothopa akua om ngei ziam? Ama tuute ii noai a ne ngawl tuucingpa a om ziam?" 
1Corinthians9:8 Ni sim a ettee thei hi bangte taw keima le keima ka kidep tu kul ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile Thukham in tuabang ma in ci hi." 
1Corinthians9:9 Moses Thukham sungah, “Khuital khat an cil in na zak uh ciangin, a muk na tuamsak heak vun,” ci in ih sim hi. Tu in, Pathian in khuitalte a thinnuammaw ziam?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Ama in tuabang a ci ciang koma hong cinopna tatak hi ngawl ziam? Hi hi, tua thu in koma atu in a ki at ahi hi. Lothopa le anlapa in an a kilate hawm khawm tu ci in lametna taw diang ahi uh hi." 
1Corinthians9:11 Kote in note sungah thaa thaicii kong poai uh hi. Tuaciang note tung panin, leitung hamphatnate nga le ung tam lei tu ziam?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Ngualdangte in note tung panin, hite nga natu lametna nei thei ahile, ko in a lianzaw ngawngawn muangmaw thei ngawl tu khu ziam? Ahihang hi ka nga tuak, ka zak tuak uhte hong zangh ngeingawl khu hi. Tua hizaw ngawlin, Christ huvau Lungdamna Thupha lampi a nokkhaksak ngawl natu in haksatna theampo a thuak hi zo khu hi." 
1Corinthians9:13 Biakinn sungah naseamte in Biakinnpi panin an nga a, biaknatau tungah sangaw biakpiakna seamte in, a satel nga uh hi." 
1Corinthians9:14 Tuasia bangma lungdamna thu a hilte in, tua ii tung panin a nuntak kivaak kitaa natu nga tu ci in Topa thupiaksa ahi hi." 
1Corinthians9:15 Ahihang hi ka nga tuak, ka zak tuak uhte ka zangh ngei bua a, tu a lai kong thaakna zongh tuabangte keima atu in a la nuam ka hi bua hi. Tua sangin ka thi nuamzaw hi! Hi kisaktheinate kuama in a luithawthong thu a sua buatu hi." 
1Corinthians9:16 Lungdamna thu ka hil hu in, ka kisuantaak natu thu ka nei bua hi. Tuasia tatak ma seam tu in hong kisawl hi. Tuaciang lungdamna thu hil bua leng kei atu in bangza in lauhuai tu ziam!" 
1Corinthians9:17 Keima uuk thu in ka tealna taw ka nasep seam hi leng, thaman hong kipiak tu ka lamen tu hi; ahihang sep tu pealmaw in nei a, a seam ka hi hi, banghang ziam cile Pathian in kei hong muang a, hi vaipuak hong aap hi." 
1Corinthians9:18 Tua ahile bang thasum ka saang ziam? Lungdamna Thupha atu nasepna sungah nga tuakte la ngawl, sum la ngawlin, lungdamna thu hil theina hunpha ka nga sia in, ka noptuamna thupha ahi hi." 
1Corinthians9:19 Keima in kuama ii sila ahi ngawl, mihing suakta khat ka hi hi; ahihang mihing a tam thethei ka nga natu in ngual theampo ii sila ka kisuaksak hi." 
1Corinthians9:20 Jew te taw na ka sepkhop laitakin, amate ka nga thei natu in Jew khat taw kibangin ka nungta hi; Moses Thukham ukna nuai ah om ngawl ka hi hang, tuabang a omte ka nga thei natu in, Thukham ukna nuai ah a omte bangin ka ngamta hi." 
1Corinthians9:21 Tuasia bangma Gentile te taw na ka sepkhop ciangin, amate ka nga thei natu in, Jew Thukham puasia ah a om Gentile te khat bangin ka om hi. Hi bangin ih ci ciang, Pathian thukham ni ngawl khi hi ka cinopna hi ngawl hi; a tatak sia Christ ii Thukham nuai ah ka om hi." 
1Corinthians9:22 Upna thaneamte kawm ah ka om ciang, amate ka nga thei natu in, amate khat bangin thaneam in ka om hi. Tua ahikom ahithei tu lampi khat po taw ahizong amate pawlkhat beak ngupna a nga thei natu in, mihing theampo ii a diksak thethei tu in ka om hi." 
1Corinthians9:23 Hite theampo sia lungdamna thu hangin thupha ka hop thei natu a seam ka hi hi. 
1Corinthians9:24 Tai kidemna sungah a kihel tam mama ahihang amate sung pan a zo khat bek in zawna tel nga ahi hunlam sia na heak uh ahi hi. Tua ahikom zawna tel na nga thei natu in tai vun. 
1Corinthians9:25 A kikhomsuan ngawl paakkual lukhu khat a kikhuksak natu in, a kimai khat sim in a sinna sungah a haksa mama kitekna nuai ah kipum aap hi; ahihang eite ih hile, a tawntungin a kip tel atu in ih seam hi." 
1Corinthians9:26 Tua hu in matut natu mun khau kithungna dong ah, tang takin ka tai hi; tuasia hu ma in ngual a thong khial ngawl kithok thiampa taw ka kibang hi." 
1Corinthians9:27 Tua kidemna ah ngual thato zo kasap a kihel zo ngawl pa ka sua ngawl natu in keima le keima kithongin ka pumpi ka ngimsakin ka kitek dipdeap hi. 
1Corinthians10:1 Suapuite awng, Moses nungzui ih taanghpupite tungah bang piang ziam ci in na phawk kik natu ka dei hi. Amate a vekpi in meeikaai ii dalna nuai ah om a, San Tuipi kaantanin suakta siat uh hi." 
1Corinthians10:2 Meeikaai sung le tuipi sungah, amate teng Moses nungzui a hina uh taw ki baptize uh hi." 
1Corinthians10:3 A vekpi in thaa anluum a kibangin ne uh a," 
1Corinthians10:4 thaa tui a kibangin dawn uh hi. Amate taw a tonkhawm thaa suangpi panin tui dawn uh hi; tua suangpi sia Christ ama mama ahi hi. 
1Corinthians10:5 Tuabang ahibel hang, amate a tamzaw tungah Pathian in diksa ngawl ahikom a luanghawm uh sia sennealngam sungah kithethaang hi." 
1Corinthians10:6 Tu in hite theampo sia eite atu in, ettee tu lim hi a, amate dei bangin a sia nate ih dei ngawl natu kidopna hong piakna hi," 
1Corinthians10:7 tua bek hi ngawlin, amate pawlkhat ii milim a biak bangin, ih biak ngawl natu in kidop natu hong piak ahi hi. Laithiangtho ci bangin, “Mihingte in zuneakna le numei le pa maitatna a om poai sungah kihel uh hi”." 
1Corinthians10:8 Eite sia amate pawlkhat bangin, numei le pa paktatna a vawt uh bangin ih ngamta bua het tu hi — ni khat thu in amate mihing tulkul le tulthum pukin thi uh hi." 
1Corinthians10:9 Amate pawlkhat bangin Topa ih ze et bua het tu hi — amate ngul in tulum uh hi. 
1Corinthians10:10 Amate pawlkhat bangin ih phuntaal bua het tu hi — Thina ii Vantunglalang in amate lalcipsak hi. 
1Corinthians10:11 Hi thupiang theampo sia ngual ii ettee tu lim hi a, eite kidop thei natu in lai sungah a kiciamtee ahi hi. Banghang ziam cile leitung bo kuan hun sungah eite ih om hi." 
1Corinthians10:12 Kip takin ding a kisa pawpo in, a puk ngawl natu in kidawm tahen." 
1Corinthians10:13 Ze etna na thuaksa uh theampo sia mihingte tungah a tung bul thute ahi hi. Ahihang Pathian in a kamciam kholet hi, tuaciang ama in a kipin na om thei natu note thuak zawk ngawl tu ze etna hong thuaksak ngawl tu hi; hong kize et ciangin zongh thuak zawk thahatna hong pia tu a, na suatak natu lampi khat hong hon tu hi." 
1Corinthians10:14 Tua ahiciang ka it lawmte awng, milim biakna na pial tavun." 
1Corinthians10:15 Mihing thu tel theite tungah thuson tu bangin note tungah kong son hi; ka sonte sia noma le noma in na khensat tavun. 
1Corinthians10:16 Topa ii Zan An neakna hai hangin Pathian tungah lungdam ih ko hi; tua hai taw ih dawn ciang Christ ii chisan a siim khawmte ih hi hi. Tuaciang anluum ih balneen hi: hi a kibalneen anluum ih neak ciang, Christ ii pumpi a siim khawmte ih hi hi." 
1Corinthians10:17 Banghang ziam cile tua anluum sia khat bek hi a, ei teng tam ih hihang, anluum khat bek nekhawm tek ih hi manin eite pumkhat ih hi hi." 
1Corinthians10:18 Israel mite thu ngaisun vun; sangaw biakpiakna an a nete in, Pathian biaknatau nasepna sungah a kihel uh hi." 
1Corinthians10:19 Tua ahile milim, ahibuale milim biakna ah a kipia ante thupisak ka hi ziam?" 
1Corinthians10:20 Hi ngawl hi! Ka cinopna in doai biate ii biaknatau tungah sa ngawte sia doaite atu a kipia hi a, Pathian tungah a kipia hi ngawl hi. Tuaciang doaite taw na kipawlkhop tu ka dei bua hi." 
1Corinthians10:21 Topa hai le doaite hai pan zong, na dawnkhawm thei buatu uh hi; Topa sabuai le doaite sabuai zongh zangh khawmin an na ne thei buatu uh hi." 
1Corinthians10:22 Tua ahibuale Topa sia a eang pa suaksak nuam ih hi ziam? Ama sangin eite hat zaw kisa ih hi ziam? 
1Corinthians10:23 Amate in, “Na theampo vawt thei natu thu ih nei hi,” ci uh hi. Tua thu maan hi, ahihang na theampo pha siat ngawl hi. “Na theampo vawt thei natu thu ih nei hi,” — ahihang na theampo in hong hu thei ngawl hi." 
1Corinthians10:24 Kuama in ama phat tuam natu a et tu hi ngawlin, ngualdangte phattuam natu a et thei tu kisamh hi." 
1Corinthians10:25 Sa kizuakna munah a kizuak theampo na neak thei natu in suatakna na nei uh a, thinnopmawkna taw bangma dok kul ngawl hi." 
1Corinthians10:26 Banghang ziam cile laithiangtho in, “Leitung le a sungah a om na theampo sia Topa ii neisa ahi hi,” ci hi." 
1Corinthians10:27 Thu um ngawl khat in an ne tu in hong sam a, pai na sawm le thin nopmawkna taw bangma dongh se ngawlin na mai ah hong kilui po ne in." 
1Corinthians10:28 Ahihang khat po in, “Hi an sia milim a kipia an hi,” hong cile, tua an sia hong sonpa le ama ii thinsung ngaisutna na khualna taw ne heak vun —" 
1Corinthians10:29 tuabang ka ci ciang, noma thinsung ka cina hi ngawlin, hong sonpa thinsung ka cinopna ahi hi. Hi thu tungtaang ah khat po in, “Tua ahile pha hi, ngualdang khat ii ngaisut natu khualna in, ka uk bang ka ngamtat tu, banghangin hong kikhaktan thei tu ziam, ci thei tu hi." 
1Corinthians10:30 Ka an atu in, Pathian tungah lungdam ka ko nale, banghangin ngualdang khat in lungdam ka ko sa an huvau sia bangbangin hong sit thei tu ziam,” a ci om tu hi." 
1Corinthians10:31 Pha hi, bang pawpo na vawt zong, bang pawpo na ne na dawn zong, Pathian minthan natu in na hi vun." 
1Corinthians10:32 Jew te atu ahizong Gentile te atu ahizong, Pathian ii pawlpi atu ahizong, haksatna a piangsak ngawl nuntakzia taw nungta tavun." 
1Corinthians10:33 Keima vawt bangin vawt po vun; ka vawt theampo sungah mihing khat sim ka lungkimsak natu in ka hanciam a, amate ngupna a nga thei natu in, keima phattuam natu ngaisun ngawlin, a vekpi phattuam natu ka ngaisun hi." 
1Corinthians11:1 Christ ii zia le tong ka zui bangin, kei ii zia le tong hong zui tavun." 
1Corinthians11:2 Nong phaw tawntung uh hu le note tungah kong piak hilciannate na zui uh hu in kong pok hi. 
1Corinthians11:3 Ahihang na tel tu uh ka dei thu pan, Christ in mihing theampo tungsia ah a lianbel hi a, pasal in zi tungsia ah a lianbel hi, Pathian in Christ tungsia ah a lianbel ahi hi." 
1Corinthians11:4 Tua ahikom pasal khat in, mihon sungah a thunget ciang ahizong, Pathian thu a thansak ciang ahizong, a lu tungah khuk khat a nei le, Christ mindaisak suak hi." 
1Corinthians11:5 Tuaciang numei khat pawpo in mihon sungah thu a nget ciang ahizong, Pathian thu a thansak ciang ahizong, a lu tungah bangma a om buale, a pasal mindaisak suak a; a lu a meettol numei dangkhat taw, kilamdanna nei ngawl hi." 
1Corinthians11:6 Tua nu in a lu tungah khuk khat a nei buale, a sam zongh a meet vet tu ahi hi. Tuaciang khat in a lu a tol in meet tu ahibuale a sam a tan tu sia maizumhuai thu ahi bangma a lu tungah tuamna khat nei le pha hi." 
1Corinthians11:7 Pasal khat in a lu seal kul ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile ama in Pathian lim le vaangletnate, ama tung panin kilanghsak hi. Ahihang numei in pasal vaangletna a kilanghsak hi;" 
1Corinthians11:8 banghang ziam cile pa sia numei sung panin kibitphua ngawlin, numei sia pa sung pan kibitphua hi." 
1Corinthians11:9 Pa in numei atu kibitphua hi ngawl a, ahihang numei in pa atu in a kibitphua hi." 
1Corinthians11:10 Tua ahiciang vantunglalangte hangin, numei in a pasal ii thuneina nuai ah om hi, ci in lak natu in a lu tuamna khat nei tu hi." 
1Corinthians11:11 Ahihang Topa sung ih nuntakna ah, numei in pasal ngawl taw tuam din thei ngawl a, pasal zongh numei ngawl taw tuam din thei ngawl hi." 
1Corinthians11:12 Banghang ziam cile numei sia pasal panin a kivawt bangma in, pasal zongh numei sung pan a suak ahi hi; tuaciangin na theampo a piangsak sia Pathian ahi hi." 
1Corinthians11:13 A lu tungah bangma a om ngawl numei khat sia mihon biak piakna sungah Pathian tung thu a nget tu sia a kilawm le a kilawm ngawl noma in khensat tavun. 
1Corinthians11:14 Banghang ziam, leitung pianzia mama zongh in pasal khat sam a sau in a hoai le a maizumhuai hi a," 
1Corinthians11:15 ahihang numeite tungah tuasia in hoina khat hi ci in hong hil hi. Numei samsau sia ama a kituam natu in, a kipia ahi hi." 
1Corinthians11:16 Ahihang khat po in hi thu a nial nuam tha le, eite ih hi zong, Pathian ii pawlpite ahizong, biakpiakna ah ngeina dang kinei ngawl hi ci sia bekma son tu ka nei hi." 
1Corinthians11:17 Hi a nuai ah ngamtatzia tu hilnate sungah ahile no kong pok bua hi, banghang ziam cile biak kikhopna ah a tatakin phatna sangin siatna piang zaw hi." 
1Corinthians11:18 A masa phitbel in na kikhopna uh sungah a kilangpan pawl tuatuamte om hi ci in hong kison hi; hisia in a maan na mun om tu ka um hi. 
1Corinthians11:19 (No sungah thutangzaw sia a kimu thiang natu in kikhennate ahile a om kul hi.) 
1Corinthians11:20 A pawl in na kikhop uh ciang, na neak uh sia Topa ii Zan An hi ngawl hi." 
1Corinthians11:21 Banghang ziam cile na neak uh ciang mihing khat sim in, noma an tek ma leap papaih na hi uh kom pawlkhat sia ngilkial in na om uh a, a dang teng sia zukham in om hi." 
1Corinthians11:22 Tuabangin na neak na dawn natu uh, inn tek nei hi ngawl nu ziam? Tua ahibuale Pathian ii pawlpi zawngsakin, a nei ngawlte na maizumsak nopna uh ziam? Hi thu huvau ah bang son tu in nong muangmaw uh ziam? No hong pok tu khi ziam? Hong pok ngawl het tu khi hi!" 
1Corinthians11:23 Banghang ziam cile Topa ii hilcianna ama ii tung pan ka saante sia note tungah kong pia sawn hi: a thu in Topa Jesus a kileeheak tu nitakin, ama in anluum la a," 
1Corinthians11:24 Pathian munah lungdam a ko zawkciang anluum balneen a, “Hisia in note atu in a kipia ka pumpi ahi hi. Kei nong phawna in hi bangin vawt vun,” ci hi." 
1Corinthians11:25 Tuasia bangma zan an a neak zawkciang ama in hai la in, “Hi hai in ka chi taw a kikipsak Pathian ii thuciamna thak ahi hi. Na dawn uh simin, kei nong phawna in na dawn vun,” ci hi." 
1Corinthians11:26 Hisia ii khiakna sia, hi anluum na neak uh sim le, hi hai panin na dawn uh simin ama hong pai kik dongin, Topa ii thina thu a thangsak na hi uh hi." 
1Corinthians11:27 Hi thu taw kipee in khat po in, ama zatak ngawlna taw Topa ii anluum ne a, hai a dawn le, tua mi in Topa ii pumpi tung le a chi tungah a maw ahi hi." 
1Corinthians11:28 Tua ahikom mihing sim in, ama le ama kisittel phot tu a, tua zawkciang anluum ne in, hai panin dawn tu hi." 
1Corinthians11:29 Banghang ziam cile anluum a neak ciang le hai panin a dawn ciangin, Topa ii pumpi ii a khiakna a tel buale, a neak a dawn hu in ama le ama tungah thukhenna a tungsak suak hi." 
1Corinthians11:30 Tua hu in note sungah mihing tam mama thazawmin a ciina a, tam ma na thi zo uh hi." 
1Corinthians11:31 Eima le eima kisittel phot in hi leang, Pathian thukhenna sungah ih theng buatu hi." 
1Corinthians11:32 Ahihang eite sia leitung bup taw hong kimawsak ngawl natu in, Topa in thu hong khen a, daan hong pia ahi hi." 
1Corinthians11:33 Suapuite awng, tua ahikom, Topa ii Zan An ne tu in, na kikhoptua uh ciangin, khat le khat na kingak vun." 
1Corinthians11:34 Tuaciang na kikhop uh ciangin a ngilkial khat po a om le, Pathian ii thukhenna nuai ah na tum ngawl natu in inn ah an ne tahen. Thudangte sia, kong pai ciangin ih son tu hi." 
1Corinthians12:1 Tu in Thaa Thiangtho letsong huvau nong at uh teng kong son tu hi. Ka suapuite awng, tuate huvau thumaan thutak sia na heak tu uh ka dei hi." 
1Corinthians12:2 Pathian he ngawlte na hi uh lai in, note sia nuntakna a nei ngawl milimte biakna sungah lampialna tam mama taw hong kipaipui ahi sia na heak uh hi." 
1Corinthians12:3 Pathian Thaa ii a lampuite kuama in, “Jesus in haamsiat thuak hen,” ci thei ngawl a, tuaciang Thaa Thiangtho ii lamlakna a om ngawl po kuama in, “Jesus in Topa hi,” ci thei ngawl hi ci thu kong hesak nuam hi." 
1Corinthians12:4 Thaa Thiangtho letsongte sia a nam tuatuam om hi, ahihang a kibang Thaa khat bek in tuate pia hi." 
1Corinthians12:5 Nasepna a nam tuatuam om hi, ahihang a kibang Topa khat atu kiseam hi." 
1Corinthians12:6 Sepna sungah thiamna nam tuatuam om hi, ahihang mihing sim atu amate sepna san tek ah thiamna nam tuatuam a pia Pathian sia a kibang hi." 
1Corinthians12:7 Mihing theampo phattuam natu in mihing khat sim sungah Thaa a om hunlam a nanamin kilak hi. 
1Corinthians12:8 Thaa in mihing khat tungah ciimna taw kidim thu khat pia a, a dang khat tungah tua Thaa ma in heakna taw kidim thu khat pia hi." 
1Corinthians12:9 Tua a kibang Thaa khat sia ma in mihing khat tungah upna pia a, a dang khat tungah ciina damsak theina vaang pia hi." 
1Corinthians12:10 Thaa in khat tungah nalamdang lak theina vaang pia a; a dang khat tungah Pathian Thuhil theina letsong pia hi; tuaciang a dang khat tungah, letsongte sia Thaa Thiangtho pan hong pai ahile ahi ngawl khentel theinate pia lai hi. Khat tungah kam tumdang pau theina pia a, a dang khat tungah kam tumdangte pheen theina pia hi." 
1Corinthians12:11 Ahihang hite theampo a vawtpa in a kibang Thaa khat bek ahi hi; tuaciangin ama uuk babangin letsong tuatuam mihing khat sim tungah pia hi. 
1Corinthians12:12 Christ in khen tuatuam tam mama a nei pumpi khat taw kibang hi. Khen tuatuam nei ahihang, pumpi khat hi veve hi." 
1Corinthians12:13 Tuasia bangma in, eite theampo sia Jew te ih hizong, Gentile te ih hizong, sila le sila ngawlte ih hizong, a kibang Thaa khat in, pumpi khat sungah hong ki baptize a, tuaciangin ih dawn tu in Thaa khat sia ei theampo hong kipia zo hi." 
1Corinthians12:14 Banghang ziam cile pumpi in khen khat bek taw a kivawt bua a, khentuam tam mama taw a kivawt ahi hi." 
1Corinthians12:15 Peang in, “Kei sia khut hi ngawl ka hi ciang pumpi ii neisa ka hi bua hi,” cile zong tua in pumpi ii khen khat a hina a bosak tuan buatu hi." 
1Corinthians12:16 Tuaciangin bil in, “Kei sia mittang hi ngawl ka hi ciang, pumpi neisa ka hi bua hi,” cile zong tua in pumpi ii neisa a hina a bosak tuan buatu hi." 
1Corinthians12:17 Pumpi buppi in mittang khat hile bangbangin khua za thei tu ziam? Tuaciangin bil bek hile bangbangin a ngimnam he thei tu ziam? 
1Corinthians12:18 Ahizong Pathian in pumpi khen tuatuamte sia ama deina sasan tek ah koi hi. 
1Corinthians12:19 A buppi in a khen tuam nam khat bek hile pumpi a om buatu hi! 
1Corinthians12:20 A khentuam tam mama om ahihang pumpi khat bek om hi. 
1Corinthians12:21 Tua ahikom mittang in khut kungah, “Nang kong tulmaw bua hi!” ci thei ngawl tu hi. Lutang in peang munah, “Nang kong tulmaw bua hi!” ci thei ngawl tu hi." 
1Corinthians12:22 Tua hi ngawlin, pumpi sungah a thazawm tuak zaw pumpi khentuamte ngawl taw bangma ih vawt thei bua hi;" 
1Corinthians12:23 tuaciangin kimanna tam nei ngawlin ih hen tua khentuamte sia ih thupi vawt tu te hizaw hi; tuaciang pumpi khentuamte sungah a et hoi keak ngawlte ahile ciliapna taw a tuan in ih kep kul a," 
1Corinthians12:24 tuabang kep tuam tu sia pumpi sungah a hoi zaw khentuamte in a tulmaw bua hi. Pathian mama in ciliap tu a taangsamh khentuamte a kiciliap thei zawk natu in pumpi sia ngawmtua hi. 
1Corinthians12:25 Tuabangin pumpi sungah kikhenna a om bua hi, ahihang ama ii khen tuatuamte khat le khat kithinbotna nei uh hi." 
1Corinthians12:26 Pumpi sungah khen tuam khat in, thuakna a nei le, a dang khentuam theampo in thuakpui hi; khentuam khat a kipok le, a dang khentuam teng in lungdam pui tek hi." 
1Corinthians12:27 Note theampo in Christ ii pumpi na hi uh a, tuaciang khat sim sia tua ii khentuam khat veu ahi hi." 
1Corinthians12:28 Pawlpi sungah Pathian in a vekpi ma a om natu san tek ah koi hi: a masa phit in sawltakte, a niina ah kamsaangte, a thumna ah lai hil syate; tua zawkciangin nalamdang lakna a vawtte, tua zom ah ciidamsakna vaang a kipiate, ngual hu thei ahibuale, lamlak thiamte, tua ahibuale kam tumdang taw a paute ahi uh hi." 
1Corinthians12:29 Amate in sawltakte, kamsaangte, lai hil syate hi siat ngawl hi. Mihing khat simin nalamdang lakna vawt thei natu in vaang ahizong," 
1Corinthians12:30 ciina damsak theina ahizong, kam tumdang taw pauna le tua kamte pheen theina ahizong, vawt theina vaang a nei kim bua uh hi." 
1Corinthians12:31 Tua ahikom, letsong a thupizawte deibel in na nei tavun. Ahitazong, a vekpi sung pan a phabel sia in a nuai a bang ahi hi." 
1Corinthians13:1 Mihingte ii kampaute le vantunglalangte ii kampau ngawngawn ka pau thei hial hangin, itna ka nei buale ka paute sia zam nging daak nging bang bek ahi hi."
