1Corinthians13:2 Pathian ii hu mop thuhil theina nei a; heakna theampo le thuku theampo telna nei a, mualte khiin zawk natu a kisamh upna teng ka nei hangin — itna ka nei buale kei sia bangma ka hi bua hi." 
1Corinthians13:3 Ka neisa na theampo pia siatin, ka pumpi ngawngawn a kihallum tu dongin, ka piak hial hangin, itna ka nei buale, hite in kei atu bangma phatna hong pia bua hi." 
1Corinthians13:4 Itna in thin uai a, dik hi; itna in ki eenna nei ngawl a, kisathei ngawl, kiphasak ngawl hi;" 
1Corinthians13:5 itna in philphit ngawl, duhop ngawl, thintom ngawl hi; itna in ngual khialnate ciamtee ngawl hi." 
1Corinthians13:6 Itna in ngitlona thu ah lungdam ngawl hi, thumaan thutak ah lungdam hi." 
1Corinthians13:7 Itna in thinkiam ngeingawl a; a upna, a lametna le a thinsauna bo ngeingawl hi." 
1Corinthians13:8 Itna in a tawntungin kip hi. Kamsaannate om ahihang tawmvei atu bek ahi hi; kam tumdangte pau theina letsongte om ahihang bo tu hi; heakna letsong om ahihang bo tu hi. 
1Corinthians13:9 Banghang ziam cile eite heakna le kamsaanna letsongte sia a cingtaak hi ngawl hi; 
1Corinthians13:10 ahihang a kicing sia hong thet ciangin a cingtaak ngawl teng bo tu hi. 
1Corinthians13:11 Patang ka hi lai in ka pauna, ka phawna, ka khua ngaisutte in patang bang ahi hi; tu in pasal khat ka hi ciangin patang vai teng ka nusia hi." 
1Corinthians13:12 Tu in ih muna in, limlangh sungah a kimu thiang ngawl lim le meal bang ahi hi; tua hun ciangin maitang kisi in ih kimu tu hi. Tu a ka heak sia kicing tak ngawl lai hi; tua zawkciang Pathian in kei hong heakna bangma in, a kicingin ka he tu hi." 
1Corinthians13:13 Tu laitakin a taanglai thu thum teng sia: upna, lametna le itna hi a; hi teng sung pan a lianbel sia in itna ahi hi." 
1Corinthians14:1 Tua ahikom na hanciam tu uh sia, ki itna ahi hi. Thaa Thiangtho letsongte, a tuanin Pathian thu thansak theina letsong na lungngul vun." 
1Corinthians14:2 Kam tumdang a pau sia in ngualdang tungah pau hi ngawlin, Pathian tungah pau ahi hi, banghang ziam cile kuama in tel ngawl hi. Ama in Thaa vaangletna taw a kiseal thumaan thutakte son ahi hi." 
1Corinthians14:3 Ahihang Pathian thu a thangsakte in mihingte tungah pau hi a, amate tungah huna, hanthotna le heenepna pia ahi hi." 
1Corinthians14:4 Kam tumdang taw a paute in ama phat tuam natu bek hi a, Pathian thu a thangsakte in pawlpi bup phattuamna a pia hi." 
1Corinthians14:5 No theampo kam tumdang pau thei le uhte kong oai hi; ahizong Pathian thu thansak theina letsong nei le uhte kong oai zaw hi. Banghang ziam cile pawlpi bup in phattuamna a nga thei natu in, no sungah a khiakna a son thei pai om ahi bua nale, kam tumdang a paute sangin Pathian thu a thangsak sia in man neizaw hi." 
1Corinthians14:6 Tua ahikom ka suapuite awng, no kungah kong pai ciangin, kam tumdangin hong pau leng, note atu in ka kimanna om tu ziam? Pathian tung pan thupualaakna, heakna, thuhilna ahibuale hilcianna khat pawpo ka nei buale note atu in bekcik zongh kimanna ka nei buatu hi." 
1Corinthians14:7 Nuntakna a nei ngawl tumthei tamngai ahizong, tengtonghte ahizong la in —, a aw kitelthiang vaset in a tum buale akua in bang aw hi ci in tel thei tu ziam?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Tuaciangin ngalkap sungah lemle tumpa in, sapna aw a kitel takin, a tum buale akua ngalsim tu in kinging thei tu ziam?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Tuasia bangma in kam tumdang taw thu na sonte a thiang buale, akua in hong tel tu ziam? Na kammalte sia vui sungah bo thong tu hi!" 
1Corinthians14:10 Simleitung ah kampau nam tuatuam om hikale, tuate sung pan khiakna nei ngawl khat zongh a om bua hi." 
1Corinthians14:11 Ahihang a kipau kam sia ka tel buale, hong paupui pa sia kei atu in ngamdang mi suak a, ama mun pan zong, keima sia ngamdang mi ka suak hi." 
1Corinthians14:12 Thaa ii letsongte nga tu sia lawp na hi uh ciang, nadang theampo sangin pawlpi a khanto thei natu a hu tu in tua letsongte zak vaial tu na hanciambel vun." 
1Corinthians14:13 Kam tumdang a pau sia in ama son teng a khiakna pheen theina letsong a nga natu in, thungen nanak tahen." 
1Corinthians14:14 Banghang ziam cile kam tumdang taw thu ka nget ciangin, ka thaa taw thungen takpi ka hihang ka thungetna sungah ka ngaisutna kihel ngawl hi." 
1Corinthians14:15 Tua ahile bangbangin ngamta tu khi ziam? Ka thaa taw thu ka ngen tu hi, ahizong ka ngaisutna taw zong thu ka ngen tu hi; ka thaa taw la ka sa tu hi, ahihang ka ngaisutna taw zong lasa tu khi hi." 
1Corinthians14:16 Pathian tungah lungdam na ko ciangin thaa bek taw na ko le, kikhopna sungah a kihel mihing thawthong khat in, nang lungdamko thungetna sia “Amen” bangbangin hong ci pui thei tu ziam? Ama in nang pauna teng a tel thei natu thu om ngawl hi." 
1Corinthians14:17 Pathian tungah lungdamkona na thungetna sia pha teei ahihang ngualdang khat in phat tuamna nei ngawl het hi. 
1Corinthians14:18 No sangin kam tumdang tamzaw pau ka hikomin, Pathian ka pok hi." 
1Corinthians14:19 Ahihang pawlpi biak kikhopna sungah ngualdangte hilna tu in, kam tumdang kammal a tul simin ka pau sangin, a kitel thei kammal nga ka pau zaw tu hi." 
1Corinthians14:20 Ka suapuite awng, na khua ngaisutna uh ah, patang bang hi heak vun; siatna lam ah patang bang na hi vun, ahihang khua ngaisutna ah na khanthin vun." 
1Corinthians14:21 Laithiangtho sungah, “Kam tumdangte a pau mihingte tungtawnin, ka mihingte tungah ka pau tu hi, Topa in ci hi. Ngamdangmite kam le muk tungtawnin ka pau tu hi, tua ahitazongin ka mite in kei hong ngai buatu hi,” ci hi." 
1Corinthians14:22 Tua ahikom, kam tumdang pauna letsong sia thu um ngawlte atu in a maan lakna hi a, thu umte atu hi ngawl hi, thuhilna letsong ahile thu umte atu in a maan lakna hi a, thu um ngawlte atu hi ngawl hi." 
1Corinthians14:23 Tua ahikom pawlpi bup kikhawm hen a, tuaciangin mihing sim in, kam tumdangte taw a pau siasua laitakin — mihing thawthong pawlkhat ahizong, thu um ngawl pawlkhat ahizong hong pai le, note sia mawmaw siat hi hong ci ngawl tu ziam?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Ahihang mihing khat simin Pathian thu a son laitakin thu um ngawl pawlkhat ahizong, mihing thawthong pawlkhat ahizong hong pai le a zaak thu taw a mawna kitel tu uh hi. Ama zaakna teng taw ama tungah thu kikhen tu hi," 
1Corinthians14:25 ama ii thuku a ngaisut teng a pua ah hong kilangh tu a, ama in kunin Pathian bia in, “A maan tatakin Pathian sia hi sung, note sungah om hi!” ci in pualaak tu hi." 
1Corinthians14:26 Suapuite awng, ka ci nop sia hi teng hi. Biakpiakna nei tu in na kikhop uh ciang, mihing khat in biakna la a sak tu khat nei tu a, a dang khat in hilciannatu khat, a dangkhat in Pathian tung pan thupualaakna, a dang khat in kam tumdang taw thusonna, a dangkhat ma in thu kison teng pheen theina, nei tu hi. Na theampo sia pawlpi phattuamna ahi tu kisamh hi." 
1Corinthians14:27 Khat po in kam tumdang a pau le, nii ahibuale a tambel in thum in pau tu a, tua zom ah khat zawkciang khat in a ban in pau tu hi, tuaciangin a dangkhat in a kipau teng ii khiakna a pheen kul tu hi." 
1Corinthians14:28 Ahihang a pheen thei a om buale, kam tumdang a paute thim tahen a, ama le Pathian kilaklaw bek ah pau tahen." 
1Corinthians14:29 Pathian thupuak a sang nii le thum te in son tu a, a dangte in, a pauna teng sia a maan le a maan ngawl khensat tu hi." 
1Corinthians14:30 Ahizong kikhopna sungah a to khat po in, Pathian ii thupuakna a saang le, a pau masa sia tawlnga tu hi." 
1Corinthians14:31 Na vekpi in khat zawkciang khat in, Pathian thupuak sia thangsak thei tu nu hi, tuasia ciangin mihing sim in, heakna hong nei tu a, tha hong nga tu hi." 
1Corinthians14:32 Pathian thu thansak thei na letsong sia a pau sia ii ukna nuai ah om tu hi. 
1Corinthians14:33 Banghang ziam cile Pathian in note sia ahi bialbual tu in hong dei ngawl a, thu kihual le a kilem tu in hong dei hi. Pathian ii mihingte ii pawlpi theampo te ah a kizangh bangma in," 
1Corinthians14:34 numeite sia kikhopnate sungah thim khipkhep in om tu hi. Amate a pau tu ki oai ngawl hi; Jew te thukham ii a ci bangma in amate sia a ukte hi thei ngawl tu hi. 
1Corinthians14:35 Amate in bang khat po heak nop a nei le, inn ah a pasalte uh dongh tahen. Pawlpi sungah numeite a pau tu sia kilawm ngawl hi." 
1Corinthians14:36 Tua ahibuale Pathian kammal sia no kung panin hong pai a hi thei tu ziam?. Tua ahibuale note tung bek ah hong tung a hi ziam? 
1Corinthians14:37 Mihing khat po in ama le ama Pathian kamtaipa a kisa a, tua ahibuale thaa letsong nei a kisa le, tu a note tungah kong at teng sia Topa thupiak hi ci in tel nanak tu hi." 
1Corinthians14:38 Ahizong ama in hi thu a nadon buale ama na nadon heak vun. 
1Corinthians14:39 Tua ahikom ka suapuite awng, Pathian thuthansakna ah, na lungngul tavun a, ahizong kam tumdang paunate na khaam heak vun." 
1Corinthians14:40 Na theampo ahi tu bang le, a kiphu a kilawm bangin vawt tu ahi hi." 
1Corinthians15:1 Ka suapuite awng, na saansa uh le na upna tung kho tak na dinna uh, kong hil Lungdamna Thupha huvau tu in kong phawksak kik nuam hi." 
1Corinthians15:2 Tua lungdamna thu sia note tungah kong hil sia ahi hi. A luithawthong in a um na hi buana uh a, pha takin lungdamna thu na kholet uhle tua thupha in note hong ngum tu hi." 
1Corinthians15:3 Keima ii ka nga sa teng note tungah kong pia sawn hi, tua thu in thupibel hi: banghang ziam cile Laithiangtho ii at bangma in Christ in eite ii mawna hangin thi hi;" 
1Corinthians15:4 tuaciang ama kiphum a, ni thum zawkciangin Laithiangtho ii at bangma in nuntakna sungah kithosak hi;" 
1Corinthians15:5 ama in Peter kungah kilak a, tua zawkciang sawltak sawm le nii teng kungah kilak hi." 
1Corinthians15:6 Tua zawkciang ama sia a nungzui 500 vaalte kungah thakhatin kilak a, tuate sung pan pawlkhat thi zo ahihang a tamzaw sia nungta nginge lai hi." 
1Corinthians15:7 Tuasia zawkciang ama in James kungah kilak a, tua zawkciang sawltakte theampo kungah kilak hi." 
1Corinthians15:7 Tuasia zawkciang ama in James kungah kilak a, tua zawkciang sawltakte theampo kungah kilak hi." 
1Corinthians15:8 Keima in nau a sua tu hunin a suak ngawl khat bang ka hi tazongin — a khakbel in kei tung zongh ah hong kilak hi. 
1Corinthians15:9 Banghang ziam cile keima in sawltak sung panin a nobel ka hi a — sawltak khat ci in minpu tu zong ka kilawm bua hi, banghang ziam cile Pathian ii pawlpi ka vawtsia ngei hi." 
1Corinthians15:10 Ahihang Pathian ii thuthiamna taw keima sia hi bang ciang ka hi a, ama hong piak thuthiamna sia a luithawthong a suak bua hi. Kei sia sawltak dangte sangin, nasia zaw in na ka seam hi. Tua zongh a tatakin kei ii sep hi ngawlin kei taw a om Pathian ii thuthiamna ii a sep ahi hi." 
1Corinthians15:11 Tua ahikom kei tung pan hong pai ahizong, amate tung pan hong pai ahizong, hisia ma ka vekpi in kong hil uh thu hi a, hisia ma in note ii up thu ahi hi." 
1Corinthians15:12 Tu in kote ii kong hil uh thu in, Christ sia thina panin kitho kiksak hi ci kasap, bangbangin note pawlkhat in a thite nuntakna sungah kithosak ngawl tu hi, ci thei nu ziam?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Tuasia in thumaan ahile Christ kitho kiksak ngawl hi tu hi; 
1Corinthians15:14 tuaciang thina pan Christ tho kik ngawl hile, kote ii hil tu bangma om ngawl tu a, note ii up tu bangma om ngawl tu hi." 
1Corinthians15:15 Tua bek dom ngawlin kote sia Pathian tungtaang ah leilot thu son hong kici tu hi, banghang ziam cile Christ sia thina panin tho kik hi ci khu hi — ahihang mithite a nungta in kithosak ngawl hi takpi ahile, ama in Christ a thosak ngawl hi tu hi." 
1Corinthians15:16 Banghang ziam cile a thite nuntakna sungah tho kik ngawl hile Christ zongh kithosak ngawl hi tu hi. 
1Corinthians15:17 Tuaciangin Christ kithosak ngawl hile, na upna uh sia cithep thu hong suak tu a, note sia noma mawnate sung ma ah a mangthang lai na hi tu uh hi." 
1Corinthians15:18 Christ sungah thu um mi a thite a bocip hi cina zongh ahi hi. 
1Corinthians15:19 Christ sungah ih lametna in, hi nuntakna sung atu bekin kimang a, a dang om ngawl ahile leitung theampo ah a khuangai huai belte ih hi tu hi." 
1Corinthians15:20 Ahihang thumaan thu in bang ziam cile, Christ sia thina panin a kithaw kik sakna sia, thina sungah a mute zongh, kitho kiksak tu hi ci in a kip kamciam hong piakna ahi hi." 
1Corinthians15:21 Banghang ziam cile thina in mihing khat tungtawnin hong pian bangma in, thina panin thawkikna zongh, mihing khat tungtawnin hong piang hi." 
1Corinthians15:22 Adam taw a kipumkhat mihing theampo a thi bangma in Christ taw a kipumkhat theampo nuntakna sungah kitho kiksak tu hi. 
1Corinthians15:23 Ahihang mihing sim amate hun tekin kitho kiksak tu hi: Christ sia a masa phitbelin tho hi; tua zawkciang ama hong pai kik ciang, ama ii mihing teng tho tu hi." 
1Corinthians15:24 Tuasia ciang a tawpna hong theng tu hi; Christ in thaa lamsang ah a ukte, thuneite, vaangletna a neite theampo zo tu a, tuaciangin a Kumpi Ngam sia Pa Pathian tungah aap tu hi." 
1Corinthians15:25 Banghang ziam cile Pathian in a ngalte theampo zo a, ama peang nuai ah a koisak dong Christ in uk tu hi." 
1Corinthians15:26 A khakbel a zaw tu a ngal sia thina ahi hi. 
1Corinthians15:27 Banghang ziam cile laithiangtho in, “Pathian in na theampo a peang nuai ah koi hi,” ci hi. A kithiangtel thu in “na theampo” ci ciangin, Christ ii peang nuai ah na theampo a koipa, Pa Pathian a kihel bua hi." 
1Corinthians15:28 Ahihang Christ ukna nuai ah na theampo a kikoi zawkciang, Tapa ahi ama mama sia, na theampo ama nuai ah a koi Pathian nuai ah ama le ama kikoi tu hi; tuaciang Pathian in a vekpi in uk siat tu hi." 
1Corinthians15:29 Tu in mithite atu ki baptize na a vawtte bangbangin ih ngaisun tu ziam? Amate in bang phattuamna piangsak tu in kimuangmaw ziam? Pawlkhat ci bangin, a thite sia nuntakna sungah kitho kiksak ngawl tu ahile tua mihingte in, banghangin mithite atu ki baptize ziam?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Kote sia nai simin banghangin launa thuak hi tu khu ziam? 
1Corinthians15:31 Ka suapuite awng, ni simin thina ka maingat hi! Note hu in, ih Topa Christ Jesus taw kipumkhat a, ih nuntakna hangin note sungah ka nei, hi kiphatsakna in hi bangin hong pausak hi." 
1Corinthians15:32 Ngamsa ngilote taw kido bang phet in, hi Ephesus khua ah ka dian nate sia mihing tupnate bek hile, ka nga tu bang phattuamna om tu ziam? Mithite sia nuntakna sungah kitho kiksak ngawl tu hile, “An ne zu dawn in om tawng, banghang ziam cile zing ciangin ih thi tu hi,” ci kam teptee om bangin ih om lel tu hi." 
1Corinthians15:33 Theamna thuak heak vun. “Kitholpui pha ngawlte in ngamtatna pha lalsak hi.” 
1Corinthians15:34 Ahi tu bangin khua hong phawk kik tavun a, na mawnate kheal vun. No pawlkhat in Pathian he ngawl na hi uh kom a maizumhuai na hina uh kong hesak hi." 
1Corinthians15:35 Pawlkhat in, “Bangbangin a thisate kitho kiksak tu ziam? Amate in bangbang pumpi nei tu ziam?” ci tu nu hi." 
1Corinthians15:36 No mihing mawmaw te! Thaicii khat lei sungah na tu uh ciangin, a thi phot buale a po bua hi." 
1Corinthians15:37 Tuaciang, zungtaang ahizong a dang thaicii khat pawpo ahizong, tua na tu uh thaicii sia a khangto tu, a kung po sa hi ngawlin, a thaicii nguak a tu na hi uh hi." 
1Corinthians15:38 Pathian in tua thaicii tek sia ama dei bangin a kung pia a; thaicii khat sim atu in a kung pha pia hi. 
1Corinthians15:39 Tuaciangin a nungta theampo ii sa sia a kibang sa nam khat bek ahi siat bua hi; Mihing sa in nam khat hi a, nganhingte, vacimte, ngasa te ii sa in a dang nam tuam tek nei hi." 
1Corinthians15:40 Vantung pumpite le leitung pumpite a om hi; vantung pumpi hoina le leitung pumpi hoina sia kilamdang hi. 
1Corinthians15:41 Ni in hoina a tuam nei a, tha ii hoina, tuaciang aksite hoina a tuam tek ahi hi; aksi tetek sung zongh ah, hoina a tuatuamin om lai hi." 
1Corinthians15:42 Mithisate a kinuntak kiksak ciangin, tuabang ma hi tu hi. Pumpi a kiphum ciangin a thithei pumpi ahi hi; a kithawsak ciangin a thi maw pumpi ahi tu hi." 
1Corinthians15:43 A kiphum ciangin a meal sia in zawngkhal hi. A kithawsak kik ciangin, a mealhoi in thahat tu hi." 
1Corinthians15:44 A kiphum ciangin cii le sa pumpi hi a; a kithawsak kik ciangin, thaa pumpi ahi tu hi. Ci le sa pumpi a om bangma in, thaa pumpi zongh a om kul hi." 
1Corinthians15:45 Banghang ziam cile laithiangtho in “Mihing masabel Adam sia nuntakna a nei mihing in kibitphua hi,” ci hi; ahihang a khakbel Adam sia nuntakna a pia Thaa ahi hi." 
1Corinthians15:46 Thaa sia pai masa ngawl hi, cii le sa hi phot a, tua zawkciang thaa hi pheang hi." 
1Corinthians15:47 Adam masa sia lei taw kivawt a, lei panin hong piang hi; Adam niina sia vantung panin hong pai hi." 
1Corinthians15:48 Leitung ii neisa ahite sia lei taw kivawt khat taw kibang hi; vantung neisate sia vantung pan hong pai pa taw kibang hi. 
1Corinthians15:49 Lei taw a kivawtpa lim le meal ih puak bangma in, vantung pan hong pai Pa lim le meal ih pua tu hi." 
1Corinthians15:50 Ka ci nop thu in, suapuite awng, chi le sa taw a kivawt sia in, Pathian ii Ngam lua thei ngawl a, a thithei sia in thithei ngawlna lua thei ngawl hi." 
1Corinthians15:51 Hi a kiseal thumaan thutak sia ngai vun: Eite theampo ih thi siat buatu hi, ahihang lemle khakbel sia a kitum ciang, eite in tawmvei no sungin, ih kikheal tu hi, mitphet khat sung za in manlang tu hi. Banghang ziam cile lemle a kitum ciangin a thisate tho kik in thi kik ngei nawn ngawl tu a, ih vekpi in ih kikheal tu hi." 
1Corinthians15:52  
1Corinthians15:53 Banghang ziam cile thina sia thithei ngawlna ah kikheal nanak tu hi; a thi tu sia a thithei ngawlin hong kikheal nanak tu hi. 
1Corinthians15:54 Hisia hong piang in a thithei sia a thithei ngawlin a kikheal ciang, laithiangtho kammal: “Thina kisucip zo hi; zawna kikhuangkhim zo hi!” a ci sia taangtung tu hi." 
1Corinthians15:55 “Thina awng na zawna koisung om ziam? Thina awng, na suksiat theina vaang koisung om ziam?”" 
1Corinthians15:56 Thina in, a suksiat theina vaang sia mawna panin nga a, tuaciang mawna in a vaang sia Thukham panin nga hi." 
1Corinthians15:57 Ahihang Topa Jesus Christ tungtawnin zawna hong pia Pathian tungah lungdam ih ko hi! 
1Corinthians15:58 Tua ahikom, kong it suapuite awng, kip tak le maan takin om vun. Topa atu na nasep uh peuma a luithawthong suak ngawl het tu hi ci in na heak uh ahiciang Topa atu na nasepna sungah a tawntung komla vun." 
1Corinthians16:1 Judea ngam ah Pathian ii mihingte huna sumkhon natu vai lai nong thaak uh sia taw kisai in kong son tu hi. Galatia ah a om pawlpite tungah ka sawl teng ma note in na vawt uh kul tu hi. 
1Corinthians16:1 Judea ngam ah Pathian ii mihingte huna sumkhon natu vai lai nong thaak uh sia taw kisai in kong son tu hi. Galatia ah a om pawlpite tungah ka sawl teng ma note in na vawt uh kul tu hi. 
1Corinthians16:2 Nipi ni simin na sum thalaw za uh taw kizui in sum pawlkhat na koituam hamtang vun a, na khol vun. Kong pai ciangin sumkhon a kul ngawl tu in na tawm vun." 
1Corinthians16:3 Kong pai zawkciang Jerusalem ah na huna letsong uhte a puak tu in pha na sak uh mihingte sawlin kiheaksakna laite taw ih paisak tu hi. 
1Corinthians16:4 Keima pai hangin a phatuam tu le, amate taw ka tonkhawm thei tu hi." 
1Corinthians16:5 Macedonia sang ka manaw zawkciangin, note kungah kong pai tu hi — Banghang ziam cile Macedonia kaantanin kong pai kul tu hi." 
1Corinthians16:6 No kungah tawmvei hunsung hong taam tu khi hi, phalbi bup hong taam tha tu khi hi. Tuasia ciang ka khualhaw kik natu mun pawpo ah ka paitan thei natu in keima nong hu thei tu uh hi." 
1Corinthians16:7 Tawmvei sung hong nawkin a kimu nuam bek hi ngawlin, Topa deina a om nale, note taw hun sau mama zak khop tu ka lamen hi." 
1Corinthians16:8 Pentecost ni dong hi sung Ephesus ah ka taam tu hi. 
1Corinthians16:9 Hong langpan mihing tam mama om ahihang, a lian le a vawt thamman nasep natu in hunpha tatak khat a om hi." 
1Corinthians16:10 Timothy sia note kungah hong theng le, note sungah nuam a sak thei natu in na vawt vun, banghang ziam cile ama sia keima bangma in Topa atu in a seam khat ahi hi." 
1Corinthians16:11 Kuama in ama zawngsak heak vun a, kei kung hong kilee kik thei natu in, ama khual hawna thinnuam takin a zop to thei natu in na hu nanak vun; banghang ziam cile ama sia suapui teng taw hong heak kik tu ka lamen hi." 
1Corinthians16:12 Tu in suapui Apollos huvau ah, ama sia suapui dangte taw no kung hong haw natu in ka hanthawn hi, ahihang tu hunin hong pai tu sia a thinzo paih ngawl hi. Hun pha a nga ciang ahile, ama hong pai tu hi." 
1Corinthians16:13 Pilvang in om vun, upna sungah kho takin ding vun, hang vun a thahat vun." 
1Corinthians16:14 Nasepna theampo ah ki itna taw seam vun. 
1Corinthians16:15 Note in Stephanas le a innkuanpuite thu na heak uh hi; amate sia Achaia ah Tapidaw suakciilte hi a, Pathian mite atu nasepna sungah a kipiate ahi uh hi." 
1Corinthians16:16 Suapuite awng, hi bang mihingte ii lampuina le amate taw a diang a seam dang khat pawpo ii a lampuina na zui natu uh kong thuum hi." 
1Corinthians16:17 Stephanas, Fortunatus le Achaicus ii hong pai hu in ka lungdam hi; amate sia hong om thei ngawl note ii luang hi," 
1Corinthians16:18 amate in note hong thinnuamsak a, tuabangin kei zongh hong thinnuamsak hi. Hi bang mihingte sia teptee thamman hi." 
1Corinthians16:19 Asia ngamkhen ah pawlpite in paupuina kam hong thaak hi; Aquila, Priscilla le amate inn ah a kikhawm pawlpi in Tapidaw kideisakna kamthiam taw hong paupui hi." 
1Corinthians16:20 Hi sungah suapuite theampo in paupuina kam hong thaak hi. Khat le khat suapui khat hina taw kinamh tavun. 
1Corinthians16:21 lai sia: keima khut tatak taw kong at hi. 
1Corinthians16:22 Topa a it ngawl po haamsiatna thuak tahen! Maranatha — Ih Topa hong pai tahen! 
1Corinthians16:23 Topa Jesus thuthiamna note taw hong om tahen. 
1Corinthians16:24 Christ Jesus sungah a om note theampo tungah kong itna om tahen. Amen. 
2Corinthians1:1 Pathian ii deina taw Christ Jesus ii sawltakpa ahi Paul le ih suapuipa Timothy in — Corinth khua ah Pathian ii pawlpi le Achaia ngam bup ah Pathian ii mihingte theampo tungah lai kong thaak uh hi: 
2Corinthians1:2 Ih Pa Pathian le ih Topa Jesus Christ in thuthiamna le thinnopna hong pia tahen. 
2Corinthians1:3 Pathian le ih Topa Jesus Christ ii Pa, hesuak thiam Pa, huna theampo hong paina Pathian tungah lungdamko tawng!" 
2Corinthians1:4 Pathian tung pan ih saan hunate ma zanghin ngimna namcin a thuakte ih hu thei natu in, ama in ih ngimna theampo sungah hong hu hi." 
2Corinthians1:5 Christ ii thuakna tam mama sungah ih kihel bangin Christ tungtawnin Pathian huna tam mama ih nga hi. 
2Corinthians1:6 Ka thuak uh le note atu in, huna le ngupna na nga natu uh hi a; kote hong kihu le note zongh hong kihu a, kote ii thuakte ma zong thinsau takin na thuak zawk natu thahatna hong kipia ahi hi." 
2Corinthians1:7 Tua ahikom note sungah ka lametna uh sia ngawk zo ngeingawl hi; ko thuaknate nong thuak pui uh bangma in, huna ka nga uhte sungah note zongh na kihel uh sia ka he uh hi." 
2Corinthians1:8 Suapuite awng Asia ngamkhen sungah ngim ka ngana uhte kong phawksak nuam hi. Kote tungah hong kisuanh vanhte lian mama a ngit leih ahikom, nungta tu zong ka ki um ngam bua uh hi." 
2Corinthians1:9 Kote tungah thi daan hong kipia bangza in ka ngaisun uh hi. Ahihang hi thu sia, koma le koma kisuang ngawlin, a thite a thosak kik, Pathian khat bek ka suan thei natu uh in a piang ahi hi." 
2Corinthians1:10 Tuabang a kiitakhuai thithei natu panin, ama in hong ngum zo a, hong ngum lai tu hi; mai sang zongh ah ama in hong ngum kik lai tu hi, ci in lametna ama tungah ka nei zo uh hi," 
2Corinthians1:11 tua in kote nong panpui na uh taw thu nong ngetsakna uh hang ahi hi. Tua ahikom kote atu thu tam mama hong kingetsaknate hong kizo tu a, Pathian in ko thupha hong pia tu hi; tuaciang mihing tam mama in, kote atu nging takin lungdamkona nei thei tu uh hi." 
2Corinthians1:12 Hi leitung ah ka nuntakna uh le a tuanin note taw ka kizopna uh sia Pathian ii hong piaksa thinmamna le citakna ii hong ukna le Pathian' thuthiamna ii vaangletna hang hi a, mihingte pilna hang hi ngawl hi, ci in telthiang in ka kiphasak uh hi." 
2Corinthians1:13 Na sim thei tu le na tel thei tu teng bek kong at uh hi. Ahizong tu in a lalang bek hong tel tu na hi uh hang, ih Topa Jesus Ni hong thet ciang, note hu in ka kiphatsak uh bangma kote hu in na kiphatsak thei natu uh in a cing tak ma nong tel tu uh kong lamen uh hi." 
2Corinthians1:14  
2Corinthians1:15 Hite theampo thumaan hi ci in ka telthiang hu in, thupha niivei na nga thei natu in note kungah haw tu in ka ngeal phot hi." 
2Corinthians1:16 Banghang ziam cile Judea ngam ah ka khualhaw natu taw kisai in note tung pan huna dei ka hikom Macedonia ka pai lam le ka cia lamin note kungah baang tu in ka ngeal hi. 
2Corinthians1:16 Banghang ziam cile Judea ngam ah ka khualhaw natu taw kisai in note tung pan huna dei ka hikom Macedonia ka pai lam le ka cia lamin note kungah baang tu in ka ngeal hi. 
2Corinthians1:17 Hi bang ka ngeal ciangin thukheal memeang nong sa uh ziam? Hi bangin ngealnate ka nei ciangin keima deina bek taw, “Hi hi,” le ci a, “Hi bo,” le a ci si tu in a om ka hi ziam?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Pathian ii thumaan a son bang tatak ma in, note tungah kong kamciamna sia “Hi hi” cile “Hi bo” ci sia thu hi ngawl hi." 
2Corinthians1:19 Banghang ziam cile Silas, Timothy le keima ii kong hil Pathian Tapa Jesus Christ sia “hi” le “hi bo” ci khop tu hi ngawl hi; ama sia Pathian ii “Hi” a cisia pa ahi zaw hi;" 
2Corinthians1:20 Banghang ziam cile, Pathian kamciam theampo tungah “Hi” a ci pa ahi hi. Hi thu hangin Jesus Christ tungtawnin, Pathian minthanna ah “Amen” ka ci uh hi." 
2Corinthians1:21 Note taw kingawm in kote Christ taw kipawl khawm a, ih nuntakna hong kipsak sia in Pathian hi a; eite hong tuam koisia Pathian ma hi in," 
2Corinthians1:22 ama ii neisa ka hina uh kote tungah tepteena hong koi zo a, eite atu hong koikholsak na theampo a kipsakna in eite thinsung ah Thaa Thiangtho hong pia pa in ama ahi hi." 
2Corinthians1:23 Keima tetti tu in Pathian ka sam hi — ama in ka thinsung hong he hi! Corinth khua ah kong pai ngawlna sia note kong maapna hizaw hi. 
2Corinthians1:24 Na up hamtang tu uh thu sia hamtangin kong sawl buatu uh a, na upna uh kip hi ci in kong he uh hi. Noma lungdam natu in note taw na a seam khawm ka hizaw uh hi." 
2Corinthians2:1 Tua ahikom note kong heesak ngawl natu in note kungah pai kik ngawl tu in ka khensat zo hi. 
2Corinthians2:2 Banghang ziam cile note hong heesak thong leng kei hong lungdamsak tu akua om nawn tu ziam? Keima ii kong heesak te ma om bek tu hi. 
2Corinthians2:3 Tua hu in no tungah tua laithak kong at ahi hi — Keima hong lungdamsak tute ma in hong heesak tu ahiciang, no kungah pai tu ka uuk bua hi. Banghang ziam cile keima ka lung a dam le, note zongh lungdam ci in ka um hi." 
2Corinthians2:4 Lai kong thaak lai in thinsung buaingawpna le khuangaina taw thitui taakin lai kong at hi; ka tupna sia note kong heesak nopna hi ngawl a, bangza in note hong it khi ziam, ci in kong telsak nopna ahi hi." 
2Corinthians2:5 Tu in mi khat pawpo in, mihing khat a khuangaisak le kei bek hong heesak hi ngawlin, a nobelin ci leang — note theampo hong heesak ahi hi. (Hi bangin ka ci sia ama tungah a nasia kamkhal ka pau nop ngawl hang ahi hi.)" 
2Corinthians2:6 Note a tamzaw in hisia pa sia tu a bangma in daan pia zo na hi uh ciangin, pha zo hi." 
2Corinthians2:7 Tu in bang po ahizong ama mawna maisak tavun a, hee leilam in a thin a lal ngawl natu in na hanthawn vun." 
2Corinthians2:8 Tua ahikom ama na it takpi na uh na telsak natu in kong thuum hi. 
2Corinthians2:9 Tua lai kong thaak sia banghang ziam cile ze etna sia bangbangin do zo a, tuaciangin kei ii hilna bangza dongin ni nu ziam ci in kong heak nop hang ahi hi." 
2Corinthians2:10 Khat po ii a ngamtatna tungtaang ah mawna na maisak uh ciang, kei zongh in ama ka maisak hi. Banghang ziam cile maw ka maisak ciangin — tuabang a kul takpi ma ahile — Christ ii hong ompuina taw in note hang in mawmaisak ka hi hi;" 
2Corinthians2:11 Satan ngealnate he ka hikom in; ama hong nopzaw ngawl natu in ka maisak ahi hi. 
2Corinthians2:12 Christ huvau Lungdamna Thupha hil tu in Troas khua ka thet ciang tua munah Topa in nasep natu lampi hon sa in a koi ka mu hi. 
2Corinthians2:13 Ahihang tualai ah ih suapuipa Titus mu zo ngawl ka hikom nasia takin ka thinngim hi. Tua ahikom tua munah a om mihingte mangpha thaak in Macedonia ah ka pai suak hi. 
2Corinthians2:13 Ahihang tualai ah ih suapuipa Titus mu zo ngawl ka hikom nasia takin ka thinngim hi. Tua ahikom tua munah a om mihingte mangpha thaak in Macedonia ah ka pai suak hi. 
2Corinthians2:14 Ahihang Pathian tungah lungdamnate kiko tahen! Banghang ziam cile Christ taw kipumkhatna hu in, Pathian in Christ ii ngalzawna sungah a mat sate bangin Pathian in eite lam hong pui tawntung hi. Christ thu heakna sia mun theampo ah paaknamtui bangin a kizel natu in Pathian in eite hong zangh hi." 
2Corinthians2:15 Banghang ziam cile eite sia Christ ii Pathian tungah a piak paaknamtui taw ih kibang a, ngupna a ngate le a mangthangte sungah ih kizel hi." 
2Corinthians2:16 A mangthangte atu in tuasia in ngual a thisak thei a ui mama thina ngim hi a; ahihang ngupna a ngate atu in nuntakna a pia ngimnamtui ahi hi. Tua ahile tuabang nasepte a seam zo tu akua om ziam? 
2Corinthians2:17 Kote sia Pathian thu takpi vanh ngina ngawl te zuak bangin a son midang tam mama te taw ka kibang bua uh hi; ahihang Pathian in hong sawl ahikom, thinsung maan tak taw ama mai ah Christ ii naseamte bangin thu ka son uh hi." 
2Corinthians3:1 Tu a teng ih son ciang koma le koma a kisuangtaak kik bang hi nong sa uh ziam? Ngualdang pawlkhatte bangin note tungah piak tu ahizong, noma in ko tung a nong piak tu uh ahizong, kiheaksakna laite kul tu ziam?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Noma mama sia mihing theampo ii heak tu le sim tu in, kote lungtang tungah a ki at, ka nei uh laithak sia na hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians3:3 Christ ama mama in hi laithak at in kote puak tu in hong thaak a hina thu kitel mama hi. Tua lai sia laitui taw ki at ngawlin, a nungta Pathian ii Thaa taw ki at a, suangpheak tungah ki at ngawlin, mihingte lungtang tungah ki at hi." 
2Corinthians3:4 Christ tungtawnin Pathian ka muan uh manin hi bangin ka ci thei uh hi. 
2Corinthians3:5 Hi nasep ka sep thei natu in koma sungah son ngam tu sep theina bangma ka nei bua uh hi. Tua sep theina ka nei uh sia Pathian kung panin hong pai ahi hi; 
2Corinthians3:6 Lai taw ki at Thukham pan hi ngawl a, Thaa pan hong piang thuciamthak a tu in, hong seamsak thei sia ama ahi hi. A ki at thukham in thina piangsak a, ahihang Thaa in nuntakna pia hi." 
2Corinthians3:7 Thukham sia suangpheak tungah a kikhuak laimalte hi a, a kipiak laitakin, Pathian ii vaangletna kilangh hi. Moses ii maitang tungah a taang sia mial vaial ahihang nasia takin taang ahikom, tua laitak Israel mite in a maitang a salh zo bua uh hi. Thina hong puak Thukham in, ama hun sung tua za in vaangletna taw hong pai ahile," 
2Corinthians3:8 Thaa ii tukna le dianna taw kisai vaangletna in bangza in nasia zaw tu ziam! 
2Corinthians3:9 Kimawsakna a piangsak thu sia vaanglian ahile; ngupna a piangsak sia ii tukna le dianna sia bangza in vaanglian zaw tu ziam! 
2Corinthians3:10 Tua vaangletna a taangzaw pek sia hangin a bosa hunsung a, a taang mama sia ii vaangletna sia a bo zo hi, kici thei hi." 
2Corinthians3:11 Banghang ziam cile, tawmvei sung bek a kikhom sia sungah vaangletna om ahile a tawntungin a kikhomsuan vaangletna sia bangza in tamzaw kan tu ziam!" 
2Corinthians3:12 Hi lametna ka nei uh hu in, kote ka hang mama uh hi." 
2Corinthians3:13 Kote in a maitang pan a vaangletna, a mial vaial in a bona sia Israel mite ii mu ngawl natu in, dial taw a maitang a seal, Moses bang ka hi bua uh hi." 
2Corinthians3:14 Amate thinsung kikhak takpi hi; amate in thuciamlui thubute a sim uh ciang tuni dongin, tua dial in a thinsung uh siin lai hi. Mihing khat in Christ taw a kizop ciang bek in, tua dial sia kihepsak hi." 
2Corinthians3:15 Tuni ngawngawn dongin Moses Thukham a sim uh ciangin tua dial in amate thinsung siincip lai hi. 
2Corinthians3:16 Ahihang kiheam thei hi. Moses thu laithiangtho sungah: “Topa sang ah a kiheak ciangin ama dial sia kiheam hi,” ci hi." 
2Corinthians3:17 Tu in hi lai sungah “Topa” ci in a ki at sia Thaa ahi hi; Topa ii Thaa omna munah suatakna om hi. 
2Corinthians3:18 Tua ahikom eite theampo in, a kisiin ngawl maitangte taw Topa vaangletna kilanghsak vun. Thaa ahi Topa kung pan hong pai tua vaangletna sia ma in a nasia vaial vaangletna sungah ama ii pianzia bangin eite hong kheal hi." 
2Corinthians4:1 Pathian in ama ii hong hesuakna taw hi nasep tu hong pia ahikom ka thin uh a kiam bua hi. 
2Corinthians4:2 Thuku theampo le a maizumhuai ngamtat nate theampo ka vawk uh hi; theamna taw na ka seam bua uh a, Pathian ii kammal zongh leilot thu ka suaksak bua uh hi. Pathian muna ah thumaanna ii a kicing khuavak sungah ka nungta uh a, mihing sim ii a pha in a tel thei natu ka hanciam uh hi." 
2Corinthians4:3 Banghang ziam cile, kong hil uh lungdamna thu kiseal ahile a mangthangte mun pan bekma in a kiseal ahi hi." 
2Corinthians4:4 Hi leitung pathian ngilopa in amate thinsung sia khuazing sungah keamcip ahikom um ngawl uh hi. Pathian taw a kibang linlian Christ ii minthanna huvau tua Lungdamna Thupha pan hong pai, amate tungah hong taang khuavak a mu thei ngawl natu in ama in vawt hi." 
2Corinthians4:5 Banghang ziam cile, kote kong hil thu in koma ii thu ahi bua hi; Jesus Christ sia Topa hi ci in kong hil uh a, Jesus hangin note ii naseamte bang ka hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians4:6 “Khuazing sung pan khuavak hong taang tu hi!” a ci Pathian sia ma in Christ ii maitang ah a taang Pathian ii vaangletna heak natu in kote thinsung ah a khuavak hong taangsak ahi hi. 
2Corinthians4:7 Ahitazong vaangletna lianbel sia Pathian neisa hi a, kote aa hi ngawl hi ci sia a kilak natu in thaa thu ah sumngum a nei kote sia tungbeal thawthong taw kibang khu hi." 
2Corinthians4:8 Kote ngim nga nithi ka hi uh hang, ka lalcip bua uh a, khat vevei lungmang ka hi uh hang, thinkiam ngeingawl khu hi;" 
2Corinthians4:9 ngal tam mama a om hang ngualtamh sel ngeingawl khu hi. Khat vevei nasia takin hong kiliamsua kale hong kisusia zo ngawl hi. 
2Corinthians4:10 Jesus ii nuntakna ka pumpi uh sungah a kimu thei natu in, ama thina sia, a thithei ka pumpi uh sungah ka vom top uh hi." 
2Corinthians4:11 Hi a thithei ka pumpi uh pan ama ii nuntakna a kimu thei natu in, ka nuntak sung tawntung, Jesus hangin thi tu launa ka nei tawntung uh hi." 
2Corinthians4:12 Thina in kote sungah na hong seam hi, ahihang nuntakna in note sungah na hong seam hi, cinopna hi." 
2Corinthians4:13 Laithiangtho in, “Um ka hikomin ka son hi,” ci hi. Tua upna thin bangma in kote zongh in um ka hi uh hu in, ka son uh hi." 
2Corinthians4:14 Topa Jesus sia nuntakna sungah a thosak kik Pathian in kote zongh Jesus taw hong thotosak tu a, note taw kingawm in ama omna munah hong la khawm tu hi, ci in ka he uh hi." 
2Corinthians4:15 Hite theampo sia note atu hi a; Pathian ii thuthiamna in mihing a tam vaialte tungah a thet ciangin, amate in Pathian minthan natu in lungdamko thungetnate a tamzaw nei tu uh hi." 
2Corinthians4:16 Hi thu hu in kote ka thin uh a kiam ngei bua hi. Ih pumpi cii le sa sia dadam in muamuat ahihang ih thaa nuntakna sia ni khat zawk ni khat hong kithaksua hi. 
2Corinthians4:17 Tuaciang, hi tawmvei hunsung ka thuak uh ngimna tawmnote in, tua ngimna sangin a tamzaw pek, a lian mama tawntung minthanna sungah kote hong then tu hi." 
2Corinthians4:18 A kimu thei nate mitsuan ka hi bua uh a, a kimu thei ngawl nate hizaw hi. A kimu theite sia tawmvei sung bek kikhom a, a kimu thei ngawlte sia a tawntungin kikhom hi." 
2Corinthians5:1 Banghang ziam cile, hi ih teenna buk — hisung leitung ah ih pumpi kisia le — a tawntungin a kikhomsuan tu, eite teen natu Pathian in vantung ah inn khat nei tu hi ci in ih he hi." 
2Corinthians5:2 Vantung pan hong pai ih inn sia eite tungah hong kikhu natu ih thangaina sia, tu in nasia mama ahikom ih vuisa hi;" 
2Corinthians5:3 tuabangin tuasia hong kisilhsak ciangin eite sia pumpi nei ngawlin ih om buatu hi. 
2Corinthians5:4 Hi leitung buk sungah ih teen laiteng in, hong kizothaw kisa in ih tau hi; tuabang ih ci ciang hi leitung pumpi suut nuam ih hi bua a, thi theina sia nuntakna taw hong kikheal natu in vantung pumpi sia ei tungah hong silhsak tu in ih deina ahi hi." 
2Corinthians5:5 Pathian in hi kikheal natu in, eite hong puuakhol a, ei atu hong kholsakte theampo hong kipsakna in ama ii Thaa hong pia hi." 
2Corinthians5:6 Tua ahikom eite in thin letna taw ih kidim tawntung hi. Ih pumpi inn sungah ih om lai tengin, eite in Topa inn taw a kikhuala ih hi hi." 
2Corinthians5:7 Banghang ziam cile eite in upna taw ih nungta a, muna taw ahi bua hi." 
2Corinthians5:8 Eite in thinletna taw ih kidim a, hi ih pumpi inn nusia in Topa taw om tu sia ih uuk zaw hi." 
2Corinthians5:9 Tua ahikom hi sung inn ah ahizong, tuasung inn ah ahizong thudang theampo sangin Ama ih lungkimsak tu sia ih deibel ahi hi." 
2Corinthians5:10 Banghang ziam cile eite theampo thukhenna thuak tu in Christ mai ah ih ding nanak tu hi. Mihing khat simin a leitung pumpi nuntak sungah ama ii sepna a pha a sia taw a kiphu a kilawm in nga tek tu uh hi. 
2Corinthians5:11 Topa kiitakna ii a cinopna ka he uh a, tua hu in, ngual zongh, tuabang ahithei natu in ka hanthawn uh hi. Pathian in kote sia a khawng a kheakin hong heak bangma in na thinsung uh ah, keima zongh hong he tu in kong muangmaw hi." 
2Corinthians5:12 Note tungah ko le ko a kiphatson tu in a hanciam kik ka hi bua uh hi. Mihingte ngamtatna en ngawl a, a meal a sa en in a kisuangtaakte na zo kik thei natu in kote nong kiphatsak pui natu ahang sia hong lak nuam ka hizaw uh hi." 
2Corinthians5:13 A thin amh tatak ka hi uh ziam? Thin amh ka hi uh le Pathian atu hi a, tua ahibuale thinciim ka hi uh ziam? Tua ahile zong note atu hi." 
2Corinthians5:14 Christ hong itna in kote hong uk hi, tu in ahile mihing khat in mihing theampo atu thi hi ci in ka tel uh hi, tua in amate theampo sia ama thina sungah thi khawm hi a cinopna ahi hi." 
2Corinthians5:15 A nungtate in amate atu nungta nawn ngawlin amate atu thi a, ahihang amate atu in nuntakna sungah a kithosak kik pa atu a nungta ahithei natu in ama in mihing theampo atu in thi hi." 
2Corinthians5:16 Tua ahiciang, mihingte munate taw kuama tungah thu ka khen nawn bua uh hi. Khatvei lai in Christ sia mihing munate taw thukhen ngei ka hita uh zong tu in tuabangin ka khen nawn bua uh hi." 
2Corinthians5:17 Mihing khat pawpo in Christ taw a kizom le ama in mihing thak ahi hi; a nuntakna lui sia bo in a thak hong piang zo hi. 
2Corinthians5:18 Hiteng theampo Pathian nasepna hi a, ama in Christ tungtawnin, a ngalte ih hina panin a lawmte hong suaksak zo a, ngualdangte zongh a lawmte ih suasak natu in, eite tungah vaipuak hong pia hi." 
2Corinthians5:19 Ka thupuak uh sia in Christ tungtawnin Pathian in mihing nam theampo ama lawmte hong suaksak hi, ci thu ahi hi. Pathian in amate mawna sazian keam ngawl a, tuaciang bangbangin ama in a lawmte suaksak cina thu ko hong hil hi." 
2Corinthians5:20 Tua ahiciang hi sungah kote Pathian ma in kote tungtawnin note tungah hong thuum bangma in Christ atu in thuson ka hi uh hi. Christ ii taangin kong thuum uh hi: Pathian in a ngalte na hina uh pan, a lawmte hong suaksak tahen!" 
2Corinthians5:21 Ama taw ih kipumkhatna hangin Pathian bang a, thumaan thutang ih sua thei natu in, mawnei ngawl Christ sia Pathian in eite taangin mawnei suaksak hi." 
2Corinthians6:1 Tua ahiciang, Pathian taw ko ii nasep khopna sungah Pathian ii thuthiamna a saangte in, tua thu thiamna sia a luithawthong a suasak ngawl natu in kong thuum uh hi." 
2Corinthians6:2 Pathian pauna ngai vun: “Note maipha kong piak tu hun hong thet ciang, note ngetna kong za hi; kong ngup tu ni hong thet ciang, note kong hu hi.” Ngai vun! Pathian ii hesuakna saan thei tu sia tu hun hi; hong kingup tu ni sia tuni ahi hi!" 
2Corinthians6:3 Ka nasepna uh taw kisai in khat pawpo ii mawna hong zon tu sia ka dei bua uh a, tua ahikom kuama haksatnate a nga natu in ka hanciam bua uh hi." 
2Corinthians6:4 Na ka sepna sung theampo ah Pathian naseamte ka hina uh ka lakna uh in, thinsau takin ngimna thuak zawkna, haksatna le buainate ka thuak kenkon zaw uh hi." 
2Corinthians6:5 Kote sia hong kivel a, thong sungah hong khumin, hong vawtsia uh hi; naseam leilam in, mu ngawlin, an ne ngawlin ka om uh hi." 
2Corinthians6:6 Pathian naseamte ka hina uh sia thiangtho nuntakna, thu heakna, thinsauna le dikna — Thaa Thiangtho taw, ki itna tatak taw," 
2Corinthians6:7 a maan thuhilna le Pathian ii vaangletna teng taw ka lak uh hi. Thutang suana sia ka ngalhiam uh hi a, ngaldo natu le koma le koma kihuukna tu in ka nei uh hi." 
2Corinthians6:8 Kote sia hong kithasia a, hong kizawngsak si hi; hong kilang a hong kipok si hi. Kote sia thumaan ka son uh hang a leilot theite bangin hong kivawt hi;" 
2Corinthians6:9 ngual theampo in hong he ahihang a kihe ngeingawlte bangin hong kivawt hi; nong mu uh bangma kote nungta napi a thisate bangin hong kivawt hi. Daan hong kipia ahizong, hong kithatlum ngawl hi;" 
2Corinthians6:10 hong heesak ahihang ka lung uh dam tawntung hi; a zawng bang ka hi uh hangin, mihing tam mamate ka hausak uh hi; neisa bangma nei ngawl tu bang ka hi uh hangin, na theampo a nei tatakte ka hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians6:11 Corinth khua a om ka it lawmte awng! No tungah ip nei ngawlin kong son zo uh hi; ka thinsung kongkha uh kong hon siat uh hi. 
2Corinthians6:12 Note tungah kote in ka thinsung uh hong khakbil hi ngawlin; noma in kote sia na thinsung uh hong khabil nu hi. 
2Corinthians6:13 Tu in note sia ka tate bangin kong pau hi: note tungah kong nei uh thinpuak bangin, kote tungah thinpuak nong neina uh hong lak tavun. Na thinsung kongkha uh hongin na taanzausak vun." 
2Corinthians6:14 Thu um ngawlte taw kipawl tu sia suak thei ngawl ahikom amate taw kibangin na na seam khawm heak vun. A maan le a maan ngawl sia bangbangin kipawl khawm thei tu ziam? Bangbangin khuavak le khuazing sia teang khawm thei tu ziam? 
2Corinthians6:15 Christ le Doaimangpa sia bangbangin thu kisi thei tu ziam? Thu um khat in thu um ngawl khat taw bangbangin na khat nei khawm thei tu ziam? 
2Corinthians6:16 Pathian ii biakinn sia doai biakna milimte taw bangbangin thukimna vawt thei tu ziam? Banghang ziam cile eite sia a nungta Pathian biakinn ih hi hi! Pathian in: “Ka mite sungah ka inn ka vawt tu a, amate sungah ka teang tu hi; keima in amate Pathian ka hi tu a, amate in keima mihingte ahi tu uh hi,” ci hi." 
2Corinthians6:17 Tuaciangin Topa in, “Amate nusia nanak in a, amate taw kikhen tavun. A thiangtho ngawlte taw kipeena bangma nei heak vun, tua hile note kong saang tu hi, ci hi." 
2Corinthians6:18 Vaanglianbel Topa in, Keima in note ii Pa kong hi tu a, note sia ka tapate le ka tanute na hi tu uh hi, ci hi,” a ci hi." 
2Corinthians7:1 Ka it ka lawmte awng, hi kamciamte theampo sia eite tungah hong kipia hi. Tua ahiciang pumpi le thinsung a ninsak thei nate theampo panin kithiansua in, Pathian ih thasiana taw a thiangtho sinsen suak tawng." 
2Corinthians7:2 Kote na thinsung uh ah hong saang tavun. Kote kuama tungah khial ngawl khu hi; kuama siatsua ngawl, kuama tungah hamphatna la ngeingawl khu hi." 
2Corinthians7:3 Noma hong mawsak nuam a, tuabangin kong ci hi ngawl hi; banghang ziam cile tu masia a kong ci sa bangma in note sia kote atu in ithuai mama na hi uh hang in, ih thi zong ih nung zong, a omkhawm tawntung ih hi hi." 
2Corinthians7:4 Note kong muang mama hi; note hangin ka kisuangtaak hi! Thinngimna theampo sungah thin letna taw ka kidim lai hi; lungnopna taw ka kidim leet hi. 
2Corinthians7:5 Macedonia ka thet zawk uh ciang zong tawlngak hun ka nei bua uh hi. Haksatna sia mun theampo ah om a, ngual taw kihauna, thinsung patauna taw ka om uh hi." 
2Corinthians7:6 Ahihang a thinkiamte a han sua Pathian in Titus hong paina taw kote hong hanthawn hi. 
2Corinthians7:6 Ahihang a thinkiamte a han sua Pathian in Titus hong paina taw kote hong hanthawn hi. 
2Corinthians7:7 Ama hong pai hu bek hi ngawlin, noma ii ama na hanthotnate zongh hong ko hu in hong lungdamsak hi. Kei nong mu nop mama na thu, na khuangai mama na uh le kei nong huuk natu in a kinging sa in na omnate uh hong ko hi; tua ahikom tu in ka lungdam seseam hi." 
2Corinthians7:8 Tua kong laithak sia in note hong khuangaisak ahile zong, tua ka at sia ka hee tuan bua hi. Tuasia in tawmvei sung teng hong khuangaisak sia ka heak ciangin, khuangai nuam leng khuangai thei tu khi hi." 
2Corinthians7:9 Ahihang tu in ka lungdam hi — kong heesak hang hi ngawlin, na heena uh sia in no hong kikhealsak ahi hu in ka lungdam hi. Tua heena sia Pathian in zangh a, tua ahikom note atu in, bangma siatna kong piangsak bua uh hi." 
2Corinthians7:10 Banghang ziam cile Pathian ih zak heena in ngupna nga natu in thin kikhealna piangsak hi — tua ii sungah bangma kisii natu om ngawl hi! Ahihang mihing ii heena lel bek in thina piangsak hi. 
2Corinthians7:11 Na heena uh sia Pathian in bangbang hi ziam ci sia en vun: tuasia in bangzata in nang hong lawpsak a, na maw ngawlna ah bangza in hong panpui nuam ziam! Tuabang thin uukna, patauna, thinsung phaw theinate, thangaina, a khialte daan piak nopna cite piangsak hi! Hi thu theampo ah note pau baang ngawl ci in noma le noma kilak zo nu hi." 
2Corinthians7:12 Tua ahikom tua laithak kong at hang, a khialpa, ahibuale a thuakpa ngaisutna taw hong at hizaw ngawlin Pathian ii muna ah ko thu bangza in hong ni ci sia a kiheak natu hong at ka hizaw hi." 
2Corinthians7:13 Tua ahikom tha ka nga mama uh hi. Tha ka nga uh bek dom ngawl hi; thinnopna a nga natu in note theampo in tha na piakna uh Titus ii lungdam hu in, ka lung uh hong damsak hi!" 
2Corinthians7:13 Tua ahikom tha ka nga mama uh hi. Tha ka nga uh bek dom ngawl hi; thinnopna a nga natu in note theampo in tha na piakna uh Titus ii lungdam hu in, ka lung uh hong damsak hi!" 
2Corinthians7:14 Titus mai ah note hangin ka kisuangtaak a, kei nong thinkiamsak bua uh hi. Note tungah thumaan kong son tawntung bangma in Titus mai a ka kisuantaakna uh sia a maan ahi hi." 
2Corinthians7:14 Titus mai ah note hangin ka kisuangtaak a, kei nong thinkiamsak bua uh hi. Note tungah thumaan kong son tawntung bangma in Titus mai a ka kisuantaakna uh sia a maan ahi hi." 
2Corinthians7:15 Note theampo in bangbangin ama thupiakte ni nuam a, bangbangin liinna le launa taw ama zindo cisia a phaw ciang ama in note hong itna khang seseam hi." 
2Corinthians7:16 Na theampo ah note kong suan thei manin ka lungdam mama hi! 
2Corinthians8:1 Koma suapuite awng, Pathian ii thuthiamna in, Macedonia pawlpite sungah bang matutna nei ziam ci sia kong hesak nuam hi." 
2Corinthians8:2 A thuak ngimna te taw amate nasia takin kize et hi; ahihang a lungdamna uh lian mama ahikom, amate zawng mama napi, piakna ah ngo thei mama uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:3 Amate in ahi theiza uh pia a, a ci thei za tungsia ngawngawn zongh pia uh hi, ka ci ngam hi. Amate uuk thu in" 
2Corinthians8:4 Judea ngam a om Pathian ii mihingte huna sungah a kihel thei lei natu in ko tungah hesuak hong ngen uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:4 Judea ngam a om Pathian ii mihingte huna sungah a kihel thei lei natu in ko tungah hesuak hong ngen uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:5 Tuate in kote lametna sang zonghin nasia zaw hi! A masa phit in amate Topa tungah kipia uh hi; tua zawkciang Pathian ii deina taw amate in kote tung zongh ah hong kipia hi. 
2Corinthians8:6 Tua ahiciangin hi nasep a pan Titus tungah a zopto suak natu le hi ki itna sungah sepna sia a khuangkhim dong na sep to thei natu in hong hu natu ka hanthawn uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:6 Tua ahiciangin hi nasep a pan Titus tungah a zopto suak natu le hi ki itna sungah sepna sia a khuangkhim dong na sep to thei natu in hong hu natu ka hanthawn uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:7 Note ii na nei uh ahi: thu upna, thusonna, thuheakna, midangte hu tu lawpna le kote nong itna uh theampo ah kicing mama nu hi. Tua ahikom in, itna taw kisai nasepna zong ah na ngo tatak tu uh kong dei uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:8 Zui tu ngeinate hong koisak ka hi bua hi. Ngualdangte sia tua zata in ngual hu nuamin a lawpna thu kong lakna taw note zongh ngual na itna uh sia bangza ahi tatak ziam ci in ka tel nopna ahi hi. 
2Corinthians8:9 Topa Jesus Christ ii thuthiamna sia na heak uh hi; ama sia hau mama napi in, ama zawnna taw note a hau na sua thei natu in note atu in ama le ama a zawngin hong kivawt ahi hi." 
2Corinthians8:10 Kei ngaisutna pan, ningkum a na patsa uh nasep sia tu in na man thiang tu sia phazaw hi. Note sia a diang phitte na hi uh dom ngawlin, dian tu a uukte zongh na hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:11 Tua ahiciang seam tan vet tavun a, man thiang tavun! Na ngeal uh lai in na lawp uh bangma in, man thiang tu zongh na lawp tavun a, tu in na neisun uh po taw naseam vun." 
2Corinthians8:12 Piak tu na thalawp uh le, na nei ngawlna tung pan hi ngawlin, na neina taw kizui in na piak tu za letsong sia Pathian in hong saang tu hi." 
2Corinthians8:13 Ngualdangte noptuam natu in note tungah vanhngit hong suan nuam ka hi bua hi; ahihang tu laitakin note ci thei na hi uh ciang, a cimawte hu le uhte ma pha tu hi; tua hile note na cimawk hun ciang amate ci thei in no hong hu tu hi. Hi bangin noma ngeal a kikimin, na kihu vadiam tu uh ahi hi." 
2Corinthians8:14  
2Corinthians8:15 Laithiangtho in, “Tam a kaikhawm sia atu tam lei ngawl tu a, tawm a kaikhawm sia atu zongh tawm lei ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
2Corinthians8:16 Kote ii no kong hu nop uh bangma in Titus ii note lawp tak a hong husak Pathian tungah bangza in ka lung uh dam ziam! 
2Corinthians8:16 Kote ii no kong hu nop uh bangma in Titus ii note lawp tak a hong husak Pathian tungah bangza in ka lung uh dam ziam! 
2Corinthians8:17 Kote ngetna hong saang bek hi ngawl hi; note hong hu tu sia lawp a, ama hantang in note kung hong zot tu sia ama thu taw khensat hi." 
2Corinthians8:18 Lungdamna thuhil nasepna ah pawlpi theampo ii a thasia mama ih suapuipa khat sia ama taw kong paisak uh hi. 
2Corinthians8:19 Tuasia bek hi ngawlin, ngual ka hu nopna uh ka lak thei natu in Topa minthan natu ka sep suak uh, hi itna taw kisai nasepna sungah kote taw khual a haw khawm tu in pawlpi ii tealsa, a kiseesa ahi hi." 
2Corinthians8:20 Ngo tak a, letsong kipiaknate ka zeakna uh ah kuama a phun ngawl natu in ka kidawm uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:21 Ka tupna uh sia Topa mai bek ah hi ngawlin, mihingte mai zongh ah a maan in a seam nuam ka hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians8:22 Tua ahikom ih suapuipa sia amate taw kong paikhawmsak uh hi; tamvei ma a zia ka en zo uh a, a tawntungin ngual hu tu lawp mama hi ci in ka mu uh hi. Tu in ama in note tungah muanna hong nei tatak ciangin ama in ngual hu tu lawp vaial hi." 
2Corinthians8:23 Titus ahile, keima naseppui hi a, note hong hu tu in keima taw naseampa ahi hi; amate taw a kithawl suapui dangte sia pawlpite taangmi hi a, Christ minthangsak hi." 
2Corinthians8:23 Titus ahile, keima naseppui hi a, note hong hu tu in keima taw naseampa ahi hi; amate taw a kithawl suapui dangte sia pawlpite taangmi hi a, Christ minthangsak hi." 
2Corinthians8:24 Note kong kiphatsak pui na uhte thumaan hi ci in pawlpi theampo in a tel natu in amate tungah na itna uh na lak tavun. 
2Corinthians9:1 Judea ngam ah Pathian ii mihingte atu huna a kipuak huvau in, lai kong at sia a kul vateal hi ngawl hi." 
2Corinthians9:1 Judea ngam ah Pathian ii mihingte atu huna a kipuak huvau in, lai kong at sia a kul vateal hi ngawl hi." 
2Corinthians9:2 Note sia ngual hu nuamte hi ci in kong he hi, tuasia bangma in Macedonia mite tungah note kong kisuantaakpui hi. “Achaia a om suapuite in, ningkum panin huna pia nuam zo hi,” ci in ka na son hi. Noma lawpna in amate a tamzaw thawn zo hi." 
2Corinthians9:3 Hi thu huvau note kong kiphatsak pui nate a luithawthong a sua ngawl natu in hi suapuite tu in kong paisak hi. Ahihang kong ci sa bangma in, amate na hu natu uh taw na kingingta khol vun." 
2Corinthians9:4 Ahizong, note tungah ta za muanna hong kinei napi keima taw Macedonia pan mihingte kong pai uh ciangin, huna taw a kinging sa in om bua le uhte, note maizum tu bek son ngawlin, kote atu zongh bangza in maizumhuai tu ziam!" 
2Corinthians9:5 Tua ahikomin, piak tu na kamciamsa letsongte a kinging kholsa in a om natu in, keima kong pai ma, hi suapuite hong paikhol tu sia hanthot tu kul ka sa hi. Tua hile kei kong thet ciang, kingin sa suak tu a, tuaciang piak tu a kul hang hi ngawlin, thinzawna taw a pia nuam ka hina uh hong kilangh tu hi." 
2Corinthians9:6 Thaicii tawm a poaipa in an tawm bek at tu a; tam a poaipa in an tam mama a at tu hi, ci in na phawk tavun." 
2Corinthians9:7 Tua hi a, mihing sim in ama khensat sa om bangin pia tu a, thinnop ngawlna taw, ahibuale piak nanak kul tu bangin ngaisutna taw pia ngawl tu hi; banghang ziam cile lungdam thinzo takin a pia sia Pathian in diksa hi." 
2Corinthians9:8 Tuaciang noma atu in na kitaangsap theampo na nei tawntung natu le, thupha vawt natu theampo ah a kicing za sangin a tamzaw na nei natu in, Pathian in na kitaangsap za sangin a tamzaw hong pia thei hi." 
2Corinthians9:9 Laithiangtho in: “Ama in a kitaangsamhte tungah ngo takin pia a; ama dikna sia a tawntungin a kikhomsuan hi,” ci hi." 
2Corinthians9:10 Poai tu ancii le neak tu an hong pia Pathian in na kisap thaicii theampo zongh hong pia tu a, tuate po in, anlaak ciang nangma ii ngo tak a na piakna tung panin an na hau tu hi." 
2Corinthians9:11 Pathian in ngo takin a pia thei tawntung tu in, a khom in hong hausak tawntung tu hi; tuabangin letsong na piak uhte ko tung pan a nga uh ciang mihing tam mama in Pathian pok tu uh hi." 
2Corinthians9:12 Banghang ziam cile hi piakna, nasepna in Pathian ii mihingte kitaangsapna bek a hu hi ngawlin, Pathian tungah nasia tak lungdamko honna piangsak hi." 
2Corinthians9:13 Tuaciangin hi nasepna tungtawnin a kimu thei thute hang in, na up uh Christ lungdamna thu tungah na thumaanna uh hu ahizong, amate le ngualdang theampo taw ngo tak a na kihopna uh hu ahizong, mihing tam mama te in Pathian minthangsak tu uh hi." 
2Corinthians9:14 Tuaciang in note tungah Pathian ii thuthiamna a lamdangin hong piak hu in, note atu amate in ki itna a thuk tatak taw thu hong ngetsak tu hi." 
2Corinthians9:15 A manh a kisep zo ngawl letsong hong piak hu in Pathian tungah lungdamko tawng! 
2Corinthians10:1 Keima Paul in keima aituamin kong thuum hi — Note taw ka omkhop ciangin dikin cingh a, no taw a kikhuala a ka om ciangin hangsan hong kici hi. Christ cikna le thiamna hu in kei zongh note kung kong pai ciangin, ka hangsan a kul tu dong hong kivawt ngawl natu kong thuum hi;" 
2Corinthians10:2 banghang ziam cile, leitung deinate taw ngamta hi hong cite tungah hangsan thei khi hi." 
2Corinthians10:3 Hi leitung ah a teang ka hi uh sia thumaan hi, ahihang leitung nate lungngulna taw ngalsim ka hi bua uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:4 Kidona sungah ka zak uh ngalhiamte sia leitung ngalhiamte hi ngawlin, kulh khote lalcipsak natu ka zak uh a thahat Pathian ii vaangletna ngalhiamte ahi hi. Kam kinialna maan ngawlte ka saatmit uh hi;" 
2Corinthians10:5 Pathian thu heak natu hong nokkhaksak thei kiphatsakna teng ka sumit uh hi; ngaisutna a minpiang sia man in ka khumcip uh a, Christ ii thu ka nisak uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:6 Tuaciangin note na thumaanna uh na kitelthiangsak zawkciangin, thumaan ngawl ngamtatna pawpo daan pia tu in ka kinging tu uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:7 Note sia a puatham omzia teng bek na en uh hi. Khat po in Christ ii neisa in a kituat a om ziam? Pha hi, ama le ama ngaisun kik tahen, banghang ziam cile kote zongh ama za ma in, Christ ii neisa ka hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:8 Banghang ziam cile Topa ii thuneina hong piakte hu in, ka kisuangtaak ngawp tha le zong ka mai a zum bua hi — tua thuneina sia no kong sukcip natu hi ngawlin, kong lapto natu ahi hi." 
2Corinthians10:9 Lai kong thaakte taw no hong lausak nuam a, hanciam bang ka hi tu sia ka dei bua hi." 
2Corinthians10:10 Khat po in, “Paul laithakte sia kamkhal kamciik veu zangh ahihang, ama tatak ei taw hong om ciang, ama thaneam in, a kammalte zongh bangma ahi tuan bua hi!” ci tha tu uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:11 Tuabang mihing khat in note taw kong omkhop ngawl uh ciang laithakte sung kong at uh thu le, tua munah note taw kong om uh ciang ka vawt tu uh thute sia a kilamdang buatu hi ci in tel hamtang tahen." 
2Corinthians10:12 A tatak ahile amate le amate a kiliansak mama te taw a kibangin, ka kituat bua a, ka kitee ngat ngam buatu hi. Amate bangza mawmaw ziam! Amate le amate ki en in, a kitee natu vawt tawm a khat le khat a kimuna za uh taw thukhente ahi uh hi!" 
2Corinthians10:13 Ahizong ko ka hi uhle, ka kisuantaakna uh in, a omsa ciangtanna a vaal buatu uh hi; Pathian ii hong see sa a kiciangtan nasepte sung bek ah ka kisuangtaak uh a, no sungah na ka sep uh sia zongh kihel hi." 
2Corinthians10:14 Tua ciangtanna huam sungah om na hi uh ciang, Christ huvau Lungdamna Thupha puakin note kungah kong pai uh ciangin tuate ka kan buatu uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:15 Tua ahikom Pathian hong koisak sa ciangtannate kalhin midangte sepna sungah ka kisuangtaak bua uh hi. Tua sangin Pathian hong koisak sa ciangtanna sung teng ah seam tawntung a, na upna uh khangto thei in note sungah ka nasepna uh a taangzai zaw thei tu in ka lamen uh hi." 
2Corinthians10:16 Tua zawkciangin Lungdamna Thupha sia note ii ngalkhat ngamte ah ka hil thei tu uh a, ngualdang khat ii lo sungah a kiseam sa nasep tungtaang ah kiphatsak natu a om buatu hi." 
2Corinthians10:17 Ahihang laithiangtho in, “A kuama po a kisuangtaak nuam sia in, Topa sep sa tungah kisuangtaak tahen,” a ci bang hi tu hi." 
2Corinthians10:18 Banghang ziam cile mihing khat sia, ama le ama pha a kisak ciang hi ngawlin, a phat takpi hunlam a kimu ciangin tua pa sia Topa in pha hi ci in a ngaisun hi." 
2Corinthians11:1 Ka mawmaw phial zonghin, nong thuak zawk natu ka dei hi. Hong khual tavun!" 
2Corinthians11:2 Pathian in note hong thinbot bangma in kei zongh in kong thinbot hi; note sia pasal khat bek taw kiteang tu a kamciam ka piaksa ngaknu thiangtho khat bang na hi uh a, tua pasal in Christ mama ahi hi." 
2Corinthians11:3 Eve sia ngul ii leilot pilnate taw a theam bangma in — na thinsung uh lalin Christ tungah a kicing le a thiangtho in na kipiakna uhte na nusiat thaak tu uh ka lau hi. 
2Corinthians11:4 Banghang ziam cile kote ii kong hil Jesus ahi ngawl, Jesus a dang khat ii thu, hil a hong pai pawpo sia lungdamin saang nu hi; kote tung panin, na nga uh Thaa le lungdamna thu taw a kibang ngawl het thaa le lungdamna thu na saang uh hi!" 
2Corinthians11:5 Note ii “sawltakte” na ci tuamte sangin kei sia bekcik zongh nozaw tuanin ka kingaisun bua hi! 
2Corinthians11:6 Thu sonna ah a kipan tuung hi kaleng heakna ah tuabang ka hi bua het hi; hi thu sia hun theampo sung le a omzia theampo thiang takin kong son tawntung sa ahi hi. 
2Corinthians11:7 Pathian Lungdamna Thupha sia note tungah kong hil ciangin thaman bangma kong la bua a; noma kong thupi vawt na in keima le keima ka kiniamkhiak hi. Tuasia in khial ka hi ziam? 
2Corinthians11:8 Note sungah kong sep laitakin pawlpi dangte in kei sia sum taw hong tham hi. Note kong hu natu in amate a suasuam ci tu bang ahi hi. 
2Corinthians11:9 Note sungah na ka sep laitakin, huna sum ka kisap ciang, no kong konlaw bua hi; Macedonia pan hong pai suapuite in ka kisap theampo hong puak hi. A bosa hunsung bangma in mai sang zongh ah: note atu in vanhngit ka hi ngei buatu hi!" 
2Corinthians11:10 Achaia ngam koima theampo ah hi keima kisuantaakna sia, kuama in hong khaam ngawl tu ci in ka sungah a om Christ ii thumaanna taw kong kamciam hi." 
2Corinthians11:11 Kong it ngawl hu in hi bangin pau ka hi ziam? Pathian in note kong it hunlam hong tel hi! 
2Corinthians11:12 Tua “sawltak” te in kote sep bangma ka seam uh ci in kisuantaak natu thu khat po a nei thei ngawl natu in, tu a ka sep teng ma ka seam tan lai tu hi." 
2Corinthians11:13 Tua mihingte sia sawltak tatakte hi ngawl hi — amate sawltak maan ngawlte hi a, a nasepna huvau leilot in Christ sawltak tatak te bangin a kimealsealte ahi uh hi." 
2Corinthians11:14 A lamdang hi ngawl hi! Satan ngawngawn zongh khuavak vantunglalang khat taw kibang tu in, kimealseal thei lai hi!" 
2Corinthians11:15 Tua ahikom ama ii naseamte in, thutang naseamte taw kibang tu in a kimealseal le a lamdangpi hi ngawl hi. A tawpna ah amate in a ngamtatnate uh taw a kiphu bang tatakin nga tu hi." 
2Corinthians11:16 Keima sia a mawmaw in kuama in hong tuat heak hen kong ci kik hi. Ahizong tuabangin, nong ngaisun uh le zong, kiphatsak pui tu tawmno ka nei thei natu beak in a mawmaw khat bangin hong saang lamh tavun." 
2Corinthians11:17 Tu a ka papau teng ahile Topa ii hong pausak tute hi ngawl hi; hi kisuantaakna vai ah a mawmaw khat bangin ka pau takpi hi. 
2Corinthians11:18 Ahihang mihing ngaisutna lelte taw zong a kisuangtaak om ahiciang, kei zongh tuabang ma ka ngamta tu hi." 
2Corinthians11:19 Noma tek ma ciim mama na hi uh komin, mihing mawmawte sia lungdam takin na dual uh hi!" 
2Corinthians11:20 Note a uk bang po hong sawlte, note tung pan na neisa hong duupte, thaang taw hong siate, hong nomute ahibuale na maitang hong beangte khat pawpo na dual uh hi." 
2Corinthians11:21 Tuabangte vawt tu in ih lauthauh leihna teng ka pualaak tu sia ka maizum hi! Ahihang khat pawpo in bang khat po huvau in a kisuangtaak ngam le — a mawmaw bangin pau tu ci leang — kei zongh ka kisuangtaak ngam tu hi. 
2Corinthians11:22 Amate sia Hebrew mi ahi uh ziam? Kei zongh ka hi hi. Amate sia Israel te ahi uh ziam? Kei zongh ka hi hi. Amate sia Abraham suante ahi uh ziam? Kei zongh ka hi hi. 
2Corinthians11:23 Amate sia Christ ii naseamte ahi uh ziam? A mawmaw bang ka hi tha ta zong, amate sangin a phazaw naseampa ka hi hi! A nasia zaw in na ka seam a, thong zong tamvei ka taak zaw hi, tamvei hong kivel zaw a, a tamvei zaw ka thi dektak bul hi." 
2Corinthians11:24 Jew te in sawmthum le kuavei veu, ngavei tak hong saat hi;" 
2Corinthians11:25 thumvei sia Rome mite in hong saat hi; khatvei sia suangtum taw hong kihua hi. Thumvei teambaw lal ka tawk a, khatvei sia nai kul le nai li sung tui sungah ka om hi." 
2Corinthians11:26 Ka khualhawna tam mama sungah namthuamna pan, ngualsuamte pan, Jew mipuite le Gentile te tung panin, lauhuaina ka thuak hi; khuapi sung, duisung ngampa, tuipi tung le ngualtamh thumaan ngawlte tung panin lauhuaina tuatuam ka thuak hi." 
2Corinthians11:27 Nasep thil vawt kitatsat ngawl a, mut ka nga ngawl hun tamvei mama hi; ka ngilkial hun le ka dangko hun om a; an ngina ka neak ngawl hun, belh tu nei ngawlin, puansilh ka nei ngawl hun tam pheivei hi." 
2Corinthians11:28 Thildang a vaal lai, pawlpite theampo atu in, ka thinbotna in, ni simin ka ngim hi." 
2Corinthians11:29 Mihing khat po a tha zawm ciangin, kei zongh in ka tha zawmpui hi; khat po mawna sungah a puk ciangin, thin heena taw ka kidim hi."

2Corinthians12:1 Bangma phattuamna om ngawl ahitazong, ka kisuangtaak kul tu hi. Ahihang tu in Topa hong piak mukholnate le thupualaaknate huvau kong son tu hi." 
2Corinthians12:2 Tu nung kum sawm le kum li lai in Tapidaw khat sia vantung a saang belna ah kila to hi ci in ka he hi. (Hisia in a piang tatak ma ziam maw, mukholna khat nei ahi ziam ci sia ka he bua hi — Pathian bek in he hi.)" 
2Corinthians12:3 Khatvei hong ci kik leng, hisia pa sia Paradise ah kila to hi ci in ka he hi. (Tusia zong a piang tatak ma ziam maw mukholna nei ziam ci sia ka he bua hi — Pathian bek in he hi.) Tua munah kammal taw a kilo thei ngawl, mihing kam le muk ii son thei ngawl kamte ama in za hi."

2Corinthians12:5 Tua ahikom hisia pa huvau ka kisuangtaak tu hi — ahihang ka thazawmna hong kilanghsak thute simngawl keima tungtaang ah ka kisuangtaak buatu hi. 
2Corinthians12:6 Hi ka son thu in thumaan ahikom, kisuangtaak nuam leng zong a mawmaw ka hi tuan buatu hi. Ahihang kisuangtaak ngawl tu khi hi, banghang ziam cile ka pauna hong kizaakna le ka sepna hong kimuna za sangin a vaalin kuama ii hong thupi ngaisut tu ka dei bua hi." 
2Corinthians12:7 Na lamdang tam mama ka mute hu in, kiphatsakna taw ka kisakthei ngawl natu in keima pumpi sungah hong zo tu in Satan sawltak khat bangin na a seam, a bot pumpi natna khat hong kipia ahikom, ka kiphatsak ngawl natu in hong khaam hi." 
2Corinthians12:8 Hisia hong laak keaksak natu in tua huvau Topa tungah thumvei thu ka ngen hi. 
2Corinthians12:9 Ahihang ama ii hong zona in: “Ka thuthiamna in nang atu in kicing hi, banghang ziam cile na thazawm ciangin keima vaang sia lianbel hi,” hong ci hi. Christ ii vaangletna in kei tung panin hong dalna ka phaw natu in, ka thazawmnate hu in ka kiphatsak sia ka lungdam belna ahi hi." 
2Corinthians12:10 Christ atu in thazawmna, kiselnona, haksatna, vawtsiatna le buainate ah ka lung a kim hi. Banghang ziam cile ka thazawm ciangin a thahat ka suak hi." 
2Corinthians12:11 Keima sia a mawmaw bangin ka ngamta hi — ahihang noma in tuabang a ngamta tu in nong vawt uh hi. Note in kei nong deina a lak tute na hi uh hi. Banghang ziam cile bangma ka hi ngawl hangin, note ii a lamdang tuamin na ngaisut uh “sawltakte” sangin ka nozaw tuan bua hi." 
2Corinthians12:12 Sawltak ka hina a kilak natu in nalamdang laknate le a lamdangte tam mama note sungah hong kivawtte sia thinsauna tatak taw hong kivawt ahi hi. 
2Corinthians12:13 Sum taw huna tu kong konlaw ngawl sia simngawl, pawlpi dangte sangin a siazaw in kong vawtna bangbang om ziam? Nong hesuakna in tuabang ka phat ngawlnate hong maisak tavun!" 
2Corinthians12:14 Tu in no kungah hong haw tu in thumvei ka kithoai zo a — note tungah bangma kong ngen buatu hi. Ka dei sia in na sum na paai uh hi ngawl a, noma mama na hi uh hi. A tatakin ci leang tate in nute pate a vaak tu hi ngawlin, nute pate ii tate a vaak tu hizaw hi." 
2Corinthians12:15 Ka nei theampo ka nuntakna dongin note kong hu natu in lungdam takin ka zangh siat tu hi. Tua za in kong it mama hu in, nong itna uh khiam zaw pumsai tu nu ziam?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Tua zawkciang kei sia note atu in vanhngit ka hi ngawlna maan na sa tu uh hi. Ahizong khat po in kei sia theamna zangh thei a, leilotnate taw note hong aitaa hi hong ci tu hi." 
2Corinthians12:17 Kamtai kong paisakte khat po tungtawnin note tung panin noptuam kong la ziam? 
2Corinthians12:18 Titus in hong pai in, Tapidaw suapui dang khat hong tonpui natu in keima nget ahi hi. Titus in a kilawm ngawlin, no tung pan laak hong nei ci tu nu ziam? Ama le kei sia a kibang tupna te tungtawnin a kibangin ngamta hi ngawl khu ziam?" 
2Corinthians12:18 Titus in hong pai in, Tapidaw suapui dang khat hong tonpui natu in keima nget ahi hi. Titus in a kilawm ngawlin, no tung pan laak hong nei ci tu nu ziam? Ama le kei sia a kibang tupna te tungtawnin a kibangin ngamta hi ngawl khu ziam?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Note mai ah a tawntungin koma le koma kipanghong bangin, nong ngaisun tha tu uh hi. Hi ngawl hi! Pathian mai ah Christ ii pau le hong oai bangin ka pau uh a, ka it lawmte awng, na ka vawt theampo uh sia, noma kong hu natu a, a kivawt ahi hi." 
2Corinthians12:20 No kung kong thet ciangin kong dei bang na hi ngawl na uh kong mu tu le, kei zongh nong dei uh bang ka hi ngawlna nong mu tu ka lau hi. Kihauna le ki eenna, thintomna le kaangsung heakna, kiselnona le kingensiatna, kiphatsakna le kilemngawlna te ka mu tu ka lau hi." 
2Corinthians12:21 Kong pai kik ciangin, a bosa hun sung note tam mama in mawna na vawt uh a, cii le sa deina taw nu le pa mawna te — paktat ngamtatnate pan a kisiik kik ngawl mawneite hu in, keima ka kap tu a, note mai ah ka Pathian in kei hong maizum sak tu ka lau hi." 
2Corinthians13:1 Hisia in tu in note kungah a thum veina haw tu in kong paina ahi hi. “Kimawsiatna khat pawpo sia tetti nii ahibuale a tamzaw ii tetti panna taw kipsak kul hi.” — laithiangtho ci bangma ahi hi. 
2Corinthians13:2 Hun bosa sungah mawna a vawt sa note tung le ngualdang theampo tungah kong son nuam hi; tu masia a, a nii veina kong pai lai in, hong ci zo khi hi, ahihang, tu in note kung pan a khualana ah om ka hi ciang hong ci kik tu khi hi: kong pai kik ciang ahile kuama daan thuakna taw na kipeal thei buatu uh hi." 
2Corinthians13:3 Christ in keima tungtawnin hong ci tatak ma a hina tetti lakna na dei uh teng na nga tu uh hi. Ama in note taw hong sep khop ciang, a thazawm bua hi; a vaangletna no sungah hong lak zaw hi." 
2Corinthians13:4 Banghang ziam cile, thinglamtee tungah a kithisakna in, thazawmna khat ahitazong, Pathian ii vaangletna taw ama nungta hi. Ama taw ih pumkhatna ah eite zongh ih thazawm hi; ahihang note taw ih kizopna ah ama ii nuntakna sung a om Pathian ii vaangletna sia ih siim khawm tek tu hi." 
2Corinthians13:5 Upna sungah na nungta uh ziam ci in na kitel natu in, noma le noma kisit vun a, noma le noma thu na kikhen vun. Christ Jesus in note sungah hong nungta hi ci in na he tatak na uh ziam? — noma a cingtaak ngawl het na hi buana uh le he tu ni hi." 
2Corinthians13:6 Kote ii lel ngawl hunlam noma tel tu in kong um hi. 
2Corinthians13:7 Kote zawna a lak tu hi ngawlin, ko sia a lelte bang zongh hi tha tu ka hi uh hang, a maan sia na sep thei natu in na tatkhial ngawl natu Pathian tungah thu kong ngetsak uh hi." 
2Corinthians13:8 Banghang ziam cile kote in thumaan thutak langpanin a seam thei te ka hi bua uh a, a panpui bek ka hi uh hi." 
2Corinthians13:9 Ko ka thazawm uh ciang, na thahat uh sia ka lung uh dam hi. Tua ahiciang note sia na cialcing thei natu in thu kong ngetsak si uh hi." 
2Corinthians13:10 Tua hangin, hi lai sia no taw ih khualat laitak kong at ahi hi; note hong susia tu hi ngawlin, note kong puuaphat nopna in, Topa hong piak thuneina zanghin — no kung kong thet ciang hangsanin kong ci a kul ngawl natu in lai hong ngal thaak ka hi hi." 
2Corinthians13:11 Tuaciang tu in suapuite awng, mangpha na man tavun! Cialcin natu na hanciam vun; kong thuumna hong ngai tavun; khat le khat na kithukim vun a; kilem takin na nungta vun. Tuaciangin ki itna le thinnopna — Pathian sia note taw hong omkhawm tu hi." 
2Corinthians13:12 Khat le khat sia suapui kinapna taw na kivaitha tavun. Pathian ii mihing theampo in paupuina kam hong thaak hi. 
2Corinthians13:13 Topa Jesus Christ ii thuthiamna, Pathian ii itna le Thaa Thiangtho ii hong pawlpuina in note theampo taw hong om tahen." 
Galatians1:1 Mihingte kung pan hi ngawl, mihingte ii piansak thu zongh hi ngawl, thina pan Jesus a tho kiksak Pa Pathian le Jesus Christ kung pan sapna a nga sawltak ahi keima Paul ii tung pan laithak ahi hi." 
Galatians1:2 Hi sungah a om suapuite theampo in Galatia ngam pawlpite tungah kimuana kam kong thaak khawm uh hi: 
Galatians1:3 Ih Pa Pathian le Topa Jesus Christ in thuthiamna le thinnopna hong pia tahen. 
Galatians1:4 Tu a hunpha ngawl sia panin ih suatak natu in ih Pa Pathian ii deina a zuina taw, Christ in eite ii mawna hangin ama le ama hong kipia hi." 
Galatians1:5 Pathian tungah minthanna a tawntung a tawntungin om tahen! Amen. 
Galatians1:6 Note lamdang kong sa hi! Christ ii thuthiamna taw note hong sam pa, tawmvei no sungin na taisan uh a, tuaciang lungdamna thu a dang khat na saang uh hi."

Galatians1:8 Ahihang kote ka hi uh zong, ahibuale vantunglalang khat keak ahihialzong, note tungah kong hil sa lungdamna thu taw a kitumdangin hong hil a om le tua mi sia hell khuk sungah kivawk tahen!" 
Galatians1:9 Tu masia zonghin kong ci zo uh hi, tu zonghin kong ci kik hi. Khat po in na saansa uh lungdamna thu sia taw a kitumdang khat hong hil le tua pa sia hell khuk sungah kivawk tahen!" 
Galatians1:10 Hi bang a ka awsua sia mihingte ii diksak tu hi na sa uh ziam? Hi ngawl het hi! Pathian ii diksak tu bek ka deina hi! Mihingte maipha nga nuamin a hanciam ka hi ziam? Tuabangin hanciam lai ka hile Christ ii naseam khat ka hi buatu hi. 
Galatians1:11 Ka suapuite awng, ka hil lungdamna thu in mihing tung pan a piang thu hi ngawl hi ci sia kong son nuam hi."

Galatians1:14 Jew te biakna ka zui sung teng in ka khanngualte a tamzaw mai ah ka madawk a, ih pute ii taangh ngeinate sungah amate sangin a nasia zawin a kipia pa ka hi hi."

Galatians2:7 Jew te tungah lungdamna thu hil tu nasep sia Peter tungah a piak bangin Pathian in kei sia Gentile te tungah lungdamna thu hil tu in nasep hong piak sia amate ii a musa ahi hi.

Barnabas le kei sia Gentile te sungah seam tu a, amate sia Jew te sungah seam tu in ka thukim uh hi." 
Galatians2:9 Lampui ahi tuak James, Peter le John te in Pathian ii hi nasep tuam hong piakna hong heakpui hi; tua ahikom amate in Barnabas le kei hong nukset a, tuasia in ei teng maapang khawm tek tu ci in limlakna ahi hi. Barnabas le kei sia Gentile te sungah seam tu a, amate sia Jew te sungah seam tu in ka thukim uh hi." 
Galatians2:9 Lampui ahi tuak James, Peter le John te in Pathian ii hi nasep tuam hong piakna hong heakpui hi; tua ahikom amate in Barnabas le kei hong nukset a, tuasia in ei teng maapang khawm tek tu ci in limlakna ahi hi. Barnabas le kei sia Gentile te sungah seam tu a, amate sia Jew te sungah seam tu in ka thukim uh hi." 
Galatians2:10 Amate hong nget thu khat sia amate pawl sungah, a cimawte ka phaw pui natu hi a, tua thu in sep tu ka lawp thu tatak ahi hi." 
Galatians2:11 Ahihang Antioch ah Peter hong pai ciangin, mihon mai ah ama ka nalh hi, banghang ziam cile ama in khial citak ma in khial hi." 
Galatians2:12 James ii hong puak mihing pawlkhat tua mun a thet ma in, Peter sia Gentile suapuite taw an nekhawm zo hi. Ahihang hi mite hong thet zawkciang, vunteap a atsak nuamte a kiitak hu in, ama kikeam a, Gentile te taw an a nekhawm nuam bua hi." 
Galatians2:12 James ii hong puak mihing pawlkhat tua mun a thet ma in, Peter sia Gentile suapuite taw an nekhawm zo hi. Ahihang hi mite hong thet zawkciang, vunteap a atsak nuamte a kiitak hu in, ama kikeam a, Gentile te taw an a nekhawm nuam bua hi." 
Galatians2:13 Jew suapui dangte zongh Peter bangma in a lauthauh te bang hong hi paih hi; tuaciang Barnabas ngawngawn zongh amate lauthauh ngamtatna in zo hi. 
Galatians2:14 Lungdamna thu thumaan lampi tang sia, amate in tawn ngawl hi, ci in ka mu ciangin, Peter munah amate theampo mai ah hi bangin ka ci hi. “Nang sia Jew mi khat hi napi Gentile te bangin a nungta nginge sa na hi a, Jew te bangin na nungta bua hi. Tua ahiciang Gentile te sia Jew te bangin a nuntak natu in bangbangin zawthawk thu taw na sawl zo tu ziam,” ka ci hi." 
Galatians2:15 A tatakin eite sia ih pian panin Jew te ih hi hi, “Gentile mawneite” a kici te ih hi bua hi." 
Galatians2:16 Ahizong mihing khat sia Jesus Christ ih upna tung bek tawnin, Pathian mai ah thutang kisuaksak hi ci in ih he a, Thukham ii deina bang sepna taw hi ngeingawl hi. Eite zongh in Thukham ii deina bang ih sepna taw hi ngawlin, Christ ih upna tungtawnin Pathian mai ah thutang ih sua natu in, Christ Jesus ih um zo hi. Banghang ziam cile Thukham ii deina zuina taw Pathian mai ah kuama thutang kisuaksak ngawl hi." 
Galatians2:17 Tua ahile Christ taw ih kipumkhatna pan thutang suak tu in, ih hanciam tak ciang, Gentile te za ma in mimawte in hong kimu ahile Christ sia mawna a piangsak tu in a seam ahi tu ziam? Hi ngawl het hi!" 
Galatians2:18 Thukham ka phiat sate puuapha kik tu in, ka kipan le — Thukham a paltan khat ka hi hunlam keima le keima a kipualaak ka hi hi." 
Galatians2:19 Ahihang Thukham taw kisai in kei ka thi zo hi — Thukham mama in hong thatlum zo hi — Pathian atu ka nuntak thei natu ahi hi. Christ taw ama ii thinglamtee tungah ka thi khawm zo hi," 
Galatians2:20 tua ahikom, a nungta sia kei ka hi nawn bua a, ahihang kei sungah a nungta sia Christ ahi hi. Tu a ka nuntakna sia ahile kei hong it a, a nuntakna kei atu hong pia Pathian Tapa ka upna taw a nungta ka hi hi." 
Galatians2:21 Pathian ii thuthiamna nial tu ka uuk bua hi. Ahihang mihing khat in Thukham tungtawnin Pathian mai ah thutang kisuaksak ahile Christ ii thina in khiakna nei ngawl a suak hi! 
Galatians3:1 Galatia mihing mawmawte awng! Akua in hong bum ziam? Jesus Christ ii thinglamtee tungah a thina thu sia na mittang uh taw, thiang takin na mu thei tu in hong kilak zo hi!" 
Galatians3:2 Hi thu khat sia hong son tavun: Pathian Thaa sia Thukham ii deina, na zuina uh panin, saang nu ziam maw, lungdamna thu za a, na upna uh pan nga hizaw nu ziam?" 
Galatians3:3 Bangbangin tu zata in mawmaw thei nu ziam! Pathian Thaa taw kipan phot nu hi; tu in noma thahatna taw khup sawm nu ziam? 
Galatians3:4 Na heaksa theampo no atu in bangma mama hi ngawl ahi ziam? Tawm peuma khiakna nei nanak tu hi! 
Galatians3:5 Pathian in Thaa hong pia a note sungah nalamdang lakna hong vawt sia Thukham ii deina na zui uh hang ziam maw lungdamna thu za a na up uh hang ziam? 
Galatians3:6 Abraham tungah thupiangte ngaisun vun; laithiangtho in, “Ama in Pathian um a, ama upna hangin Pathian in thumaan thutang in saang hi,” ci hi." 
Galatians3:7 Tua ahiciang Abraham suan tatakte sia upna a nei mihingte ahi hi, ci in na tel natu ahi hi." 
Galatians3:8 Pathian in Gentile te sia upna tungtawnin thutang suaksak tu hi ci in laithiangtho in sonkhol hi. Tua ahikom laithiangtho in Lungdamna Thupha sia Abraham tungah, “Nang tungtawnin Pathian in mihing nam theampo thupha pia tu hi,” ci in son hi." 
Galatians3:9 Abraham in um a thupha kipia hi; tua ahikom a umte theampo ama bangin thupha kipia hi. 
Galatians3:10 Thukham zuina a suangte sia haamsiatna nuai ah nungta hi. Banghang ziam cile laithiangtho in, “A kuama po Thukham laibu sungah a ki at teng a vekpi in a zui tawntung ngawlte sia Pathian ii haamsiatna nuai ah om hi!” ci hi." 
Galatians3:11 Tu in Thukham taw Pathian mai ah kuama thutang kisuaksak ngawl ci sia kitel thiang hi, banghang ziam cile laithiangtho in, “Upna tungtawnin Pathian mai ah thutang a kisuaksak sia bek nungta tu hi,” ci hi." 
Galatians3:12 Ahihang Thukham in, upna taw a kisaina bangma om ngawl hi. “A kuama po thukham deina a vekpi in a seam peuma nungta tu hi,” laithiangtho in ci zaw hi." 
Galatians3:13 Ahihang Christ in ei atu a kihaamsiatna taw Thukham ii hong puak haamsiatna panin eite ama in hong tan zo hi! Banghang ziam cile laithiangtho in, “A kuama po, thing tungah a kikhai sia in Pathian ii haamsiatna nuai ah om hi,” ci hi." 
Galatians3:14 Upna tungtawnin Pathian ii hong kamciamsa Thaa ih nga natu le Abraham tungah Pathian kamciamsa thuphate, Christ Jesus tungtawnin Gentile te tungah a kipiak thei natu in, Christ in tuabangin vawt ahi hi." 
Galatians3:15 Ka suapuite awng, ni sim a piang sonteena khat kong zangh tu hi: mihing nii in na khat tungtaang ah thukim in lungkimna lai a vawt uh le kuama in tua thukimna paltan thei ngawl a, belap thei ngawl hi." 
Galatians3:16 Tu in, Pathian in Abraham le ama ii suan pa tungah kamciamte pia hi. Laithiangtho in mihing a tam cina a lak “a suan a paalte” ci kammal zangh ngawlin, mihing khat bek a cinopna “a suan” ci kammal sia Christ a cinopna hi." 
Galatians3:17 Ka son nop sia Pathian in Abraham taw thuciamna vawt a, ka kholet tu hi, ci in kamciam pia hi. Kum zali le kum sawmthum zawkciang a kipia Thukham in tua thuciamna paltan in Pathian kamciam sia phiat thei ngawl hi." 
Galatians3:18 Banghang ziam cile Pathian letsong sia Thukham tungah kibulphu hile, ama kamciam tungah kibulphu ahi nawn bua hi. Ahizong ama ii kamciam hangin Pathian in Abraham sia tua letsong pia hi." 
Galatians3:19 Tua ahile Thukham ii tupna in bang ziam? Tatkhialna sia bang ziam ci in a lak tu in a kibelap ahi hi, tuaciang tua Thukham sia kamciam a kipiakna pa, Abraham ii suan sia hong pian mateng a kho tu in a kingaisun ahi hi. Thukham sia vantunglalangte in hong thaaksuk a, mihing khat in a kilaklaw ah palai hong seam hi." 
Galatians3:20 Ahihang mihing khat nguak sepna sungah palai kul ngawl hi; tuaciang Pathian sia khat ahi hi. 
Galatians3:21 Tua ahile Thukham sia Pathian kamciamte taw a kileebul ziam? Kileebul ngawl het hi! Banghang ziam cile mihingte in nuntakna hong pia thei Thukham khat a saang zo le tua thukham zuina taw mihing sim in Pathian mai ah thutang kisuaksak thei tu hi. 
Galatians3:22 Ahihang laithiangtho in leitung bup sia mawna vaangletna nuai ah om hi, ci hi; tua ahikom Jesus Christ ih upna bulphu a, a kipia kamciam sia, ama a umte tungah kipia hi." 
Galatians3:23 Ahihang upna nei natu hun hong thet ma in Thukham in hi hong pai tu upna hong kipualaak mateng eite theampo thongtaak bangin hong khabil hi. 
Galatians3:24 Tuaciangin Upna tungtawnin Pathian mai ah thutang ih sua thei natu in, Thukham in Christ ii hong pai mateng hong uk hi."
