Galatians3:25 Tu in upna nei natu hun sia hisung hong theng zo ahikom, Thukham in eite hong uk nawn bua hi." 
Galatians3:26 Note theampo sia upna tungtawnin Christ Jesus taw na kipumkhatna uh hu in Pathian ii tate na suak siat uh hi. 
Galatians3:27 Note Christ taw na kipumkhatna sungah na ki baptize uh a, tuaciang Christ ama mama ii nuntakna taw puan bangin hong kisilhsak zo cinopna hi." 
Galatians3:28 Tua ahikom Jew te le Gentile te, silate le sila ahi ngawlte, pate le numeite kilaklaw tek ah kilamdanna om nawn ngawl hi; Christ Jesus taw na kipumkhat uh ciangin note theampo sia pumkhat na hi uh hi." 
Galatians3:29 Christ ii neisa na hi uh le, Abraham suante na hi uh a, Pathian hong kamciam sate na saang tu uh hi." 
Galatians4:1 Ahihang tu in zomto suak leang — Pa ii ngamh a lua tu tapa in na theampo ama ii neisa ahihang, a khanmoi lai in sila bangin kivawt hi." 
Galatians4:2 Ama a khanmoi laitakin a pa ii a hun ciam dong a vai teng a hawmsak tu le ama a en tu in pasal pawlkhat om hi. 
Galatians4:3 Tuasia bangma in eite zongh thaa lamsang ah ih khanthin matengin vaannuai bup a uk thaa te ii sila in ih om hi. 
Galatians4:4 Ahihang a hun hong cin pepeet ciang, Pathian in a Tapa hong paisak hi. Ama sia mihing ahi leitung nu khat ii tapa bangin hong pai a, Jew te Thukham nuai ah nungta hi," 
Galatians4:5 Pathian ii tapate tanute ih sua natu in thukham khutnuai ah a omte a tat natu in tuabangin hong piang hi. 
Galatians4:6 Note sia ama ii tapa tanute na hina uh a lak natu in, Pathian in a Tapa ii Thaa “Pa awng, Ka Pa awng!” ci in a au Thaa sia ih thin sungah hong puak hi." 
Galatians4:7 Tua ahikom nang sila hi nawn ngawlin tapa khat na hi hi. Tuaciangin ama tapa hi zo na hikom, Pathian in a tapate a tanute atu, a nei theampo nangma hong pia tu hi." 
Galatians4:8 Hun bosa sungah note in Pathian na he bua uh hi, tua hu in a maan ngawl pathiante ii sila in na om uh hi." 
Galatians4:9 Ahihang tu in Pathian na heak zawk uh ciang — tua ahibuale Pathian ii no hong heak zawkciang ci leang — banghangin tua a zawngkhal, a khuangai huai ukna nei thaate kung zuan kik thei nu ziam? Banghangin amate sila suak kik nuam nu ziam?" 
Galatians4:10 Nite, thate, khuahunte le kumte na thupi laak uh hi." 
Galatians4:11 No huvau in ka thinngim hi! No atu ka sep sa teng bangma a kimang thei ngawl a suak bua natu ziam? 
Galatians4:12 Ka suapuite awng, hong ngen khi hi, keima bang hong hi tavun. Ahi tatakin ci leang kei zongh noma bangma ka hi hi. Kei tungah no ii nong khialna uh bangma om ngawl hi." 
Galatians4:13 Lungdamna thu note kong hil maksakna ahang sia na he lai uh hi; ka ciinat hu a hong hil ka hi hi. 
Galatians4:14 Ka pumpi omzia sia note atu in thinngimpi khat ahitazong, nong zawngsak bua uh a nong nial bua uh hi. Vantunglalang khat na saan tu uh bangin nong saang zaw uh hi; Christ Jesus na saan tu uh bangin, kei nong saang uh hi." 
Galatians4:15 Tualai in lungdam mama nu hi! Ahitazong bang teng piang man ziam? Na mittang uh khelkeak in kei hong pia thei le uhte hong pia nuam liangin om nu hi, ci in keima tatak ma in ka son thei hi." 
Galatians4:16 Tua ahile, tu in thumaan thutak sia kong son hu in na ngalpa suak zo ka hi ziam?" 
Galatians4:17 Tua midangte in note nasia takin hong thinnuammaw hi, ahihang amate tupna le sawmnate pha ngawl hi. Amate ii no hong kin bangin no zongh amate na kin thei natu in, no le kei hong khen nuam ahi hi." 
Galatians4:18 Tu in tuabang a kithin nopmawkna tatakte sia tupna le sawmna pha hithong le — hisia in note taw kong omkhop ciang bek hi ngawlin, a tawntung atu in pha hi." 
Galatians4:19 Ka it tanote awng, Christ pianzia note sungah hong pian mateng in, numeite nausuak tu a tut ciangin a bot bangma in ka thuak hi." 
Galatians4:20 Tu laitakin note taw kong omkhawm thei nuam hi, tua hile kong ngaisut zia kikheal thei tu hi. Note atu in ka thinngim mama hi!" 
Galatians4:21 Thukham khutnuai ah a om nuamte, thu khat kong dongh tu hi. Thukham ii cina sia za ngawl nu ziam?" 
Galatians4:22 Abraham in tapa nii nei a, khat sia sila numei taw a hin hi a, a dang khat sia sila ahi ngawl a suakta numei taw a hin ahi hi." 
Galatians4:23 Sila numei taw a hin tapa sia mihing pian ngei bang a, piang hi. Ahihang a suakta numei taw a hin sia in Pathian kamciamna pan piang hi, ci hi." 
Galatians4:24 Hi te sia limlakna khat bangin kihe thei hi. Numei nii sia thuciamna nam nii hi. Sila in a piang tate a hing sia Hagar hi, tuaciang ama in Sinai mual ah a kivawt thuciamna ii lim ahi hi." 
Galatians4:25 Hagar sia Arabia ngam Sinai Mual ii lim hi a, a mihingte theampo taw sila kaai in a om lai hun Jerusalem khuapi ii lim ahi hi." 
Galatians4:26 Ahihang vantung Jerusalem sia a suakta hi a, ama sia eite ii nu ahi hi." 
Galatians4:27 Banghang ziam cile laithiangtho in, “Tasel numei awng, lungdam in! lungdamna taw aukeak in! Nang nautut nat a he ngeingawl nu awng! Banghang ziam cile, a kitaisan numei in, a pasal ii a nusiat ngeingawl numei sia sangin, ta tam a nei zaw tu hi,” ci hi." 
Galatians4:28 Isaac sia kamciamna panin piang ahi bangma tu in no, ka suapuite awng, kamciamna pan a piang tate na hi uh hi." 
Galatians4:29 Tua hunlai in a pian ngei bangin a piang tapa in Pathian Thaa taw a piang tapa sia vawtsia hi; tu in zongh tuabang ma ahi hi. 
Galatians4:30 Ahihang laithiangtho in bang na ci ziam? “Sila numei le a tapa paikhiasak vun; banghang ziam cile sila numei ii tapa in a suakta numei ii tapa taw a pa lamhsa a lua khawm buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Galatians4:31 Tua ahikom ka suapuite awng, eite sia sila numei ii tate ih hi bua a, a suakta numei ii tate ih hi hi." 
Galatians5:1 Suatakna sia ei neisa hi — Christ in hong suaktasak zo hi! Tua ahikom a suakta mihingte bangin, ding vun a, sila na suak kik nuam heak vun." 
Galatians5:2 Ngai vun! Keima Paul in kong ci hi, na vunteap uh na atsak nuam uh le Christ in note atu kimanna nei ngawl het ahi hi." 
Galatians5:3 Khatvei ma kong ci kik hi, pasal khat peuma in a vunteap a atsak nuam le Thukham buppi a zui kul hi." 
Galatians5:4 Thukham zuina taw Pathian mai ah thutang sua natu na hanciam uh le no teng in noma le noma Christ kung pan a kikhaktan na hi uh hi. Note in Pathian ii thuthiamna puasia ah na om uh hi. 
Galatians5:5 Kote ka hi uh le ka lam etna uh sia Pathian in thutang hong suasak tu ci thu ahi hi; hi thusia ka upna uh tungtawnin Pathian ii Thaa vaangletna taw hong seam tu hi ci in ka ngak uh sia ahi hi. 
Galatians5:6 Banghang ziam cile Christ Jesus taw pumkhatin ka om uh ciang vunteap atna ahizong, at ngawlna ahizong bangma kitumdanna a omsak bua hi; a thupi sia in ki itna tungtawn a, na a seam upna ahi hi." 
Galatians5:7 Na vawt uh sia pha mama hi! Akua in thumaan thu na nit tu sia hong khaktan ziam? Bangbangin ama in hong kaizawn ziam? 
Galatians5:8 No hong sam Pathian in tuabangin hong vawt ngawl hi. 
Galatians5:9 “A kithau sa anvui a khan natu in tol tawm bek kisamh hi,” a ci uh bangma ahi hi." 
Galatians5:10 Ahihang note huvau in thinmuanna ka nei lai hi. Topa taw pum khatin ih nuntakna in, ngaisutna tumdang na nei ngawl natu in hong lungmuangsak a, hong nawngkaisak pa sia akua po ahizong, Pathian in daan pia tu hi, ci in ka um hi." 
Galatians5:11 Ahihang kei ka hile, ka suapuite awng, vunteap at kul hi ci in thu hil lai ka hile banghangin hong kivawtsia lai ziam? Tua sia in thumaan hi thongle Christ ii thinglamtee thu ka hilna in bangma ngimna a piangsak buatu hi." 
Galatians5:12 No hong nawngkaisak mite tai siat le ka oai hi; amate le amate cil kinget vet tahen! 
Galatians5:13 Ka suapuite awng, no sia a suakta tu in hong kisam hi. Ahihang hi suatakna in chi le sa deina ii hong ukna tu a paulap nuam hisak heak vun. Tua taangin ki itna taw khat le khat kihu vun." 
Galatians5:14 Banghang ziam cile Thukham buppi sia thupiak khat in kingawm hi: “Nangma le nangma na ki it bangin na innpaamte na it in.” 
Galatians5:15 Ahihang ngamsate bangin na ngamta uh a, khat le khat kisuu in na kiliamsak uh le, tuasia ciang kidawm tavun, tua ahibuale khat le khat kilalcipsak tu nu hi." 
Galatians5:16 Kong son thu in hi sia ahi hi: Thaa in na nuntakna uh zeaksak vun, tua hile mihing pianzia ii deinate na lungkimsak buatu uh hi." 
Galatians5:17 Banghang ziam cile ih mihing pianzia ii deite sia Thaa ii deite taw kilangpan hi, tuaciangin Thaa ii deite sia mihing pianzia ii deite taw kilangpan hi. Hite nii in kingal hi, na ngamtat nop uh bangin na ngamta thei bua uh hi a cinopna hi." 
Galatians5:18 Thaa in hong lampui le Thukham khutnuai ah na om nawn bua uh hi. 
Galatians5:19 Mihing pianzia ii sepna sia thiang takin kimu hi. Tua sia in nu le pa paktatna, a kiihuai le zummawk ngamtatnate;" 
Galatians5:20 milim biakna le bum le ai toaina te hi. Mihingte khat le khat kingalin kido uh hi; amate ki eangin, thin uukin, ultup uh hi. Amate a pawl a pawlin kikhen hi;" 
Galatians5:21 kidungawkna, zukhamna, sikvil loklenna le hite taw a kibang ngamtatna dangte nei uh hi. Kidop natu kong piak ngei bangin tu in kong ci hi: hi bang ngamtatna neite in Pathian Ngam lua ngawl tu hi." 
Galatians5:22 Ahihang Thaa in itna, lungdamna, thinnopna, thinsauna, dikna, phatna, thumaanna," 
Galatians5:23 kiniam khiakna le eima le eima ki uk zawknate piangsak hi. Hi te a langpan thukham bangma a om bua hi. 
Galatians5:24 Tuaciang Christ Jesus ii neisa ahite in, a mihing pianzia le tua ii uukna le deinate sia thi khawmsak zo hi." 
Galatians5:25 Thaa in nuntakna ei hong pia zo hi; ama in ih nuntakna zongh hong uk nanak tu hi. 
Galatians5:26 Ei sia khat le khat tungah kiphasakin, kitaw in, ih ki eang buatu hi." 
Galatians6:1 Ka suapuite awng, tatkhialna nam khat po taw mihing khat a kiman le, thaa taw a nungta note in, ama sia a dinmun maan ah na koi vun; ahihang cikna thiamna na zangh hamtang vun. Tuaciangin note zongh ze etna na thuak ngawl natu noma le noma ki en in kidawm vun." 
Galatians6:2 Khat le khat vanhngitte na kidawn tavun, tuabangin Christ ii thukham na zui tu uh hi." 
Galatians6:3 Khat po in ama sia bangma hi ngawl napi, hi a kisa le ama le ama kitheam hi bek hi." 
Galatians6:4 Mihing khat simin ama le ama a ngamtatna kisit hen. A pha in a ngamta khat in ngualdang khat ii ngamtatna taw kiteengat ngawlin, ama ii ngamtat phatna tungah kisuangtaak thei tu hi." 
Galatians6:5 Banghang ziam cile mihing sim in a vanh uh tek a puak kul tu hi. 
Galatians6:6 Tapidaw thu a kihil pasal khat in, ama ii neisa na pha theampo a Syapa taw hawm tahen." 
Galatians6:7 Noma le noma kitheam heak vun; Pathian sia kuama ii theam zawk hi ngawl hi. Mihing khat in a poai bang lianin a at tu hi. 
Galatians6:8 Ama in leitung pumpi deina lo sungah a poai le, tua mun panin thina an kaikhawm tu hi; Thaa ii deina lo sungah a poai le Thaa panin tawntung nuntakna an kaikhawm tu hi." 
Galatians6:9 Tua ahikom na pha sepna sungah toi kisa bua tawng; banghang ziam cile thinkiam in tawp bua po leang ih anlaak tu hun hong theng tu hi. 
Galatians6:10 Tua ahikom hunpha ih nga simin mihing theampo tungah a pha ih seam tu a, a tuan in upna sung a ih innkuanpuite tungah ih seam tu hi." 
Galatians6:11 Keima khut taw laithak kong at ciang, laimal lian taw ka at sia mu tu nu hi!" 
Galatians6:12 Note tungah zawthawk thu taw vunteap hong atsak nuamte sia, a puatham thute ah kisa thei a, a kisuangtaakte ahi hi. Ahizong amate ii tuabang a vawtna sia, Jesus ii Thinglamtee hu in amate in vawtsiatna a thuak bua thei tha le ci in a ngaisut uh hang bek ahi hi." 
Galatians6:13 Vunteap at te ngawngawn zongh Thukham a zui bua uh hi; note vunteap hong atsak nopna thu in, pumpi tung a zeksa vawtna sungah na tum uh sia, a kisuantaak thei natu ahi hi." 
Galatians6:14 Ahizong kei ka hile ih Topa Jesus Christ ii thinglamtee bekma ka kiphatsak pui tu hi; banghang ziam cile ama ii thinglamtee hangin leitung sia kei atu in a thisa hi a, keima in leitung atu in a thisa ka hi hi." 
Galatians6:15 Mihing khat vunteap a ki at le a ki at ngawl sia a phatmawkna mama om ngawl het hi; a pha maw sia in mihing thak suana ahi hi. 
Galatians6:16 A nuntakna sungah hi ngeina a zuite tungah thinnopna le hesuakna om tahen a — amate le Pathian mihing theampo tung zongh ah om tahen! 
Galatians6:17 Thu khupna ah: kuama in kei tungah ngimna hong pia thuasak nawn heak vun, banghang ziam cile ka pumpi tung a meima pawn omte in kei sia Jesus ii sila ka hina lak hi." 
Galatians6:18 Ka suapuite awng, ih Topa Jesus Christ ii thuthiamna sia note theampo tungah hong om tahen. Amen." 
Ephesians1:1 Pathian ii deina taw Christ Jesus ii sawltak khat ahi Paul in — Jesus taw kipumkhat nuntakna sungah a thumaan Ephesus khua Pathian ii mihingte tungah lai kong thaak hi; 
Ephesians1:2 Ih Pa Pathian le Jesus Christ in thuthiamna le thinnopna hong pia tahen. 
Ephesians1:3 Ih Topa Jesus Christ ii Pa le Pathian tungah lungdamko tawng! Banghang ziam cile Christ taw kipumkhatna sungah ama in eite sia vantung ngam taw kisai thaa thupha theampo hong pia hi. 
Ephesians1:4 Christ taw kipumkhatna tungtawnin, ama mai ah sit baang ngawl le ih thiantho natu in, Pathian in leitung a vawt ma ngawngawn in eite hong teal zo hi. Hong itna hangin," 
Ephesians1:5 Pathian in Jesus Christ tungtawnin a tapa a tanute hong suasak natu in a khensat sa hi a — hi thu in ama diksak le tupna ahi hi. 
Ephesians1:6 A minthang a thuthiamna hu le a it a Tapa sungah eite a thawthongin hong piak letsong hu in, Pathian pok tawng." 
Ephesians1:7 Banghang ziam cile Christ ii chisan hangin eite kisuakta a, tua thu in ih mawna kimaisak hi, cinopna hi. Pathian ii thuthiamna bangza in lian ziam," 
Ephesians1:8 tua in, hi za ta a lian mama eite hong piak thuthiamna ahi hi! Ama ciimna theampo le a thuk mu theina taw," 
Ephesians1:9 Pathian in a tupna sa bangin vawt a, a pawlcing tu in a khensat sa ama tupna thuku sia Christ zanghin, eite hong hesak hi." 
Ephesians1:10 A hun hong tun ciangin Pathian ii a khuangkhim tu, hi tupna in vantung leitung ah bitphua sa theampo kaikhawm tu a, a lutang tu in Christ koi tu hi." 
Ephesians1:11 Na theampo sia Pathian ii tupna le khensatna bangin kiseam a; Pathian in a kipatciil pan mama in a khensatsa thu bulphu in, ama ii tupna hu in eite Christ taw kipumkhat a, ama aituam mihingte ih sua natu in hong teal hi." 
Ephesians1:12 Tua ahikom Christ sungah lametna a nei phit eite in, Pathian ii minthanna pok tawng!" 
Ephesians1:13 No ngupna hong puak thumaan thu ahi Lungdamna Thupha sia na zaak uh ciang, note zongh Pathian ii mihingte na suak uh hi. Note in Christ na um uh a, tuaciang Pathian in hong kamciamsa Thaa Thiangtho hong piakna taw ama ii neisa na hina uh tepteena tazeik note tungah hong tuum hi." 
Ephesians1:14 Tua Thaa in Pathian ii mihingte hong kamciam sate ih nga natu kipsakna hi a, ama ii neisa ahite tungah suatakna a cingin Pathian in hong pia tu hi ci in hong lungmuangsak hi. Ama ii minthanna pok tawng!" 
Ephesians1:15 Hi thu hu in, Pathian ii mihingte na itna uh le Topa Jesus na upna uhte ka zaak nungsang," 
Ephesians1:16 note atu in Pathian tungah lungdamkona ka tawlnga ngei bua hi. Ka thungetnate sungah kong phawk a," 
Ephesians1:17 ih Topa Jesus Christ ii Pathian, a vaanglian Pa tungah nang hong ciimsak a ama na heak natu le Pathian hong lak tu Thaa hong piak natu in, ka ngen hi." 
Ephesians1:18 Bang lametna nei tu in note hong sam a, a mite a piak tu a, a kamciam thuphate bangza in nasia, ci in na heak natu in na thinsung uh hong kihonsak a, a khuavak na mu thei natu in kong ngetsak hi," 
Ephesians1:19 tuaciangin ei, thu umte sungah na hong seam ama ii vaangletna sia bangza in lian ziam, ci in na heak natu kong ngetsak hi. Eite sungah na hong seam, hi a nasia thahatna in," 
Ephesians1:20 Christ sia thina pan thosak a, vantung ama ii tokhum ziatsang ah a tosak sia ma ahi hi." 
Ephesians1:21 Christ in tua munah vantung ukpite, thuneite, vaangletna neite, tote theampo ii tung panin uk hi; ama in hi leitung ah ahizong, hong pai pheang tu leitung ah ahizong, thunei min le zate theampo sangin a lianzaw min le za nei hi." 
Ephesians1:22 Pathian in na theampo sia Christ peang nuai ah koi a, na theampo ii ukpi Topa ahi tu in pawlpi tungah ama pia hi." 
Ephesians1:23 Pawlpi in Christ ii pumpi hi a, kicinna ahi ama mama in mun theampo ah na theampo khuangkhim hi." 
Ephesians2:1 A bosa hun sungah note in na thunit ngawl hang le, na mawnate hangin thaa lamsang ah a thisa na hi uh hi." 
Ephesians2:2 Tua hunlai in note in, leitung ngitlona zia na zui uh hi; van awng sungah thaa vaangletnate a ukpa thu na ni uh hi, tua thaa in tu laitakin Pathian thu a ni ngawl mihingte a uk sia ma ahi hi." 
Ephesians2:3 A tatakin eite zongh, amate bang ih hi ngei a, ih pianpui lungngulnate taw ih nungta zo hi, ih pumpi le ih thinsung taw a kisi bangin ih seam ih vawt hi. Ih pianlim in ngualdang bangma in, Pathian thin uukna thuak tu in, a kiciangtan sa ih hi hi." 
Ephesians2:4 Ahihang Pathian ii hesuakna sia kicing lawlawm a, tuaciang eite hong itna sia lian mama hi." 
Ephesians2:5 Tua hi a eite ih thunit ngawlna taw thaa lamsang ah a thisa in ih om laitak Christ taw hong nungtasak kik hi. Pathian ii thuthiamna taw note hong kingum zo hi. 
Ephesians2:6 Christ Jesus taw pumkhat ih hina taw vantung ngam ah ama taw a uk khawm tu in, Pathian in eite ama taw hong thosak zo hi." 
Ephesians2:7 Hi bangin a sepna sia Christ Jesus sungah hong kilak, ki itna sungah a om, a tuanin a lian saap thuthiamna sia hong pai tu hun theampo ah a kikhomsuan tu ahi hunlam hong lakna ahi hi." 
Ephesians2:8 Banghang ziam cile note in upna tungtawnin Pathian ii thuthiamna taw ngup sa na hi uh hi. Tua in note hanciamna hang hi ngawlin, note kisuantaak thaak ngawl natu in Pathian letsong ahi hi." 
Ephesians2:9  
Ephesians2:10 Eite in tu a ih hi babangin, Pathian hong vawtsa ih hi a, Jesus Christ taw kipumkhatna sungah ngamtat pha nuntakna nei natu in, hong bitphua sa ih hi hi, tua thu in eite sep tu in, hong koi kholsak sa ahi hi." 
Ephesians2:11 Amate le amate “Vunteap atte” (Pate ii amate pumpi tungah a vawtte cinopna) a kici Jew te in “Vunteap at ngawlte” hong ci, pianna suana pan Gentile te ahi note in, hun bosa sungah na omzia uh kiphawk tavun." 
Ephesians2:12 Tua hunlai in note in Christ taw kikhenin a omte na hi uh hi. Note in ngamdangmite na hi uh a Pathian ii tealsa mihingte na hi bua uh hi. Pathian ii mihingte tungah a kamciamte a bulphu thuciamnate sungah na kihel bua uh a, note in hi leitung ah lametna sel le Pathian selin na nungta uh hi." 
Ephesians2:13 Ahihang tu in, Christ Jesus taw na kipumkhat uh hu in, a khuala a om ngeisa note sia Christ ii chisan hu in a nai hong kithen zo hi." 
Ephesians2:14 Banghang ziam cile Christ ama mama in, Jew te le Gentile te minam khat hong suasakna taw eite tungah kilemna hong puak zo hi. Amate a khen, ngal a suaksak kidoina pang sia ama pumpi taw sutham zo hi." 
Ephesians2:15 Ama taw kipumkhatna hangin, minam niite sung pan, a thak minam khat a bitphua thei natu in, minam a doi Jew te ii thukhamte, a thupiakte le a zui tute theampo phiatin hong kilemsak hi." 
Ephesians2:16 Thinglamtee tungah Christ a thi ciangin amate kilaklaw ah kingal vawtnate lalthamsak hi; ama ii thinglamtee hangin, tua minamte ngeal sia pumkhat a suak tu in ngawmtua a, Pathian kungah zotpui kik hi." 
Ephesians2:17 Tua ahikom Christ hong pai in Pathian taw a kikhuala, no Gentile te tung le Pathian taw a kinai Jew te tungah kilemna thu ahi Lungdamna Thupha hong hil hi." 
Ephesians2:18 Christ tungtawnin eite theampo, Jew te ih hi a, Gentile te ih hi zongin, Thaa khat sungah Pa omna ih theng thei hi." 
Ephesians2:19 Tua ahikom, Gentile te sia, ngamdang mi, khualmi hi nawn ngawl a; tu in note in Pathian ii mihingte taw ngam mipui, Pathian innkuan sungah a kihel mihingte na hi uh hi." 
Ephesians2:20 Note zongh, sawltakte le kamsaangte ii cian phungkawng tungah a kisate na hi uh a, tua phungkawng, innking suangpi sia Christ Jesus ahi hi." 
Ephesians2:21 Ama in inn bup a lenpa hi a, khangtosakin Topa tungah a ki aap biakinn thiangtho a suaksakpa ahi hi." 
Ephesians2:22 Ama taw na kipumkhatna sung uh ah note zongh, Pathian ii a Thaa taw a teenna munah ngualdangte taw hong kisa khawm hi." 
Ephesians3:1 Hisia thu hu in, no Gentile te atu in Christ Jesus ii thongtaakpa keima Paul in, Pathian tungah thu ka ngen hi." 
Ephesians3:2 Note phattuam natu in, Pathian in a thuthiamna taw hi nasep sia kei hong piakna thu, na za takpi zo uh hi." 
Ephesians3:3 Pathian in a tupku sia hong lak a, kei hong hesak hi. (Hi thu a tom in kong at zo hi." 
Ephesians3:4 Kong lai at sa sia na sim uh le, Christ thuku ka heakna thu na he tu uh hi.)" 
Ephesians3:5 Hun bosa sungah tua thuku sia mihingte tungah kison ngawl a, ahizong tu in Pathian in a thiangtho sawltakte le a kamsaangte tungah Thaa taw lak zo hi." 
Ephesians3:6 A thuku sia bang ziam cile Gentile te le Jew te in Pathian thupha sia lungdamna thu hangin saang khawm thei hi; amate in pumpi khat ii nate hi tek a, Pathian ii Christ Jesus tungtawn a kamciam a piakte nga tek hi." 
Ephesians3:7 Ama ii vaangletna tungtawnin Pathian ii a tuam vilvelin hong piak letsong taw kei sia lungdamna thuhil naseampa ka suak hi. 
Ephesians3:8 Keima in Pathian ii mihingte sung pan a nobel sia sangin a nozaw lai pa ka hi hi; tua hi napi in, a kison zo ngawl Christ ii hauna Lungdamna Thupha Gentile te tungah a puak tu in Pathian in hamphatna hong pia hi," 
Ephesians3:9 tuaciang mihing theampo in, koi bangin Pathian thuku sia kiseam thei tu ziam ci in a mu thei natu in hong seamsak hi. Vantung ngam ah vantunglalang a ukte le vaangletna a neite ii, Pathian ii ciimna a tuatuamte, tu hun sungah pawlpi tungtawnin a heak thei natu in, na theampo a bitphua Pathian in a thuku sia a bosa khang hunte sungah seal top hi." 
Ephesians3:10  
Ephesians3:11 Hi thu sia Pathian in ih Topa Christ Jesus tungtawnin a kitaksua ama ii tawntung tupna taw kizui in a vawt ahi hi. 
Ephesians3:12 Christ taw ih kikopna le ama sungah ih upna hu in, Pathian omna munah kimuanna le hanna taw ih pai ngam hi." 
Ephesians3:13 Tua zawkciang, note atu in thuak ka hihang, na thin a kiam ngawl natu in kong thuum hi; tuate theampo sia noma phattuam natu ahi hi." 
Ephesians3:14 Hi thu hu in ih Pa mai ah ka khupdin hi," 
Ephesians3:15 ama tung pan vantung le leitung ah a om innkuan sim in a min maan a nga uh hi. 
Ephesians3:16 Pathian in ama ii a kicing minthanna panin a Thaa tungtawnin, na sungsang mi sia hong hatsak natu in, vaang hong piak natu kong ngetsak hi," 
Ephesians3:17 na upna hangin note thinsung ah Christ hong teangin, ki itna thu ah zung thuk le, bulkip na nei natu in thu ka ngen hi," 
Ephesians3:18 tuasia ciang note le Pathian ii mihingte theampo in Christ itna ii a zaina le a sauna, a saanna le a thuknate heak theina na nei tu uh hi." 
Ephesians3:19 Christ hong itna a kicing takin, kihe thei ngeingawl tu ahitazong, ama hong itna he thei in, Pathianzia mama taw na kidim sitset natu in, thu ka ngen hi." 
Ephesians3:20 Ih sungah a vaangletna taw hong sep hu in, ei ii nget thei le ngaisut theiza sangin tamzaw pek a seam thei pa:" 
Ephesians3:21 Pathian tungah pawlpi sung le Christ sungah minthanna sia hun theampo atu in a tawntung a tawntungin om tahen! Amen. 
Ephesians4:1 Tua ahiciang Topa ii na ka sep hu in, thongtaak keima in, Pathian ii note hong sap hun laitakin hong koisak bang nuntakna zia taw na nuntak natu in, kong hanthawn hi." 
Ephesians4:2 A tawntungin kiniamkhiak in, cinghkamh in, na thinsausak tavun. Khat le khat kidualna taw itna kilak tavun." 
Ephesians4:3 Na kilemna tungtawn a Thaa ii hong piak, no hong ngawmtua kipumkhatna sia ahi theiza in na keamcing tavun." 
Ephesians4:4 Note Pathian ii hong sapna sungah lametna khat a om bangma in, pumpi khat om a, Thaa khat om hi." 
Ephesians4:5 Topa khat, upna khat, baptize na khat om hi." 
Ephesians4:6 Mihing theampo ii Pathian le Pa khat bek om hi, tua Pathian in mihing theampo ii Topa hi a, ama in mihing theampo tungtawnin naseam a, mihing theampo sungah om hi." 
Ephesians4:7 Eite theampo in Christ hong piakna taw kizui in, letsong a tuam khat tek ih nga hi." 
Ephesians4:8 Laithiangtho in, “A saang mama na munah a paito lai in, ngalmat tam mama tonpui to hi. Ama in mihingte tungah tel pia hi,” ci hi." 
Ephesians4:9 Tu in, “Ama a paito hi,” a ci sia bang ci nuam ziam? A cinopna sia lei a thuk belna ah, paisuk masa zo hi, a cinopna hi." 
Ephesians4:10 Tua ahikom a paisuk pa sia vaannuai buppi ah a om siat natu in vantungte kalhin, a paitopa ma ahi hi." 
Ephesians4:11 “Mihingte tungah, letsong hong pia sia” ama ahi hi, pawlkhatte sawltak nasep, pawlkhat sia kamsaang nasep, a dangte thupha puak nasep, pawlpi keam le lai hil sya nasep pia hi." 
Ephesians4:12 Christ ii pumpi a kisak to natu in Tapidaw nasepna ah sep natu in, ama in hi bangin, Pathian ii mihingte theampo puuakhol natu in vawt hi." 
Ephesians4:13 Pathian Tapa ih heakna le ih upna sungah pumkhat ih sua natu in eite theampo ih kingawmkhawm tu hi; mihing puicingte ih suak tu a, Christ ii tun tan le a phakcia ih banto tu hi." 
Ephesians4:14 Tuaciangin phuatawm thimthel pilna taw ngualtheam a, a thuhilna uh taw ngual a lampialsak thei te hu in vuivak kikheal pawpo le tui kihual pawpo ii a paipui patangte na hi nawn buatu uh hi." 
Ephesians4:15 Ki itna thinsung nei in thumaan ih sonna taw lutang ahi Christ sangah a nanamin ih khangto zaw tu hi. 
Ephesians4:16 Ama ii ukna nuai ah pumpi ii a nate theampo kisi linlian a hong kipiasa kipee-awnate in, hong len khawm diimdiam hi. Tua ahikom pumpi sung na a tuatuamte in ahi tu bangin hong sep ciangin pumpi bup hong khang a, ki itna tungtawnin ama le ama hong kisa to hi." 
Ephesians4:17 Tua ahikom, Topa min taw kidop natu thu kong pia hi: a khua ngaisutna uh a mannung ngawl Pathian he ngawl mihingte bangin na nungta heak vun," 
Ephesians4:18 amate thinsung sia khuazingcip hi. Pathian piak nuntak ziate sungah amate atu bangma om ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile amate in heakna nei ngawlin a thin uh pui hi." 
Ephesians4:19 Amate in maizum he vet nawn ngawl hi, amate in ngamtatna pha ngawlte sungah ki aap uh a, a thasiathuai thu tuatuamte sungah cizat nei ngawl uh hi." 
Ephesians4:20 Christ tung pan na sin uhte in tuabang hi ngawl hi! 
Ephesians4:21 Ama thu sia na zaak takpi sa uh hi a, note a nungzuite na hina uh taw Jesus sungah thumaan thu note hong kihil hi." 
Ephesians4:22 Nidang a na nuntakziate uh taw hong nungtasak na milui uh — a maan ngawl duna le deinate ii a lalcipsak na milui uh sia vawkkeak vun. 
Ephesians4:23 Na thinsung uh le na ngaisutna uh sia a thak sitset na suaksak tavun," 
Ephesians4:24 tuaciangin, Pathian lim bangin kivawt a, a thiangtho, a thutang le nuntakna maan taw ama le ama hong kilak, na mithak suana uh sia na silh tavun." 
Ephesians4:25 Tua ahiciang, leilot thu son nawn heak vun! Mihing sim in a thu uppuite tungah thumaan son tahen, banghang ziam cile eite in Christ ii pumpi sungah nate ih hi khawm siat hi." 
Ephesians4:26 Na thin uh a uuk le, na thin uukna in, mawna sung thensak heak vun, thin uukna taw na nivui heak vun." 
Ephesians4:27 Doaimangpa hunpha na ngasak heak vun. 
Ephesians4:28 Ngual neisa a suttol thei sia in sutolna kheal tahen a, ama nuntak natu a thalaw natu le a zawngte a hu thei natu in, naseam tahen." 
Ephesians4:29 Kamsia pau heak vun, kammal manphate bek pau vun; kitaangsapna sungah a kizangh thei le hong sato thei kammalte pau vun, tua hile hong za po in, phattuamna nga tu hi." 
Ephesians4:30 Pathian ii suatak hong piak tu Ni kipsakna le Pathian neisa na hina hong ciamtee Pathian Thaa Thiangtho khuangaisak heak vun. 
Ephesians4:31 Thin natna, thin tomna le thin uukna theampo na vawk vun. Ki oksatna ahibuale kiselnona, ki etsatna a tuatuamte theampo vawk vun." 
Ephesians4:32 Khat le khat tungah kithuthiam zaw vun a, thinneam tavun, Christ tungtawnin Pathian ii note mawna hong maisak bangma in, note zongh khat le khat mawna kimaisak tavun." 
Ephesians5:1 Note sia Pathian ii it a tate na hi uh komin, ama bang na hi natu hanciam vun." 
Ephesians5:2 Christ in hong it a, Pathian diksak ngimnamtui biakpiakna le sangaw biakpiakna bangin, a nuntakna hong piak bangma, itna in na nuntakna uh uksak vun." 
Ephesians5:3 Note in Pathian ii mihingte na hi bangma in, numei le pa paktatna, a thasiathuai nuntakna le duhopnate note sungah son tu in zongh na nei vet heak vun." 
Ephesians5:4 Kampauna sungah a kiihuai, a nin kammal le zummawk kammalte na zak tu uh zongh kilawm ngawl a, Pathian tungah lungdamkona kam na pau tu uh hizaw hi." 
Ephesians5:5 A kuama po a paktatte, a thasiathuai a, a kithoaite le a duhopte (duhop sia milim biakna nam khat hi) in Pathian le Christ Ngam lua ngeingawl tu hi ci sia pha takin na he uh hi." 
Ephesians5:6 Mawmawt kammal taw kuama in theamsak heak vun; hi thute mama hu in, Pathian ii thin uukna sia ama ii thu a ni ngawlte tungah tung tu hi." 
Ephesians5:7 Tua ahikom tuabang mihingte taw kizopna nei heak vun. 
Ephesians5:8 Noma mama zongh khuazing sungah om ngei na hi uh hang Topa mihingte na sua uh ciangin, khuavak sungah na om uh hi. Tua ahiciang khuavak ii neisa mihingte bangin na nungta tavun," 
Ephesians5:9 tua khuavak in na a pha theampo, thutang suana le thumaanna hong puak hi." 
Ephesians5:10 Topa ii diksak thute sin vun. 
Ephesians5:11 Mihingte ii sep le vawt khuazing taw a kipawl a mannung ngawlte na thutha heak vun a, tua ngamtatnate khuavak sungah then siat zaw tavun." 
Ephesians5:12 (Amate ii khuazing sungah a sep a vawt kute sia son tu zongh in maizumhuai lei hi.) 
Ephesians5:13 Tuaciang na theampo khuavak sungah hong kipusua tak ciang, amate pianzia babang thiang takin hong kilangh tu hi;" 
Ephesians5:14 banghang ziam cile a thiang takin a kilangh na khat pawpo sia khuavak suak hi. Tua hu in hi bangin kici hi; “A mutthippa awng, khanglo in, tuaciang thina pan tho in, tua hile Christ sia nang tungah hong taang tu hi.”" 
Ephesians5:15 Tua ahikom na nuntakzia kidawm in, heakmeal nei ngawlte bangin na nungta heak vun a, a ciimte bangin na nungta vun." 
Ephesians5:16 Hunpha na nga simin, a pha in zangh in, banghang ziam cile tu hun in ngitlo hun ahi hi." 
Ephesians5:17 Tua ahikom mawmaw heak vun a, Topa in nang sia bang vawt le hong oai ziam cisia na heak tu in na hanciam vun." 
Ephesians5:18 No hong lalsak thei, sapittui na kham heak vun: Thaa taw na kidim zaw tavun." 
Ephesians5:19 Psalm late, biakna late le la thiangtho te ii kammalte taw khat le khat na kipaupui tavun; biakna late le psalm late sa in, na thinsung theampo taw Topa pok vun." 
Ephesians5:20 Topa Jesus Christ min taw na theampo atu in Pathian ahi Pa tungah a tawntungin lungdam ko tavun. 
Ephesians5:21 Christ na thasiana uh taw khat le khat tungah thu kinitna nei tavun. 
Ephesians5:22 Zite awng, Topa ii thu na nit uh bangin na pasalte ii thu ni tavun." 
Ephesians5:23 Banghang ziam cile Christ in pawlpi tungah thu a nei bangma in, pasalte in zite tungah thu nei hi: tuaciangin Christ sia a pumpi ahi pawlpi ii Hunpa ahi hi." 
Ephesians5:24 Pawlpi in Christ tungah thunitna a nei bangma in, zite in pasalte tungah a khawng a kheakin thunitna nei tahen." 
Ephesians5:25 Pasalte awng, na zite it vun. Christ in Pawlpi it a, a nuntakna a piak bangin na zite na it vun." 
Ephesians5:26 Pawlpi sia thiangtho a, sit baang ngawl, paubanna om ngawl a, Pathian kammal ahi tui taw a kisilthiang zawkciang Pathian tungah tua pawlpi a ki aap thei natu in pawlpi atu Christ kipia hi." 
Ephesians5:27  
Ephesians5:28 Tuabang ma in pasalte in amate pumpi a it bangma in, a zite a it natu ahi hi. Pasal khat a zi a itpa in, ama le ama ki it ahi hi." 
Ephesians5:29 (Kuama in ama ii pumpi a ensan a om bua hi. Christ ii pawlpi tungah a vawt bangma in, mihingte in a pumpi sia anvaak in ou zaw hi;" 
Ephesians5:30 banghang ziam cile eite in ama pumpi ii nate ih hi hi.) 
Ephesians5:31 Laithiangtho ii, “Hi thu hangin pa khat in a nu le a pa nusia tu a, a zi taw a kop tu hi. Tuaciangin amate nii sia khat suak tu hi,” a ci bangma ahi hi." 
Ephesians5:32 Laithiangtho sungah a thuk mama thuku khat kipualaak a, tua thu in Christ le pawlpi atu ahi hunlam ka tel hi." 
Ephesians5:33 Ahihang tuasia in note tung zongh ah kizangh thei hi; pasal khat simin ama le ama a ki it bangin a zi it tu a, zite khat simin a pasal zakta tu uh hi." 
Ephesians6:1 Tate awng, nute pate thu na nit tu uh sia na Tapidaw vaipuak hi a, hisia in a maan sep tu sia ahi hi." 
Ephesians6:2 “Na nu le na pa zakta in,” a ci sia kamciam taw a kizui thupiak masabel ahi hi:" 
Ephesians6:3 “Tua hile na theampo sungah na khangto tu a, leitung ah na khansau tu hi,” ci hi." 
Ephesians6:4 Nute pate awng, na tate thin uuk natu in vawt heak vun. Tapidawte kitekna le kihilna taw khangtosak zaw vun." 
Ephesians6:5 Silate awng, na leitung tote sia kiitakna le liinna taw a thu ni vun; tuabangin na hi uh ciang, Christ atu a seam bangma in thinsung takpi taw seam vun." 
Ephesians6:6 Hong kipok tu thangaina taw amate hong mu sung teng bekin, tuabangin ngamta heak vun a; Christ ii sila bangin, Pathian dei sia na thin theampo taw seam vun." 
Ephesians6:7 Sila na hina uh taw na na sep uh ciangin, mihingte bek atu seam hi ngawlin Topa atu a seam bangin maitai takin naseam vun." 
Ephesians6:8 Topa in sila hikale sila ngawl hikale mihing sim ii a sep nasep pha tungtaang ah thaman pia tu ci in na phawk tavun. 
Ephesians6:9 To ahite awng, silate tungah tuabang ma in na ngamta vun a, tawnna kam na zangh nawn heak vun. Note le na silate in vantung ah Topa khat nei khawm a, tua pa in a kikhaikim in mihing khat sim tungah thu hong khen tu hi ci in phawk tavun." 
Ephesians6:10 A khakbel in, Topa taw kikopna pan le ama ii vaangletna lianpi taw na thahat tavun." 
Ephesians6:11 Doaimangpa ngitlo theamnate na nalh zawk natu in, Pathian hong piak ngalvanhte theampo na silh vun." 
Ephesians6:12 Banghang ziam cile eite in mihing ngal ih do bua a, vantung a thaa ngilote hatna, a ukte, thuneite, hi khuazing hun sungah vaangletna neite ih do hi." 
Ephesians6:13 Tua ahiciang tu in Pathian ngalvanhte silh vun! Tua hile hun ngilo ni hong thet ciangin ngalte ii hong simna te na nalh zo tu uh a, a tawp dongin na sim zawk uh ciang na dinmun kip lai tu hi." 
Ephesians6:14 Tua ahiciang, thumaan thutak sia na kawng ah kawngkhau bang, thutang suana sia awmdalna bang," 
Ephesians6:15 Lungdamna Thupha thansak tu kinginna sia peangdap bangin zanghin, a kithoaisa in om vun." 
Ephesians6:16 Hun theampo sungah upna sia lum bangin toai vun; banghang ziam cile tua taw Ngilopa hong kaapna thaltang kuangte theampo na tulmit thei tu uh hi. 
Ephesians6:17 Ngupna sia thik lukhu bangin na saang vun a, tuaciangin Pathian kammal sia Thaa ii hong piak namsau bangin na zangh vun." 
Ephesians6:18 Hite theampo thungetna taw seam vun a, Pathian munah huna na ngen vun. Thaa ii hong lampui bangin, hun theampo sungah thu na ngen vun. Hi thu hu in pilvangin, thinkiam ngei heak vun; Pathian ii mihingte theampo atu thu na ngen tawntung vun." 
Ephesians6:19 Lungdamna thuku sia hangsan tak le ngual ii tel tu ka son thei natu in, son tu ka kithoai ciang, Pathian ii ka son tu thu hong hil natu kei atu zongh thu hong ngetsak tavun." 
Ephesians6:20 Tu laitakin, thonginn sungah om ka hi hang, hi lungdamna thu atu in, keima sia tongciin ka hi hi. Lungdamna thu ka son tu bang a, hangsan takin ka son ngam natu thu hong ngetsak tavun." 
Ephesians6:21 Bangbangin om khi ziam ci in na heak thei natu in, Topa nasepna sungah thumaan naseam ih suapuipa Tychicus in kei huvau thu thakte hong son tu hi." 
Ephesians6:22 Tuasia hu in, kote ka vekpi in bangbangin om khu ziam ci thu hong son tu le, note hong hanthawn tu in — ama note kungah kong paisak laitak ahi hi." 
Ephesians6:23 Pa Pathian le Topa Jesus Christ in Tapidaw suapui theampo tungah thinnopna le ki itna, upna taw hong pia khawm tahen." 
Ephesians6:24 A thi ngei ngawl itna taw ih Topa Jesus Christ a it te theampo tungah Pathian ii thuthiamna hong om tahen. 
Philippians1:1 Christ Jesus ii naseamte ahi Paul le Timothy in — Christ Jesus taw pumkhat a om pawlpi lampuite le, Husyate a kihel Philippi ah a om Pathian ii mite theampo tungah lai kong thaak uh hi." 
Philippians1:2 Ih Pa Pathian le Topa Jesus Christ in thuthiamna le thinnopna hong pia tahen. 
Philippians1:3 Noma kong ngaisut simin, noma hu in ka Pathian tungah lungdam ka ko hi;" 
Philippians1:4 tuaciangin no teng theampo atu thu ka nget simin thinnop lungdamna taw thu ka ngen hi," 
Philippians1:5 banghang ziam cile ka kipat phit ni pan tu dong lungdamna thu nasepna sungah nong hu zia uhte ka ngaisut hang ahi hi. 
Philippians1:6 Tua ahikom no sungah hi nasep pha hong patpui Pathian in nasep a kizaw tu hun Christ Jesus Ni ciang dong na hong seam suak tu ka ci ngam hi. 
Philippians1:7 Ka thinsung ah no kong phawk tawntung hi! Tuabangin kong phaw sia kei atu in a kilawm thu ahi hi. Banghang ziam cile, tu laitak thonginn sungah ka om laitak ahizong, lungdamna thu ii a maanna sia huuk tu le kipsak tu in ka suatak laitak ahizong, Pathian ii hong piak hi phattuamna nong saan pui tek uh hi." 
Philippians1:8 A thukin no kong phawna sia Christ Jesus mama ii thinsung pan hong luang tatak ahi hunlam ka tetti sia Pathian ahi hi. 
Philippians1:9 Ki itna na khantosak seseam natu, heakna maan le thukhenna maan na nei khop thei natu," 
Philippians1:10 tua tungtawnin, a phabel sia na teal thei natu in thu kong ngetsak hi. Tuasia ciangin Christ ii Ni hong thet hunin niinnoina teng le mawsiatna theampo taw na kipeal tu uh hi." 
Philippians1:11 Pathian minthan natu le ama pok natu in Jesus Christ bek ii piansak thei a maan pilna thiamnate taw na nuntakna uh hong kidim tu hi. 
Philippians1:12 Suapuite awng, kei tungah hong tung thute sia lungdamna thu khangtosak takpi ahi hunlam na tel tu uh ka dei hi." 
Philippians1:13 Tua thute taw kizomin, kumpi inncing ngalkap bup le hi sungah a om a dang teng in kei sia Christ ii naseam ka hi hu a thongtaak ka hi hunlam he siat uh hi." 
Philippians1:14 Thong sungah ka om hu in u le nau a tamzaw in Topa tungah thinmuanna neizaw uh a, tuaciang ngupna thu lau ngawlin hil ngam vaial uh hi." 
Philippians1:15 Amate sung panin pawlkhatte ahile eenna le kingal vawtna thin taw Christ thuhil a, ahizong a dangte in thupha deina takpi taw hil uh hi." 
Philippians1:16 Pathian ii kei sia lungdamna thu a maanna dinpui tu nasep hong piak hunlam amate in he ahikom hite in ki itna taw ma thu a hil uh hi. 
Philippians1:17 A dangte ahile Christ thu sia thinpha taw thangsak ngawl a, amate kaang sung vai tupna thin taw hil uh hi; thonginn sungah ka om laitakin hong nawngkaisak thei zaw tu in ngaisun uh hi." 
Philippians1:18 Phamaw ka sa bua hi! Hisia huvau ka lungdam hi — tupna maan taw ahizong, ahi bua zong Christ thu a nanamin kihil hi pole ka lungdam veve hi. Tuaciangin ka lungdamna sia kizom suak tu hi," 
Philippians1:19 banghang ziam cile nong thungetsakna uh le Jesus Christ ii Thaa kung pan hong pai huna taw kei hong kisuaktasak tu ci sia ka he hi. 
Philippians1:20 Ka deina tatak le ka lametna sia bang ziam cile ka thi zong ka nung zong ka nuntakna buppi taw Christ vaang ka piak thei natu, hun theampo sung, a tuanin tu hun sung teng seseamin, hangsan takin ka panmun ka lel ngeingawl natu thu ahi hi." 
Philippians1:21 Nuntakna sia bang ziam? Kei atu in, nuntakna sia Christ hi a, thina sia hamphat zawk natu ahi hi." 
Philippians1:22 Ahizong ka nuntak ciangin a thupi nasepte seam thei zaw tu ka hile, thina le nuntakna, ka teal sawn tu ka he vaset bua hi." 
Philippians1:23 Kei sia ka lang le ka lang panin hong kikang hi. Hi nuntakna nusia in Christ taw ka omkhawm nuam mama a, tua in a phazaw kan thu ahi hi;" 
Philippians1:24 ahihang no atu in ci leang a nungta in om lai leng thupi zawlai hi. 
Philippians1:25 Hi thu thiangtel ka hikomin a nungta a om tu ka hina ka he hi, upna sungah noma khantona le thinnopna a kibelap natu in no teng taw kong om lai tu hi," 
Philippians1:26 tua hile no kungah kong haw kik ciangin Christ Jesus taw kipumkhat in na nuntakna sungah kei nong kiphatsak pui seseam thei natu a hi hi. 
Philippians1:27 Tu in a thupi thu in na nuntakna uh sia Christ lungdamna thu ii dei bang tatak ahi natu thu ahi hi, tua hile kei kong pai thei a, kong pai maw zong note tupna kibang khat tungah kip takin a dingte hi a, deina khat bek taw lungdamna thu upna atu ngaldo khawmte na hi hunlam kong za tu hi." 
Philippians1:28 Na ngalte na kiita heak vun; na thinlian tawntung tavun, tua hile amate in hong lel tu a, noma in na zo tu uh hi, banghang ziam cile zawna hong pia sia Pathian ahi hi." 
Philippians1:29 Ama um bek ngawlin, ama hang a ngimna na thuakna uh taw, Christ atu nasep thei natu in hamphatna nga na hi uh hang hi." 
Philippians1:30 Tu in keima taw kopin ngaldona sungah na kihel thei tu uh hi. Tua ngalkidona sia nidang zongin ka do nong mu uh a, tu zongh in na zaak uh bangma in ka do lai hi." 
Philippians2:1 Christ sungah na nuntakna in, hong thahatsak a, tuaciang ama hong itna in hong thinnuamsak hi. Note in Thaa taw na kipawlkhawm uh a, tuaciang khat le khat ii tungah dikna le ciliapna na nei uh hi." 
Philippians2:2 Tua ahikom ka lungdamna nong pawlcinsak natu in ngaisutna kibangin, ki itna khat nei khawm a, thin khat lung khat hi in na om natu uh kong hanthawn hi." 
Philippians2:3 Kaangsung atu tupna bek taw ahizong, kisak thei nopna lel taw ahizong bangma seam heak vun, tua hi ngawlzaw in, khat le khat ii tungah kiniamkhiakin noma sangin ngualdangte a phazaw in ngaisun tawntung zaw vun." 
Philippians2:4 Noma ii kinsante bek na en heak vun a, khat le khat ii kinsante zongh na ki etpui tavun:" 
Philippians2:5 Christ Jesus ii a nei thinpuak na nei tavun. 
Philippians2:6 Ama in Pathian ii pianzia nei nginge a, ahihang Pathian taw kikim natu in zawthawk thu zanghin hanciam tu a ngaisun bua hi." 
Philippians2:7 Tua hi ngawlzaw in, ama uuk thu in a nei theampo nusia in naseampa pianzia la hi. Ama in mihing taw kibangin piang a, mihing bangin kilangh hi." 
Philippians2:8 Ama in kiniamkhiak a, a thi tu in thunitna lampi tawn a — a thina thinglamtee tung dongah pai hi." 
Philippians2:9 Hi thu hangin Pathian in ama sia a saangbelna munah laamto a mindang khat pawpo sangin a lianzaw min pia hi. 
Philippians2:10 Tua ahikom Jesus min patoai natu in vantung, leitung ah nuntakna a nei theampo, nuai simlei ah a om theampo in khupdin tu uh a," 
Philippians2:11 tuaciang a theampo in Pa Pathian minthan natu Jesus Christ sia Topa hi ci in, a kilangh takin thangsak tu uh hi." 
Philippians2:12 Tua ahikom ka itte awng, no kungah kong om lai in ka thu nong nit tawntung uh bangma in, no taw kong omkhop ngawl ciang ngawngawn in, ka thu nong nit tu uh sia thupi zaw lai hi. Na ngupna a cingtaak natu in launa le liinna taw na seam tan tavun," 
Philippians2:13 banghang ziam cile ama deina na zui thei natu le na uuk natu in Pathian sia a tawntung na sung uh ah na hong seam hi. 
Philippians2:14 Na theampo ah phun ngawl, nial ngawlin seam vun," 
Philippians2:15 tua hile mawna le ngamtat siatna taw kidim leitung mite kawmah, a sitbaang ngawl Pathian ii tate bangin a maw ngawl, a thiangthote na suak thei tu uh hi. Aksite ii van ah a taan bangma in," 
Philippians2:16 nuntakna thu amate na son uh ciangin amate sungah na taang tu uh hi. Tuabangin na hi uh le Christ Ni hong thet ciangin, no kong kiphatsak pui natu a thu ka nei tu hi, banghang ziam cile ka hanciamna sa le ka sepna sa teng a luithawthong hi ngawl hi ci in hong lak tu hi." 
Philippians2:17 Note upna hangin Pathian a kipia sangaw biakpiakna tungah piakkhiatna khat bangin ka nuntakna chisan kibua tu ahile zong ka lungdam tu a, ka thinnopna no theampo kong hawmsawn tu hi." 
Philippians2:18 Tuasia bangma in note zongh na lung uh na damsak vun a, na thinnopna uh kei nong hawm tu uh hi." 
Philippians2:19 Topa ii deina a om le noma thu ka zaakna taw ka kihansua natu in Timothy kong paisak pal thei tu hi. 
Philippians2:20 Ama bekma sia kei taw ngaisutna kisi a, no hong thinnuammaw tatak pa ahi hi." 
Philippians2:21 Midang khat pawpo ahile Jesus Christ atu sangin, ama ii aituam thute bek kin hi." 
Philippians2:22 Ama taktai ziate bangbangin hong lak a, ama le kei sia pata bangin lungdamna thu atu bangza in diangkhawm khu ziam ci sia na heak uh hi." 
Philippians2:23 Tua ahikom ka vai bangbang takin hong piang tu ci in ka heak po ciang, no kungah ama kong paisak tu hi." 
Philippians2:24 Keima mama no kung kong pai pal thei natu in Topa ka muang hi. 
Philippians2:25 Keima hong hu tu in kamtai a na zak sa uh, kei taw kop a, naseamin ngal hong do pui ih suapui Epaphroditus kong paisak kul tu hi ci in ka ngaisun hi." 
Philippians2:26 Ama in note theampo hong mu tu kaal ngakla a, a cina hi ci in na zaak uh sia a thinnuam ngawl hi." 
Philippians2:27 Ama a cina takpi peu a, thi dektak zawsap hi. Ahihang Pathian in ama hesuak a, ama bek hi ngawlin kei zongh, khuangaina nasia zaw ka thuak ngawl natu in hong hesuak hi." 
Philippians2:28 Tua ahikom kong paisak tu sia ka thalawp kan hi. Tua hile ama na mu uh ciang na lungdam tu a, kei khuangaina bo tu hi." 
Philippians2:29 Tua ahikom Topa sungah suapui khat a hina hangin lungdamna taw na saang vun. Ama bang ahi tua mi theampo tungah zatakna lak tavun," 
Philippians2:30 banghang ziam cile kei nong hu thei ngawlna munah huna hong piak natu in, Christ ii na a sepna sungah a luangkhaamin a thi dektak pa ahi hi." 
Philippians3:1 Thukhupna ah, ka suapuite awng, Topa taw pumkhat na hina uh taw kisai in lungpil tavun. Ka at sa thute ka at kikik sia phamaw sa tuan ngawl khi hi, note thinmuan natu hi zaw hi." 
Philippians3:2 A sia a vawtte, tua uite, vunteap at kul hi a ci hamtangte, na encik tavun." 
Philippians3:3 A maan vunteap atna a neite sia amate hi ngawl a, eima ih hi zaw hi, banghang ziam cile eite in Pathian sia ama Thaa taw ih bia a, Christ Jesus taw pumkhat a ih nuntakna sung ah, a lawpte ih hi hi. A puatham cii le sa limte tungtaang ah eite in muanna ih nei bua hi." 
Philippians3:4 Keima zongh tuabang thute muan thei natu a neipa ka hi hi. A puatham cii le sa limte muan thei tu thu nei ing a ci khat po a om le tuabang ci thei natu thu a tamzaw ka nei hi. 
Philippians3:5 Ka sua zawk nipi khat a cin ciangin ka vunteap hong ki atsak hi. Ka pianna sia Israel mi in ka piang a, Benjamin suan hi in, Hebrew chi tatak ka hi hi. Jew te Thukham zuina taw kizomin keima in Pharisee khat ka hi hi," 
Philippians3:6 a biakna sangah tha lawp leilam ka hi komin, pawlpi ka vawtsia zazaan hi. Mihing khat in thukham tanna taw thutang suak thei tu hile sitbaanna ka nei bua hi." 
Philippians3:7 Ahihang meetna in ka ngaisut thei thute theampo sia tu in Christ atu hangin supna hizaw hi ci in ka tuat hi. 
Philippians3:8 Tuate bek ahi bua hi: ka Topa Christ Jesus heakna thu sia manpha zaw pek ahi hu in nadang theampo sia supna hi ci in ka tuat hi. Ama hangin na theampo ka vawk zo hi; Christ ka nei thei natu le, ama taw pumkhat ka sua bit thei natu in na theampo sia ninbu lomtangh bang bekin ka ngaisun hi," 
Philippians3:9 Thukham zuina taw a kinga theite nam ahi keima aituam thutang suana khat sia ka nei nawn bua hi. Christ ih upna tungtawnin hong kipia, Pathian kung pan hong pai upna a kibulphu thutang sia tu in ka nei zo hi." 
Philippians3:10 Christ heak tu le ama thaw kikna vaangletna siim tu, ama thuaknate thuakpui tu, a thina sungah ama taw kiban tu sia ka dei bulpi ahi hi," 
Philippians3:11 tua in keima mama thina pan nuntakna ah ka thaw kik tu ka lametna ahi hi. 
Philippians3:12 Ka nasepna taangtun zo ing, tua ahibuale cialcing zo ing ci ngawl khi hi. Jesus Christ in ama atu in kei hong sungsuam zo a hina tel sia ka nga zawk natu in ka hanciam tan lai hi." 
Philippians3:13 Hi hi, ka suapuite awng, tua tel nga zo khi hi, ci in ka ngaisun bua hi; ahizong ka sepna khat sia, nungsang thute mangil in maisang thute ka phak natu in ahi theiza ka hanciam hi." 
Philippians3:14 Tua ahikom Jesus Christ tungtawnin tungsang nuntak natu Pathian hong sapna ahi, tel a nga zo tu in tang takin mungtupna sangah ka tai hi." 
Philippians3:15 Thaa lamsang ah a khanthin eite theampo in hi bang thin ih nei natu ahi hi. Ahihang no pawlkhat in thutuam na nei uh le Pathian in hong telsak tu hi. 
Philippians3:16 Tuabang ahi hial zong, tu dong ciang ih zui sa hi ngeinate taw ma mainawt tawng." 
Philippians3:17 Suapuite awng, keima ngamtat bangin hong zui tawntung tavun. Noma ettee tu a ngamtatna maan kong koisak sia a zuite na nadon`` tavun." 
Philippians3:18 Hi thute tamvei ma kong son ngei zo a, tu in thitui taw kong son kik hi: a nuntakna zia uh taw thinglamtee tungah Christ' thina ii ngalte a suak mihing tam mama om hi." 
Philippians3:19 Amate sia a khakbel ciangin hell theng tu uh hi, banghang ziam cile cii le sa deinate sia amate ii pathian ahi hi. A maizum huai, a thasiathuaite thangphatna in la uh a, leitung neisa nate bekma ngaisun uh hi." 
Philippians3:20 Eite ih hile vantung ngammite ih hi a, vantung panin ih Hunpa Topa Jesus Christ hong pai tu thalawp takin ih ngak hi." 
Philippians3:21 Ama in a thazawm a thithei ih pumpite sia na theampo ama uk sung a thet natu, a vawt theina vaang zangh a, ama ii vaang nei pumpi taw kibangin hong vawt tu hi." 
Philippians4:1 Tua ahikom suapuite awng, no sia kei atu bangza in na ithuai uh a, bangza in hong phawk khi ziam! Nong lungdamsak mama uh a, note hu in ka angtang mama hi! — ka it suapuite awng, hisia in na nuntak sung teng Topa sungah na khodin tu uh zia ahi hi." 
Philippians4:2 Euodia le Syntyche te awng, kong nget nop thu in kei nong hesuakna in Topa sungah unau numeite bangin na thukim thei natu uh na hanciam vun." 
Philippians4:3 Tuaciang a thumaan ka naseppui noma zongh in, hi numeite na hu tu uh ka dei hi; banghang ziam cile amate sia Pathian ii nuntakna laibu sungah a om Clement le ka naseppui dangte theampo taw kop in, lungdamna thu kizel natu in keima taw nasia tak a diangte ahi uh hi." 
Philippians4:4 Topa taw pumkhat na hi hu in, a tawntung lungdam tavun. Kong ci kik hi: na lungdam tavun!" 
Philippians4:5 Mihing khat sim tungah na cikna uh lak tavun. Topa hong pai pal tu hi. 
Philippians4:6 Na khat pawpo atu in thinngim heak vun, ahihang na thungetna theampo ah na kisap uh te, Pathian tungah lungdamko nopna thin taw na ngen tawntung vun." 
Philippians4:7 Tua hile mihing tel zawk ngawl Pathian ii thinnopna in Christ Jesus taw na kipumkhatna hangin, na thin na lung hong ngammuangsak tu hi." 
Philippians4:8 A khakbel kong cinopna ah ka suapuite awng, thupha le a pok huai thute: a thumaan, mipi tan huai, a thutang, a thiangtho, a ithuaite le a thasiahuai nate na ngaisun tavun." 
Philippians4:9 Ka kammalte le ka ngamtatnate pan na heak uh, na saan uhte sia na zangh vateak tavun. Tua hile eite thinnopna hong pia Pathian in no taw hong omkhawm tu hi." 
Philippians4:10 Topa taw kipumkhat a ka nuntak sungah a khuangei hun khat zawkciangin khatvei ma nong thin nopmawkna uh nong lak thei lai natu in, hunpha nga kik na hi uh ciangin ka lungdamna lian hi. Hong kin ngawl nu hi kong ci bua hi — nong thin nopmawkna uh nong lak tu hun om ngawl hi bek hi." 
Philippians4:11 Hi bang ka ci ciang hong kingaingon kong sakna hi tuan ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile ka nei babang taw lungkim natu ka sin sa ahi hi." 
Philippians4:12 Cimawkna le ci thei zawknate ka he hi. A koima pawpo ah bang hun po ahizong ngilvana le ngilkialna, hauna le zawnna sungah, lungkim thei natu in hi thuku ka sin sa ahi hi." 
Philippians4:13 Christ ii hong piak vaangletna taw na theampo phul zawk natu thahatna ka nei hi. 
Philippians4:14 Tua ahitazong, ka ngim nganate ah nong hu uh sia na phat mamana uh hi." 
Philippians4:15 Lungdamna Thupha ka hil kipat sawng, Macedonia ka nusiat ciangin kei hong hu pawlpi sia noma bekma na hi hunlam noma Philippi te in pha tak ma na heak uh ahi hi; ka nganate le ka supnate ah noma bekma in nong sikpui uh hi." 
Philippians4:16 Thessalonica khua ah huna ka kisap laitakin khatvei bek hi ngawlin, huna nong thathaak uh hi." 
Philippians4:17 Letsong nga tute a thangai ka hi bua hi; na thupha vawt sate tungah a meet a kibelap tu ka mu nopna hizaw hi. 
Philippians4:18 Tua ahikom hi sungah nong piaksa uh theampo kong saanna lai om a — kicing vaal hi! Epaphroditus in na letsong uh theampo hong puak ahikom, tu in ka kitaangsap theampo nei zo khi hi. Tuate in Pathian mai ah ngimnamtui piak taw kibangin a saannophuai le dik a sak biakpiakna hi." 
Philippians4:19 Tuaciang ka Pathian in Jesus Christ tungtawnin a kicing ama hauna theampo taw kizui in na kitaangsap theampo hong sik tu hi. 
Philippians4:20 Ih Pathian le Pa tungah minthanna a tawntung, a tawntungin om tahen! Amen." 
Philippians4:21 Jesus Christ ii neisa ahi Pathian mihing khat sim tungah kong paupui hi. Hi sungah keima taw a om u le naute in nuksetna kam hong thaak hi. 
Philippians4:22 Hi sungah a om Pathian mite theampo, a tuanin Kumpilianpa inn sungah a omte in hong paupui hi." 
Philippians4:23 Topa Jesus Christ ii thuthiamna note theampo taw om tahen. 
Colossians1:1 Pathian ii deina taw Jesus Christ ii sawltak khat ahi Paul le ih suapuipa Timothy in — 
Colossians1:2 Colossae khua ah a om Christ taw pumkhat ahi a thumaan suapui le Pathian mite tungah lai kong thaak uh hi. Ih Pa Pathian in thuthiamna le thinnopna hong pia tahen. 
Colossians1:3 No atu thu ka nget uh ciangin, ih Topa Jesus ii Pa ahi Pathian tungah lungdam ka ko tawntung uh hi." 
Colossians1:4 Banghang ziam cile Jesus Christ na upna uh le Pathian ii mite theampo na itna uh ka za uh hi. 
Colossians1:5 Lungdamna Thupha a maan thuhilna no tungah hong theng masa a, tua ii hong piak tu lametna sia na za zo uh hi. Tua ahikomin vantung ah no atu in hong kikoisak na lamet uh sia ii tungah na upna le na itna uh, kingaa in om hi." 
Colossians1:6 Pathian ii thuthiamna na zaak phit ni uh pan kipan, no in a maan tatakin na heak uh bangma, tua lungdamna thu in, thuphate no tungah hong puapuak a, leitung theampo ah kizel hi." 
Colossians1:7 Pathian ii thuthiamna sia kote taangin Christ ii thumaan naseampa ka nasep pui Epaphras tung panin heakna na nga uh hi. 
Colossians1:8 Ama in Thaa ii hong piak itna na neina uh ko tungah hong son zo hi. 
Colossians1:9 Tua thu hangin note thu ka zaak pan kipan thu kong ngetsak tawntung uh hi. Ama deina tel theina le a Thaa ii hong piak ciimna le heakna theampo taw note hong kidimsak natu in Pathian tungah ka ngen uh hi. 
Colossians1:10 Tuaciang Topa deina bangin na nungta thei tu uh a, ama ii diksak bangin na vawt tawntung tu uh hi. Na nuntakna in nasep pha theampo piangsak tu a, Pathian heakna sungah na khangto tu uh hi." 
Colossians1:11 Na theampo thinsauna taw na thuak zawk natu uh in, ama ii minthang vaangletna in note hong thahatsak tahen." 
Colossians1:12 Thinnopna taw Pa tungah lungdam na ko tavun. A ma in khuavakna ngam sungah a mite ii lua tu a khealsiate nga tu in hong kilawmsak hi. 
Colossians1:13 Ama in khuazing vaangletna sung pan eite hong hun a, a it a Tapa ngam sungah bit takin hong paipui hi." 
Colossians1:14 A chisan hangin eite ih suakta a, ih mawnate hong kimaisak zo hi." 
Colossians1:15 Christ sia mu thei ngawl Pathian ii pianzia muna ahi hi. Ama sia bitphua sa theampo sung pan Tapa upabel ahi hi. 
Colossians1:16 Banghang ziam cile vantung leitung na theampo, a kimu thei le a kimu maw nate thaa taw kisai vaangletna neite, tote, a ukte le thuneite theampo sia ama tungtawnin Pathian in bitphua hi. Pathian in ama tungtawnin vaannuai buppi ama atu in bitphua hi." 
Colossians1:17 Christ sia tuate theampo om ma in om a, ama taw kikopin a omna mun tu tek ah om uh hi." 
Colossians1:18 Ama in a pumpi ahi pawlpi lutang hi a, ama in pumpi ii nuntakna naak ahi hi. Ama in Tapa upabel hi a, na theampo sungah ama bek a masa phitbel ahi natu in thina panin tho kiksak zo hi." 
Colossians1:19 Banghang ziam cile Pathian ii khensatna om bangin Tapa in Pathian ii zia theampo nei hi. 
Colossians1:20 Tuaciang Tapa tungtawnin Pathian in vaannuai buppi sia ama kung a thet kik thei natu in khensat hi. Thinglamtee tungah a kibua Tapa ii chisan tungtawnin Pathian in kilemna piangsak a, leitung vantung ah a om, na theampo ama kungah then kik siat hi." 
Colossians1:21 Hun khat lai in note in Pathian taw na kikhuala uh a, ngitlo ngamtatna le ngitlo khua ngaisutna na nei uh manin a ngalte na hi uh hi." 
Colossians1:22 Ahihang tu in ama omna munah a thiangtho, a kidoituam, a sitbaang ngawlin hong thet thei natu in a Tapa ii pumpi thina hangin Pathian in a lawmte hong suaksak zo hi." 
Colossians1:23 A kho thu doppha tungah na thumaan tawntung vun a, lungdamna thu na zaak ciil uh lai a na nga uh lametna taw na kipeal nuam heak vun. Leitung mihing sim tungah a kihil hi lungdamna thu hu in keima Paul sia naseam khat suak ka hi hi." 
Colossians1:24 Tu in no atu ka thuak nate tungtaang ah ka lungdam hi, banghang ziam cile a pumpi ahi pawlpi atu Christ ii thuak tu a om laite a khuangkhim natu in keima in cii le sa taw ka thuak ciangin a hu ka hi hi." 
Colossians1:25 Tuaciangin kei sia Pawlpi naseam tu in Pathian in hong vawt hi a, note phat natu in hi nasep lian sia sep tu in hong kipia hi. Tua nasep lian sia ama thu a cing takin thansak natu hi a," 
Colossians1:26 tua thu in hun bosa sungah mihing nam theampo te sung pan a kiseal, tuciangin ama mite tungah a kilak thuku ahi hi." 
Colossians1:27 Pathian ii ngealna sia ama ii thuku, mihing theampo atu in, ama ii a nei a tuanngen thuku sia a mite ii a heaksak tu ahi hi. Tua thuku in bangziam cile Christ in note sungah om a tua hu in note in Pathian ii vaangletna na lua tu uh hi." 
Colossians1:28 Tua ahikom Christ sia mihing khat sim tungah ka hil uh hi. Pathian omna munah mihing khat simin Christ taw kikop in, a khanthin natu in ciimna theampo taw hil in a kidop natu thu ka pia uh hi." 
Colossians1:29 Hi nasep a kizaw thei natu in ka sungah na hong seam Christ ii nasia tak a tha hong piakna zanghin diangin ka kisaan hi. 
Colossians2:1 Kei akua ci hong he ngawl midangte le Laodicea a om mihingte le note atu in bangzata haksa in naseam khi ziam ci sia kong son tu hi. 
Colossians2:2 Hi bang ka ngamtat sia amate thinletna taw a kidim natu, ki itna sungah a kikaizot natu, le thumaan heakna pan a piang thinmuanna a kicing hauna a nei thei natu deina ahi hi. Hisia lam panin Pathian thuku ahi Christ ama mama sia amate in he tu uh hi." 
Colossians2:3 Pathian ciimna le heakna a kiphualseal sumngum theampo a kihonna tawtang sia ama ahi hi. 
Colossians2:4 Tua ahikom kong son hi, bangza po in pha tu bang ahitazong, kinialna maan ngawlte taw kuama in na theamsak heak vun." 
Colossians2:5 Banghang ziam cile ka pumpi taw hong omkhawm ngawl ka hihang ka thinsung taw note kungah kong om hi, tuaciangin Christ ih upna sungah kip takin na din khopna uh ka mu ciangin ka lungdam hi." 
Colossians2:6 Jesus Christ sia Topa a na saan zawk uh nungsang, ama taw kikopin nungta tavun." 
Colossians2:7 Ama sungah zung thuk tha vun a, ama tungah na nuntakna uh sa to tavun, tuaciangin hong kihil sa bangin na upna sungah hat seseam vun. Lungdamkona taw na kidim tavun." 
Colossians2:8 Tua ahikom Christ sung pan ahi ngawl, vaannuai a uk thaa te ii mihingte tungah a piak susuk a mannung ngawl kitheamna, mihing ciimnate taw kuama in sila a hong mat ngawl natu in kikeam tavun." 
Colossians2:9 Banghang ziam cile thaa pianzia sia Christ le ama ii mihing a hina sung mama ah a cing takin teang a," 
Colossians2:10 tuaciangin ama taw na kikopna uh sungah a kicing nuntakna hong pia zo hi. Ama sia thaa lam sangah a ukte le thuneite khat sim sangin lianzaw hi. 
Colossians2:11 Jesus taw kikopna sungah note vunteap at sa na hi uh a, mihing vunteap atzia taw hi ngawlin, hi mawna pumpi thahatna pan hong suatak Christ vunteap atzia taw hong ki at zo hi." 
Colossians2:12 Cinopna in na ki baptize uh ciang Christ taw a kivui sa na hi zo uh a, na ki baptize na in thina pan a thokiksak Pathian ii vaangletna sungah na upna tungtawnin note zongh Christ taw hong kitho kik khawmsak zo hi." 
Colossians2:13 Hun khat lai in, na mawna uh hang le Thukham nei ngawl Gentile te na hi uh hangin note sia thaa lam ah a thisa na hi uh hi. Ahitazong tu in Pathian in Christ taw nuntakna sungah hong then zo hi. Pathian in ih mawna theampo hong maisak zo hi." 
Colossians2:14 Ama in eite hong heencip ahi thusia tepteena leiba theampo hong phiatsak a, thinglamtee tungah hong kilcipsak siat zo hi." 
Colossians2:15 Tuaciang tua thinglamtee tungah Christ in thaa lam sangah ukna neite le thuneite ii vaangletna pan ama le ama kisuaktasak hi; tuate sia ama ngalzaw poai sungah sila tu in a kimante bangin mihonte ii mu tu in kai hi. 
Colossians2:16 Tua ahikom neak le dawn huvau ahizong, a thiangtho nite huvau ahizong, Thadet poai le Sabbath nipi huvau ahizong note tungah zui tu ngeina vawtsak heak vun." 
Colossians2:17 Tuabangte theampo sia maisang a hong pai pheang tu nate ii limh ahi hi; a tatak sia Christ ahi hi. 
Colossians2:18 Vawttawm kiniamkhiakna le vantunglalangte bia in hong sawl a, mukhol thei tuam a neina hangin thupi a kisate ii hong puavawk tu sia noma le noma na ki oai heak vun. Bangma thu om ngawl bulin tuabang mihingte sia a mihing khua ngaisutna taw kisuangtaak uh a," 
Colossians2:19 tuaciang pumpi lutang ahi Christ thasua uh hi. Christ ukna nuai ah pumpi bup kipuua to a, a ngu le a sapiatte in a om natu san tek len in Pathian dei bangin khangto uh hi." 
Colossians2:20 Note Christ taw thi khawm zo a, vaannuai a uk thaa te panin hong kisuaktasak zo hi. Tua ahile banghangin hi leitung ii neisa bangin nungta nu ziam?" 
Colossians2:21 “Hisia tham heak in, tuasia tep heak in, a dang sia thutha heak in,” ci bang thukhamte banghangin ni nu ziam?" 
Colossians2:22 Hite in khatvei a kizak zawkciang, kimanna a nei nawn ngawl thute a cina hi; tuate in mihing vawttawm ngeinate le hilnate hi bek hi." 
Colossians2:23 Tuabang ngeinate sia ciimna bulphu in a piang hi tuak a, vantunglalangte biak tu sawl ngawpna sung, vawttawm kiniamkhiakna sung le pumpi nasia tak a ngim piakna sungah kizangh hi; ahihang tuate in pumpi deinate ukna tu in bangma man nei ngawl hi." 
Colossians3:1 Note nuntakna sungah Christ taw hong kithosak kik zo ahikom Pathian ii ziatsang kumpi tokhum tung Christ tona mun vantung ah a om nate thangai vun. 
Colossians3:2 Tua munah na ngaisutna uh phut vun a, hi leitung ah phut heak vun." 
Colossians3:3 Banghang ziam cile note thi zo a, tuaciang na nuntakna uh sia Pathian sungah Christ taw kiseal zo hi." 
Colossians3:4 Na nuntakna tatak uh sia Christ hi a, tuaciang ama hong kilangh ciangin note zongh ama taw na kilangh khawm tu uh a, ama ii vaangletna na siim tu uh hi!" 
Colossians3:5 Note in na sungah na hong seam leitung deinate na thisak uh kul tu hi, tuate sia numei le pa khialna, kiihuai ngamtatna, cii le sa deina zui nopna, ngamtat sia tatnopna, duhopna (duhopna sia milim biakna nam khat ahi hi) te ahi hi." 
Colossians3:6 Tua bangte hu in ama thu a ni ngawlte ii tungah Pathian thin uukna hong tung tu hi. 
Colossians3:7 Na nuntakna uh tuate ii hong huknelh hunlai in noma mama zongh tuabang uukna deinate taw kipawl in na nungta ngei zo uh hi. 
Colossians3:8 Ahihang tu in note in, thin uukna, a sia thangaina, etsatna thin neina, hite theampo na vawk siat vun. Kiselnona le a kiihuai kammalte na muk uh pan pusuaksak ngei heak vun." 
Colossians3:9 Khat le khat na kitheam heak vun, banghang ziam cile na nuntakna lui taw a kikop zongsang nate na suut zo uh a," 
Colossians3:10 a thak nuntakna zia na silh zo uh hi. Tua in, a kicing takin ama ih heak seseam natu in, Bitphuapa Pathian ii ama a suun tu in hong thaksua tawntung nuntakna thak ahi hi." 
Colossians3:11 Tua hu in Gentile le Jew, vunteap at le at ngawl, khualmi le tualmi, sila le sila ahi ngawlte ci bangin kidoidanna om ngawl hi. Ahihang Christ sia na theampo hi a, na theampo sungah Christ om hi." 
Colossians3:12 Note sia Pathian ii mite na hi uh hi, ama in hong it a ama atu in hong teal hi. Tua ahikom note sia kiciliapna, cikna, kiniamkhiakna, thinneamna le thinsau nate puan bangin na silh uh kul hi." 
Colossians3:13 Khat le khat na kidual vun a, a dang khat ii tungah lungkim ngawlna a nei khat po na om uh ciangin, khat le khat kimaisak vun. Topa in note mawna hong maisak bangma in note zongh khat le khat na kimaisak vun." 
Colossians3:14 Tuaciangin hi kicinna tungsia ah ki itna belap vun, tua in na theampo a cingin pumkhat suak tu in hong hencip hi." 
Colossians3:15 Christ ii thinnopna hong piak sia bang tu ziam cile na thukhensat nate sungah lam hong lak tu in, hong piak ahi hi. Banghang ziam cile hi thinnopna sungah note theampo pumkhatin a omkhawm tu, Pathian in hong sam hi. Tuaciangin lungdamko na thiam tavun." 
Colossians3:16 A kicing Christ ii thu na thinsung uh ah hong teang tahen. Khat le khat ciimna theampo taw kihil kilak tavun. Psalm late, pokna late le la thiangtho te na thinsung uh ah lungdamkona in Pathian tungah na sa vun." 
Colossians3:17 Na sep, na son uh theampo hu in, Pa Pathian tungah lungdam na ko uh ciangin, Topa Jesus min taw na vawt tu uh hi." 
Colossians3:18 Zite awng, na pasalte thu ni tavun, banghang ziam cile Tapidaw na hina uh taw hi bangin na ngamtat tu uh ahi hi." 
Colossians3:19 Pasalte awng, na zite uh na it vun, amate tungah na ngongtat heak vun." 
Colossians3:20 Tate awng, nute pate ii thu na nit tawntung tu uh sia Tapidawte vaipuak hi a, tua in Pathian ii lungkim thu ahi hi." 
Colossians3:21 Nute pate awng, na tate uh a thin na uuksak heak vun, a thin na uuksak uh le a thin kiam tu hi." 
Colossians3:22 Silate awng, thu theampo ah na tote thu ni vun, pha hong sak tu deina taw amate hong etcik laitak bek hi ngawlin, Topa na thasia uh hu in, thin tak taw a thu ni vun." 
Colossians3:23 Na nasep uh theampo sungah mihing atu hi ngawlin Topa atu a seam bangin kingaisunin na thin theampo taw naseam vun. 
Colossians3:24 Topa in ama ii mite atu a khealsia thamante note hong pia tu hi ci in na phawk tavun. Banghang ziam cile na Topa tatakin Christ ahi hi. 
Colossians3:25 Tuaciangin ngamtat khialna a nei theampo sia a khialna bangin thuak tu hi, banghang ziam cile Pathian in mihing sim a kibangin thukhen tu hi." 
Colossians4:1 To ahite awng, na sila te tungah dikna le thutang taw na ngamta vun. Vantung ah note zongh in Topa khat na nei uh hunlam phawk tavun." 
Colossians4:2 Thu na ngen tawntung nanak vun. Thu na nget uh ciang na pilvang vun a, Pathian tungah lungdam na ko vun." 
Colossians4:3 Ko atu zongh hong ngetsak tavun, tua hile Pathian in Christ ii thukute huvau ka hil natu hunpha hong pia tu hi. Banghang ziam cile tua thu in tu laitak a, thongsung a ka omna thu ahi hi." 
Colossians4:4 Tua ahikom tua thu a thiang a, ka son tu bangin ka son thei natu in thu na ngetsak vun." 
Colossians4:5 Thu um ngawlte tung na ngamtatna uh ah ciimna na zangh vun a, hunpha na nga uh theampo a pha takin na zangh vun." 
Colossians4:6 Na kampau na uh sia a zaak nop huai hi tu a, a lawp huai hi tawntung tu hi, tuaciangin mihing khat sim tungah a maanin na zo kik thei tavun." 
Colossians4:7 Ih it ih suapuipa Tychicus, a thumaan naseampa le Topa nasepna sungah ih naseppui pa in kei huvau thupiang thakte hong son siat tu hi." 
Colossians4:8 Note kungah ama kong paisakna in tua thu hang ahi hi, kote bangbangin om ka hi uh hunlam hong son ciangin na thin uh a nop natu ka deina ahi hi." 
Colossians4:9 Ama in Onesimus a kici khat taw hong ton hi, tua pa in a thumaan suapui hi a, no pawl sungah hong kihel khat ahi hi. Amate nii in hi sungah thupiang theampo hong son tu hi." 
Colossians4:10 Kei taw thong sungah a om Aristarchus in hong paupui hi, tuasia bangma Barnabas suapuisealpa Mark zongh in hong paupui hi. (Mark sia no sangah hong pai ahile vai na muak vun ci in sawlna zongh nga zo nu hi)" 
Colossians4:10 Kei taw thong sungah a om Aristarchus in hong paupui hi, tuasia bangma Barnabas suapuisealpa Mark zongh in hong paupui hi. (Mark sia no sangah hong pai ahile vai na muak vun ci in sawlna zongh nga zo nu hi)" 
Colossians4:11 Justus zongh a kici Joshua zongh in paupuina kam hong thaak hi. Hite thum in Jew te sung pan hong kikhealte hi a Pathian ngam atu kei taw na a seam khawmte hi a, amate in nasia takin hong hute ahi uh hi." 
Colossians4:12 Epaphras zongh in hong paupui hi, ama in Jesus Christ ii naseampa khat hi a noma pawl sungah a kihel khat ahi hi. Ama in Pathian tungah note sia a khanthin le a cingtaak tak a, a thinzo Tapidawte, Pathian ii deina bang a, khuangkhim takin a zuite bangin kho takin, na din natu in nasia tatakin thu hong ngetsak tawntung hi." 
Colossians4:13 No atu le Laodicea le Hierapolis ah a om mihingte atu in nasia takin na a seampa hi ci in keima tatak ma in tetti ka pang hi. 
Colossians4:14 Ih it syavuan Luke le Demas in paupuina kam hong thaak hi. 
Colossians4:14 Ih it syavuan Luke le Demas in paupuina kam hong thaak hi. 
Colossians4:15 Laodicea khua ah a om ih suapuite le Nympha le tua nu inn ah a kikhawm pawlpi tungah thupha ka deisaknate na sonsak vun. 
Colossians4:16 Hi laithak na sim zawk uh ciangin Laodicea pawlpite zongh in na simsak hamtang vun. Laodicea khua a om ih suapuite hong puak tu lai sia zongh na sim vun. 
Colossians4:17 Tuaciangin Archippus munah, “Topa nasepna sungah, na sep tu hong kipiate na zaw thei natu na son in,” na cisak vun." 
Colossians4:18 ci in hi lai, keima khut vateak taw ma kong at hi. Koltaang ka hi hong mangil heak vun! Pathian ii thuthiamna in no taw hong om tahen." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Paul, Silas le Timothy kung pan — Pa Pathian le Topa Jesus Christ ii neisa ahi Thessalonica pawlpi mite tungah: Thuthiamna le kilemna sia no aa hi tahen." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Note theampo atu in Pathian tungah lungdam ka ko tawntung a, tuaciang thungetna sungah na min kong lo tawntung uh hi." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Upna na zakzia uh, itna na nei uh hu a, nasia takin na nasepna zia le ih Topa Jesus Christ sungah na lametna uh a kipzia sia ih Pa Pathian mai ah kong phawk uh hang ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Ko ii suapuite awng, Pathian in note hong it a, ama atu in hong tealsa na hi uh sia ka he uh hi." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Banghang ziam cile Lungdamna Thupha sia, kammal nguak taw hi ngawlin, vaangletna le Thaa Thiangtho taw zongh le a thumaan thutak saan tatakna taw no kungah kong puak uh hi. Note taw ka om uh lai in bangbangin nungta khu ziam ci in nong he uh hi; tuate in noma ii phat natu ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Koma le Topa ettee in nong zui uh hi; nasia takin thuak na hi ta uh zong, Thaa Thiangtho kung pan hong pai tua thu sia lungdamna taw na saang zo uh hi." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Tua ahikom note sia Macedonia le Achaia ah thu umte theampo atu in ettee tu khat na suak uh hi. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Bangbang ziam cile Topa thu in no tung pan Macedonia le Achaia kaantan in pai a, tua bek dom ngawlin, Pathian na upna uh thu sia mun theampo ah thang hi. Tua ahikom thudang bangma ka son tuan tu kisamh ngawl hi." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Tua mihing theampo in kong haw uh lai a, nong saan zia uh, milim biakna pan Pathian sangah na kikhealna uhte son tek a, a maan le a nungta Pathian atu sepsak tu le," 
1Thessalonians1:10 hong tung tu Pathian thin uukna pan hong suatak, ama ii thina pan a thawsak, vantung pan hong pai tu — ama Tapa Jesus ngak tu in na om uh thute son hi." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Ko ii suapuite awng, no kung kong hawna uh sia, nguaksuak ngawl hi ci in noma mama ii na heak uh ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Noma kung Thessalonica ah kong pai uh ma in Philippi ah kote hong kivawtsia zo a, hong kizawnsakzia sia na heak uh ahi hi. Tuaciangin hong langpan tam kale, ama kung pan a hong pai Lungdamna Thupha note tungah kong son natu in, ih Pathian in thinletna hong pia hi." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Note tungah kong maangkaana uh sia khialna ahibuale a thiangtho ngawl niimnate tungah kibulphu ngawl hi, khat po theam tu zongh ka hanciam bua uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Tuate luangin Pathian in pau a hong dei bangin ka pau tawntung uh hi, banghang ziam cile Lungdamna Thupha son tu in kote kiphu hi ci in ama in khensat hi. Mihingte diksak tu in ka hanciam bua uh hi, ahihang ka niimna uh hong sittel Pathian diksak tu in ka hanciam uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Note kungah kong pai uh lai in, kisialpokna kampauna taw kong pai bua uh a, duhopna a phualseal natu kammalte kong zangh bua uh hi. Tuabang ka hi uh sia noma in nong he mama uh hi — Pathian sia koma tetti ahi hi!" 
1Thessalonians2:6 No tung pan hikale, ngualdangte tung pan hikale, kuama tung pan pokna nga tu in ka hanciam bua uh hi," 
1Thessalonians2:7 Christ ii sawltakte ka hina uh taw, ka deina uhte no tung pan kong nget thei uh hi napi, kong ngen bua uh hi. Ahihang note taw ka om uh lai in nu khat ii tate a kep bangin kong khoi uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:8 No kong it hu in Pathian kung pan hong pai Lungdamna Thupha bek hi ngawlin ka nuntakna uh no hong hawm tu in ka kinging uh hi. Note sia ko atu in a ithuai mama na hi uh hi! 
1Thessalonians2:9 Ko ii suapuite awng, ka sep ka dianna uh teng ciamtee nak vak uh te! Pathian tung pan hong pai Lungdamna Thupha no tungah kong hil uh ciangin, no ngim kong piakna uh ahi ngawl natu in, a sun a zanin na ka seam uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:10 No thu umte tungah ka ngamtatna uh sia thiangtho, maan, khialna om ngawl ahi hunlam note in ka tetti te na hi uh a, Pathian zongh ka tetti uh ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Pa ii tate tung, a vawt tu bangin note khat sim tungah kong vawt uh sia na he uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:12 Ama Ngam le a minthanna hong hawm tu in hong sam Pathian ii diksak nuntakna a nei tu in, kong hanthawn a, kong heeneam a, kong thawn top uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Tuaciangin, Pathian tungah a tawntung lungdam ka kona uh ahang khat zongh om hi. Pathian thu kong puak uh lai in, mihing ii thupuak bang hi ngawlin Pathian thupuak bang ahi takpi sia na za uh a, na saang uh hi. Banghang ziam cile no thu umte sungah Pathian in na hong seam hi." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Ko ii suapuite awng, no sungah thupiangte ma Judea ah Pathian ii Pawlpite, tua mun a om Christ Jesus ii neisa mihingte tung zongh ah piang hi. Note in na mipuite ii vawtsiatna na thuak uh bangin, amate zongh Jew te ii vawtsiatna thuak hi," 
1Thessalonians2:14 Ko ii suapuite awng, no sungah thupiangte ma Judea ah Pathian ii Pawlpite, tua mun a om Christ Jesus ii neisa mihingte tung zongh ah piang hi. Note in na mipuite ii vawtsiatna na thuak uh bangin, amate zongh Jew te ii vawtsiatna thuak hi," 
1Thessalonians2:15 tua Jew te in Topa Jesus le kamsaangte thatlum a, ko hong vawtsiate ma ahi uh hi. Amate Pathian atu in bangza in lungkimhuai ngawl tu ziam! A kuama po atu in amate bangza in ngal ciipha ahi ziam!" 
1Thessalonians2:16 Ngupna a piangsak tu thute Gentile te tungah ka hil tu uh ngawngawn khaktan tu in hanciam uh hi. Hi bangin amate ii a paltan tawntung sa mawna theampo pawlcingsak uh hi. Tu in Pathian thin uukna sia amate tungah a khakbel ciangin hong thengsuk zo hi! 
1Thessalonians2:17 Ko ka hi uh le suapuite awng, note taw tawmvei ih kikhen zawkciang — ka ngaisutna uh taw hi ngawlin, pumpi mama taw — bangza in no hong ngai a, kong mu kik natu bangza haksa in hanciam khu ziam!" 
1Thessalonians2:18 Note kungah kong heak kik nuam uh hi. Keima mama heak kik tu in khatvei bek dom ngawl ka kithoai bul a, ahihang Satan in hong oai bua hi." 
1Thessalonians2:19 A huamin ci leang, note sia — ngualdang hi ngawl! — note sia kote lametna, lungdamna le zawna ka nga uh hu in Topa Jesus hong pai ciang, ama mai ah ka kisuantaakna na hi tu uh hi." 
1Thessalonians2:20 Note sia kote kiphatsakna le lungdamna tatak na hi tu uh hi! 
1Thessalonians3:1 A khakbel ciang ka thuak zo nawn bua uh hi. Tua ahikom Athens ah koma nguakin, om tu in ka khensat uh hi." 
1Thessalonians3:2 Tua lanin, Christ huvau Lungdamna Thupha hil a, Pathian atu ko taw naseam khawm ko ii suapui Timothy kong paisak uh hi. Hong thakhosak tu le, na upna uh sungah hong hu tu in kong paisak uh a," 
1Thessalonians3:3 hi vawtsiatna hu in, kuama na nungtol kik ngawl natu ka deina uh ahi hi. Tuabang vawtsiatna in Pathian ii ei atu a deina thu khat om hi ci in, noma ma in na he uh hi." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Banghang ziam cile noma taw ka om nginge laitakin, ko hong kivawtsiat natu te kong sonkhol zo uh hi; tuaciang na heaksa uh bangma in, tuabang tatak ma in hong piang hi." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Tuasia hu in Timothy kong paisak kul hi. Vei zo nawn ngawl ka hikomin na upna uh dawp tu in ama kong paisak hi. Doaimangpa in no hong ze et zo a, ko nasep teng a luithawthong hi zo ci sia suak thei mama ngawl tu hi!" 
1Thessalonians3:6 Tu in Timothy hong heak kik zo a, tuaciangin ama na upna uh le, na itna uh taw kisai ka ngalaak uh thu, hong puak hi. Ama in kote tung hong sonna pan, a pha in nong ngaisut tawntung na uh le, ko ii kong mu nop uh bangma no zongh in nong mu nopna thu ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Tua ahikom ka ngimna uh le ka thuakna theampo sungah, note ii thu in thin letna hong pia hi, suapuite awng. Ko hong thinliansak sia in noma upna ahi hi," 
1Thessalonians3:8 banghang ziam cile tu in na nuntakna sungah Topa taw pum khat a, a kho in na ding uh le a nungta takpite ih hi hi." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Tu in note atu in Pathian tungah lungdam ka ko thei zo uh hi. Note hangin ama mai ah lungnopna ka nei uh hu in Pathian tungah lungdam ka ko uh hi. 
1Thessalonians3:10 Maitang kisi a, kimu thei natu le na upna uh sungah a kisamh sia hong piak thei natu a sun a zanin, ka thin theampo taw thu ka ngen uh hi." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Ih Pa Pathian mama le ih Topa Jesus in no kungah kong pai thei natu in lampi hong sialsak tahen! 
1Thessalonians3:12 Khat le khat na ki itna uh le mihing theampo na itna sungah khangto vaialin, noma kong itna a lian za ma in na ki it natu uh, Topa in hong siam tahen." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Hi bangin ama in no hong thahatsak tu a, ama ii neisa mihing theampo taw Topa Jesus hong pai ciang, ih Pa Pathian omna ah sit baang ngawlin na thiangtho tu uh hi." 
1Thessalonians4:1 A khakbelin suapuite awng, Pathian ii diksak nuntakzia sia, ko tung panin na sin sa uh ahi hi. Hisia in note nuntakzia sia ma ahi hi. Tu in tua sang zong a nasia zaw in na nuntak natu uh Topa Jesus min taw kong ngen uh a, kong thawn uh hi." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Banghang ziam cile Topa Jesus thuneina taw hilna kong piakte na he uh hi. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Pathian in note thiangtho in, numei le pa paktatna pan a thiangtho tak a, a kipealte na hi tu uh hong dei hi." 
1Thessalonians4:4 No pasalte khat sim in, na zi uh taw a thiangtho le a thasiahuai in nuntakzia tu na heak uh kul hi." 
1Thessalonians4:5 Pathian a he ngawlte bangin cii le sa deina taw na nungta heak vun. 
1Thessalonians4:6 Tua ahikom hi thu tungtaang ah, kuama in ama ii Tapidawpuipa tungah khial ngawl tu a, hamphatna in la thei ngawl tu hi. Hi thu kong son ngei zo uh a, tuabang a ngamtate Topa in daan pia tu hi, ci in nasia takin kidop natu kong son zo uh hi." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Pathian in eite sia paktatna taw nungta ngawlin a thiangtho nuntakna taw a nungta zaw tu in hong sam hi. 
1Thessalonians4:8 Tua ahikom, hi kihilna a nial pawpo sia mihing nial ahi bua a, a Thaa Thiangtho no tungah hong pia Pathian nial ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Noma thu up puite itna tu huvau lai at tu kul ka sa bua uh hi. Khat le khat na ki it natu in Pathian in no tung mama ah hong hil zo hi. 
1Thessalonians4:10 Tuaciang a tatak ci leang Macedonia ngam mun theampo ah a om, suapui teng tungah tuabangin na ngamta zo uh hi. Tua ahikom suapuite awng, tu a sangin zongh a kician zaw lai in na ngamta tavun." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Kong son ngeisa bangma in, na nuntakna sungah nuam hithiatin na nuntak tu, noma taw kisaite bek ngaisutin nei tu, noma nuntak natu in na thalaw natu uh teng sia tup in na nei vun." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Hi bang teng taw in thu um ngawlte ii zatakna na nga tu uh a, tuaciang na kitaangsapna tungtaang ah kuama na konlaw uh a kul buatu hi." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Ko ii suapuite awng, lametna a nei ngawlte bangin na khuangai ngawl natu in, a thisate huvau thumaan thutak na heak tu uh ka dei uh hi." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Jesus thi a, tho kik hi, ci in ih um hi, tua ahikom ama um a, a thite sia Pathian in Jesus taw hong la kik tu hi, ci in ih um hi." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Tu a kong hil uh sia in Topa ii hilcianna ahi hi: Topa hong pai ni in, ei a nungta laite in a thisate mai ah ih pai buatu hi." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Vantunglalangte sung pan a lianbel sia ii aw taw thupiak auna, Pathian lemle aw om tu a, tuaciang Topa ama mama vantung pan hong tuaksuk tu hi. Christ um a, a thite hong tho masabel tu a," 
1Thessalonians4:17 tua hunin a nungta lai eite sia Topa taw vui sungah kisi tu in, amate taw meei sungah hong kikaikhawm tu hi. Tuabangin eite in a tawntungin Topa taw ih omkhawm tu hi."
