1Thessalonians4:18 Tua ahikom, hi kammalte taw khat le khat na kihanthawn tavun." 
1Thessalonians5:1 Suapuite awng, hi thute hong pianna tu a hun a taang huvau, lai kong at tu uh kul sa ngawl khu hi." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Banghang ziam cile noma ma in Topa Ni sia, zan lai a, nguta khat hong pai bang in, hong pai tu hi, ci in a pha tak na he uh hi." 
1Thessalonians5:3 Mihingte in, “Na theampo thim khipkhep hi, lungmuanna om hi,” a ci laitakin thakhat thu in, siatna sia amate tungah hong theng vat tu hi! Nau a suak tu numei khat sia nautun a, a nat bangin thakhatin hong pai tu hi, tuaciang mihingte a suakta buatu uh hi." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Ahihang suapuite awng, note in khuazing sungah om ngawl nu hi, tua ahikom tua Ni in nguta khat hong pai a, lamdang na sak bang ahi buatu hi." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Note theampo in khuavak ii neisa, sun hun ii neisa na hi uh hi. Eite sia zan ii neisa, khuazing sungah a omte ih hi bua hi." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Tua ahikom ngualdangte bangin ih mutthip buatu hi; eite khangciimin ih pilvang tu hi. 
1Thessalonians5:7 Zan sia mihingte mut hun hi; zanin amate zukham uh hi. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Ahihang eite in sun hun ii neisa ih hi a, ih pilvang kul tu hi. Eite in upna le ki itna sia awmdalna in ih silh tu a, ih lamet ngupna sia thik lukhu bangin ih khuk kul hi." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Pathian in eite sia a thin uukna thuak tu in hong teal bua a, Topa Jesus Christ tungtawnin, ngupna a nga tu in hong teal hi zaw hi." 
1Thessalonians5:10 Ama hong pai ciang, ih thi a ih nung zong, ama taw ih nuntak khop thei natu in eite atu a thi ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Tua ahiciang tu laitak a, na sep uh bangma in khat le khat kihanthawnin na kihuu tavun." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Suapuite awng, Tapidaw nuntakna sungah lam hong lak, hong hil a, no sungah na hong seamte tungah ahi tu bang zatakna na piak natu in kong ngen uh hi." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Amate ii sepna hu in itna le zatakna lianbel taw na kizom tavun. Noma sungah kilemna taw na om tavun. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Suapuite awng, hi bangin kong hanthawn uh hi. A zuzaute kidop natu thu na pia vun a, a lauthauhte na hansua vun, a thazawmte na hu vun, a kuama theampo tungah thinsau in na khual vun." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Khialna sia khialna taw in na thuk heak vun a, khat le khat tung le mihing theampo tungah phatna vawt tu sia hun theampo sungah na tup na sawm uh na hisak tavun." 
1Thessalonians5:16 A tawntungin lungdam vun," 
1Thessalonians5:17 hun theampo sungah thu ngen tawntung vun," 
1Thessalonians5:18 na theampo sungah lungdamko vun. Christ Jesus taw pumkhat a, na nuntak sungah Pathian hong deisak thu in hisia ahi hi." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Thaa Thiangtho na khaam heak vun; 
1Thessalonians5:20 Pathian tung pan hi a kici kamsaannate sia zawngsak heak vun. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Na theampo na sittel vun: a pha teng na keam tavun," 
1Thessalonians5:22 A sia nam theampo na pial tavun. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Eite thinnopna hong pia Pathian in note a nanam in hong thiangthosak tahen, na nuntakna buppi - na thaa, na thinsung le na pumpi — hong keam tahen, Topa Jesus Christ hong pai ciangin sepkhial vawtkhial theampo taw hong kipealsak tahen." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Hong sampa ama in na hong seam tu hi, banghang ziam cile ama thumaan hi." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Suapuite awng, ko atu zongh thu hong ngetsak tavun." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Thu um theampo suapui kinapna taw na kimuak tavun. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Thu um mi theampo tungah hi laithak na sim natu in Topa thuneina suangin kong thawn hi. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Ih Topa Jesus Christ ii thuthiamna no tungah hong om tahen. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Paul, Silas le Timothy in — Ih Pa Pathian le Topa Jesus Christ neisa Thessalonica pawlpi mite tungah lai kong thaak uh hi:" 
2Thessalonians1:2 Ih Pa Pathian le Topa Jesus Christ in note tungah thuthiamna le thinnopna hong pia tahen. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Suapuite awng, note atu in hun theampo ah Pathian ka pok uh kul hi. Tuabang ka ngamtat tu uh sia maan hi, banghang ziam cile na upna uh nasia khan mama a, tuaciang note khat sim ii midangte na itna uh lian vaial hi." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Pathian ii pawlpite sungah no huvau ka kisuantaakna uh sia in hi thu hang ahi hi. Vawtsiatna le ngimna teng theampo na thuak uh kawm panin, thuak zawkna le upna na nei tan uh hu in a kisuangtaak ka hi uh hi." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Tu a na thuakna teng in Pathian thukhen na sia thumaan a hina kilanghsak hi, tua in noma ii na ngimlaw uh ama Kumpi Ngam taw a kilawm hong suaksak tu hi," 
2Thessalonians1:6 Pathian in a maan bangin seam tu hi: note hong thuaksakte tungah thuakna tungsak tu a," 
2Thessalonians1:7 tuaciang no a thuakte le ko zongh nopsakna hong pia tu hi. Topa Jesus in ama ii a thahat vantunglalangte taw 
2Thessalonians1:8 Pathian a nialte le Topa Jesus Lungdamna Thupha a zui nuam ngawlte daan pia tu in meikuang taw hong pai ciang ama in tuasia seam tu hi. 
2Thessalonians1:9 Ama ii mihing theampo le a thu um mihingte tung pan minthanna le vaang piakna a nga tu in, tua Ni Topa hong pai ciang, Topa mai le vaanglet minthan na pan amate kikhen tu a, tawntung lalcipna daan thuak tu hi. Note zongh, ko ii kong son thute um zo na hi uh ciangin tua thu um te sungah na kihel tu uh hi." 
2Thessalonians1:10  
2Thessalonians1:11 Note atu in a tawntungin thu kong ngetsakna in hi thu hang ahi hi. A nungta tu in ama hong sap na nuntakna sungah a kiphu a kilawm hong suasak natu in, Pathian munah kong ngetsak uh hi. Ama in a vaangletna taw phat natu na deina theampo khuangkhimsak tahen a, upna taw nasepna hong taangtungsak tahen." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Hi bangin ih Pathian le Topa Jesus Christ ii thuthiamna taw ih Topa Jesus min in, note tung pan minthanna saang tu a, note zongh in ama tung pan minthanna na saang tu uh hi." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Ih Topa Jesus Christ hong pai kik natu le ama taw omkhawm tu in, ih kikhoptuana thu taw kizomin: suapuite awng," 
2Thessalonians2:2 Topa hong pai tu Ni sia hong tung zo hi ci in a kison thu taw na khua ngaisutna uh nawngkaisak heak vun a, na thin kiamsak memeang heak vun ci in kong thuum uh hi. Hi thu sia kote kamsaanna sung, ahibuale thuhilna sung, tua ahibuale laithak atna sungah kote in son hi ci in kingaisun hi thei tha tu hi." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Bangbang po ahizong kuama in na theamsak heak vun. Banghang ziam cile a khakbel Kileedona, hong om a, hell sung a theng tu in a kisep sa A Seksolpa hong kilangh mateng in tua Ni sia hong tung ngawl tu hi." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Ama in pathian a kici theampo ahibuale biak thei theampo langpan tu a, tuate tungsia ah ama le ama kikoi tu hi. Ama in Pathian Biakinnpi sung ngawngawn ah tum in to tu a, Pathian ka hi hi ci tu hi." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Ciamtee ngawl nu ziam? Hite sia no taw ka omkhop lai in kong sonsiat sa ahi hi. 
2Thessalonians2:6 Ahitazong, tu laitak hisia a pian ngawl natu in a khak khat om a, tuasia bang ziam na heak uh hi. Tua ahikom a hun a cin ciang A Seksolpa hong kilangh tu hi." 
2Thessalonians2:7 A lamdang Seksolna in tu in na hong seam zo hi, ahihang a khaktanpa a kihepkeak matengin a piang tu thu sia piang ngawl lai tu hi." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Tuasia zawkciangin A Seksolpa sia hong kilaak tu a, ahihang Topa Jesus hong pai ciang, a kam sung pan a huu pusuak sia taw ama that tu a, a taang velvol a vaangletna taw lalcipsak tu hi." 
2Thessalonians2:9 A Seksolpa sia Satan vaangletna taw hong pai tu a, nalamdang lakna a theam le a lamdang na nam tuatuamte hong vawt tu hi," 
2Thessalonians2:10 tuaciangin a lal tu teng tungah a seksol theamna namcin zangh tu hi. Amate lal tu hi, banghang ziam cile amate a kihutna tu thumaan thutak sia a saang bua uh a, a it bua uh hi." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Tua ahikom Pathian in telkhialna vaang ama te sungah puak a, amate in a maan ngawl thute a up natu in na seamsak hi." 
2Thessalonians2:12 Tua ahikomin, tua thumaan thutak a um ngawl, mawna sungah a nuamsa theampo, kipuavawk tu hi." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Topa hong it suapuite awng, note atu in Pathian tungah a tawntungin lungdam ka ko hamtang tu uh hi. Banghang ziam cile Thaa ii vaangletna taw ama mi thiangthote hong suasak natu le thumaan thutak na upna uh taw a kingum phitbelte na sua natu uh in Pathian ii tealte na hi uh hi." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Lungdamna Thupha no tungah kong hilna uh tungtawnin Pathian in hisia atu hong sam hi; Ama in ih Topa Jesus Christ minthanna tel na nga natu hong sam ahi hi. 
2Thessalonians2:15 Tua ahikom suapuite awng, thuhilna le laithakna taw kong hil uh thumaante kholet vun a, kip takin ding vun." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Ih Topa Jesus Christ ama mama le eite hong it a, a thuthiamna taw a kiam ngeingawl thinletna le lametna kho hong pia, ih Pa Pathian in," 
2Thessalonians2:17 a tawntungin a pha sep natu le pau natu hong hanthawn in hong thahat sak tahen. 
2Thessalonians3:1 A khakbel in suapuite awng, Topa thu sia note sungah na saan bangma in, manlang takin a kizel natu le thasiana taw a kisaan thei tawntung natu in, kote atu thu hong ngetsak tavun." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Mihing seksolte le misiate khut sung pan Pathian ii hong suataksak natu in thu hong ngetsak si tavun; banghang ziam cile mihing simin tua thu um ngawl hi. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Ahihang Topa sia thumaan a, ama in note A Ngilopa kung pan hong keamcingin hong thahatsak tu hi." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Note kungah kong son thute na zui uh bangma in zui paisuak tatak tu ci in note muanna thin kote sungah Topa in hong pia hi. 
2Thessalonians3:5 Pathian hong itna le Christ ii hong piak thuak zawkna a thukzaw in na tel thei natu Topa in lam hong pui tahen. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Suapuite awng, kong lamlak nate zui ngawl a, datham nuntakzia taw a nungta suapuite theampo kung panin na kikeam tavun ci in Topa Jesus Christ min taw thu kong pia uh hi." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Ko ngamtat bang na ngamtat tu uh sia noma ma in na heak uh ahi hi. Note taw ka om uh lai in ko datham ngawl khu hi. 
2Thessalonians3:8 Man piak ngawlin kuama tung pan huna saang ngawl khu hi. Tua taangin naseam a, diang khu hi; note khat po atu in supna zanna ka hi ngawl natu in a sun a zanin ka seam tan uh hi." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Hi bangin ka hi uh sia, ngual ii hu tu le et tu in, a kilawm ngawl ka hi uh hang, ahi bua hi; nong ettee tu le nong zui tu in tuabangin ngamta ka hi uh hi." 
2Thessalonians3:10 No taw ih om lai in, “Na a seam nuam ngawl peuma an nesak ngawl tu hi,” kong ci uh hi." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Hi bangin kong ci theina uh sia, no sungah mihing pawlkhat datham a, ngual nasepna kamkumh in, nawngkaisak tu ci simngawl sep dang nei ngawl ci in ka za uh hi." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Topa Jesus Christ min taw hi mihingte tungah ahi tu bangin nungta tahen a, nasepna taw a nuntak natu thalaw tahen, ci in kidop natu thu ka pia uh hi." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Ahihang suapuite awng, a pha sepna sia cimtak peuma heak vun." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Hi laithak sungah kong son uh thute a zui ngawl tu khat po om tha tu hi. Tuabang ahile, ama sia ciamtee tavun a, na koithong lel vun, tua hile, ama a maizum tu hi." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Ahihang ama na ngal vawt heak vun; tua hi ngawl zaw in, suapui khat bangin a kidop thei natu na hil vun." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Eite thinnopna ii naak ahi Topa ama mama in, a tawntung le a nanam in, thinnopna hong pia tahen. Topa in note theampo taw hong omkhawm tahen." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Paul in kong paupui hi ci in lai kong thaak sia keima khut tatak taw ka at hi: Laithak ka at sim ka minthuna sia hisia ahi hi; lai ka atzia hi bang ahi hi. 
2Thessalonians3:18 Ih Topa Jesus thuthiamna in note theampo taw hong om tahen. 
1Timothy1:1 Jesus Christ sawltak khat ahi Paul in, eite hong Ngumpa Pathian le eite lametna Jesus Christ thupiak na bangin —" 
1Timothy1:2 Upna sungah ka tapa tatak ahi Timothy tungah lai kong thaak hi: Pa Pathian le ih Topa Jesus Christ in, thuthiamna, hesuakna le thinnopna nang hong pia tahen." 
1Timothy1:3 Macedonia ah ka pai lai, kong sawl sa bangma in Ephesus ah na taam tu kong deisak hi. Tua munah mihing pawlkhat in a maan ngawl upna thubulte hil hi, amate tuabang hilna pan a tawp natu in, thu na pia in." 
1Timothy1:4 Kinialna bek a piangsak taanghthute le taanghpupite khang tepteena saute a vawk natu in na son in; tuate in upna taw a kihe Pathian ngealna taangtut natu in kizangh ngawl hi. 
1Timothy1:5 Hi thupiakna ii tupna sia, lungtang thiangtho, thinsung thiangtho le upna tatak panin hong piang ki itna a khanto thei natu deina hi." 
1Timothy1:6 Mihing pawlkhat in hite panin lampial in a mawmawthuai kam kikupnate sungah ngammang uh hi. 
1Timothy1:7 Amate in Pathian thukham hil syate suak nuam ahihang, amate kammal tatak ma ahizong, kimuan tatakna taw a son uh thute ahizong a tel bua uh hi." 
1Timothy1:8 A kizak tu bangin a kizangh nale Thukham sia pha hi ci in ih he hi. 
1Timothy1:9 Ih phawk tu a kul thu sia, thukhamte sia mihing phate atu a kivawt hi ngawlin, thukham paltante le khialna lian vawtte, pathian selte le a mawte, biakna kin ngawl le thaa mi ahi ngawlte, pate nute a thatlumte, mihing thatte," 
1Timothy1:10 numei le pa huvau a paktatte, numei le pa ngeina ngawlin a ngamtate, mihing a mante, leilotin thumaan ngawl tetti a pangte tua ahibuale a pha a kho upna thubul taw a kileebulin ngamtatna a neite atu in a kivawt ahi hi." 
1Timothy1:11 Tuabang hilcianna sia ka thansak tu in hong ki aap lungdamna thu sungah kimu a, tua Lungdamna Thupha sia a minthang thupha toai Pathian kung pan hong pai ahi hi." 
1Timothy1:12 Ka nasep natu in thahatna hong pia Jesus Christ ih Topa tungah lungdam ka ko hi. Ama ii na seam tu in kilawm hong sakna le nasep hong piak hu in, ama tungah ka lungdam hi," 
1Timothy1:13 ahihang hun bosa sungah ama ngensia in, vawtsia in lang zazaan ngei hi kaleng, upna ka nei ma, heakna nei ngawlin ngamta ka hikom Pathian in kei hong hesuak hi." 
1Timothy1:14 Tuaciangin ih Topa in a thuthiamna a kicing takin hong buak a, Jesus Christ taw pumkhat hina sungah eite neisa ahi upna le ki itna kei tungah hong pia hi." 
1Timothy1:15 Jesus Christ in mawneite hun tu in leitung ah hong pai hi: ci sia thumaan hi a, a cing takin up tu le saan tu ahi hi. Tua a mawte sung pan keima in a mawbelpa ka hi hi," 
1Timothy1:16 ahihang nungsang ciangin ama umin tawntung nuntakna a saang tute ii a ettee tu in, kei a mawbelpa tungah Jesus Christ in thinsauna a cingin hong lak thei natu, Pathian in kei hong hesuak hi." 
1Timothy1:17 Ama bek Pathian ahi a thi thei ngawl, a kimu thei ngawl Tawntung Kumpipa tungah patoaina le minthanna a tawntung a tawntungin om tahen! Amen." 
1Timothy1:18 Ka ta Timothy awng, nangma huvau a hun bosa sungah kamsaan sonkholna a om bangin, hi thupiakna sia na khut sungah muangin kong aap hi. Ngal pha tak na sim thei natu in tua kammalte ngalhiam in zangh in a," 
1Timothy1:19 na upna kholet in, thinsung thiangtho na nei ta'n. Mihing pawlkhat a thinsung uh pan a phaw thute ngai ngawlin a upna uh lalsak uh hi." 
1Timothy1:20 Satan vaangletna nuai ah aapna taw daan ka piaksate sungah Hymenaeus le Alexander te kihel uh hi; Pathian min a daisak nawn ngawl natu in hi thu in amate hil tu hi. 
1Timothy2:1 Tuaciang a masa phitbel kong hanthot nopna panin, maangkaana, thungetna, hu ngetna le lungdamkona sia mihing theampo atu Pathian tungah na vawt vun;" 
1Timothy2:2 eite nuam takin kilem vadiam in om thei a, Pathian thasia in a kilawm ngamtatna taw ih nuntak thei natu in kumpite le a dang thu nei uliante atu zongh tuabangin na vawtsak natu kong thawn hi." 
1Timothy2:3 Hi bangin a pha ih vawtte in Pathian ih Ngumpa lungkimsak hi," 
1Timothy2:4 mihing khat sim ngupna nga a, thumaan thutak a heak tu sia Pathian in dei hi." 
1Timothy2:5 Banghang ziam cile Pathian khat bek om a, Pathian le mihing hong kilemsak kik, mihing ahi Jesus Christ khat bek om hi." 
1Timothy2:6 Ama in mihing nam theampo tat natu in, a nuntakna pia hi. Tua in a hun a cin ciang Pathian ii mihing khat sim ngupna a piak nopna thu a lakna hi a," 
1Timothy2:7 tua thu hu in upna le thumaan thutak thangsak tu in, Gentile te ii sawltak khat le sya khat bangin hong kipuak hi. A leilot ka hi bua a; thumaan thutak son ka hi hi!" 
1Timothy2:8 Pawlpi sungah biakpiak simin, thin uukna le kinialna om ngawlin, a khut laamin thungen thei a, Pathian tungah a kipumpiak pasalte ii thu a nget tu ka dei hi." 
1Timothy2:9 Numeite zongh a kiniamkhiak ngamtatna le puansilh kizepna ah a etlawm, a hoi ciaciangin khua ngaisutna a nei tu ka dei hi; sam khawng a lamdadang in vawtna taw ahizong, khamhte, keptangte le a manham nikteen puansilhte taw ahizong kizeam ngawlin," 
1Timothy2:10 biakna kin numeite atu taw a kilawm ngamtat phate taw om tahen. 
1Timothy2:11 Numeite in thim khipkhep in om thei in, kiniam khiakna theampo sin tahen." 
1Timothy2:12 Amate in pasalte tungah a hilcian tu ahizong, thu a nei natu ahizong, ka oai bua hi; amate thim khipkhep in om tahen." 
1Timothy2:13 Banghang ziam cile Adam kibitphua masa a, tua zawkciang Eve kibitphua hi." 
1Timothy2:14 Tuaciangin theam a thuak sia in Adam hi ngawl hi; theam thuak a, Pathian thukham a paltan sia in numei ahi hi." 
1Timothy2:15 Ahihang, ama in upna, ki itna le thianthona sungah omdan thiamna taw zom suak pole numei sia ta a neina tungtawnin kingum tu hi." 
1Timothy3:1 A maan kam teptee khat sia: Pasal khat in pawlpi lampui khat hi tu a uuk le, ama in nasep pha mama khat lungngul ahi hi." 
1Timothy3:2 Pawlpi lampuipa khat in sit baanna nei ngawl ahi tu kisamh hi; ama in zi khat bek a nei, thinpha a nei, ama le ama a ki uk zo, a cilngil ahi kul hi; zindo thiam, ngual a hil thei ahi tu kisamh hi." 
1Timothy3:3 Ama sia zukham thei le a ngoltol hi ngawl het tu a, cinghin ngual taw kilem thei tu hi; ama in sum bek ngaisun ngawl het tu hi;" 
1Timothy3:4 ama in a bangkua sung pha takin uk thei tu a, a tate in zatakna takpi taw a thu a nitsak thei tu kisamh hi." 
1Timothy3:5 Banghang ziam cile pasal khat in ama ii bangkua a uk natu zia a he buale Pathian ii pawlpi bangbangin keam thei tu ziam? 
1Timothy3:6 Ama in kiphatsakna taw a kidim Doaimangpa bangin pua vawkna a thuak ngawl natu in, upna sungah a khanthin sa khat hi tu hi." 
1Timothy3:7 Ama in mindai in Doaimangpa thaang sungah a awk thak ngawl natu in, pawlpi puasia a om mihingte ii zatak khat hi tu hi." 
1Timothy3:8 Pawlpi upate zongh ngamtat pha nei tu a, a citakte ahi tu kisamh hi; amate in sapittui tam lei ne ngawl tu a, sum lam sangah duhop ngawl het tu hi;" 
1Timothy3:9 amate in upna thumaan a kipualaakte thinsung thiangtho taw kholet tu hi. 
1Timothy3:10 Amate kisinsak phot tu a, a kisinna a ong le seam tak tu hi." 
1Timothy3:11 A zite uh zongh, ngamtat pha nei tu a, ngual ngen ngawl tu hi; amate in na theampo sungah thutuumin thumaan tu hi." 
1Timothy3:12 Pawlpi upa khat in zi khat bek nei tu a, a tate le a bangkua sia pha takin uk zo tu hi." 
1Timothy3:13 Pawlpi upa nasep pha takin a seamte in amate atu dinmun pha khat nga hi a, Jesus Christ sungah a upna hangsan takin son ngam tu hi." 
1Timothy3:14 Hi lai kong at laitakin no kungah hong pai in hong mu pal tu, ci in lametna ka nei hi." 
1Timothy3:15 Ahihang kong hai tha le hi laithakin a nungta Pathian ii pawlpi, thumaan thutak ii dinna le a panpui ahi Pathian bangkua sungah ih ngamtat natu hong hesak tu hi." 
1Timothy3:16 Eite biakna in a lian thuku khat a hina sia kuama in, a nial thei buatu hi: Ama sia mihing mealin hong kilangh a, Thumaan hi ci in Thaa in lakin, vantunglalangte in mu hi. Ama sia minamte sungah a thu kihil a, leitung theampo in ama umin, tuaciang vantung ah ama kila to hi." 
1Timothy4:1 Thaa in thiangtho takin a sonna pan hun khaksang ciangin, mihing pawlkhat in a upna uh nusia tu hi; amate in, leilot thaa te thu ni tu a, doaite hilna zui tu hi ci hi." 
1Timothy4:2 Tuabang hilciannate sia leilot theite in theamna taw kizelsak hi, amate thinsung sia thiksa taw hal bangin thi hi." 
1Timothy4:3 Tuabang mihingte in zi nei ngawl pasal nei ngawlin omna le an pawlkhat neakna in khialna hi ci in hil hi. Ahihang thumaan thutak a hete le a umte in lungdamkona thungetna taw a neak tu in, tua ante sia Pathian piansak ahi hi." 
1Timothy4:4 Pathian bitphua sa nate theampo pha hi; bangma nil tu vawk tu om ngawl hi, ahihang na theampo lungdamko thungetna taw saan tu ahi hi," 
1Timothy4:5 banghang ziam cile tuasia Pathian kammal le thungetna in Pathian ii saan thei suaksak hi. 
1Timothy4:6 Nangma in thaa thu ah upna kammalte taw kivaak a, thuhilna maan na zui kawmin, hi kong hilnate suapuite sungah na son nale nangma in Jesus Christ ii naseam pha khat na hi tu hi." 
1Timothy4:7 Ahihang a son thamman ngawl, Pathian ii thu taw a kisi ngawl phua tawm taanghthute pan na kikeam ta'n. Pathian dei bang na nuntak zawk natu in kisinna nei ta'n." 
1Timothy4:8 Pumpi thasaalin kisinna in phatna pawlkhat nei hi, ahihang thaa thu ah kisinna in, tu hun le maisang hun atu nuntakna ahikom manpha zaw pek lai hi." 
1Timothy4:9 Hi thu in thumaan kam teptee khat hi a, up tu le a cing tak saan tu thumaan thutak ahi hi." 
1Timothy4:10 Mihing theampo le, a tuan in a umte a Ngumpa, a nungta Pathian sungah lametna ih nei hu in eite in nasia takin hanciam a, na ih seam hi." 
1Timothy4:11 Hi lamlaknate le hilnate amate tungah sonsawn in. 
1Timothy4:12 Khangmoi na hi hu in, kuama in na zawngsaksak heak in a, ahihang na pauna, na ngamtatna, na itna, upna le thiangthona sungah, thu umte ii ettee tu hi ta'n." 
1Timothy4:13 Kong pai mateng in, na hun le na hanciamnate mihonpite tungah Laithiangtho simna, thuhilna le hilna in, na zangh in." 
1Timothy4:14 Na sungah a om Thaa thiangtho telte na ngaingon heak in, tuate sia kamsaangte in pau a, pawlpi upate in na tungah khut hong ngak uh ciangin na nga uh ahi hi." 
1Timothy4:15 Hite, na kisisin ta'n a, nangma le nangma tuate atu in kipia ta'n, tua hile na khantona ngual theampo in hong mu tu hi." 
1Timothy4:16 Nangma le nangma ki en in a, na hilna zongh en in a, kidawm in. Hi bang na vawtte zom to ta'n; banghang ziam cile tuabangin na vawt le nangma le na thusonna hong za te in ngupna nga tu uh hi." 
1Timothy5:1 Pasal khanghaam zaw khat sia teih heak vun a, na pa bangin ngaisun in, na thuum zaw vun. Pasal khangmoizawte na suapui bangin vawt vun," 
1Timothy5:2 nupi a haamzawte sia na nute uh bang, numei a moizawte sia thinsung thiangtho tak taw na suapuinumeite uh bangin na vawt vun." 
1Timothy5:3 Amate nguak a, a om takpi meingongte thasia vun." 
1Timothy5:4 Ahihang meingong khat in ta le tu a nei le, amate in biakna huvau sep tu a neite a innkuan sungah sin phot tahen, tua hile a nute a pate le a pute a pite ii ama tungah a sepnate a thuk kik hi tu hi, banghang ziam cile tua in Pathian diksak thu ahi hi." 
1Timothy5:5 Ama nguak om a, kuama ama a en tu a nei ngawl meingong khat in, a lametna sia Pathian tungah koi a, sun taw zan taw ama ii hu natu in thungen hi." 
1Timothy5:6 Ahihang meingong khat ama le ama cii le sa nopsakna sungah a kidia khat sia nungta napi a thisa ahi hi. 
1Timothy5:7 Amate tungah kuama in maw a zon thei ngawl natu in, hi lamlaknate hil sawn in." 
1Timothy5:8 Ahihang khat pawpo in a mealheakte, a tuanin ama innkuanpuite a en nuam bua uh le ama in upna thu a nial suak a, thu um ngawlte sangin sia zaw lai hi." 
1Timothy5:9 Meingong khat sia kum sawmluk a vaal bualai nale meingong tepteena lai sungah hel heak vun. Tua bek hi ngawlin tepteena lai sungah a tum thei tute sia khatvei bek pasal a neite," 
1Timothy5:10 tuaciangin ngamtat pha nei hi ci in a kisonte: a tate pha takin a khangtosakte, a inn ah zin pha takin a dote, Tapidaw puite tungah a kiniamkhiakte, a ngim nga mi a hute, na pha seam tu in a kipumpiakte a hi tu kisam lai hi." 
1Timothy5:11 Ahihang a khangmoi zaw meingongte sia tua tepteena lai sungah hel heak vun, banghang ziam cile a pumpi deina zui in pasal a nei nop kik ciang, Christ kung panin lampial uh hi," 
1Timothy5:12 tuabangin ama tungah kamciam a piak maksak sia a paltanna taw a maw suak uh hi. 
1Timothy5:13 Amate in inn khat pan inn khat ah vak kawkoai in hunte a luithawthongin bosak uh hi; a siazaw lai thu in, amate in ngual ngen a, mihing theampo nuammawin, a pau tuak ngawl thute pau uh hi." 
1Timothy5:14 Tua ahikom kei deina ah meingong khangmoite in pasal nei in ta nei a, a bangkua uh en tahen, tua hile ih ngalte in amate siatna a son tu hunpha a nga buatu uh hi." 
1Timothy5:15 Banghang ziam cile meingong pawlkhat in Satan nungzui tu in heakkik zo uh hi. 
1Timothy5:16 Ahihang Tapidaw numei khat in, a bangkua sungah meingong a om le, pawlpi tungah vanhngit suan ngawlin ama in en tahen, tua hile pawlpi in amate nguak a om meingong tatak teng en thei zaw tu hi." 
1Timothy5:17 Lampuite bangin na pha tak a seam pawlpi upate, a tuanin thuhilna le laithiangtho hilna nasia tak a seamte, thaman a thuap nii in nga tuak hi ci in ngaisut tu ahi hi." 
1Timothy5:18 Banghang ziam cile, laithiangtho in, “Taang a cil khuital muk tuamsak heak vun,” ci a, “Naseamte in a thaman a nga hamtang tu kilawm hi,” ci hi." 
1Timothy5:19 Pawlpi upa khat a kimawsakna ah, nii ahibuale a tamzaw tetti a om buale, thu in sim heak vun." 
1Timothy5:20 Ngualdangte zongh a lau thei natu in a maw a khialte mihonpi mai ah teih in. 
1Timothy5:21 Na nasep napo kuama nguptuam paihtuam nei ngawlin kong thupiakte na nit natu in Pathian mai, Christ Jesus mai le a thiangtho vantunglalangte mai ah ciliap huai takin kong sawl hi." 
1Timothy5:22 Topa naseam tu in aapna in mihing khat pawpo tungah na khut nga memeang heak in. Ngualdangte mawna vawtna sungah kihel heak in; nangma le nangma thiangtho takin kikeam in. 
1Timothy5:23 Na cina thei tawntung ahikomin, na ngilsung an a zaan natu tui bek dawn ngawlin sapittui tawm ne in." 
1Timothy5:24 Mihing pawlkhatte mawna sia kilangh papai a, a mawna tungtaang ah thu khenna thuak masa pai hi; ahihang a dangte mawna ahile kinungmu pheang hi." 
1Timothy5:25 Tuabang ma in ngamtat phatnate zongh kilangh pal a, a kilangh lei ngawlte ngawngawn zongh kiseal cip thei ngawl hi." 
1Timothy6:1 Kuama in Pathian min le eite hilcianna a sonsiat ngawl natu in, sila ahi theampo in a tote zatakna piak tu kilawm hi, ci in a ngaisut kul hi." 
1Timothy6:2 Tapidawte nei silate in a tote simmaw heak hen, banghang ziam cile, amate in unau khat ahi uh hi. Tua hi zaw ngawlin amate in a phazaw in na sepsak tahen, banghang ziam cile, phattuamna a ngate sia amate ii a it thu umte ahi hi. Hi thute hilin na hanthawn in." 
1Timothy6:3 Ih Topa Jesus Christ ii thumaan kammalte le ih biakna ii hilna taw a kisi ngawl upna thubul tumdang a hil sia in 
1Timothy6:4 kiphatsakna taw a kidim hi a, bangma heak a nei bua hi. Ama in a pha ngawl kam kinialna le kihaunate kin a, tuasia in ki eenna, kikamtamna, kiselnona, thusia taw kimuanlaakna," 
1Timothy6:5 thumaan thutak nei nawn ngawl a, thinsung maan ngawlte ii kam kinialna te piangsak hi. Amate in biakna sia sumhau thei natu lampi khat in ngaisun uh hi." 
1Timothy6:6 Mihing khat in a nei pawpo taw a lungkim nale biakna paaina in ama sia sumhau mama pa a suaksak takpi ma ahi hi. 
1Timothy6:7 Hi leitung ah bang ih keng ziam? Bangma ih keng bua hi! Leitung panin bang ih pusuapui thei tu ziam! Bangma ih pusuapui thei buatu hi! 
1Timothy6:8 Tua ahiciang eite in anneak le puansilh ih nei le, eite atu in a kicing hi tu hi." 
1Timothy6:9 Ahihang sum a hau nuam mihingte sia ze etna thuakin, a mawmawthuai le siatna a piangsak thei deinate ii thaang sungah awk a siatna le lalna nga uh hi." 
1Timothy6:10 Sum dei leilamna in siatna namcin ii a naak khat ahi hi. Pawlkhat in sum dei leilam ahikomin, upna pan pialin heena thinngimna tam mama thuak uh hi." 
1Timothy6:11 Ahihang Pathian mihing ahi nangma in hite theampo na pial in. Thumaan thutanna, Pathian thu sungah nopsakna, upna, itna, thuak zawkna, ciknate na nei zawk natu hanciam in." 
1Timothy6:12 Upna tai kidemna sungah na hi thei tawpin tai in a, tuaciang nangma atu in tawntung nuntakna na sungsuam in; banghang ziam cile tetti tam mamate mai ah na upna kho takin na pualaak ciang hi nuntakna ah Pathian in nang hong sam ahi hi." 
1Timothy6:13 Na theampo nuntakna a pia Pathian mai le Pontius Pilate mai ah a upna kho takin, a pualaak Christ Jesus mai ah, nangma thu kong piakna pan" 
1Timothy6:14 ih Topa Jesus Christ hong kilak kik Ni matengin, nang hong thupiaknate zui in thumaanna taw na keamcing in." 
1Timothy6:15 Kumpite ii Kumpi, topa te ii Topa, thupha sang Ukpa khat bek ahi Pathian in a hun a tun ciangin ama hong kilanghsak tu hi." 
1Timothy6:16 Ama bek thi maw a; kuama in a nai a neak thei ngawlna khuavak sungah teang hi. Kuama in ama mu ngeingawl a; kuama in ama mu thei ngeingawl tu hi. Ama ii tungah zatakna le tawntung ukzawkna om tahen! Amen. 
1Timothy6:17 Hi nuntakna sungah a kizangh nate hauna taw a kiphatsak ngawl natu, tuabang a kho ngawl haunate tungah lametna koi ngawlin, ih nopsak natu a, na theampo ngo takin hong pia Pathian tungah lametna koi vun ci in a haute tungah na hil in." 
1Timothy6:18 Nasep pha te hau a, a pha ngamtatna nei in, a sep natu, ngo takin midangte na a hop nop natu hil in." 
1Timothy6:19 Tu bangin maisang ah a kip doppha khat a suak tu sumngumte amate atu in a khol tu uh hi. Tua hile amate in nuntakna maan tatak a nei zo hong hi tu hi. 
1Timothy6:20 Timothy awng, nangma khut sungah muanna taw hong ki aapte pha takin keamcing in. Pawlkhatte ii “Heakna” ci in, a min a vaw khial, a kiihuai kampauna le mawmawt kam kinialnate na pial in." 
1Timothy6:21 Banghang ziam cile mihing pawlkhatte in tua heakna ka nei uh hi, ci in kisuangtaak uh a, tua hu in a upna lampi bo sua uh hi. Pathian ii thuthiamna in note theampo tungah om tahen." 
2Timothy1:1 Christ Jesus taw kikop a, ih nei hong kikamciam nuntakna a thangsak tu in Pathian ii deina taw a kisawl Christ Jesus sawltakpa Paul in," 
2Timothy1:2 Ka it ka tapa Timothy tungah lai kong thaak hi: Ih Pa Pathian le ih Topa Christ Jesus in thuthiamna, hesuakna le thinnopna hong pia tahen." 
2Timothy1:3 Ka taanghpupite ii sep bangin thinsung thiangtho taw a na ka sepsak Pathian tungah lungdam ka ko hi. Sun taw zan taw ka thungetna sungah nang kong phawk a, ama tungah lungdam ka ko hi." 
2Timothy1:4 Na thituite ka phawk a, tua ahikom, ka lungdamna a kicin natu in, nang kong mu nuam mama hi." 
2Timothy1:5 Na pi Lois le na nu Eunice te zongh ii a nei bang a na nei thintak upna sia ka phawk hi. Nang zongh tuabang ma in nei tu ni hi ci in kong muang tatak hi. 
2Timothy1:6 Hi thu hu in, na tungah khut kong ngak ciang Pathian hong piak tel sia na nuntaksak natu in kong phawksak hi." 
2Timothy1:7 Banghang ziam cile Pathian hong piak Thaa in eite hong lauthauhsak bua hi; tua hizaw ngawlin, a Thaa in vaangletna, itna le eima le eima ki uk zawkna taw hong kidimsak hi." 
2Timothy1:8 Tua ahikom, Topa atu tetti panna ah maizum heak in, Christ atu in thongtaakpa kei atu zonghin maizum heak in. Tua hi zaw ngawlin Pathian nasep natu thahatna hong piak bangin, Lungdamna Thupha atu thuakna sungah na kihel in." 
2Timothy1:9 Ama in ama aituam mihingte ih sua natu in eite hong hun a, hong sam hi; eite ii sepnate hang hi ngawlin, ama tupna le thuthiamna hang ahi hi. Hun kipat ma in ama in Christ Jesus tungtawnin hi thuthiamna hong pia hi," 
2Timothy1:10 ahihang tu in ih Hunpa Christ Jesus hong paina tungtawnin tua thu hong kilak hi. Ama in thina vaangletna bosak zo a, tuabangin lungdamna thu tungtawnin thimawk nuntakna hong lak zo hi." 
2Timothy1:11 Lungdamna Thupha a thangsak tu le a hil tu in, Pathian in sawltak panmun kei hong suanh a," 
2Timothy1:12 tuaciangin hi thu hu in hite ka thuak hi. Ahihang thinmuanna taw ka kidim nginge lai hi, banghang ziam cile ka uppa ka he a, ama in kei hong muang a hong aapsa teng sia tua Ni dong ama in hong kepcingsak thei tu ci in ka he hi." 
2Timothy1:13 Thumaan kammal kong hilte na kholet in a, na zui tu etteena in nei in, tuaciangin Christ Jesus taw kikopna sungah, eite aa ahi upna le ki itna sungah na kip in." 
2Timothy1:14 Ih sungah hong teang Thaa Thiangtho vaangletna tungtawnin, nang tungah, hong kimuang a hong ki aap naphate keamcing in." 
2Timothy1:15 Phygelus le Hermogenes kihelin, Asia ngammi theampo ii kei hong taisat siat sia na he hi." 
2Timothy1:16 Topa in Onesiphorus innkuan sungah hesuakna tungsak tahen, banghang ziam cile tamvei ma ka thin hong nuamsak hi. Thonginn sungah ka om sia, ama in hong maizumpui ngawl a," 
2Timothy1:17 Rome khua a thet po ciangin hong mu dawdong hong zong hi. 
2Timothy1:18 Tua Ni ciangin Topa in ama tungah hesuakna pia tahen. Ephesus khua ah zongh, kei atu in ama in bangza in hong seam ci sia na heak mama ahi hi." 
2Timothy2:1 Ka tapa awng, nang na hi le, Jesus Christ taw ih kikopna tungtawnin ih nga thuthiamna hangin thahat in." 
2Timothy2:2 Tetti tam mamate ii mai ah ka thansak hilnate la in, ngualdang a hil sawn thei tu a muanhuaite tungah aap in." 
2Timothy2:3 Jesus Christ ii a thumaan a ngalkappa bangin ngimna thuak in," 
2Timothy2:4 a seam lai ngalkap khat in, a mangpa diksak tu uuk a, khua mi thawthongte ii vai sungah kihel ngawl hi." 
2Timothy2:5 Tai kidemna sungah a tai khat in ngeina a kikoite a zui buale tel saang thei ngawl hi. 
2Timothy2:6 Lothopa khat nasep haksa a seam sia in, anlaak ciangin ama ii tel tu in an a tung masabel sia nga tu hi." 
2Timothy2:7 Kong son teng sia na ngaisusun in, banghang ziam cile Topa in a vekpi in hong tel theisak tu hi." 
2Timothy2:8 Lungdamna Thupha sungah a kihil, keima thuhilna ahi, thina pan a kitho kiksak David suan ahi Jesus Christ sia na phawk ta'n." 
2Timothy2:9 Lungdamna Thupha thuhilna in ka nei hu in, ka thuak a, mihing a maw a khialte bangin thikkol taw ngawngawnin hong kikhit hi. Ahihang Pathian kammal sia thikkhau kibul ngawl hi." 
2Timothy2:10 Jesus Christ tungtawn a hong pai ngupna le tawntung minthanna sia Pathian tealsa mite zongh in a nga thei natu in, na theampo ka thuak kenkon hi." 
2Timothy2:11 Hi thu sia thumaan hi: “Ama taw ih thi khawm zo ahile, ama taw ma in ih nungta khawm tu hi." 
2Timothy2:12 Thuakna ih zom to suak le ama taw ih maangkhawm tu hi. Ama ih nial le, ama zongh in hong nial tu hi." 
2Timothy2:13 Ih thumaan bua zonghin, ama sia hong thumaan top hi, banghang ziam cile ama le ama kitheam thei ngawl hi.”" 
2Timothy2:14 Mihingte tungah hi thu phawksak in a, tuaciang kam kinialin a kihau ngawl natu in, Pathian mai ah a ciliap huai kidop natu in hilkhol in. Hite in bangma phat tuamna hong pia ngawl a, a zate atu in siatna piangsak bek hi." 
2Timothy2:15 Pathian muna ah a kicing kikipsakna na nga natu in a phabelin naseam in a, nasep tungtaang ah a maizum natu a om ngawl naseampa bang hi in, Pathian thumaan thute a maan tak a hil theipa na hi in." 
2Timothy2:16 A kiihuai le a mawmawthuai kam kikupnate pan kikeam in, tuate in mihingte Pathian kung panin kikhualasak bek hi." 
2Timothy2:17 Tuabang kihilnate in ih sa hong neaksak meima balhte bang ahi hi. Tuabang a hil pasal niite sia Hymenaeus le Philetus ahi uh hi. 
2Timothy2:18 Amate in thumaan lampi nusia in, ih thaw kikna sia hong piang zo hi ci in a hilna uh taw mihing pawlkhatte upna lalsak hi." 
2Timothy2:19 Ahitazong Pathian ii a phaa sa, a kip tawdap sia kingawksak thei ngawl hi; tuaciang tua tungah hi kammalte ki at hi. “Topa in ama ii neisate he hi,” tuaciang “A kuama po Topa ii neisa ka hi a cite in ngamtat khialna pial tu hi.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Inn lian khat ii sungah kuang le keau a namcin in om hi: pawlkhat sia ngunn le khamh taw kivawt a, a dangte sia thing le tungman taw kivawt hi, pawlkhatte sia hun thupi sungah zak tu hi a, a dangte sia hun thawthong sungah zak tu hi." 
2Timothy2:21 Khat po in a siate theampo panin, a kithiangsak le ama sia tupna theampo ah kizangh tu hi, banghang ziam cile ama sia a Topa atu in a kipia a taktaipa hi a, na pha sep natu sung theampo ah a kizangh tu in kinging khol hi." 
2Timothy2:22 Khangno lungngulnate pialin, tuaciangin thumaan thutang, upna, ki itna, thinnopna sia, thinsung thiangtho taw Topa tungah huna ngen a, a aute taw nga khawm tu in na hanciam in." 
2Timothy2:23 Ahihang mawmawthuai le telmeal om ngawl kam kinialnate na pial in, tuate sia kihauna taw tawp ahi sia na heak ahi hi." 
2Timothy2:24 Topa ii naseampa in ngual taw kihau ngawl tu hi. Ama in mihing theampo tung a thinneam tu a, a thin uai sya pha hi tu hi." 
2Timothy2:25 Ama a langpante a puuaphat kik ciangin, thu khualna zangh tu hi. Banghang ziam cile Pathian in amate tungah kisii kikna pia in thumaan thutak a heak natu zongh hi thei tu hi." 
2Timothy2:26 Tuasia zawkciangin amate sia khuaphawk tu a, ama thu nisak nuamin a manpa Doaimangpa thaang sung panin amate suakta tu uh hi." 
2Timothy3:1 Ni tawpkhak hun ciangin hun haksa hong om tu hi, ci in na ciamtee in." 
2Timothy3:2 Mihingte sia duhop, kaangsung he, kisathei, kiphasak tu hi; amate in ngual langin, nu le pa thu ni ngawlin, lungdamna he ngawl, biakna nei ngawlin hong om tu hi." 
2Timothy3:3 Amate sia dikna nei ngawl, hesuakna sel, ngual min siasak, ngoltol, kiitakhuai, a phate ensan," 
2Timothy3:4 muan thamman ngawl, lopthop, tuaciangin kisak theina taw kidim tu uh hi. Pathian sangin pumpi nopsakna deizaw tu uh hi." 
2Timothy3:5 Amate in ih biakna sia a pua zuunna in nei tu a, ahihang a vaangletna tatak sia nial tu uh hi. Tuabang mihingte kung pan kiheam ta'n." 
2Timothy3:6 Tuate sung pan pawlkhat sia ngual inn sungah tumin mawna vanhngit a pua, deina ukna tuatuam a nei numei thaneamte," 
2Timothy3:7 sin nuam he nuam tawntung leei ahihang thumaan thutak a tel zo ngawl numeite, amate ii upna sangah zo uh hi." 
2Timothy3:8 Jannes le Jambres in Moses a langpan uh bangma in — hi mihingte in thumaan thutak langpan uh hi. Amate sia a khua ngaisutna uh naseam ngawl a upna sangah a lel ahi uh hi. 
2Timothy3:9 Ahihang amate sia mainawt ngawl tu hi, banghang ziam cile mihing theampo in amate mawmawtna hong mu tu a, Jannes le Jambres te ii thuak bangma ahi hi." 
2Timothy3:10 Ahizong nangma in ka hilna hong zui a ka ngamtatna hong zui in, nuntakna sungah ka tupna nong zui hi. Ka upna, ka thinsauna, ka itna, ka thuak zawkna," 
2Timothy3:11 hong kivawtsiatna le ka thuak thute theampo nong mu zo hi. Antioch, Iconium le Lystra ah vawtsiatna nasia mama ka thuak sate theampo na he zo hi. Ahihang, Topa in tuate theampo pan hong suatak hi." 
2Timothy3:12 A kuama po Jesus Christ taw kipawlin, Pathian dei bang nuntakna a nungta nuamte sia kivawtsia tu hi." 
2Timothy3:13 Tuaciang mihing ngilote le a kimealsealte in, phat ngawlna pan, phat ngawl seseam na ah zuan tu uh a, ngual theamin amate le amate dongin theam thuak tu uh hi." 
2Timothy3:14 Ahihang nang na hile hong kihil sa, kho takin na upna thumaan thutakte na zomto suak in. Na Syate sia a kuate ziam ci in na he hi." 
2Timothy3:15 Jesus Christ ih upna tungtawnin ngupna thu sungah hong lampui ciimna hong pia thei Lai Thiangtho sia na no ciang a, na heaksa thu ahi hunlam ciamtee ta'n." 
2Timothy3:16 Laithiangtho sia a vekpi in Pathian hu mop ahi hi. Thumaan thutak hil natu, teih natu, khialna pua natu, a maan a nuntakna tu in hil natu sung theampo ah manpha hi." 
2Timothy3:17 Tua ahikom, Pathian na a seamte in naphate theampo a vawt natu in, kicinna a cingin a nei thei natu ahi hi." 
2Timothy4:1 Pathian mai le Kumpi a hong maang tu in hong pai tu, a thite le a nungtate tungah thukhen tu, Jesus Christ mai ah, ciliap huai takin kong sawl nopna panin," 
2Timothy4:2 ngupna thu sia thuhilna in na nei in, (a hun a lem zong, a lem bua zong) upsak natu, teih natu, hanthot natu in thinsauna taw na thansak natu na vawt hamtang in." 
2Timothy4:3 Mihingte in upna thubul maante hong za nuam nawn buatu a, amate deina uh zui in, bilthak liang a, a zaak nop uh thute a son tu syate tam vaial hong khoptua tu hun hong theng tu hi." 
2Timothy4:4 Amate in thumaan thute ngaina pan puapial in, phuatawm thute hong ngai nuamzaw tu hi." 
2Timothy4:5 Ahihang nangma le nangma sia hunte theampo sungah na ki uk in; ngimnate na thuak kenkon in, Lungdamna Thupha thuhilpa nasepte naseam in a, Pathian naseampa bangin nasep tu theampo na seam in." 
2Timothy4:6 Kei ka hile sangaw biakpiak bangin hong kivawt tu hun, hong theng zo hi; kei atu in nuntakna ka nusiat tu hun hong theng hi." 
2Timothy4:7 Tai kidemna ah ka hi thei tawpin ka hi zo a, ka tai tu tan ka tai zo hi, upna ka keamcing zo hi." 
2Timothy4:8 Tu in thumaan thutang thukhenpa, Topa in tua Ni ciangin kei hong piak tu, Pathian mai ah thutang suana zawna thaman in kei hong ngak nginge hi. Kei bek hong pia tu hi ngawl a, ama hong pai kik tu itna taw a ngakte theampo zongh pia tu hi." 
2Timothy4:9 Kei kungah hai ngawlin nong pai natu in, hong hanciam ta'n." 
2Timothy4:10 Demas in hi leitung it zaw a, kei hong taisan zo hi. Thessalonica hong zot san hi. Crescens sia Galatia zuan hi, tuaciang Titus sia Dalmatia zuan hi." 
2Timothy4:10 Demas in hi leitung it zaw a, kei hong taisan zo hi. Thessalonica hong zot san hi. Crescens sia Galatia zuan hi, tuaciang Titus sia Dalmatia zuan hi." 
2Timothy4:11 Luke bek kei taw om lai hi. Mark samin hi sungah hong paipui ta'n, banghang ziam cile ama in ka nasep hong hu thei hi." 
2Timothy4:11 Luke bek kei taw om lai hi. Mark samin hi sungah hong paipui ta'n, banghang ziam cile ama in ka nasep hong hu thei hi." 
2Timothy4:11 Luke bek kei taw om lai hi. Mark samin hi sungah hong paipui ta'n, banghang ziam cile ama in ka nasep hong hu thei hi." 
2Timothy4:12 Ephesus ah Tychicus ka paisak hi. 
2Timothy4:13 Nong pai ciang Troas khua Carpus kungah ka nusiat ka laktong puasilh hong paipui ta'n; laibute zongh hong keng ta'n, savun taw a kivawt sia a tuanin ka dei hi." 
2Timothy4:14 Thik seakpa Alexander in hong nawngkaisak mama hi. Topa in ama ii sepna sa tung pan thaman pia tu hi. 
2Timothy4:15 Nang mama zongh ama tungtaang ah na kidawm in, banghang ziam cile ama in ih ngupna thuhilnate nasia takin hong langpan hi." 
2Timothy4:16 Keima le keima ka kihuuk phitbel lai in, kuama in kei hong dinpui ngawl a hong taisan siat uh hi. Pathian in amate tungah na siik heak hen." 
2Timothy4:17 Ahitazong Topa sia kei kungah hong om a, thahatna hong pia hi. Tuasia ciangin Gentile te theampo ii a zaak tu in ngupna thu a cing in ka thangsak thei hi; tuaciang kei sia thidaan panin hong suaktasak hi." 
2Timothy4:18 Topa in kei sia siatna theampo panin, hong suatak tu a, ama Vantung Ngam sungah muanhuai takin hong lato tu hi. Ama tungah vaangletna a tawntung le a tawntungin om tahen. Amen." 
2Timothy4:19 Priscilla, Aquila le Onesiphorus te innkuan tungah paupuina kong thaak hi." 
2Timothy4:20 Erastus sia Corinth ah taam hi. Trophimus sia a ciina ahikom Miletus ah ka nusia hi. 
2Timothy4:21 Phalbi ma in nong pai natu hong hanciam tavun. Eubulus, Pudens, Linus le Claudia te in paupuina hong thaak hi. Tuasia bangma in Tapidaw suapui dangte zongh in hong thaak hi." 
2Timothy4:22 Topa sia nangma ii thaa taw hong om tahen. Pathian ii thuthiamna sia note theampo taw hong om tahen. 
Titus1:1 Pathian ii naseampa le Jesus Christ ii sawltakpa, keima Paul in lai kong thaak hi. Kei masia Pathian teal sate upna khantosak natu le, ih biakna ii hil thumaan thutak ah, a lampui tu in hong kiteal a, hong kipuak hi." 
Titus1:2 Tua thumaan thutak sia tawntung nuntakna lametna tungah kiphut hi. A leilot ngawl Pathian in hi nuntakna sia, ei atu in, hun kipat pan ma hong kamciam zo a," 
Titus1:3 tuaciang a hun hong tun tak ciangin, ama ii hong puak thu sungah hong pualaak hi. Hi thu sia kei hong ki aap a, tuaciang ih Ngumpa Pathian hong thupiakna taw ka thangsak hi." 
Titus1:4 Ih nei khop tek upna sungah ka tapa tatak ahi Titus tungah lai kong at hi. Pathian le ih Hunpa Christ Jesus in, thuthiamna le thinnopna hong pia tahen." 
Titus1:5 Sep tu a kitaangsamh lai teng, ahi tu bangin a vaihawmsak tu le khuapi simin pawlpi upate na koi thei natu in, Crete ah nang hong nusia ka hi hi. Kong vaithakte na phawk tan:" 
Titus1:6 pawlpi upa khat sia sitbaang ngawl tu hi; ama in zi khat bek a nei hi tu a, tuaciang, a tate sia thu um mi hi tu hi, a uuk po ngamtate le thu ni ngawlin a minthangte hi ngawl tu hi." 
Titus1:7 Banghang ziam cile Pawlpi lampui khat sia Pathian ii nasepna a uk ahikom, ama sia paubanna nei ngawl tu hi. A ma sia a kihisak, a thintom, zukham thei, a ngoltol, ahibuale sum lamsang a duhop hi ngawl tu hi." 
Titus1:8 Ama in zindo thiam tu a, a phate dei tu hi. Ama le ama ki uk zo tu a, thutangin, thiangtho in, phinciing tu hi." 
Titus1:9 Ama in up tu thubul taw a kisi, a muan thamman thu sia kho takin len tu hi. Tuabang hile thumaan hilcianna taw ngualdangte hanthawn thei tu a, tuaciang, tua thumaan kihilna a nalhte ii khialna zongh lak thei tu hi." 
Titus1:10 Banghang ziam cile, tuabang mihing tam mama om a, a tuanin Jew biakna sung pan hong kikhealte in, amate ii thu nawnsante taw ngual langpanin theam uh hi." 
Titus1:11 Maizum maw in sum nga nopna bek taw, a kilawm ngawl thute a hilna uh taw, innkuan bubup buaisak ahikom, a thuson ih khaktan kul tu hi." 
Titus1:12 Amate ii kamsaang khat ahi thumaan a son Crete mipui khat ma in, “Crete mite sia a leilot tawntungte, ngamsa ngilote le a datham antuangte hi,” ci hi. Hi thu hu in, amate nasia takin teih lete amate in a maan upna nei tu hi." 
Titus1:13  
Titus1:14 Tuaciang Jew te ii phuatawm taanghthute le thumaan thutak a nial mihingte ii thupiakte amate in len nawn ngawl tu hi. 
Titus1:15 Thinsung thiangtho mihingte atu in, na theampo thiangtho hi; ahihang a ninnoite le a um ngawlte atu in, bangma a thiangtho om ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile amate thinsung le a khua ngaisutnate ninnoi hi." 
Titus1:16 Amate in Pathian ka he uh ci ahihang, amate ngamtatnate taw kileebul hi. Amate sia ki etsatna taw kidim a, thu ni ngawl ahiciang a pha khat zongh seam tu in kiphu ngawl hi." 
Titus2:1 Ahihang nang na hile, upna thubul maan taw a kisi thute na hil kul tu hi." 
Titus2:2 Pasal khanghaamzawte sia a kilawm bang ngamtatna nei tu, khuangaisun thei tu, amate le amate ki uk zo tu; a upna uh maan tu, ki itna nei tu, tuaciang thuak zawkna a nei natu uh in na hil in." 
Titus2:3 Tuasia bangma, numei khanghaamzawte a thiangtho nuntakna taw a nungta numeite bangin, a ngamtat natu hil in. Amate sia ngual ngensia theite hi ngawl tu a, sapittui ii sila hi ngawl tu hi. Amate in a pha teng hil thei tu a," 
Titus2:4 amate sungah numei khangmoizawte in a pasal uh le a tate uh a it natu in hil tu uh hi," 
Titus2:5 amate le amate a ki uk zo, a thiangtho, tuaciang a pasalte ii thu a ni, bangkua nupi pha ahi thei tu in hil tu nu hi, tua hile Pathian kung pan hong pai thute, kuama in sonsia ngawl tu hi." 
Titus2:6 Tuabang ma in pa khangmoite sia, amate le amate ki uk zawk natu in hanthawn ta'n." 
Titus2:7 Na theampo ah ngamtat phatna taw kisai in nangma mama a ettee taak na hi kul tu hi. Na hilna sungah deisak takpina le thupi laakna taw hil in. 
Titus2:8 Sit thei tu ahi ngawl kammal kilawmte zangh in, tua hile na ngalte in, ei huvau a sia hong pau natu, a heak ngawl uh ciangin, amate maizum thei tu uh hi." 
Titus2:9 Sila te in na theampo sungah, a tote thu zawp tu a, amate lungkimsak tu hi. Amate kam zo kik ngawl tu a," 
Titus2:10 a neisa nguksak ngawl tu hi. Tua hi zaw ngawlin, silate in, a tawntung a uphuai le mihing pha ahi hunlam a lak kul tu hi, tua hile ih Ngumpa Pathian thu kihilna sia a sepna theampo ah man neisak tu hi." 
Titus2:11 Banghang ziam cile Pathian in mihing theampo ngupna nga natu in, a thuthiamna hong pualaak hi." 
Titus2:12 Tua thu thiamna in, eite Pathian dei ngawl nuntakna zia, leitung taw kisai lungngul nate nusia in hong sawl a, hi leitung ah eima le eima a ki uk zo nuntakna, thutang le Pathian dei bang nuntaknate taw ih nuntak tu in hong hil hi." 
Titus2:13 A lian ih Pathian le Hunpa Jesus Christ minthanna taw hong kilangh tu ih lam et thupha hong tun Ni ngak in, ih om laitak tuabangin ngamta tawng." 
Titus2:14 Seksolna theampo pan ih suatak natu le ama bek ii neisa hi in, a pha sep tu a lawp, a thiangtho mite hong suasak natu in ama le ama sia ei atu hong kipia hi." 
Titus2:15 Na thu hong ngaite, na hanthot ciang le na hil na pau ciangin nangma thuneina theampo na zangh in a, hi thute na hil ta'n. Amate kuama in nangma nomusak heak in." 
Titus3:1 Ngamukte le thuneite thu zawpin a thu a nit natu le thupha theampo vawt tu in a kingin khol natu na mihingte na phawksak in. 
Titus3:2 Kuama siat son ngawlin, ngual taw kilem a, a kuama theampo tungah, cikna thiamna a lak tawntung natu na son in." 
Titus3:3 Banghang ziam cile, eima zongh khatvei lai in, a mawmaw, thu ni ngawl le a khial thei mi ih hi ngei hi. Ci le sa deina le nopsakna namcin ii sila ih hi ngei hi. Ih nuntakna sia hazatna le eenna taw ih zangh hi; ngual in hong ensan a, tuaciang ei zongh in ih ensan hi." 
Titus3:4 Ahihang ih Ngumpa Pathian ii cikna le itna hong pualaak ciang," 
Titus3:5 ama in ei hong ngum hi. Tua in eite ii naphate ih sep hang hi ngawl a, pianthakna le nuntakna thak hong pia Thaa Thiangtho tungtawnin, ama hong hesuakna taw hong ngup ahi hi." 
Titus3:6 Pathian in Jesus Christ ih Hunpa tungtawnin, Thaa Thiangtho sia a kicing takin, eite tungah hong buak hi," 
Titus3:7 tuasia ciangin ama ii thuthiamna taw, eite sia Pathian taw thutang suak thei in ih lamet ahi tawntung nuntakna hong neisak hi." 
Titus3:8 Hisia in a maan thu sonna ahi hi. Pathian umte in mihing khat sim atu thinbot thei a, a manphate sep natu in a hun uh a piak thei natu in hi thute na thupi laak tuam tu in ka dei hi." 
Titus3:9 Ahihang a mawmawthuai kam kinial nate, taanghpupite khang simna saute, kihauna le thukham huvau khat le khat kinialna te na pial tavun. Tuate sia phattuamna om ngawl a, man nei ngawl hi." 
Titus3:10 Pawl kikhenna a piangsak mihing khat ii tungah a kidop thei natu, niivei peuma na hil tavun, tua zawkciang ahile, ama taw na kipee nawn heak vun." 
Titus3:11 Tuabang mihingte sia a lal hi a, a mawnate in ama a khial hunlam kilanghsak ahi sia na he hi." 
Titus3:12 Artemas ahibuale Tychicus sia nang kungah kong puak ciang, kei kung Nicopolis ah nong pai natu in hong hanciam ta'n, banghang ziam cile, phalbi hun sia tua munah zak tu in ka khensat zo hi." 
Titus3:13 Sitnipa Zenas le Apollos khualhaw hong kipat thei natu in na hu in a, a kisap tu theampo ahithei za in na vaihawmsak in." 
Titus3:14 A kitaangsamh tatak teng a piak thei natu in mihingte in a hun uh sia thupha vawtna in a zak thei natu a sin uh kul tu hi; amate in a nuntak nate man nei ngawlin zangh heak hen. 
Titus3:15 Ka ompui theampo in, hong paupui tek uh hi. Upna sungah ih lawmte theampo tungah nuksetna kam na sonsak in. Pathian ii thuthiamna sia note theampo taw hong om tahen." 
Philemon1:1 Christ Jesus atu a, thong a taak Paul le ih suapuipa Timothy in — koma ngualtamh le ka nasep puipa uh Philemon tungah," 
Philemon1:2 Tuaciang Philemon le na inn ah a kikhawm pawlpi le koma suapuinu Apphia le ngalkap bang a ka seppui uh Archippus tungah lai kong thaak uh hi: 
Philemon1:3 Ih Pa Pathian le ih Topa Jesus Christ in thuthiamna le thinnopna hong pia tahen. 
Philemon1:4 Suapui Philemon awng, thu ka nget simin na min kong lo a, ka Pathian tungah lungdam ka ko hi." 
Philemon1:5 Banghang ziam cile, Pathian mihing a kici peuma na itna le Topa Jesus sungah upna na neina thute ka za hi." 
Philemon1:6 Ka thungetna sia, thu umte ih hina taw ih kipawl khopna in Christ taw kipumkhat a, ih nuntakna sungah ih nei thupha a minpiang a thuk zaw in hong telsak thei natu ahi hi." 
Philemon1:7 Suapui awng, nong itna in, kei atu lungdamna lianpi le hanthotna tam ma hong pia hi! Pathian ii mihingte theampo ii thin nong nuamsak hi." 
Philemon1:8 Hi thu hu in, Christ sungah na suapui khat ka hina taw, sep tu a kul khat sia hangsan takin kong sawl ngam hi." 
Philemon1:9 Ahihang nang hong it ka hikomin, kong thuum zaw hi. Keima Paul sia Christ Jesus ii tongciin hi a, ama hu in tu laitak mama in thongtaak zongh hi napi, hi bangin thuumna kong zangh zaw hi." 
Philemon1:10 Tua ahikom, Onesimus luangin ngetsakna khat kong nei hi, ama sia Christ sungah ka tapa hi zo hi; banghang ziam cile thong sungah ka om sung ma in, thaa vai ah ama ii a pa ka suak zo hi." 
Philemon1:11 Hun khat lai in ahile ama sia nang atu in, a kimanna om ngawl hi, ahihang tu in, ama sia nang le kei atu in a kizangh thei khat hong suak hi." 
Philemon1:12 Tu in nang kungah ama kong puak kik a, ka thinsung theampo taw ka phawk nginge hi." 
Philemon1:13 Lungdamna thu hu in, luangta in ka om laitak, nangma luangin kei hong hu thei tu, ama sia hi sungah ka keam nuam hi." 
Philemon1:14 Ahitazong, nong hu natu kong sawl hamtang nuam bua hi; tua sangin, nangma thu in na ngamtat tu kong dei zaw hi. Tua ahikom, na thukim ngawl po bangma ka vawt buatu hi." 
Philemon1:15 Onesimus sia nang kung panin tawmvei sung a tai sia, a tawntungin na omkhop kik thei natu uh hang hizaw tha tu hi." 
Philemon1:16 Tu in ama sia sila khat lel po hi nawn ngawlin, sila dinmun tungsia ah om zo hi: ama sia Christ sungah ih it suapuipa khat hi zo ta hi. Ama sia kei atu in bangza in, manpha ziam! Tuaciang nang atu zonghin, sila khat a hina le, Topa sungah suapuipa khat a hina taw bangza in manpha zaw lai tu ziam!" 
Philemon1:17 Tua ahikom nangma ii na naseppui bangin, kei nong ngaisun le, keima nong saan tu bangin, ama na saang kik in." 
Philemon1:18 Nang tungah ngamtat khialna hong nei a, ahibuale, leiba hong nei le zong, keima ii kong bat bangin na ciamtee in." 
Philemon1:19 Hi sungah keima khut tatak taw ma in lai hong at tu khi hi: (A tatakin ci leang, nangma pumpi mama kei tungah hong ba nginge na hi sia, kong phawsak tu kul ngawl hi.)" 
Philemon1:20 Tua ahikom suapui awng, Topa atu in, thupha hi sia hong seam ta'n; Christ sungah suapui khat hina taw ka thin hong nuamsak ta'n!" 
Philemon1:21 Lai hi sia kong at laitakin, kong sawl bangin vawt hamtang tu in kong muang hi — a tatakin kong sawl za sangin a tamzaw vawt tu ci in kong he hi." 
Philemon1:22 Tuaciang kei atu in inn doituam khat, na koi kholsak in, banghang ziam cile note theampo ii thungetna sia, Pathian in hong saang tu a, note kungah kei hong zuansak kik tu hi, ci in lametna ka nei hi." 
Philemon1:23 Christ Jesus atu in ka thongtaakpui Epaphras in note hong paupui hi," 
Philemon1:24 tuabang ma in ka naseppui Mark, Aristarchus, Demas le Luke in note hong nukset uh hi." 
Philemon1:24 tuabang ma in ka naseppui Mark, Aristarchus, Demas le Luke in note hong nukset uh hi." 
Philemon1:24 tuabang ma in ka naseppui Mark, Aristarchus, Demas le Luke in note hong nukset uh hi." 
Philemon1:25 Topa Jesus Christ ii thuthiamna sia note theampo taw hong omkhawm tahen. 
Hebrews1:1 A bosa hunin, Pathian in ih taanghpupite tungah kamsaangte tungtawnin, lam tuatuam taw tamvei ma paupui hi," 
Hebrews1:2 ahihang hi hun khakbel hunte ah, a Tapa tungtawnin hong paupui hi. Ama tungtawnin Pathian in vaannuai bup bitphua a, a khakbel ciangin na theampo ama ii neisa suak tu in ama sia Pathian ii tealsa ahi hi." 
Hebrews1:3 Ama in Pathian' minthanna ii vaangtaang hong lengsak a, ama sia Pathian ii hina zia bang tatak ma hi in, vaannuai bup ama ii a vaang nei a kammal taw khosak hi. Mihingte ii mawnate atu in mawmaitsakna a nga sak zawkciangin Vaanglianpipa Pathian ii ziatsang vantung ah to hi." 
Hebrews1:4 Ama tungah Pathian piak min sia vantunglalangte min sangin lianzaw ahi bangma in, Tapa sia vantunglalangte sangin lian zaw hi." 
Hebrews1:5 Banghang ziam cile Pathian in vantunglalangte khat po tungah, “Nang sia ka Tapa na hi hi; tu ni in kei sia na Pa ka hi hi,” a ci ngei bua hi. Tuasia bangma in Pathian in, vantunglalangte khat po tungah, “Kei sia ama ii Pa ka hi tu a, ama sia ka Tapa hi tu hi,” ci ngeingawl hi." 
Hebrews1:6 Ahihang Pathian in a Tapaciil leitung ah a paisak tu ciangin, “Pathian ii vantunglalangte theampo in ama bia tu hi,” ci hi." 
Hebrews1:7 Ahihang Pathian in vantunglalangte huvau ahile, “Pathian in a vantunglalangte vui suaksak a, a naseamte sia meikuang suaksak hi,” ci hi." 
Hebrews1:8 Tapa huvau ahile Pathian in: “Pathian awng, na ngam sia a tawntung a tawntungin kip tu hi! Nangma in na mihingte thutang taw na uk hi." 
Hebrews1:9 A maan thute na dei a, a maan ngawl thute na ngaimaw hi. Tua hu in Pathian, na Pathian in nang hong teal zo hi. Tuaciang na lawmte a piak sangin nang tungah lungdamna le upatna a lianzaw hong pia hi,” ci hi." 
Hebrews1:10 Ama in a ci laina panin, “Topa awng, nangma in a kipatciilin simlei na bitphua hi, tuaciang na khut mama taw vantungte na vawt hi." 
Hebrews1:11 Tuate mangthang tu a, ahihang nang na kip tu hi; Tuate in puan bang lui in sia tu hi." 
Hebrews1:12 Amate laktong puasilh bangin na thep tu a, puan bangin na laih tu hi. Ahihang nang na hile a tawntungin na kibang a, na nuntakna a bo ngei bua hi,” ci hi." 
Hebrews1:13 Pathian in a vantunglalangte khat po ii tungah: “Na ngalte na peang nuai ah sisanhin kong neisak mateng, ka ziatsang ah to in,” ci ngeingawl hi." 
Hebrews1:14 Tua ahile vantunglalangte sia bang ziam? Amate sia Pathian naseam thaa te hi a, ngupna a saang tute a hu tu in, a sawlte ahi uh hi." 
Hebrews2:1 Tua hu in ei in thumaan thu ih zaak te pan, lam ih pial ngawl natu in ih kholet seseam kul hi." 
Hebrews2:2 Vantunglalangte in ih taanghpupite tungah a thupiakte maan hi ci in lak hi, tuaciang a zui ngawl a ni ngawl khat pawpo sia ama taw a kiphu in daan thuak tu hi." 
Hebrews2:3 Tua hi a, hi zata in a lian ngupna thusim buathong leang bangbangin suakta tu hi ziam? Topa ama mama in hi ngupna thangsak masa a, tuaciangin a zate in ei tungah tua thu a maanna hong lak zo hi." 
Hebrews2:4 Tua kawmkaal ah Pathian in nalamdang laknate, a tumdang tuatuamte vawtna le, Thaa Thiangtho letsong te ama ii a dei bangin a hawmsakna taw in amate tetti panna tungah tetti panna belap thua hi." 
Hebrews2:5 Pathian in hong pai tu ci in ih son leitung thak sia, a uk tu in vantunglalangte a koi bua hi." 
Hebrews2:6 Tua hi ngawl zaw in Laithiangtho mun khat ah: “Pathian awng, mihingte sia bang hi a; tuaza in banghang thinbot ni ziam? mihing ma hi lel napi a bang tu in thinnuammaw ni ziam?" 
Hebrews2:7 Vantunglalangte sangin a niamzaw in tawmvei sung na koi a; upatna le minthanna ama na khusak hi," 
Hebrews2:8 tuaciang na theampo tungah a uk tu in na vawt hi.” Pathian in mihing sia “na theampo a uk tu” in vawt hi, ci hi. Hi thu in na theampo huam siat hi. Ahihang tu laitak hunin, mihing in na theampo uk hi, ci in ih mu bua hi." 
Hebrews2:9 Ahihang Pathian ii thuthiamna tungtawnin, mihing theampo atu a thi tu in, vantunglalangte sangin tawmvei hunsung teng a niamzaw in a kivawt Jesus ih mu hi. Thina a thuak hu in tu in minthanna le upatna lukhu a khuk ih mu hi." 
Hebrews2:10 Ta tam mama in ama ii vaangletna a siim thei natu in, na theampo bitphua in a keam Pathian in, Jesus sia a thuakna tungtawnin a cialcing pa a suasak tu sia a maan thu hi takpi hi. Banghang ziam cile amate ngupna sung a then sia Jesus ahi hi." 
Hebrews2:11 Ama in mihingte sia a mawnate uh panin, thiansua a, tuaciang ama le tuabangin a kithiansua sa theampo in, Pa kibang a nei uh hi. Tua hu in Jesus in, amate sia innkuanpui a nak tu in, a mai a zum bua hi." 
Hebrews2:12 Ama in Pathian munah, “Ka mite munah na sep sa teng ka son tu hi; amate ii a kikhopna sungah nang kong pok tu hi,” ci hi." 
Hebrews2:13 Ama in, “Ka muanna sia Pathian tungah ka nga tu hi,” ci hi. Tuaciang, “Hi sungah Pathian ii kei hong piak tanote taw ka om hi,” zongh ci lai hi." 
Hebrews2:14 Ama ci bangin tua tanote sia chi le sa taw a om mihingte ahi bangma, Jesus ama mama zongh amate bang hong suak a, amate mihing pianzia teng hong siim hi. Hi bang a hina sia banghang ziam cile ama thina tungtawnin thina tungah vaang a nei doaimangpa a lalcipsak natu hi a," 
Hebrews2:15 thina a kiitak hu in a nuntak sung teng sila a, a kaai mihingte tuabangin suaktasak hi." 
Hebrews2:16 Banghang ziam cile ama ii huna a piakte sia vantunglalangte hi ngawl hi ci in kitelthiang hi. Tua hi ngawl zawin, ama in Abraham ii suan le paalte a hu hizaw hi." 
Hebrews2:17 Hisia hu in ama in a suapuite taw na theampo sungah a kiban uh kul hi, banghang ziam cile mihingte a mawna pan mawmaisakna kipiak thei natu in, Pathian na a sepna ah, a thumaan ngual a hesuak thei Thiampi Lianbel a sua natu ahi hi." 
Hebrews2:18 Tu in ama in ze etna a thuakte sia hu thei hi. Banghang ziam cile ama mama zongh kize et zo a, thuak ngei zo hi." 
Hebrews3:1 Pathian hong sapsa zongh ahi, ka Tapidaw suapuite awng! Ih pualaak upna ii Thiampi Lianbel tu in, Pathian ii a sawlpa Jesus ngaisun vun." 
Hebrews3:2 Pathian ii inn sungah Moses sia a nasepna ah a thumaan bangma in, ama in hi nasep seam tu in a teal Pathian tungah thumaan hi." 
Hebrews3:3 Inn khat a sa pa in tua inn sangin upatna nga zaw hi. Tuasia bangma in, Jesus sia Moses sangin vaang piakna lianzaw taw kiphu hi." 
Hebrews3:4 Inn theampo a sa khat tek om a, ahizong na theampo a vawt pa sia Pathian ahi hi." 
Hebrews3:5 Moses sia Pathian inn sungah naseampa bangin, thumaan hi. Tuaciangin ama in maisang a Pathian ii son tu thute son hi." 
Hebrews3:6 Ahihang Christ sia Pathian inn uk Tapa bangin thumaan hi. Eite in, ih lametnate sungah thinletna le kimuanna ih kholet le ama inn ih hi hi." 
Hebrews3:7 Tua ahikom Thaa Thiangtho ii cina taw kizui in, “Tuni in Pathian aw na za uh le," 
Hebrews3:8 na taanghpupite sennealngam sungah a om uh lai, Pathian a langpan lai, Pathian a ze et uh hun lai bangin, na thin uh na sahsak heak vun." 
Hebrews3:9 Amate in kum sawmli tawntung ka sep teng mu zo napi Kei hong ze et uh a, hong sin zazaan uh hi, Pathian in ci hi." 
Hebrews3:10 Tua ahikom tua mite tungah ka thin uuk a, hi bangin ka ci hi, ‘Amate in kei tungah hong thumaan ngawl tawntung a, ka thupiakte hong nial uh hi.’" 
Hebrews3:11 Ka thin uuk a, ‘Tawlngakna ka piak natu ngam ah amate tum ngeingawl tu hi!’ ci in: a ciliaphuai kamciamna ka vawt hi,” ci hi." 
Hebrews3:12 Ka thu uppuite awng, a nungta Pathian kung pan na lampial ngawl natu in, no sungah kuama peuma in ngitlona thinsung le up ngawlna thin na nei ngawl natu in kidawm tavun." 
Hebrews3:13 Laithiangtho sungah, “Tuni” a kici kammal sia a kizak thei lai teng mawna ii hong theam ngawl natu le na thin uh a sak ngawl natu in, khat le khat ni simin na kihu zawk uh kul tu hi." 
Hebrews3:14 Banghang ziam cile a kipat pan ih nei kimuanna sia a tawp dongin ih kholet le ei theampo sia Christ taw a kikopte ih hi hi. 
Hebrews3:15 Hisia laithiangtho ii ci ahi hi: “Tuni in Pathian ii aw na za le, na taanghpupite ii Pathian a langpan lai uh bangin na thin uh na sahsak heak vun.”" 
Hebrews3:16 Pathian aw za a, ama a langpante a kuate ziam? Moses ii Egypt ngam panin a pusuapui theampo ahi hi." 
Hebrews3:17 Pathian sia kum sawmli tawntung a kuate ii tungah thin uuk ziam? Sennealngam sungah puk a, a thi mawneite tungah Pathian a thin uuk hi." 
Hebrews3:18 Pathian in a ciliaphuai kamciam pia a, “Amate tawlngakna ka piak natu ngam ah a tum ngei buatu uh hi,” a ci sia — akua te ii thu a sonna ziam? Ama a langpante ahi hi." 
Hebrews3:19 Amate in tua ngam sungah tum thei ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile amate in um ngawl ahihang hi ci in ih he hi." 
Hebrews4:1 Tu in Pathian in, ama sonsa tawlngak nuam sia ih nga thei natu in kamciam hong pia hi. Tua ahiciang, tua tawlngak nuam sia saang ngawlin khat zongh ih om thaak ngawl natu eite kidawm tek tawng." 
Hebrews4:2 Banghang ziam cile eite zongh amate bangma in lungdamna thu ih za zo hi. Amate ahile tua thu za napi amate atu phatuamna a pia bua hi. Banghang ziam cile amate in a zaak uh ciangin upna taw a saang bua uh hi. 
Hebrews4:3 Tua hi a, ei a umte in, Pathian hong kamciamsa tawlngak nuam sia ih saang hi. “Ka thin uuk a, hi bangin a ciliap huai kamciam ka vawt hi. ‘Amate in ka piak tu tawlngakna ngamnuam ah a tum ngei buatu hi!’ ” a ci bang tatak ma ahi hi. Ama ii nasep sia simlei a bitphua hun panin a kiman sa hi napi tu a bangin ci veve hi." 
Hebrews4:4 Banghang ziam cile Laithiangtho sung mun khat ah ni sali ni huvau hi bangin ci hi: “Pathian sia a nasepna theampo pan a ni sali ni in tawlnga hi.” 
Hebrews4:5 Hi thu a kison kik leleau na ah, “Amate in tawlngakna ka piak natu ngam ah a tum ngei buatu hi.” ci hi." 
Hebrews4:6 Lungdamna Thu a za phit te in tua tawlngak nuam sia a saang bua uh hi. Banghang ziam cile amate in a um bua uh hi. Tua ahikom a saang tu in, a deisak midang om hi." 
Hebrews4:7 Hi thu sia koi bangin kilak ziam cile Pathian in, “Tuni,” a kici nidang khat koi hi. Tua zawk kum tam mama ciangin, a kisonsa laithiangtho khante sungah a om bangma in Pathian in David tungtawnin, tua thute hi bangin son hi: “Tuni in Pathian aw na za uh le, na thin na sahsak heak vun.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Joshua in Pathian kamciam ahi tawlngak nuam sia mihingte tungah pia zo hi thong le, Pathian in nidang khat ciang son kik nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Hebrews4:9 Tua ahikom ni sali ni in Pathian a tawlngak bangma in, Pathian mite atu in tawlngak nuam khat om lai hi." 
Hebrews4:10 Banghang ziam cile tua Pathian kamciam a piak tawlngak nuam sungah a tawlnga peuma in, Pathian tawlngak bangma in, amate nasepna pan a tawlnga tu uh hi." 
Hebrews4:11 Tua ahikom, amate upna a sel hu in tawlngakna a nga ngawl bang ih sua ngawl natu in, ei zongh tua tawlngakna sia ih saan thei natu in, ih hi theiza in hanciam tawng." 
Hebrews4:12 Pathian kammal in nungta a, thahat in, lang nii hiam namsau sangin hiam zaw hi. Ama in thaa le thinsung kisiktuana mun, ngu le taang ngungeak kipeena mun teng pailet hi. Ama in mihing deina le lungngulna te tungah thukhen hi." 
Hebrews4:13 Pathian mai ah bangma a kiseal thei bua hi; bitphua sa na theampo sia ama mai ah kipualaak siat hi. Tuaciangin ih sep ih vawt sa theampo tungah thu hong sit tu sia ama ahi hi. 
Hebrews4:14 Tua ahikom ih upna ih pualaak sate ii tungtaang ah eite kip tek tawng. Banghang ziam cile eite in Pathian omna tatak ah a pai sa, Thiampi Lianbelpa — Pathian Tapa Jesus ih nei hi." 
Hebrews4:15 Ih Thiampi Lianbelpa in ei tha zawmna hong khuangai pui thei ngawlpa ahi bua hi. Tuabang hi ngawl zaw in, Thiampi Lianbelpa in, eima bangma in ze etna namcin na thuak a, ahizong a khial ngei bua hi." 
Hebrews4:16 Tua ahikom, kimuanna nei in thuthiamna a omna mun Pathian kumpi tokhum kung zuan tek tawng. Tua munah hesuakna ih saang tu a, ih kitaangsap laitak hong hu tu in, thuthiamna ih mu tu hi." 
Hebrews5:1 Thiampi lianbel peuma a mipuite sung panin kiteal a, mawmai natu sangaw biakpiakna le piakkhiatna vawt tu in, amate taangin Pathian naseam tu a kitavaw te ahi hi." 
Hebrews5:2 Ama mama in thaneamna tuatuam nei ahikom, thu tel ngawlte le khialna vawtte tungah ama in, cingh thei hi." 
Hebrews5:3 Ama mama thaneam ahikom, a mihingte mawna atu bek hi ngawlin ama mawnate atu zongh sangaw biakpiakna a sep kul hi." 
Hebrews5:4 Thiampi lianbelpa za sia ama le ama kiteal a, a kipia kuama om ngeingawl hi. Aaron tungah a kipiak bangin — mihing khat sia Pathian ii samna bek taw thiampi lianbel kisuaksak hi." 
Hebrews5:5 Tuasia bangma in Christ in ama le ama thiampi lianbel za a kipia bua hi. Pathian in ama munah, hi bangin ci zaw hi, “Nang sia ka Tapa na hi hi; tuni in Kei sia nangma ii Pa ka suak hi.”" 
Hebrews5:6 Mundang khat ah a sonna panin, “Nangma sia thiampi na hi tawntung tu hi. Melchizedek taw a kinguizui thiampi na hi tu hi,” ci hi." 
Hebrews5:7 Leitung ah a nuntak lai in Jesus in thina pan a ngum thei, Pathian tungah a nging auna le thitui luanna taw thungetna le dei ngetnate nei hi. Ama kiniam khiak a, Pathian ii deina a zuipa ahi hu in, Pathian in za hi." 
Hebrews5:8 Ama in Pathian Tapa ahihang, thuakna tungtawnin thunitna sin hi." 
Hebrews5:9 Ama sia a cingtaak a kisuasak zawkciang, ama thu a ni theampo atu in, tawntung ngupna ii naak a suak hi." 
Hebrews5:10 Pathian in ama sia Melchizedek pan a kinguizui susuk thiampi lianbel in saang hi. 
Hebrews5:11 Hi thu tungtaang son tu tam mama om hi. Ahihang no tungah son tel thei tu haksa hi. Banghang ziam cile note in thu na tel hak mama uh hi. 
Hebrews5:12 Note in sya na sep natu uh, hun tam ma om zo napi — Pathian thu kipatciilna taw hong hil tu khat na kisamh lai uh hi. Antak ne tu hi zo napi noai na neak uh kul lai hi." 
Hebrews5:13 Noai ne khat pawpo sia patang hi lai a, a maan le a maan ngawl a khentel thei ngawl laite na hi uh hi." 
Hebrews5:14 Antak sia ulian sate atu hi a, amate in, kisinna tungtawnin a pha le a sia khentel thei uh hi." 
Hebrews6:1 Tua ahikom Tapidawte tungah thuhil phitnate nungsangah nusia in, a puicing kihilna taw eite mainawt tawng! A mannung ngawl nasepnate nusia in Pathian ih upna," 
Hebrews6:2 baptize na nanamte, khut ngakna. tawntung thukhenna le a thisate thawkiknate, kansuut kikik pheang nawn bua tawng." 
Hebrews6:3 Eite mainawt tawng! Pathian in hong lungkimpui le, ih vawt tu sia hisia ahi hi." 
Hebrews6:4 Banghang ziam cile a upna uh a nusia sate sia a kisii kik natu in, kikaizawn kik thei nawn na ziam? Amate sia khatvei lai in Pathian ii khuavak sungah om ngei zo uh hi. Amate sia vantung letsong tep ngei zo uh hi. Amate sia Thaa Thiangtho zongh a saang ngeisa ahi uh hi." 
Hebrews6:5 Pathian kammal pha hi ci in a tel sa, maisang a hong pai pheang tu, hun ii vaangletna zongh a he sate ahi uh hi." 
Hebrews6:6 Tua zawkciang amate in a upna uh taisan uh hi! Amate sia a kisii kik tu sia suak thei nawn ngawl hi. Banghang ziam cile, amate in Pathian Tapa sia Thinglamtee tungah kilh kik a, mipi mai ah a maizumhuai in a pholaak ahi uh hi." 
Hebrews6:7 Lothote atu a limci ankungte a posak nguatui a dawn leitangte ii tungah Pathian in thupha pia hi. 
Hebrews6:8 Ahihang lopa le lingkungte a posak a ahile, tua leitang sia a mannung bua hi. Pathian ii haamsiat tu le, meikuang taw a halcip tu lauhuai hi." 
Hebrews6:9 Ahizong hi bangin ih pau hang, kong it lawmte awng, no atu sia ka lungmuang hi. Note ii ngupna taw kizui thupha a phazawte na nei uh sia kong he uh hi." 
Hebrews6:10 Pathian sia a maan ngawlin a ngamta ngei bua hi. Ama in na a sepnate ahizong, ama ii tungah itna na lakna uh ahi, Tapidawpui te ii tungah huna na piakte le na piapiak laite sia hong makngilsak ngawl tu hi." 
Hebrews6:11 Deisakna lianpi kong neisakna uh sia, bang ziam cile, na lamet uh thute hong taangtung takpi thei natu in, na lawpna uhte a tawp dongin, mihing sim in, na kepcing tek tu ahi hi." 
Hebrews6:12 Na datham tu sia kong deisak bua uh hi, Pathian ii kamciamte na nga natu in, a umte le a thinsaute bang na hi natu in kong deisak uh hi." 
Hebrews6:13 Pathian in Abraham tungah kamciam a piak ciangin, a kamciam teng a taangtun natu ama in kiciamna vawt hi. Ama sangin a lianzaw om nawn ngawl ahikom, ama ii min taw kiciam hi." 
Hebrews6:14 Ama in “Thupha kong pia tu a, suan le paal tam mama kong pia tu hi ci in kamciam kong pia hi,” ci hi." 
Hebrews6:15 Abraham sia a thinsau ahikom Pathian ii kamciam teng a saang hi. 
Hebrews6:16 Mihing khat in kiciamna a vawt ciangin, ama sangin a lianzaw khat ii min zangh a, tua in kinialna theampo bosak hi." 
Hebrews6:17 Ama ii kamciam a piakte, a saang tute tungah, Pathian in a tup a sawmna peal ngeingawl hi, ci in thiang takin telsak nuam ahikom a kamciamte sia, kiciamna taw in belap hi." 
Hebrews6:18 Tua hi a, thu nam nii om hi, tuate sia kikheal thei ngawl a, Pathian in tua thute taw kisai in leilot thei ngawl hi. Tua ahikom ama sungah ngammuanna a ngate in, ih mai ah hong kikoi lametna sia kho takin ih let natu in nasia takin hanna ih nei hi." 
Hebrews6:19 Hi lametna sia ih nuntakna atu in, thikkip bangin, ih nei hi. Tuasia in, maanin, muanhuai a, vantung biakinn a kidalna puankhai sia kaantanin mun thiangtho sungnung ah pai hi." 
Hebrews6:20 Ei taangin, Jesus in eite mai tua munah paikhol zo hi. Tuaciang, Melchizedek thiampi sia taw a kinguizui, a tawntung atu in, thiampi lianbel hong suak hi." 
Hebrews7:1 Hi Melchizedek sia Salem kumpipa hi a, a Saangbel Pathian ii thiampipa ahi hi. Abraham sia kumpi li taw kisimin, ngalzo a hong cia ciang, Melchizedek taw kisi a Melchizedek in thupha pia hi." 
Hebrews7:2 Tuaciang Abraham in ngalte ii neisa a laak theampo tung pan see sawm sua see khat ama pia hi. (Melchizedek min ii khiakna masa sia “Thutang Kumpipa,” cina hi a, tuaciang, Salem kumpipa zongh kici ahikom, “Kilemna Kumpipa,” zongh kici si hi.)" 
Hebrews7:3 Melchizedek ii pa ahizong a nu ahizong a taanghpupite min ahizong a kiciamtee mun om ngawl hi. A suana ahizong a thina ahizong tepteena om ngawl hi. Ama sia Pathian Tapa bang ahi hi. Ama in a tawntungin thiampi hi top hi. 
Hebrews7:4 Tua ahikom ama bangza in lian ziam ci in na ngaisun thei uh hi. A minthang ih taanghpupi ahi Abraham zongh in, ngal kisim na phual pan a, a nga vanhte sung pan see sawm sua see khat ama pia hi." 
Hebrews7:5 Tuaciang, Levi suan thiampite sia Thukham in Israel mite tung pan see sawm sua see khat, a laak natu thupia hi. Tuate in, a minampuite hi a, tua a minampuite sia Abraham suante ma ahi hi." 
Hebrews7:6 Melchizedek sia Levi suan hi ngawl hi. Ahihang Abraham tung panin see sawm sua see khat la in, Pathian kamciam a saang Abraham sia thupha pia hi." 
Hebrews7:7 Thupha a pia pa in, thupha a saang sia sangin, lianzaw ahi hunlam tel laak om ngawl hi." 
Hebrews7:8 Thiampite tungtaang a, see sawm sua see khat sia, a thithei mihingte in la hi. Ahihang Melchizedek ahile, laithiangtho son bangma in, see sawm sua see khat sia a nungta pa in la hi." 
Hebrews7:9 Bang ci nuam hi ziam cile, Abraham in see sawm sua see khat a piak ciangin Levi in zongh a pia suak hi (A suan a paalte in khon hi)." 
Hebrews7:10 A tatakin ci leang, Levi sia piang ngawl lai hi, Melchizedek in, Abraham taw a kimu lai in Levi sia a taanghpupi Abraham pumpi sungah om hi, ci tu ahi hi." 
Hebrews7:11 Levi thiampite bulphu in, Israel mite tungah Thukham a kipia ahi hi. Tu in Levi thiampite nasepna sia a cialcing sa hile thiampi nam dang khat a pian kul ngawl tu hi. Tua Thiampi in Aaron za laih hi ngawlin, Melchizedek za laih tu a kulna sia hi thu hang ahi hi." 
Hebrews7:12 Banghang ziam cile thiampi huvau ah kikhealna a om ciang, thukham zongh a kikheal kul hi." 
Hebrews7:13 Tu a ih son teng huvau sia ih Topa in phung dang pan hi a, ama bee le phung sung pan thiampi a seam ngei kuama a om bua hi." 
Hebrews7:14 Ama sia Judah minam a piang ahi hunlam sia a kuama po ii heak ahi hi. Tuaciang thiampite huvau a son ciangin Moses in Judah min a lo ngei bua hi. 
Hebrews7:15 A thu paizia sia thiang vaial hi; thiampi tuam dangkhat hong khang a, tua pa sia Melchizedek bangma ahi hi." 
Hebrews7:16 Ama sia thiampi kisuaksak hi. Mihingte ngeina le zui tu thu omte taw hi ngawlin mong nei ngawl nuntakna khat ii vaang taw kisuaksak hi. 
Hebrews7:17 Banghang ziam cile laithiangtho in, “Nang sia thiampi khat na hi tawntung tu hi. Melchizedek taw a kinguizui thiampi za lua pa na hi hi,” ci hi." 
Hebrews7:18 Tua ahikom ngeina lui sia, kiheam hi. Banghang ziam cile tua in thaneam a, a mannung bua hi." 
Hebrews7:19 Banghang ziam cile Moses thukham in bangma a cialcingsak thei bua hi. Tu in Pathian taw ih kinai thei natu lametna phazaw khat hong kipia zo hi. 
Hebrews7:20 Tuaban ah, Pathian kiciamna zongh om si hi. Midangte thiampi a kisuasak lai in, tuabang kiciamna a om bua hi." 
Hebrews7:21 Ahihang Jesus sia kiciamna khat taw thiampi a sua natu Pathian in, “Topa in a ciliap huai kamciamna khat vawt zo a, tuaciang, ama in a dawk kik buatu hi. ‘Nang sia a tawntungin thiampi na hi tu hi’ ” ci hi." 
Hebrews7:22 Tua ahikom hi a kilamdanna in, Jesus sia a phazaw thuciamna a kipsak pa zongh suaksak hi." 
Hebrews7:23 A kilamdanna dang khat zongh om lai hi: thiampi dang tam mama a om hi, banghang ziam cile amate sia thithi a, a nasep uh a zomto thei bua hi." 
Hebrews7:24 Ahihang Jesus sia nungta tawntung ahikom ama ii thiampi nasep sia ngualdang a ki aap sawn bua hi. 
Hebrews7:25 Tua ahikom ama in, tu le a tawntungin, ama tungtawn a, Pathian kung a zuante sia hun thei hi, banghang ziam cile ama in amate atu Pathian munah thu ngetsak tu in, a nungta tawntung hi." 
Hebrews7:26 Tua ahikom Jesus sia ih kitaangsapnate hong kicingsak thei, Thiampi Lianbel ahi hi. Ama thiangtho a; ama in mawna ahizong, khialna ahizong, ama sungah a nei bua hi; ama sia mawneite sung panin, kidoi tuam a, vantungte sangin a saang zaw in kilaamto hi." 
Hebrews7:27 Ama sia thiampi lianbel dangte taw a kibang bua hi; a masa phitbelin, ama mawna atu le tua zawkciang midangte mawna atu in, sangaw biakna ni simin a piak kul ngawl hi. Ama le ama a kipiak ciangin, a tawntung atu in khatvei lian sangaw biakpiakna vawt zo hi." 
Hebrews7:28 Moses Thukham in a cialcing ngawl mihingte thiampi lianbel tu in sep hi; ahihang Thukham om zawkciang hong piang, Pathian ii kiciamna taw a vawt kamciam in a tawntung atu in a cialcing Tapa sia Thiampi suaksak hi." 
Hebrews8:1 Ih sawson theampo ii bulpi in, tuabangin eite ii Thiampi Lianbel khat ih neina thu ahi hi. Tua pa in vantung ah Vaanglian Pathian tokhum ziatsang ah to hi." 
Hebrews8:2 Ama in mihingte ii sak ahi ngawl, Topa ii sak buk tatak ahi A Thiangthobel Mun ah Thiampi Lianbel seam hi." 
Hebrews8:3 Thiampi Lianbel theampo sia Pathian tungah piakkhiatnate le nganhing taw biakpiaknate a pia tu in, a kisep ahi hi. Tua ahi bangma, ih Thiampi Lianbelpa zongh in, na khat peuma a piak nanak tu ahi hi." 
Hebrews8:4 Jew te Thukham deina bangin letsong a pia tu in thiampite om ahi nungsang, hi leitung ah ama hong om le zong thiampi hi ngawl tu hi." 
Hebrews8:5 A tatakin ci leang ama ii a thiampi nasep in vantung a sia a zui hi a, tua ii limh bek ahi hi. Tua in Moses ii sepna sia bangma ahi hi. Ama in Puanbuk Thiangtho a sak tu ciangin, Pathian in, “Mualtung ah hong kilak sia ii lim bang tatakin, na theampo na vawt hamtang in,” ci hi." 
Hebrews8:6 Ahihang tu in, Jesus a ki aap thiampi nasepna sia amate aa sangin lianzaw a, Pathian le a mihingte kilaklaw ah a vawt thuciamna sia zongh amate aa sangin, a phat zawk bangma ahi hi. Banghang ziam cile tua thuciamna sia a phazaw nate kamciam piaknate tungah kidoppha ahi hu hi." 
Hebrews8:7 A masa thuciamna sia ah khialna om ngawl hi thong le, a niina thuciamna sia kul ngawl tu hi." 
Hebrews8:8 Ahihang Pathian in, a mite tungah khialna mu ahikom thu a sonna ah, “Topa in, Israel mite le Judah mite taw thuciamna thak khat, ka vawt tu hun hong theng tu hi." 
Hebrews8:9 Amate ii taanghpupite taw thuciamna ka vawt bang ahi buatu hi. A khut uh pan kai in, Egypt pan ka pusuapui hunlai bang ahi buatu hi. Amate taw ka vawt thuciamnate tungah a thumaan bua uh hi, tua ahikom amate ka awlmawk bua hi." 
Hebrews8:10 Tu in hisia in, maisang hong pai lai tu hun sungah, Israel mite taw ka vawt tu thuciamna ahi hi, Topa in ci hi: Ka thukhamte amate thinsung ah ka koi tu a, a lungtang tungah ka at tu hi. Kei sia amate ii Pathian ka hi tu a, amate sia keima ii mite ahi tu hi." 
Hebrews8:11 Amate kuama in a minam puite a hil sawn a kul nawn buatu hi. ‘Topa he vun,’ zongh amate tetek tungah a kici buatu hi. Banghang ziam cile amate in kei hong he siat tu a, a nobel panin a lianbel dongin hong he tu hi." 
Hebrews8:12 A mawnate uh ka maisak tu a, a khialnate uh ka ciamtee nawn buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Hebrews8:13 Pathian in thuciamna thak sia a son ciangin, a masa sia a lui suaksak hi; tuaciangin bang khat pawpo a lui a tul sate sia hai ngawlin bomang tu hi." 
Hebrews9:1 Thuciam masa sia in biakpiakna ngeinate le mihing ii vawt biakna mun zongh nei hi. 
Hebrews9:2 Puanbuk khat kisa a, a puanung sia Thiangtho Mun kici hi. Tua ii sungah mei detna khuam le Pathian a piak anluum koina sabuai om hi." 
Hebrews9:3 Kidalna puankhak a niina sia ii nungsangah Thiangthobel Mun a kici puanbuk khat om hi. 
Hebrews9:4 Tua ii sungah sathau namtui halna, khamh biaknatau le, khamh taw a kituam Thuciamna Thingkuang om a, a sungah manna koina khamh uum le a teeno a suak Aaron ciangkhut le thupiakte a ki atna suangpheak niite om uh hi." 
Hebrews9:5 Tuate tungah Pathian ompuina lim a lak, cherub te om a, maw kimaisakna mun ii tung pan a tha taw siin uh hi. Ahihang tu laitak sia tua nate theampo a vaikhua in son tu hun ahi bua hi." 
Hebrews9:6 Hite sepzia sia hi bang ahi hi. Thiampite in ni simin puanbuk puanung sungah tumin a sep tute seam uh hi," 
Hebrews9:7 ahihang a sungnung doituam sungah, Thiampi Lianbelpa bek kum khatin khatvei tum hi. Ama ii mawna le a mihingte ii a phaw thaak ngawl mawnate atu in, chisan la in, Pathian bia hi." 
Hebrews9:8 Puanbuk puanung sia a kip in a om laitengin Thiangthobel Mun kihong ngawl lai hi, ci in Thaa Thiangtho in thiang takin hil hi." 
Hebrews9:9 Hisia in tu hun kilakna lim khat ahi hi. Pathian tungah a kipia biakpiakna le, nganno taw biakpiakna in, a biate thinsung cialcingsak thei ngawl hi ci thu kimu hi," 
Hebrews9:10 banghang ziam cile tuate in anneak, tuidawn le kithiansuana tuatuamte taw kisai bek hi. Hite sia a puatham zui tu ngeinate hi a, Pathian ngeina thak a piak sia a kipsak mateng atu hi bek hi."
