Hebrews9:11 Ahihang Christ sia hi lai ah a omsa naphate theampo ii Thiampi Lianbel tu in hong pai zo hi. Ama ii thiampi sepna puanbuk sia lianzaw a, cialcing zaw hi; tuasia in mihingte ii vawt hi ngawl a, a kibitphua simlei taw a kisai ahi bua hi." 
Hebrews9:12 Christ in Thiangthobel Mun ah khatvei lian a tum zawkciang, ama in, kealte le khuitalte ii chi sia biakpiakna tu in a keng bua hi. Ama chisan piazaw in, ei atu in tawntung ngupna hong ngasak hi." 
Hebrews9:13 Kealte le khuitalte ii chi le khuino halna vaamte a kithe ciang biakna huvau a, a thiangtho ngawl mihingte thiangthosak hi." 
Hebrews9:14 Hisia thumaan ahikom, Christ ii chisan in bangza in seam zozaw seseam tu ziam! Tawntung Thaa tungtawnin, ama in Pathian tungah ama le ama a cialcing sangaw biakpiakna in, kipia zo hi. Ama chisan in a mannung ngawl biakna huvau panin, ih thinsung hong thiangsak tu hi." 
Hebrews9:15 Tawntung thupha Pathian kamciamte a saan thei natu in, Pathian sapsa mihingte atu, Christ in thuciam thak khat hong vawtsakna in, hisia hang ahi hi. Hisia kipiangsak thei hi, banghang ziam cile thina khat om a thuciam masa sia a om kimlai ma in, mihingte a khialnate pan tua thina in suaktasak hi." 
Hebrews9:16 Ngamhlua natu lai a kinusiat tungtaang ah tua lai atpa sia thi zo ci in a lak thei tu kisamh hi," 
Hebrews9:17 banghang ziam cile thi zawkciang atu in a ki at lai sia, a at pa nuntak lai teng kizangh thei ngawl a, a at pa thi zawkciang bekin kizangh thei pheang hi." 
Hebrews9:18 Tua hi a, thuciam masa sia ngawngawn zongh chisan zakna bek taw thu suak thei hi." 
Hebrews9:19 A masa phitbel in Thukham sungah a thupiak theampo mihingte tungah Moses in sonthiang phot hi. Tua zawkciangin khuitalte le kealte chi la in tui taw a hel zawkciang, hyssop baak le tuu mulsan pawlkhat zanghin, Thukham laibu tung le mihingte tungah the hi." 
Hebrews9:20 Ama in “Hi chi in Pathian ii ih zui tu a, hong thupiak thuciamna a kipsak sia ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Hebrews9:21 Tuasia bangma Moses in Puanbuk Thiangtho tung le biakna ah a kizangh nate theampo tungah chi the hi. 
Hebrews9:22 A tatakin, thukham ii ci bang hile na theampo phialma chisan in thiansua a, chisan a buak ciang bekin mawmaisakna om hi." 
Hebrews9:23 Vantung ah a om nate ii lim a late sia tuabangin kithiansua hi. Ahihang vantung nate mama in a phazaw biakpiaknate kulsak hi. 
Hebrews9:24 Banghang ziam cile, Christ in a tatak sia ii lim ahi mihingte vawt Thiangtho Mun sungah a tum bua hi. Ama in vantung tatak ma ah tumin Pathian mai ah eite luangin, tu in a na kilak tawntung hi." 
Hebrews9:25 Jew te Thiampi Lianbelpa in Thiangthobel Mun ah kum simin nganno chi taw tum hi. Ahihang Christ in ama le ama a kipia kikik bua hi," 
Hebrews9:26 tuabang hi thong le, simlei a kibitphua pan kipan tamveipi na thuak zo tu hi. Tu in hunkhen theampo a tawp natu hong nai ciangin, ama le ama a kipiakna taw mawna kithiansua natu in, ama in a tawntung atu, khatvei lian hong kilaak zo hi." 
Hebrews9:27 Mihing theampo khatvei tek thi tu a, tua zawkciang Pathian in amate tungah thukhen tu hi." 
Hebrews9:28 Tuasia bangma in, Christ zongh mihing tampite mawna a laaksak tu in, a nuntakna khatvei lian a kipia ahi hi. Ama sia a nii veina hong kilangh tu a, mawna taw kipekan tu hi nawn ngawlin, ama ngak nginge in a omte hun tu ahi hi." 
Hebrews10:1 Jew te Thukham sia a tatakte ii a kicing le a maan lim ahi zo bua hi; hong pai tu naphate ii a kician tak ngawl a pianzia bek ahi hi. Tua sangaw biakpiaknate zongh kum simin kipia tawntung hi. Tua ahile hi sangaw biakpiaknate tungtawnin, Thukham sia in Pathian kung a zuan mihingte bangbang hong cialcingsak thei tu ziam?" 
Hebrews10:2 Pathian a bia mihingte sia a mawna panin, kithiansua takpi hi le amate sia mawna taw kithasung nawn ngawl tu a, sangaw biakpiakna theampo om nawn ngawl tu hi." 
Hebrews10:3 Ahihang kum khat zawkciang kum khat sangaw biakpiaknate in, mihingte mawna phawksak kik tu hi." 
Hebrews10:4 Banghang ziam cile khuitalte le kealtalte chi in mawnate a la keak thei ngei bua hi. 
Hebrews10:5 Hi thu hangin Christ sia leitung ah hong pai tu ciangin ama in Pathian tungah, “Sangaw biakpiaknate le piakkhiatna te na dei bua hi, ahihang kei atu in pumpi khat nong koisak khol zo hi." 
Hebrews10:6 Nang in mawmaisak natu in biaknatau tungah nganhing a kipumhalte ahibuale sangaw biakpiaknate taw na lung a kim bua hi. 
Hebrews10:7 Tuaciangin, ‘Thukham laibu sungah keima thu a ki at bangma in, Pathian awng, na deina bang a seam tu in, Hi sungah om ing,’ ka ci hi,” ci hi." 
Hebrews10:8 Ama in a masa in, “Nang in sangaw biakpiakna, piaknate le mawnate laakkeak natu in, biaknatau tungah nganhing pumhalte na dei bua a, na lung a kim bua hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom Pathian in sangaw biakpiaknate Thukham bangin kipia hi napi, tu a bangin na ci hi." 
Hebrews10:9 Tua zawkciangin, ama in, “Pathian awng, na deina bang a seam tu in, hi sungah om khi hi,” ci hi. Tua ahikom Pathian in sangaw biakpiakna lui te phiat siat a, Christ ii kipumpiak biakpiakna taw theak hi." 
Hebrews10:10 Pathian dei bangin Christ in ngamta ahikom, ama ii tawntung atu khatvei lian a pumpi a kipiakna hu in eite theampo mawna pan hong kithiansua hi." 
Hebrews10:11 Jew thiampite khat simin, a nasep sia ni simin seam a, sangaw biakpiakna sia tamvei ma pia veve hi; Ahihang hi sangaw biakpiaknate in mawnate a la keak thei ngei bua hi." 
Hebrews10:12 Ahihang Christ in mawnate atu in, sangaw biakpiakna khat pia a, tua biakpiakna sia a tawntung atu in, kikhomsuan hi, tua zawkciangin, ama sia Pathian ii ziatsang ah to hi." 
Hebrews10:13 A ngalte sia peang ngakna tokhum bangin ama ii peang nuai ah Pathian ii a koi mateng, tu in ama in tua munah ngak hi." 
Hebrews10:14 Tua ahiciang ama in khatvei a kipumpiakna taw mawna pan a kithiansuate, a tawntung atu in a cialcing suaksak hi." 
Hebrews10:15 Tuaciangin Thaa Thiangtho zongh in, ama ii tetti panna hong pia hi. Hi bangin ci masa hi," 
Hebrews10:16 “Hisia maisang ah hong pai tu hun sungah amate taw ka vawt tu thuciamna hi. Ka thukhamte amate lungtang sungah ka koi tu a, a thinsung ah ka at tu hi,” Topa in ci hi." 
Hebrews10:17 Tuaciangin ama in, “Amate mawnate le ngitlo ngamtatnate ka ciamtee nawn buatu hi” ci hi." 
Hebrews10:18 Tua ahikom hi mawnate hong kimaisak zawkciangin, mawnate laak keak natu piakkhiatna dang a kul nawn bua hi." 
Hebrews10:19 Tuaciangin suapuite awng, Jesus ii chisan hu in, Thiangthobel Mun ah ih tum natu in, suatakna a kicing takin ih nga hi." 
Hebrews10:20 Ama in eite atu ama ii pumpi ahi kidalna puankhak sia pailetin — a nungta lampi thak khat hong honsak hi. 
Hebrews10:21 Eite in Pathian ii innpi a uk thiampi lian khat ih nei hi. 
Hebrews10:22 Tua ahikom thintak le upna maan taw mawna kithasunna pan, a kithiansua sa lungtang le tuithiang taw a kisil sa pumpite taw Pathian kung zuan tek tawng." 
Hebrews10:23 Ih pualaak sa lametna kholet tawng, banghang ziam cile Pathian in, hong kamciam sate sia kholet tu hi, ci in ih muang ngam hi." 
Hebrews10:24 Khat le khat kithinbot tawng, ki itna kilak in a pha ngamtat natu kihu tek tawng." 
Hebrews10:25 Pawlkhatte bang hi ngawlin, eite in kikhoptua ngei sia thasua bua tawng. Topa Ni hong nai hi ci in, mu na hi uh ciangin, khat le khat kihanthawn seseam zaw tawng." 
Hebrews10:26 Banghang ziam cile thumaan hong kiheaksak zawkciang, mawna ih vawt kaltang lai le, mawna maisak natu, biakpiakna khat beak zongh om nawn ngawl hi." 
Hebrews10:27 Hong pai pheang tu thukhenna le Pathian a langpante a lalcipsak tu a kiitakhuai meikuang sia launa taw ngak a, ih om tu bek taang lai hi!" 
Hebrews10:28 Moses thukham a paltan khat pawpo sia tetti nii ahibuale a tamzaw taw thukhenin a kimawsak le hesuakna om ngawlin kithisak hi. 
Hebrews10:29 Tua ahile Pathian Tapa a zawngsak pa sia bang suak tu ziam? Mawna pan a, a thiansua Pathian thuciamna chisan a awlmaw ngawlte, thuthiamna Thaa a zawngsak te, bang tek suak tu ziam? Ngaisun vun, tuabang mihing khat ii thuak tu a kilawm daan sia bangza in nasia zaw tu ziam!" 
Hebrews10:30 Banghang ziam cile, “Phu ka lam tu a, ka thuk kik tu hi,” a ci sia pa le, “Topa in ama mihingte thu a khen tu hi,” a ci sia pa zongh ih he hi." 
Hebrews10:31 A nungta Pathian khut sung ih taaksuk tu sia lauhuai mama hi! 
Hebrews10:32 A bosa hun sungah note, bangbang hi kana nu ziam, phawk kik vun. Tualai in, Pathian khuavak sia no tungah hong taan zawkciang, na tam mama na thuak ngei uh hi. Ahitazong kisaan in na hanciamna ah, na lel bua uh hi." 
Hebrews10:33 Note khat vevei ngual sungah a kilanghin hong kivawtsia a, tuaciang hun dangte ah hi bangin a kivawtsiate na pawlpui ngam uh hi." 
Hebrews10:34 Thongtaakte na thuakpui uh a, na neisa theampo hong kimatsak ciangin, tua supna sia lungdam takin na thuak uh hi, banghang ziam cile a tawntung a, a kikhomsuan tu, a phazaw pek khat, nei nginge lai na hi uh sia na he uh hi." 
Hebrews10:35 Tua ahiciang na thinletna uh thasua heak vun. Banghang ziam cile tuasia in thaman lian mama taw hong kizom tu hi. 
Hebrews10:36 Pathian ii deina bangin na sep thei natu le, ama hong kamciamte na saan thei natu in, na thin na sausak kul tu hi." 
Hebrews10:37 Banghang ziam cile laithiangtho in, “Tawmvei zawkciang, hong pai tu pa hong pai tu hi; ama haisaang ngawl tu hi." 
Hebrews10:38 Bangpo ahizong a thutang ka mite in, um tu a nungta tu hi: ahihang amate khat po a heak kik le ama ii tungah ka lungkim ngawl tu hi,” ci hi." 
Hebrews10:39 Eite in heak kik a, a mangthangte ih hi bua hi. Ei sia upna nei in a kingumte ih hizaw hi." 
Hebrews11:1 Upna nei ih ci sia, lametna ih neinate tungah thinmuanna hi a, a kimu thei ngawl laite tungtaang ah muan ngamna ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:2 Taanghlai mihingte sia upna a nei hu in, Pathian lungkim hi." 
Hebrews11:3 Vaannuai bup sia Pathian kammal taw kibitphua a, a kimu thei nate sia a kimu thei ngawl nate panin, kivawt hi ci in upna taw ih tel hi." 
Hebrews11:4 Upna taw Abel ii Pathian tungah a biakpiakna sia Cain ii biakpiakna sangin phazaw hi. Ama ii upna tungtawnin, ama sia Pathian in thutang hi ci in a saan pa hi a, banghang ziam cile Pathian mama in a piakte lungkim hi. Abel sia thi zo ahihang ama ii upna in thu hong son lai hi." 
Hebrews11:5 Upna in Enoch sia thina panin keam hi. A thi tu luangin, Pathian in ama la to zaw a, kuama in ama mu thei nawn ngawl hi. Laithiangtho sungah Enoch sia a kilaak to ma in, Pathian lungdamsak hi, ci hi." 
Hebrews11:6 Upna ngawl taw kuama in, Pathian lungdamsak thei ngawl hi, banghang ziam cile Pathian kung a zuan peuma in, ama sia om takpi a, ama a zongte thaman pia hi, ci in, a up uh kul hi." 
Hebrews11:7 Ama ii a mu thei ngawl maisang ah hong tung pheang tu nate huvau, Pathian ii kingintaak natu a sonte, Noah ii a zaak thei sia upna hang ahi hi. Ama in Pathian thu ni a, teambaw vawtin, tua ii sungah ama le a innkuanpuite kisuatak hi. Tua hu in leitung bup sia puavawkna thuak a, tuaciang upna pan hong pai thutang suana sia Noah in Pathian tung panin nga hi." 
Hebrews11:8 Pathian ii kamciam a piaksa ngam ah a pai tu in, Abraham in Pathian ii sapna a nit sia upna hang ahi hi. Ama in koisung pai tu ci in he ngawl pipi ma in, a ngam nusia hi." 
Hebrews11:9 Pathian ii ama tungah, a kamciamsa ngam ah ngamdangmi khat in a teen sia upna hang ahi hi. Ama in Pathian tung pan a kibang kamciamna ma a saang, Isaac le Jacob bangma in puanbuk sungah teang hi." 
Hebrews11:10 Abraham in Pathian ii ngealin a sak, a bulkip khuapi ngak nginge hi." 
Hebrews11:11 Abraham huai mama zo a, a zi Sarah zongh ta nei thei ngawl hi napi upna in ama sia pa khat suaksak hi. Pathian in a kamciam sia tungsak tu hi, ci in muang hi." 
Hebrews11:12 Abraham sia a thithi ma hi zo napi, hi pasal khat ii a suan le a paal sia van a aksi za le tuipivaal ah a kisim zo ngawl senvui za ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:13 Hi mite theampo sia upna sungah thi uh hi. Amate in Pathian ii kamciamte saang man ngawl a, a khualana pan ngal mu bek uh hi, ahitazong lungkim veve uh hi. Tuaciang amate in hi leitung ah ngamdangmi le ngaltaite bang ahi uh sia pualaak uh hi." 
Hebrews11:14 Tuabang a pualaakte in, amate aituam tu ngam khat zong hi ci in kitelthiangsak hi." 
Hebrews11:15 Amate in a nusiat sa ngam sia a ngaisusun nawn bua uh hi, ngaisun nuam le a heak kik natu hunpha om thei tu hi." 
Hebrews11:16 Amate ii lungngul sia ngam phazaw, vantung ngam hi zaw hi. Tua ahikom Pathian in amate ii Pathian hi a kici sia a mai a zum bua hi. Banghang ziam cile ama in, amate atu khuapi khat vawtkhol sa in koisak hi." 
Hebrews11:17 Pathian in Abraham a ze et lai in, a tapa Isaac sia sangaw biakpiakna bangin a pia ngamsak sia upna ahi hi. Abraham sia Pathian ii kamciam a piakna pa hi napi ama in a tapa khat bek a nei sia sangaw biakpiakna in nei tu kithoai hi." 
Hebrews11:18 Pathian in Abraham tungah, “Isaac tungtawnin kong kamciamsa suan le paalte na nei tu hi,” ci hi." 
Hebrews11:19 Abraham in Isaac sia thina pan Pathian in thosak kik thei tu hi ci in tuat hi, tua ahiciang Abraham in Isaac sia thina panin nga kik — ci tu ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:20 Isaac in Jacob le Esau ii maisang atu thupha a piak sia upna hang ahi hi. 
Hebrews11:21 Jacob in a thi mahiat in, Joseph tapate thupha a piak sia upna hang ahi hi. Ama in a ciangkhut dawnah kinang in Pathian bia hi." 
Hebrews11:22 Joseph in a thi dektak ciangin Israel mite Egypt ngam pan a pusua natu thu a son sia le ama luanghawm tungtaang ah a ngamtat natu uh a vaithak teng sia upna hang ahi hi. 
Hebrews11:23 Moses a sua zawk tha thum sung, a nu le a pa in, ama a sealcip uh sia, upna hang ahi hi. Amate in ama sia nauno hoi khat hi, ci in mu ahikom, kumpipa thupiakna a nit ngawl uh hang, a lau bua uh hi." 
Hebrews11:24 Moses hong khanthin tak ciang kumpipa tanu ii a tapa a kici tu uuk ngawlin a nial sia upna hang ahi hi. 
Hebrews11:25 Tawmvei sung mawna sungah a nopsak tu sangin, Pathian ii mihingte taw a thuak khop tu sia uukzaw hi." 
Hebrews11:26 Ama in Messiah hangin huasaakna a thuak tu sia, Egypt ngam ii hauna theampo sangin, kimanh zaw pek sa hi, banghang ziam cile ama in maisang thaman a saan pheang lai tu te mitsuan hi." 
Hebrews11:27 Moses in kumpipa thin uuk tu lau ngawlin, Egypt ngam a nusiat sia upna hang ahi hi. A kimu thei ngawl Pathian sia a mu bang phetin, nungsang ah heak kik tu a uuk bua hi." 
Hebrews11:28 Thina ii Vantunglalang in, Israel mite ii tapaciil theampo a thalup thaak ngawl natu in ama in Paisan Poai piangsak a, kongkhate tungah chisan a kinoi natu thu a piak zongh upna hang ahi hi." 
Hebrews11:29 Upna in San Tuipi sia leiko tung tot bangin, Israel mite kaantansak zo a, Egypt mite in kaantan tu in a kipat ciang, tuipi in amate valhlum siat hi." 
Hebrews11:30 Israel mite Jericho khua ni sali kiimkotin a pai zawkciang tua khua luphungte a cip thapna in upna hang ahi hi. 
Hebrews11:31 Pumpi zuak numei Rahab sia Pathian thu a ni ngawlte taw a kithalup khop ngawl natu in a keam sia upna ahi hi. Banghang ziam cile ama in, Israel te ii ngalvilte pawlvawt in zindo hi." 
Hebrews11:32 Ka son tawto lai tu ziam? Gideon, Barak, Samson, Jephthah, David, Samuel le kamsaangte theampo ii thu ka son natu hun kicing ngawl hi." 
Hebrews11:33 Upna tungtawnin, amate in, ngam bu bup sim uh a, zo uh hi. Amate in a maan nasepte seam a, tuaciang Pathian kamciamte saang uh hi. Amate in tawpite kam humcip a," 
Hebrews11:34 a kiitakhuai meikuangte sumit in namsau taw thalup natu pan suakta uh hi. Amate sia thaneam kale thahatte suak uh hi; amate sia kidona sungah thahat a, ngamdangmi ngalkapte zothal uh hi." 
Hebrews11:35 Upna tungtawnin a thisa a kinungtasak kik a mealheakte, numeite in nga uh hi. A dangte ahile, suatakna a saan tu nial in, a phazaw nuntakna sungah a kithaw kiksak natu in, vawtsiat zazaan thuakin thi uh hi." 
Hebrews11:36 Pawlkhat sia kiselno in kivel a, pawlkhat sia thikkol kibulin, thong sungah kikhum hi." 
Hebrews11:37 Amate suang taw kideang hi, tum nii sua in ki attan a, namsau taw kithat hi. Amate tuuvun ahibuale, kealvun silhin vak uh hi — zawngkhal in, kivawtsia a, ahi ngawl lalam in kivawt uh hi." 
Hebrews11:38 Leitung sia amate taw a kiphu bua hi! Amate in ngaltaite bangin, sennealngamsung le mual tungah vakthap in, suanghawng leihawng sungah a teang uh hi." 
Hebrews11:39 Upna a nei hu in hi mite theampo sia bangza in teptee huai ziam! Ahihang amate in, Pathian kamciam a saang man bua uh hi," 
Hebrews11:40 banghang ziam cile Pathian in ei atu a phazaw tupna, hong neisak hi. Ama ii tupna sia, eite taw ih kitholkhop ciang bekin a kicialcingsak pheang tu ahi hi." 
Hebrews12:1 Ei ih hi le, ih kiimkot ah hiza a tam mihonpi tetti ih nei hi. Tua ahikom ih mai hong khak thei na theampo le hong lencip thei mawnate vawkin, ih mai ah tai kidemna sungah thin khensatsa in tai tek tawng." 
Hebrews12:2 A kipatna pan a tawp dong upna a piangsak pa, a kicingsakpa Jesus mitsuan tawng. Ama sia thinglamtee hangin thinkiam ngawl hi! Ama a ngak nginge lungdamna hangin, thinglamtee tungah maizum thina sia pha maw sa ngawl zaw a, tu in Pathian tokhum ziatsang ah to hi." 
Hebrews12:3 Ama thuakna teng ngaisun vun; bangza in mawneite ii a nasia tatak etsatna thuak ziam! Tua ahikom note zongh thinkiam heak vun, hanciam vun." 
Hebrews12:4 Banghang ziam cile mawna taw na kidona sungah thalup thuak tu dongin, na nalh tu uh kul ngawl lai buang hi." 
Hebrews12:5 Pathian in a tate na hina uh taw hanthotna kam hong paute mangil zo nu ziam? “Ka tapa awng, Topa ii hong hil ciangin, a pha takin ngai in, hong teih ciangin thinkiam heak vun." 
Hebrews12:6 Banghang ziam cile Topa in a itte theampo hil a, a ta bangin a saante theampo daan pia hi,” ci hi." 
Hebrews12:7 Pa ii daan hong piak bang na thuak po vun; tua na thuakna in Pathian ii a tate bangin hong tuat a hina kiciansak hi. A pa ii daan a piak ngeingawl tapa a om ngei ziam? 
Hebrews12:8 A tate theampo a piak bangin daan hong pia ngei bua ahile, ta tatak hi ngawlin, lamlak ta na hi uh hunlam kilangh hi." 
Hebrews12:9 Ih leitung pate tungtaang ahile amate in daan hong pia a, eite zongh in zatakna ih pia hi. Tua ahile thaa lamsang ih Pa tungah bangza in ki aap zaw tu a, nungta zaw tu hi ziam!" 
Hebrews12:10 Ih leitung pate in pha a sak uh ciaciang, tawmvei sung daan hong pia hi; ahihang Pathian in, ahile, ama thianthona ih siim thei natu in eima phattuam natu a vawt ahi hi." 
Hebrews12:11 Eite daan hong kipiak ciangin, tua hun laitak ih lungdam natu hi ngawlin, ih hee natu hong pia hile kilawm hi. Ahihang nungsang ciangin, tuabang kitekna a thuakte in thumaan thutang nuntakna ii thinnopna thaman nga uh hi." 
Hebrews12:12 Tua ahikom na khut uh a kha le laamto vun a, a huang vadil na khupte uh hatsak vun." 
Hebrews12:13 Na peang a bai na sang a dam zawk natu le a kizak thei kik natu in, lamzin tang zui tawntung tavun." 
Hebrews12:14 Mihing theampo taw na kilem tu hanciam vun a, a thiangtho nuntakna taw nuntak tu hanciam tavun, banghang ziam cile kuama in tua ngawl taw Topa a mu buatu hi." 
Hebrews12:15 Pathian ii thuthiamna pan na heak kik ngawl natu kikeam tavun. A khaa thingkung khangto a, lalna tam mama a piangsak nguu a nei thingkung bang na hi heak vun." 
Hebrews12:16 Esau bangin paktatna ahibuale thaa lamsang zawngkhalna kuama in na nei heak vun, ama in ta uzaw ii a nga tu hamphatnate theampo anneak khat taw zuak hi." 
Hebrews12:17 Tua zawkciangin, na heak uh bangma, ama in a pa ii thupha saang nuam hi; ahihang ama kinolh hi, banghang ziam cile ama in ama ii a sep sate a kheal kik natu lampi sia thitui taak liangin a zon hang zong a mu thei bua hi." 
Hebrews12:18 Note in Israel mite Sinai mual a zot uh bangin cii le sa ii phaw theinate ahi meikuang ahizong, khuazing le khuangial ahizong, vuipi suangval ahizong," 
Hebrews12:19 lemle aw le awnging khat ahizong, tuate kung nong zuan bua uh hi. Israel mihingte in tua awnging khat a zaak uh ciangin, kammal dang a zaak ngawl natu in, thuum uh hi." 
Hebrews12:20 Banghang ziam cile amate in, “Nganhing khat ngawngawn in tua mual a thutha le suangtum taw hua lup kul tu hi,” ci in thupiakna sia a thuak zo bua uh hi." 
Hebrews12:21 Tua a muna sia lauhuai leilam ahikom, Moses in “Lau in ka liing vadil hi!” ci hi." 
Hebrews12:22 Note Zion Mual le a nungta Pathian khuapi vantung Jerusalem, vantunglalang tul tam mamate omna ah nong pai zaw uh hi." 
Hebrews12:23 Note in vantung ah a min a kikhum Pathian taciilte lungdam takin a kikhopna ah nong pai uh hi. Note in mihing theampo thukhenpa Pathian kung le a kicialcingsak mihingphate ii thaa omna munah nong pai uh hi. 
Hebrews12:24 Thuciam thak a vawtpa Jesus kungah nong pai uh a, Abel chi ii sep sangin a phazaw pek nate hong kamciam, a kithe chi kungah nong zuan uh hi." 
Hebrews12:25 Tua ahikomin kidawm vun a, a sonpa sia ngai nuam ngawlin, nial heak vun. Pathian thu leitung ah a son pa nadon ngawl a, a nialte a suakta bua hi. Vantung pan hong sonpa na thusim buale bangbang suakta thei seseam tu hi ziam!" 
Hebrews12:26 Ama aw in tua hun laitakin, leitung liingsak ahihang tu in ama in, “Leitung bek hi ngawlin, vantung zongh khatvei ma ka liingsak lai tu hi,” ci hi." 
Hebrews12:27 Hi kammal “khatvei ma” ci sia in bitphua sa nate ngawk zazaanin, khiin tu a, a kingawksak thei ngawl teng bek taang lai tu a hina thiang takin lak hi." 
Hebrews12:28 Tua ahiciang, lungdam tek tawng, banghang ziam cile eite in, a kingawk thei ngawl ngam ih nga hi. Ama lungkim tu bangin, eite in thasiana le kiitakna taw Pathian tungah lungdamko in, ama bia tek tawng;" 
Hebrews12:29 banghang ziam cile ih Pathian sia a haltum thei meikuang tatak ahi hi. 
Hebrews13:1 Tapidaw mi unau khat bangin khat le khat ki it tawntung vun. 
Hebrews13:2 Na inn ah leangnate zin na do tu mangil heak vun. Tuabang a ngamta pawlkhat in vantunglalangte zin dawdo ahi hunlam a he bua uh hi. 
Hebrews13:3 Thongsung a omte na phawk tavun a, noma zongh amate taw thongtaak khawm bangin kingaisun tavun. Ngim a thuakte na phawk tavun a, noma zongh amate taw ngim a thuak khawm bangin na kingaisun tavun." 
Hebrews13:4 Nupa kiteenna sia a kuama theampo in zatak vawt tahen a, pasalte le zite sia khat le khat tungah kithumaan hamtang tahen. Pathian in a paktatte le a kipalngulte tungah thukhen tu hi." 
Hebrews13:5 Na nuntakna uh sia sum le vanh manpha deina taw na kipealsak vun a, tuaciangin na nei uh sia taw na lungkim vun. Banghang ziam cile Pathian in, “Bangma hunin kong taisan ngei buatu a, kong nusia ngei buatu hi,” ci hi." 
Hebrews13:6 Tua ahikom hangsan takin, hi bangin ci tawng, “Topa sia kei hong hu pa hi a, ka pa tau buatu hi. Akua in kei bang hong law thei tu ziam?”" 
Hebrews13:7 No tungah Pathian thu hong son na lampui masate phawk vun. Amate bangbangin nungta a, bangbangin thi ziam ci in ngaisunin, amate upna bang na ettee tavun." 
Hebrews13:8 Jesus Christ sia zeini, tuni le a tawntungin a kibang ahi hi." 
Hebrews13:9 A lam dadang kihilna nam tuatuamte zui in, thumaan lampi pan pial heak vun. Neak le dawn vai thukhamte zuina taw hi ngawlin, Pathian ii thuthiamna pan, ih sungsang thahatna nga tu sia pha hi; neak le dawn lamsang thukham zuite tungah tua thukhamte in phattuamna pia ngawl hi." 
Hebrews13:10 Jew te ii biakna munah thiampi seamte in, ih biaknatau tungah a om sate a neak thei natu thu nga ngawl hi." 
Hebrews13:11 Jew te ii Thiampi Lianbelpa in ngannote ii chi sia Thiangthobel Mun ah mawphel biakpiak natu in tumpui hi; ahihang ngannote ii pum sia ngiaphual puasia ah hal hi. 
Hebrews13:12 Hi thu hu in, Jesus zongh mihingte mawna pan a chisan taw a thiansua natu in, khuapi puasang ah thi hi." 
Hebrews13:13 Tua ahikom, eite zongh ngiaphual puasang, ama kung zuanin a maizumnate thuak pui tawng." 
Hebrews13:14 Banghang ziam cile hi leitung ah a kip khuapi khat zongh ih nei bua hi; eite in hong piang pheang tu khuapi sia ih zon laitak ahi hi. 
Hebrews13:15 Tua ahikom, eite in Jesus tungtawnin ih kipum piak biakpiakna in Pathian pok tawntung tawng, Topa hi ci in a pualaakte ii kam taw a kipia biakpiakna in tuasia ahi hi." 
Hebrews13:16 Na pha sep tu le khat le khat kihu tu sia, na mangil heak vun, banghang ziam cile hite sia Pathian a lungkimsak ih kipumpiak biakpiakna ahi hi." 
Hebrews13:17 Na lampuite ii thupiakna na zui vun. Amate ii thu na ni vun. Amate in tawlnga ngawlin na thaa uh hong cinsak hi, banghang ziam cile amate in, Pathian tungah amate nasep huvau sazian a lak kul tu hi. Amate thu na ni uh le amate sia lungdam takin, naseam tu hi; tua hi buathong le, amate in heena taw naseam tu a, note atu in bangma phattuamna a om buatu hi." 
Hebrews13:18 Ko atu thu hong ngetsak tawntung tavun. Thin thiangtho nei ung, ci ngam khu hi, banghang ziam cile, a maan bekma seam tawntung nuam khu hi." 
Hebrews13:19 Note kungah hai ngawlin, Pathian ii kei hong paisak kik pal natu thu nong ngetsak thua lai tu uh nasia tak kong thum hi." 
Hebrews13:20 A nuntakna biakpiakna in a piak hu in Tuucing Lian ahi Topa Jesus sia Pathian in thina pan tho kiksak zo a, tuaciang a chisan hu in a tawntung thuciamna sia kikipsak zo hi. Kilemna Pathian in ama ii dei sia na vawt thei natu in na kisap uh vanh pha theampo hong pia tahen a, tuaciang ama diksak sia Jesus Christ tungtawnin ei sungah hong seam tahen. Christ tungah minthanna a tawntung a tawntungin om tahen! Amen." 
Hebrews13:21  
Hebrews13:22 Suapuite awng, hi kihanthotna kammalte pha takin na ngai vun ci in kong thum hi; banghang ziam cile hi laithak kong at sia sau leih ngawl hi." 
Hebrews13:23 Ih suapui Timothy sia thongsung panin kipusuaksak zo hi, ci sia kong zasak nuam hi. Hong theng pal nale, noma taw kimu tu in, kong tonpui tu hi." 
Hebrews13:24 Pathian mite theampo le na lampuite theampo tungah kong nuksetna kam na zasak vun. Italy pan suapuite in hong nukset hi. 
Hebrews13:25 Pathian ii thuthiamna sia note theampo taw om tahen. 
James1:1 Pathian le Topa Jesus Christ ii naseampa James in: leitung bup ah a kithethaang Pathian mite kong paupui hi. 
James1:2 Ka suapuite awng, ze etna namcin na thuak uh ciangin hampha in na kingaisun tavun," 
James1:3 banghang ziam cile, na upna in tuabang ze etnate na zaw zawkciang, thuak zawkna piang hi ci in na he uh hi." 
James1:4 Note sia a kicing, a cialcing, bangma a kitaangsamh ngawlte na hi natu in na thuak zawknate in note, puk ngawlin lam tawntung hong khosak tahen." 
James1:5 Ahihang note khat po in, ciimna na nei buale, a pia tu pa Pathian tungah thu ngen tahen; banghang ziam cile Pathian in ngo tatak le thuthiam takin, a kuama theampo tungah pia hi." 
James1:6 Ahihang thu na nget uh ciangin, na up tu kul a, up laakna na nei ngawl het tu uh kisamh hi. Up laakna a nei khat pawpo sia, tuipi tungah vui ii seam kawkoai tuihual taw kibang hi." 
James1:7 Tuabang mihing khat, a sepna theampo ah a thin a khensat thei ngawl khat sia in, Topa tung pan bangma nga tu in ngaisun heak hen." 
James1:8  
James1:9 A zawng Tapidawte a zawnna pan Pathian in a lapto ciangin a lungdam tu uh a," 
James1:10 tuaciangin a hau Tapidawte sia Pathian in a khiasuk le a lungdam tu uh ahi hi. Banghang ziam cile a hau khat sia ngam lopa paak bangin bo tu hi. 
James1:11 Ni hong suak a, nisa in a kung hal a; a paak pulin a hoina teng siacipsak hi. Tuasia bangma in mihaupa sia a nasepna ah, a sep laitakin kisusia tu hi." 
James1:12 Ze etna haksa a thuak zote in a lungdam mihing ahi hi, banghang ziam cile tuabang hong sit nate a zaw ciangin, Pathian a itte tungah a kamciamsa nuntakna sia tel in saang tu hi." 
James1:13 Mihing khat sia tuabang haksatnate taw ze etna a thuak le, “Hi ze etna sia, Pathian kung panin hong pai hi,” ci heak hen. Banghang ziam cile Pathian sia siatna in ze et zo ngawl hi, tuaciang ama mama in kuama a ze et bua hi." 
James1:14 Ahihang mihingte sia, amate ii a pha ngawl deinate in kai a, a awk ciang, ze etna thuak ahi hi." 
James1:15 Tuasia ciangin amate ii deina pha ngawlte a sung uh ah paai in mawna piangsak hi; tuaciang, mawna hong khanthin tak ciangin thina piangsak hi." 
James1:16 Ka it suapuite awng, theamna um heak vun!" 
James1:17 A pha tel le ziakte le a cingtaak letsong theampo vantung panin hong pai hi; tua teng sia vantung khuavakte a bitphua, kikheal ngeingawl a, kihei in khua a zingsak ngawl Pathian kung pan hong paisuk hi." 
James1:18 Ama ii piansaknate theampo sung pan a thupibel ih sua thei natu in, thumaan kammal tungtawnin, ama ii deina om babangin eite hong piangsak hi." 
James1:19 Ka it suapuite awng, hi thu ciamtee tavun! Mihing khat simin thu ngaina thu zaakna ah manlang tu a, ahizong pau papaih ngawl tu a thin uuk papaih ngawl tu kul hi." 
James1:20 Mihingte thin uukna in, Pathian ii thutang tupna taangtung ngawlsak hi." 
James1:21 Tua ahikom a kiihuai zongsang nate le seksolnate theampo vawk siat vun. Pathian tungah ki aap vun a, na thinsung ah hong khum a kammal na saang vun, tua in note hong ngum thei hi." 
James1:22 Ama ii kammal ngaina bek taw noma le noma kitheam heak vun a; ngamtatna taw zui paih zaw vun. 
James1:23 A kuama po kammal ngai a, a zui ngawlte sia limlangh sung ki en a, ama le ama a pian babangin a kimu mihing khat taw kibang hi." 
James1:24 Ama le ama pha tak a ki et zawkciangin pusuak a, ama meal bangbang hi ziam cisia mangil paih hi." 
James1:25 Ahihang mihingte a suaktasak a kicing thukham sia pha takin a et zawkciang thupi ngaisut tawntung a, a zaak sia a mangil kik paih sia hi ngawlin, a zui — a nuntak puite peuma sia Pathian in a sepna ah thupha pia tu hi." 
James1:26 Khat po in ama sia biakna kin mihing khat hi ing ci in a kingaisun ziam? Ama in a leei a uk zo buale ama ii a biakna sia a luithawthong suak a, ama le ama kitheam ahi hi." 
James1:27 Pa Pathian ii a thiangtho le biakna tatak hi ci in, a ngaisut sia hi teng hi: tangate le meingongte ii thuakna sung pan khoi natu le leitung siatna panin eima le eima kikep natu ahi hi." 
James2:1 Ka suapuite awng, a minthang Topa, ih Topa Jesus Christ thu umte na hi uh bangma in, a puasang omzia etna taw kuama doidan ngei heak vun." 
James2:2 Sonteena in, mihau khat sia khamh khutzungbu bun a, puan pha silhin, kikhopna munah hong pai hen a, tuaciangin mihing khat sia puansia ngapkaai silhin, kikhopna munah hong pai hi." 
James2:3 Puan pha taw a kizeampa zatak piak zawkna taw, “Hi sung tona phabel tungah to in,” ci a, ahihang mizawngpa munah “Nang zia lai ah ding in, tua ahibuale ka peang kung suat tungah to in,” ci le uhte" 
James2:4 tuasia ciangin noma pawlsung mama ah, kidoidanna a piangsak, a sia tupna bulphu in thukhenna taw a maw na hi uh hi." 
James2:5 Hong ngai tavun, ka it suapuite awng! Pathian in hi leitung ah mizawngte sia, upna sungah a hau tu le ama a itte atu kamciam a piak kumpi ngam a lua tu in teal zo hi." 
James2:6 Ahihang note in mizawngte sia na thusim bua uh hi! A kuate in no hong zothaw a, thukhenmangte mai hong then ahi ziam? Mihaute hi!" 
James2:7 No hong kipiasa tua minphatna a sonsiate sia amate ahi hi. 
James2:8 Laithiangtho sungah a kimu Kumpi ngam ii thukham na zui uh le, a maan in na a seam na hi tu uh hi. Tua thukham in, “Noma le noma na ki it uh bangma in, na innpaam pa na it vun,” ci hi." 
James2:9 Ahihang mihingte tungah a puasang omzia muna taw na en uh le, mawna vawt na hi uh a, tuaciang thukham in nang sia thukham paltan pa bangin hong mawsak hi." 
James2:10 A kuama po thupiak khat a paltan pa in, thukham a vekpi in paltan ahi hi." 
James2:11 Banghang ziam cile “Palngul mawna vawt heak vun,” a ci pa mama in “Mihing that heak vun,” zongh ci si hi. Palngul mawna na vawt bua hial uh zong mihing na that uh le, thukham paltan na suak uh hi." 
James2:12 Eite hong suatak thukham sia taw thu a kikhen tu mihingte bangin pau in, ngamta vun." 
James2:13 Banghang ziam cile hesuakna a nei ngawl mihing khat tungah thu a khen ciangin, Pathian in hesuakna a lak buatu hi; ahihang hesuakna in thukhenna zo hi." 
James2:14 Ka suapuite awng, khat po in upna ka nei ci napi in, a ngamtatnate taw a lak buale, bang phatuam ziam? Tua upna in, ama ngum thei tu ziam?" 
James2:15 Sonteena in u le nau sungah, puansilh kisamhte le, anneak tu kicingin nei ngawl om hi ci tawng." 
James2:16 Amate tungah, “Pathian in thupha hong pia tahen! Na khua lum in, na ngilva tahen!” na ci uh hang, nuntak natu a kisamh nate na pia bua uh le na pauna in bang phattuamna om ziam?" 
James2:17 Upna ih ci zongh ta bangma hi: ngamtatnate a om ngawl upna in ama nguak ahikom a thi ahi hi. 
James2:18 Ahizong khat po in, hi bangin ci thei tu hi, “Mihing khat in upna nei a, a dangkhat in ngamtatnate nei hi,” ci hi. Keima zo kikna in hi bang ahi hi. “Bangbangin mihing khat po in, ngamtatna om ngawl upna nei thei tu ziam? Ka upna sia ka ngamtatnate taw hong lak tu khi hi,” ka ci tu hi." 
James2:19 Pathian khat bek om hi, ci in na um uh ziam? Pha hi! Doaite zongh in um a — kiitakna taw liing hi." 
James2:20 Mihing mawmawte awng! ngamtatna om ngawl upna in, kimanna nei ngawl hi, ci thu a kilak tu na dei uh ziam?" 
James2:21 Ih taanghpupi ahi Abraham sia bangbangin Pathian mai ah thutang a na suak ziam? Ngamtatnate pan hi, biaknatau tungah a tapa Isaac a piak ciang tua ngamtatna tungtawnin thutang a na suak hi." 
James2:22 Hi thu mu thei ngawl nu ziam? A upna le a ngamtatna sia kithua khawm a; a upna sia a ngamtatnate tungtawnin khuangkhim hi. 
James2:23 Tuaciang laithiangtho in hi bang a ci ciangin, thumaan son ahi hi, “Abraham in, Pathian um a, tuaciang a upna hang komin, Pathian in ama sia thutang in saang hi.” Tua hi a, Abraham sia Pathian ii lawm hi kici hi." 
James2:24 Tua hi a, en vun, mihing khat sia ngamtatnate taw Pathian mai ah thutang suak a, a upna bek pan hi ngawl hi." 
James2:25 Numei pumpi zuak Rahab zongh tuabang ma hi. Ama in Pathian mai a thutang a sua sia a ngamtatna pan hi, Israel thudawpkute huna pia in lampi dang khat panin, a suataksak ngamtatna pan ahi hi." 
James2:26 Tua ahikom thaa om ngawl pumpi sia a thi ahi bangma in, ngamtatna om ngawl upna sia zongh a thi hi." 
James3:1 Ka suapuite awng, note sya seam nuam tam na om heak vun. Na heak uh bangma in ngualdang sangin ko syate tungah nasia zaw in thu hong kikhen tu hi." 
James3:2 Ih vekpi in, sep khial ih nei bul hi. Ahihang mihing khat in, pau khialna a nei ngei buale ama sia a cialcing hi a, a pumpi bup zongh, a uk thei mi ahi hi." 
James3:3 Siphu in ih thu hong nit thei natu in, a kam sungah kamkhau ih koi a, ih uukna pawpo ah ih paisak thei hi." 
James3:4 Tua ahibuale teambaw khat ngaisun vun: tuaza in lian a, a thahat vui ii a seamna taw kihawl hikale, a heakna no mama khat taw kiheak zo hi, tuaciangin teambaw hawlpa ii paisak nopna pawpo ah pai hi." 
James3:5 Leei zongh tuabang ma ahi hi: tuasia in no ahihang, na liante huvau ah kisuangtaak thei hi. Meikuang no khat taw, duipui khat a kihal theina thu ngaisun vun!" 
James3:6 Tuaciang leei sia meikuang taw kibang hi. Ama sia khialna omna leitung hi a, ih pumpi sungah mun la in hong om a, ih pumpi bup tungtawnin thusia kizelsak hi. Hell pan a hong pai meikuang taw in nuntak sung tawntung hong hal hi." 
James3:7 Mihing in a nungta dang theampo — duisung nganhingte, vacimte, awmtaalin a vakte le, ngasate zualsak thei zo hi." 
James3:8 Ahihang kuama in leei sia a zualsak zo ngei bua hi. Leei sia, sia a, uk thei hi ngawlin, thi theina nguu taw kidim hi." 
James3:9 Leei sia ih Topa le Pa tungah lungdamkona in ih zangh a, Pathian taw a kisunin a kivawt ih mipuite haamsiatna in ih zangh si hi." 
James3:10 Lungdamkona le haamsiatna kammalte sia kamhawng khat sung panin pusuak khawm hi. Ka suapuite awng, tubang hi tu kilawm ngawl hi!" 
James3:11 Tuilim le tuikhaa sia ciktui naak khat sung pan pusuak khawm ngawl hi. 
James3:12 Ka suapuite awng, theikung khat in olive ngate nga thei ngawl hi; sapitkung khat in thei ngate nga thei ngawl hi; sii tuinaak in tuilim piangsak thei ngawl hi." 
James3:13 Note sungah a ciim thutel thei na om uh ziam? Amate in tuasia a nuntakna pha taw ahizong, kiniamkhiakna le ciimna taw a pha sepnate taw ahizong lak tahen." 
James3:14 Ahihang na thinsung ah eenna, thin natna le duhopnate a om le, na ciimna na kiphatsakpuina taw thumaan thutak sia langpanin mawna vawt heak in." 
James3:15 Tuabang ciimna sia vantung panin hong paisuk hi ngawl hi; tua in leitung neisa hi a, thaa vai hi ngawlin, doai vai ahi hi." 
James3:16 Ki eenna le duhopna omna munah buaina le siatna namcin zongh om hi. 
James3:17 Ahihang tungsang pan ciimna sia a masabel in thiangtho hi; tua in kilemna, cikna, lemzawngna zongh ahi hi. Tua in kihesuakna taw kidim a, a pha sepnate piangsak hi; tua in, kidoidanna nei ngawlin, kihithepsakna nei ngawl hi." 
James3:18 Phatna in kilemna piangsakte ii a tu thaicii panin a piang thaw an ahi hi. 
James4:1 Note sungah kihauna le kidona teng sia koisung pan hong pai ziam? Na sungah a kido tawntung leitung nopna na deina uhte pan hong pai ahi hi. 
James4:2 Nate dei a, na nga thei ngawl uh ciangin, ngual thatlum tu in na kingingta uh hi; nate nasia takin na dei uh a, ahizong na nga zo bua uh hi, tuasia ciangin na kihau uh a, na kido uh hi. Na dei uhte na nga ngawl uh sia, banghang ziam cile Pathian munah na ngen bua uh hi." 
James4:3 Tuaciangin na nget uh ciang, na nga bua uh hi, banghang ziam cile na niimnate pha ngawl hi; noma nopsak natu sung bek ah na zak tu uh nate na ngen uh hi." 
James4:4 Thumaan ngawl mihingte awng! Leitung ii ngualtamh ih hi le Pathian ii ngal ih hi hunlam he ngawl nu ziam? A kuama po leitung ngualtamh a suak nuam sia Pathian ii ngal suak nuam ahi hi. 
James4:5 Laithiangtho sungah, “Pathian ii ih sungah hong koisak thaa sia a nasia mama lungngulnate taw kidim hi,” a ci sia thumaan ngawlin ngaisun heak vun." 
James4:6 Ahihang Pathian hong piak thuthiamna sia khohzaw kan lai hi. Laithiangtho in “Pathian in a kiphasakte nalh a, ahihang a kiniamkhiakte thuthiamna pia hi,” a ci bangma hi." 
James4:7 Tua ahikom Pathian tungah ki aap vun. Doaimangpa nalh vun, tua hile note kung pan tai tu hi." 
James4:8 Pathian kungah hong neak tavun, tua hile Pathian in note hong neak tu hi. Na khut uh sil vun, no mawneite awng! Na thinsung uh thiansua vun, no a kihitheamsakte awng!" 
James4:9 Heena, kaana, tauna taw om vun; na nuina uh sia kaana taw laih tavun a, na lungdamna uh sia, maikhinna taw laih tavun!" 
James4:10 Topa mai ah noma le noma kiniamkhiak tavun, tua hile ama in hong laamto tu hi." 
James4:11 Ka suapuite awng, khat le khat na kisonsia heak vun. Tapidaw suapui khat a sonsia ahibuale a tung a thu a khen sia in, Thukham sonsia a thukhen ahi hi. Thukham tungah thu na khen le, Thukham a zui nawn ngawl, Thukham tungah thukhenpa na hi uh hi." 
James4:12 Pathian bekma thukham pia Pa le thukhenpa ahi hi. Ama bek in, ngum thei a, susia thei hi. Na mipuite tungah thukhen tu in nang sia akua kisa ni ziam?" 
James4:13 “Tuni ahibuale zing ciangin, khua khat ah khual va haw tong i, tualai ah kum khat bang taamin, sum meet vawt in, sum tam mama thalaw tong,” a cite awng hong ngai tavun." 
James4:14 Na nuntakna sia zing ciangin bangbang hi tu ci ngawngawn na he bua uh hi! Note in tawmvei hong kilangh zok a, a bo kik meikhu lomno khat taw na kibang uh hi." 
James4:15 Na pau tu uh sia hi bang hizaw tu hi: “Topa deina a om le ih nungta tu a, hisia ahibuale ziasia ih vawt tu hi.”" 
James4:16 Ahihang no, tu in kiphasak a, kisuangtaak nu hi; tuabang kisuantaakna theampo sia maan ngawl hi." 
James4:17 Tua ahikom a pha tu he napi a pha a vawt ngawl sia in mihing mawnei ahi hi. 
James5:1 Tu in, no sumhaute awng, hong ngai tavun! No tungah hong tung tu ngimna haksatnate huvau kapin mau vun!" 
James5:2 Na hauna uh teng sia muat zo a, na puansilh teng sia nget in ne zo hi." 
James5:3 Na khamhte le na ngunnte sia eakseau zo hi. Tuaciang hi a eakseaute in, no langkhat panin tetti hong hi tu a, meikuang taw kibangin, na sa uh hong ne khawng tu hi. Hi ni tawpkhak hun sungah, note in haunate na khol zo uh hi." 
James5:4 Na lo sungah naseam mihingte ii thaman na pia bua uh hi. Amate ii phunnate ngai vun! Na an uh hong laksakte ii auna sia Topa Vaanglianbel Pathian bil sungah theng zo hi. 
James5:5 Hi leitung ah na nuntakna uh sia a liap a vaal nate le nopsakna taw kidim hi. Hong kingaw lup ni ciang na thau natu in noma le noma na kivaak zo uh hi. 
James5:6 Mawna nei ngawl mihingte mawsak in, na thatlum zo uh hi, tuaciang amate in no hong nalh ngawl uh hi." 
James5:7 Tua ahikom, ka suapuite awng, Topa hong pai mateng in, na thin uh sausak vun. Lothopa khat in, leitang tung pan an manpha hong pian natu sia, bangza in thinsauna taw ngak ziam en vun. Amate in khuapi ngua le tuk ngua sia thinsau takin ngak hi." 
James5:8 No zongh na thin uh a sau kul hi. Na lametna uh saangsak vun, banghang ziam cile Topa ii hong pai tu ni hong nai zo hi." 
James5:9 Ka suapuite awng, note khat le khat tungah lungkim ngawlna taw na kiphunsan heak vun, tua hile Pathian in no tungah thu hong khen ngawl tu hi. Thukhenpa sia hong nai zo a, hong kilangh tu in kithoai zo hi." 
James5:10 Ka suapuite awng, Topa min suangin a pau kamsaangte phawk vun. Thuakna sungah thinsau takin a thuak zo amate ii thuak zawk hatna sia ettee in nei tavun." 
James5:11 Amate sia mihing lungdamte hi ih ci hi, banghang ziam cile amate in thuak zo uh hi. Job ii thin sauna te na za zo uh a, a tawpna ah Topa ii piakkikna thu na he zo uh hi. Banghang ziam cile, Topa sia hesuakna le ciliapna taw kidim hi." 
James5:12 A thupibelin ci leang suapuite awng, kamciam na vawt uh ciangin tomlo in kiciam heak vun. Vantung taw ahizong leitung taw ahizong, nadang khat pawpo taw ahizong tomlo in kiciam heak vun. Hi na sak uh ciang, “Hi hi” bekma ci vun, ahi ngawlna ah, “Hi bo” ci lel vun, tua hile Pathian ii thukhenna na thuak buatu uh hi." 
James5:13 A ngim nga khat po no sungah na om uh ziam? Thungen tahen. A lungdam khat po na om uh ziam? Ama in pokna late sa tahen. 
James5:14 A cina khat po na om uh ziam? Pawlpi upate sam hen a, amate in thungetsakin, olive thau taw Topa min suangin zut tahen." 
James5:15 Hi upna taw thungetna in ciina damsak tu hi. Topa in ciidamna pia kik tu a, tuaciang mawna a vawtte kimaisak tu hi." 
James5:16 Tua ahikom, na mawna uh sia khat le khat tungah kipualaak vun a, khat le khat thu na kingetsak vun, tua hile hong damsak tu hi. Mipha thumaan thutang khat ii thungetna in vaang nei hi." 
James5:17 Elijah zong eima bangma mihing khat ahi hi. Ama in ngua a zuk ngawl natu in, nasia takin thungen a, kum thum le kum lang nguatui hang hi." 
James5:18 Nguazuk kik natu thungen kik leleau a, van in nguatui hong buaksuk a, lei in an piangsak hi." 
James5:19 Ka suapuite awng, note sung panin, khat po in, thumaan thutak panin, lampial a, a dang khat in hong ciapui kik le," 
James5:20 hi thu phawk tavun: a kuama po mihing a maw khat sia ama ngamtat khialna pan hong khealsak ahile, tua pa in mawneipa ii thaa a thi natu panin hun tu a, mawna tam mamate kimaisakna piangsak tu hi." 
1Peter1:1 Jesus Christ ii sawltak Peter in — Pontus, Galatia, Cappadocia, Asia le Bithynia ngamte ah ngaltai a, a kithethaang Pathian tealsa mite tungah lai kong thaak hi." 
1Peter1:2 No sia Pa Pathian tupna taw hong tealsa hi a, Jesus Christ thu a ni tu le a chisan taw a kithiansua tu in, ama Thaa taw a thiangtho minam a suak sate na hi uh hi. Thuthiamna le thinnopna note sungah hong dim tahen." 
1Peter1:3 Topa Jesus Christ ii Pa le Pathian tungah lungdamko tawng! Hong hesuakna lian ahikomin, Jesus Christ sia thina pan a thawsak kikna taw nuntakna thak eite hong pia hi. Hi sia in a nungta lametna taw hong dimh hi," 
1Peter1:4 tua ahikom a mite atu Pathian ii a koi, a thupha tam mamate a nei tu in ih kilamen hi. Ama in note atu in tua thuphate vantung ah keam a, tua munah muat thei ngawl, lal thei ngawl le vul thei ngawlin om hi." 
1Peter1:5 Tua teng sia noma atu ahi hi, hun tawpkhak ni ciang a kilaak khia tu a kinging sa in a om, ngupna sia upna tungtawnin a nga note atu in, Pathian vaang taw tuate hong kepcingsak hi." 
1Peter1:6 Na thuak uh haksatna namcin hu in tu laitak hun tawm vei no sung khuangaina na thuak uh kul hikale, hi thute ah lungdam vun." 
1Peter1:7 Tua haksatna thuaknate ii tupna in na upna uh a maanna a kilak natu ahi hi. A kisia thei khamh ngawngawn zongh meisa taw kisit lai hi; tua ahikom khamh sangin tam mama in a man nei zaw na upna uh zongh a kip thei natu in hong kisit tu hi. Tua hile Jesus Christ hong kilaak Ni tak ciangin pokna, minthanna le vaang piakna na saang tu uh hi." 
1Peter1:8 Ama mu ngeingawl na hi uh hang na it uh a, tu zongh in ama mu ngawl na hi uh hang na um uh hi. Tua ahikomin, kam taw a kison zo ngawl dongin lungdamna lianpi taw nasia takin na lawp uh hi," 
1Peter1:9 banghang ziam cile ama na upna uh hu in na upna uh ii tupna bulpi a hi thaa ngupna sia na saang uh hi. 
1Peter1:10 Kamsaangte ii pha tak a zon le a kat sia hi ngupna thu hi a, Pathian ii no tung hong piak tu hi letsong huvau amate in sonkhol zo hi." 
1Peter1:11 Amate in tua thu sia bang hun ciang tung tu a, bangbang hong pai tu ziam cisia, heak tu in hanciam uh hi. Tua hun sia Christ in ngim thuak tu a, tua zawkciang minthanna taw kizom tu hi ci in amate sung a, a om Christ Thaa ii a sonkholna taw a lak hun sia ahi hi." 
1Peter1:12 Vantung panin Thaa Thiangtho ii vang taw a sawl, Lungdamna Thupha a thangsak, thupuakte tung pan tu in na zaak uh thute Pathian in hi kamsaangte tungah a pualaakna ah cileang, amate nasep sia in amate phattuam na tu in a seam hi ngawl a, noma atu in a seam hizaw hi. Hi thute sia vantunglalangte dong ii a tel nop uh thu ahi hi." 
1Peter1:13 Tua ahikom a diang tu in, na thin sung uh ah kingin khol tavun. Jesus Christ hong kilangh ciangin, note hong piak tu thupha tungah lametna a cingin nei tavun, na kipilvangsak vun." 
1Peter1:14 Pathian thu ni vun, tuaciang bangma na heak ma na nei uh, deinate in na nuntakna uh uksak heak vun." 
1Peter1:15 Tua hi ngawl zaw in, na sep na vawt theampo sungah note hong sam Pathian a thiantho bangma in thiangtho vun." 
1Peter1:16 Laithiangtho in, “Kei thiangtho ka hikom na thiangtho vun,” ci hi." 
1Peter1:17 Mihing khat sim ii a sepna bangin a kibang thukhenna taw mihing theampo thu a khen Pathian tungah thu na nget uh ciang, Pa awng, na ci uh hi; tua ahiciang hi leitung ah nungta in na om uh laiteng ama thasia tavun." 
1Peter1:18 Banghang ziam cile na taanghpupite pan na luasuk uh, a mannung ngawl nuntakzia pan na suatak natu in, note bang taw hong tan ci thu na he uh hi. Ngunn le khamh bangin a kisia thei thilte taw hong kilei hi ngawl hi;" 
1Peter1:19 a sitbaang ngawl, ahibuale a mealhem ngawl tuuno, Christ ii a manpha a kipumpiakna taw hong tan a hina he tavun." 
1Peter1:20 Ama sia simlei a kibitphua ma in, Pathian teal kholsa hi a, hi ni tawpkhak nite sungah no atu hong kilaak ahi hi." 
1Peter1:21 Ama thina pan a thosak, minthanna a pia Pathian sia ama tungtawnin na um uh hi; tuaciang note upna le lametna sia Pathian tungah kibul hi." 
1Peter1:22 Tu in thumaan thutak na zui uh hu in, noma le noma na kithiansua zo uh a, na thu uppui mihingte it zo takpi tu na hi uhkom na thin theampo uh taw khat le khat nasia takin ki it tavun." 
1Peter1:23 Banghang ziam cile a nungta tawntung Pathian kammal tungtawnin, a thi maw a nungta tawntung nu le pa khat ii tate bangin, na piangthak zo uh hi." 
1Peter1:24 Laithiangtho in, “Mihing theampo sia lopa bang hi a, amate ii minthanna sia duisung paakte taw kibang hi. Tua lopa ko a, tua paakte pul hi." 
1Peter1:25 Ahihang Topa kammal sia a tawntungin kip hi,” ci hi. Hi kammal sia no tung a hong kithangsak tua Lungdamna Thupha ahi hi." 
1Peter2:1 Tua ahiciang siatna a minpiang vawk siat in; leilotna, kihitheamsakna, ki eenna, ahibuale kiselnona kam note sungah om nawn heak hen." 
1Peter2:2 Nausen suaktuungte bangin a thiangtho thaa noaitui tatak du tawntung tavun, tuabang a na neakna taw in na khangto tu uh a, ngupna na nga tu uh hi." 
1Peter2:3 Laithiangtho in, “Noma mama in, Topa sia bangza in dik ziam ci in na mu zo uh hi,” ci hi." 
1Peter2:4 Mihingte in mannung ngawl hi ci in nial hikale Pathian ii manpha a sak, a teal, a nungta suangpi ahi, Topa kungah pai tavun." 
1Peter2:5 Nuntakna a nei suangte bangin pai tavun a, thaa biakinn sak natu in a kizanghte hi tavun, tua munah Jesus Christ tungtawnin, Pathian tungah a saan thamman, thaa taw kisai sangaw biakpiakna a pia a thiangtho thiampite bangin na seam tu uh hi." 
1Peter2:6 Banghang ziam cile laithiangtho in, “A man nei suang khat ka teal a, Zion ah innkingh suang tu in ka phut hi, tuaciang ama a um peuma in, a thin a kiam ngei buatu uh hi,” ci hi." 
1Peter2:7 No a umte atu in hi suang sia man nei mama hi; ahihang a um ngawlte atu in: inn sate ii mannung a sak ngawl, a nial suang sia a vekpi sung pan a thupibel hong suak hi,” ci hi." 
1Peter2:8 Laithiangtho mundang khat ma ah, “Hi suang in mihingte lutusak tu a, amate a liiksak suangpi suak tu hi,” ci hi. Kammal a up ngawl manin amate lutu uh hi; tuasia in amate atu in Pathian ii deina ahi hi." 
1Peter2:9 Ahihang note sia a kiteal sa minam, Kumpi thiampite, a thiangtho minam, Pathian ii aituam mite, khuazing sung pan a lamdang ama ii khuavak sungah nang hong sam pa Pathian ii a lamdang ngamtatnate a thangsak tu a hong tealsate na hi uh hi." 
1Peter2:10 Hun khat lai in, note sia Pathian mite na hi bua uh hi, ahihang tu in ama mite na hi uh hi; hun khat lai in, Pathian ii hesuakna na he bua uh hi, ahihang tu in ama ii hesuakna na saang zo uh hi." 
1Peter2:11 Hi leitung ah khualmite le ngaltaite ahi no ka lawmte tungah hi bangin, kong thuum nuam hi! Na pumpi cii le sa deinate zawp heak vun, tuate in thaa taw kido tawntung uh hi." 
1Peter2:12 Pathian he ngawlte kawm ah na ngamtatna uh a phat mama hu in amate ii mihing tatsiate ci a hong zungkaw ciangin, na ngamtatna phate hong mu tu a, ama hong pai Ni ciangin, Pathian pok tu uh hi." 
1Peter2:13 Topa hangin mihing thunei peuma ii ukna nuai ah om tavun: a lianbel thunei ahi Kumpilianpa le," 
1Peter2:14 mihing tatsiate daan pia tu le, thupha a vawtte a pok tu in a koi, ngamkhen uk maangte khutnuai ah na om tavun." 
1Peter2:15 Banghang ziam cile a pha na vawt uhte taw, mihing mawmawte ii a mot paunate na thimsak tu uh Pathian in hong deisak hi." 
1Peter2:16 A suakta mite bangin nungta vun; ahizong ngitlo ngamtatnate seal natu in na suatakna uh zangh heak vun a, Pathian ii silate bangin nungta tavun." 
1Peter2:17 Mihing theampo zatak vawt vun, na thu uppuite it vun, Pathian thasiana nei vun a, Kumpilianpa zakta vun." 
1Peter2:18 No naseamte in a dik thukhual theite bek hi ngawlin, a thuthiam ngawl a thinngam na tote zongh zatakna a cingin pia vun, amate ukna nuai ah na om uh kul hi." 
1Peter2:19 Ama deina na phawna uh hu in, ngimthuak ngawl tu bul na thuak uh le, hite tungtaang ah, Pathian in thupha hong pia tu hi." 
1Peter2:20 Banghang ziam cile na khialna hangin velna na thuak le bang phattuamna om na ziam? Ahihang a maan na sep uh ciang ngawngawn in na thuak veve uh le, Pathian in tua hu in thupha hong pia tu hi." 
1Peter2:21 Pathian in no hong sapna sia hi thu hang ahi hi, banghang ziam cile Christ ama mama in, no atu in thuak a, ama khuani na zui thei natu in ettee tu hong nusiat hi." 
1Peter2:22 Ama in mawna vawt ngawl a, ama kam panin leilot thu pusuak hi ci in kuama in za ngeingawl hi." 
1Peter2:23 Ama a kilan ciangin selnona kam taw thuk ngawl hi; ngimna a thuak ciang kuama tawng ngawl a thutang thukhenpa Pathian tungah a lametna koi zaw hi. 
1Peter2:24 Eite, mawna sungah thi a, thutang suana sungah ih nuntak thei natu in, Christ ama mama in, thinglamtee tungah a pumpi taw ih mawnate hong puaksak zo hi. Ama liammate taw note hong damsak zo hi." 
1Peter2:25 Note sia lam amh tuute bang na hi uh hi, ahihang tu in na thaa uh hong Keampa le Tuucingpa zui tu in, hong kipui kik zo hi." 
1Peter3:1 Tuasia bangma in, no zite awng na pasalte khat po Pathian thu um ngawl a om le, na ngamtatna taw Pathian thu um khat na suasak thei natu in na pasalte thu na nit uh kul hi. Kam khat zongh na pau kul ngawl tu hi," 
1Peter3:2 banghang ziam cile amate in noma ngamtatna sia bangza thiangtho in thasiahuai ziam ci in hong mu tu uh hi. 
1Peter3:3 Na hoi natu sam vawtzia taw, suangmanphate taw, nikteen puansilh daan taw, tuabang tungtham kipuuanate taw, kizeam heak vun," 
1Peter3:4 tuate taangin na hoina sungah Pathian ii muna ah a man neibel ahi a tul thei ngawl, a dik cikna thiamna le thinsung pha na nei tu uh hi zaw hi." 
1Peter3:5 A bosa hun sung biakna sungah a takkha, Pathian tungah lametna a neite sia, a pasalte thu a nitna uh taw a mealhoi veu suak hi." 
1Peter3:6 Sarah zongh tuabang ma ahi hi; Abraham ii thu ni a, ama sia topa ci in sam hi. Na pha seamin bangma sep kiitak na nei buana uh le, tu in no sia Sarah ii tanute na hi uh hi." 
1Peter3:7 Tuasia bangma in no pasalte zongh, na zite uh thaneam zaw ahi hunlam telthiam in na nuntakpui tu uh kul hi. Amate zatak vawt tavun, banghang ziam cile, amate zongh noma taw kibangin, Pathian ii nuntakna letsong sia sang khawm tu uh hi. Tuabangin na ngamta uhle na thungetna uh bangma in hong nawngkaisak ngawl tu hi." 
1Peter3:8 A tawpna ah: note theampo in a kibang ngaisutna le khuaheakna nei tavun; tuaciang khat le khat unau bangin ki it vun. Khat le khat tungah dikin, kiniamkhiak tavun." 
1Peter3:9 Ngitlona sia ngitlona taw thuk kik heak vun a, haamsiatna zongh haamsiatna taw thuk kik heak vun; tua hi ngawl zaw in thupha taw kithuk zaw vun, banghang ziam cile, note Pathian hong sap lai in piak tu a hong kamciam sia thupha hi zaw hi." 
1Peter3:10 Laithiangtho in: “Nuntak nuamin a nungta nuamte le hunphate a mu nuamte in, kam sia pau heak hen a, leilot thuson kheal nanak tahen." 
1Peter3:11 Amate in siatna pan kikhealin phatna vawt nanak tahen; amate in kilem natu a thin theampo taw a hanciam kul hi. 
1Peter3:12 Banghang ziam cile, Topa in thutangte en a, a thungetna uh ngai hi; siatna a vawtte ahile ama in langpan hi,” ci hi." 
1Peter3:13 A pha vawt tu na lawp uh le, akua in hong nasak tu ziam?" 
1Peter3:14 Ahihang thumaan nasepna na sep uh ciang ngawngawnin na thuak uh le, bangza in lungdam tu nu ziam! Kuama kiita heak vun a, thinngim heak vun." 
1Peter3:15 Ahihang na thinsung ah Christ sia thasiana nei tavun. Topa a hina bangin ama vaang pia vun. Na sungah lametna na nei uh sia sonthiang tu in hong dongh khat pawpo na zo thei natu in a tawntung kinging tavun," 
1Peter3:16 ahihang tuabang na son uh ciang, cikna thiamna le kithasiana nei tavun. Na thinsung ah, kithasunna omsak heak vun, tua hile hong kiselno ciangin, Christ nungzuite na hina uh taw na ngamtat phate hong sonsiate sia, amate pauna taw a maizum tu uh hi." 
1Peter3:17 Banghang ziam cile Pathian ii deina ahi nale a pha sepna hu a thuakna in, a sia sepna hu a thuakna sangin phazaw hi." 
1Peter3:18 Banghang ziam cile Christ in mawna hu in a tawntung atu khatvei lian thi zo hi, note Pathian kungah hong zot pui natu in mipha khat sia mawneite taangin thi zo hi. Ama pumpi thi ahihang thaa sungah kinungtasak zo hi," 
1Peter3:19 tuaciang a thaa nuntakna taw ama pai in, thaa thongtaakte munah thuhil hi." 
1Peter3:20 Hi thaa te sia Noah ii teambaw a sak lai hun a, Pathian ii thin uai takin a ngak, Pathian thu a ni nuam ngawlte ii thaa te ahi hi. Teambaw sungah mihing tawmno — a vekpi in liat bek — tui in laamto in suaktasak hi," 
1Peter3:21 tua tui sia tu in note hong kingupna lim a lak, tui kiphumna ahi hi. Pumpi tung ciniinte silthiangna hi ngawlin, thinsung khentel theina pha taw Pathian tungah kamciam piakna ahi hi. Tua in Jesus Christ thawkikna tungtawn a note hong ngum hi," 
1Peter3:22 ama, vantung ah pai zo a, Pathian ii ziatsang ah om in, vantunglalangte, vantung thuneite le vaang neite theampo uk siat hi." 
1Peter4:1 Christ in a pumpi ngim thuak ahikom in, note zongh ama khua ngaisutna bangma nei in noma le noma na kithahatsak nanak vun; banghang ziam cile a kuama po pumpi taw a thuak sate sia, mawna sungah a tualta nawn bua hi." 
1Peter4:2 Tua ahikom tu pan kipanin, na leitung nuntakna uh a om laiteng, mihing ii deinate in uksak heak vun a, Pathian ii deina in uksak hamtang vun." 
1Peter4:3 A bosa hun sungah Pathian he ngawlte ii sep nop teng, a khomin seam zo nu hi. Na nuntakna uh sia, zummawk ngamtatna, sikvilna, zu khamna, uangtatna, zuneakna, a thasiathuai milim biaknate taw zangh zo nu hi." 
1Peter4:4 Tu in Pathian he ngawlte in amate sansak po maitat, loklenna sungah na kihel nop nawn ngawl uh ciang, lamdang sa in note hong selno uh hi." 
1Peter4:5 Ahihang a nungtate le a thisate tungah thukhen tu in a kingingta sa Pathian mai ah amate in thusitna thuak tu uh hi. 
1Peter4:6 Mihing khat sim tungah, thu kikhen ahi bangma in, amate pumpi nuntakna tungah thu a kikhen sa hi a, a thite zongh Lungdamna Thupha a kihilna sia, tua thu hang ahi hi; amate thaa nuntakna sungah Pathian nuntak bangin, a nuntak thei natu thu a kihil ahi hi." 
1Peter4:7 Na theampo a bo natu hun hong nai zo hi. Thu na nget thei natu in noma le noma ki uk thiamin, na pilvang tavun." 
1Peter4:8 Khat le khat thinsung takpi taw na ki it tu sia thupi ngaisutbel tavun, banghang ziam cile ki itna in mawna tam mama sincip hi." 
1Peter4:9 Phun ngawlin khat le khat zin kido thiam tavun. 
1Peter4:10 Mihing sim in Pathian letsong tuatuamte a zeak thiampa bangin, Pathian tung pan a tuam vilvel na saan uh letsongte sia ngualdangte phattuam natu in zangh hamtang vun." 
1Peter4:11 Thuhil pawpo in Pathian ii ngupna thute hil nanak tahen a; na theampo ah Jesus Christ tungtawnin Pathian tungah pokna a kipiak thei natu in, na a seam pawpo in Pathian piak thangui thatang taw seam nanak tahen, tua Pathian tungah minthanna le vaangletna a tawntung a tawntungin om tahen. Amen." 
1Peter4:12 Ka it lawmte awng, a haksa ze etna na thuak uh hu in, lamdang sa heak vun, a piang ngeingawl thute no tungah hong piang bangin ngaisun heak vun." 
1Peter4:13 Christ ii vaangletna hong kilangh ciangin, lungdamna a cingin na nga thei natu in, ama thuaknate thuakpui na hi uh komin, lungdam zaw tavun." 
1Peter4:14 Christ ii nungzui na hi uh hu in hong kizawngsak ahile, na lungdam tu uh hi; tua in a vaanglian Thaa ahi Pathian Thaa Thiangtho in no tungah a om hang ahi hi." 
1Peter4:15 Note sungah khat po in ngimna a thuak le zong, ama sia mihing a that, a nguta, khialna lian a vawt, tua ahibuale, midang a kamkup nop hu hi heak hen." 
1Peter4:16 Ahizong Tapidaw na hi uh hu in a thuak na hi uh le, maizum in nei heak vun, Christ minpu na hi uh hu in, Pathian tungah lungdamko tavun." 
1Peter4:17 Thukhen kipat tu hun hong tung zo a, Pathian aituam mihingte sia thu kikhen masa tu hi. Eite taw hong pan le Pathian kung pan hong pai Lungdamna Thupha a um ngawlte bang suak thong tu ziam?" 
1Peter4:18 Laithiangtho in: “Miphate a kingup tu haksa hi; tua ahile Pathian a sel mawneite bang suak tu ziam?” ci hi. 
1Peter4:19 Tua ahiciang Pathian ii deina a om hu in a thuakte ahile, a kamciam a peal ngeingawl, amate a Bitphuapa sungah, a ngamtat phatnate taw amate le amate kipummuan tahen." 
1Peter5:1 Pawlpi upa khat ahi keima in no pawlpi upate tungah kong thuum hi. Keima sia Christ thuakna ii tetti khat ka hi a, maisang hong kilangh tu minthanna a nga tu khat ka hi hi." 
1Peter5:2 Uuk ngawl pipina taw hi ngawlin Pathian hong deisak bangin, uukna takpi taw Pathian hong piak tuuhonte keam tavun ci in kong thuum hi. Na nasep uh sia thasum saan natu lel hi ngawlin, uukna takpi taw a seam hi tavun." 
1Peter5:3 Noma ii kep tu a hong ki aapte tungah zawthawkna taw uk tu hanciam ngawlin, tuuhon atu in a ettee pha na hizaw vun." 
1Peter5:4 Tuaciang Tuucing Pipa hong kilangh ciangin, a taanna a bo ngeingawl tu minthanna lukhu na saang tu uh hi." 
1Peter5:5 Tuasia bangma in no khangmoizawte zongh, khanghaamzawte thu na ni vun. Tuaciangin note theampo khat le khat, na na kisepsak thei natu in, kiniam khiakna awmdal sia puan bangin silh tavun; banghang ziam cile, laithiangtho in, “Pathian in a kiphasakte nalh a, a kiniamkhiakte tungah maipha pia hi,” ci hi." 
1Peter5:6 Pathian ii thahatna khutnuai ah kiniamkhiak vun, tua hile ama ii hunpha hong tun ciangin ama in hong laamto tu hi." 
1Peter5:7 Ama in note hong thinnuam maw ahikom, na thinngimna theampo ama aap vun." 
1Peter5:8 Pilvang vun a, encik vilvel vun! Na ngalpa Doaimangpa sia a valhlup tu khat po zong a, a hawk tawpi taw kibangin, na kiimkot ah hong vak kawkoai hi." 
1Peter5:9 Na upna sungah kip vun a, ama na nalh vun, banghang ziam cile, leitung theampo a om na thu uppuite zongh a kibang ngimnate thuak hi." 
1Peter5:10 Ahihang tawmvei na thuak zawk uh ciangin, Christ taw pumkhat hina taw, ama ii a bomaw minthanna nga tu a hong sam, thuthiamna theampo ii Pathian, ama mama in no hong cialcingsak tu a, kipsakna, thahatna le, bul khona hong pia tu hi." 
1Peter5:11 Ama tungah vaangletna om tawntung tahen! Amen. 
1Peter5:12 A thumaan Tapidaw suapui in ka ngaisut Silas ii hong huna taw, hi lai tomno kong at hi. Hi thu sia Pathian ii thuthiamna tatak hi ci in tetti pangin, kong hanthawn hi. Tua thu sungah kho takin ding vun." 
1Peter5:13 Pathian teal ahi, Babylon khua ah a om, na pawlpike ii hong paupui bangma in ka tapa Mark zongh in hong paupui hi." 
1Peter5:13 Pathian teal ahi, Babylon khua ah a om, na pawlpike ii hong paupui bangma in ka tapa Mark zongh in hong paupui hi." 
1Peter5:14 Tapidaw ki it kinapna taw khat le khat kimuak tavun. Christ neisa ahi note theampo tungah thinnopna hong om tahen. 
2Peter1:1 Jesus Christ ii sawltakpa le silapa Simon Peter in — Ih Pathian le Hunpa Jesus Christ thumaan thutang tungtawn a, kote ii upna za ma in a manpha upna, a neite tungah lai kong thaak hi:" 
2Peter1:2 Pathian le Jesus, ih Topa na heakna uh tungtawnin, thuthiamna le thinnopna kicing sia no aa hi tahen." 
2Peter1:3 Pathian ii a nei vaangletna in, ama ii minthanna le phatna nga tu a, hong sam pa ih heakna tungtawnin, Pathian thu sungah a maan nuntakna ih nei natu in, ih kitaangsap theampo ei tungah hong pia hi." 
2Peter1:4 Hi bangin hong kamciamsa ahi a lian mama le a manpha letsongte sia, leitung ah a om hong lalsak thei cii le sa deina pan suatakna na nga thei natu le ama pianzia na siim thei natu in hong piak ahi hi." 
2Peter1:5 Hi thu hang mama in, na hi thei tawpin phatna sia na upna tungah belap vun; na phatna tungah heakna belap vun;" 
2Peter1:6 na heakna tungah pumpi ki ukzawkna belap vun; pumpi ki ukzawkna tungah thuak zawkna belap vun; na thuak zawkna tungah Pathian bang hina belap vun; 
2Peter1:7 Pathian bang hina tungah u le nau ki itna belap vun; tuaciang u le nau ki itna tungah ngual it theina belap vun. 
2Peter1:8 Hi kicinnate sia na kitaangsap uh hi a, tuaciangin tuate tam mama na nei uh le, tua teng in no sia ih Topa Jesus Christ heakna sungah a diang zo tawntung le a muibunin hong nungtasak tu hi." 
2Peter1:9 Ahihang hi kicinnate a nei ngawl peuma sia, a khua muna toi ahikom, a mawna luite pan kithiansua zo ahi hunlam mu thei ngawlin mangil zo uh hi." 
2Peter1:10 Tua ahikom ka suapuite awng, Pathian hong sapna le hong tealna sia a kip a kho a sua natu in a nasia zaw kanin hanciam vun; tuabangin na hi uh le na upna na nusia ngei buatu uh hi." 
2Peter1:11 Hisia tungtawnin ih Topa le Hunpa Jesus Christ ii tawntung Kumpi ngam sungah tum thei natu thu a cingin no hong kipia tu hi. 
2Peter1:12 Hi thute sia na heaksa uh hi, na saansa thumaan thutak sungah kho takin a omsa na hita uh zong, kong phawksak kikik nuam hi." 
2Peter1:13 Hi thute na tepteena kong satsuasak tu sia, ka nuntak lai teng kei atu in a maan nasep hi ci in ka ngaisun hi." 
2Peter1:14 Ih Topa Jesus Christ ii a thiang tak a hong sonsa bangin, hi a thithei pumpi sia suut pal tu cisia ka kihe hi." 
2Peter1:15 Tua ahikom, ka thi zawkciang, hi thute a tawntungin na teptee thei natu lampi a kihon natu, ka hi thei tawpin ka seam tu hi." 
2Peter1:16 Ih Topa Jesus Christ ii vaangletna taw hong pai natu thu kong heaksak ciangin, phuatawm taanghthute ka sisanh bua uh hi. Ama ii letna sia ka mit uh taw ka mu sa uh ahi hi." 
2Peter1:17 A vaanglianbel Pa in, “Hisia ka it ka Tapa hi a, dik ka sak pa ahi hi!” ci a, Pa Pathian in patoaina le minthanna a piak laitak, tua munah ka om uh hi." 
2Peter1:18 Hi aw vantung panin hong pai lai in, kote mama mual thiangtho tungah, ama taw ka omkhawm uh a, ka za uh hi." 
2Peter1:19 Tua ahikom kamsaangte son thute tungtaang ah thinmuanna ka nei seseam uh hi. Tua thute na thupi ngaisut tu pha hi, banghang ziam cile, tua Ni khua hong vak a, nikonghong aksi na thinsung uh ah hong taan dong in, khuazingna munah tua thu sia meivak taang taw kibang hi." 
2Peter1:20 Ahizong, thildang a vaal lai, a thupibel in Laithiangtho sungah a om kamsaanna thu khat sia kuama in ama thu in, a khiakna son thei ngawl ahi hunlam ciamtee tavun." 
2Peter1:21 Banghang ziam cile kamsaanna thute sia mihing deina pan bek hong pai ngeingawl a, ahihang Pathian kung pan hong pai thute a son uh ciangin, mihingte sia Thaa Thiangtho ukna nuai ah a om ahi uh hi." 
2Peter2:1 A bosa hun in mihingte sungah kamsaang maan ngawlte piang hi, tuasia bangma in no sung zongh sya maan ngawlte hong piang tu hi. Amate in hong lalsak thei upna thubul maan ngawlte hong keng tu a, amate a tan Topa nial tu hi, tuasia ciang thakhat thu in, amate le amate kilalsua tu hi." 
2Peter2:2 Tua hi napi in, mihing tam mama in amate paktat nopna lampite zui tu uh hi; tuaciang amate ngamtatna hu in ngualdangte in, thumaan Lampi sia sonsia tu uh hi." 
2Peter2:3 Hi sya maan ngawlte sia duhop ahikom amate phuatawm taanghthute hong sonna taw no tung pan a meet hong vawt tu hi. Amate ii Thukhen pa sia a kingin zawk ngei zo a, amate a Lalsak pa khanglo zo hi!" 
2Peter2:4 Pathian in a maw a khial vantunglalangte khoaikhe ngawlin, hell sung denna in nei hi, amate tua mun khuazing sungah Thukhenna Ni ngak tu in koltaang hi." 
2Peter2:5 Taanghlai leitung mite sia Pathian in a khoaikhe bua hi, Pathian a sel mihingte ii leitung ah tuipi liimsak hi; a ngup mihingte sia thumaan thutang a hil Noah le a dang mihing sali teng bek hi." 
2Peter2:6 Pathian a selte tung a piang tu sia mu thei natu in, Sodom le Gomorrah khuapite sia meikuang taw Pathian in haltham hi." 
2Peter2:7 Ngeina pha zui ngawl a maitatte ii paktat ngamtatnate hu in a khuangai, mihing pha Lot bekma ama in suatak hi." 
2Peter2:8 Tua mihing pha Lot sia amate sungah teang a, ni khat zawkciang ni khat, amate ngamtat siatnate a mu a zaak ciangin, thinngimin na sa mama hi." 
2Peter2:9 Tua ahikom Topa in Pathian ii dei bang a nungtate, haksatnate pan bangbang suatak tu ci thu, mihing seksolte Thukhenna Ni ciang bangbang daan thuaksak tu ci sia le" 
2Peter2:10 a tuan in Pathian ii thuneina simmaw a, a kiihuai a pumpi deina a zuite daan piak tu ci sia he hi. Hi sya maan ngawlte sia hangsanin kisa thei hi, tuaciang minthanna a nei vantung mite a zakta bua uh a, selno zawlai uh hi." 
2Peter2:11 Hi a maan ngawl syate sangin a nasia zaw pekin a tha khozaw, a hatzaw vantunglalangte zongh in, amate sia Topa mai ah selnona taw mawsiat ngawl hi." 
2Peter2:12 Ahihang hi mihingte in, amate thinsung pan, a piangtawm thinpuakte taw ngamta uh a, mat tu le thalup tu a, a piang ngamsate taw kibang uh hi; amate heak zawk ngawl na theampo selno nate taw do uh hi. Amate sia ngamsate bangin kithat tu hi," 
2Peter2:13 tuaciang amate in mihingte ngim thuaksak ahikom, ngim thuakna taw ma in kithuk kik tu hi. Ci le sa deina a thaisak tu ngamtatna khat pawpo suntangin a vawtna sia, amate nopsakna hi; ngualtheam a nuntakziate nuamsa ahikom, ankuang na uumpui tu zongh maizumhuai a, mindai huai hi!" 
2Peter2:14 Amate in numei paktatte simngawl a dang en nuam ngawl hi; a maw nopna bo ngeingawl hi. Amate in a tha zawm mite sia thaang sung zotpui uh hi. A thinsung uh ah duhop natu a sin ahi uh hi. Amate sia Pathian haamsiatna nuai ah om uh hi! 
2Peter2:15 Amate in lampi tang nusia in, lam amh uh hi; amate in a maan ngawl sepna taw sum a nga nuam Beor tapa Balaam ii lampi zui uh a," 
2Peter2:16 tuaciang tua pa sia a mawna hu in teih thuak hi. Ama ii laa a khoai sia mihing aw taw pau in, kamsaangpa ii mawmawt ngamtatna khaam hi." 
2Peter2:17 Hi mihingte sia a kang sa cik taw kibang a, vuipi suangval ii a seamkeak meeikaaite bang ahi uh hi; Pathian in amate atu in, a zing belna mun khealsiasak hi." 
2Peter2:18 Amate in kiphatsakna le mawmawt kamte pau a, tuaciangin khialna sung pan a suakta tu a kipan tuungte zongh pumpi lungngul khialnate zanghin aitaa uh hi." 
2Peter2:19 Amate in tuabangte suatak natu kamciam pia ahihang, amate mama sia lalna zongsangna ii silate ahi uh hi — banghang ziam cile mihing khat sia ama a zocip na khat pawpo ii sila ahi hi." 
2Peter2:20 Mihingte in, leitung siatna thahatnate sung pan, ih Topa le ih Hunpa Jesus Christ heakna taw suakta zo hi napi, tuate ma in man kik a, zosak kik ahile, tuabang mihingte sia a kipat lai sangin a tawpna ah, a sia zaw mun theng hi." 
2Peter2:21 Amate tungah a kipia a thiangtho thupiakna pan a pial uh sangin, a heak uh thutang lampi sia he ngei phot buazaw le, amate atu phazaw lai tu hi." 
2Peter2:22 Paunak sungah, “Ui khat in a luak sa ne kik a, a kisilthiang sa vok khat buan sungah bual kik hi,” ci thu a maan hunlam sia amate tung thupiang sia in lak hi." 
2Peter3:1 Ka it lawmte awng, hi sia in no tung kong laithak a niina hi. Laithakte ngeal sungah na thinsung a om a thiangtho ngaisutnate a kiphawlo thei natu in, hi thute phawsak tu in kong hanciam hi." 
2Peter3:2 Taanghlai in a thiangtho kamsaangte sonnate le noma ii sawltakte tung pan na nga uh Topa le Hunpa thupiak sia na teptee tu ka dei hi. 
2Peter3:3 A masa phitin, hi hun khakbel sungah, a nuntakna uh pumpi deinate ii a uksak mihing pawlkhat hong pian tu sia na heak tu ka dei hi. Amate in hong nunau tu a," 
2Peter3:4 hi bangin, hong dongh tu uh hi. “Hong pai kik tu ci in kamciam hong pia ahi bua ziam? Ama koisung om ziam? Ih taanghpupite sia thi siat zo hi, ahihang simlei kibitphua lai pan bangma in, na theampo kibang lai hi!”" 
2Peter3:5 Khuangei mama lai in, Pathian in thupia a, vantungte le leitung kibitphua ahi sia amate in thusim ngawl kaltang uh hi. Leitung sia tui sung pan le tui taw in kipiangsak hi," 
2Peter3:6 tuaciangin tua leitung lui sia tui taw ma in tuipi liimna taw kilalsak hi. 
2Peter3:7 Ahihang tu in a om, vantungte le leitung sia meikuang taw a kilalsak natu in, tua a kibang Pathian thupiak sia ma in keamcingin om nginge hi. Pathian a sel mite thu kikhen natu le a kilalsak tu hun, a ni hong thet tu ngakin kikeam zii hi." 
2Peter3:8 Ahizong ka it lawmte awng na khat na mangil heak vun! Topa muna ah ni khat le kum tulkhat sia a kilamdanna om ngawl hi; ama atu in tuate nii sia kibang hi. 
2Peter3:9 Mihing pawlkhatte ngaisut bang hi ngawlin, a kamciamte a tunsak natu in, Topa haisaang ngawl hi. Ama, no tungah a thinsau hizaw hi, banghang ziam cile ama in, kuama lalcipsak nuam ngawl a, a mawna uh pan kisiiksak siat nuam hi." 
2Peter3:10 Ahihang Topa Ni sia nguta bangin hong pai tu hi. Tua Ni ciangin vantungte a nging mama khat taw hong bocip tu a, vantung a om nate kuangkeak in, leitung le a sung a om theampo zong bo cimit tu hi." 
2Peter3:11 Hite theampo tuabangin kilalcipsak tu ahile no sia bangbang mihingte na hi tu uh kisamh tu ziam? Na nuntakna uh sia thiangtho tu a, Pathian atu in a ki aaptuam nuntakna hi tu hi," 
2Peter3:12 vantungte kaanghtumin bocip a, vantung a om nate a sa in a tuithapsak siat tu ni — Pathian ii Ni ngakin, hong thet pal thei natu na sep thei tawpin seam in." 
2Peter3:13 Ahihang ko ka hi uh le, Pathian kamciam omsa sia ka ngak uh hi: thumaan thutang a om tawntung natu mun, vantung thakte le leitung thak ka ngak uh hi." 
2Peter3:14 Tuaciangin ka lawmte awng, tua Ni ngakin na om uh ciang Pathian mu na ah na thiantho natu, na sitbaang ngawl natu le ama taw na kilem natu in, ahithei za in hanciam tavun." 
2Peter3:15 Ih Topa thin sauna sia ngupna na nga natu in, hunpha hong piakna hi ci in ngaisun tavun. Tua in Pathian piak ciimna zanghin ih it suapui Paul ii hong laithak bangma ahi hi." 
2Peter3:16 A laithak theampo sungah tua thulu taw kisai in a at ciang a son thu in hi thu ahi hi. Ama laithakte sungah thu haksa pawlkhat om a, tuate sia heakna nei ngawlte le, kip takin a ding ngawlte in ahi ngawl lalam in son a, Laithiangtho hilna dangte zongh tuabangin son thei uh hi. Tuabangin amate le amate kilalsua uh hi." 
2Peter3:17 Ahihang no ka lawmte awng, hi thu na heaksa uh hi. A muanhuai na dinmun pan na puk ngawl natu le ngeina maan zui ngawl a maitatte ii khialnate taw hong lampui thaak ngawl natu in, kikeam tavun."

3John1:8 Tua ahikom ei Tapidawte in hi mihingte ii thumaan thutak a tu a sepna sungah a seppui ih hi thei natu in ih hu tu hi. 
3John1:9 Pawlpi tungah laithak tomno khat ka at hi; ahihang amate ih lampui a suak nuam Diotrephes in kei ii ci bang sia hong thupi sim bua hi.

3John1:10 Tua ahikom kong pai ciangin ama ngamtatna theampo: ko thu a cizathuai a hong sonte le a leilotna teng ka pholaak tu hi! Ahihang tua teng bek hi ngawl lai hi; Tapidaw suapuite hong pai ciangin saang nuam ngawlin, tuabang a saang nuamte ngawngawn tho in, biakinn pan hawlkeak tu hanciam lai hi!" 
3John1:10 Tua ahikom kong pai ciangin ama ngamtatna theampo: ko thu a cizathuai a hong sonte le a leilotna teng ka pholaak tu hi! Ahihang tua teng bek hi ngawl lai hi; Tapidaw suapuite hong pai ciangin saang nuam ngawlin, tuabang a saang nuamte ngawngawn tho in, biakinn pan hawlkeak tu hanciam lai hi!" 
3John1:11 Ka it ka lawmpa awng, a pha ngawlte zui heak vun a, a phate zui tavun. Thupha vawt peuma Pathian neisa hi a; thusia vawt peuma in Pathian a mu bua hi." 
3John1:11 Ka it ka lawmpa awng, a pha ngawlte zui heak vun a, a phate zui tavun. Thupha vawt peuma Pathian neisa hi a; thusia vawt peuma in Pathian a mu bua hi." 
3John1:12 Demetrius sia ngual theampo in phat son hi; thumaan thutak mama in ama phat son hi. Tuaciang ko zongh in tetti ka pang thua uh a, thumaan son ka hi uh sia na he uh hi."

3John1:13 Kong son nop tam mama om ahihang laikung laite taw kong at nuam bua hi.

3John1:14 No taw kimu pal tu in lametna ka nei a, tua hun ciangin maitang kisi in ih son tu hi."

Jude1:1 Jesus Christ ii naseam, James ii suapuipa Jude kung pan — Pa Pathian ii itna sung le Jesus Christ ii kepcingna sung a nungta Pathian ii sapsate tungah laithak ahi hi:" 
Jude1:1 Jesus Christ ii naseam, James ii suapuipa Jude kung pan — Pa Pathian ii itna sung le Jesus Christ ii kepcingna sung a nungta Pathian ii sapsate tungah laithak ahi hi:" 
Jude1:2 Hesuakna, thinnopna, ki itna a kicingin note aa hi tahen." 
Jude1:3 Ka it lawmte awng, ih nei khop tek ngupna huvau hong at nuam ing, ka ci laitakin, Pathian ii mihingte tungah a tawntung atu in khatvei a piak upna huvau ngal ih sim kul lai hi, ci in hanthot nopna ka thinsung ah thakhatin hong suak hi." 
Jude1:4 Pathian a nei ngawl mihing pawlkhatte ei sungah hong tum ku ahikom, amate ii pheangtatnate a kam zonna in, Pathian ii thuthiamna thute ahi ngawl lamin zeak a, eima bek ii To le Topa ahi Jesus Christ sia nial uh hi. Ngeitawng lai in Laithiangtho in amate puavawkna a thuakna thute sonkhol zo hi." 
Jude1:5 Na heaksa uh ahitazong, Topa in Israel te sia Egypt ngam pan suatak napi, a thu um ngawlte sia a khak sang ciangin, susiacip hi ci in kong phawksak nuam hi." 
Jude1:6 Amate thuneina ciaciang sungah a om po ngawl, a teenna a nusia vantunglalangte phawk tavun: amate sia leinuai khuazingna ah tawntung thikkol kibul a, amate tungah thu a kitan tu Pathian ii Ni lianpi ni dong atu in Pathian in koi hi." 
Jude1:7 Sodom, Gomorrah le a kiim khuapite zongh phawk tavun, tua vantunglalangte bangin ngamta a, numei le pa paktatna le ngeina ngawl bangin mawna vawt uh hi: amate sia mihing theampo ii a kidop thei natu in, tawntung meikuang sungah daan a thuak uh hi." 
Jude1:8 Tuasia bangma in hi mihingte in amate ii pumpi mama a khialsak tu mukholnate nei a; amate in Pathian ii thuneina zawngsakin, tung sangah a minthangte nunau uh hi." 
Jude1:9 Vantunglalangte sung pan a lianbel Michael zongh in hi bangin ngamta ngawl hi. Moses luanghawm sia Doaimangpa taw a kituu laitakin, Michael in Doaimangpa sia kamsia taw na lang ngawl a, “Topa in nang hong teih tahen,” na ci bek hi." 
Jude1:10 Ahihang hi mite in a tel ngawl nate sia nunau in, selno uh hi; tuaciang nganhing bangin, amate ii a pianpui thinsung uh taw a heak thei nate in amate lalsak uh hi." 
Jude1:11 Amate atu in bangza in lauhuai ziam! Amate in Cain ii lampi tawn uh hi. Balaam khial bangma in, amate sia sum huvau in puk uh hi. Korah ii a langpan bangin, amate zongh in langpan uh a, ama bangma in kilalsak hi." 
Jude1:12 Amate sia a maizumhuai neakna dawnna taw ngualnuamin om uh a, noma ii kipawlkhop anneakpoai uh hong nokkhaksakte ahi hi. Amate in a kaangsung atu bek kin hi. Amate sia vui ii seam nguatui a paai ngawl meeikaaite taw kibang hi: tangngam hun dongin a nga mama a nga ngawl thingkungte le a kizunglok a thicip sa thingkungte taw kibang hi." 
Jude1:13 Amate sia tuipi sung a, tui kihualte taw kibang a, amate ii a maizumhuai ngamtatnate sia, tuiphuante bangin kilangh hi. Amate sia khuazing belna sung, a tawntung a om natu mun Pathian ii a koi kholsak, a vakthap aksite taw kibang hi." 
Jude1:14 Adam suan a khang salina, Enoch in hi bangin, amate huvau sonkhol hi. “Topa sia a vantunglalang thiangtho tul tam mama te taw hong pai tu a," 
Jude1:15 mihingte theampo tungah thutanna vawt tu le, Pathian awlmawk ngawl ngamtatnate le Pathian sel mawneite ii Pathian langpanna a lauhuai kam paunate tungah puavawkna vawt tu hi!” ci hi." 
Jude1:16 Hi mihingte in a tawntungin, phunin ngual veu mawsiat uh hi; amate in a ngitlo nopna thinpuakte zui uh hi; amate le amate kisuangtaakin, a dei uh sia a nga thei natu in, ngualdangte sialpok uh hi." 
Jude1:17 Ahihang lawmte awng, a bosa hun sungah ih Topa Jesus Christ sawltakte ii hong son thute na phawk tavun." 
Jude1:18 Amate in “Ni tawpkhak hun hong thet ciangin, note hong selno tu mihing hong piang tu a, tua mihingte in pathian sel amate ii deinate zui tu uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Jude1:19 Hi mihingte in kikhenna a piangsakte hi a, cii le sa deina in amate uk in, Thaa a nei bua uh hi." 
Jude1:20 Ahihang no, ka lawmte awng, a thiangthobel na upna tungah kikipsak seseam vun. Thaa Thiangtho vaangletna sungah thungen tavun," 
Jude1:21 tuaciang, ih Topa Jesus Christ ii hesuakna taw tawntung nuntakna hong piak tu ngakin na om uh laitakin, noma le noma sia Pathian ii itna sungah kikeamcing tavun." 
Jude1:22 A um tatak zo ngawlte tungah hesuakna na lak tavun; 
Jude1:23 midangte sia meikuang sung pan dokin, hun tavun; a dangte tungah hesuakna le kiitakna kithua in, na lak tavun a, ahihang amate paktat mawna taw nin a baang sa puante mama na ensan tavun." 
Jude1:24 Tu in na puk ngawl natu in, hong keam thei a, ama ii minthanna mai ah a sitbaang ngawl le lungdamna lianpi taw hong then thei —" 
Jude1:25 ama bek Pathian ahi ih Ngumpa tungah ih Topa Jesus Christ tungtawnin, minthanna, vaangletna, thahatna le thuneina sia, a bosa hun theampo sung, tu le a tawntungin om top tahen! Amen." 
Revelation1:1 Hi laibu sia Jesus Christ ii pualaak thute a kitepteena ahi hi. Hai ngawlin, a tung tu thute a naseamte tungah a lak thei natu in, Pathian in hi pualaakna pia hi. Christ in a naseampa John tungah a heaksak natu in, ama kungah a vantunglalang paisak a," 
Revelation1:1 Hi laibu sia Jesus Christ ii pualaak thute a kitepteena ahi hi. Hai ngawlin, a tung tu thute a naseamte tungah a lak thei natu in, Pathian in hi pualaakna pia hi. Christ in a naseampa John tungah a heaksak natu in, ama kungah a vantunglalang paisak a," 
Revelation1:2 tuaciang John in a mu theampo son siat hi. Hisia in Pathian ii thupuak le Jesus Christ ii a pualaak thumaante huvau thukona ahi hi.
