Revelation1:3 Hi thubu sungah a ki at laite a simte le maisang thu kisonkholna kammal a zuite in mihing lungdamte ahi hi! Banghang ziam cile hi thute hong tun tu hun hong nai zo hi. 
Revelation1:4 Asia ngamkhen sung a om pawlpi salite tungah, John in lai kong thaak hi: A om nginge, a omsa le hong pai pheang tu Pathian kung pan, a kumpi tokhum mai ah thaa sali te kung pan le" 
Revelation1:4 Asia ngamkhen sung a om pawlpi salite tungah, John in lai kong thaak hi: A om nginge, a omsa le hong pai pheang tu Pathian kung pan, a kumpi tokhum mai ah thaa sali te kung pan le" 
Revelation1:5 a thumaan tetti hi a, thina pan kithosak kik masa leitung kumpite theampo a ukpa Jesus Christ kung pan thuthiamna le thinnopna sia note aa hi tahen. Ama in ei hong it a, ama chisan hangin eite, mawna pan hong suatak hi," 
Revelation1:6 tuaciangin eite sia a Pathian le a Pa atu a seam tu in thiampi in hong vawt hi. Jesus Christ tungah minthanna le vaangletna sia a tawntung a tawntungin om tahen! Amen. 
Revelation1:7 En vun, meei tungah ama hong pai hi! Mihing khat simin ama mu tu hi, tuate sungah ama a hollette zongh kihel tu hi. Leitung mihing theampo ama hu in khuangaina taw tau tu uh hi. Tuabangin hong piang tatak tu hi!" 
Revelation1:8 “Keima in a masabel le a khakbel ka hi hi,” ci in a om nginge, a omsa, le hong pai pheang tu, Vaanglianbel Topa Pathian in ci hi." 
Revelation1:9 Keima in na suapuipa John ka hi a, tuaciang Jesus nungzui khat ka hina taw Pathian ngam lua tute ii thuak tu vawtsiatna noma taw a kibangin a thuak kenkon na seppuipa ka hi hi. Kei sia Patmos tuikulh tungah hong kikoi hi, banghang ziam cile, Pathian kammal le Jesus ii hong pualaak thumaan thutak ka thansak hang ahi hi."

Kei sia Patmos tuikulh tungah hong kikoi hi, banghang ziam cile, Pathian kammal le Jesus ii hong pualaak thumaan thutak ka thansak hang ahi hi." 
Revelation1:10 Topa ii ni in, Thaa in kei hong uk a, aw nging khat ka za hi, tua aw sia lemle aw bang hi a, ka nungsang panin hong paupui hi." 
Revelation1:11 Tuasia in, “Na mu teng at in a, a laibu sia hi pawlpite omna khuapi sali ahi: Ephesus, Smyrna, Pergamum, Thyatira, Sardis, Philadelphia, Laodicea te tungah thaak in,” ci hi." 
Revelation1:12 Akua in hong paupui ziam ci in ka nung ka kiheak ciang, khamh meivakna sali ka mu hi," 
Revelation1:13 tuate kawmah mihing taw a kibang khat ka mu a, ama in a peang dong a tualsuk puan khat silhin, a awm kiimkot ah khamh kawngkhau khat vet hi." 
Revelation1:14 Ama sam sia tuumul ahibuale vuuk bangin paak a, tuaciangin a mittang sia meikuang bang ahi hi;" 
Revelation1:15 ama ii peang sia a kithiangsak, a kinawt taau taw kibang a, a aw sia tuiteautuak hawk bang ahi hi." 
Revelation1:16 Ama in a khut ziatsang ah aksi sali toai a, tuaciang a kam sung panin a lang nii hiam namsau khat hong pusuak hi. A maitang sia sun lai nitaang bangin taang hi." 
Revelation1:17 Ama ka mu ciangin mithi sa bangin, a peang ah ka puk hi. Ama in a khut ziatsang ka tungah hong nga a, “Lau heak in! Kei sia a masabel le a khakbel ka hi hi." 
Revelation1:18 Keima in a nungta pa ka hi hi! Keima sia ka thi zo a, ahihang tu in a tawntung a tawntungin, ka nungta hi. Thina le mithite khua ka uk hi." 
Revelation1:19 Tua ahikom nungciangin, hong piang tu nate le tu laitak a om nate, na mu teng at in." 
Revelation1:20 ka ziatsang khut sungah na mu aksi salite le khamh meivak khuam salite ii a kiphualseal a khiakna sia hi bang ahi hi: aksi salite sia pawlpi salite ii vantunglalangte hi a, meivakna khuam salite sia pawlpi salite ahi hi." 
Revelation2:1 “Ephesus khua Pawlpi ii vantunglalang tungah hi bangin at in: “Hisia in a khut ziatsang ah aksi sali toai a, khamh meikhuam salite kawm ah a vakpa ii hong kamvaithak ahi hi." 
Revelation2:2 Na sep teng kong he hi; bangza in haksa mama in naseam a, thin uai takin na om sia kong he hi. Mi ngilote dual thei ngawlin, sawltak hi ngawl napi ka hi uh hi a cite zongh na sit uh a, ahi ngawl uh hunlam na tel zawkciangin, leilot mihingte hi ci in na mu uh zongh kong he hi." 
Revelation2:3 Note na thin uh uai a, kei atu in thuakin, na thin uh na thasua bua uh hi." 
Revelation2:4 Ahihang note kong mawsakna khat sia hi thu ahi hi. A masa a nong it uh bangin, tu in kei nong it nawn bua uh hi." 
Revelation2:5 Bangza dongin kiamsuk na hi uh sia ngaisun vun! Na mawnate uh panin kisiik vun a, na vawt phit uh sia vawt kik vun. Na mawnate uh pan na kisiik bua uh le, keima note kungah hong pai in, na meivakna uh a omna mun pan kong laaksak tu hi." 
Revelation2:6 Ahihang hisia in note atu phatna hi: keima ngaimawk bangma in, note zongh in Nicolaitans pawlte nasepna na ngaimaw uh hi." 
Revelation2:7 “Bil na nei uh le pawlpite tungah Thaa thusonnate ngai vun! “Pathian ii huan sungah a po nuntakna thingkung ii nga sia, zawna a ngate ii a neak thei natu thu ka pia tu hi." 
Revelation2:8 “Smyrna khua pawlpi ii kamtai vantunglalang tungah hi bangin at in: “Hisia in a masa phitbel le a khakbel ahi, a thisa a nungta kikpa tung pan kam hong vaithak hi." 
Revelation2:9 Na ngimna teng kong he hi; zawng hi ci in kong he hi — ahihang a tatak sia hau nu hi! Jew te khu hi a ci theamte ii no hong siatsonnate ka he hi; amate sia Satan ii neisa honkhat ahi uh hi. 
Revelation2:10 Na thuak lai tute a bang po ahizong, lau heak vun. Ngai vun! Doaimangpa in note hong ze etna in, pawlkhat thonginn sung denna in hong nei tu a, na ngimna uh sia ni sawm sung teng hi tu hi. Thi tu keak a kul zong kei tungah hong thumaan tavun, tua hile nuntakna sia zawna tel in kong pia tu hi." 
Revelation2:11 “Bil na nei uh le pawlpite tungah Thaa thusonnate ngai vun! “Zawna a ngate niivei thina in a susia buatu hi. 
Revelation2:12 “Pergamum khua pawlpi tungah kamtai vantunglalang tungah hi bangin at in: “Hisia in a lang nii hiam namsau a neipa ii hong kam vaithak ahi hi. 
Revelation2:13 Satan ii kumpi tokhum a ngakna munah na teen uh kong he hi. A thumaan ka tetti Antipas sia Satan teenna tua munah a kithalup hun dongin, na upna uh na thasua bua uh a, kei tungah nong thumaan uh hi." 
Revelation2:14 Ahihang kong mawsiat nopna pawlkhat om hi: milim biakna an a neak natu le numei le pa paktat natu a kaizotna taw Israel te mawna sung a thengsak Balak tungah thu a hil Balaam thuhilna a zui pawlkhat na om uh hi. 
Revelation2:15 Tuasia bangma in Nicolaitans hilna a zui zongh na om uh hi. 
Revelation2:16 Tu in na mawnate uh pan kisiik kik vun! Na kisiik kik bua uh le ka kam sung pan a pusuak namsau taw tua mihingte a sim tu in, note kungah hong pai pal tu khi hi." 
Revelation2:17 “Bil na nei uh le pawlpite tungah Thaa thusonnate ngai vun! “Zawna a nga mihingte tungah a kiseal manna an pawlkhat ka pia tu hi. Amate khat tek tungah, a saangte ngawl po kuama dang ii heak ngawl minthak a ki at suangpheak khat tek ka pia si tu hi." 
Revelation2:18 “Thyatira pawlpi ii kamtai vantunglalang tungah hi bangin at in: “Hisia in, a mittangte meikuang bang hi a, a peangte taau nawtthiang bang ahi Pathian Tapa ii hong kam vaithak ahi hi." 
Revelation2:19 Note bang vawt ci sia kong he hi. Na itna, na thumaanna, na nasepna, le na thin uaina ka he hi. A masa na sep uh sangin tu in tamzaw seam ci in kong he hi." 
Revelation2:20 Ahihang nang kong mawsiat nopna pan: Pathian naseam khi hi ci in a kivawttawm Jezebel numeinu sia dual ni hi. Ama hilna taw ama in ka naseamte lamkhialsakin, milim biakna ante neakna le, numei le pa paktatnate vawtsak hi." 
Revelation2:21 A mawnate a kisiik kik natu hun pia ka hi hang, ama in paktatna pan, kikheal nuam ngawl hi." 
Revelation2:22 Tua ahikom tua nu le ama taw palngul mawna a vawtte sia lupna khat tungah, ka lawn tu a nasia takin thuak tu uh hi. Tua numei taw seksolna a vawtte a kisiik kik bua uh le, tu mama in ka ci sa bangin ka vawt tu hi." 
Revelation2:23 A nungzuite zongh ka thatlum tu hi, tuasia ciangin pawlpi theampo in kei sia mihing theampo ii ngaisutna le a deina a he siat pa ka hi hunlam hong he tu hi. Note khat tek na ngamtat uh babangin kong thuk tu hi." 
Revelation2:24 “Ahihang Thyatira a om a dangte in, hi ngitlo kihilnate na zui bua uh a; ‘Satan ii a thuk thukute’ a kicite na tel bua uh hi. Note tungah vanhngit a dang hong suan ngawl tu khi hi, kong ci hi." 
Revelation2:25 Ahihang kong pai mateng na neisate uh kip takin na kep uh kul tu hi. 
Revelation2:26 Zawna a ngate le a tawp dong ka dei bang a, a ngamta suakte sia ka Pa tung pan ka nga thuneina ka pia tu hi: minamte thikciang taw a uk natu thuneina ka pia tu a, amate in leibeal bangin amate a bek a bekin tamhthamsak tu uh hi. Amate tungah nikonghong aksi zongh ka pia tu hi."

Revelation3:1 “Sardis khua pawlpi ii vantunglalang tungah hi bangin at in: “Hisia in Pathian ii thaa sali a neipa le aksi sali a neipa ii hong kamvaithak ahi hi. Nang in bang teng vawvawt ci in kong he hi; thi na hihang nungta nginge a, na minthan sia kong he hi!" 
Revelation3:2 Tua ahikom khanglo in a, na nei sun teng a thicip ma in tha khosak in. Banghang ziam cile na sep teng sia ka Pathian mai ah cialcing ngawl lai hi, ci in kong mu hi." 
Revelation3:3 Tua ahikom note hong kihil sa le na zaaksate phawk kik tavun; tua thute ni vun a, na mawnate uh pan kisiik kik vun. Na khanglo bua uh le, note kungah nguta bangin kong pai tu a, kong pai tu a hun ngawngawn zongh na he buatu uh hi." 
Revelation3:4 Ahihang tua Sardis khua sungah a om pawlkhatte in, na puansilh uh na thiangsak zo uh hi. Puankaang silhin kei taw na vak khawm tu uh hi, banghang ziam cile tuabang tu in na kilawm uh hi." 
Revelation3:5 Zawna a ngate in hi bang puankaang a silh tu hi, tuaciangin amate min sia a nungtate min khumna laibu sung pan ka phiat buatu hi. Ka Pa le a vantunglalangte mai ah amate sia keima neisa ahi hi, ci in a kilangh takin ka thangsak tu hi." 
Revelation3:6 “Bil na nei uh le pawlpite tungah Thaa thusonnate ngai vun! 
Revelation3:7 “Philadelphia khua pawlpi ii vantunglalang tungah hi bangin at in: “Hi kamvaithak sia a thiangtho le a thumaanpa tung pan ahi hi. Ama in David ii neisa tawtang nei a, kongkha a hon ciang kuama in a khak thei bua hi, tuaciang kongkha a kha ciang kuama in a hong thei bua hi." 
Revelation3:8 Note bang vawt ci sia kong he hi; vaangletna tawm nei hi ci in kong he hi; ka hilnate nong zui uh a, kei tungah nong thumaan uh hi. Na mai uh ah kuama ii kha thei ngawl kongkha khat ka hong zo hi." 
Revelation3:9 Ngai vun! Jew mi a kici theam a leilot, tua Satan pawlte ahile, na peang uh ah a bok tu in kong paisak tu hi. Amate theampo in note kong it sia he tu uh hi." 
Revelation3:10 Thuak kenkon natu kong thupiakte, keamcing na hi uh komin, leitung bup mihingte ze et tu in, ngimna hong pai ciang, note zongh kong keamcing tu hi." 
Revelation3:11 Hong pai pal tu khi hi, kuama in na zawna tel uh hong suu zawk ngawl natu in, na neisun uh teng keamcing tavun." 
Revelation3:12 A zo pa sia ka Pathian biakinn khuam ka suaksak tu a, ama in a nusia ngei buatu hi. Ama tungah ka Pathian min le ka Pathian kung vantung pan hong tuaksuk tu Pathian ii khuapi min ahi Jerusalem khuathak ii min ka at tu hi. Ama tungah ka minthak zongh ka at tu hi." 
Revelation3:13 “Bil na nei uh le pawlpite tungah Thaa ii thusonte ngai vun! 
Revelation3:14 “Laodicea pawlpi ii vantunglalang tungah hi bangin lai at in: “Hisia in Pathian ii bitphua sa theampo ii pian kipatna, a maan tetti, a thumaan Amen ii hong kam vaithak ahi hi." 
Revelation3:15 Na sepsate ka he hi: Nang sia sa le sa ngawl, vot le vot ngawl, ci in hong he khi hi. Na sa le sa vet, na vot le vot vet lete kong oai hi." 
Revelation3:16 Ahihang sa le sa ngawl, vot le vot ngawlin a lum bek na hikom ka kam sung pan hong sia kik tu khi hi!" 
Revelation3:17 Nang in ‘Kei sia hau in nuamsa ing; ka kisap theampo nei ing,’ ci ni hi. Ahihang bangza in zawngkhalin, hesuakhuai na hi hunlam na kihe bua hi! Nangma na zawng a, pumnguak na om a, na mittaw hi." 
Revelation3:18 Tua ahikom ngaisut kong piakna panin, na hau natu in kei kung pan khamh, khamh ciitak hong lei ta'n. A maizumhuai pumnguaktangin na om sia na kiseal natu in, puankaang zongh hong lei ta'n. Khua na mu thei natu in, na mittang na noi tu in, za pawlkhat hong lei ta'n." 
Revelation3:19 Ka it te a vekpi in, teihin daan ka pia hi. Tua ahikom na thin takpi taw in, na mawnate pan kisiik kik in." 
Revelation3:20 Ngai vun! Keima in kongkha kungah dingin ka king hi; khat pawpo in ka aw za in kongkha hong hon le, ama ii inn sungah tumin, ama taw an ka nekhawm tu a, ama zongh kei taw an nekhawm tu hi." 
Revelation3:21 Keima in zawna nga zo a, tu in ka Pa kung kumpi tokhum tungah ka to bangma in zawna a ngate tungah keima kung ka kumpi tokhum tungah a to thei natu thu ka pia tu hi." 
Revelation3:22 “Bil na nei uh le pawlpite tungah Thaa ii sonte ngai vun!” 
Revelation4:1 Hi santak ah mukholna dangkhat ka nei a, vantung ah kongkha khat kihong sa in a om ka mu hi. Tuaciang lemle aw taw a kibang ka zaak ngeisa ahi kei hong paupuina awnging in “Hi sungah hong paito ta'n, hisia zawkciang bang teng piang tu ziam, ci in kong lak tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation4:2 Thakhat thu in Thaa in kei hong uk hi. Tua mun vantung ah kumpi tokhum khat om a, a tungah mihing khat to hi." 
Revelation4:3 Ama maitang sia jasper le carnelian suangmanphate bangin, taang a, tuasia ciang a kumpi tokhum buppi kiimkot ah emerald suanghing bang ahi sangun khat om hi." 
Revelation4:4 Kumpi tokhum ii kiimkot ah a beamin, kumpi tokhum dang kul le li om a, tuate tungah upa kul le li puankaang silhin, khamh kumpilukhu khu in to uh hi." 
Revelation4:5 Kumpi tokhum pan khualeng vazal a, nging vangam in vanto hi. Tua kumpi tokhum mai ah Pathian thaa salite ahi meisip salite kuang hi." 
Revelation4:6 A kumpi tokhum mai ah a thiang vakil limlangh tuipi taw a kibang khat zongh ka mu hi. Kumpi tokhum kiim a pangh khat sim panin a nungta nganhing li in uumci a, a nung a mai theampo mittang taw kidim hi." 
Revelation4:7 A masabel sia tawpi taw kibang hi; a niina sia khuital taw kibang hi; a thumna sia mihing maitang nei hi; a lina sia muvanlai leang bang ahi hi. 
Revelation4:8 Nganhing lite khat simin tha luk tek nei a, tuaciang tua thate sungsang le puasang ah mittang taw kidim uh hi. Sun taw zan taw amate in a lasak a tawlnga ngei bua uh hi: “Vaanglianbel Topa Pathian sia Thiangtho, thiangtho, thiangtho hi, ama in a om sa, a om nginge, hong pai pheang tu pa hi,” ci uh hi." 
Revelation4:9 Kumpi tokhum tungah a to pa, a tawntung a tawntungin a nungta pa tungah nganhing li teng in minthanna, upatna le lungdamkona la sak uh hi." 
Revelation4:10 Tuabangin a sep uh ciangin upa kul le lite sia kumpi tokhum tung a to Topa mai ah boksuk in, a tawntung a tawntungin a nungta pa bia uh hi. Amate in a kumpi lukhute sia kumpi tokhum mai ah khiasuk in," 
Revelation4:11 “Ka Topa le ka Pathian! Minthanna, upatna le vaangletna saang tu in na kilawm hi. Banghang ziam cile nangma in na theampo na bitphua hi, tuaciangin nangma deina taw amate tungah pianna le nuntakna na pia hi,” ci uh hi." 
Revelation5:1 Kumpi tokhum tung a to pa ziatsang khut sungah laizial khat ka mu hi; tuasia in a lang le lang dim lai ki at a, tepteena sali taw kituum hi." 
Revelation5:2 Tuaciangin vantunglalang a hat mama khat ka mu a, ama in awnging tak taw, “Akua in hi tepteenate a baltham tu le laizial a hong tu in kiphu ziam?” ci in au hi." 
Revelation5:3 Ahihang vantung ah ahizong, leitung ah ahizong, leinuai ah ahizong, tua lai sia hongin a sung a en thei tu a om bua hi." 
Revelation5:4 Tua laizial a hong thei tu le, a sung a en thei tu a kiphu kuama kimu ngawl ahikom nasia takin ka kap hi." 
Revelation5:5 Tua zawkciang upate khat in, kei tungah, “Kap heak in, En in! Judah minam sung panin Tawpi ahi, a lian David suan pa in zawna nga zo a, ama in tepteena salite balthamin laizial hong thei tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation5:6 Tua zawkciangin kumpi tokhumte laizang, nganhing lite le upate ii a kiim uumna sungah Tuuno khat a ding ka mu hi. Tua Tuuno in a kithatlum sa bang keak ahi hi. Ama in kii sali nei a, mittang sali nei hi, tuate sia Pathian ii thaa salite hi a, leitung bup ah a kipaisakte ahi hi." 
Revelation5:7 Tuuno in pai in kumpi tokhum tungah a to pa ziatsang khut panin, laizial sia la hi." 
Revelation5:8 Tuabang a vawt ciangin, nganhing li teng le upa kul le li teng sia Tuuno mai ah boksuk uh hi. Tengtongh khat tek le ngimnamtui taw a kidim khamh khawbeamte nei tek uh a, tuate sia Pathian ii mihingte ii thungetna ahi uh hi." 
Revelation5:9 Amate in la thak sa uh a: “Nangma in laizial la tu le tepteena hong tu in na kilawm hi. Banghang ziam cile nangma hong kithatlum zo a, na kipumpiak thina taw, Pathian atu in, bee le phung sim, kam namcin sim, ngam sim le minam sim panin, mihingte na lei zo hi." 
Revelation5:10 Nangma in amate sia eima ii Pathian na a seam tu in kumpi thiampite ukna na suaksak zo a, tuaciang amate in leitung uk tu uh hi.”" 
Revelation5:11 Tuaciangin ka et kik le, tul tam mama le awn tam mama a pha vantunglalangte aw ka za hi! Amate in kumpi tokhum, nganhing li teng le upate kiimkot ah dingin," 
Revelation5:12 nging takin lasa uh hi: “Tuuno a kithatlum sia in vaang letna, hauna, ciimna, le thahatna upatna, minthanna le pokna, a saang tu in kiphu hi!” ci uh hi." 
Revelation5:13 Tuaciangin vantung, leitung, leinuai, tuipi sung — vaannuai ah nuntakna a nei theampo in hi bangin la a sak ka za hi: “Kumpi tokhum tungah a to pa le Tuuno tungah pokna, upatna, minthanna le thahatna a tawntung a tawntungin om tahen!”" 
Revelation5:14 Nganhing nungta li teng in “Amen!” ci in zo uh hi. Tuaciang upate in boksukin, bia uh hi." 
Revelation6:1 Tua zawkciang tepteena salite sung pan a masabel sia Tuuno in a hon ka mu a, nganhing nungta lite sung pan khat in, vanto bang ahi aw taw, “Hong pai ta'n!” hong ci hi." 
Revelation6:2 Ka et le, siphu kaang khat ka mu hi. A tungah a to pa in thal khat toai a, kumpilukhu khat kipia hi. Ama in ngalzopa ii ngalzo tu in a kuan bangin siphu tungah to in kuan hi." 
Revelation6:3 Tuaciangin tepteena a niina sia Tuuno in hong a, tuasia ciang nganhing a niina sia in, “Hong pai ta'n!” hong ci hi." 
Revelation6:4 Siphu dang khat hong pusuak a, a san ahi hi. Mihingte khat le khat a kithalup natu in, a tungah a to pa sia leitung ah ngal kidona piansak natu vaang kipia hi. Ama sia namsau lian khat kipia hi." 
Revelation6:5 Tuasia zawkciang tepteena a thumna sia Tuuno in hong a, nganhing a thumna sia in, “Hong pai ta'n!” hong ci hi. Ka et le siphu vom khat om hi. A tungah a to pa in a khut sungah khaikhin kop khat toai hi." 
Revelation6:6 Nganhing lite sung pan khat ii aw tu bangin ka zaak khat in, “Ni khat thaman sia zungtaang litre khat, ni khat thaman tu mangtaang litre thum hi. Ahihang olive kungte le sapitkungte na lalsak heak vun!” hong ci hi." 
Revelation6:7 Tua zawkciang tepteena a lina sia Tuuno in hong a, nganhing nungta a lina sia in, “Hong pai ta'n!” hong ci hi." 
Revelation6:8 Ka et ciang, siphu a daang khat ka mu hi. A tungah a to pa ii min sia Thina hi a, a nung panin mithi khua in zui hi. Leitung ah a teangte see li sua see khat sia amate in ngal, kialpi, natna le ngamsate taw thalup thei natu in thu kipia hi." 
Revelation6:9 Tua zawkciang tepteena a ngana sia Tuuno in hong hi. Biaknatau nuai ah, Pathian kammalte a thansak uh hu le thumaanna taw tetti a panna hu a, a kithatlumte ii thaate ka mu hi." 
Revelation6:10 Amate in awnging tak taw au uh a, “Vaanglianpipa Topa, a thiangtho thumaan pa awng! Leitung ah kote hong that mihingte tungah thu na khen tu le, daan na piak tu sia bang tanvei khuangei lai tu ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Revelation6:11 Amate khat sim sia puantual kaang khat tek kipia hi, tuaciangin amate a kithalup bangma in a nasep puite le a suapuite a thalup nopza a cin mateng a ngak zii lai natu in sawl uh hi." 
Revelation6:12 Tua zawkciang tepteena a lukna sia Tuuno in a hon ka mu hi. Nasia takin zinliing a, ni sia puanvom bangin hong vomcip a, tha sia chi bangin sancip hi." 
Revelation6:13 Vui nasia takin va a, theikungte a thin ngawp ciang, a nga ungte lei ah a pul bangin aksite lei ah taaksuk uh hi." 
Revelation6:14 Van sia laidal pheak kizial bangin bomang a, mual theampo le tuikulh theampo amate omna mun pan kikhiin siat hi." 
Revelation6:15 Tuasia ciang leitung kumpite le ngamukte, ngalkap maangte, sumhaute, a thahatte, a dang mihing theampo, silate, sila ngawlte, leihawng sung le mualtung suangpite nuai ah buu uh hi." 
Revelation6:16 Amate in mualte le suangpite munah, “Ko tungah hong cimhsuk ka heu vun a, kumpi tokhum tungah a to pa ii muna pan le Tuuno ii thin uukna panin, hong seal tavun." 
Revelation6:17 Amate ii thin uukna a kiitakhuai mama ni sia hi sungah hong theng a, akua in thuak zo tu ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Revelation7:1 Hisia zawkciang leitung king li ah a ding vantunglalangte li ka mu a, leitung ah ahizong tuipi tungah ahizong, thingkung khat po tungah ahizong, vui a vak ngawl natu in amate in vuipi lite lencip uh hi." 
Revelation7:2 Tua zawkciang a nungta Pathian ii tepteena toai in nisuana sang pan vantunglalang a dang khat hong paito ka mu hi. Ama in awnging tak taw, leitung le tuipi lalsak tu a, Pathian ii vaang a piak vantunglalang lite sam hi." 
Revelation7:3 Tua vantunglalang in, “Pathian naseamte talki tungah tepteena a kivawt siat mateng, leitung, tuipi le thingkungte susia heak lai vun,” ci hi." 
Revelation7:4 Tuaciang a talki tungah Pathian ii tepteena a nga sia 144,000 pha hi ci in kei tungah hong kison hi. Amate sia Israel minam sawm le niite pan hi a," 
Revelation7:5 nam khat ciangin tulsawm le tulnii veu ahi: Judah, Reuben, Gad, Asher, Naphtali Manasseh, Simeon, Levi, Issachar, Zebulun, Joseph le Benjamin suante ahi uh hi."

Revelation7:9 Hisia zawkciang ka et le, kuama ii sim zawk ngawl tu mihonpi khat om hi! Amate sia minam, bee le phung, ngam tuatuam le kam namcin pan hi a, amate in puantual kaang silh a, a khut sungah palm sawl toai in Tuuno kumpi tokhum mai ah ding uh hi." 
Revelation7:10 Amate in awnging takin au uh a, “Kumpi tokhum tungah a to ih Pathian le Tuuno kung panin, Ngupna hong pai hi,” ci uh hi." 
Revelation7:11 Vantunglalangte theampo kumpi tokhum, upate le nganhing nungta lite kiimkot ah ding uh hi. Tuaciang amate in kumpi tokhum mai lei ah boksuk in Pathian bia uh a," 
Revelation7:12 “Amen! Pokna, minthanna, ciimna, lungdamkona, upatna, vaangletna le thahatna ih Pathian in a tawntung a tawntungin nei tahen! Amen!” ci uh hi." 
Revelation7:13 Upate khat in, “Hi puantual kaang silhte a kuate hi a, koisung pan hong pai ziam?” ci in hong dongh hi." 
Revelation7:14 “Topa awng, he ngawl khi hi. Nangma he ni hi,” ci in ka zo hi. Ama in, “Hite sia vawtsiatna nasia mama sung pan a suaktate hi. Amate in a puantualte silthiang zo a, Tuuno chi taw kaanghsak zo uh hi." 
Revelation7:15 Tua ahi hu in, amate sia Pathian kumpi tokhum mai ah dingin sun taw zan taw a biakinn sungah ama atu in na sepsak uh hi. Kumpi tokhum tungah a to pa in amate sia ama ompuina taw dal tu hi." 
Revelation7:16 Amate in ngilkial, dangko kik ngei nawn ngawl tu hi; ni le satna a nei dangte in amate sia kaangh ngawl tu hi," 
Revelation7:17 banghang ziam cile kumpi tokhum laizang ah a om Tuuno in amate ii tuucingpa hi tu a, amate sia nuntakna a pia ciktuite ah paipui tu hi. Tuaciang Pathian in amate mittang sung pan thitui theampo nawlsak tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation8:1 Tuuno in tepteena salina sia a hon ciang nai lang sung bang vantung ah thim dide hi. 
Revelation8:2 Tuaciangin Pathian mai ah a ding vantunglalang sali teng, ka mu a, amate tungah lemle sali kipia hi." 
Revelation8:3 Vantunglalang dangkhat khamh taw kivawt ngimnamtui halna, a neipa, hong pai in biaknatau mai ah ding hi. Pathian ii mihingte thungetna a belapsak natu in, ama sia ngimnamtui tam mama kipia a, kumpi tokhum mai a, a om khamh biaknatau tungah piak tu ahi hi." 
Revelation8:4 Ngimnamtui ii a khu sia Pathian ii mihingte thungetna taw kopin, Pathian mai ah a ding vantunglalang khut panin zaamto hi." 
Revelation8:5 Tua zawkciang, paaknamtui halna sia vantunglalang in la a, biaknatau pan meikuang sia taw a dip zawkciang leitung ah lawnsuk hi. A nging vangam le a puak vazakin, vanto a, khualeng vazalin zinliing hi." 
Revelation8:6 Tuaciang vantunglalang salite in, lemle salite tum tu in kithoai uh hi." 
Revelation8:7 Vantunglalang a masabel sia in, a lemle tum hi. Ngialtang le meikuang sia chi taw kihelin leitung ah hong kibuaksuk hi. Leitung ii see thum sua see khat, thingkung see thum sua see khat le lopa hing theampo kaanghtum siat hi." 
Revelation8:8 Tuaciang vantunglalang a niina sia in, a lemle tum hi. A kuang mualpi taw a kibang khat tuipi sungah lawnsuk hi. Tuipi tui see thum sua see khat sia chisan suak a," 
Revelation8:9 tuisung nganhing see thum sua see khat thi a, teambawte see thum sua see khat lalcip hi." 
Revelation8:10 Tuaciang vantunglalang a thumna sia in, a lemle tum hi. Aksi lian khat meisip bangin, a kuang khat sia, van panin taaksuk a, ngunte le ciktuite ii see thum sua see khat tungah tu hi." 
Revelation8:11 (Aksi sia ii min in “A Khaa” kici hi.) Tui see thum sua see khat sia tuikhaa suak a, tuaciang mihingte tam mama tua tui a dawnna panin thi uh hi, banghang ziam cile tua tui in tuikhaa suak zo hi." 
Revelation8:12 Vantunglalang a lina sia in, a lemle tum hi. Ni sia see thum sua see khat, tha see thum sua see khat, aksi see thum sua see khat kivaattham a, tuasia ciangin amate ii taanna sia see thum sua see khat bo hi; sun see thum sua see khat le zan see thum sua see khat sung, khuavak a om nawn bua hi." 
Revelation8:13 Tua zawkciangin ka et le muvanlai khat leang a, hi bangin a pau ka za hi, “Oh launa! launa! A dang vantunglalang thum teng in a lemle uh a tum ciang, leitung ah a teang theampo atu bangza in lauhuai tu ziam!” ci hi." 
Revelation9:1 Tuaciang vantunglalang a ngana sia in, a lemle tum hi. Aksi khat leitung ah a taaksuk ka mu a, tua aksi tungah a hawng thukpui sia ii tawtang kipia hi." 
Revelation9:2 Aksi in a hawng thukpui sia hong a, thik huanna meimang sung panin, a pusuak bangin meikhu pusuak hi; a hawng thukpui sung pan a pusuak meikhu in nitaang le vuite zingcipsak hi." 
Revelation9:3 Meikhu sung panin khaumaw honte lei ah hong taak uh hi, tuaciang amate tungah aikamte ii nei ngute kipia uh hi." 
Revelation9:4 Thingkungte, lopate ahibuale a kung dang khat pawpo a lalsak ngawl natu in, amate tungah thu kipia hi; Pathian ii tepteena a talki tungah a nei ngawl mihingte bek susia thei uh hi." 
Revelation9:5 Khaumawte in mihingte thisak ngawlin, tha nga hun sung teng ngim pia in, a vawtsiat natu bek thu kipia hi. Ngim piakna taw a vawtsiatna in, aikamte ii hong pe ciang, a bot sia taw kibang hi." 
Revelation9:6 Tua tha nga hun sung teng mihingte in thithei natu lampi a zon uh hang, a mu buatu uh hi; amate in thi nuam tu hikale, thina in amate taisan tu hi." 
Revelation9:7 Khaumawte sia ngalsim tu in a kinging siphute taw kibang uh hi; a lu tungah khamh taw kivawt kumpi lukhute taw a kibangte nei uh a, a maitangte sia mihingte maitang taw kibang uh hi." 
Revelation9:8 A sam uh sia numeite sam taw kibang a, a ha uh sia tawpi ha taw kibang hi." 
Revelation9:9 A awm uh sia thik awmdalna taw a kibangte taw kituam hi, tuaciang a thaphil nging aw in ngal kidona sungah a tai siphu ngalleang tam mamate ii ngin taw kibang hi." 
Revelation9:10 Amate in mei nei a, aikam mei bangin hong de thei hi. Tua meite taw amate in tha 5 sung teng mihingte a liamsak natu vaang nei uh hi." 
Revelation9:11 Amate in a uk kumpipa khat nei uh hi, tuasia pa sia a hawng thukpui a uk vantunglalang hi. Ama ii min sia Hebrew kam in Abaddon hi a, Greek kam in Apollyon hi. (“A Susia pa” a cinopna hi)" 
Revelation9:12 Launa a masabel sia bo a, ahihang hisia zawkciangin hong piang tu launa nam nii om lai hi." 
Revelation9:13 Vantunglalang a lukna sia in, lemle tum hi. Pathian mai ah khamh biaknatau sia ii king li panin, aw khat hong nging ka za hi." 
Revelation9:14 A awnging in vantunglalang a lukna sia munah, “Eupharates ngun ah a kiheencip vantunglalang li teng tha vun,” ci hi." 
Revelation9:15 Vantunglalang li teng kitha hi; tu kum, tu tha, tuni, tu hun lianin mihing theampo ii see thum sua see khat a thalup natu in amate li sia a kingingta sa in kikoi hi." 
Revelation9:16 Siphu ngalkap awn zanii om hi ci in hong kison hi. 
Revelation9:17 Ka mukholna sungah siphute le a tung tote ka mu hi; amate in awmdalna sia meikuang bangin a san, sapphire suangmanpha bangin vancii, kaan bangin a eng silh uh hi. A siphute ii lutang sia tawpi lutang taw kibang a, a kam sung pan meikuang, meikhu le kaante hong pusuak hi." 
Revelation9:18 Mihingte sung pan see thum sua see khat sia siphute kam sung pan hong pusuak ngimna lian nam thum ahi, meikuang, meikhu le kaan in thatlum uh hi." 
Revelation9:19 Banghang ziam cile siphute vaangneina sia a kam sung le a mei ah om hi. Amate ii meite sia lu nei ngulte taw kibang a, mihingte a liamsak natu in zangh uh hi." 
Revelation9:20 Hi ngimna liante ii thalup mong a taanglai mihingte in amate khut taw a vawttawm uh nate panin a kikheal kik nuam bua uh hi. Doai biakna tawp ngawlin, khamh, ngunn, taau, suang le thing milim khuamu thei ngawl, khuaza thei ngawl, lampai thei ngawlte a biak uh zongh a kheal bua uh hi." 
Revelation9:21 Amate in ngual a thalupna, bum le ai toaina, numei le pa paktatna le nguktaknate uh panin a kisiik kik bua uh hi." 
Revelation10:1 Tua zawkciang a thahat vantunglalang a dang khat, vantung panin hong tuaksuk ka mu hi. Ama sia meei taw kituam a, a lutang kiimkot ah sangun khat in uum hi; a maitang sia ni taw kibang a, a peangte meikuang khuamte taw kibang hi." 
Revelation10:2 Ama in a khut sungah laizial no khat phalhsa in toai hi. Ama in a peang ziatsang sia tuipi tungah nga in, a peang veisang sia leitung ah nga hi," 
Revelation10:3 tuaciang ama in tawpi hawk taw a kibang awnging taw oksan hi. A oksat zawkciang, vanto salite in hawkin zo uh hi." 
Revelation10:4 Amate pau zawk po ciangin lai taw ciamtee tu in, at ka kipan hi. Ahihang vantung pan awnging khat ka za a, “Vanto salite ii pauna sia thuku in koi in, lai taw at heak in,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation10:5 Tuaciangin vantunglalang khat tuipi le leitung sisanh in a ding ka mu sia in, a khut ziatsang vantung ah laamto in," 
Revelation10:6 a tawntung a tawntungin a nungta, vantung, leitung, tuipi le a sung a om theampo a bitphua Pathian min taw kiciamna pia hi. Vantunglalang in, “Haisaang nawn ngawl tu hi!" 
Revelation10:7 Ahihang vantunglalang a salina sia in, lemle a tum tak ciang, a naseam kamsaangte tungah a sonsa bangin Pathian in a thuku ngealna khuangkhim tu hi,” ci hi." 
Revelation10:8 Tua zawkciang vantung pan hong paupuina aw, ka zaak ngeisa aw sia in, kei hong paupui kik a, “Va pai ta'n a, tuipi le leitung a sisanh vantunglalang ii khut sungah laizial sia la ta'n,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation10:9 Vantunglalang kungah ka pai a, laizial no sia hong piak natu in ka ngen hi. Ama in kei tungah, “La in a ne in; na ngil sungah a thuk suak tu hi, ahihang na kam sungah khuaitui bangin thum tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation10:10 Laizial no sia ama khut tung pan la in ka ne hi, tuaciang ka kam sungah tuasia in khuaitui bangin thum hi. Ahihang ka valh zawkciang ka ngil sungah a thuk suak hi." 
Revelation10:11 Tua zawkciang, “Nang in a tam mama ngamte, minam khente, kampaute le kumpipate taw kisai Pathian vaithak thu sia khatvei ma na thangsak kik tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation11:1 Tua zawkciang kei sia ciangkang khat hong kipia a, a sau teena piciang bang ahi hi, tuaciang hi bangin hong sawl hi, “Va pai ta'n a, Pathian biakinn le a biaknatau sia va tee ta'n, tuaciang biakinn sungah biakpiakna a nei mihing phaza hong sim ta'n." 
Revelation11:2 Ahihang a huang puanung sia na tee heak in, banghang ziam cile tua mun sia Pathian he ngawlte atu a kipiasa hi a, amate in Khuapi Thiangtho sia tha sawmli le tha nii sung tuanhcil tu uh hi." 
Revelation11:3 Ka tetti te nii khau-ip puan silh in, ka paisak tu a, amate in ni 1,260 sung teng Pathian ii thu vaithak thangsak tu uh hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation11:4 Tetti te nii a cite sia leitung Topa mai ah a ding olive kung niite le meivak khuam niite ahi uh hi. 
Revelation11:5 Khat po in amate vawtsia tu in a sawm le, a kam sung pan meikuang pusuak tu a, a ngalte lalcipsak tu uh hi; tuaciang hi bangin a kuama po amate susia nuamin a kipante sia kithatlum tu hi." 
Revelation11:6 Amate in van khakbil in Pathian thu vaithak a thansak hun sungin, ngua a zuksak ngawl natu in thunei uh hi. Amate in ciktuite chisan a suasak thei natu thunei si uh hi; tuaciang amate in a uuk ni sim po in, leitung sia ngimna lian nam theampo taw ngim piak thei natu zongh thunei uh hi." 
Revelation11:7 Amate in a thu vaithak a thansak zawk ciangin, a hawng thukpui sung pan hong pusuak nganhing sia in, amate sim tu hi. Tua nganhing in amate zo in thatlum tu a," 
Revelation11:8 a luangte sia amate ii Topa thinglamtee tungah a kithalupna mun tua khuapi lian sia sung lampi tungah kisial tu uh hi. Tua khuapi ii a minsealh sia Sodom, ahibuale Egypt kici hi." 
Revelation11:9 Ngam, minam, kampau namte le minam khente pan mihingte in a luangte sia ni thum le ni lang sung en tu a, a phumsak buatu uh hi." 
Revelation11:10 Leitung mihingte in hite nii ii thi hu in lungdam tu uh hi. Amate in lungdamna poaikhaam in, khat le khat letsong kithaak tu uh hi; banghang ziam cile tua kamsaangte nii in, mihingte tungah ngimna tam mama tungsak hi." 
Revelation11:11 Ni thum le ni lang zawkciang, Pathian kung pan nuntakna a pia husanna hong pai in, amate sungah tum a, tuaciangin amate hong dingto uh hi; a mu theampo lau mama uh hi." 
Revelation11:12 Tua zawkciang kamsaangte nii in “Hi sungah hong pai to tavun!” ci in vantung panin awnging tatak khat za hi. A ngalte mu tangin, amate sia meeikaai khat taw van ah kaato uh hi." 
Revelation11:13 Tua hun laitak nasia tatakin zinliing hi; khuapi ii see sawm sua see khat laltham a, mihing tul sali thi hi. A om lai mihingte lau in vantung ah om Pathian letna pok uh hi." 
Revelation11:14 Liinna launa lian a niina sia bo ahihang a thumna sia hong pai pal tu hi! 
Revelation11:15 Tua zawkciang vantunglalang a salina sia in a lemle tum a, vantung ah awnging tatak taw, “Leitung uk natu vaangletna in ih Topa le ama Messiah ii neisa hi a, ama in, a tawntung a tawntungin uk tu hi!” ci hi." 
Revelation11:16 Tuasia ciang a kumpi tokhumte taw Pathian mai ah a to upa kul le lite bokin Pathian bia uh a: 
Revelation11:17 “Topa Pathian vaanglianbelpa, a om nginge le a omsa pa, Na vaangletna lian taw ukna kipan tu hi zo na hikom lungdam kong ko uh hi!”" 
Revelation11:18 Pathian he ngawlte sia thin uukna taw kidim hi, banghang ziam cile na thin uuk tu hun le, a thite tungah thu na khen tu hun hong theng zo hi. Na naseam kamsaangte, a lian a no nang hong thasia theampo minphatna thaman na piak tu hun hi zo a, Leitung a lalsakte na lalsak tu hun hong theng zo hi!” ci hi." 
Revelation11:19 Vantung ah Pathian biakinn sia kihong a, Thuciamna Thingkuang sia tua munah kimu hi. Tuasia zawkciang khualengin, vanto ngawp a, zinliing in ngial nasia takin kia hi." 
Revelation12:1 Tua zawkciang van ah a lian lim lamdang khat kilangh hi. A puansilh sia ni hi a, tha sia a peang nuai ah koi in, aksi sawm le nii a nei kumpilukhu a lu tungah a khu numei khat om hi." 
Revelation12:2 Ama sia nausuak pal tu hi a, nautun natnate a thuakna hangin ama aukeak hi." 
Revelation12:3 A dang lim lamdang khat zongh, van ah kilangh hi. Lu sali le kii sawm a nei, a lute khat ii sim tungah kumpilukhu a khu, ngulpui san lian mama khat om hi." 
Revelation12:4 A mei taw van ah aksite see thum sua see khat kaikeak in lei ah sepsuk hi. Ama in numeinu mai ah dingin nau a sua po ciang, a nau neaksak tu in om hi." 
Revelation12:5 Tuasia ciangin numei in tapa khat hong nei a, tua tapa in leitung minam theampo thikciang taw uk tu hi. Ahihang a tano sia kisut a Pathian kung le a kumpi tokhum kungah kipaipui hi." 
Revelation12:6 Numei sia sennealngam sungah tai a, Pathian vawt kholsaksa tuak munah ni 1,260 dong ama kikeamcing tu hi." 
Revelation12:7 Tua zawkciang vantung ah ngal kisimna piang hi. Michael le a vantunglalangte in ngulpui do uh a, tua ngulpui in, ama lalangte taw kopin do kik hi;" 
Revelation12:8 ahihang ngulpui sia kizothal a, ama le a lalangte vantung ah a om tu uh a ki oai nawn bua hi." 
Revelation12:9 Tua ciangin taangh ngulpui lian Doaimangpa ahibuale Satan a kici leitung bup a theampa ngulpui lian mama sia, ama ii lalang theampo taw leitung ah hong kisepsuk hi." 
Revelation12:10 Tua zawkciang, vantung ah aw a nging tatak khat ka za a, “Tu in Pathian ngupna sia hong theng zo hi! Tu in Pathian in Kumpipa a hina, a vaangletna hong lak zo hi! Tu in ama Messiah in a thuneina hong lak zo hi! Banghang ziam cile Pathian mai ah ding a, ih suapuite sun taw zan taw a mawsakpa sia, vantung panin kivawk zo hi." 
Revelation12:11 Ih suapuite in Tuuno chi le thumaan thutang a thansakna uh taw zawna nga zo uh hi; amate in a nuntakna uh pia in thi ngam hi. 
Revelation12:12 No, vantungte le tua munah a teangte awng, lungdam vun! Ahihang leitung le tuipi atu bangzata in lauhuai ziam! Banghang ziam cile doaimangpa sia no kungah hong pai suk zo a, hun tawm cilik bek nei lai ahi hunlam he in, thangsiatna taw kidim hi,” a ci hi." 
Revelation12:13 Ngulpui in leitung ah a kivawksuk thu a tel tak ciang, tapano a hing numei sia del tu in kipan hi." 
Revelation12:14 Tua numei sia sennealngam ama omna a zot natu in muvanlai lian khat ii thakhui nii kipia a, tua munah kum thum le kum lang sung ngulpui ii sim natu pan kikeamcing tu hi." 
Revelation12:15 Tua teng zawkciang ngulpui in numeinu a taai tu in, a kam sung pan, khuanawl tui a pusuaksak hi." 
Revelation12:16 Ahihang lei in numeinu hu hi; tua lei in a kamkaa in ngulpui kam sung pan hong luang tui sia valh hi. 
Revelation12:17 Ngulpui sia numei tungah a thin uuk mama a, Pathian ii thupiakte zui a, Jesus ii pualaak thumaan tungah a kip numeinu ii suan a taanglaite sim tu in kuan hi." 
Revelation12:18 Tuaciangin ngulpui sia tuipi vaalbo ah ding hi. 
Revelation13:1 Tua zawkciang nganhing khat, tuipi sung pan hong pusuak ka mu hi. Ama in kii sawm le lutang sali nei hi; a kiite khat sim tungah kumpilukhu khat tek om a, a lutang khat sim tungah Pathian selnona min khat tek om hi." 
Revelation13:2 Tua nganhing sia pawlbeam bang hi a, a peang sia vom peang bang hi in, a kam sia tawpi kam bang ahi hi. Ngulpui in tua nganhing tungah, ama ii vaangletna, a kumpi tokhum le a lian thuneina teng pia hi." 
Revelation13:3 Nganhing lutang khat sia thi dektakin a liam taw kibang napi a liamma sia dam kik zo hi. Leitung theampo in lamdang sa in hi nganhing nung zui uh hi. 
Revelation13:4 Ngulpui in tua nganhing tungah ama thuneinate pia ahikom, mihing theampo in ngulpui a bia uh hi. Amate in nganhing zongh bia uh a, “Akua in hi nganhing taw kibang ziam? Akua in ama do zo tu ziam?” ci uh hi." 
Revelation13:5 Nganhing sia Pathian selnona kamte taw a kiphatsak natu le tha sawmli le tha nii sung teng thunei thei tu in thu kipia hi. 
Revelation13:6 Ama in Pathian min, a teenna le vantung ah a teangte theampo haamsiat tu in kipan hi." 
Revelation13:7 Ama sia Pathian ii mihingte do tu le a zo tu in kivawt a, bee le phung, ngam, pau namcin le minamte tungah thuneina kipia hi." 
Revelation13:8 A kithatlum Tuuno ii neisa ahi leitung kibitphua ma a nuntakna laibu sungah a kikhum min neite simngawl, leitung a teang mihing theampo in a bia tu uh hi." 
Revelation13:9 “Tua ahiciang bil na nei uh le ngai vun! 
Revelation13:10 Ngalmat tu in a kitavaw peuma kiman takpi tu a, namsau taw thalup tu in a kitavaw peuma namsau taw ma kithatlum tu hi. Hite hu in Pathian ii mihingte tungah thuak zawkna le upna kisamh hi,” ci hi." 
Revelation13:11 Tuaciang leisung panin hong pai to nganhing dang khat ma ka mu hi. Ama in tuuno kii bangin kii nii nei a, ama in ngulpui pau bangin pau hi." 
Revelation13:12 Ama in nganhing masa sia ii thuneina lian tengma ama mai ah zangh hi. Ama in leitung le a tungah a om theampo in a liamma a damsa nganhing masa sia biasak hi. 
Revelation13:13 Hi nganhing niina sia in, a nasia nalamdang laknate vawt hi; ngual theampo mu tangin vantung panin leitung ah meikuang taaksak hi." 
Revelation13:14 Nganhing masa sia ii mai ah vawt thei natu thu a nga bangin nalamdang laknate taw leitung mihing theampo theam hi. Tua nganhing in namsau taw kiliamsua napi a nungta lai nganhing sia upat natu in milim khat a vawt natu amate sawl hi. 
Revelation13:15 Nganhing niina sia in nganhing masa sia ii lim sia a pau thei natu le ama a bia ngawl theampo a thalup thei natu in a sungah nuntakna hu a khum thei natu thu nga hi. 
Revelation13:16 Nganhing in a no a lian, a hau a zawng, sila le sila ngawl mihing theampo ii ziatsang khutte tungah le a talkite tungah tepteena a vawt natu in zawthawk thu taw sawl hi." 
Revelation13:17 Tua nganhing min ahibuale, a min luangin a kizangh nambat tepteena a nei ngawl peuma vanh lei vanh zuak thei ngawl tu hi." 
Revelation13:18 Hi thu sungah ciimna zak thei tu kisamh hi. Khua ngaisut theina a nei peuma in nganhing nambat sia ii khiakna sia tuat thei tu hi, banghang ziam cile, tua nambat sia mihing khat ii min ahi hi. Tua nambat sia 666 ahi hi." 
Revelation14:1 Tuaciang ka et le Tuuno sia Zion Mual tungah a ding ka mu hi; ama taw mihing 144,000 dingkhawm uh a, ama min le a Pa min a talki tungah ki at hi." 
Revelation14:2 Tuiteautuak hawk bang le vanto nging bang ahi, vantung panin awnging khat ka za hi. Music thiamte ii tengtongh tum aw bang zongh ahi hi." 
Revelation14:3 Mihing 144,000 teng sia kumpi tokhum mai ah, nganhing li teng le upa kul le li teng taw ding uh hi; amate in lathak khat sa uh a, tua la sia amate bek ii heak thei ahi hi. Mihing nam theampo sung pan amate teng bekma a kitansa ahi uh hi." 
Revelation14:4 Amate in numeite taw omkhopna a nei ngeingawl tangval thiangthote ahi uh hi. Amate in Tuuno paina theampo zui uh hi. Amate sia a taang lai mihing nam sung panin a kitan sate hi a, Pathian le Tuuno tungah a kipia masa phitte ahi uh hi." 
Revelation14:5 Amate sia leilot thuson hi ci in kihe ngeingawl hi; amate sitbaanna nei ngawl hi. 
Revelation14:6 Tuaciangin leitung mihingte, minam sim, bee le phung sim, paunam sim le ngam sim te ii tungah a kip tawntung Lungdamna Thupha son tu a nei vantunglalang dang khat a saangna vui sungah a leang ka mu hi." 
Revelation14:7 Ama in awnging tak taw, “Pathian upat vun a, ama ii vaangletna pok vun! Banghang ziam cile ama ii thukhen tu hun hong theng zo hi. Vantung, leitung, tuipi le ciktuite a vawtpa bia vun!” ci hi." 
Revelation14:8 Vantunglalang a niina sia in a masa sia zui a, “Numeinu lal zo hi. A lian mama Babylon lal zo hi. Ama in a paktatna sapittui sia mihing theampo in nesak zo hi,” ci hi." 
Revelation14:9 Vantunglalang a thumna sia in a masate nii zomin, awnging tak taw, “A kuama po nganhing lim bia a, ama ii tepteena sia a talki tung, ahibuale a khutte tungah a saangte in," 
Revelation14:10 Pathian thangsiatna sapittui ne tu uh hi. A thin uukna hai sungah a thahatna a dim in a sunsuk sapittui dawn tu uh hi. Hi bang a ahite theampo in, vantunglalang thiangthote le Tuuno mai a meikuang le kaan sungah vawtsiat zazaanna a thuak tu uh hi." 
Revelation14:11 Amate ngim a pia meikuang khu sia, a tawntung a tawntungin zaamto hi. Nganhing le milim bia in, a min tepteena a nei theampo sia sun zong zan zong noptuamna a nga bua uh hi,” ci in au uh hi." 
Revelation14:12 Pathian thupiakte ni a, Jesus tungah a thumaan Pathian ii mihingte atu in thuak zawkna kisamh hi." 
Revelation14:13 Tua zawkciang, vantung panin awnging khat ka za a, “Hi sia at in. Tu pan kipan Topa nasepna sungah a thite sia mihing thupha ngate ahi uh hi,” ci hi. “Hi tatak hi! Amate in nasep haksatnate panin, tawlngakna nga tu hi, banghang ziam cile amate nasep phatna in amate zui tu hi,” ci in Thaa in zo hi." 
Revelation14:14 Tuaciang khua ka et le, meeikaang khat ka mu a, tua meei tungah mihing bang khat to hi; a lu tungah khamh kumpilukhu khat khu a, a khut sungah phiau hiam khat toai hi." 
Revelation14:15 Tuaciang vantunglalang a dangkhat biakinn sung pan hong pusuak a, meei tungah a to pa ii munah nging takin, “Na phiau zanghin anla in, banghang ziam cile a hun hong theng zo hi; leitung ante laak tu in min zo hi!” ci in oksan hi." 
Revelation14:16 Tuaciang meei tung a to sia in, a phiau lei ah vik a, leitung an kila hi." 
Revelation14:17 Tua zawkciang vantunglalang dang khat sia vantung biakinn sung pan hong pusuak a, phiau hiam khat zongh nei hi." 
Revelation14:18 Tua zawkciang meikuang a ukpa ahi vantunglalang dangkhat biaknatau panin hong pai hi. Ama in phiau hiam a nei vantunglalang tungah awnging tak taw au hi. “Na phiau zangh in a, leitung sapithuante panin sapitngate at in, banghang ziam cile, sapitte min zo hi!” ci hi." 
Revelation14:19 Tua ahikom vantunglalang in, a phiau sia leitung ah vik a, sapithuan panin sapitngate a at zawkciang, Pathian thin uukna ahi sapittui suukna set sungah, tua sapitngate hong lawnsuk hi." 
Revelation14:20 Sapit ngate sia khuapi pua a om, sapittui suukna set sungah kisuuk in, tuaciang tua sapittui suukna set pan chi luang a, tua chi sia metre 2 dektak thukin, kilometre 300 dong bang tuipawm bangin luang hi." 
Revelation15:1 Tuaciangin van ah a lian a lamdang lim khat ka mu hi. Tuasiat ngimna lian nam sali a toai vantunglalang sali om a, Pathian thin uukna a lak a tawpkhakna ahikom, tuate sia a khakbel ngimna liante ahi uh hi." 
Revelation15:2 Tuaciangin meikuang taw kihel limlangh tuipi bang khat ka mu hi. Nganhing, ama lim le a min nambat taw a kipia sate tungah zawna a ngate zongh ka mu hi. Amate sia Pathian piaksa tengtonghte toai in limlangh tuipi hui ah dingin" 
Revelation15:3 Pathian naseampa Moses la le Tuuno lasa uh a: “Topa Pathian vaanglianbelpa, Na sep, na vawtnate bangza in lianin lamdang ziam! Minamte ii Kumpipa awng, na lampi sia bangza in tang a, maan ziam?" 
Revelation15:4 Topa awng nang lamdang hong sa ngawlin akua ding tu ziam? Akua in na letna a thansak tu nial ngam tu ziam? Nangma bek na thiangtho hi. Minam theampo hong pai in nang hong bia tu hi, banghang ziam cile, thumaanin na ngamtatnate mihing theampo in hong mu siat uh hi,” ci hi." 
Revelation15:5 Tuasia zawkciang a sungah Pathian ii a Thiangtho Buk a om, vantung biakinn a kihong sia ka mu hi." 
Revelation15:6 Ngimna lian nam sali a nei vantunglalang salite, biakinn pan hong pusuak uh a, a thiangtho puanpaak neal, a tee ziazuate silh in, a awm uh ah khamh kawngkhaute kisawm hi." 
Revelation15:7 Tua zawkciang a nungta nganhing lite sung pan khat in vantunglalang salite tungah a tawntung a tawntungin a nungta Pathian thin uukna taw a kidim khamh khawbeam sali pia hi. 
Revelation15:8 Biakinn sia Pathian minthanna le vaangletna meikhu taw kidim hi, tuaciangin vantunglalang salite ii hong paipui uh ngimna lian nam salite a ven dongin kuama in biakinn sungah a tum thei bua uh hi." 
Revelation16:1 Vantunglalang salite tungah biakinn panin awnging tatak khat in: “Pai tavun a, Pathian thin uukna khawbeam salite leitung ah sungsuk tavun!” a ci ka za hi." 
Revelation16:2 Vantunglalang a masabel sia pai in leitung ah a khawbeam a sungsuk hi. A kiitakhuai le a bot mama meimate sia a nganhing ii kitepteena a neite le tua ii lim a bia teng tungah hong piang hi. 
Revelation16:3 Tua zawkciang vantunglalang a niina sia in a khawbeam sia tuipi tungah sungsuk hi. Tui sia mithi khat ii chisan bang suak a tuipi sungah nuntakna a neite theampo thi siat hi. 
Revelation16:4 Tua zawkciang vantunglalang a thumna sia in a khawbeam sia ngunte le ciktuite tungah sungsuk a, tuate chisan suak siat hi." 
Revelation16:5 Tuite a uk vantunglalang in, “Tu hun le a bosa hunin a om a Thiangtho Pa awng, na thukhennate tang hi!" 
Revelation16:6 Amate in Pathian ii mihingte le, kamsaangte chisan keesak ahikom amate dawn tu in chisan a pia zo hi. Amate in a kiphu a kilawm in thuak hi,” a ci ka za hi." 
Revelation16:7 Tuaciang biaknatau pan aw khat ka za a, “Topa Pathian Vaanglianbelpa awng! Na thukhennate maanin tang takpi hi,” ci hi." 
Revelation16:8 Vantunglalang a lina sia in, ni tungah a khawbeam hong sung a, tuasia ciang, nisatna meisa bang hi in, mihingte kaanghsak hi." 
Revelation16:9 Amate sia a sa mama nisa in hal uh a, tuaciang hi ngimna tungah a thunei Pathian ii min amate in haamsiat uh hi. Ahihang amate in a mawnate pan kisiik ngawlin ama ii letna zongh a pok buatu uh hi." 
Revelation16:10 Tua zawkciang vantunglalang a ngana sia in, nganhing sia ii kumpi tokhum tungah a khawbeam hong sungsuk hi. Nganhing ii ukna ngam sungah khuazing hong theng a, mihingte in na a sak hu in a leei pet uh hi," 
Revelation16:11 tuaciang vantung Pathian tungah a meima botte hu in, haamsiat uh hi. Ahihang amate ngitlona pan a kisiik tuan bua uh hi." 
Revelation16:12 Vantunglalang a lukna in, Euphrates ngun tungah a khawbeam sungsuk hi. Nguntui hong kang a nisuana sang panin hong pai tu kumpipate atu in lampi piangsak hi." 
Revelation16:13 Tua zawkciang ulol taw a kibang thaa nin thum ka mu hi. Tuate in ngulpui kam sung, nganhing kam sung le leilot kamsaangpa kam sung panin hong pusuak uh hi." 
Revelation16:14 Amate sia nalamdang laknate a vawt doaite thaa ahi uh hi. Vaanglianbelpa Pathian ii ni thupi Ni in, ngal kidona sungah a khawmtua tu in leitung kumpipate theampo kungah hi thaa thumte pai uh hi." 
Revelation16:15 “Ngai vun! Nguta khat taw kibangin kong pai tu hi! Ngual mai ah pumnguak in om a, maizum a nga ngawl natu in, mu ngawlin a puansilhte a keamcing pa sia mihing lungdam ahi hi.”" 
Revelation16:16 Tua zawkciang tua thaate in kumpite sia Hebrew kam a Armageddon a kicina munah hong paipui uh hi. 
Revelation16:17 Tuasia ciang vantunglalang a salina sia in, a khawbeam sia vui sungah hong sungsuk hi. Biakinn sung kumpi tokhum tung pan, awnging tatak khat hong nging a, “Kiman zo hi!” ci hi." 
Revelation16:18 Khua hong leng vazal a, luum vangam in vanto a, a lauhuai mama in zinliing hi. Hisia in zinliing theampo sung pan a nasiabel hi; mihingte a kibitphua pan kipan tuabang zinliing a om ngei bua hi!" 
Revelation16:19 Khuapi lian sia khen thum in hong kiphaltham uh a, tuaciangin ngam theampo a khuapite sia kilalsak siat hi. Pathian in Babylon khuapi sia phawkin a thin uuk thangsiatna sapittui sia — ama ii hai panin dawnsak hi." 
Revelation16:20 Tuikulh theampo bo in, mual theampo mangthang siat hi." 
Revelation16:21 Khat ciang kilogramme sawm nga bang a pha tu, a lian mama ngialtangte van panin mihingte tungah kia hi, tua ngimna lian sia nasia lei lawlawm ahikom, tua ngialkiate hangin mihingte in Pathian haamsiat uh hi." 
Revelation17:1 Khawbeam sali a nei vantunglalangte sali sung pan khat kei kungah hong pai in, “Hong pai ta'n, a minthang pumpi zuak nu, ngun tam mama hui ah a kisaat khuapi sia bangbangin daan kipia tu ziam, ci in kong lak tu hi." 
Revelation17:2 Leitung kumpipate in ama taw paktat khialna vawt uh a, leitung mihingte in ama ii paktatna sapittui ne in kham uh hi,” ci hi." 
Revelation17:3 Thaa in kei hong uk a, tua zawkciang vantunglalang khat in, sennealngam khat sungah hong paipui hi. Tua munah numei khat sia, a pumpi tung theampo a dim in, Pathian selnona minte a ki at nganhing san khat ii tungah a to ka mu hi; tua nganhing in lutang sali le kii sawm nei hi." 
Revelation17:4 Numei in puan sandup le puansan silh in, khamh kizepna tuatuamte, suang manphate le keptangte taw kizeam hi. Ama khut sungah a paktatna pan, a piang a kiihuai le a nin nate taw a kidim khamh hai khat toai hi." 
Revelation17:5 A talki tungah, min khat ki at a, a kiphualseal khiakna sia: “Leitung ah numei pumpi kizuak theampo le zummawk ngamtatna neite ii nu, A lian Babylon,” ahi hi." 
Revelation17:6 Tuaciang numei nu sia Pathian ii mihingte chisan le Jesus tungah a thumaan uh hu in a kithatte chisan sia zukham bangin a kham ka mu hi. Ama ka mu ciangin lamdang ka sa mama hi. 
Revelation17:7 “Banghangin lamdang sa ni ziam?” ci in vantunglalang in hong dong hi. “Numei le ama a pua lutang sali le kii sawm a nei nganhing ii a kiphualseal khiakna sia kong son tu hi. 
Revelation17:8 Nganhing sia khatvei lai nungta ngei ahihang tu in nungta nawn ngawl hi; ama sia a hawng thukpui sung panin, hong pusuak to dektak zo a, a kisusia tu in pai tu hi. Leitung bitphua ma in, nuntakna laibu sungah a min uh a kikhum ngawl, leitung ah a nungta mihing theampo in, nganhing sia a et uh ciangin, lamdang sa tu uh hi. Ama sia khatvei lai in nungta ngei hi; tu in nungta nawn ngawl hi, ahihang khatvei hong kilangh kik tu hi." 
Revelation17:9 “Hi sia taw kisai in, ciimna le teltheina nei tu kisamh hi. Lutang salite in, tua numei tona mual sali ahi hi. Amate in kumpi salite zongh ahi hi:" 
Revelation17:10 amate sung pan nga sia taak zo a, khat sia maang lai hi; tuaciang a dang khat sia hong pai ngawl lai hi; hong pai ciang zong tawmvei bek uk tu hi." 
Revelation17:11 Tuaciangin khatvei nungta ngei ahihang tu in a nungta nawn ngawl nganhing sia ma in, kumpi a liatna hi, ama sia salite sungah kihel a, a kisusia tu in pai tu hi." 
Revelation17:12 “Kii sawm na mu teng sia, ngam uk tu a kipan ngawl lai kumpi sawmte hi, ahihang tua nganhing taw nai khat sung ukna thuneina a kipia khawm tu kumpite ahi uh hi." 
Revelation17:13 Hi sawm teng in tupna kibang nei uh a, a vaangneina le a thuneina uh sia nganhing tungah pia tu uh hi." 
Revelation17:14 Amate in Tuuno sia do tu uh hi; ahihang Tuuno in ama sapsa, tealsa le a thumaan nungzuite taw kopin zothal tu uh hi, banghang ziam cile ama sia topate ii Topa, kumpite ii Kumpipa ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Revelation17:15 Vantunglalang in hi bangin hong ci si hi, “Pumpi zuak nu ii a tung a to laitak na mu tuite sia ngamte, mihingte, minamte le kampaute ahi hi." 
Revelation17:16 Kii sawm na mute le nganhing in pumpi zuaknu sia ensan tu hi; ama ii neisa theampo sia amate in laaksak tu a, a pumnguak in nusia tu hi; ama sa ne tu a, mei taw ama sia haltum tu hi." 
Revelation17:17 Banghang ziam cile Pathian in, amate ii thinsung ah ama tupnate a sep khop nop natu, Pathian kammalte a tun mateng a uk natu in, nganhing tungah amate vaangneina pia uh hi." 
Revelation17:18 “Numei na mu sia in leitung kumpite a uk khuapi lian sia ahi hi,” ci hi." 
Revelation18:1 Hi sia zawkciang vantung panin, vantunglalang a dangkhat hong tuaksuk ka mu hi. Ama in thuneina lianpi nei a, ama vaang in leitung bup taangsak hi." 
Revelation18:2 Ama in nging takin au a, “A lian Babylon khuapi cim zo hi! cim zo hi! Ama sia tu in doaite le thaa ninte in teenna in nei hi; a kiihuai le a ngaimawkhuai vacimte zongh a sungah teang hi." 
Revelation18:3 Banghang ziam cile, minamte theampo in ama ii paktat sikvilna sapittui ciik ne uh hi. Leitung kumpipate in ama taw paktat khialna vawt uh a, leitung sumvawtte in ama ii ciangtan om ngawl sikvilna hangin hau law uh hi,” ci hi." 
Revelation18:4 Tua zawkciang vantung panin aw dang khat hi bangin ka za hi; “Hong pusuak tavun, ka minamte awng! Ama kung pan hong pusuak tavun; Ama ii mawnate sungah kihel heak vun! ama ii daan thuakpui heak vun." 
Revelation18:5 Banghang ziam cile ama ii mawnate in van ban a, Pathian in ama ii ngitlonate ciamtee hi." 
Revelation18:6 Tua nu ii note tungah hong ngamtat bang tatak ma in note zongh amate tungah ngamta vun. Ama ii sepsa theampo a zaa nii in lo kik vun. Note atu hong vawt sa sia sangin a zaa nii in a ciik zaw sapittui ama neak tu in a hai sungah sung in. 
Revelation18:7 A minthanna le a nopsaknate ama le ama a kipiakna taw kizui in, ngimna le heena na thuaksak in. Banghang ziam cile ama in: ‘Hi sungah kei sia kumpinu in to khi hi! Kei sia meingong hi ngawl khi hi. Khuangai ngeingawl tu khi hi!’ a kici hi." 
Revelation18:8 Hisia hu in ni khat ni ciang ama in ngimna liante ahi — natna, heena, kial tunna, thuak tu hi. Ama thu a khen Topa Pathian sia thahat ahikom, ama sia mei taw kihal tu hi.”" 
Revelation18:9 Ama taw paktatna sungah a kihel leitung kumpite in tua khuapi kak tumna meikuangte pan meikhu a mu ciangin au in kap tu uh hi. 
Revelation18:10 Amate in ama thuakna sia a thuakpui ngam bua uh a, a khualana ah ding uh hi. Amate in, “Bangza in kiitakhuai ziam! Bangza in lauhuai ziam! Hi a lian le a hat Babylon khuapi! Nai khat sung tengin daan hiza na tawk hi,” ci uh hi." 
Revelation18:11 Kuama in amate vanhte a lei nawn bua uh a, leitung sumvawtte in, ama hu in kapin khuangai uh hi," 
Revelation18:12 kuama in a khamh, a ngunn, a suangmanpha, a keptangte; puan le puan sandupte, naaipuan, puansan; thing manpha namcin, saiha taw a kivawt thil tuatuamte, thing manham taw kivawt nate, taau, thik le marble suang taw a kivawtte, a lei nawn bua uh hi;" 
Revelation18:13 thing namtuite, sathau namtui, thil namtui myrrh le frankincense paaknamtui te; sapittui le sathau, anvui le zungtaang, khui, tuu, siphute le leangte, sila le mihing nuntaknate dong, a khawng nawn bua uh hi." 
Revelation18:14 Sumvawtte in ama tungah, “Na thangai vanh pha theampo sia bomang siat zo a, na hauna le na khiaklaak huaina theampo bo siat zo hi, tuaciang in tuate bangma hunin na nga kik ngei nawn buatu hi!” ci uh hi." 
Revelation18:15 Tua khuapi sungah sum vawt a haute in, hi ama thuaknate kiita in a thuakpui ngam bua uh a, a khualana ah a ding tu uh hi. Amate kapin a tau tu uh a," 
Revelation18:16 tuaciang, “Bangza in kiitakhuai ziam! Tua khua atu in bangza in lauhuai ziam! Ama le ama sia naaipuan taw, puan sandup taw, puansan taw kizeam in, khamh kizepna, suangmanpha le keptangte taw kizeam ngei hi!" 
Revelation18:17 Nai khat sungah a hauna theampo taan siat zo hi,” ci uh hi. Teambaw ukpa le a to mihingte, teambaw naseamte, tuipi tungah naseam in nuntak natu a thalawte le a dang theampo, a khualana ah dingin," 
Revelation18:18 ama a kaanghtum meikuangte pan meikhu sia a mu uh ciang, “Hi khuapi lian taw a kibang khuapi dang om ngeingawl hi!” ci in au uh hi." 
Revelation18:19 Amate in a lu tung uh ah leivui kithe in, au in tau in, “Bangza in kiitakhuai ziam? Tua khuapi atu in bangza in lauhuai ziam! Tua nu sia tuipi tungah a pai teambawte a neite theampo ama ii hauna taw a hausak khuapi ahi hi! Nai khat sung teng in taan siat zo hi!” ci uh hi." 
Revelation18:20 Vantung awng, ama ii lalna hu in, lungdam in! Pathian ii mihingte, sawltakte le kamsaangte awng, lungdam tavun! Banghang ziam ci le ama ii note hong vawtna hu in, Pathian in ama daan pia zo hi!" 
Revelation18:21 Tua zawkciangin vantunglalang a thahat khat in, an ngoaina suang cia a lian suang khat la in tuipi sungah deangsuk a, hi bangin ci hi. “Khuapi lian mama Babylon sia hi bangin kilawn suk tu a, a kimu kik nawn buatu hi." 
Revelation18:22 Tengtongh tumna awte le mihing lasaknate, tamngai le lemle tumnate sia nang sungah a kiza ngei nawn buatu hi! Nuntak zonna naseamte nang sungah kuama a kimu nawn buatu hi; an ngoaina suang nging zongh nang sungah a kiza nawn buatu hi!" 
Revelation18:23 Meiinn taang zongh nang sungah a kimu nawn buatu hi; mo le zi neipa awte zongh nang sungah kiza nawn ngawl tu hi. Na sum vawtte sia leitung theampo ah a hatbelte hi a, na ngual theamna ai taw leitung mihingte theampo na theam siat hi!”" 
Revelation18:24 Kamsaangte le Pathian mite ii chisan le leitung ah a kithatlum theampo ii chisan sia, tua khuapi sungah kimu ahikom Babylon khuapi sia daan kipia hi." 
Revelation19:1 Hisia zawkciangin, vantung a mihonte auna bang khat ka za hi. “Pathian pok vun! Ngupna, minthanna, vaangletna Pathian neisa ahi hi!" 
Revelation19:2 Ama ii thukhennate sia maanin tang hi! Ama in a paktatna taw leitung a lalsak pumpi zuaknu sia nilkeak zo hi. Pathian in ama daan pia hi, banghang ziam cile ama in Pathian naseamte thatlum hi,” ci uh hi." 
Revelation19:3 Tuaciangin amate au kik a, “Pathian pok vun! Khuapi a kaanghtumsak meikuang pan meikhu in a tawntung a tawntungin kaato hi!” ci hi." 
Revelation19:4 Upa kul le li le nganhing nungta li teng sia bokin kumpi tokhum tungah a to Pathian bia uh hi. Amate in, “Amen! Pathian Pok vun!” ci uh hi." 
Revelation19:5 Tua zawkciang, kumpi tokhum panin aw khat hong nging a, “Pathian pok vun, a naseam theampo le ama a thasia mihing a lian a no theampo in pok vun!” ci hi." 
Revelation19:6 Tuaciangin tuiteau nging bang le vanto nging bang mihonpi auna aw bang khat ka za hi. Tua awte in, “Topa pok vun! Banghang ziam cile Topa, eite ii Vaanglianbel Pathian sia Kumpi ahi hi!" 
Revelation19:7 Eite lawpin lungdam tawng; ama ii letna pok tawng! Banghang ziam cile Tuuno mopoai hun hong theng zo a, ama ii mo tu sia in ama le ama kipuua sa in om zo hi." 
Revelation19:8 Ama ii silh tu in a thiang, a tee vazia puante kipia zo hi,” ci uh hi. (A puanneal in Pathian ii mihingte ii na pha a septe ahi hi.)" 
Revelation19:9 Tuaciangin vantunglalang in kei tungah, “Hi thu at in: Tuuno mopoai sungah a kisamte sia mihing lungdamte ahi hi,” hong ci hi. Tuaciang vantunglalang in, “Hite sia Pathian ii a son tatak kammalte ahi hi,” hong ci thua lai hi." 
Revelation19:10 A peang ah ama bia tu in ka bok hi, ahihang, ama in, “Hong bia heak in! Keima in, Jesus ii hong pualaak thumaan thutak a kholet nangma le na suapuite theampo taw naseam khawm khat ka hi hi. Pathian bia in!” hong ci hi. Banghang ziam cile Jesus ii hong pualaak thumaan thutakin kamsaangte thinsung a hil sia ahi hi." 
Revelation19:11 Tuaciang vantung a kihongin ka mu a, tua ii sungah siphu kaang khat om hi. A tung to pa sia Thumaan Thutang kici hi; ama in khaikim takin thukhen a, a ngalte do hi." 
Revelation19:12 Ama mittangte sia meikuang bang hi a, a lu tungah kumpilukhu tam mama khu hi. Ama simngawl kuama dang ii a heak ngawl min khat ama tungah ki at hi." 
Revelation19:13 Ama silh puantual sia in chisan taw kidim hi. Ama min sia “Pathian Kammal” ahi hi. 
Revelation19:14 Vantung ngalkap honte in puankaang neal silh a, siphu kaang tungah to in ama zui uh hi." 
Revelation19:15 Ama kam sung panin a hiam namsau khat pusuak a tua taw ngam theampo a zothal tu hi. Amate tungah ama in thik ciangkhut taw uk tu a, vaanglianbelpa Pathian thin uukna ahi sapittui sukna sungah sapittuite siikcil tu hi." 
Revelation19:16 A puantual tung le a pheizang tungah, “kumpite ii Kumpipa, topate ii Topa,” ci in a min ki at hi." 
Revelation19:17 Tua zawkciang vantunglalang khat sia ni tungah a ding ka mu hi. Ama in vui sungah a leang vacimte munah awnging tatak taw, “Pathian poaipi sungah pai tu in hong kikhawmtua tavun!" 
Revelation19:18 Kumpipate, ngalkap maangte, ngalkapte ii sa, siphute le a tung a tote ii sa, mihing theampo, sila le sila ngawlte, a lian a note ii sa ne tu in, hong pai tavun!” ci hi." 
Revelation19:19 Tua zawkciang nganhing le leitung kumpipate le a ngalkap honte in siphu tung a to pa le a ngalkap honte sim tu in hong kingawmtua uh hi. 
Revelation19:20 Nganhing le tua nganhing omna mai ah, nalamdang lakna a vawt leilot kamsaangpa kiman khawm hi. (Nganhing tepteena a neite le, nganhing milim a biate sia, nalamdang laknate taw ama in theam zo hi) Nganhing le leilot kamsaangpa sia, kaan meikuang meili sungah a hingtang in kivawk khawm hi." 
Revelation19:21 A ngalkaphonpite sia siphu tung a to pa kam sung pan hong pusuak namsau taw kithatlum uh hi; tuaciang vacim theampo in a sa a du zaza in ne uh hi. 
Revelation20:1 Tua zawkciang vantung panin vantunglalang khat hong tuaksuk ka mu a, a khut sungah a hawng thukpui kikhana tawtang le thikkhau ngit khat toai hi." 
Revelation20:2 Ama in taangh ngulpui — Doaimangpa kici Satan — sia man a, kum tulkhat sung thikkhau taw khit hi." 
Revelation20:3 Vantunglalang in ama sia a hawng thukpui sungah lawnsuk a, tawkalh in, kum tulkhat a cin mateng, minam tuatuamte a theam thei ngawl natu in a kongkha ah tepteena tuum hi. Tua zawkciang ama sia tawmvei sung kitha kik tu hi." 
Revelation20:4 Tua zawkciang kumpi tokhumte ka mu a, a tungah a tote in thu a khen thei natu in vaangneina kipia hi. Pathian kammalte le Jesus ii pualaak thumaan thutak te a thansak uh hu a, a kithatte ii thaate zongh ka mu hi. Amate in nganhing le a lim a bia bua uh hi, tua bek dom ngawlin, a talki tungah ahibuale a khutte tung zongh ah nganhing tepteena a nei bua uh hi. Amate in hong nungta kikin Christ taw kum tulkhat kumpipate bangin a uk uh hi." 
Revelation20:5 (Kum tulkhat a cin mateng in, a thisa a taanglaite kuama a nungta kik a om bua uh hi.) Hi a thite thawsak kikna sia a masabel ahi hi." 
Revelation20:6 Hi a thite thawsakna masa sungah a kihelte sia nasia takin thupha saangte hi uh a, a lungdamte ahi hi. Niivei thina in amate tungah vaangneina a nei nawn bua hi; amate sia Pathian le Christ ii thiampite hi tu uh a, ama taw kum tulkhat maangkhawm tu uh hi." 
Revelation20:7 Kum tulkhat a bo zawkciang, Satan sia a thong pan kitha kik tu a," 
Revelation20:8 leitung mun theampo ah a kithethaang Gog le Magog minamte theam tu in pai tu hi. Satan in tuate theampo sia ngalsim tu in hong kaikhawm tu a, tuipivaal ah senvuite za in tam tu uh hi." 
Revelation20:9 Amate leitung bup ah kizelin, Pathian ii mihingte ii phual le a it khuapi a kiim uum uh hi. Ahihang vantung panin, meikuang hong taaksuk a, amate lalsak hi." 
Revelation20:10 Tua zawkciang amate a theam Doaimangpa sia nganhing le leilot kamsaangpa kivawkna meili le kaan sungah kivawk hi; tuaciangin amate sia sun taw zan taw a tawntung a tawntung ngim kipia tu hi. 
Revelation20:11 Tuaciangin a lian kumpi tokhum kaang khat le a tungah a to pa ka mu hi. Leitung le vantung sia ama omna panin tai uh a, mu mun om nawn ngawl hi." 
Revelation20:12 Tuaciangin a thite a lian le a no a kibangin kumpi tokhum mai ah a ding ka mu hi. Laibute kihong a, tua zawkciang a nungtate tepteena laibu dang khat zongh kihong hi. A thite sia tua laibu sungah amate ngamtatna a kitepteena bangin thu kikhen hi." 
Revelation20:13 Tua zawkciang tuipi in ama sungah a thite aap hi. Thina le mithi khua in amate ii a kep a thite aap uh hi. Tuaciang, a vekpi in a sepna uh bangin thu kikhen hi." 
Revelation20:14 Tua zawkciang thina le mithi khua sia zongh meili sungah kisep hi. (Hi meili in niivei thina ahi hi.) 
Revelation20:15 A nungtate min khumna laibu sungah a min a om ngawl peuma meili sungah kilawn hi. 
Revelation21:1 Tuaciangin vanthak le leithak khat ka mu hi. Vantung masa sia le leitung masa sia bomang zo a, tuipi zongh bo hi." 
Revelation21:2 Mothak khat a pasal tu taw kimu tu in a kipua bangin vantung Pathian kung panin Khuapi Thiangtho ahi Jerusalem khuathak hong tuaksuk sia ka mu hi. 
Revelation21:3 Kumpi tokhum pan a ngingin a pau khat ka za hi: “Tu in Pathian omna inn sia mihingte taw omkhawm zo hi! Ama in amate taw teang khawm tu a, ama mihingte a hi tu hi. Pathian mama in amate taw omkhawm tu a, ama in amate ii Pathian ahi tu hi." 
Revelation21:4 Amate mittang sung pan, thitui theampo nawlsak tu hi. Thina, heena, kaana le natnate a om nawn buatu hi. A luisa na theampo bomang zo hi,” ci hi." 
Revelation21:5 Tuaciangin kumpi tokhum tungah a to sia in, “Tu in na theampo a thak in ka vawt hi!” a ci zawkciang kei tungah, “Hi kammalte sia maan a muan thamman ahikom, lai taw at in” hong ci si hi." 
Revelation21:6 Tuaciang ama in, “Kiman zo hi! Kei sia a kipatna le a tawpna ahi a masabel le a khakbel ka hi hi. A dangko theampo tungah man piak ngawlin nuntakna ciktui a neak thei natu thu ka pia tu hi." 
Revelation21:7 Zawna a nga pawpo kei tung pan a saan tu thu in: Kei sia amate ii Pathian ka hi tu a, ama sia Keima tapa ahi tu hi." 
Revelation21:8 Ahihang a lauthauh, ngual leeheakte, zummawk seamte le ngual thatte, a paktatte, bum le ai toaite, milim biate, le a leilot thei theampo — a om natu sia niivei thina ahi meili le kaan sia ahi hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation21:9 Ngimna lian khawbeam sali a nei vantunglalang salite sung pan, khat in kei kungah hong pai in, “Hong pai ta'n, mo ahi Tuuno zi kong lak tu hi,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation21:10 Thaa in kei hong uk a, vantunglalang in, mualsaang mama khat ii dawn ah hong paipui hi. Ama in Vantung Pathian kung pan a hong paisuk Khuapi Thiangtho ahi Jerusalem khua hong lak a," 
Revelation21:11 tua khuapi sia Pathian minthanna taw tee ziikzeak a, jasper suangmanpha bangin taangin, crystal suang bangin thiang sitset hi." 
Revelation21:12 Tua khuapi luphung sia saa in saang mama a, kongpi sawm le nii om in vantunglalangte sawm le nii in cing hi. Kongpite tungah Israel minam sawm le niite min ki at hi." 
Revelation21:13 A pangh khat simin kongpi thum veu om hi: thum sia nisuana sangah, thum sia thang sangah, thum sia saksang ah, thum sia nitumna sangah om hi." 
Revelation21:14 Khuapi luphungte sia phungkawng tawdap sawm le nii tungah kiciangto a, tuate ii tungah Tuuno sawltak sawm le niite min ki at hi." 
Revelation21:15 Kei hong paupui vantunglalang sia in, Khuapi kongpite le a luphungte a tee natu in khamh piciang khat nei hi." 
Revelation21:16 Khuapi sia king li nei a, a dung le a vai kikim hi. Vantunglalang in khuapi sia a teena piciang taw tee a: kilometre 2,400 pha in, a dung, a vai le a saanna kikim linlian hi." 
Revelation21:17 Vantunglalang in ama zak piciang taw a luphung zongh tee a, metre 60 saang hi." 
Revelation21:18 Khuapi luphung sia jasper suangmanpha taw kiciangin, a khuapi mama sia khamh ciitak taw a kivawt hi a, limlangh bangin a thiang sitset hi." 
Revelation21:19 Khuapi luphung tawdapte sia suangmanpha namcin taw kivawt hi. A tawdap masa phit sia jasper hi a, a niina sia sapphire hi, a thumna sia agate a cite hi a, a lina sia emerald hi," 
Revelation21:20 a ngana sia onyx hi a, a lukna sia carnelian hi, a salina sia yellow quartz hi a, a liatna sia beryl hi, a kuana sia topaz hi a, a sawmna sia chalcedony hi, a sawm le khatna sia turquoise hi a, a sawm le niina sia amethyst ahi hi." 
Revelation21:21 A kongpi sawm le niite sia keptang sawm le nii hi a; kongpi khat simin keptang khat taw kivawt hi. Khuapi lampite sia khamh ciitak hi a, maan bangin kimu let thei hi." 
Revelation21:22 Topa Vaanglianbelpa Pathian le a Tuuno sia khuapi ii biakinn hi zo ahikom, khuapi sungah biakinn ka mu bua hi." 
Revelation21:23 Tuuno sia khuapi ii meiinn hi zo a, Pathian minthanna vaang sia, ama tungah taang zo ahikom, tua khuapi in nitaang le thataang a kisamh bua hi." 
Revelation21:24 Tua khuavak taang sungah leitung mihingte lampai tu uh a, leitung kumpite in khuapi sungah a nei a lamhte hong paipui tu uh hi." 
Revelation21:25 Zan om ngawl tu ahikom, kongpite kikhakcip ngeingawl tu a, ni bupin kihong suak tu hi." 
Revelation21:26 Minamte letna le hauna sia tua khuapi sungah hong kipaipui tu hi. 
Revelation21:27 Ahihang a thiangtho ngawl, a maizumhuai a ngamtate le leilot theite kuama tua khuapi sungah a tum thei buatu uh hi. Tuuno nuntakna laibu sungah a min a kikhumte bek tua khuapi sungah tum thei tu uh hi." 
Revelation22:1 Vantunglalang in, Pathian le Tuuno kumpi tokhum kung pan hong luang suk, crystal suang bangin a tee vakil nuntakna nguntui sia hong lak a," 
Revelation22:2 khuapi sung lampi laizang ah luangsuk hi. Ngun ii a lang le lang ah nuntakna thingkung khat veve po a, tua thingkung sia, tha simin khatvei veu kum khat in sawm le niivei nga hi. Tuaciangin a thingteete sia minamte ciidamsak natu ahi hi." 
Revelation22:3 Pathian haamsiatna nuai ah a om peuma, khuapi sungah kuama a kimu buatu hi. Pathian le Tuuno ii kumpi tokhum sia khuapi sungah om tu a, a naseamte in ama bia tu uh hi." 
Revelation22:4 Amate in ama ii maitang mu tu a, amate talki tungah a min ki at tu hi." 
Revelation22:5 Zan a om nawn buatu a, amate in meiinn le nitaang kisamh nawn ngawl tu uh hi, banghang ziam cile Topa Pathian sia amate khuavak hi tu a, amate in a tawntung a tawntungin ukna nei kumpite bangin a maang tu uh hi." 
Revelation22:6 Tua zawkciang vantunglalang in, kei tungah, “Hi kammalte sia maan a, muan taak hi. Kamsaangte tungah a Thaa a pia Topa Pathian in hai ngawlin hong piang tu thute, a naseamte tungah lak tu in a vantunglalang sawl zo hi.”" 
Revelation22:7 “Ngai vun! Kei, hong pai pal tu khi hi. Hi laibu sungah sonkholnate a zuite in mihing hamphate ahi uh hi,” Jesus in ci hi." 
Revelation22:8 Keima John in hite theampo ka za zo a, ka mu zo hi. Tuaciang ka zaak zawkciang le ka mu zawkciangin, vantunglalang peang ah ka bok a, hi nate hong lak vantunglalang sia bia tu in ka kipan hi." 
Revelation22:8 Keima John in hite theampo ka za zo a, ka mu zo hi. Tuaciang ka zaak zawkciang le ka mu zawkciangin, vantunglalang peang ah ka bok a, hi nate hong lak vantunglalang sia bia tu in ka kipan hi." 
Revelation22:9 Ahihang ama in kei tungah, “Kei hong bia heak in! Keima in nangma le na suapuite ahi kamsaangte le hi laibu sungah a om thute a zuite theampo taw naseam khawm khat ka hi hi. Pathian bia in!” hong ci hi." 
Revelation22:10 Tuaciang vantunglalang in kei kungah, “Hi laibu sung a ki at thute a tun tu hong nai zo ahikom, iimcip heak in” hong ci hi." 
Revelation22:11 A ngilo sia in a ngitlo bangin paisuak tahen a, a kiihuai sia in a kiihuai bangin zom suak tahen; a kuama po mihing phate in phatna vawt suak tahen a, a thiangthote in a thiangtho in om suak tahen,” hong ci hi." 
Revelation22:12 Jesus in, “Ngai in! Kong pai pal tu hi. Mihing sim tungah ama ii sepna bangin, ka piak tu thamante kong keng tu hi." 
Revelation22:13 Kei sia a masabel le a khakbel, a kipatna le a tawpna ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Revelation22:14 Nuntakna thingnga neak thei natu le khuapi sungah kongkha kaantan in pai thei natu in a puantual a sawp thiangte in mihing hamphate ahi uh hi. 
Revelation22:15 Ahihang lampialte, bum le ai toaite, a paktatte, mihing thatte, milim biate, leilot kampauna le ngamtatna taw ngualtheam theite khuapi puasia ah om tu uh hi." 
Revelation22:16 “Keima Jesus in, hi thute pawlpi sung note tungah a thangsak tu in ka vantunglalang kong paisak zo hi. Kei sia David ii zung le a suan ka hi hi; keima in nikonghong aksi taang sia ka hi hi,” ci hi." 
Revelation22:17 Thaa le a Mothak in, “Hong pai ta'n!” hong ci hi. A zate theampo zongh in, “Hong pai ta'n!” ci si hen. A dangko theampo hong pai tavun; nuntakna tui a dei peuma in, tua nuntakna tui letsong in saang tavun." 
Revelation22:18 Keima John in, hi kamsaanna laibu sungah a kikhumte a sim peuma tungah kidop natu thu ka pia hi: Khat pawpo in a belap le, Pathian in hi thubu sungah a kison ama ii daante tungah ngimnate belap thua tu hi." 
Revelation22:18 Keima John in, hi kamsaanna laibu sungah a kikhumte a sim peuma tungah kidop natu thu ka pia hi: Khat pawpo in a belap le, Pathian in hi thubu sungah a kison ama ii daante tungah ngimnate belap thua tu hi." 
Revelation22:19 Tuaciang khat pawpo in hi laibu sungah kamsaanna kammalte a dok le, Pathian in ama sia hi laibu sungah a kison nuntakna thingkung nga le Khuapi Thiangtho pan a nga tu tel teng taansak tu hi." 
Revelation22:20 Hi thute theampo tetti a pang pa in, “Hi hi, maan hi! Kong pai pal tu hi!” ci hi. Na ci bangma hi tahen. Topa Jesus awng, hong pai ta'n!"
